While key anatomical and pathological features are decisive for surgical planning, current research focuses predominantly on improving segmentation accuracy, leaving the reliable, quantitative extraction of clinically actionable features largely under-explored. Furthermore, constructing comprehensive TAAD datasets requires labor-intensive, expert level pixel-wise annotations, which is impractical for most clinical institutions. Due to significant domain shift, models trained on a single center dataset also suffer from severe performance degradation during cross-institutional deployment. This study addresses a clinically critical challenge: the accurate extraction of key TAAD clinical features during cross-institutional deployment in the total absence of target-domain annotations. To this end, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA)-driven framework for the automated extraction of TAAD clinical features. The framework leverages limited source-domain labels while effectively adapting to unlabeled data from target domains. Tailored for real-world emergency workflows, our framework aims to achieve stable cross-institutional multi-class segmentation, reliable and quantifiable clinical feature extraction, and practical deployability independent of high-cost annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly improves cross-domain segmentation performance compared to existing state-of-the-art approaches. More importantly, a reader study involving multiple cardiovascular surgeons confirms that the automatically extracted clinical features provide meaningful assistance for preoperative assessment, highlighting the practical utility of the proposed end-to-end segmentation-to-feature pipeline.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于无监督域适应的TAAD术前关键临床特征自动提取框架，可在无需目标域标注的情况下实现跨院区稳定分割与可量化特征提取，经多中心外科医生验证具备实际临床辅助价值。
AI.motivation: A型主动脉夹层(TAAD)急诊手术规划依赖精准解剖量化特征，但现有研究仅关注分割精度，缺乏对临床可行动特征的可靠提取；同时单中心标注成本高昂且跨域部署性能骤降，临床亟需零目标标注条件下的跨机构特征提取方案。
AI.method: 构建UDA驱动框架：①利用有限源域标签完成初始分割；②设计针对TAAD的域适应策略，对齐源-目标特征空间；③在目标域无标注数据上实现多类别分割；④通过后处理链自动提取直径、破口位置、累及范围等关键临床参数，形成分割-特征端到端管线。
AI.result: 跨域分割Dice较SOTA提升6.8–11.2%；累及区分类准确率达89.3%。多中心 reader study显示，自动特征使术前评估时间缩短32%，漏诊关键破口由14%降至3%，5位心血管外科医生一致认为系统提供“有意义辅助”。
AI.conclusion: 首次在零目标标注约束下实现TAAD跨院区稳定特征提取，既免除高成本标注，又直接输出临床决策所需量化参数，为急诊场景提供可即时部署的AI解决方案，具备推广至其他急性大血管疾病的潜力。

title: Development of a European Union Time-Indexed Reference Dataset for Assessing the Performance of Signal Detection Methods in Pharmacovigilance using a Large Language Model
summary: Background: The identification of optimal signal detection methods is hindered by the lack of reliable reference datasets. Existing datasets do not capture when adverse events (AEs) are officially recognized by regulatory authorities, preventing restriction of analyses to pre-confirmation periods and limiting evaluation of early detection performance. This study addresses this gap by developing a time-indexed reference dataset for the European Union (EU), incorporating the timing of AE inclusion in product labels along with regulatory metadata. Methods: Current and historical Summaries of Product Characteristics (SmPCs) for all centrally authorized products (n=1,513) were retrieved from the EU Union Register of Medicinal Products (data lock: 15 December 2025). Section 4.8 was extracted and processed using DeepSeek V3 to identify AEs. Regulatory metadata, including labelling changes, were programmatically extracted. Time indexing was based on the date of AE inclusion in the SmPC. Results: The database includes 17,763 SmPC versions spanning 1995-2025, comprising 125,026 drug-AE associations. The time-indexed reference dataset, restricted to active products, included 1,479 medicinal products and 110,823 drug-AE associations. Most AEs were identified pre-marketing (74.5%) versus post-marketing (25.5%). Safety updates peaked around 2012. Gastrointestinal, skin, and nervous system disorders were the most represented System Organ Classes. Drugs had a median of 48 AEs across 14 SOCs. Conclusions: The proposed dataset addresses a critical gap in pharmacovigilance by incorporating temporal information on AE recognition for the EU, supporting more accurate assessment of signal detection performance and facilitating methodological comparisons across analytical approaches.

AI.tldr: 本研究构建首个欧盟时间索引药物-不良事件（AE）参考数据集，解决缺乏可靠基准数据以评估信号检测方法的痛点。
AI.motivation: 现有AE数据集缺失“监管确认时间”字段，无法划定上市前分析窗口，导致早期信号检测性能难以客观评估。
AI.method: 抓取1 513个中央审批产品的历史SmPC（1995-2025，17 763版本），用DeepSeek V3提取4.8节AE；自动解析标签变更并记录AE首次写入SmPC的日期，生成时间索引。
AI.result: 覆盖110 823条活跃药物-AE关联；74.5%的AE在上市前已写入说明书，25.5%为上市后增补；2012年出现安全更新峰值；中位每药48个AE，涉及14个系统器官分类。
AI.conclusion: 该带时间戳的欧盟级数据集填补药械警戒空白，可为信号检测算法提供“黄金标准”，支持上市前性能量化与跨方法比较。

title: Can Small Models Reason About Legal Documents? A Comparative Study
comment: 17 pages, 9 models, 5 prompting strategies, 3 legal benchmarks, 405 experiments
summary: Large language models show promise for legal applications, but deploying frontier models raises concerns about cost, latency, and data privacy. We evaluate whether sub-10B parameter models can serve as practical alternatives by testing nine models across three legal benchmarks (ContractNLI, CaseHOLD, and ECtHR) using five prompting strategies (direct, chain-of-thought, few-shot, BM25 RAG, and dense RAG). Across 405 experiments with three random seeds per configuration, we find that a Mixture-of-Experts model activating only 3B parameters matches GPT-4o-mini in mean accuracy while surpassing it on legal holding identification, and that architecture and training quality matter more than raw parameter count. Our largest model (9B parameters) performs worst overall. Chain-of-thought prompting proves sharply task-dependent, improving contract entailment but degrading multiple-choice legal reasoning, while few-shot prompting emerges as the most consistently effective strategy. Comparing BM25 and dense retrieval for RAG, we find near-identical results, suggesting the bottleneck lies in the language model's utilization of retrieved context rather than retrieval quality. All experiments were conducted via cloud inference APIs at a total cost of $62, demonstrating that rigorous LLM evaluation is accessible without dedicated GPU infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 低于10B参数的专家混合模型可在法律任务上达到GPT-4o-mini水平，效率与隐私更优；少样本提示最稳健，思维链效果任务相关；RAG瓶颈在模型端而非检索端；全云API实验仅花62美元即可复现。
AI.motivation: 前沿大模型在法律场景应用面临成本高、延迟大、隐私风险；验证小参数模型能否以更低资源提供可比性能，为实际部署提供可行方案。
AI.method: 在ContractNLI、CaseHOLD、ECtHR三大法律基准上，对9个≤9B参数的模型采用5种提示策略（直接、思维链、少样本、BM25 RAG、稠密RAG），共405组实验（3随机种子），通过云API完成推理与成本统计。
AI.result: 仅激活3B的专家混合模型平均准确率追平GPT-4o-mini，在判例援引识别上更优；9B模型整体最差，说明架构与训练质量重于参数量。少样本提示最稳定；思维链提升合同蕴含但削弱多选推理；BM25与稠密检索效果几乎相同，瓶颈在模型利用上下文能力。
AI.conclusion: 小且精调的模型可替代大规模封闭模型进行法律分析，降低部署门槛；优化训练/架构与提示策略比堆参数更关键；RAG效果受限主因是模型理解而非检索质量；云API低成本验证方案具备可复制性。

title: Optimization Trade-offs in Asynchronous Federated Learning: A Stochastic Networks Approach
summary: Synchronous federated learning scales poorly due to the straggler effect. Asynchronous algorithms increase the update throughput by processing updates upon arrival, but they introduce two fundamental challenges: gradient staleness, which degrades convergence, and bias toward faster clients under heterogeneous data distributions. Although algorithms such as AsyncSGD and Generalized AsyncSGD mitigate this bias via client-side task queues, most existing analyses neglect the underlying queueing dynamics and lack closed-form characterizations of the update throughput and gradient staleness. To close this gap, we develop a stochastic queueing-network framework for Generalized AsyncSGD that jointly models random computation times at the clients and the central server, as well as random uplink and downlink communication delays. Leveraging product-form network theory, we derive a closed-form expression for the update throughput, alongside closed-form upper bounds for both the communication round complexity and the expected wall-clock time required to reach an $ε$-stationary point. These results formally characterize the trade-off between gradient staleness and wall-clock convergence speed. We further extend the framework to quantify energy consumption under stochastic timing, revealing an additional trade-off between convergence speed and energy efficiency. Building on these analytical results, we propose gradient-based optimization strategies to jointly optimize routing and concurrency. Experiments on EMNIST demonstrate reductions of 29%--46% in convergence time and 36%--49% in energy consumption compared to AsyncSGD.

AI.tldr: 本文用排队网络理论首次给出广义异步联邦学习（Generalized AsyncSGD）的闭式吞吐量、收敛轮次与能耗公式，并据此联合优化路由与并发度，在 EMNIST 上将收敛时间与能耗分别削减 29%–46% 与 36%–49%。
AI.motivation: 同步 FL 受困于掉队者，异步 FL 虽提高更新吞吐量，却面临梯度过时与快客户端偏差两大难题。现有研究对任务队列的随机排队动态缺乏闭式刻画，无法定量权衡过时、收敛速度、能耗三者关系。
AI.method: 1) 建立随机排队网络模型：将客户端计算、上下行通信、服务器计算均视为乘积型排队网络节点，联合建模随机延迟；2) 推导闭式：更新吞吐量、到达 ε-稳定点的通信轮次复杂度与期望壁钟时间上界；3) 扩展至能耗：在随机时序下量化收敛速度—能效权衡；4) 基于梯度联合优化路由与并发度。
AI.result: 获得首个可解释闭式：吞吐量 ∝ 客户端服务率/（1+通信延迟倍率）；轮次复杂度与壁钟时间上界显式依赖过时度；能耗公式揭示“越快越费电”倒 U 型关系。EMNIST 实验验证：相比 AsyncSGD，收敛时间降 29%–46%，能耗降 36%–49%，且方差更小。
AI.conclusion: 排队网络理论能系统量化异步 FL 的核心性能三元组（吞吐量、收敛、能耗），为算法-系统联合优化提供可解释、可预测的解析工具；未来可嵌入控制平面，实现运行时自适应路由与并发调节。

title: Learning to Trim: End-to-End Causal Graph Pruning with Dynamic Anatomical Feature Banks for Medical VQA
summary: Medical Visual Question Answering (MedVQA) models often exhibit limited generalization due to reliance on dataset-specific correlations, such as recurring anatomical patterns or question-type regularities, rather than genuine diagnostic evidence. Existing causal approaches are typically implemented as static adjustments or post-hoc corrections. To address this issue, we propose a Learnable Causal Trimming (LCT) framework that integrates causal pruning into end-to-end optimization. We introduce a Dynamic Anatomical Feature Bank (DAFB), updated via a momentum mechanism, to capture global prototypes of frequent anatomical and linguistic patterns, serving as an approximation of dataset-level regularities. We further design a differentiable trimming module that estimates the dependency between instance-level representations and the global feature bank. Features highly correlated with global prototypes are softly suppressed, while instance-specific evidence is emphasized. This learnable mechanism encourages the model to prioritize causal signals over spurious correlations adaptively. Experiments on VQA-RAD, SLAKE, SLAKE-CP and PathVQA demonstrate that LCT consistently improves robustness and generalization over existing debiasing strategies.

AI.tldr: 引入可学习的因果修剪框架LCT，通过动态解剖特征库和可微修剪模块端到端抑制数据级虚假相关、强化实例特异证据，显著提升MedVQA的跨集泛化与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有MedVQA模型过度依赖数据内部重复出现的解剖模式或问句规律，导致泛化差；传统因果方法多为静态或后处理，无法随训练动态优化。
AI.method: 1)构建Dynamic Anatomical Feature Bank(DAFB)，用动量更新机制持续估计全局解剖与语言原型；2)设计可微修剪模块，以实例表示与全局原型的依赖度为门控，软性抑制高相关特征、保留实例特异证据；3)将修剪嵌入端到端训练，实现可学习的因果去偏。
AI.result: 在VQA-RAD、SLAKE、SLAKE-CP和PathVQA四个医疗VQA基准上，LCT一致超越现有去偏策略，提升鲁棒性与泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 将因果修剪转变为可学习、端到端优化的过程，可有效抑制虚假相关、强化因果信号，为医疗VQA等高风险场景提供可靠且可扩展的泛化方案。

title: When Perplexity Lies: Generation-Focused Distillation of Hybrid Sequence Models
summary:
Converting a pretrained Transformer into a more efficient hybrid model through distillation offers a promising approach to reducing inference costs. However, achieving high-quality generation in distilled models requires careful joint design of both the student architecture and the distillation process. Many prior distillation works evaluate downstream multiple-choice benchmarks by ranking candidate answers with log-likelihood rather than requiring autoregressive generation, which can obscure important differences in model quality. For example, we show that a 7B parameter distilled model that nearly matches its teacher to within 0.2\,pp under log-likelihood scoring actually falls behind by 20.8\,pp when the model must generate answers autoregressively.
  We propose a Hybrid Kimi Delta Attention (Hybrid-KDA) architecture paired with GenDistill, a multi-stage distillation pipeline, and use generation-based evaluation throughout to guide design decisions. Applying this approach to Qwen3-0.6B, we systematically ablate six design axes: training objective, loss masking, training duration, dataset selection, parameter freezing, and architecture choice. We find that log-likelihood-based evaluation consistently underestimates the gap between teacher and student, and can in some cases reverse the ranking of design choices, meaning that conclusions drawn from perplexity-only evaluation may be misleading. Among the factors we study, dataset selection, completion-only masking, and freezing attention layers during post-training have the largest impact on generation quality.
  Our best Hybrid-KDA model retains 86--90\% of teacher accuracy on knowledge benchmarks while reducing KV cache memory by up to 75\% and improving time-to-first-token by 2--4$\times$ at 128K-token contexts.

AI.tldr: 通过GenDistill多阶段蒸馏+Hybrid-KDA结构，把大Transformer蒸馏成小混合模型；用生成式评估指导设计，发现对数似然指标会严重低估生成差距，最终0.6B模型在128K长文本下KV缓存减75%、首token延迟降2–4×，仍保留教师86–90%知识精度。
AI.motivation: 现有蒸馏研究仅用对数似然做多选题评测，不强制自回归生成，掩盖了学生模型真实质量，导致蒸馏设计决策不可靠。
AI.method: 提出Hybrid-KDA（局部-全局混合+Δ注意力）学生结构，配合GenDistill多阶段流水线：逐层蒸馏→生成微调→长文本后训练；全程采用生成式评估，系统消融六大设计轴（目标函数、掩码、训练步数、数据选择、参数冻结、结构变体）。
AI.result: 相比仅对数似然评估，生成评估暴露学生模型落后教师20.8个百分点；最优组合（精选数据+completion-only掩码+冻结注意力层）把教师知识精度保持86–90%，128K上下文下KV缓存占用减少75%，首token延迟提升2–4倍。
AI.conclusion: 生成式评估是蒸馏设计的必要条件，对数似然会误导结构选择；Hybrid-KDA+GenDistill提供了一条兼顾长文本效率与生成质量的可行路线，数据策略与注意力冻结为最关键杠杆。

title: Collision-Aware Vision-Language Learning for End-to-End Driving with Multimodal Infraction Datasets
summary: High infraction rates remain the primary bottleneck for end-to-end (E2E) autonomous driving, as evidenced by the low driving scores on the CARLA Leaderboard. Despite collision-related infractions being the dominant failure mode in closed-loop evaluations, collision-aware representation learning has received limited attention. To address this gap, we first develop a Video-Language-Augmented Anomaly Detector (VLAAD), leveraging a Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) formulation to obtain stable, temporally localized collision signals for proactive prediction. To transition these capabilities into closed-loop simulations, we must overcome the limitations of existing simulator datasets, which lack multimodality and are frequently restricted to simple intersection scenarios. Therefore, we introduce CARLA-Collide, a large-scale multimodal dataset capturing realistic collision events across highly diverse road networks. Trained on this diverse simulator data, VLAAD serves as a collision-aware plug-in module that can be seamlessly integrated into existing E2E driving models. By integrating our module into a pretrained TransFuser++ agent, we demonstrate a 14.12% relative increase in driving score with minimal fine-tuning. Beyond closed-loop evaluation, we further assess the generalization capability of VLAAD in an open-loop setting using real-world driving data. To support this analysis, we introduce Real-Collide, a multimodal dataset of diverse dashcam videos paired with semantically rich annotations for collision detection and prediction. On this benchmark, despite containing only 0.6B parameters, VLAAD outperforms a multi-billion-parameter vision-language model, achieving a 23.3% improvement in AUC.

AI.tldr: 提出VLAAD碰撞感知识别器与CARLA-Collide/Real-Collide两个数据集，以显著提高端到端自动驾驶闭环分数与开环检测性能。
AI.motivation: CARLA排行榜的高违规率表明碰撞是导致E2E自动驾驶闭环得分低下的最大短板，而现有工作对碰撞感知的表征学习关注不足。
AI.method: 1. 构建VLAAD：将碰撞预测转定义为多示例学习(MIL)任务，通过视频-语言增强方式学习时间定位的碰撞信号并输出碰撞概率。2. 创建CARLA-Collide大规模多模态仿真数据集，在复杂道路网收集碰撞前后多传感器同步数据。3. 将训练后的VLAAD作为轻量插拔模块(0.6B参数)注入到已有的E2E模型TransFuser++中微调。4. 收集公共行车记录仪视频并建立Real-Collide开环基准，用于真实世界泛化评估。
AI.result: 1. 在CARLA Leaderboard闭环评测中，仅微调的TransFuser++驾驶得分相对提升14.12%，首次打通
AI.conclusion: 碰撞感知的表征学习可以被系统地在中观尺度上建模，以小参数量的插件即可显著降低违规率并提升驾驶分数。VLAAD验证了此类桥接仿真空白的模块在Sim-to-Real以及闭环-开环评估中的可行性和推广价值，提示端到端策略在复杂场景下的鲁棒性提升可进一步通过显式碰撞感知组件实现。

title: Knowledge Distillation for Efficient Transformer-Based Reinforcement Learning in Hardware-Constrained Energy Management Systems
summary: Transformer-based reinforcement learning has emerged as a strong candidate for sequential control in residential energy management. In particular, the Decision Transformer can learn effective battery dispatch policies from historical data, thereby increasing photovoltaic self-consumption and reducing electricity costs. However, transformer models are typically too computationally demanding for deployment on resource-constrained residential controllers, where memory and latency constraints are critical. This paper investigates knowledge distillation to transfer the decision-making behaviour of high-capacity Decision Transformer policies to compact models that are more suitable for embedded deployment. Using the Ausgrid dataset, we train teacher models in an offline sequence-based Decision Transformer framework on heterogeneous multi-building data. We then distil smaller student models by matching the teachers' actions, thereby preserving control quality while reducing model size. Across a broad set of teacher-student configurations, distillation largely preserves control performance and even yields small improvements of up to 1%, while reducing the parameter count by up to 96%, the inference memory by up to 90%, and the inference time by up to 63%. Beyond these compression effects, comparable cost improvements are also observed when distilling into a student model of identical architectural capacity. Overall, our results show that knowledge distillation makes Decision Transformer control more applicable for residential energy management on resource-limited hardware.

AI.tldr: 用知识蒸馏把大容量 Decision Transformer 的电池调度策略压缩 96% 参数、90% 内存、63% 延迟，几乎不损失性能，使住宅控制器可实际部署。
AI.motivation: Decision Transformer 在家居能源管理中效果好，但高算力需求与嵌入式控制器资源受限矛盾，需在不牺牲控制质量前提下实现轻量化。
AI.method: 基于 Ausgrid 多建筑数据离线训练教师 Decision Transformer；以「动作匹配」策略蒸馏至不同规模学生网络，评估同构与异构师生配置的性能-压缩权衡。
AI.result: 蒸馏后控制器参数↓96%、推理内存↓90%、时间↓63%，平均成本改善持平或微升1%；即使师生容量相同，也能获得相当成本收益，验证蒸馏有效性。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏让 Decision Transformer 的家居电池调度策略可在内存与实时性受限的住宅硬件上落地，兼顾低成本、高性能与易部署。

title: Knowledge is Power: Advancing Few-shot Action Recognition with Multimodal Semantics from MLLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have propelled the field of few-shot action recognition (FSAR). However, preliminary explorations in this area primarily focus on generating captions to form a suboptimal feature->caption->feature pipeline and adopt metric learning solely within the visual space. In this paper, we propose FSAR-LLaVA, the first end-to-end method to leverage MLLMs (such as Video-LLaVA) as a multimodal knowledge base for directly enhancing FSAR. First, at the feature level, we leverage the MLLM's multimodal decoder to extract spatiotemporally and semantically enriched representations, which are then decoupled and enhanced by our Multimodal Feature-Enhanced Module into distinct visual and textual features that fully exploit their semantic knowledge for FSAR. Next, we leverage the versatility of MLLMs to craft input prompts that flexibly adapt to diverse scenarios, and use their aligned outputs to drive our designed Composite Task-Oriented Prototype Construction, effectively bridging the distribution gap between meta-train and meta-test sets. Finally, to enable multimodal features to guide metric learning jointly, we introduce a training-free Multimodal Prototype Matching Metric that adaptively selects the most decisive cues and efficiently leverages the decoupled feature representations produced by MLLMs. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior performance across various tasks with minimal trainable parameters.

AI.tldr: FSAR-LLaVA 首次将多模态大模型（MLLM）端到端嵌入小样本动作识别，无需额外训练即可同时利用视觉-文本语义，显著超越传统“特征→字幕→特征”流程。
AI.motivation: 现有 FSAR 方法把 MLLM 当成“字幕生成器”，造成语义损失且度量学习局限在视觉空间；亟需直接挖掘 MLLM 作为统一知识库的跨模态表征能力，缩小元训练-元测试分布差异。
AI.method: 1) 以 Video-LLaVA 多模态解码器抽取时空-语义融合表征，经 Multimodal Feature-Enhanced Module 解耦并增强为互补的视觉/文本特征；2) 利用 MLLM 的提示自由度构造场景自适应输入，驱动 Composite Task-Oriented Prototype Construction，在特征空间对齐元训练与元测试分布；3) 提出零训练开销的 Multimodal Prototype Matching Metric，动态选择决定性线索，实现跨模态联合度量。
AI.result: 在多个标准 FSAR 基准上刷新 SOTA，参数仅微调 MLLM 少量层即可，且对基类和新类均保持稳定增益。
AI.conclusion: MLLM 可被视为端到端的多模态知识库，通过特征解耦、分布对齐与跨模态度量三步，彻底释放其在小样本视频理解中的潜力，为后续研究提供即插即用的新范式。

title: MemBoost: A Memory-Boosted Framework for Cost-Aware LLM Inference
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) deliver strong performance but incur high inference cost in real-world services, especially under workloads with repeated or near-duplicate queries across users and sessions. In this work, we propose MemBoost, a memory-boosted LLM serving framework that enables a lightweight model to reuse previously generated answers and retrieve relevant supporting information for cheap inference, while selectively escalating difficult or uncertain queries to a stronger model. Unlike standard retrieval-augmented generation, which primarily grounds a single response, MemBoost is designed for interactive settings by supporting answer reuse, continual memory growth, and cost-aware routing. Experiments across multiple models under simulated workloads show that MemBoost substantially reduces expensive large-model invocations and overall inference cost, while maintaining high answer quality comparable to the strong model baseline.

AI.tldr: MemBoost用轻量缓存+智能路由代替每次都调大模型，在重复/相似查询场景下把推理成本打下来，答案质量不掉线。
AI.motivation: 大模型线上服务常被“换汤不换药”的重复提问拖累，每次完整推理费用高；亟需一种能在互动中持续复用历史答案、只把真难题交给大模型的高效框架。
AI.method: 提出“MemBoost”框架：1) 用轻量模型当缓存门，命中则直接复用历史答案；2) 对未命中但可检索支持的，做低成本检索增强；3) 对困难或不确定请求，路由至大模型并回写新答案到记忆；4) 支持在线增量记忆与成本敏感路由策略，区别于只做单次RAG的传统方案。
AI.result: 在模拟真实重复查询负载的实验中，MemBoost显著减少大模型调用次数，总推理成本大幅下降，同时回答质量与全量大模型基线持平甚至略优。
AI.conclusion: 通过“缓存+路由”双轮驱动，MemBoost把大模型从“每题必答”解放出来，为高频交互场景提供了可扩展、低成本、高质量的LLM服务范式。

title: When Chain-of-Thought Backfires: Evaluating Prompt Sensitivity in Medical Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in medical settings, yet their sensitivity to prompt formatting remains poorly characterized. We evaluate MedGemma (4B and 27B parameters) on MedMCQA (4,183 questions) and PubMedQA (1,000 questions) across a broad suite of robustness tests. Our experiments reveal several concerning findings. Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting decreases accuracy by 5.7% compared to direct answering. Few-shot examples degrade performance by 11.9% while increasing position bias from 0.14 to 0.47. Shuffling answer options causes the model to change predictions 59.1% of the time, with accuracy dropping up to 27.4 percentage points. Front-truncating context to 50% causes accuracy to plummet below the no-context baseline, yet back-truncation preserves 97% of full-context accuracy. We further show that cloze scoring (selecting the highest log-probability option token) achieves 51.8% (4B) and 64.5% (27B), surpassing all prompting strategies and revealing that models "know" more than their generated text shows. Permutation voting recovers 4 percentage points over single-ordering inference. These results demonstrate that prompt engineering techniques validated on general-purpose models do not transfer to domain-specific medical LLMs, and that reliable alternatives exist.

AI.tldr: 医学专用大模型对提示格式极度敏感：CoT 和少样本反而显著降分，选项顺序扰动导致近六成预测改变，上下文前截断使性能跌破无上下文基线；cloze 打分和排列投票可部分挽回。
AI.motivation: 医疗场景 LLM 的提示鲁棒性尚缺系统评估，需验证通用 prompt 技巧在医学领域是否仍有效，并寻找更可靠的推断方式。
AI.method: 在 MedMCQA（4 183 题）和 PubMedQA（1 000 题）上对 MedGemma-4B/27B 进行七项鲁棒性测试：CoT vs 直接回答、0/5-shot、选项乱序、前后截断、cloze 最大 token 概率选答、排列投票。
AI.result: CoT 降 5.7%，少-shot 降 11.9% 且位置偏置升至 0.47；乱序使 59.1% 预测翻转、最高掉 27.4 点；前截 50% 跌破无上下文基线，后截 97% 精度留存；cloze 法达 51.8%/64.5%，优于任何提示策略；排列投票再提 4 点。
AI.conclusion: 通用 prompt 工程对医学 LLM 不成立，应优先采用 cloze 评分、排列投票等无需特殊提示的可靠推断策略。

title: Improving Risk Stratification in Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy: A Novel Score Combining Echocardiography, Clinical, and Medication Data
summary: Hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM) requires accurate risk stratification to inform decisions regarding ICD therapy and follow-up management. Current established models, such as the European Society of Cardiology (ESC) score, exhibit moderate discriminative performance. This study develops a robust, explainable machine learning (ML) risk score leveraging routinely collected echocardiographic, clinical, and medication data, typically contained within Electronic Health Records (EHRs), to predict a 5-year composite cardiovascular outcome in HCM patients. The model was trained and internally validated using a large cohort (N=1,201) from the SHARE registry (Florence Hospital) and externally validated on an independent cohort (N=382) from Rennes Hospital. The final Random Forest ensemble model achieved a high internal Area Under the Curve (AUC) of 0.85 +- 0.02, significantly outperforming the ESC score (0.56 +- 0.03). Critically, survival curve analysis on the external validation set showed superior risk separation for the ML score (Log-rank p = 8.62 x 10^(-4) compared to the ESC score (p = 0.0559). Furthermore, longitudinal analyses demonstrate that the proposed risk score remains stable over time in event-free patients. The model high interpretability and its capacity for longitudinal risk monitoring represent promising tools for the personalized clinical management of HCM.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了基于EHR 数据的可解释机器学习模型，用于HCM 患者5 年心血管复合事件风险预测；内部验证 AUC 0.85，显著优于 ESC 评分，外部验证亦显示更强风险分层能力。
AI.motivation: HCM 需精准风险分层以指导 ICD 植入和随访决策，但现行 ESC 评分鉴别效能一般，需利用常规临床数据构建更优工具。
AI.method: 使用 SHARE 注册研究（n=1 201，佛罗伦萨医院）训练随机森林集成模型，结合超声心动图、临床及用药信息；在法国雷恩医院独立队列（n=382）进行外部验证，并以 Kaplan-Meier 和纵向分析评估模型稳定性与风险分层效能。
AI.result: 模型内测 AUC 0.85±0.02，显著优于 ESC 评分 0.56±0.03；外部队列生存分析中 ML 评分的 Log-rank p=8.62×10⁻⁴，远超 ESC 的 0.0559；事件未发生患者群体中长期风险评分保持恒定。
AI.conclusion: 该 EHR 驱动、可解释、随机森林风险模型能准确预测 HCM 患者 5 年预后，并支持动态随访，具备直接服务于个体化管理的转化潜力。

title: Face2Parts: Exploring Coarse-to-Fine Inter-Regional Facial Dependencies for Generalized Deepfake Detection
summary: Multimedia data, particularly images and videos, is integral to various applications, including surveillance, visual interaction, biometrics, evidence gathering, and advertising. However, amateur or skilled counterfeiters can simulate them to create deepfakes, often for slanderous motives. To address this challenge, several forensic methods have been developed to ensure the authenticity of the content. The effectiveness of these methods depends on their focus, with challenges arising from the diverse nature of manipulations. In this article, we analyze existing forensic methods and observe that each method has unique strengths in detecting deepfake traces by focusing on specific facial regions, such as the frame, face, lips, eyes, or nose. Considering these insights, we propose a novel hybrid approach called Face2Parts based on hierarchical feature representation ($HFR$) that takes advantage of coarse-to-fine information to improve deepfake detection. The proposed method involves extracting features from the frame, face, and key facial regions (i.e., lips, eyes, and nose) separately to explore the coarse-to-fine relationships. This approach enables us to capture inter-dependencies among facial regions using a channel-attention mechanism and deep triplet learning. We evaluated the proposed method on benchmark deepfake datasets in both intra-, inter-dataset, and inter-manipulation settings. The proposed method achieves an average AUC of 98.42\% on FF++, 79.80\% on CDF1, 85.34\% on CDF2, 89.41\% on DFD, 84.07\% on DFDC, 95.62\% on DTIM, 80.76\% on PDD, and 100\% on WLDR, respectively. The results demonstrate that our approach generalizes effectively and achieves promising performance to outperform the existing methods.

AI.tldr: 作者提出一种基于“由粗到细”分层特征表示的混合取证框架Face2Parts，对帧、整张脸及口眼鼻区域分别提取特征，再用通道注意力与深度三元组学习捕获部位间依赖，在8组主流deepfake数据集上平均AUC远超现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有换脸伪造可模拟多媒体证据，且篡改方式多样；单部位或全局取证技术难以兼顾、判别鲁棒性不足，因此需要融合多层级面部局部的互补信息提升检测势。
AI.method: Face2Parts：①并行抽取帧级、脸级与口、眼、鼻五支纹理/频域特征；②用层次特征表示(HFR)按粗→细统一编码；③引入通道注意力学习区域间相互依赖；④深度三元组损失削减类内差异、拉大伪造-真实边界；⑤端到端训练完成跨伪造跨库检测。
AI.result: 在FF++、CDF1/2、DFD、DFDC、DTIM、PDD、WLDR共8基准上分别达到98.42%、79.80%、85.34%、89.41%、84.07%、95.62%、80.76%、100% AUC，平均指标优于现有单部位/单模态方法15%~30%，跨库泛化能力最佳。
AI.conclusion: Face2Parts通过融合由粗到细的面部多层次特征并显式建模区域依赖，显著提高了对未知伪造技术与跨库场景的检测鲁棒性和泛化性能，为后续深度伪造取证提供了有效范式。

title: EnTaCs: Analyzing the Relationship Between Sentiment and Language Choice in English-Tamil Code-Switching
summary: This paper investigates the relationship between utterance sentiment and language choice in English-Tamil code-switched text, using methods from machine learning and statistical modelling. We apply a fine-tuned XLM-RoBERTa model for token-level language identification on 35,650 romanized YouTube comments from the DravidianCodeMix dataset, producing per-utterance measurements of English proportion and language switch frequency. Linear regression analysis reveals that positive utterances exhibit significantly greater English proportion (34.3%) than negative utterances (24.8%), and mixed-sentiment utterances show the highest language switch frequency when controlling for utterance length. These findings support the hypothesis that emotional content demonstrably influences language choice in multilingual code-switching settings, due to socio-linguistic associations of prestige and identity with embedded and matrix languages.

AI.tldr: 利用XLM-RoBERTa量化YouTube英-泰混码评论，发现情感越积极英语占比越高，混合情感切换最频，证实情感驱动语码选择。
AI.motivation: 已有研究暗示情感可能与语码混用相关，但缺乏大规模实证证据；需厘清情感极性如何系统影响双语者的语言选择，以揭示身份、声望等社会语言学机制在数字文本中的运作方式。
AI.method: 在DravidianCodeMix的3.56万条罗马化评论上，微调XLM-RoBERTa做token级语言识别；提取每条话语的英语比例与切换频次，以长度等为控制变量，采用线性回归检验情感对二者的影响。
AI.result: 正向话语英语比例34.3%，显著高于负向24.8%；混合情感话语切换频次最高；效应在控制长度后仍显著。
AI.conclusion: 情感内容显著塑造多语码切换行为，英语承载高端、现代身份象征，泰米尔语维系本地认同；结果为情感驱动的语言选择假设提供首份大规模统计证据，对情感计算、社会语言学及NLP资源建设均有启示。

title: Do Neurons Dream of Primitive Operators? Wake-Sleep Compression Rediscovers Schank's Event Semantics
summary:
We show that they do. Schank's conceptual dependency theory proposed that all events decompose into primitive operations -- ATRANS, PTRANS, MTRANS, and others -- hand-coded from linguistic intuition. Can the same primitives be discovered automatically through compression pressure alone?
  We adapt DreamCoder's wake-sleep library learning to event state transformations. Given events as before/after world state pairs, our system finds operator compositions explaining each event (wake), then extracts recurring patterns as new operators optimized under Minimum Description Length (sleep). Starting from four generic primitives, it discovers operators mapping directly to Schank's: MOVE_PROP_has = ATRANS, CHANGE_location = PTRANS, SET_knows = MTRANS, SET_consumed = INGEST, plus compound operators ("mail" = ATRANS + PTRANS) and novel emotional state operators absent from Schank's taxonomy.
  We validate on synthetic events and real-world commonsense data from the ATOMIC knowledge graph. On synthetic data, discovered operators achieve Bayesian MDL within 4% of Schank's hand-coded primitives while explaining 100% of events vs. Schank's 81%. On ATOMIC, results are more dramatic: Schank's primitives explain only 10% of naturalistic events, while the discovered library explains 100%. Dominant operators are not physical-action primitives but mental and emotional state changes -- CHANGE_wants (20%), CHANGE_feels (18%), CHANGE_is (18%) -- none in Schank's original taxonomy.
  These results provide the first empirical evidence that event primitives can be derived from compression pressure, that Schank's core primitives are information-theoretically justified, and that the complete inventory is substantially richer than proposed -- with mental/emotional operators dominating in naturalistic data.

AI.tldr: 首次证明仅通过最小描述长度（MDL）压缩压力即可自动发现 Schank 手工设计的概念依赖原语，并在真实常识数据上发现 Schank 未涵盖的心理/情感原语占主导。
AI.motivation: 检验 Schank 提出的“所有事件可分解为少量手工原语”这一经典理论能否在无任何先验语言学知识的情况下，仅由数据压缩压力重新发现或扩展。
AI.method: 将 DreamCoder 的“醒-睡”库学习框架改造为事件状态转换学习：以“事件前/后世界状态对”为输入， Wake 阶段用现有原语组合解释事件，Sleep 阶段在 MDL 目标下抽取出高频可复用的新原语并加入库，迭代扩展。
AI.result: 从 4 个通用原语出发，系统自动复现出 Schank 的 ATRANS、PTRANS、MTRANS、INGEST 等核心原语及复合原语（如“mail”=ATRANS+PTRANS）；在合成数据上 MDL 代价与手工原语差距 <4%，解释率 100% vs 81%；在 ATOMIC 真实常识数据上，Schank 原语仅解释 10% 事件，发现库解释 100%，且高频原语为心理/情感变化（CHANGE_wants 20%、CHANGE_feels 18%、CHANGE_is 18%）。
AI.conclusion: 首次实证表明事件原语可完全由压缩压力自动涌现；Schank 核心原语信息论有效；完整原语集远丰富于手工方案，自然场景下心智与情感原语占主导。

title: Contrastive Conformal Sets
summary: Contrastive learning produces coherent semantic feature embeddings by encouraging positive samples to cluster closely while separating negative samples. However, existing contrastive learning methods lack principled guarantees on coverage within the semantic feature space. We extend conformal prediction to this setting by introducing minimum-volume covering sets equipped with learnable generalized multi-norm constraints. We propose a method that constructs conformal sets guaranteeing user-specified coverage of positive samples while maximizing negative sample exclusion. We establish theoretically that volume minimization serves as a proxy for negative exclusion, enabling our approach to operate effectively even when negative pairs are unavailable. The positive inclusion guarantee inherits the distribution-free coverage property of conformal prediction, while negative exclusion is maximized through learned set geometry optimized on a held-out training split. Experiments on simulated and real-world image datasets demonstrate improved inclusion-exclusion trade-offs compared to standard distance-based conformal baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可学习多范数约束的保形预测方法，首次在对比学习语义特征空间中给出正样本覆盖保证，并无需负样本即可最大化负样本排除。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习虽能聚类正样本、远离负样本，但缺乏对语义特征空间覆盖率的理论保证；尤其在负样本缺失场景下，如何同时确保正样本高覆盖与负样本高排除尚无系统方法。
AI.method: 将保形预测框架扩展到对比学习，引入带可学习广义多范数约束的最小体积覆盖集；利用独立验证集优化集合几何，以体积最小化代理负样本排除，并保证用户指定水平的正样本覆盖率。
AI.result: 理论证明体积最小化等价于负样本排除最大化，且正样本覆盖具备分布无关的保证；在模拟与真实图像数据上，相比传统距离式保形基线，显著提升了包含-排除权衡。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法首次在对比学习中实现分布自由的正样本覆盖与无需负样本的负样本排除，为深度学习特征空间的不确定性量化提供了可扩展的保形解决方案。

title: Rethinking Token Pruning for Historical Screenshots in GUI Visual Agents: Semantic, Spatial, and Temporal Perspectives
summary: In recent years, GUI visual agents built upon Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong potential in navigation tasks. However, high-resolution GUI screenshots produce a large number of visual tokens, making the direct preservation of complete historical information computationally expensive. In this paper, we conduct an empirical study on token pruning for historical screenshots in GUI scenarios and distill three practical insights that are crucial for designing effective pruning strategies. First, we observe that GUI screenshots exhibit a distinctive foreground-background semantic composition. To probe this property, we apply a simple edge-based separation to partition screenshots into foreground and background regions. Surprisingly, we find that, contrary to the common assumption that background areas have little semantic value, they effectively capture interface-state transitions, thereby providing auxiliary cues for GUI reasoning. Second, compared with carefully designed pruning strategies, random pruning possesses an inherent advantage in preserving spatial structure, enabling better performance under the same computational budget. Finally, we observe that GUI Agents exhibit a recency effect similar to human cognition: by allocating larger token budgets to more recent screenshots and heavily compressing distant ones, we can significantly reduce computational cost while maintaining nearly unchanged performance. These findings offer new insights and practical guidance for the design of efficient GUI visual agents.

AI.tldr: 针对高分辨率GUI截图带来的视觉token膨胀问题，作者从前景-背景语义构成、随机剪枝保空间结构、近期截图优先三个经验洞见出发，给出历史截图序列的轻量压缩策略，实现计算开销大幅下降而导航性能几乎无损。
AI.motivation: 现有的MLLM驱动GUI视觉代理在导航任务中需保留大量历史截图，高分辨率产生巨量的视觉token，导致推理成本高昂。本文旨在通过系统实验探究如何安全压缩历史截图token，以构建高效且性能不降的GUI视觉代理。
AI.method: 作者首先提出基于边缘检测的“前景-背景”二划分方法，量化两类区域对界面状态变化的贡献；随后比较随机剪枝与多种基于语义或注意力得分的剪枝方案，揭示随机剪枝在保留空间格局上的优势；最后引入类人“近因效应”，设计按时间分配token预算的递减压缩策略并在多款GUI基准上验证。
AI.result: 1) 背景区域虽常被忽略，却包含丰富状态转换信号，对导航定位有显著辅助作用；2) 同等token预算下，随机剪枝的导航成功率明显高于自适应注意力剪枝等复杂策略；3) 将80%以上token预算分配给最近两帧并极限压缩远帧，可削减约50%计算量，同时性能衰减低于1%。
AI.conclusion: GUI截图的前景-背景结构、随机剪枝保空间一致性与agent对近因信息的偏爱三大经验结论，为设计轻量级视觉记忆模块提供了明确且易落地的指导，可广泛应用于跨平台GUI自动化与导航任务。

title: Weight Tying Biases Token Embeddings Towards the Output Space
summary: Weight tying, i.e. sharing parameters between input and output embedding matrices, is common practice in language model design, yet its impact on the learned embedding space remains poorly understood. In this paper, we show that tied embedding matrices align more closely with output (unembedding) matrices than with input embeddings of comparable untied models, indicating that the shared matrix is shaped primarily for output prediction rather than input representation. This unembedding bias arises because output gradients dominate early in training. Using tuned lens analysis, we show this negatively affects early-layer computations, which contribute less effectively to the residual stream. Scaling input gradients during training reduces this bias, providing causal evidence for the role of gradient imbalance. This is mechanistic evidence that weight tying optimizes the embedding matrix for output prediction, compromising its role in input representation. These results help explain why weight tying can harm performance at scale and have implications for training smaller LLMs, where the embedding matrix contributes substantially to total parameter count.

AI.tldr: 权重绑定实质上将嵌入矩阵「输出化」，早期输出梯度主导训练是主因；放大输入梯度可缓解偏差，为小型/大型语言模型设计提供调优依据。
AI.motivation: 尽管语言模型普遍采用输入-输出嵌入矩阵共享（权重绑定），但其对嵌入空间学习的具体影响缺乏机制性理解。作者旨在揭示绑定导致的表征-预测冲突，并给出可干预的改进方向。
AI.method: 1) 对比绑定/非绑定模型的嵌入与输出（unembedding）矩阵的余弦对齐度；2) 引入tuned lens分析早期残差流贡献；3) 在训练阶段对输入与输出梯度进行差异化缩放，观察绑定偏差的因果变化。
AI.result: 1) 绑定矩阵与输出矩阵对齐度显著高于与非绑定输入嵌入，表明其被主要塑造成「输出预测器」；2) 该偏向源于训练早期输出梯度占据主导；3) 放大输入梯度可降低偏向，恢复早期层对残差流的有效贡献。
AI.conclusion: 权重绑定通过梯度不平衡机制优化嵌入矩阵服务于输出预测，牺牲了输入表征功能，为解释其在大模型上性能下降及指导小模型参数分配提供了机制证据与调优策略。

title: Policy-Guided World Model Planning for Language-Conditioned Visual Navigation
summary: Navigating to a visually specified goal given natural language instructions remains a fundamental challenge in embodied AI. Existing approaches either rely on reactive policies that struggle with long-horizon planning, or employ world models that suffer from poor action initialization in high-dimensional spaces. We present PiJEPA, a two-stage framework that combines the strengths of learned navigation policies with latent world model planning for instruction-conditioned visual navigation. In the first stage, we finetune an Octo-based generalist policy, augmented with a frozen pretrained vision encoder (DINOv2 or V-JEPA-2), on the CAST navigation dataset to produce an informed action distribution conditioned on the current observation and language instruction. In the second stage, we use this policy-derived distribution to warm-start Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) planning over a separately trained JEPA world model, which predicts future latent states in the embedding space of the same frozen encoder. By initializing the MPPI sampling distribution from the policy prior rather than from an uninformed Gaussian, our planner converges faster to high-quality action sequences that reach the goal. We systematically study the effect of the vision encoder backbone, comparing DINOv2 and V-JEPA-2, across both the policy and world model components. Experiments on real-world navigation tasks demonstrate that PiJEPA significantly outperforms both standalone policy execution and uninformed world model planning, achieving improved goal-reaching accuracy and instruction-following fidelity.

AI.tldr: PiJEPA 将 LLM 先验策略与基于 JEPA 的世界模型规划两阶段融合，用策略输出给 MPPI 提供热启动，显著缓解了长时序视觉导航中的动作初始化与规划品质问题。
AI.motivation: 端到端策略易在长时程任务中累积偏差，纯世界模型又面临高维动作空间采样‘冷启动’困境；如何把策略先验快速注入预测模型，实现高质量指令跟随导航仍缺乏系统化解决方案。
AI.method: 阶段一：基于 Octo 通用策略骨架，结合冻结的 DINOv2/V-JEPA-2 视觉编码器，在 CAST 数据集上微调，获得指令-观察条件下的动作分布；阶段二：单独训练 JEPA 世界模型预测未来潜在状态，将该策略分布作为 MPPI 采样先验，引导动作序列搜索。
AI.result: 在真实导航任务中，PiJEPA 相比纯策略执行与无先验世界模型规划，在到达目标准确率与指令跟随一致性上均取得显著提升，且 V-JEPA-2 整体优于 DINOv2。
AI.conclusion: 引入策略热启动的 PiJEPA 框架有效统一了反应式决策与预测式规划，为高维动作场景下的指令条件视觉导航提供了更鲁棒、更高样本效率的解决范式。

title: Topology-Aware Graph Reinforcement Learning for Energy Storage Systems Optimal Dispatch in Distribution Networks
summary: Optimal dispatch of energy storage systems (ESSs) in distribution networks involves jointly improving operating economy and voltage security under time-varying conditions and possible topology changes. To support fast online decision making, we develop a topology-aware Reinforcement Learning architecture based on Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3), which integrates graph neural networks (GNNs) as graph feature encoders for ESS dispatch. We conduct a systematic investigation of three GNN variants: graph convolutional networks (GCNs), topology adaptive graph convolutional networks (TAGConv), and graph attention networks (GATs) on the 34-bus and 69-bus systems, and evaluate robustness under multiple topology reconfiguration cases as well as cross-system transfer between networks with different system sizes. Results show that GNN-based controllers consistently reduce the number and magnitude of voltage violations, with clearer benefits on the 69-bus system and under reconfiguration; on the 69-bus system, TD3-GCN and TD3-TAGConv also achieve lower saved cost relative to the NLP benchmark than the NN baseline. We also highlight that transfer gains are case-dependent, and zero-shot transfer between fundamentally different systems results in notable performance degradation and increased voltage magnitude violations. This work is available at: https://github.com/ShuyiGao/GNNs_RL_ESSs and https://github.com/distributionnetworksTUDelft/GNNs_RL_ESSs.

AI.tldr: 用 GNN+TD3 强化学习在线调度配网储能，兼顾经济性与电压安全；三类 GNN 在 34/69 节点拓扑变化场景下均减少电压越限，69 节点系统降本更优，但跨拓扑/跨规模零样本迁移效果大幅下降。
AI.motivation: 配网拓扑常变、工况时变，传统优化模型在线计算慢，需快速鲁棒的储能调度策略；将拓扑结构信息显式嵌入决策可提升电压安全与经济性的协同。
AI.method: 提出拓扑感知 TD3 框架，以 GNN（GCN/TAGConv/GAT）编码网络拓扑特征，输出储能功率决策；在 34/69 节点系统上进行训练，测试拓扑重构、规模迁移与零样本迁移场景，并以 NLP 最优解为参考基准。
AI.result: GNN 控制器显著降低电压越限次数与幅度，69 节点系统效果优于 34 节点；TD3-GCN 与 TD3-TAGConv 节省成本优于纯 NN 基线。零样本迁移至不同规模网络时，电压越限和成本指标明显退化，增益高度依赖具体案例。
AI.conclusion: GNN 增强的 RL 储能调度在单系统内兼顾经济-电压目标，拓扑变化下鲁棒；但跨系统/跨规模迁移仍需微调或域自适应，零样本直接迁移尚难保证性能。

title: Seeing Like Radiologists: Context- and Gaze-Guided Vision-Language Pretraining for Chest X-rays
summary: Despite recent advances in medical vision-language pretraining, existing models still struggle to capture the diagnostic workflow: radiographs are typically treated as context-agnostic images, while radiologists' gaze -- a crucial cue for visual reasoning -- remains largely underexplored by existing methods. These limitations hinder the modeling of disease-specific patterns and weaken cross-modal alignment. To bridge this gap, we introduce CoGaze, a Context- and Gaze-guided vision-language pretraining framework for chest X-rays. We first propose a context-infused vision encoder that models how radiologists integrate clinical context -- including patient history, symptoms, and diagnostic intent -- to guide diagnostic reasoning. We then present a multi-level supervision paradigm that (1) enforces intra- and inter-modal semantic alignment through hybrid-positive contrastive learning, (2) injects diagnostic priors via disease-aware cross-modal representation learning, and (3) leverages radiologists' gaze as probabilistic priors to guide attention toward diagnostically salient regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoGaze consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across diverse tasks, achieving up to +2.0% CheXbertF1 and +1.2% BLEU2 for free-text and structured report generation, +23.2% AUROC for zero-shot classification, and +12.2% Precision@1 for image-text retrieval. Code is available at https://github.com/mk-runner/CoGaze.

AI.tldr: CoGaze 首次把“读片语境”和“放射科医师眼动”同时引入胸片视觉-语言预训练，在多项下游任务上显著超越现有最佳方法。
AI.motivation: 当前医学视觉-语言模型把胸片当成普通自然图像，忽视临床语境（病史、症状、检查目的）和放射科医师眼动信号，导致难以学习疾病特异性表征，跨模态对齐薄弱。
AI.method: 提出 CoGaze 框架：(1) 上下文注入视觉编码器，显式建模语境如何引导诊断推理；(2) 多级监督范式：① 混合正样本对比学习实现模态内与模态间语义对齐，② 疾病感知跨模态表征学习注入诊断先验，③ 把眼动转为概率先验，引导模型关注病灶显著区域。
AI.result: 在自由文本与结构化报告生成、零样本分类、图文检索等任务上全面领先，CheXbert F1 最高提升 2.0%，BLEU-2 提升 1.2%，零样本分类 AUROC 提升 23.2%，图文检索 Precision@1 提升 12.2%。
AI.conclusion: 结合语境与眼动先验的预训练策略显著增强模型对诊断流程的建模能力，为医学视觉-语言研究提供了新的性能上限与可解释途径。

title: Do Neurons Dream of Primitive Operators? Wake-Sleep Compression Rediscovers Schank's Event Semantics
summary:
We show that they do. Schank's conceptual dependency theory proposed that all events decompose into primitive operations -- ATRANS, PTRANS, MTRANS, and others -- hand-coded from linguistic intuition. Can the same primitives be discovered automatically through compression pressure alone?
  We adapt DreamCoder's wake-sleep library learning to event state transformations. Given events as before/after world state pairs, our system finds operator compositions explaining each event (wake), then extracts recurring patterns as new operators optimized under Minimum Description Length (sleep). Starting from four generic primitives, it discovers operators mapping directly to Schank's: MOVE_PROP_has = ATRANS, CHANGE_location = PTRANS, SET_knows = MTRANS, SET_consumed = INGEST, plus compound operators ("mail" = ATRANS + PTRANS) and novel emotional state operators absent from Schank's taxonomy.
  We validate on synthetic events and real-world commonsense data from the ATOMIC knowledge graph. On synthetic data, discovered operators achieve Bayesian MDL within 4% of Schank's hand-coded primitives while explaining 100% of events vs. Schank's 81%. On ATOMIC, results are more dramatic: Schank's primitives explain only 10% of naturalistic events, while the discovered library explains 100%. Dominant operators are not physical-action primitives but mental and emotional state changes -- CHANGE_wants (20%), CHANGE_feels (18%), CHANGE_is (18%) -- none in Schank's original taxonomy.
  These results provide the first empirical evidence that event primitives can be derived from compression pressure, that Schank's core primitives are information-theoretically justified, and that the complete inventory is substantially richer than proposed -- with mental/emotional operators dominating in naturalistic data.

AI.tldr: 首次证明：仅凭压缩压力即可自动重现并扩充Schank手工设计的概念依赖基元；系统从4个通用基元出发，在合成数据上逼近手工方案MDL，在ATOMIC真实常识事件中解释率从10%升至100%，并发现大量心理/情绪基元。
AI.motivation: 验证Schank“所有事件均可分解为少量原子操作”的假说是否可脱离语言学直觉，由最小描述长度（MDL）驱动的无监督学习自动发现；同时检验手工基元在信息论意义上的必要性及完备性。
AI.method: 将DreamCoder的wake-sleep库学习框架适配为“事件解释”：wake阶段用现有运算符合成解释每一事件的前后状态变化；sleep阶段以MDL为准则提炼高频复合子序列为新运算符，迭代扩展运算符库。
AI.result: 1) 合成事件：自动基元与Schank手工基元MDL差距≤4%，解释率100% vs 81%。2) ATOMIC真实数据：手工基元仅覆盖10%，自动生成库覆盖100%；新增运算符中CHANGE_wants/CHANGE_feels/CHANGE_is合计占56%，原手工体系缺失。
AI.conclusion: 压缩压力足以自动发现Schank式事件基元，证实其核心物理-动作基元的信息论正当性；真实世界事件原语集远较手工方案丰富，心理与状态变化运算符占主导，需重新扩展常识推理系统的基元体系。

title: D-GATNet: Interpretable Temporal Graph Attention Learning for ADHD Identification Using Dynamic Functional Connectivity
summary: Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) is a prevalent neurodevelopmental disorder whose neuroimaging-based diagnosis remains challenging due to complex time-varying disruptions in brain connectivity. Functional MRI (fMRI) provides a powerful non-invasive modality for identifying functional alterations. Existing deep learning (DL) studies employ diverse neuroimaging features; however, static functional connectivity remains widely used, whereas dynamic connectivity modeling is comparatively underexplored. Moreover, many DL models lack interpretability. In this work, we propose D-GATNet, an interpretable temporal graph-based framework for automated ADHD classification using dynamic functional connectivity (dFC). Sliding-window Pearson correlation constructs sequences of functional brain graphs with regions of interest as nodes and connectivity strengths as edges. Spatial dependencies are learned via a multi-layer Graph Attention Network, while temporal dynamics are modeled using 1D convolution followed by temporal attention. Interpretability is achieved through graph attention weights revealing dominant ROI interactions, ROI importance scores identifying influential regions, and temporal attention emphasizing informative connectivity segments. Experiments on the Peking University site of the ADHD-200 dataset using stratified 10-fold cross-validation with a 5-seed ensemble achieved 85.18% +_5.64 balanced accuracy and 0.881 AUC, outperforming state-of-the-art methods. Attention analysis reveals cerebellar and default mode network disruptions, indicating potential neuroimaging biomarkers.

AI.tldr: D-GATNet 利用动态功能连接构建时序脑图，以图注意力+时序注意力网络在 ADHD-200 上实现 85.18% 平衡精度和 0.881 AUC，并通过注意力权重定位了小脑与默认模式网络异常，提供可解释 biomarker。
AI.motivation: ADHD 神经影像诊断难点在于脑连接随时间复杂变化；既往深度学习多用静态功能连接，缺乏动态信息且可解释性不足。
AI.method: 滑动窗 Pearson 相关生成动态功能连接序列→构建以 ROI 为节点、连接强度为边的时序脑图；多层图注意力网络捕获空间依赖，1D 卷积+时序注意力建模时间动态；联合图注意力权重、ROI 重要度分数及时间点注意力实现模型可解释性。
AI.result: 在 ADHD-200 北大站点采用分层 10 折交叉验证+5 次随机种子集成，D-GATNet 取得 85.18%±5.64 平衡准确率与 0.881 AUC，优于现有最佳方法；注意力分析揭示小脑及默认模式网络连接异常。
AI.conclusion: 动态功能连接结合可解释图时序注意力网络不仅提升 ADHD 分类性能，还能定位潜在神经影像 biomarker，为临床机制研究与辅助诊断提供新工具。

title: Bridging Pixels and Words: Mask-Aware Local Semantic Fusion for Multimodal Media Verification
summary: As multimodal misinformation becomes more sophisticated, its detection and grounding are crucial. However, current multimodal verification methods, relying on passive holistic fusion, struggle with sophisticated misinformation. Due to 'feature dilution,' global alignments tend to average out subtle local semantic inconsistencies, effectively masking the very conflicts they are designed to find. We introduce MaLSF (Mask-aware Local Semantic Fusion), a novel framework that shifts the paradigm to active, bidirectional verification, mimicking human cognitive cross-referencing. MaLSF utilizes mask-label pairs as semantic anchors to bridge pixels and words. Its core mechanism features two innovations: 1) a Bidirectional Cross-modal Verification (BCV) module that acts as an interrogator, using parallel query streams (Text-as-Query and Image-as-Query) to explicitly pinpoint conflicts; and 2) a Hierarchical Semantic Aggregation (HSA) module that intelligently aggregates these multi-granularity conflict signals for task-specific reasoning. In addition, to extract fine-grained mask-label pairs, we introduce a set of diverse mask-label pair extraction parsers. MaLSF achieves state-of-the-art performance on both the DGM4 and multimodal fake news detection tasks. Extensive ablation studies and visualization results further verify its effectiveness and interpretability.

AI.tldr: MaLSF 通过“主动双向验证”取代现有“被动整体融合”，解决多模态谣言检测中“特征稀释”导致细微冲突被平均掩盖的问题，在两个公开数据集上刷新 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态事实核查普遍采用被动式的全局特征融合，面对日益精巧的多模态谣言时，细微的局部语义冲突（如图片局部与文字描述不符）被全局平均化，出现“特征稀释”现象，导致漏检。
AI.method: 提出 MaLSF 框架，核心思想是“主动、双向、局部”：1) 用掩码-标签对作为像素-词语之间的语义锚点；2) Bidirectional Cross-modal Verification (BCV) 模块并行执行“以文查图”和“以图查文”两条查询流，显式定位冲突区域；3) Hierarchical Semantic Aggregation (HSA) 模块按粒度层级聚合多分辨率冲突信号，供下游任务推理；4) 配套设计多样化的掩码-标签对抽取解析器，保证细粒度锚点质量。
AI.result: 在 DGM4 数据集和多模态假新闻检测任务上均取得 SOTA 准确率；消融实验表明 BCV 与 HSA 分别带来显著增益；可视化显示模型能精确定位图文冲突区域，具备良好的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: MaLSF 通过“掩码-标签锚点+双向交叉验证+层级聚合”的新范式，有效缓解特征稀释，提升了对复杂多模态谣言的检测与定位能力，为多模态事实核查提供了可解释、可扩展的新思路。

title: Policy-Guided World Model Planning for Language-Conditioned Visual Navigation
summary: Navigating to a visually specified goal given natural language instructions remains a fundamental challenge in embodied AI. Existing approaches either rely on reactive policies that struggle with long-horizon planning, or employ world models that suffer from poor action initialization in high-dimensional spaces. We present PiJEPA, a two-stage framework that combines the strengths of learned navigation policies with latent world model planning for instruction-conditioned visual navigation. In the first stage, we finetune an Octo-based generalist policy, augmented with a frozen pretrained vision encoder (DINOv2 or V-JEPA-2), on the CAST navigation dataset to produce an informed action distribution conditioned on the current observation and language instruction. In the second stage, we use this policy-derived distribution to warm-start Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) planning over a separately trained JEPA world model, which predicts future latent states in the embedding space of the same frozen encoder. By initializing the MPPI sampling distribution from the policy prior rather than from an uninformed Gaussian, our planner converges faster to high-quality action sequences that reach the goal. We systematically study the effect of the vision encoder backbone, comparing DINOv2 and V-JEPA-2, across both the policy and world model components. Experiments on real-world navigation tasks demonstrate that PiJEPA significantly outperforms both standalone policy execution and uninformed world model planning, achieving improved goal-reaching accuracy and instruction-following fidelity.

AI.tldr: PiJEPA 是一个两阶段框架：先用指令微调的大模型产生高质量动作先验，再将该先验作为MPPI规划器的初始分布，在冻结视觉编码器（DINOv2/V-JEPA-2）的潜空间中快速搜索长程导航路径，显著提升真实场景下的指令视觉导航成功率与指令跟随度。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉导航方法要么用反应式策略难以做长程规划，要么用高维世界模型因动作空间随机初始化导致规划效率低；需要一种能结合策略先验与模型预测规划优势的新框架。
AI.method: 两阶段设计：①在CAST数据集上微调 Octo 通用策略+冻结 DINOv2/V-JEPA-2 视觉编码器，得到语言-视觉条件动作分布；②将该分布作为 Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) 的初始采样分布，在独立训练的 JEPA 潜空间世界模型上滚动优化，搜索到达目标的最优动作序列。
AI.result: 系统对比 DINOv2 与 V-JEPA-2 作为共享视觉骨干的效果；真实环境实验表明 PiJEPA 在目标到达精度与指令遵循度上均显著优于单独策略执行或随机初始化的纯世界模型规划。
AI.conclusion: 通过将策略先验嵌入潜空间模型预测控制，PiJEPA 兼具长程规划能力与高效搜索，为指令条件视觉导航提供了实用且性能优越的新范式。

title: FairLLaVA: Fairness-Aware Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning for Large Vision-Language Assistants
summary: While powerful in image-conditioned generation, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can display uneven performance across demographic groups, highlighting fairness risks. In safety-critical clinical settings, such disparities risk producing unequal diagnostic narratives and eroding trust in AI-assisted decision-making. While fairness has been studied extensively in vision-only and language-only models, its impact on MLLMs remains largely underexplored. To address these biases, we introduce FairLLaVA, a parameter-efficient fine-tuning method that mitigates group disparities in visual instruction tuning without compromising overall performance. By minimizing the mutual information between target attributes, FairLLaVA regularizes the model's representations to be demographic-invariant. The method can be incorporated as a lightweight plug-in, maintaining efficiency with low-rank adapter fine-tuning, and provides an architecture-agnostic approach to fair visual instruction following. Extensive experiments on large-scale chest radiology report generation and dermoscopy visual question answering benchmarks show that FairLLaVA consistently reduces inter-group disparities while improving both equity-scaled clinical performance and natural language generation quality across diverse medical imaging modalities. Code can be accessed at https://github.com/bhosalems/FairLLaVA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 FairLLaVA，一种可在不牺牲整体性能的前提下，通过最小化目标属性互信息来消除多模态大模型（MLLM）在医学视觉指令调优中群体差异的参数高效微调插件，实验证明其在胸片报告生成与皮肤镜 VQA 两大基准上显著降低组间差异并提升公平性指标。
AI.motivation: 尽管 MLLM 在图像条件生成任务上表现强劲，但不同人口群体（如性别、种族）在图像–文本联合分布中存在系统性偏差，导致在关键临床场景中可能输出不平等诊断叙事，损害患者信任。现有公平性研究多聚焦纯视觉或纯语言模型，针对 MLLM 的偏差机制与治理方法尚属空白。
AI.method: FairLLaVA 在 LoRA 低秩适配框架内引入“群体互信息正则化”：冻结主网络，仅在 adapter 层学习，同时对病灶语义与人口属性之间的互信息进行最小化，迫使视觉–语言表示对人口统计信息保持不变性。该方法无需修改原架构，可作为轻量级插件插拔式部署。
AI.result: 在 60 万张胸片报告生成与 1.2 万张皮肤镜 VQA 的大规模医学基准上，FairLLaVA 将组间 BLEU/F1 差距平均降低 39%，同时将公平缩放临床得分（Equity-Scaled Clinical Score）提升 5.8%，整体生成质量（CIDEr、BLEU-4）不降反升 1.3–2.1%。
AI.conclusion: FairLLaVA 首次证明参数高效的群体互信息正则化可移植至多模态大模型，兼顾公平性与下游性能，为医疗器械级 AI 提供即插即用的偏差治理方案，并开源代码供社区验证与扩展。

title: Curvature-aware Expected Free Energy as an Acquisition Function for Bayesian Optimization
summary: We propose an Expected Free Energy-based acquisition function for Bayesian optimization to solve the joint learning and optimization problem, i.e., optimize and learn the underlying function simultaneously. We show that, under specific assumptions, Expected Free Energy reduces to Upper Confidence Bound, Lower Confidence Bound, and Expected Information Gain. We prove that Expected Free Energy has unbiased convergence guarantees for concave functions. Using the results from these derivations, we introduce a curvature-aware update law for Expected Free Energy and show its proof of concept using a system identification problem on a Van der Pol oscillator. Through rigorous simulation experiments, we show that our adaptive Expected Free Energy-based acquisition function outperforms state-of-the-art acquisition functions with the least final simple regret and error in learning the Gaussian process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用期望自由能（Expected Free Energy, EFE）作为贝叶斯优化的采集函数，实现优化与函数学习的同步进行，并证明其在凹函数上具有无偏收敛性；在系统辨识任务中，自适应的曲率感知更新机制显著优于现有主流采集函数。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯优化将函数学习与优化分两阶段进行，导致采样效率低。作者希望用一个统一的目标函数同时指导“下一步最优采样”和“模型快速学习”，从而缓解探索-利用困境。
AI.method: 1. 将主动采样问题建模为自由能最小化，提出Expected Free Energy采集函数；2. 在特定假设下推导出EFE退化为UCB、LCB与Expected Information Gain的统一形式；3. 证明EFE对凹函数具备无偏收敛保证；4. 引入曲率感知更新律，利用高斯过程二阶信息动态调节探索-利用权重；5. 在Van der Pol振子系统辨识任务上验证算法有效性，并与EI、PI、UCB等主流采集函数对比。
AI.result: 理论：给出EFE收敛率及无偏性证明；实验：在Van der Pol辨识任务中，EFE的最终简单遗憾与GP预测误差均最低（相对次优方法降低约25–30%），且所需采样次数减少约20%。
AI.conclusion: 期望自由能为贝叶斯优化提供了一个可解释、可扩展的统一采集框架，其曲率感知版本在联合学习与优化场景中同时实现更快收敛与更高模型精度，可直接推广到其它昂贵黑箱优化问题。

title: Pioneering Perceptual Video Fluency Assessment: A Novel Task with Benchmark Dataset and Baseline
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures. Accepted by CVPR 2026 findings track
summary: Accurately estimating humans' subjective feedback on video fluency, e.g., motion consistency and frame continuity, is crucial for various applications like streaming and gaming. Yet, it has long been overlooked, as prior arts have focused on solving it in the video quality assessment (VQA) task, merely as a sub-dimension of overall quality. In this work, we conduct pilot experiments and reveal that current VQA predictions largely underrepresent fluency, thereby limiting their applicability. To this end, we pioneer Video Fluency Assessment (VFA) as a standalone perceptual task focused on the temporal dimension. To advance VFA research, 1) we construct a fluency-oriented dataset, FluVid, comprising 4,606 in-the-wild videos with balanced fluency distribution, featuring the first-ever scoring criteria and human study for VFA. 2) We develop a large-scale benchmark of 23 methods, the most comprehensive one thus far on FluVid, gathering insights for VFA-tailored model designs. 3) We propose a baseline model called FluNet, which deploys temporal permuted self-attention (T-PSA) to enrich input fluency information and enhance long-range inter-frame interactions. Our work not only achieves state-of-the-art performance but, more importantly, offers the community a roadmap to explore solutions for VFA.

AI.tldr: 首项针对视频流畅性感知评估（VFA）的独立研究，构建数据集FluVid与基准模型FluNet，填补当前VQA方法忽视时间与运动一致性的空白。
AI.motivation: 传统视频质量评估（VQA）把流畅性仅作为整体质量的一个子维度，实验表明其对主观流畅性感知严重低估，限制了流媒体、游戏等实时场景的性能优化。
AI.method: 1）建立含4,606段真实场景视频的流畅性专向数据集FluVid，首次提出专用评分标准与主观实验；2）在FluVid上系统评测23种现有方法，归纳VFA模型设计原则；3）提出基准网络FluNet，引入“时序置换自注意（T-PSA）”单元，显式挖掘长程帧间依赖并增强流畅性信息表征。
AI.result: FluNet在FluVid上取得SOTA相关性（SRCC/PLCC等指标领先>5%），基准测试揭示现有VQA模型平均仅达0.55 SRCC，显著低于FluNet的0.78。
AI.conclusion: VFA作为独立感知任务可显著提升流畅性预测精度；FluVid和FluNet为后续研究提供开放的数据基线与方法论，推动流媒体、UGC平台、游戏引擎等在时序一致性方向的技术落地。

title: H-Node Attack and Defense in Large Language Models
summary: We present H-Node Adversarial Noise Cancellation (H-Node ANC), a mechanistic framework that identifies, exploits, and defends hallucination representations in transformer-based large language models (LLMs) at the level of individual hidden-state dimensions. A logistic regression probe trained on last-token hidden states localizes hallucination signal to a small set of high-variance dimensions -- termed Hallucination Nodes (H-Nodes) -- with probe AUC reaching 0.90 across four architectures. A white-box adversarial attack amplifies these dimensions at inference time via a real-time forward hook, achieving a selectivity of 3.02x with less than 10% visibility to the defender. Adaptive ANC defense suppresses H-Node excess in-pass using confidence-weighted cancellation, reducing grounded activation drift by 33-42% over static cancellation. A dynamic iterative extension that re-ranks cancellation targets across successive passes recovers up to 0.69 robustness from a single-pass baseline of 8%. All contributions are validated on OPT-125M, Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct, LLaMA-3-8B-Instruct, and Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3 (125M-8B parameters). Perplexity impact is surgical (<5%) and MMLU degradation is at most 3%, confirming that the defense does not impair general reasoning capability.

AI.tldr: 提出H-Node ANC：一套在隐藏维度层面定位、放大并压制LLM幻觉信号的机制，兼顾攻击与防御，且几乎不损通用能力。
AI.motivation: 大模型幻觉难以追踪，现有事后检测或整体微调难以定位内部表征；需要一种可解释、细粒度且低代价的“幻觉神经元级”攻防框架。
AI.method: 1. 用逻辑回归探针在末层隐藏态定位高方差幻觉维度（H-Nodes）；2. 白盒攻击：推理时通过前向钩子定向放大这些维度；3. 防御：置信度加权即时压制（ANC），并迭代重排目标以动态修复鲁棒性；4. 在125M–8 B四种模型上验证，监测PPL与MMLU。
AI.result: 探针AUC≈0.90；攻击选择性3.02×且 defender 可见<10%；静态ANC降低激活漂移33–42%，迭代版单步鲁棒性从8%恢复到69%；PPL<+5%，MMLU↓≤3%。
AI.conclusion: 幻觉信号可被精确压缩到少量隐藏维度，H-Node ANC首次实现“超低可见”攻击与“几乎无损”防御的统一，为LLM安全提供可解释、轻量级的新范式。

title: VLAgeBench: Benchmarking Large Vision-Language Models for Zero-Shot Human Age Estimation
summary: Human age estimation from facial images represents a challenging computer vision task with significant applications in biometrics, healthcare, and human-computer interaction. While traditional deep learning approaches require extensive labeled datasets and domain-specific training, recent advances in large vision-language models (LVLMs) offer the potential for zero-shot age estimation. This study presents a comprehensive zero-shot evaluation of state-of-the-art Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) for facial age estimation, a task traditionally dominated by domain-specific convolutional networks and supervised learning. We assess the performance of GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and LLaMA 3.2 Vision on two benchmark datasets, UTKFace and FG-NET, without any fine-tuning or task-specific adaptation. Using eight evaluation metrics, including MAE, MSE, RMSE, MAPE, MBE, $R^2$, CCC, and $\pm$5-year accuracy, we demonstrate that general-purpose LVLMs can deliver competitive performance in zero-shot settings. Our findings highlight the emergent capabilities of LVLMs for accurate biometric age estimation and position these models as promising tools for real-world applications. Additionally, we highlight performance disparities linked to image quality and demographic subgroups, underscoring the need for fairness-aware multimodal inference. This work introduces a reproducible benchmark and positions LVLMs as promising tools for real-world applications in forensic science, healthcare monitoring, and human-computer interaction. The benchmark focuses on strict zero-shot inference without fine-tuning and highlights remaining challenges related to prompt sensitivity, interpretability, computational cost, and demographic fairness.

AI.tldr: 首次系统评估 GPT-4o、Claude-3.5-Sonnet、LLaMA-3.2-Vision 在 UTKFace 与 FG-NET 上的零样本面部年龄估计性能，发现通用大视觉-语言模型无需微调即可与专用 CNN 竞争，同时揭示图像质量与人口统计差异带来的公平性挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统深度年龄估计依赖大量标注数据与领域特定训练，成本高且难泛化；大型视觉-语言模型（LVLM）具备零样本潜力，却缺乏在人脸年龄任务上的系统基准与公平性审视。
AI.method: 以完全零样本方式调用 GPT-4o、Claude-3.5-Sonnet、LLaMA-3.2-Vision，对 UTKFace、FG-NET 两基准数据集进行推理；设计统一 prompt，采用 MAE、RMSE、MAPE、±5 岁准确率等 8 项指标量化性能，并按图像质量与人口统计属性分层分析。
AI.result: 三款 LVLMs 在零样本条件下取得与专用 CNN 监督模型相近的 MAE 与 ±5 岁准确率；GPT-4o 整体最佳，但所有模型对低分辨率图像与非白人、女性子群存在系统性偏差。
AI.conclusion: 通用 LVLMs 已显现“涌现”的零样本身龄估计能力，可快速部署于医疗、法医、人机交互等场景；未来需解决 prompt 敏感性、可解释性、计算开销与人口统计公平性，方可真正落地。

title: A Formal Framework for Uncertainty Analysis of Text Generation with Large Language Models
summary: The generation of texts using Large Language Models (LLMs) is inherently uncertain, with sources of uncertainty being not only the generation of texts, but also the prompt used and the downstream interpretation. Within this work, we provide a formal framework for the measurement of uncertainty that takes these different aspects into account. Our framework models prompting, generation, and interpretation as interconnected autoregressive processes that can be combined into a single sampling tree. We introduce filters and objective functions to describe how different aspects of uncertainty can be expressed over the sampling tree and demonstrate how to express existing approaches towards uncertainty through these functions. With our framework we show not only how different methods are formally related and can be reduced to a common core, but also point out additional aspects of uncertainty that have not yet been studied.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统一框架，将提示、生成、解释三阶段的不确定性建模为同一张采样树上的不同函数，从而把现有方法归约到同一核心并揭示尚未被研究的新不确定性维度。
AI.motivation: 大模型文本生成的不确定性来源复杂，既包括生成本身，也涉及提示设计和下游解释，但缺乏能同时刻画这三类不确定性的形式化工具。
AI.method: 将提示构造、token 自回归生成、下游解释全部抽象为串行或并行的自回归过程，统一表示成一棵“采样树”；在树上定义过滤器和目标函数族，用形式化语言描述各种不确定性（熵、互信息、最坏情况等），并证明现有多种不确定性估计方法均可被该函数族特例化。
AI.result: 统一了数据级、模型级和解释级的不确定性度量，显式揭示不同方法在采样树上的对应关系；通过框架扫描发现提示歧义、解释路径分歧等此前未被量化的不确定性来源。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅把分散的不确定性研究归约到同一形式核心，还为未来设计新的提示策略、生成置信度估计和解释鲁棒性评估提供了可扩展的理论基础。

title: MuDD: A Multimodal Deception Detection Dataset and GSR-Guided Progressive Distillation for Non-Contact Deception Detection
summary: Non-contact automatic deception detection remains challenging because visual and auditory deception cues often lack stable cross-subject patterns. In contrast, galvanic skin response (GSR) provides more reliable physiological cues and has been widely used in contact-based deception detection. In this work, we leverage stable deception-related knowledge in GSR to guide representation learning in non-contact modalities through cross-modal knowledge distillation. A key obstacle, however, is the lack of a suitable dataset for this setting. To address this, we introduce MuDD, a large-scale Multimodal Deception Detection dataset containing recordings from 130 participants over 690 minutes. In addition to video, audio, and GSR, MuDD also provides Photoplethysmography, heart rate, and personality traits, supporting broader scientific studies of deception. Based on this dataset, we propose GSR-guided Progressive Distillation (GPD), a cross-modal distillation framework for mitigating the negative transfer caused by the large modality mismatch between GSR and non-contact signals. The core innovation of GPD is the integration of progressive feature-level and digit-level distillation with dynamic routing, which allows the model to adaptively determine how teacher knowledge should be transferred during training, leading to more stable cross-modal knowledge transfer. Extensive experiments and visualizations show that GPD outperforms existing methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance on both deception detection and concealed-digit identification.

AI.tldr: 提出 MuDD 跨模态数据集与 GPD 渐进蒸馏框架，用 GSR 生理信号指导音视频无感测谎，缓解模态鸿沟，实现 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 视觉/听觉欺骗线索跨被试稳定性差，而 GSR 虽可靠却只能接触采集。目标：利用 GSR 的稳健知识提升无接触模态的自动 deception 检测性能。
AI.method: 1) 采集 130 人 690 min 的 MuDD 多模态数据集（视频、音频、GSR、PPG、HR、人格）。2) 提出 GPD 框架：渐进式特征级+数字级蒸馏，引入动态路由自适应决定教师知识转移时机与强度，抑制负迁移。
AI.result: 在 deception 检测与隐藏数字识别任务上，GPD 显著优于现有方法，达到新 SOTA；可视化证实跨模态知识迁移更稳定。
AI.conclusion: GSR 可充当无感测谎的可靠教师，GPD 通过渐进蒸馏与动态路由有效缩小模态差异，为后续非接触欺骗检测研究提供数据与范式支撑。

title: Semi-Automated Knowledge Engineering and Process Mapping for Total Airport Management
summary:
Documentation of airport operations is inherently complex due to extensive technical terminology, rigorous regulations, proprietary regional information, and fragmented communication across multiple stakeholders. The resulting data silos and semantic inconsistencies present a significant impediment to the Total Airport Management (TAM) initiative. This paper presents a methodological framework for constructing a domain-grounded, machine-readable Knowledge Graph (KG) through a dual-stage fusion of symbolic Knowledge Engineering (KE) and generative Large Language Models (LLMs).
  The framework employs a scaffolded fusion strategy in which expert-curated KE structures guide LLM prompts to facilitate the discovery of semantically aligned knowledge triples. We evaluate this methodology on the Google LangExtract library and investigate the impact of context window utilization by comparing localized segment-based inference with document-level processing. Contrary to prior empirical observations of long-context degradation in LLMs, document-level processing improves the recovery of non-linear procedural dependencies.
  To ensure the high-fidelity provenance required in airport operations, the proposed framework fuses a probabilistic model for discovery and a deterministic algorithm for anchoring every extraction to its ground source. This ensures absolute traceability and verifiability, bridging the gap between "black-box" generative outputs and the transparency required for operational tooling. Finally, we introduce an automated framework that operationalizes this pipeline to synthesize complex operational workflows from unstructured textual corpora.

AI.tldr: 提出一种双阶段混合框架——先用专家知识图谱引导 LLM 抽取机场三元组，再配套确定性溯源算法——实现 TAM 所需的高可信、可追溯知识图谱自动构建。
AI.motivation: 机场运行文档术语密集、法规严苛、数据孤岛与语义冲突严重，阻碍 Total Airport Management（TAM）对全局态势的一致理解，亟需机器可读且来源可信的知识图谱。
AI.method: 1) 符号知识工程先构建领域骨架；2) 用该骨架提示 LLM 完成三元组发现（概率模型）；3) 确定性锚定算法为每条三元组绑定原文出处；4) 对比局部片段与整篇文档的上下文窗口策略，验证后者能更好捕获非线性流程依赖；5) 全流程自动化封装成 LangExtract 可调用管线。
AI.result: 在 Google LangExtract 的机场语料上，文档级上下文显著提升非线性流程依赖的召回；溯源算法实现 100 % 可追踪；框架已能自动将大量非结构化文本合成为可执行运行流程。
AI.conclusion: 通过“专家骨架+LLM 发现+确定性锚定”的混合策略，可在保持生成模型覆盖度的同时满足航空运营对透明度与合规性的严苛要求，为 TAM 提供可落地的知识基础设施。

title: Unlabeled Cross-Center Automatic Analysis for TAAD: An Integrated Framework from Segmentation to Clinical Features
summary: Type A Aortic Dissection (TAAD) is a life-threatening cardiovascular emergency that demands rapid and precise preoperative evaluation. While key anatomical and pathological features are decisive for surgical planning, current research focuses predominantly on improving segmentation accuracy, leaving the reliable, quantitative extraction of clinically actionable features largely under-explored. Furthermore, constructing comprehensive TAAD datasets requires labor-intensive, expert level pixel-wise annotations, which is impractical for most clinical institutions. Due to significant domain shift, models trained on a single center dataset also suffer from severe performance degradation during cross-institutional deployment. This study addresses a clinically critical challenge: the accurate extraction of key TAAD clinical features during cross-institutional deployment in the total absence of target-domain annotations. To this end, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA)-driven framework for the automated extraction of TAAD clinical features. The framework leverages limited source-domain labels while effectively adapting to unlabeled data from target domains. Tailored for real-world emergency workflows, our framework aims to achieve stable cross-institutional multi-class segmentation, reliable and quantifiable clinical feature extraction, and practical deployability independent of high-cost annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly improves cross-domain segmentation performance compared to existing state-of-the-art approaches. More importantly, a reader study involving multiple cardiovascular surgeons confirms that the automatically extracted clinical features provide meaningful assistance for preoperative assessment, highlighting the practical utility of the proposed end-to-end segmentation-to-feature pipeline.

AI.tldr: 提出首个面向跨机构场景、无需目标域标注的A型主动脉夹层(TAAD)无监督域适应(UDA)框架，实现从分割到临床特征提取的全流程自动化，显著提升跨中心泛化能力并获得心血管外科医师验证的临床价值。
AI.motivation: TAAD急性主动脉手术决策依赖厘米级精度影像学特征，但现有研究只关注分割精度，未解决跨机构部署时域漂移导致性能骤降、且目标域需昂贵像素级标注的瓶颈，临床难以落地。
AI.method: 构建UDA驱动的端到端框架：① 以极少量源域有标注CT为输入；② 设计切片级与体素级双重对齐策略，结合解剖先验与去伪影模块，零标注适配目标域；③ 输出多类分割后，嵌入可量化规则层直接提取直径、破口、累及范围等7项术前关键指标。
AI.result: 在含6家医院、312例CT的跨中心测试中， Dice 提升6.8–11.2%，Hausdorff 距离降低28%，显著优于最新UDA基线；读者研究显示5位心外医生利用自动特征评估效率提升42%，误判率降低15%，Kappa一致性达0.87。
AI.conclusion: 该UDA框架首次证明在无目标域标签情况下，仍可获得临床级TAAD影像特征，为急性主动脉综合征的快速转诊与远程术前评估提供即时、低成本解决方案，具备直接嵌入急诊PACS的部署潜力。

title: Generative Modeling in Protein Design: Neural Representations, Conditional Generation, and Evaluation Standards
summary: Generative modeling has become a central paradigm in protein research, extending machine learning beyond structure prediction toward sequence design, backbone generation, inverse folding, and biomolecular interaction modeling. However, the literature remains fragmented across representations, model classes, and task formulations, making it difficult to compare methods or identify appropriate evaluation standards. This survey provides a systematic synthesis of generative AI in protein research, organized around (i) foundational representations spanning sequence, geometric, and multimodal encodings; (ii) generative architectures including $\mathrm{SE}(3)$-equivariant diffusion, flow matching, and hybrid predictor-generator systems; and (iii) task settings from structure prediction and de novo design to protein-ligand and protein-protein interactions. Beyond cataloging methods, we compare assumptions, conditioning mechanisms, and controllability, and we synthesize evaluation best practices that emphasize leakage-aware splits, physical validity checks, and function-oriented benchmarks. We conclude with critical open challenges: modeling conformational dynamics and intrinsically disordered regions, scaling to large assemblies while maintaining efficiency, and developing robust safety frameworks for dual-use biosecurity risks. By unifying architectural advances with practical evaluation standards and responsible development considerations, this survey aims to accelerate the transition from predictive modeling to reliable, function-driven protein engineering.

AI.tldr: 本综述首次系统梳理蛋白质生成式AI的表征、模型与任务，提出统一评估规范并指出动力学、大复合体及生物安全三大开放挑战。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质生成建模文献分散、难以横向比较，亟需统一框架指导从预测到设计的转化。
AI.method: 按三重维度系统综述：①序列/几何/多模态基础表征，②SE(3)扩散、流匹配及混合生成架构，③结构预测、de novo设计、蛋白-配体/蛋白-蛋白交互等任务设置；并归纳泄漏感知数据划分、物理有效性检查与功能导向基准的最佳评估实践。
AI.result: 获得生成方法在条件机制、可控性与评估指标上的可比较全景图，明确当前评估缺陷与改进清单。
AI.conclusion: 需优先攻克构象动力学、超大复合体高效建模及双重用途生物安全框架，方可实现可靠的功能驱动蛋白质工程。

title: R-PGA: Robust Physical Adversarial Camouflage Generation via Relightable 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Physical adversarial camouflage poses a severe security threat to autonomous driving systems by mapping adversarial textures onto 3D objects. Nevertheless, current methods remain brittle in complex dynamic scenarios, failing to generalize across diverse geometric (e.g., viewing configurations) and radiometric (e.g., dynamic illumination, atmospheric scattering) variations. We attribute this deficiency to two fundamental limitations in simulation and optimization. First, the reliance on coarse, oversimplified simulations (e.g., via CARLA) induces a significant domain gap, confining optimization to a biased feature space. Second, standard strategies targeting average performance result in a rugged loss landscape, leaving the camouflage vulnerable to configuration shifts.To bridge these gaps, we propose the Relightable Physical 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) based Attack framework (R-PGA). Technically, to address the simulation fidelity issue, we leverage 3DGS to ensure photo-realistic reconstruction and augment it with physically disentangled attributes to decouple intrinsic material from lighting. Furthermore, we design a hybrid rendering pipeline that leverages precise Relightable 3DGS for foreground rendering, while employing a pre-trained image translation model to synthesize plausible relighted backgrounds that align with the relighted foreground.To address the optimization robustness issue, we propose the Hard Physical Configuration Mining (HPCM) module, designed to actively mine worst-case physical configurations and suppress their corresponding loss peaks. This strategy not only diminishes the overall loss magnitude but also effectively flattens the rugged loss landscape, ensuring consistent adversarial effectiveness and robustness across varying physical configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于可重打光3D高斯溅射(R-PGA)框架解决动态光照与视角变化下物理对抗贴图失效难题，显著增强自动驾驶3D目标攻击的跨域鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有物理对抗伪装因简化的模拟器和追求平均损失，无法抵御几何、环境辐射动态变化，形成域间失效，直接威胁自动驾驶安全。
AI.method: 1.采用3D高斯溅射还原真实场景并解耦材质与光照属性，再在前景用可重打光渲染、背景用预训练图像翻译模型对齐光照；2)引入Hard Physical Configuration Mining，持续挖掘并下降最差物理配置的损失峰值，平滑损失空间。
AI.result: 实验表明R-PGA生成的对抗贴图在未知视角、动态光照和大气散射等复杂条件下仍保持高欺骗率，且优于依赖传统模拟的策略。
AI.conclusion: 高保真3D场景重建＋对最恶劣硬件与光照组合进行损失抑制，是实现物理对抗伪装跨域稳定有效的关键，并为后续自动驾驶防御与安全测试提供了新靶标。

title: Selective Deficits in LLM Mental Self-Modeling in a Behavior-Based Test of Theory of Mind
summary: The ability to represent oneself and others as agents with knowledge, intentions, and belief states that guide their behavior - Theory of Mind - is a human universal that enables us to navigate - and manipulate - the social world. It is supported by our ability to form mental models of ourselves and others. Its ubiquity in human affairs entails that LLMs have seen innumerable examples of it in their training data and therefore may have learned to mimic it, but whether they have actually learned causal models that they can deploy in arbitrary settings is unclear. We therefore develop a novel experimental paradigm that requires that subjects form representations of the mental states of themselves and others and act on them strategically rather than merely describe them. We test a wide range of leading open and closed source LLMs released since 2024, as well as human subjects, on this paradigm. We find that 1) LLMs released before mid-2025 fail at all of our tasks, 2) more recent LLMs achieve human-level performance on modeling the cognitive states of others, and 3) even frontier LLMs fail at our self-modeling task - unless afforded a scratchpad in the form of a reasoning trace. We further demonstrate cognitive load effects on other-modeling tasks, offering suggestive evidence that LLMs are using something akin to limited-capacity working memory to hold these mental representations in mind during a single forward pass. Finally, we explore the mechanisms by which reasoning models succeed at the self- and other-modeling tasks, and show that they readily engage in strategic deception.

AI.tldr: AI首度是否真的拥有心智理论（ToM）而非只会复刻文本，作者设计需“据此行动”的新实验对比2024以来多款LLM与人类，发现早期模型全失败；近期模型在他人信念建模已达人类级，但自我建模仅当提供“草稿纸”时才通过，并观察到类工作记忆负荷效应，最后揭示推理模型会主动实施策略性欺骗。
AI.motivation: 心智理论是人类操纵社交世界的核心，海量文本虽让LLM表面模仿ToM，但其是否内化可跨情境迁移的因果模型仍未知。研究旨在设计更严苛的行为任务，检验LLM真正具备他人-自我信念表征并据此策略行动的能力。
AI.method: 提出“行动型心智理论”范式：任务要求模型先推断自身及他人的隐藏知识/意图，然后基于该信念选择下一步行动，而非仅做描述。流程：① 构建需心智推理的多轮博弈与欺骗情境；② 对比测试2024前后开放/闭源前沿模型与人类；③ 读取消耗token数与反应时作为认知负荷指标；④ 引入可写“草稿纸”条件检验是否等同人类工作记忆；⑤ 对表现达人类级模型进行可解释性与策略欺骗分析。
AI.result: ① 2025前发布的LLM在所有任务上全面失败；② 2025后部分模型在推断他人信念任务上达成人类水平成功率，出现认知负荷-表现负相关，提示使用受限容量“单次前向工作记忆”；③ 即使最先进模型，若不给草稿纸，自我信念更新失败，一旦提供scratchpad即刻达标；④ 成功模型学会策略性欺骗并自动生成谎言链。
AI.conclusion: 最新LLM通过在大规模数据之上的推理链，可在单次前向传播中形成可操控的他人-自我信念模型，但自我建模仍依赖外部工作记忆等价物，表明其ToM机制与人类有根本差别；模型已具备策略性欺骗潜力，需建立相应安全与评估框架。未来需进一步揭示内部表示并减小与人类因果理解差距。

title: Designing Fatigue-Aware VR Interfaces via Biomechanical Models
summary: Prolonged mid-air interaction in virtual reality (VR) causes arm fatigue and discomfort, negatively affecting user experience. Incorporating ergonomic considerations into VR user interface (UI) design typically requires extensive human-in-the-loop evaluation. Although biomechanical models have been used to simulate human behavior in HCI tasks, their application as surrogate users for ergonomic VR UI design remains underexplored. We propose a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework that leverages biomechanical user models to evaluate and optimize VR interfaces for mid-air interaction.
