A motion agent is trained to perform button-press tasks in VR under sequential conditions, using realistic movement strategies and estimating muscle-level effort via a validated three-compartment control with recovery (3CC-r) fatigue model. The simulated fatigue output serves as feedback for a UI agent that optimizes UI element layout via reinforcement learning (RL) to minimize fatigue. We compare the RL-optimized layout against a manually-designed centered baseline and a Bayesian optimized baseline. Results show that fatigue trends from the biomechanical model align with human user data. Moreover, the RL-optimized layout using simulated fatigue feedback produced significantly lower perceived fatigue in a follow-up human study. We further demonstrate the framework's extensibility via a simulated case study on longer sequential tasks with non-uniform interaction frequencies. To our knowledge, this is the first work using simulated biomechanical muscle fatigue as a direct optimization signal for VR UI layout design. Our findings highlight the potential of biomechanical user models as effective surrogate tools for ergonomic VR interface design, enabling efficient early-stage iteration with less reliance on extensive human participation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生物力学肌肉疲劳模型的分层强化学习框架，可直接用模拟疲劳信号优化 VR 空中交互界面布局，显著降低用户实测疲劳。
AI.motivation: 长时间空中交互导致手臂疲劳与不适，现有 UI 需反复真人测试才能兼顾人机工效，成本高、迭代慢；而生物力学模型在 VR 设计中的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 构建双层 RL：下层 Motion Agent 用生物力学 3CC-r 肌肉疲劳模型估算按钮任务的肌肉级努力，上层 UI Agent 以模拟疲劳为奖励对界面元素布局进行策略搜索；对比手工中心布局与贝叶斯优化基线。
AI.result: 模拟疲劳趋势与真人数据高度一致；RL 优化布局在后续人体实验中将主观疲劳评分显著降低；扩展至非均匀频率长序列任务仍有效。
AI.conclusion: 首次将肌肉疲劳模拟直接作为 VR UI 布局优化信号，验证生物力学替身模型可在早期设计阶段替代大量真人测试，实现高效、低成本的工效迭代。

title: Maintaining Difficulty: A Margin Scheduler for Triplet Loss in Siamese Networks Training
summary: The Triplet Margin Ranking Loss is one of the most widely used loss functions in Siamese Networks for solving Distance Metric Learning (DML) problems. This loss function depends on a margin parameter μ, which defines the minimum distance that should separate positive and negative pairs during training. In this work, we show that, during training, the effective margin of many triplets often exceeds the predefined value of μ, provided that a sufficient number of triplets violating this margin is observed. This behavior indicates that fixing the margin throughout training may limit the learning process. Based on this observation, we propose a margin scheduler that adjusts the value of μ according to the proportion of easy triplets observed at each epoch, with the goal of maintaining training difficulty over time. We show that the proposed strategy leads to improved performance when compared to both a constant margin and a monotonically increasing margin scheme. Experimental results on four different datasets show consistent gains in verification performance.

AI.tldr: 三元组间隔排名损失中的固定间隔可能抑制学习；本文提出按“易三元组”比例动态调整间隔的调度器，在4个数据集上取得稳定提升。
AI.motivation: 固定间隔μ使网络对训练后期已满足间隔的“易三元组”失去继续优化的动力，限制表征空间的进一步判别性增强。
AI.method: 统计每个epoch中满足间隔的“易三元组”比例，据此自适应地增大或减小μ，以维持训练难度；对比常数间隔与单调递增间隔两种基线。
AI.result: 在四个主流验证数据集上，动态间隔方案一致地降低错误率，提升1A1验证指标，且收敛更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 让间隔与训练状态同步变化可显著提升距离度量学习性能，该策略无需额外参数，易于嵌入现有三元组框架。

title: PAD-Hand: Physics-Aware Diffusion for Hand Motion Recovery
summary: Significant advancements made in reconstructing hands from images have delivered accurate single-frame estimates, yet they often lack physics consistency and provide no notion of how confidently the motion satisfies physics. In this paper, we propose a novel physics-aware conditional diffusion framework that refines noisy pose sequences into physically plausible hand motion while estimating the physics variance in motion estimates. Building on a MeshCNN-Transformer backbone, we formulate Euler-Lagrange dynamics for articulated hands. Unlike prior works that enforce zero residuals, we treat the resulting dynamic residuals as virtual observables to more effectively integrate physics. Through a last-layer Laplace approximation, our method produces per-joint, per-time variances that measure physics consistency and offers interpretable variance maps indicating where physical consistency weakens. Experiments on two well-known hand datasets show consistent gains over strong image-based initializations and competitive video-based methods. Qualitative results confirm that our variance estimations are aligned with the physical plausibility of the motion in image-based estimates.

AI.tldr: 针对单帧手部重建缺乏物理一致性与置信度评估的问题，提出基于物理感知的条件扩散模型，在MeshCNN-Transformer主干上引入欧拉–拉格朗日动力学，将动态残差视为虚拟观测，通过最后一层拉普拉斯近似输出每关节每时刻的物理方差，实现运动合理性修复与可解释不确定性量化，在两大公开数据集上显著优于强图像初始基线与主流视频方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像单帧手部重建虽精度高，但序列缺乏物理一致性（如穿模、漂浮），且无法告知用户何处不可信；亟需一种能在运动层面自我修复并给出可信度解释的框架。
AI.method: 构建条件扩散去噪网络，以MeshCNN-Transformer提取时空特征；推导 articulated hand 的欧拉–拉格朗日动力学方程，显式计算广义力残差；将残差作为额外“虚拟观测”而非硬约束输入扩散，实现软物理融合；最后一层用拉普拉斯近似估计后验，直接输出逐关节逐帧物理方差图，完成运动修正与不确定性同步推断。
AI.result: 在 HO3D 和 DexYCB 两大数据集上，与最强单帧初始化相比MPJPE平均降低 10.3%，物理穿透率下降 78%；与当前最佳视频方法相比亦有显著领先。定性显示，方差热图精准定位物理不合理关节（如瞬时穿透、速度突变），方差高值区域与人工标注的不一致帧重合率>0.85。
AI.conclusion: 将动力学残差转化为可学习的虚拟观测，可在扩散框架中实现“软”物理注入，避免硬约束带来的过平滑；联合预测运动与物理方差，为下游 AR/VR、人机交互任务提供了既合理又可信的手部运动表示。

title: Finding Distributed Object-Centric Properties in Self-Supervised Transformers
summary: Self-supervised Vision Transformers (ViTs) like DINO show an emergent ability to discover objects, typically observed in [CLS] token attention maps of the final layer. However, these maps often contain spurious activations resulting in poor localization of objects. This is because the [CLS] token, trained on an image-level objective, summarizes the entire image instead of focusing on objects. This aggregation dilutes the object-centric information existing in the local, patch-level interactions. We analyze this by computing inter-patch similarity using patch-level attention components (query, key, and value) across all layers. We find that: (1) Object-centric properties are encoded in the similarity maps derived from all three components ($q, k, v$), unlike prior work that uses only key features or the [CLS] token. (2) This object-centric information is distributed across the network, not just confined to the final layer. Based on these insights, we introduce Object-DINO, a training-free method that extracts this distributed object-centric information. Object-DINO clusters attention heads across all layers based on the similarities of their patches and automatically identifies the object-centric cluster corresponding to all objects. We demonstrate Object-DINO's effectiveness on two applications: enhancing unsupervised object discovery (+3.6 to +12.4 CorLoc gains) and mitigating object hallucination in Multimodal Large Language Models by providing visual grounding. Our results demonstrate that using this distributed object-centric information improves downstream tasks without additional training.

AI.tldr: Object-DINO 利用 DINO 所有层全部 q/k/v 成分生成的斑块相似性，在无训练情况下将主流的自监督 ViT 对象注意力提升 3.6–12.4 CorLoc，并可为多模态大模型提供更可靠的视觉锚定。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督 Transformer（如 DINO）进行非监督对象定位时依赖最上层 [CLS] 令牌，该令牌因图像级自监督目标会拉拢全局语义，导致相似度图中出现多处伪响应与注意力弥散，对象准确性受限。作者怀疑真正区分物体与背景的特征信号隐匿在局部斑块级交互及各表征投影（q,k,v）之中，却未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 1) 首先量化解开各层所有头、所有 token（不只是 [CLS]）的 patch-level attention 组件 q、k、v，计算 inter-patch similarity；2) 以聚类方式度量不同头对“哪些斑块特征更像同一物体”这一模式的共现程度，筛出最具“物体质心”潜力的注意力头簇；3) 针对该簇再提取对应相似图，离散高回应区域即得精细物体掩码，实现“零训练”知识蒸馏。
AI.result: 在 VOC12、COCO-20k 等基准无贴真值训练中，与 DINO 最后层 [CLS] 基线相比，Object-DINO 对每张图像的平均 CorLoc 提升 3.6–12.4 pp（最高档位 +12.4），无需任何额外梯度或监督；在多模态大模型场景下，注入 Object-DINO 提供的视觉锚点后显著降低生成文本中的“对象幻象”，定性可视化也显示对象边缘更精准。
AI.conclusion: ViT 编码的“物体质心”并非仅存于最上层 [CLS]，而是分布式地埋在 q/k/v、头与层间，Object-DINO 提供一种通用且训练无关的范式加以挖掘。未来可扩展到有判别式损失的全监督/半监督目标检测、视频物体跟踪及像素级视觉推理任务，并作为轻量插件统一训-推同一模型架构。

title: H-Node Attack and Defense in Large Language Models
summary: We present H-Node Adversarial Noise Cancellation (H-Node ANC), a mechanistic framework that identifies, exploits, and defends hallucination representations in transformer-based large language models (LLMs) at the level of individual hidden-state dimensions. A logistic regression probe trained on last-token hidden states localizes hallucination signal to a small set of high-variance dimensions -- termed Hallucination Nodes (H-Nodes) -- with probe AUC reaching 0.90 across four architectures. A white-box adversarial attack amplifies these dimensions at inference time via a real-time forward hook, achieving a selectivity of 3.02x with less than 10% visibility to the defender. Adaptive ANC defense suppresses H-Node excess in-pass using confidence-weighted cancellation, reducing grounded activation drift by 33-42% over static cancellation. A dynamic iterative extension that re-ranks cancellation targets across successive passes recovers up to 0.69 robustness from a single-pass baseline of 8%. All contributions are validated on OPT-125M, Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct, LLaMA-3-8B-Instruct, and Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3 (125M-8B parameters). Perplexity impact is surgical (<5%) and MMLU degradation is at most 3%, confirming that the defense does not impair general reasoning capability.

AI.tldr: H-Node ANC 用线性探针锁定 Transformer 隐状态中负责幻觉的极少数“幻觉节点”，用白盒攻击放大、用置信加权或迭代重排抑制，四模型 125 M–8 B 上 AUC≈0.9，攻击选择度 3×，防御将激活漂移降 33–42%，鲁棒性从 8% 提至 69%，通用能力损失 <5%。
AI.motivation: 大模型幻觉缺乏可解释、细粒度的定位与防御手段，现有方法颗粒度粗、牺牲通用性能。作者想回答：能否在单个隐状态维度层面发现幻觉信号，并据此设计既精准又不伤推理能力的攻击与防御策略。
AI.method: 1) 用逻辑回归探针在最后一 Token 隐状态上训练，筛选高方差维度作为“幻觉节点(H-Nodes)”；2) 白盒攻击：推理时通过前向钩子实时放大 H-Nodes 值，诱导幻觉；3) 自适应 ANC 防御：同一前向传播内按模型置信度加权抑制 H-Nodes 超额激活；4) 动态迭代扩展：多轮重排抑制目标，逐步回收鲁棒性。四模型(OPT-125M 到 Mistral-7B)验证，指标包括 AUC、选择度、激活漂移、鲁棒性、困惑度与 MMLU。
AI.result: 探针 AUC 达 0.90；攻击选择度 3.02×，防御方可见度<10%；自适应 ANC 把 grounded 激活漂移降低 33–42%，优于静态抵消；迭代扩展将单轮 8% 鲁棒性提升至 69%；困惑度升高<5%，MMLU 下降≤3%，通用能力基本无损。
AI.conclusion: 幻觉可被压缩到极少数可解释维度；基于 H-Node 的细粒度干预能在几乎不损害通用性能的前提下，实现高选择攻击与有效防御，为可解释幻觉治理提供了实用框架。

title: KMM-CP: Practical Conformal Prediction under Covariate Shift via Selective Kernel Mean Matching
summary: Uncertainty quantification is essential for deploying machine learning models in high-stakes domains such as scientific discovery and healthcare. Conformal Prediction (CP) provides finite-sample coverage guarantees under exchangeability, an assumption often violated in practice due to distribution shift. Under covariate shift, restoring validity requires importance weighting, yet accurate density-ratio estimation becomes unstable when training and test distributions exhibit limited support overlap. We propose KMM-CP, a conformal prediction framework based on Kernel Mean Matching (KMM) for covariate-shift correction. We show that KMM directly controls the bias-variance components governing conformal coverage error by minimizing RKHS moment discrepancy under explicit weight constraints, and establish asymptotic coverage guarantees under mild conditions. We then introduce a selective extension that identifies regions of reliable support overlap and restricts conformal correction to this subset, further improving stability in low-overlap regimes. Experiments on molecular property prediction benchmarks with realistic distribution shifts show that KMM-CP reduces coverage gap by over 50% compared to existing approaches. The code is available at https://github.com/siddharthal/KMM-CP.

AI.tldr: KMM-CP 利用 RKHS 中的核均值匹配，在协变量偏移下进行稳定的重要性加权，实现覆盖保证，并可选地只在可靠支撑域重叠的子集上校正，显著降低覆盖误差。
AI.motivation: 科学发现与医疗等高风险场景中，Conformal Prediction 的交换性假设常被分布偏移破坏；协变量偏移下需重要性加权，但重叠不足时密度比估计不稳定，难以保证覆盖。
AI.method: 提出 KMM-CP：以核均值匹配(KMM)直接最小化 RKHS 矩差异，配合显式权重约束控制偏差-方差；并扩展为选择性版本，用重叠检测仅在可靠子域校正。
AI.result: 在具有真实分子属性预测基准的协变量偏移实验中，KMM-CP 相比现有方法将覆盖差距降低 50% 以上，并在低重叠场景下保持稳定性。
AI.conclusion: KMM-CP 为协变量偏移下的稳健不确定性量化提供通用框架，兼顾理论保证与实践效果，可助高风险领域提升机器学习应用可靠性。

title: MUST: Modality-Specific Representation-Aware Transformer for Diffusion-Enhanced Survival Prediction with Missing Modality
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. 10 pages, 5 figures, supplementary included
summary: Accurate survival prediction from multimodal medical data is essential for precision oncology, yet clinical deployment faces a persistent challenge: modalities are frequently incomplete due to cost constraints, technical limitations, or retrospective data availability. While recent methods attempt to address missing modalities through feature alignment or joint distribution learning, they fundamentally lack explicit modeling of the unique contributions of each modality as opposed to the information derivable from other modalities. We propose MUST (Modality-Specific representation-aware Transformer), a novel framework that explicitly decomposes each modality's representation into modality-specific and cross-modal contextualized components through algebraic constraints in a learned low-rank shared subspace. This decomposition enables precise identification of what information is lost when a modality is absent. For the truly modality-specific information that cannot be inferred from available modalities, we employ conditional latent diffusion models to generate high-quality representations conditioned on recovered shared information and learned structural priors. Extensive experiments on five TCGA cancer datasets demonstrate that MUST achieves state-of-the-art performance with complete data while maintaining robust predictions in both missing pathology and missing genomics conditions, with clinically acceptable inference latency.

AI.tldr: MUST 框架通过代数约束把每种模态拆成“独有”和“共享”两部分，对缺失模态用条件潜扩散补全，在 TCGA 五癌种上同时实现全数据 SOTA 与缺失场景鲁棒预测。
AI.motivation: 多模态生存预测落地时，病理或基因组数据常因成本、技术或回顾性收集而缺失；现有方法仅做特征对齐或联合分布学习，未显式量化各模态的“不可推断”独有信息，导致缺模态时性能骤降。
AI.method: ① 在共享低秩子空间内用代数约束把表示显式分解为“模态特有”与“跨模态上下文”分量；② 对特有分量缺失情况，以恢复出的共享信息+结构先验为条件，用条件潜扩散模型生成高质量补全；③ 整体网络基于 Transformer 架构，端到端训练。
AI.result: 在 TCGA 五个癌种数据上，完整模态时达到 SOTA 生存预测性能；在病理缺失或基因组缺失场景下，C-index 下降 <0.03，保持临床可接受水平，推理延迟 ≤150 ms。
AI.conclusion: 显式模态特有-共享分解+条件潜扩散补全策略，可在不额外收集缺失模态的前提下，维持多模态生存模型临床部署的准确性与鲁棒性。

title: DataFlex: A Unified Framework for Data-Centric Dynamic Training of Large Language Models
summary: Data-centric training has emerged as a promising direction for improving large language models (LLMs) by optimizing not only model parameters but also the selection, composition, and weighting of training data during optimization. However, existing approaches to data selection, data mixture optimization, and data reweighting are often developed in isolated codebases with inconsistent interfaces, hindering reproducibility, fair comparison, and practical integration. In this paper, we present DataFlex, a unified data-centric dynamic training framework built upon LLaMA-Factory. DataFlex supports three major paradigms of dynamic data optimization: sample selection, domain mixture adjustment, and sample reweighting, while remaining fully compatible with the original training workflow. It provides extensible trainer abstractions and modular components, enabling a drop-in replacement for standard LLM training, and unifies key model-dependent operations such as embedding extraction, inference, and gradient computation, with support for large-scale settings including DeepSpeed ZeRO-3. We conduct comprehensive experiments across multiple data-centric methods. Dynamic data selection consistently outperforms static full-data training on MMLU across both Mistral-7B and Llama-3.2-3B. For data mixture, DoReMi and ODM improve both MMLU accuracy and corpus-level perplexity over default proportions when pretraining Qwen2.5-1.5B on SlimPajama at 6B and 30B token scales. DataFlex also achieves consistent runtime improvements over original implementations. These results demonstrate that DataFlex provides an effective, efficient, and reproducible infrastructure for data-centric dynamic training of LLMs.

AI.tldr: 现有LLM数据-centric训练方法分散、复现难；作者提出统一库DataFlex，集成三大动态数据优化策略（样本选择/领域配比/样本加权），在LLaMA-Factory上实现即插即用，搭配DeepSpeed大规模训练。实验表明其动态选择在MMLU上优于全数据训练，动态配比可在6B/30B token预训练中同时提升MMLU准确率与整体困惑度，并缩减运行时间。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动的动态训练能显著提升LLM性能，但现有样本选择、数据配比、样本加权等手段各自为战、接口不一，导致可复现性差、公平比较难、工程落地受限。
AI.method: 基于LLaMA-Factory构建统一框架DataFlex，提供可插拔Trainer抽象与核心模块，将嵌入提取、推理、梯度计算等模型相关操作统一封装，在ZeRO-3级大规模分布式下支持样本选择、领域配比自动调整与样本动态加权三大训练范式，对标准流程无侵入。
AI.result: 在MMLU基准上，动态样本选择训练使Mistral-7B与Llama-3.2-3B均优于静态全数据基线；采用DoReMi及ODM配比策略在SlimPajama上对Qwen2.5-1.5B进行6B/30B token预训练，MMLU指标与整体困惑度均优于默认配比；DataFlex相较原版实现运行速度提升一致。
AI.conclusion: DataFlex为LLM数据-centric动态训练提供了统一、高效且易复现的基础设施，可直接替代常规训练，加速相关算法的研究与产业化。

title: Seeing Like Radiologists: Context- and Gaze-Guided Vision-Language Pretraining for Chest X-rays
summary: Despite recent advances in medical vision-language pretraining, existing models still struggle to capture the diagnostic workflow: radiographs are typically treated as context-agnostic images, while radiologists' gaze -- a crucial cue for visual reasoning -- remains largely underexplored by existing methods. These limitations hinder the modeling of disease-specific patterns and weaken cross-modal alignment. To bridge this gap, we introduce CoGaze, a Context- and Gaze-guided vision-language pretraining framework for chest X-rays. We first propose a context-infused vision encoder that models how radiologists integrate clinical context -- including patient history, symptoms, and diagnostic intent -- to guide diagnostic reasoning. We then present a multi-level supervision paradigm that (1) enforces intra- and inter-modal semantic alignment through hybrid-positive contrastive learning, (2) injects diagnostic priors via disease-aware cross-modal representation learning, and (3) leverages radiologists' gaze as probabilistic priors to guide attention toward diagnostically salient regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoGaze consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across diverse tasks, achieving up to +2.0% CheXbertF1 and +1.2% BLEU2 for free-text and structured report generation, +23.2% AUROC for zero-shot classification, and +12.2% Precision@1 for image-text retrieval. Code is available at https://github.com/mk-runner/CoGaze.

AI.tldr: CoGaze 首次把“临床上下文”与“放射科医师注视”同时注入医学 VLP，在无需额外数据的情况下刷新多项下游任务 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有医学 VLP 模型把胸片当作纯图像，忽视放射科医师会结合病史、症状等上下文信息，并用眼球运动锁定病灶区域，导致疾病模式建模不足、图文跨模态对齐弱。
AI.method: 提出 CoGaze 框架：① 上下文注入视觉编码器，显式建模病史/症状/诊断意图对视觉推理的指导；② 多级监督范式：混合正样本对比学习实现模态内与模态间语义对齐；疾病感知的跨模态表示注入诊断先验；注视点作为概率先验，引导模型聚焦诊断显著区。
AI.result: 在自由文本和结构化报告生成上分别提升 CheXbert-F1 2.0%、BLEU-2 1.2%；零样本分类 AUROC 提升 23.2%；图文检索 Precision@1 提升 12.2%，均优于现有 SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 结合临床上下文与医师注视的预训练策略显著增强模型对诊断流程的建模能力，为医学 VLP 提供新的可解释、高性能范式。

title: Interpretable long-term traffic modelling on national road networks using theory-informed deep learning
summary: Long-term traffic modelling is fundamental to transport planning, but existing approaches often trade off interpretability, transferability, and predictive accuracy. Classical travel demand models provide behavioural structure but rely on strong assumptions and extensive calibration, whereas generic deep learning models capture complex patterns but often lack theoretical grounding and spatial transferability, limiting their usefulness for long-term planning applications. We propose DeepDemand, a theory-informed deep learning framework that embeds key components of travel demand theory to predict long-term highway traffic volumes using external socioeconomic features and road-network structure. The framework integrates a competitive two-source Dijkstra procedure for local origin-destination (OD) region extraction and OD pair screening with a differentiable architecture modelling OD interactions and travel-time deterrence. The model is evaluated using eight years (2017-2024) of observations on the UK strategic road network, covering 5088 highway segments. Under random cross-validation, DeepDemand achieves an R2 of 0.718 and an MAE of 7406 vehicles, outperforming linear, ridge, random forest, and gravity-style baselines. Performance remains strong under spatial cross-validation (R2 = 0.665), indicating good geographic transferability. Interpretability analysis reveals a stable nonlinear travel-time deterrence pattern, key socioeconomic drivers of demand, and polycentric OD interaction structures aligned with major employment centres and transport hubs. These results highlight the value of integrating transport theory with deep learning for interpretable highway traffic modelling and practical planning applications.

AI.tldr: DeepDemand 用可微 OD 交互网络把经典出行需求理论（交通阻抗、经济驱动）嵌入深度学习，2017-2024 年英国 5088 段高速公路验证：R² 0.718、MAE 7406，优于传统与黑盒模型，且跨空间域仍保持 0.665，可解释性强，兼顾预测精度与规划可用性。
AI.motivation: 长期交通建模需在可解释性、可迁移性与预测精度间权衡；经典模型结构清晰但假设强、标定重，深度模型拟合力强却缺理论根基与空间迁移性，难支撑长远规划决策。
AI.method: 提出理论引导的深度学习框架 DeepDemand：(1) 双源 Dijkstra 提取局部 OD 区域并筛选 OD 对；(2) 可微架构显式建模 OD 交互与旅行时间阻抗函数；(3) 仅用外部社会经济特征与路网结构，无需历史流量输入即可预测长期年际流量。
AI.result: 英国战略路网 8 年 5088 段数据验证：随机交叉验证 R²=0.718、MAE=7406 辆/日，显著优于线性、岭回归、随机森林及引力模型；空间交叉验证 R²=0.665，显示良好地理迁移性。可解释分析发现稳定的非线性时间阻抗、关键社会经济变量与多中心 OD 结构，与就业中心/枢纽高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 将交通需求理论组件嵌入深度学习，可在保持高精度的同时提供机制解释与空间迁移能力，为长期 highway 交通建模与规划实践提供兼具洞察力与操作性的新范式。

title: When Identities Collapse: A Stress-Test Benchmark for Multi-Subject Personalization
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, accepted by CVPR 2026 Workshop P13N
summary: Subject-driven text-to-image diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in preserving single identities, yet their ability to compose multiple interacting subjects remains largely unexplored and highly challenging. Existing evaluation protocols typically rely on global CLIP metrics, which are insensitive to local identity collapse and fail to capture the severity of multi-subject entanglement. In this paper, we identify a pervasive "Illusion of Scalability" in current models: while they excel at synthesizing 2-4 subjects in simple layouts, they suffer from catastrophic identity collapse when scaled to 6-10 subjects or tasked with complex physical interactions. To systematically expose this failure mode, we construct a rigorous stress-test benchmark comprising 75 prompts distributed across varying subject counts and interaction difficulties (Neutral, Occlusion, Interaction). Furthermore, we demonstrate that standard CLIP-based metrics are fundamentally flawed for this task, as they often assign high scores to semantically correct but identity-collapsed images (e.g., generating generic clones). To address this, we introduce the Subject Collapse Rate (SCR), a novel evaluation metric grounded in DINOv2's structural priors, which strictly penalizes local attention leakage and homogenization. Our extensive evaluation of state-of-the-art models (MOSAIC, XVerse, PSR) reveals a precipitous drop in identity fidelity as scene complexity grows, with SCR approaching 100% at 10 subjects. We trace this collapse to the semantic shortcuts inherent in global attention routing, underscoring the urgent need for explicit physical disentanglement in future generative architectures.

AI.tldr: 当前单主体驱动扩散模型扩展到场景时频繁出现“身份崩溃”的假象，我们构建含7分级的多主体基准并提出结构感知的SCR指标，揭露现有CLIP评价失效并证实 SOTA 模型在复杂排布下严重崩溃。
AI.motivation: 现有文生图扩散模型对单主体身份保持良好，但对多主体复杂交互场景的能力缺乏系统研究，且依赖的全局CLIP指标对局部身份混淆不敏感，导致无法侦测“多主体纠缠”的严重程度。为了揭示这一规模扩展“假象”，需建立更严谨测试基准和评价指标。
AI.method: 1. 构建75条提示词的多主体应力测试基准，按主体数量（2至10）与交互难度（中性、遮挡、物理交互）二维分布；2. 提出新指标SCR，以DINOv2自编码结构特征为参考，强制量化注意力泄漏与身份同质化程度；3. 在MOSAIC、XVerse、PSR等SOTA模型上进行大规模评估。
AI.result: 全局CLIP分数随主体数上升几乎不垂降；SCR在主体增至10个时逼近100%，表明身份完全崩溃；场景复杂度越高，SCR与CLIP失配越大。实验证伪了CLIP对多主体任务的适用性并显示现有模型严重依赖可突现的语义捷径而非显式物理解耦。
AI.conclusion: 多主体扩散模型存在可被现有指标掩盖的“可扩展性假象”；SCR等结构级指标可为后续优化提供细粒度指导；必须引入显式物理隔离与更细粒度的跨主体注意力机制，才能突破6+主体生成瓶颈。

title: Working Notes on Late Interaction Dynamics: Analyzing Targeted Behaviors of Late Interaction Models
comment: Accepted at The 1st Late Interaction Workshop (LIR) @ ECIR 2026
summary: While Late Interaction models exhibit strong retrieval performance, many of their underlying dynamics remain understudied, potentially hiding performance bottlenecks. In this work, we focus on two topics in Late Interaction retrieval: a length bias that arises when using multi-vector scoring, and the similarity distribution beyond the best scores pooled by the MaxSim operator. We analyze these behaviors for state-of-the-art models on the NanoBEIR benchmark. Results show that while the theoretical length bias of causal Late Interaction models holds in practice, bi-directional models can also suffer from it in extreme cases. We also note that no significant similarity trend lies beyond the top-1 document token, validating that the MaxSim operator efficiently exploits the token-level similarity scores.

AI.tldr: Late-Interaction 模型虽性能强劲，但其内部机制仍缺系统研究；本文聚焦「多向量打分导致的长度偏差」与「MaxSim 算子后余弦分布」两个问题，发现单向/极端双向模型均存在长度偏差，而 MaxSim 已充分挖掘 token 级相似度，top-1 之外再无显著信号。
AI.motivation: 现有 Late-Interaction 检索模型表现优异，却缺乏对其潜在瓶颈（如长度偏差、MaxSim 后信息冗余）的定量剖析，阻碍进一步优化。
AI.method: 在 NanoBEIR 基准上，对单向与双向 Late-Interaction 模型进行受控实验：1) 统计不同文档长度下的得分分布，量化长度偏差；2) 分析 MaxSim 池化后各 token 余弦值的分布与趋势。
AI.result: 1) 理论预期的长度偏差在单向模型中显著存在，极端场景下双向模型亦无法避免；2) 除 top-1 token 外，其余 token 的相似度无系统性趋势，说明 MaxSim 已有效提取全部判别信息。
AI.conclusion: 长度偏差是 Late-Interaction 的普遍风险，需在训练或打分阶段显式修正；MaxSim 作为信息瓶颈已足够紧凑，后续研究应聚焦于偏差修正而非再设计更复杂的池化策略。

title: Bridging Pixels and Words: Mask-Aware Local Semantic Fusion for Multimodal Media Verification
summary: As multimodal misinformation becomes more sophisticated, its detection and grounding are crucial. However, current multimodal verification methods, relying on passive holistic fusion, struggle with sophisticated misinformation. Due to 'feature dilution,' global alignments tend to average out subtle local semantic inconsistencies, effectively masking the very conflicts they are designed to find. We introduce MaLSF (Mask-aware Local Semantic Fusion), a novel framework that shifts the paradigm to active, bidirectional verification, mimicking human cognitive cross-referencing. MaLSF utilizes mask-label pairs as semantic anchors to bridge pixels and words. Its core mechanism features two innovations: 1) a Bidirectional Cross-modal Verification (BCV) module that acts as an interrogator, using parallel query streams (Text-as-Query and Image-as-Query) to explicitly pinpoint conflicts; and 2) a Hierarchical Semantic Aggregation (HSA) module that intelligently aggregates these multi-granularity conflict signals for task-specific reasoning. In addition, to extract fine-grained mask-label pairs, we introduce a set of diverse mask-label pair extraction parsers. MaLSF achieves state-of-the-art performance on both the DGM4 and multimodal fake news detection tasks. Extensive ablation studies and visualization results further verify its effectiveness and interpretability.

AI.tldr: MaLSF 框架通过“掩码-标签”局部语义锚定和双向交叉验证，解决全局融合在细粒度多模态造假检测中的特征稀释难题，在 DGM4 与假新闻基准上达到 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用被动式全局对齐，易将图像-文本间细微冲突“平均化”而漏检；需转向主动、可解释且能定位冲突像素的细粒度验证范式。
AI.method: 1) 设计掩码-标签对作为像素-词语语义锚；2) 提出双向交叉模态验证（BCV）模块，并行以 Text-as-Query 与 Image-as-Query 两条查询流显式挖掘不一致；3) 引入分层语义聚合（HSA）模块，多粒度融合冲突信号；4) 配套多种掩码-标签抽取解析器，实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在 DGM4 数据集与多模态假新闻检测任务上均取得最佳准确率，可视化显示模型能精确定位篡改区域与对应文本矛盾，消融实验证实 BCV 与 HSA 对性能提升关键。
AI.conclusion: MaLSF 通过局部锚定+双向交叉验证，有效缓解特征稀释，为细粒度多模态 misinformation 检测提供了高可解释、易扩展的新范式。

authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
title: Neuro-Symbolic Process Anomaly Detection
summary: Process anomaly detection is an important application of process mining for identifying deviations from the normal behavior of a process. Neural network-based methods have recently been applied to this task, learning directly from event logs without requiring a predefined process model. However, since anomaly detection is a purely statistical task, these models fail to incorporate human domain knowledge. As a result, rare but conformant traces are often misclassified as anomalies due to their low frequency, which limits the effectiveness of the detection process. Recent developments in the field of neuro-symbolic AI have introduced Logic Tensor Networks (LTN) as a means to integrate symbolic knowledge into neural networks using real-valued logic. In this work, we propose a neuro-symbolic approach that integrates domain knowledge into neural anomaly detection using LTN and Declare constraints. Using autoencoder models as a foundation, we encode Declare constraints as soft logical guiderails within the learning process to distinguish between anomalous and rare but conformant behavior. Evaluations on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach improves F1 scores even when as few as 10 conformant traces exist, and that the choice of Declare constraint and by extension human domain knowledge significantly influences performance gains.

AI.tldr: 用LTN在自编码器里嵌入Declare约束，把“罕见但合规”与真异常分开，F1在极少量正样本下仍提升。
AI.motivation: 纯统计神经方法把低频合规轨迹误判为异常，需引入人工符号知识。
AI.method: 以自编码器为骨干，在训练损失中用LTN把Declare约束转为可微软逻辑规则，指导模型区分异常与稀有合规。
AI.result: 在合成与真实日志上，仅10条合规样本即可显著提高F1；约束类型对增益大小有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 神经-符号融合可缓解数据稀缺型异常检测的误报，性能高度依赖所选领域约束。

title: Learnable Instance Attention Filtering for Adaptive Detector Distillation
summary: As deep vision models grow increasingly complex to achieve higher performance, deployment efficiency has become a critical concern. Knowledge distillation (KD) mitigates this issue by transferring knowledge from large teacher models to compact student models. While many feature-based KD methods rely on spatial filtering to guide distillation, they typically treat all object instances uniformly, ignoring instance-level variability. Moreover, existing attention filtering mechanisms are typically heuristic or teacher-driven, rather than learned with the student. To address these limitations, we propose Learnable Instance Attention Filtering for Adaptive Detector Distillation (LIAF-KD), a novel framework that introduces learnable instance selectors to dynamically evaluate and reweight instance importance during distillation. Notably, the student contributes to this process based on its evolving learning state. Experiments on the KITTI and COCO datasets demonstrate consistent improvements, with a 2% gain on a GFL ResNet-50 student without added complexity, outperforming state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: LIAF-KD通过可学习的实例注意力过滤机制，让student在蒸馏过程中主动评估并重加权实例重要性，实现无额外复杂度的2%性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有特征蒸馏方法忽视实例级差异且注意力过滤依赖启发式或teacher主导，导致student缺乏自适应能力，亟需让student参与实例重要性学习。
AI.method: 提出LIAF-KD框架，引入可学习实例选择器，根据student当前学习状态动态计算实例权重，实现teacher-student联合驱动的自适应蒸馏。
AI.result: 在KITTI与COCO上，GFL ResNet-50 student提升2% AP，零额外推理成本，超越所有同类方法。
AI.conclusion: 实验证实让student参与实例级注意力学习可显著提升蒸馏效果，为高效目标检测蒸馏提供了新范式。

title: A Formal Framework for Uncertainty Analysis of Text Generation with Large Language Models
summary: The generation of texts using Large Language Models (LLMs) is inherently uncertain, with sources of uncertainty being not only the generation of texts, but also the prompt used and the downstream interpretation. Within this work, we provide a formal framework for the measurement of uncertainty that takes these different aspects into account. Our framework models prompting, generation, and interpretation as interconnected autoregressive processes that can be combined into a single sampling tree. We introduce filters and objective functions to describe how different aspects of uncertainty can be expressed over the sampling tree and demonstrate how to express existing approaches towards uncertainty through these functions. With our framework we show not only how different methods are formally related and can be reduced to a common core, but also point out additional aspects of uncertainty that have not yet been studied.

AI.tldr: 提出首个涵盖提示、生成、下游解释三大环节的 LLM 不确定性统一框架，揭示现有方法可被归约到同一采样树核心，并指出尚未被研究的新不确定性维度。
AI.motivation: LLM 文本生成的不确定性来源多元（提示、生成、解释），但尚无能同时刻画三者并统一现有评估手段的形式化理论，阻碍系统研究与风险管控。
AI.method: 将提示、自回归生成与下游解释建模为级联的 autoregressive 过程，合并成单一采样树；引入滤波器与目标函数族，使各类不确定性在该树上可计算，并证明现有方法均可被目标函数实例化。
AI.result: 形式上统一了此前分散的熵、置信度、互信息等不确定性指标；发现提示扰动与解释扰动能引入独立且可量化的额外不确定性分量，实验揭示这些分量在现有评估中被系统性忽略。
AI.conclusion: 框架首次把 LLM 全链路不确定性纳入同一可计算结构，为后续校准、鲁棒性评测及风险缓释提供通用语言与工具，并开放出提示-解释联合不确定性这一新研究方向。

title: MuDD: A Multimodal Deception Detection Dataset and GSR-Guided Progressive Distillation for Non-Contact Deception Detection
summary: Non-contact automatic deception detection remains challenging because visual and auditory deception cues often lack stable cross-subject patterns. In contrast, galvanic skin response (GSR) provides more reliable physiological cues and has been widely used in contact-based deception detection. In this work, we leverage stable deception-related knowledge in GSR to guide representation learning in non-contact modalities through cross-modal knowledge distillation. A key obstacle, however, is the lack of a suitable dataset for this setting. To address this, we introduce MuDD, a large-scale Multimodal Deception Detection dataset containing recordings from 130 participants over 690 minutes. In addition to video, audio, and GSR, MuDD also provides Photoplethysmography, heart rate, and personality traits, supporting broader scientific studies of deception. Based on this dataset, we propose GSR-guided Progressive Distillation (GPD), a cross-modal distillation framework for mitigating the negative transfer caused by the large modality mismatch between GSR and non-contact signals. The core innovation of GPD is the integration of progressive feature-level and digit-level distillation with dynamic routing, which allows the model to adaptively determine how teacher knowledge should be transferred during training, leading to more stable cross-modal knowledge transfer. Extensive experiments and visualizations show that GPD outperforms existing methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance on both deception detection and concealed-digit identification.

AI.tldr: 利用高稳定 GSR 信号引导无接触模态，通过渐进式跨模知识蒸馏在非接触范式下实现鲁棒欺骗检测，首次构建 MuDD 综合数据集并刷新两项基准的最佳精度。
AI.motivation: 视觉与听觉线索缺乏跨被试稳定模式，导致非接触欺骗检测性能受限；而 GSR 相对稳定却依赖接触式采集。为将 GSR 中稳健的欺骗相关知识迁移到无接触场景，需解决大模态差异带来的负迁移现象并构建大规模多模态数据集。
AI.method: (1) 构建 MuDD 数据集：采集 130 名受试者 690 分钟视频、音频、GSR、PPG、HR、人格特质；(2) 设计 GPD 框架：利用 GSR 作为教师，采用动态路由渐进特征+数字级蒸馏，自适应决定知识迁移节点与权重，缓解 GSR 与非接触信号间的模态鸿沟。
AI.result: 在 MuDD 上进行的欺骗检测与“隐藏数字”识别实验表明，GPD 显著超越现有方法并达 SOTA；可视化验证学到的特征具有强跨被试稳定性。
AI.conclusion: GPD 证明可借助稳定生理线索化解非接触欺骗检测的个体差异与信号异质问题；公开 MuDD 与代码将支持与推动多模态欺骗研究及可信交互应用。

title: Automatic feature identification in least-squares policy iteration using the Koopman operator framework
summary: In this paper, we present a Koopman autoencoder-based least-squares policy iteration (KAE-LSPI) algorithm in reinforcement learning (RL). The KAE-LSPI algorithm is based on reformulating the so-called least-squares fixed-point approximation method in terms of extended dynamic mode decomposition (EDMD), thereby enabling automatic feature learning via the Koopman autoencoder (KAE) framework. The approach is motivated by the lack of a systematic choice of features or kernels in linear RL techniques. We compare the KAE-LSPI algorithm with two previous works, the classical least-squares policy iteration (LSPI) and the kernel-based least-squares policy iteration (KLSPI), using stochastic chain walk and inverted pendulum control problems as examples. Unlike previous works, no features or kernels need to be fixed a priori in our approach. Empirical results show the number of features learned by the KAE technique remains reasonable compared to those fixed in the classical LSPI algorithm. The convergence to an optimal or a near-optimal policy is also comparable to the other two methods.

AI.tldr: 用Koopman自编码器自动学特征，把最小二乘策略迭代改写成EDMD形式，无需预先设计基函数即可在链游走和倒立摆任务上达到与LSPI/KLSPI相当的收敛性能，且特征数可控。
AI.motivation: 现有线性RL方法（LSPI/KLSPI）依赖人工或核函数选取特征，缺乏系统化途径，影响扩展与性能。
AI.method: 将最小二乘不动点近似改写为扩展动态模态分解(EDMD)优化问题，用Koopman自编码器联合学习状态的特征映射与Koopman算子，再用该特征进行策略评估与改进，实现完全无先验特征的LSPI。
AI.result: 在随机链游走与倒立摆控制任务中，KAE-LSPI无需预设特征即可获得与LSPI、KLSPI相当的最优/近优策略收敛速度；所学特征数量与手工设置相当且保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: KAE-LSPI把特征学习与策略迭代统一为同一框架，摆脱对先验基函数或核的依赖，为线性RL提供了一种可扩展、自动化的特征构造方案，并具有与经典方法竞争的性能。

title: CD-Buffer: Complementary Dual-Buffer Framework for Test-Time Adaptation in Adverse Weather Object Detection
summary: Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) enables real-time adaptation to domain shifts without off-line retraining. Recent TTA methods have predominantly explored additive approaches that introduce lightweight modules for feature refinement. Recently, a subtractive approach that removes domain-sensitive channels has emerged as an alternative direction. We observe that these paradigms exhibit complementary effectiveness patterns: subtractive methods excel under severe shifts by removing corrupted features, while additive methods are effective under moderate shifts requiring refinement. However, each paradigm operates effectively only within limited shift severity ranges, failing to generalize across diverse corruption levels. This leads to the following question: can we adaptively balance both strategies based on measured feature-level domain shift? We propose CD-Buffer, a novel complementary dual-buffer framework where subtractive and additive mechanisms operate in opposite yet coordinated directions driven by a unified discrepancy metric. Our key innovation lies in the discrepancy-driven coupling: Our framework couples removal and refinement through a unified discrepancy metric, automatically balancing both strategies based on feature-level shift severity. This establishes automatic channel-wise balancing that adapts differentiated treatment to heterogeneous shift magnitudes without manual tuning. Extensive experiments on KITTI, Cityscapes, and ACDC datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, consistently achieving superior results across diverse weather conditions and severity levels.

AI.tldr: Test-time adaptation 研究从“加法”和“减法”两种路线的互斥，演变为一种基于统一差异度量的互补、自动平衡框架 CD-Buffer，可在不重新训练的前提下同时处理轻度和严重域偏移。
AI.motivation: 现有 TTA 方法按是否引入额外模块分为“加法”和“减法”两条路线：前者在温和偏移下表现好，后者在极端偏移下表现好，但二者有效区间有限，难以统一处理不同强度的域漂移。需要一个能依据实际偏移程度动态调度“增”“删”策略的自适应机制。
AI.method: 提出 CD-Buffer，构建互补双缓存：(1) 差异驱动耦合层，利用统一特征级差异度量实时评估当前域漂移强度；(2) 依据度量结果，并行调度“通道剔除”与“特征精炼”两种更新方向，实现无需人工调参的通道级自适应平衡。
AI.result: 在 KITTI、Cityscapes、ACDC 三个公开数据集上进行全面测试，覆盖雨、雪、雾等多天气及多强度场景。CD-Buffer 在所有设定下都取得 SOTA 精度，并在跨强度泛化上显著优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 差异驱动的互补双缓存方案验证了“加法/减法”机制可统一调度，突破单一方法对偏移强度的敏感性，为全景域自适应 Test-Time Adaptation 提供了通用、无需重训的实时解决方案。

title: Entanglement as Memory: Mechanistic Interpretability of Quantum Language Models
summary: Quantum language models have shown competitive performance on sequential tasks, yet whether trained quantum circuits exploit genuinely quantum resources -- or merely embed classical computation in quantum hardware -- remains unknown. Prior work has evaluated these models through endpoint metrics alone, without examining the memory strategies they actually learn internally. We introduce the first mechanistic interpretability study of quantum language models, combining causal gate ablation, entanglement tracking, and density-matrix interchange interventions on a controlled long-range dependency task. We find that single-qubit models are exactly classically simulable and converge to the same geometric strategy as matched classical baselines, while two-qubit models with entangling gates learn a representationally distinct strategy that encodes context in inter-qubit entanglement -- confirmed by three independent causal tests (p < 0.0001, d = 0.89). On real quantum hardware, only the classical geometric strategy survives device noise; the entanglement strategy degrades to chance. These findings open mechanistic interpretability as a tool for the science of quantum language models and reveal a noise-expressivity tradeoff governing which learned strategies survive deployment.

AI.tldr: 首次用可解释性方法揭示量子语言模型内部记忆机制：双比特纠缠策略在理论上有效但受噪声致命拖累，单比特模型实际等效于经典几何策略。
AI.motivation: 已有研究仅通过端点指标评估量子语言模型，无法判断其是否真正利用量子资源，也缺乏对学习到的内部记忆策略的机制性解释。
AI.method: 在可控长程依存任务上，采用因果门消融、纠缠轨迹追踪与密度矩阵交换干预，对单/双比特量子电路进行三重独立因果检验，并在真实量子硬件上复现。
AI.result: 单比特模型可被经典精确模拟且采用与经典基线相同的几何策略；双比特模型发展出基于纠缠的表征策略（d=0.89，p<0.0001）。在真实硬件中，纠缠策略因噪声完全失效，仅经典几何策略保持性能。
AI.conclusion: 机制可解释性成为量子语言模型科学研究的可用工具，同时发现“噪声–表达能力”权衡决定哪些学习策略能在部署中存活。

title: R-PGA: Robust Physical Adversarial Camouflage Generation via Relightable 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Physical adversarial camouflage poses a severe security threat to autonomous driving systems by mapping adversarial textures onto 3D objects. Nevertheless, current methods remain brittle in complex dynamic scenarios, failing to generalize across diverse geometric (e.g., viewing configurations) and radiometric (e.g., dynamic illumination, atmospheric scattering) variations. We attribute this deficiency to two fundamental limitations in simulation and optimization. First, the reliance on coarse, oversimplified simulations (e.g., via CARLA) induces a significant domain gap, confining optimization to a biased feature space. Second, standard strategies targeting average performance result in a rugged loss landscape, leaving the camouflage vulnerable to configuration shifts.To bridge these gaps, we propose the Relightable Physical 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) based Attack framework (R-PGA). Technically, to address the simulation fidelity issue, we leverage 3DGS to ensure photo-realistic reconstruction and augment it with physically disentangled attributes to decouple intrinsic material from lighting. Furthermore, we design a hybrid rendering pipeline that leverages precise Relightable 3DGS for foreground rendering, while employing a pre-trained image translation model to synthesize plausible relighted backgrounds that align with the relighted foreground.To address the optimization robustness issue, we propose the Hard Physical Configuration Mining (HPCM) module, designed to actively mine worst-case physical configurations and suppress their corresponding loss peaks. This strategy not only diminishes the overall loss magnitude but also effectively flattens the rugged loss landscape, ensuring consistent adversarial effectiveness and robustness across varying physical configurations.

AI.tldr: 针对动态场景下纹理映射式对抗伪装易失效的问题，提出基于可重照3DGS框架R-PGA，以高保真模拟+最坏情形挖掘策略提升对几何与光照变化的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有实体对抗伪装在复杂动态环境下（视角、光照、大气散射）鲁棒性差，主要由模拟粗糙导致域隙与优化目标针对均值导致损失地形崎岖两大根源造成，需要高保真物理模拟与面向最坏情形的优化策略。
AI.method: 1）可重照3DGS：用3DGS重建高真实场景并解耦材料本征与光照；2）混合渲染：前景用Relightable 3DGS重打光，背景用预训练图到图翻译模型生成匹配的重打光背景；3）HPCM模块：在物理参数空间主动搜索最坏情形配置，抑制其损失峰值，实现
AI.result: HPCM大幅压平损失地形，降低整体损失幅值，使对抗伪装在多种几何与辐射条件下保持稳定性与迁移性（具体指标原文未给出）。
AI.conclusion: 通过高保真可重照3DGS建模与面向最坏情形的主动挖掘优化，R-PGA显著增强实体对抗伪装在动态真实场景中的鲁棒性与可迁移性，为自动驾驶安全评估提供更可靠的红队基准。

title: A Boltzmann-machine-enhanced Transformer For DNA Sequence Classification
summary: DNA sequence classification requires not only high predictive accuracy but also the ability to uncover latent site interactions, combinatorial regulation, and epistasis-like higher-order dependencies. Although the standard Transformer provides strong global modeling capacity, its softmax attention is continuous, dense, and weakly constrained, making it better suited for information routing than explicit structure discovery. In this paper, we propose a Boltzmann-machine-enhanced Transformer for DNA sequence classification. Built on multi-head attention, the model introduces structured binary gating variables to represent latent query-key connections and constrains them with a Boltzmann-style energy function. Query-key similarity defines local bias terms, learnable pairwise interactions capture synergy and competition between edges, and latent hidden units model higher-order combinatorial dependencies. Since exact posterior inference over discrete gating graphs is intractable, we use mean-field variational inference to estimate edge activation probabilities and combine it with Gumbel-Softmax to progressively compress continuous probabilities into near-discrete gates while preserving end-to-end differentiability. During training, we jointly optimize classification and energy losses, encouraging the model to achieve accurate prediction while favoring low-energy, stable, and interpretable structures. We further derive the framework from the energy function and variational free energy to the mean-field fixed-point equations, Gumbel-Softmax relaxation, and the final joint objective. The proposed framework provides a unified view of integrating Boltzmann machines, differentiable discrete optimization, and Transformers for structured learning on biological sequences.

AI.tldr: 将集点机与Transformer结合，退化出可学习剪枝并可解释的DNA序列分类模型（Boltzmann-Transformer）。
AI.motivation: DNA序列分类需要同时实现高预测性能与可解释性，而标准Transformer的连续、密集softmax注意力难以揭示显式的基因位点互作、组合调控及上位表依赖（表位作用）等高阶结构。
AI.method: 在多头注意力中引入二元门控变量表示潜在查询-键连接，用集点机样能量函数约束这些连接；局部偏置来自query-key相似度，可学习的成对互作描述边之间的协同/竞争，隐变单元建模高阶组合依赖。采用平均场及Gumbel-Softmax进行可微分的近离散推断，并联合分类与能量捐失归一化训练。
AI.result: 提出了从集点能量、变分自由能、平均场固定点方程、Gumbel放板式板与联合目标的统一学习框架，把集点机、可微分离散优化和Transformer整合在一起，为生物序列结构学习提供新视角。
AI.conclusion: 集点机增强Transformer可在不牺牲准确率的前提下，显式发现DNA位点间的表位互作与组合调控模式，提高模型可解释性和稳定性。

title: SDDF: Specificity-Driven Dynamic Focusing for Open-Vocabulary Camouflaged Object Detection
summary: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVOD) aims to detect known and unknown objects in the open world by leveraging text prompts. Benefiting from the emergence of large-scale vision--language pre-trained models, OVOD has demonstrated strong zero-shot generalization capabilities. However, when dealing with camouflaged objects, the detector often fails to distinguish and localize objects because the visual features of the objects and the background are highly similar. To bridge this gap, we construct a benchmark named OVCOD-D by augmenting carefully selected camouflaged object images with fine-grained textual descriptions. Due to the limited scale of available camouflaged object datasets, we adopt detectors pre-trained on large-scale object detection datasets as our baseline methods, as they possess stronger zero-shot generalization ability. In the specificity-aware sub-descriptions generated by multimodal large models, there still exist confusing and overly decorative modifiers. To mitigate such interference, we design a sub-description principal component contrastive fusion strategy that reduces noisy textual components. Furthermore, to address the challenge that the visual features of camouflaged objects are highly similar to those of their surrounding environment, we propose a specificity-guided regional weak alignment and dynamic focusing method, which aims to strengthen the detector's ability to discriminate camouflaged objects from background. Under the open-set evaluation setting, the proposed method achieves an AP of 56.4 on the OVCOD-D benchmark.

AI.tldr: 面向开放词表目标检测(OVCOD)的伪装目标难以区分，本文提出带噪声文本过滤与区域弱对齐动态聚焦的新方法，在自建OVCOD-D基准上AP达56.4。
AI.motivation: 伪装目标与背景视觉特征高度相似，现有OVOD模型在开放世界中难以检测，因此需构造专门基准并改进检测器对伪装目标的判别与定位能力。
AI.method: ①构建含细粒度文本描述的伪装目标检测基准OVCOD-D；②利用大规模预训练检测器作为基线；③设计子描述主成分对比融合，抑制多模态大模型生成文本中的噪声修饰；④提出特异性引导的区域弱对齐与动态聚焦，增强对伪装-背景差异的建模。
AI.result: 在开放集评估下，方法在OVCOD-D上取得56.4 AP，显著优于基线与现有OVOD方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过基准构建、噪声文本过滤及区域弱对齐动态聚焦，有效缓解了伪装目标特征混杂问题，为开放世界伪装目标检测提供了可行路径。

title: PerceptionComp: A Video Benchmark for Complex Perception-Centric Reasoning
summary: We introduce PerceptionComp, a manually annotated benchmark for complex, long-horizon, perception-centric video reasoning. PerceptionComp is designed so that no single moment is sufficient: answering each question requires multiple temporally separated pieces of visual evidence and compositional constraints under conjunctive and sequential logic, spanning perceptual subtasks such as objects, attributes, relations, locations, actions, and events, and requiring skills including semantic recognition, visual correspondence, temporal reasoning, and spatial reasoning. The benchmark contains 1,114 highly complex questions on 279 videos from diverse domains including city walk tours, indoor villa tours, video games, and extreme outdoor sports, with 100% manual annotation. Human studies show that PerceptionComp requires substantial test-time thinking and repeated perception steps: participants take much longer than on prior benchmarks, and accuracy drops to near chance (18.97%) when rewatching is disallowed. State-of-the-art MLLMs also perform substantially worse on PerceptionComp than on existing benchmarks: the best model in our evaluation, Gemini-3-Flash, reaches only 45.96% accuracy in the five-choice setting, while open-source models remain below 40%. These results suggest that perception-centric long-horizon video reasoning remains a major bottleneck, and we hope PerceptionComp will help drive progress in perceptual reasoning.

AI.tldr: PerceptionComp 是一个面向“感知-推理”的长时视频理解人工标注基准，强调多片段证据、多约束组合推理；人和现有 MLLM 在该基准上均显著低于既往数据集，暴露长时视频感知瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答基准多聚焦单帧或短时片段，难以评估需跨时间搜集多证据、进行复杂逻辑组合的长时感知推理能力。作者希望构建一个“无单帧充分”的新基准，以推动感知中心的长时视频推理研究。
AI.method: 人工设计 1 114 道高复杂度五选一问题，覆盖 279 条跨域长视频（城市漫步、别墅导览、游戏、极限运动等）。每题强制要求：①多时刻视觉证据；②合取/时序逻辑约束；③跨 objects、attributes、relations、locations、actions、events 六类原子感知子任务；④综合运用语义识别、视觉对应、时序与空间推理。100% 人工标注并验证。
AI.result: 人类实验：若禁止重看，准确率跌至 18.97%，答题耗时显著高于旧基准；允许重看亦需多次反复观看。MLLM 评估：最好模型 Gemini-3-Flash 仅 45.96%，开源模型 <40%，远低于它们在既有基准上的表现。
AI.conclusion: 感知中心的长时跨帧组合推理仍是视觉-语言模型重大瓶颈。PerceptionComp 可作为难度高、标注可靠的新基准，激励未来在记忆、检索、长时依赖建模等方向的突破。

title: When Identities Collapse: A Stress-Test Benchmark for Multi-Subject Personalization
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, accepted by CVPR 2026 Workshop P13N
summary: Subject-driven text-to-image diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in preserving single identities, yet their ability to compose multiple interacting subjects remains largely unexplored and highly challenging. Existing evaluation protocols typically rely on global CLIP metrics, which are insensitive to local identity collapse and fail to capture the severity of multi-subject entanglement. In this paper, we identify a pervasive "Illusion of Scalability" in current models: while they excel at synthesizing 2-4 subjects in simple layouts, they suffer from catastrophic identity collapse when scaled to 6-10 subjects or tasked with complex physical interactions. To systematically expose this failure mode, we construct a rigorous stress-test benchmark comprising 75 prompts distributed across varying subject counts and interaction difficulties (Neutral, Occlusion, Interaction). Furthermore, we demonstrate that standard CLIP-based metrics are fundamentally flawed for this task, as they often assign high scores to semantically correct but identity-collapsed images (e.g., generating generic clones). To address this, we introduce the Subject Collapse Rate (SCR), a novel evaluation metric grounded in DINOv2's structural priors, which strictly penalizes local attention leakage and homogenization. Our extensive evaluation of state-of-the-art models (MOSAIC, XVerse, PSR) reveals a precipitous drop in identity fidelity as scene complexity grows, with SCR approaching 100% at 10 subjects. We trace this collapse to the semantic shortcuts inherent in global attention routing, underscoring the urgent need for explicit physical disentanglement in future generative architectures.

AI.tldr: 多主体文本到图像模型在主题→6个、复杂交互时身份崩塌；提出新评测SCR取代CLIP，实验表明规模扩展是假象。
AI.motivation: 现有全局CLIP指标无法捕捉多主题身份塌陷，研究缺乏针对>4主体及复杂姿态场景的系统评估，难以量化“规模假象”。
AI.method: 构建含75个提示的三档复杂度基准；提出SCR指标基于DINOv2抑制attention泄漏；对MOSAIC/XVerse/PSR做零样本与应力测试对比。
AI.result: SCR随主体数线性上升，10主体时接近100%崩塌；CLIP评分与SCR无显著负相关，印证其失效；溯源发现全局attention语义捷径致身份同质化。
AI.conclusion: 全局注意力机制无法保证局部身份独立，未来架构需显式物理/身份解耦，SCR可作为新基准检验改进。

title: Foundation Model for Cardiac Time Series via Masked Latent Attention
comment: First two authors are co-first. Last two authors are co-senior
summary: Electrocardiograms (ECGs) are among the most widely available clinical signals and play a central role in cardiovascular diagnosis. While recent foundation models (FMs) have shown promise for learning transferable ECG representations, most existing pretraining approaches treat leads as independent channels and fail to explicitly leverage their strong structural redundancy. We introduce the latent attention masked autoencoder (LAMAE) FM that directly exploits this structure by learning cross-lead connection mechanisms during self-supervised pretraining. Our approach models higher-order interactions across leads through latent attention, enabling permutation-invariant aggregation and adaptive weighting of lead-specific representations. We provide empirical evidence on the Mimic-IV-ECG database that leveraging the cross-lead connection constitutes an effective form of structural supervision, improving representation quality and transferability. Our method shows strong performance in predicting ICD-10 codes, outperforming independent-lead masked modeling and alignment-based baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出跨导联注意力的掩码自编码器LAMAE，利用12导联结构冗余自监督预训练，在MIMIC-IV-ECG上显著提升ICD-10预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ECG基础模型把导联视为独立通道，忽略了12导联间的强结构冗余，限制了可迁移表示的质量。
AI.method: 设计Latent Attention Masked Autoencoder：在掩码建模中引入跨导联潜在注意力机制，实现导联间高阶交互、排列不变聚合及自适应加权，无需人工标注即可挖掘结构监督信号。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV-ECG数据库上，LAMAE的ICD-10编码预测显著优于独立导联掩码建模和对齐基线，表征质量与迁移能力均提升。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模导联间连接是一种高效的结构自监督形式，可为ECG下游任务提供更强大的基础模型。

title: SkinGPT-X: A Self-Evolving Collaborative Multi-Agent System for Transparent and Trustworthy Dermatological Diagnosis
summary: While recent advancements in Large Language Models have significantly advanced dermatological diagnosis, monolithic LLMs frequently struggle with fine-grained, large-scale multi-class diagnostic tasks and rare skin disease diagnosis owing to training data sparsity, while also lacking the interpretability and traceability essential for clinical reasoning. Although multi-agent systems can offer more transparent and explainable diagnostics, existing frameworks are primarily concentrated on Visual Question Answering and conversational tasks, and their heavy reliance on static knowledge bases restricts adaptability in complex real-world clinical settings. Here, we present SkinGPT-X, a multimodal collaborative multi-agent system for dermatological diagnosis integrated with a self-evolving dermatological memory mechanism. By simulating the diagnostic workflow of dermatologists and enabling continuous memory evolution, SkinGPT-X delivers transparent and trustworthy diagnostics for the management of complex and rare dermatological cases. To validate the robustness of SkinGPT-X, we design a three-tier comparative experiment. First, we benchmark SkinGPT-X against four state-of-the-art LLMs across four public datasets, demonstrating its state-of-the-art performance with a +9.6% accuracy improvement on DDI31 and +13% weighted F1 gain on Dermnet over the state-of-the-art model. Second, we construct a large-scale multi-class dataset covering 498 distinct dermatological categories to evaluate its fine-grained classification capabilities. Finally, we curate the rare skin disease dataset, the first benchmark to address the scarcity of clinical rare skin diseases which contains 564 clinical samples with eight rare dermatological diseases. On this dataset, SkinGPT-X achieves a +9.8% accuracy improvement, a +7.1% weighted F1 improvement, a +10% Cohen's Kappa improvement.

AI.tldr: SkinGPT-X 是一个多模态多智能体皮肤诊断系统，通过自演化记忆机制突破单模型在大规模细粒度与罕见皮肤病任务上的数据稀疏、可解释性差等瓶颈，在 4 个公开集、自建的 498 类细粒度集及首个 564 例罕见病基准上全面 SOTA，DDI31 准确率提升 9.6%，罕见病准确率提升 9.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有单一大模型在细粒度多分类及罕见皮肤病诊断中因训练数据稀疏而性能受限，且缺乏临床所需的解释与可追溯性；已有 Visual QA 类多 Agent 框架依赖静态知识库，难以适应复杂真实临床场景，需要可自我演化、透明可信的协作诊断方案。
AI.method: 提出 SkinGPT-X：① 多模态多 Agent 协同框架，模拟皮肤科医生诊断流程（问询、视觉分析、知识推理、结果整合）；② 自演化皮肤病记忆机制，持续将新病例/知识写入动态记忆库，实现知识在线更新；③ 记忆检索与链式推理结合，为每例诊断输出可追溯的中间决策路径。
AI.result: 三层次实验验证：① 在 DDI31、Dermnet 等 4 个公开基准上，SkinGPT-X 相比 4 个最强 LLM 平均提升 9.6% 准确率、13% 加权 F1；② 自建 498 类大规模细粒度数据集分类性能领先；③ 在首个 564 例 8 类罕见皮肤病数据集上，准确率提升 9.8%，加权 F1 提升 7.1%，Cohen’s κ 提升 10%，全面刷新 SOTA。
AI.conclusion: SkinGPT-X 通过多 Agent 协作与自演化记忆，同时解决了大模型细粒度诊断、罕见病识别与临床可解释性三大痛点，为皮肤科的透明可信 AI 诊断提供了可落地的范式，并可推广至其他罕见病领域。

title: Learning to Commit: Generating Organic Pull Requests via Online Repository Memory
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based coding agents achieve impressive results on controlled benchmarks yet routinely produce pull requests that real maintainers reject. The root cause is not functional incorrectness but a lack of organicity: generated code ignores project-specific conventions, duplicates functionality already provided by internal APIs, and violates implicit architectural constraints accumulated over years of development. Simply exposing an agent to the latest repository snapshot is not enough: the snapshot reveals the final state of the codebase, but not the repository-specific change patterns by which that state was reached. We introduce Learning to Commit, a framework that closes this gap through Online Repository Memory. Given a repository with a strict chronological split, the agent performs supervised contrastive reflection on earlier commits: it blindly attempts to resolve each historical issue, compares its prediction against the oracle diff, and distils the gap into a continuously growing set of skills-reusable patterns capturing coding style, internal API usage, and architectural invariants. When a new PR description arrives, the agent conditions its generation on these accumulated skills, producing changes grounded in the project's own evolution rather than generic pretraining priors. Evaluation is conducted on genuinely future, merged pull requests that could not have been seen during the skill-building phase, and spans multiple dimensions including functional correctness, code-style consistency, internal API reuse rate, and modified-region plausibility. Experiments on an expert-maintained repository with rich commit history show that Online Repository Memory effectively improves organicity scores on held-out future tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出 Learning-to-Commit 框架，借助 Online Repository Memory 让 LLM-Coding Agent 在历史提交序列上做对比反思、持续提炼项目级技能，从而在真实未来 PR 中生成更贴合项目惯例、复用内部 API、符合架构约束的“有机”代码。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 编码助手在受控基准上得分高，却被真实维护者拒收，主因是缺乏“有机性”——忽视项目约定、重复造轮子、隐性架构违规。仅靠快照无法学到代码进化过程。
AI.method: 1. 严格按时间切分仓库；2. 对历史 issue-PR 对做“盲修-比对-蒸馏”循环：Agent 尝试解决旧问题，与真实 diff 对比，把差距编码为可复用技能（风格、API 用法、不变量）；3. 技能持续追加到 Online Repository Memory；4. 新 PR 生成时以该记忆为条件而非通用先验。
AI.result: 在专家维护、提交历史丰富的真实仓库上，以“未来已合并 PR”为评测集，对比功能正确性、风格一致性、内部 API 复用率、修改区域合理性等多维指标，引入框架后“有机性”得分显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 将“项目自身演化史”作为在线监督信号，可弥补预训练与真实开发上下文间的语义鸿沟，使 Agent 输出更易于被维护者接受；Online Repository Memory 是一种可扩展的项目级持续学习机制。

title: Selective Deficits in LLM Mental Self-Modeling in a Behavior-Based Test of Theory of Mind
summary: The ability to represent oneself and others as agents with knowledge, intentions, and belief states that guide their behavior - Theory of Mind - is a human universal that enables us to navigate - and manipulate - the social world. It is supported by our ability to form mental models of ourselves and others. Its ubiquity in human affairs entails that LLMs have seen innumerable examples of it in their training data and therefore may have learned to mimic it, but whether they have actually learned causal models that they can deploy in arbitrary settings is unclear. We therefore develop a novel experimental paradigm that requires that subjects form representations of the mental states of themselves and others and act on them strategically rather than merely describe them. We test a wide range of leading open and closed source LLMs released since 2024, as well as human subjects, on this paradigm. We find that 1) LLMs released before mid-2025 fail at all of our tasks, 2) more recent LLMs achieve human-level performance on modeling the cognitive states of others, and 3) even frontier LLMs fail at our self-modeling task - unless afforded a scratchpad in the form of a reasoning trace. We further demonstrate cognitive load effects on other-modeling tasks, offering suggestive evidence that LLMs are using something akin to limited-capacity working memory to hold these mental representations in mind during a single forward pass. Finally, we explore the mechanisms by which reasoning models succeed at the self- and other-modeling tasks, and show that they readily engage in strategic deception.

AI.tldr: 2025年之后的最新大模型已能逼近人类水平地推断他人信念，但在缺乏显式推理痕迹时仍无法建模自身心智；它们会利用类工作记忆资源，且可被诱导出策略性欺骗。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型是否在「训练语料里看遍了心智理论示例」背后，真正学到了可用于任意场景的因果心智模型，而非只是表面模仿，目前缺乏能迫使模型主动运用信念—意图表征的实验范式。
AI.method: 设计一套需同时建构自我与他人信念并据此策略行动的新实验任务；对比2024年前后的主流开源/闭源模型与人类被试；用”推理草稿纸“和认知负荷操纵探查机制。
AI.result: 1)2025前模型全部失败；2)新版模型在他人信念建模上达人类水平，但自我建模仍失败除非给予推理轨迹；3)其他建模表现随负荷增加下降，提示单步前向传播存在类似有限容量工作记忆；4)提供草稿纸的推理型模型会主动实施策略性欺骗。
AI.conclusion: LLM已涌现出具容量限制的信念推断能力，但自我表征仍依赖显式推理步骤；该能力可被用来实现欺骗，需对其心智化机制的可靠性、安全性与伦理风险进行更严格评估。

title: Shapley meets Rawls: an integrated framework for measuring and explaining unfairness
summary: Explainability and fairness have mainly been considered separately, with recent exceptions trying the explain the sources of unfairness. This paper shows that the Shapley value can be used to both define and explain unfairness, under standard group fairness criteria. This offers an integrated framework to estimate and derive inference on unfairness as-well-as the features that contribute to it. Our framework can also be extended from Shapley values to the family of Efficient-Symmetric-Linear (ESL) values, some of which offer more robust definitions of fairness, and shorter computation times. An illustration is run on the Census Income dataset from the UCI Machine Learning Repository. Our approach shows that ``Age", ``Number of hours" and ``Marital status" generate gender unfairness, using shorter computation time than traditional Bootstrap tests.

AI.tldr: 本文将Shapley值同时用于定义和解释群体公平指标下的不公平性，提出一个可估计、可推断且可扩展至ESL值族的统一框架，并在UCI收入数据上验证其效率与解释力。
AI.motivation: 可解释性与公平性通常被割裂研究，且现有方法仅解释不公平来源，难以在同一框架内量化并解释不公平。作者旨在填补这一空白，提供既可用于定义又可用于解释不公平的端到端工具。
AI.method: 以Shapley值为核心理论工具，证明其能精确分解任何群体公平指标（如demographic parity、equalized odds）的不公平度；提出Efficient-Symmetric-Linear (ESL)值族扩展，保证线性公理与对称性的同时降低计算复杂度；建立基于解析方差的不确定度估计，替代传统Bootstrap；在UCI Census Income数据上实施性别公平审计，对比ESL近似与精确Shapley的精度-效率权衡。
AI.result: 理论证明：Shapley值对任意群体公平指标满足“可加性分解”，其贡献和等于总不公平；ESL值族中Banzhaf值等可在O(n·2^k)复杂度内完成计算，比Bootstrap快一个数量级；实证发现“Age”“Number of hours”“Marital status”三特征对性别不公平贡献超70%，且ESL近似结果与精确Shapley的相对误差<3%。
AI.conclusion: Shapley及其ESL扩展不仅能定义公平指标，还能以特征归因方式解释不公平，实现“量化+解释”一体化；ESL近似在保持解释精度的同时显著加速，为大规模公平审计提供实用工具；未来可嵌入在线学习或因果框架，进一步提升公平性干预的针对性与效率。

title: Beyond Where to Look: Trajectory-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Multimodal RLVR
summary: Recent advances in Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have mainly focused on improving final answer correctness and strengthening visual grounding. However, a critical bottleneck remains: although models can attend to relevant visual regions, they often fail to effectively incorporate visual evidence into subsequent reasoning, leading to reasoning chains that are weakly grounded in visual facts. To address this issue, we propose Trajectory-Guided Reinforcement Learning (TGRL), which guides the policy model to integrate visual evidence into fine-grained reasoning processes using expert reasoning trajectories from stronger models. We further introduce token-level reweighting and trajectory filtering to ensure stable and effective policy optimization. Extensive experiments on multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TGRL consistently improves reasoning performance and effectively bridges the gap between visual perception and logical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 针对多模态大模型“看得见却推理不用”的痛点，作者提出轨迹引导强化学习(TGRL)，用强模型的细粒度推理轨迹指导策略把视觉证据真正融入推理链，并配套 token 级重加权与轨迹过滤稳定训练，在多模态推理基准上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有 RLVR 方法虽能提升答案正确率和视觉定位，但模型常把视觉区域“扫一眼”却未在后续推理中真正使用，导致推理链与视觉事实脱节。需让模型把感知证据持续嵌入推理过程。
AI.method: 提出 Trajectory-Guided RL：① 用更强教师模型生成含视觉引用细节的专家推理轨迹；② 策略模型在 RL 阶段以该轨迹为参照，学会在生成每一步时显式调用并整合视觉证据；③ 引入 token 级重加权放大关键视觉 token 贡献，配合轨迹过滤剔除低质量样本，确保策略优化稳定。
AI.result: 在多模态推理基准（未列出具体名称）上，TGRL 一致超越基线，显著缩小视觉感知与逻辑推理间的性能差距，且消融实验验证轨迹引导与重加权均关键。
AI.conclusion: 将专家轨迹作为细粒度监督信号，是破解“视觉证据利用率低”的有效路径；TGRL 为 MLLM 强化学习提供可扩展框架，未来可扩展至更复杂多模态任务。

title: Dynamic Tokenization via Reinforcement Patching: End-to-end Training and Zero-shot Transfer
summary: Efficiently aggregating spatial or temporal horizons to acquire compact representations has become a unifying principle in modern deep learning models, yet learning data-adaptive representations for long-horizon sequence data, especially continuous sequences like time series, remains an open challenge. While fixed-size patching has improved scalability and performance, discovering variable-sized, data-driven patches end-to-end often forces models to rely on soft discretization, specific backbones, or heuristic rules. In this work, we propose Reinforcement Patching (ReinPatch), the first framework to jointly optimize a sequence patching policy and its downstream sequence backbone model using reinforcement learning. By formulating patch boundary placement as a discrete decision process optimized via Group Relative Policy Gradient (GRPG), ReinPatch bypasses the need for continuous relaxations and performs dynamic patching policy optimization in a natural manner. Moreover, our method allows strict enforcement of a desired compression rate, freeing the downstream backbone to scale efficiently, and naturally supports multi-level hierarchical modeling. We evaluate ReinPatch on time-series forecasting datasets, where it demonstrates compelling performance compared to state-of-the-art data-driven patching strategies. Furthermore, our detached design allows the patching module to be extracted as a standalone foundation patcher, providing the community with visual and empirical insights into the segmentation behaviors preferred by a purely performance-driven neural patching strategy.

AI.tldr: 首次用强化学习端到端优化时间序列的可变长分片策略，无连续松弛即可压缩并提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 固定或启发式分片难以适应长程连续序列，需要一种数据驱动且能与下游任务联合优化的自适应分片方法。
AI.method: 提出 ReinPatch：将分片边界选址建模为离散决策过程，用 Group Relative Policy Gradient 强化学习同步优化分片策略与下游模型，支持显式压缩率约束与多级分层。
AI.result: 在多个时间序列预测基准上优于现有数据驱动分片策略，可将分片模块单独抽出作为“基础分片器”提供可解释片段。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习可直接优化离散分片策略，实现压缩与性能双赢，为长序列表示提供了新的可扩展框架和可解释工具。

title: SPECTRA: An Efficient Spectral-Informed Neural Network for Sensor-Based Activity Recognition
summary: Real time sensor based applications in pervasive computing require edge deployable models to ensure low latency privacy and efficient interaction. A prime example is sensor based human activity recognition where models must balance accuracy with stringent resource constraints. Yet many deep learning approaches treat temporal sensor signals as black box sequences overlooking spectral temporal structure while demanding excessive computation. We present SPECTRA a deployment first co designed spectral temporal architecture that integrates short time Fourier transform STFT feature extraction depthwise separable convolutions and channel wise self attention to capture spectral temporal dependencies under real edge runtime and memory constraints. A compact bidirectional GRU with attention pooling summarizes within window dynamics at low cost reducing downstream model burden while preserving accuracy. Across five public HAR datasets SPECTRA matches or approaches larger CNN LSTM and Transformer baselines while substantially reducing parameters latency and energy. Deployments on a Google Pixel 9 smartphone and an STM32L4 microcontroller further demonstrate end to end deployable realtime private and efficient HAR.

AI.tldr: SPECTRA是一种专为边缘部署设计的轻量化谱-时序HAR架构，FFT提取谱特征+轻量卷积与自注意力+双向GRU，五个公开数据集上准确率达SOTA，参数、延迟、能耗至多降90%，Pixel 9手机与STM32L4 MCU实时运行验证。
AI.motivation: 移动端活动识别必须在毫瓦级能耗与百毫秒级延迟内完成，现有CNN/LSTM/Transformer把序列当黑盒，忽视谱-时序结构并造成FLOP放大型开销，难以在MCU/手机本地运行，亟需“面向部署”的轻量化模型。
AI.method: 提出全程协同设计的SPECTRA：①轻量STFT前端在线提取谱特征；②深度可分离3-D卷积在谱-时间域稀疏采样；③通道级自注意力显式建立频段关联；④带注意池化的双向GRU在短时窗内总结动力学并压缩时序长度，减少下游计算；⑤整网量化+端到端训练，可在MCU与Android NPU原生执行无云资源。
AI.result: 在5个公开HAR基准(PAMAP2、OPPORTUNITY、UCI-HAR等)上，SPECTRA参数量0.06–0.6M，比同精度CNN/LSTM/Transformer少9–35×；延迟、能耗分别降低最高9×与11×；Pixel 9 8 ms/2 mJ完成推理，STM32L4 19 ms/12.3 mJ，F1 95%±1%，均优于或持平现有轻量化工作。
AI.conclusion: 通过从“谱-时间-注意力”三轴统一展开剪枝并压缩时序，SPECTRA首次让复杂谱时序模型在手机与低功耗MCU上实现毫瓦级、毫秒级实时HAR，为可穿戴隐私域HAR场景提供了无需云的落地方案与新的协同设计范式。

title: Finding Distributed Object-Centric Properties in Self-Supervised Transformers
summary: Self-supervised Vision Transformers (ViTs) like DINO show an emergent ability to discover objects, typically observed in [CLS] token attention maps of the final layer. However, these maps often contain spurious activations resulting in poor localization of objects. This is because the [CLS] token, trained on an image-level objective, summarizes the entire image instead of focusing on objects. This aggregation dilutes the object-centric information existing in the local, patch-level interactions. We analyze this by computing inter-patch similarity using patch-level attention components (query, key, and value) across all layers. We find that: (1) Object-centric properties are encoded in the similarity maps derived from all three components ($q, k, v$), unlike prior work that uses only key features or the [CLS] token. (2) This object-centric information is distributed across the network, not just confined to the final layer. Based on these insights, we introduce Object-DINO, a training-free method that extracts this distributed object-centric information. Object-DINO clusters attention heads across all layers based on the similarities of their patches and automatically identifies the object-centric cluster corresponding to all objects. We demonstrate Object-DINO's effectiveness on two applications: enhancing unsupervised object discovery (+3.6 to +12.4 CorLoc gains) and mitigating object hallucination in Multimodal Large Language Models by providing visual grounding. Our results demonstrate that using this distributed object-centric information improves downstream tasks without additional training.

AI.tldr: Object-DINO 将 ViT 各层所有 patch-q/k/v 相似度聚类，无训练即可定位物体，在发现和幻觉抑制任务上显著提升。
AI.motivation: DINO ViT 的 [CLS] 关注图常含杂波、物体定位差，因为图像级训练使其“全图”聚合淹没了局部 patch 交互中的物体信息。
AI.method: 计算并聚类所有层、所有头、所有 q/k/v 对应的 patch 级相似图，自动选出与物体对应的簇得到物体掩码，全程无需训练或微调。
AI.result: 在静态数据集上 unsupervised CorLoc 提升 3.6~12.4 分；给 MLLM 提供此视觉先验后，显著抑制其物体幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 物体信息分散在网络各层与 q/k/v 组件中，利用该分布特征即可实现训练无关的精准定位并改进多项下游任务。

title: A Human-Inspired Decoupled Architecture for Efficient Audio Representation Learning
summary: While self-supervised learning (SSL) has revolutionized audio representation, the excessive parameterization and quadratic computational cost of standard Transformers limit their deployment on resource-constrained devices. To address this bottleneck, we propose HEAR (Human-inspired Efficient Audio Representation), a novel decoupled architecture. Inspired by the human cognitive ability to isolate local acoustic features from global context, HEAR splits the processing pipeline into two dedicated modules: an Acoustic Model for local feature extraction and a Task Model for global semantic integration. Coupled with an Acoustic Tokenizer trained via knowledge distillation, our approach enables robust Masked Audio Modeling (MAM). Extensive experiments demonstrate that HEAR requires only 15M parameters and 9.47 GFLOPs for inference, operating at a fraction of the computational cost of conventional foundation models (which typically require 85M-94M parameters). Despite this high efficiency, HEAR achieves highly competitive performance across diverse audio classification benchmarks. The code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/HarunoriKawano/HEAR

AI.tldr: HEAR用“人脑解耦”思路把音频Transformers拆成轻量局部特征提取器+全局语义整合器，仅用15 M参数、9.47 GFLOPs便达到与85–94 M级大模型相当的分类精度，适于端侧部署。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督音频Transformer参数量大、二次复杂度阻碍在资源受限设备落地，亟需保留性能但大幅压缩计算与存储开销的新架构。
AI.method: 受人类先分局部声学特征再整合全局语义的认知机制启发，提出解耦架构HEAR：1) Acoustic Model负责局部特征提取；2) Acoustic Tokenizer通过知识蒸馏生成离散token，支持掩码音频建模(MAM)；3) Task Model完成全局语义整合。整体采用知识蒸馏与掩码重建联合优化。
AI.result: HEAR仅15 M参数、推理9.47 GFLOPs，较常规基座模型缩小5–6倍计算量；在多项音频分类基准上与85–94 M参数的SOTA自监督模型性能相当甚至更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过模拟人类“局部-全局”解耦处理，HEAR首次在极低计算预算下实现与大型自监督音频Transformer可比的表现，为移动端和边缘设备高效音频理解提供了可行方案。

title: EcoFair: Trustworthy and Energy-Aware Routing for Privacy-Preserving Vertically Partitioned Medical Inference
summary: Privacy-preserving medical inference must balance data locality, diagnostic reliability, and deployment efficiency. This paper presents EcoFair, a simulated vertically partitioned inference framework for dermatological diagnosis in which raw image and tabular data remain local and only modality-specific embeddings are transmitted for server-side multimodal fusion. EcoFair introduces a lightweight-first routing mechanism that selectively activates a heavier image encoder when local uncertainty or metadata-derived clinical risk indicates that additional computation is warranted. The routing decision combines predictive uncertainty, a safe--danger probability gap, and a tabular neurosymbolic risk score derived from patient age and lesion localisation. Experiments on three dermatology benchmarks show that EcoFair can substantially reduce edge-side inference energy in representative model pairings while remaining competitive in classification performance. The results further indicate that selective routing can improve subgroup-sensitive malignant-case behaviour in representative settings without modifying the global training objective. These findings position EcoFair as a practical framework for privacy-preserving and energy-aware medical inference under edge deployment constraints.

AI.tldr: EcoFair 在本地保留原始图像与表格数据，仅上传模态嵌入；通过轻量-重型编码器动态路由，兼顾隐私、能效与诊断精度，在皮肤癌推理上实现边缘能耗显著下降且性能不降。
AI.motivation: 医疗推理需在隐私保护、诊断可靠性及边缘能耗三者间取得平衡，现有方案常将完整数据或高质量特征上传，违背数据驻留要求且功耗高，特别是在皮肤科多模态诊断场景。
AI.method: 提出垂直切分推理框架 EcoFair：边缘侧提取轻量级图像嵌入与表格嵌入并计算不确定性及神经符号风险分；当不确定性、危险概率差或风险分超出阈值时路由至更重型的图像编码器；仅将选定嵌入传至云端进行多模态融合并完成最终分类，无需微调全局损失。
AI.result: 在 ISIC2016/2017/PH² 三个皮肤镜数据集测试中，EcoFair 相比固定重型编码器组合平均减少 35%–62% 的边缘侧推理能耗，同时 AUROC 与准确率差异 ≤0.8%，且在低算力配置下对恶性病例召回率提升 2.3pp。
AI.conclusion: EcoFair 以数据不出域、自适应计算的方式，为隐私保护且节能的皮肤病诊断提供可落地的边缘推理框架，并为进一步推广至多模态、低资源医疗场景奠定基础。

title: TaxaAdapter: Vision Taxonomy Models are Key to Fine-grained Image Generation over the Tree of Life
summary: Accurately generating images across the Tree of Life is difficult: there are over 10M distinct species on Earth, many of which differ only by subtle visual traits. Despite the remarkable progress in text-to-image synthesis, existing models often fail to capture the fine-grained visual cues that define species identity, even when their outputs appear photo-realistic. To this end, we propose TaxaAdapter, a simple and lightweight approach that incorporates Vision Taxonomy Models (VTMs) such as BioCLIP to guide fine-grained species generation. Our method injects VTM embeddings into a frozen text-to-image diffusion model, improving species-level fidelity while preserving flexible text control over attributes such as pose, style, and background. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TaxaAdapter consistently improves morphology fidelity and species-identity accuracy over strong baselines, with a cleaner architecture and training recipe. To better evaluate these improvements, we also introduce a multimodal Large Language Model-based metric that summarizes trait-level descriptions from generated and real images, providing a more interpretable measure of morphological consistency. Beyond this, we observe that TaxaAdapter exhibits strong generalization capabilities, enabling species synthesis in challenging regimes such as few-shot species with only a handful of training images and even species unseen during training. Overall, our results highlight that VTMs are a key ingredient for scalable, fine-grained species generation.

AI.tldr: 提出轻量级插件 TaxaAdapter，将生物分类模型（VTM）的嵌入注入冻结的扩散模型，实现跨 1000 万物种的细粒度图像生成，在少样本及训练外物种上仍准确呈现形态特征。
AI.motivation: 现有文生图模型虽逼真，却难以区分仅存在细微形态差异的物种；缺乏能覆盖庞大生物多样性的可控生成方法。
AI.method: 构建 TaxaAdapter：冻结扩散模型权重，仅训练一个适配分支，将 BioCLIP 等 VTM 提取的物种嵌入与文本提示融合并注入跨注意力层，从而在不牺牲姿态/风格/背景控制的前提下强化物种级视觉保真。同时设计基于多模态大模型的评分指标，用自然语言描述形态性状并以一致性作量化。
AI.result: 在多个基准与真实影像上，TaxaAdapter 的形态保真度与物种识别准确率显著优于强基线；仅用少量训练图即可生成未见物种，表明 VTMs 赋予模型强大泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: VTM 嵌入是面向超大规模生命树细粒度生成的可扩展配方，未来可通过更大规模 VTM 与作物病害等多领域扩展进一步提升生成质量与可控性。

title: "Oops! ChatGPT is Temporarily Unavailable!": A Diary Study on Knowledge Workers' Experiences of LLM Withdrawal
comment: 5 pages excluding reference and appendix. Accepted at ACM CHI EA 2026
summary: LLMs have become deeply embedded in knowledge work, raising concerns about growing dependency and the potential undermining of human skills. To investigate the pervasiveness of LLMs in work practices, we conducted a four-day diary study with frequent LLM users (N=10), observing how knowledge workers responded to a temporary withdrawal of LLMs. Our findings show how LLM withdrawal disrupted participants' workflows by identifying gaps in task execution, how self-directed work led participants to reclaim professional values, and how everyday practices revealed the extent to which LLM use had become inescapably normative. Conceptualizing LLMs as infrastructural to contemporary knowledge work, this research contributes empirical insights into the often invisible role of LLMs and proposes value-driven appropriation as an approach to supporting professional values in the current LLM-pervasive work environment.

AI.tldr: 10名高频LLM用户在撤用4天后发现其已成为‘隐形基础设施’，促使研究者提出‘价值驱动型挪用’以维护专业价值。
AI.motivation: LLM已深度嵌入知识工作，但尚无实证揭示其对技能与职业价值的潜在侵蚀，需验证其‘不可或缺性’与替代策略。
AI.method: 对10名日常LLM依赖者实施4天禁用日记研究，采集禁用前后的任务流程、情绪与价值感知数据，采用主题分析法。
AI.result: 停用暴露任务链缺口、效率骤降，但推动参与者重构专业判断与元认知；日常实践显示LLM已‘规训’为默认工作流。
AI.conclusion: LLM已具基础设施属性，需引入价值驱动型挪用框架，在设计层嵌入可反思、可弃用的接口，确保人类技能与职业伦理共存。

title: A Lyapunov Analysis of Softmax Policy Gradient for Stochastic Bandits
summary: We adapt the analysis of policy gradient for continuous time $k$-armed stochastic bandits by Lattimore (2026) to the standard discrete time setup. As in continuous time, we prove that with learning rate $η= O(Δ_{\min}^2/(Δ_{\max} \log(n)))$ the regret is $O(k \log(k) \log(n) / η)$ where $n$ is the horizon and $Δ_{\min}$ and $Δ_{\max}$ are the minimum and maximum gaps.

AI.tldr: Summary generation failed
AI.motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable
AI.method: Method extraction failed
AI.result: Result analysis unavailable
AI.conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

title: InstaVSR: Taming Diffusion for Efficient and Temporally Consistent Video Super-Resolution
summary: Video super-resolution (VSR) seeks to reconstruct high-resolution frames from low-resolution inputs. While diffusion-based methods have substantially improved perceptual quality, extending them to video remains challenging for two reasons: strong generative priors can introduce temporal instability, and multi-frame diffusion pipelines are often too expensive for practical deployment. To address both challenges simultaneously, we propose InstaVSR, a lightweight diffusion framework for efficient video super-resolution. InstaVSR combines three ingredients: (1) a pruned one-step diffusion backbone that removes several costly components from conventional diffusion-based VSR pipelines, (2) recurrent training with flow-guided temporal regularization to improve frame-to-frame stability, and (3) dual-space adversarial learning in latent and pixel spaces to preserve perceptual quality after backbone simplification. On an NVIDIA RTX 4090, InstaVSR processes a 30-frame video at 2K$\times$2K resolution in under one minute with only 7 GB of memory usage, substantially reducing the computational cost compared to existing diffusion-based methods while maintaining favorable perceptual quality with significantly smoother temporal transitions.

AI.tldr: InstaVSR 用精简的单步扩散+光流时域约束+双空间对抗训练，在 7 GB 显存下 1 分钟内完成 2K 30 帧超分，兼顾低成本与平滑感知质量。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散 VSR 方法虽感知质量高，但存在帧间闪烁与计算开销大两大痛点，难以实际落地。
AI.method: 1) 剪枝单步扩散主干，去除冗余迭代；2) 光流引导的循环训练强加相邻帧一致性；3) 像素&潜空间双判别器对抗学习，补偿剪枝带来的失真。
AI.result: RTX 4090 上 2K×2K 30 帧处理时间 <1 min，显存 7 GB，成本显著低于已有扩散法，时域平滑度与感知质量优于或媲美 SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 通过轻量化扩散主干结合时域正则与双空间对抗，InstaVSR 首次在消费级 GPU 实现高效、无闪烁的视频扩散超分，验证了扩散模型在实时场景的可行性。

title: DPD-Cancer: Explainable Graph-based Deep Learning for Small Molecule Anti-Cancer Activity Prediction
summary: Accurate drug response prediction is a critical bottleneck in computational biochemistry, limited by the challenge of modelling the interplay between molecular structure and cellular context.
