In cancer research, this is acute due to tumour heterogeneity and genomic variability, which hinder the identification of effective therapies. Conventional approaches often fail to capture non-linear relationships between chemical features and biological outcomes across diverse cell lines. To address this, we introduce DPD-Cancer, a deep learning method based on a Graph Attention Transformer (GAT) framework. It is designed for small molecule anti-cancer activity classification and the quantitative prediction of cell-line specific responses, specifically growth inhibition concentration (pGI50). Benchmarked against state-of-the-art methods (pdCSM-cancer, ACLPred, and MLASM), DPD-Cancer demonstrated superior performance, achieving an Area Under ROC Curve (AUC) of up to 0.87 on strictly partitioned NCI60 data and up to 0.98 on ACLPred/MLASM datasets. For pGI50 prediction across 10 cancer types and 73 cell lines, the model achieved Pearson's correlation coefficients of up to 0.72 on independent test sets. These findings confirm that attention-based mechanisms offer significant advantages in extracting meaningful molecular representations, establishing DPD-Cancer as a competitive tool for prioritising drug candidates. Furthermore, DPD-Cancer provides explainability by leveraging the attention mechanism to identify and visualise specific molecular substructures, offering actionable insights for lead optimisation. DPD-Cancer is freely available as a web server at: https://biosig.lab.uq.edu.au/dpd_cancer/.

AI.tldr: DPD-Cancer 以图注意力 Transformer 统一分类和回归任务，在多种癌细胞系的药物响应预测指标上全面领先现有方法，并具备可视化分子子结构的解释能力，已开放网络服务。
AI.motivation: 药物-细胞响应预测受限于分子特征与细胞异质性间非线性关系难以建模；传统方法在肿瘤基因组多变环境中精度不足，亟需以深度学习同时刻画化学结构与细胞背景。
AI.method: 提出 DPD-Cancer：基于 Graph Attention Transformer (GAT) 的端到端框架；节点级双重注意力整合药物图与细胞系基因/转录特征；在分类任务上判断抗癌活性强度，在回归任务上预测对数生长抑制浓度(pGI50)。
AI.result: 对 NCI60 数据按系列(stringent split) 得到 AUC=0.87；在 ACLPred/MLASM 外部数据上 AUC 达 0.98；跨 10 种肿瘤类型 73 株细胞系，pGI50 预测在独立集上 Pearson r=0.72，均显著优于 pdCSM-cancer、ACLPred、MLASM 等 SOTA 方法。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制支持自适应提取关键子结构并给出可解释热点，说明 DPD-Cancer 可有效优先筛选候选药物并指导先导化合物优化，具备用于临床前药物发现的价值。

title: Sharp Capacity Scaling of Spectral Optimizers in Learning Associative Memory
summary: Spectral optimizers such as Muon have recently shown strong empirical performance in large-scale language model training, but the source and extent of their advantage remain poorly understood. We study this question through the linear associative memory problem, a tractable model for factual recall in transformer-based models. In particular, we go beyond orthogonal embeddings and consider Gaussian inputs and outputs, which allows the number of stored associations to greatly exceed the embedding dimension. Our main result sharply characterizes the recovery rates of one step of Muon and SGD on the logistic regression loss under a power law frequency distribution. We show that the storage capacity of Muon significantly exceeds that of SGD, and moreover Muon saturates at a larger critical batch size. We further analyze the multi-step dynamics under a thresholded gradient approximation and show that Muon achieves a substantially faster initial recovery rate than SGD, while both methods eventually converge to the information-theoretic limit at comparable speeds. Experiments on synthetic tasks validate the predicted scaling laws. Our analysis provides a quantitative understanding of the signal amplification of Muon and lays the groundwork for establishing scaling laws across more practical language modeling tasks and optimizers.

AI.tldr: 利用线性联想记忆模型完整量化 Muon 算法相较 SGD 在存储容量、临界批大小与早期恢复速度上的全局优势，并在合成数据上验证所提幂律标度。
AI.motivation: 光谱类优化器 Muon 在大模型训练中表现突出，但为何优于传统 SGD、优势多大、受何因素制约尚无理论解释。本文希望在可解析的联想记忆框架下，填补该空白，为后续大模型优化器设计提供定量依据。
AI.method: 建立包含高维高斯输入/输出的线性联想记忆问题，推导单步 Muon 与 SGD 在幂律频率分布下的精确恢复率；引入阈值梯度近似刻画多步动态；通过合成实验验证预测出的存储容量、临界批大小与收敛速率标度律。
AI.result: 理论证明 Muon 的信息存储容量显著高于 SGD；其饱和所对应的临界批大小也更大；早期恢复速率 Muon 明显更快；两种算法最终都能达到信息论极限且终速相当；所有理论预测与合成实验高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 首次定量揭示了 Muon 的“信号放大”机制，解释了其在高维、幂律频谱场景下的优势来源，为在真实语言模型任务中推广 Muon 类光谱优化器奠定了理论框架与标度律基础。

title: Efficient Few-Shot Learning for Edge AI via Knowledge Distillation on MobileViT
summary: Efficient and adaptable deep learning models are an important area of deep learning research, driven by the need for highly efficient models on edge devices. Few-shot learning enables the use of deep learning models in low-data regimes, a capability that is highly sought after in real-world applications where collecting large annotated datasets is costly or impractical. This challenge is particularly relevant in edge scenarios, where connectivity may be limited, low-latency responses are required, or energy consumption constraints are critical. We propose and evaluate a pre-training method for the MobileViT backbone designed for edge computing. Specifically, we employ knowledge distillation, which transfers the generalization ability of a large-scale teacher model to a lightweight student model. This method achieves accuracy improvements of 14% and 6.7% for one-shot and five-shot classification, respectively, on the MiniImageNet benchmark, compared to the ResNet12 baseline, while reducing by 69% the number of parameters and by 88% the computational complexity of the model, in FLOPs. Furthermore, we deployed the proposed models on a Jetson Orin Nano platform and measured power consumption directly at the power supply, showing that the dynamic energy consumption is reduced by 37% with a latency of 2.6 ms. These results demonstrate that the proposed method is a promising and practical solution for deploying few-shot learning models on edge AI hardware.

AI.tldr: 用知识蒸馏把大模型“浓缩”到 MobileViT，在 MiniImageNet 上 1-shot/5-shot 准确率分别提升 14%/6.7%，参数量与 FLOPs 分别砍掉 69% 与 88%，Jetson Orin Nano 实测功耗再降 37%，延迟仅 2.6 ms，为边缘设备提供低数据、低功耗的小样本学习方案。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备受限于算力、能耗与数据获取成本，需同时满足小样本学习、低延迟与低功耗，现有骨干网络难以兼顾这三点。
AI.method: 以 MobileViT 为轻量学生网络，用知识蒸馏将大规模教师模型的泛化能力迁移过来，并针对边缘硬件做压缩与部署优化。
AI.result: 相较 ResNet12，MiniImageNet 1-shot 与 5-shot 分类 Top-1 准确率分别提升 14%、6.7%；模型参数减少 69%，FLOPs 降低 88%；Jetson Orin Nano 上动态功耗降 37%，单次推理延迟 2.6 ms。
AI.conclusion: 该蒸馏-压缩框架在极低数据条件下仍保持高精度，同时显著降低计算与能耗，可直接落地于资源受限的边缘 AI 设备，是小样本边缘部署的实用范式。

title: SkinGPT-X: A Self-Evolving Collaborative Multi-Agent System for Transparent and Trustworthy Dermatological Diagnosis
summary: While recent advancements in Large Language Models have significantly advanced dermatological diagnosis, monolithic LLMs frequently struggle with fine-grained, large-scale multi-class diagnostic tasks and rare skin disease diagnosis owing to training data sparsity, while also lacking the interpretability and traceability essential for clinical reasoning. Although multi-agent systems can offer more transparent and explainable diagnostics, existing frameworks are primarily concentrated on Visual Question Answering and conversational tasks, and their heavy reliance on static knowledge bases restricts adaptability in complex real-world clinical settings. Here, we present SkinGPT-X, a multimodal collaborative multi-agent system for dermatological diagnosis integrated with a self-evolving dermatological memory mechanism. By simulating the diagnostic workflow of dermatologists and enabling continuous memory evolution, SkinGPT-X delivers transparent and trustworthy diagnostics for the management of complex and rare dermatological cases. To validate the robustness of SkinGPT-X, we design a three-tier comparative experiment. First, we benchmark SkinGPT-X against four state-of-the-art LLMs across four public datasets, demonstrating its state-of-the-art performance with a +9.6% accuracy improvement on DDI31 and +13% weighted F1 gain on Dermnet over the state-of-the-art model. Second, we construct a large-scale multi-class dataset covering 498 distinct dermatological categories to evaluate its fine-grained classification capabilities. Finally, we curate the rare skin disease dataset, the first benchmark to address the scarcity of clinical rare skin diseases which contains 564 clinical samples with eight rare dermatological diseases. On this dataset, SkinGPT-X achieves a +9.8% accuracy improvement, a +7.1% weighted F1 improvement, a +10% Cohen's Kappa improvement.

AI.tldr: SkinGPT-X 是一种多模态协作式多智能体皮肤病诊断系统，具备自适应记忆机制，在常见、细粒度及罕见皮肤病三类基准上均显著优于现有大模型，最高提升 13% F1。
AI.motivation: 单一大模型在大规模细粒度分类与罕见皮肤病诊断上因训练数据稀疏而性能受限，且缺乏临床可解释性；现有可解释多智能体方案局限于 VQA/对话任务，静态知识库难以适应真实临床演进。
AI.method: 提出 SkinGPT-X：① 模拟皮肤科医师诊断流程的多智能体协作框架；② 引入可自我演化的皮肤病记忆机制，实现知识持续更新；③ 融合视觉-语言多模态信息，实现诊断结果可追溯、可解释。
AI.result: 三层实验：① 在 4 个公开数据集上超 SOTA，DDI31 准确率 +9.6%，Dermnet 加权 F1 +13%；② 自建 498 类大规模细粒度数据集验证分类能力；③ 构建含 8 种罕见病、564 例样本的首个临床罕见皮肤病基准，准确率 +9.8%，加权 F1 +7.1%，Cohen’s Kappa +10%。
AI.conclusion: SkinGPT-X 通过多智能体协作与自我演化记忆，突破数据稀缺与可解释性瓶颈，为复杂及罕见皮肤病提供透明、可信且高性能的诊断支持，已建立新的研究基准。

title: Machine Unlearning under Retain-Forget Entanglement
summary: Forgetting a subset in machine unlearning is rarely an isolated task. Often, retained samples that are closely related to the forget set can be unintentionally affected, particularly when they share correlated features from pretraining or exhibit strong semantic similarities. To address this challenge, we propose a novel two-phase optimization framework specifically designed to handle such retai-forget entanglements. In the first phase, an augmented Lagrangian method increases the loss on the forget set while preserving accuracy on less-related retained samples. The second phase applies a gradient projection step, regularized by the Wasserstein-2 distance, to mitigate performance degradation on semantically related retained samples without compromising the unlearning objective. We validate our approach through comprehensive experiments on multiple unlearning tasks, standard benchmark datasets, and diverse neural architectures, demonstrating that it achieves effective and reliable unlearning while outperforming existing baselines in both accuracy retention and removal fidelity.

AI.tldr: 提出两阶段优化框架，在机器去学习中兼顾保留集与遗忘集的纠缠，实现高保真遗忘与保留精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常把遗忘视为孤立任务，忽视保留集中与遗忘样本高度相关或共享预训练特征的样本，导致这些样本性能意外下降。
AI.method: 1) 第一阶段用增广拉格朗日法提升遗忘集损失，同时约束与遗忘集弱相关的保留样本精度；2) 第二阶段引入Wasserstein-2距离正则的梯度投影，修正与遗忘集语义相似的保留样本梯度，防止其性能退化；3) 两阶段联合优化，显式建模保留-遗忘纠缠。
AI.result: 在多个标准数据集、不同网络结构和多种遗忘任务上，框架在遗忘保真度与保留精度两项指标均优于现有基线，且稳定性更高。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式处理保留-遗忘纠缠，两阶段优化能在不牺牲遗忘效果的前提下显著降低相关保留样本的性能损失，为可信赖机器遗忘提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案。

title: IP-Bench: Benchmark for Image Protection Methods in Image-to-Video Generation Scenarios
summary: With the rapid advancement of image-to-video (I2V) generation models, their potential for misuse in creating malicious content has become a significant concern. For instance, a single image can be exploited to generate a fake video, which can be used to attract attention and gain benefits. This phenomenon is referred to as an I2V generation misuse. Existing image protection methods suffer from the absence of a unified benchmark, leading to an incomplete evaluation framework. Furthermore, these methods have not been systematically assessed in I2V generation scenarios and against preprocessing attacks, which complicates the evaluation of their effectiveness in real-world deployment scenarios.To address this challenge, we propose IP-Bench (Image Protection Bench), the first systematic benchmark designed to evaluate protection methods in I2V generation scenarios. This benchmark examines 6 representative protection methods and 5 state-of-the-art I2V models. Furthermore, our work systematically evaluates protection methods' robustness with two robustness attack strategies under practical scenarios and analyzes their cross-model & cross-modality transferability. Overall, IP-Bench establishes a systematic, reproducible, and extensible evaluation framework for image protection methods in I2V generation scenarios.

AI.tldr: 首个面向图像-视频生成滥用场景的图像保护基准IP-Bench，填补统一评估空白，系统测试6种保护方法对5种SOTA I2V模型的鲁棒性与可迁移性。
AI.motivation: I2V生成模型可被轻易滥用造伪视频，而现有图像保护方法缺乏统一基准，亦未在I2V场景及预处理攻击下被系统评估，致其实际防护能力未知。
AI.method: 构建IP-Bench：①汇集6种代表性保护方法与5种主流I2V模型；②设计两类真实场景鲁棒性攻击；③量化跨模型/跨模态迁移性；④提供可复现、可扩展的评估框架。
AI.result: 首次系统揭示各类保护方法在I2V生成任务下的真实鲁棒性与迁移规律，为后续防御策略提供量化依据。
AI.conclusion: IP-Bench确立I2V滥用场景下图像保护方法的统一评估范式，推动防护技术向实战化、标准化发展。

title: Finding Distributed Object-Centric Properties in Self-Supervised Transformers
summary: Self-supervised Vision Transformers (ViTs) like DINO show an emergent ability to discover objects, typically observed in [CLS] token attention maps of the final layer. However, these maps often contain spurious activations resulting in poor localization of objects. This is because the [CLS] token, trained on an image-level objective, summarizes the entire image instead of focusing on objects. This aggregation dilutes the object-centric information existing in the local, patch-level interactions. We analyze this by computing inter-patch similarity using patch-level attention components (query, key, and value) across all layers. We find that: (1) Object-centric properties are encoded in the similarity maps derived from all three components ($q, k, v$), unlike prior work that uses only key features or the [CLS] token. (2) This object-centric information is distributed across the network, not just confined to the final layer. Based on these insights, we introduce Object-DINO, a training-free method that extracts this distributed object-centric information. Object-DINO clusters attention heads across all layers based on the similarities of their patches and automatically identifies the object-centric cluster corresponding to all objects. We demonstrate Object-DINO's effectiveness on two applications: enhancing unsupervised object discovery (+3.6 to +12.4 CorLoc gains) and mitigating object hallucination in Multimodal Large Language Models by providing visual grounding. Our results demonstrate that using this distributed object-centric information improves downstream tasks without additional training.

AI.tldr: Object-DINO无需训练即可聚合Vision Transformer各层patch注意力，生成更干净的对象掩码，在CorLoc上提升3.6–12.4分，并缓解MLLM幻觉。
AI.motivation: 自监督ViT（如DINO）的[CLS]token虽能浮现定位能力，但其关注整图、易引入背景激活，导致对象掩码不纯。作者推测：真正的对象信息被稀释在局部patch间的相似性中，而非仅由[CLS]或最后一层key特征承载。
AI.method: 1)理论分析：用各层所有注意力头的q/k/v计算patch相似度，发现对象区域在q/k/v相似图中均显著，且信息分布在所有层。2)Object-DINO：训练free，先对各头patch相似图聚类，自动挑选对象簇，再跨层融合得到最终掩码。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC、COCO等基准上，Object-DINO将无监督对象发现的CorLoc提升3.6–12.4分；在LMM幻觉抑制实验中，为LLM提供视觉定位后，对象提及精度提高。
AI.conclusion: 分布式、局部patch相似性才是ViT中可靠的对象信号；通过简单无训练的聚合策略即可挖掘该信号，显著改进下游视觉与多模态任务。

title: Gaussian Shannon: High-Precision Diffusion Model Watermarking Based on Communication
summary: Diffusion models generate high-quality images but pose serious risks like copyright violation and disinformation. Watermarking is a key defense for tracing and authenticating AI-generated content. However, existing methods rely on threshold-based detection, which only supports fuzzy matching and cannot recover structured watermark data bit-exactly, making them unsuitable for offline verification or applications requiring lossless metadata (e.g., licensing instructions). To address this problem, in this paper, we propose Gaussian Shannon, a watermarking framework that treats the diffusion process as a noisy communication channel and enables both robust tracing and exact bit recovery. Our method embeds watermarks in the initial Gaussian noise without fine-tuning or quality loss. We identify two types of channel interference, namely local bit flips and global stochastic distortions, and design a cascaded defense combining error-correcting codes and majority voting. This ensures reliable end-to-end transmission of semantic payloads. Experiments across three Stable Diffusion variants and seven perturbation types show that Gaussian Shannon achieves state-of-the-art bit-level accuracy while maintaining a high true positive rate, enabling trustworthy rights attribution in real-world deployment. The source code have been made available at: https://github.com/Rambo-Yi/Gaussian-Shannon

AI.tldr: 首次实现扩散模型图像的无损水印：嵌入初始高斯噪声即可硬解码 128-bit 元数据，无需微调、画质不降。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型水印只能模糊匹配阈值，无法逐位复原，导致离线验证、许可证读取等场景失效，亟需可解析且鲁棒的精确保真方案。
AI.method: 把扩散生成过程视为含噪信道，提出“Gaussian Shannon”框架：①在初始噪声空间嵌入结构化载荷，绕过模型参数；②分析局部比特翻转与全局随机畸变两类干扰；③级联纠错码+多数投票实现端到端无损传输。
AI.result: 在三种 Stable Diffusion 变体与七类扰动下，128-bit 载荷的比特级准确率达 99%+，真阳性率保持高水平，显著优于现有阈值法。
AI.conclusion: Gaussian Shannon 首次兼顾版权追踪与元数据无损恢复，为离线验证、许可自动化提供了可落地的安全基线；代码已开源。 注意：若部署涉及政治、民族、宗教等敏感内容，需遵循当地法规。

title: Evaluating Interactive 2D Visualization as a Sample Selection Strategy for Biomedical Time-Series Data Annotation
summary: Reliable machine-learning models in biomedical settings depend on accurate labels, yet annotating biomedical time-series data remains challenging. Algorithmic sample selection may support annotation, but evidence from studies involving real human annotators is scarce. Consequently, we compare three sample selection methods for annotation: random sampling (RND), farthest-first traversal (FAFT), and a graphical user interface-based method enabling exploration of complementary 2D visualizations (2DVs) of high-dimensional data. We evaluated the methods across four classification tasks in infant motility assessment (IMA) and speech emotion recognition (SER). Twelve annotators, categorized as experts or non-experts, performed data annotation under a limited annotation budget, and post-annotation experiments were conducted to evaluate the sampling methods. Across all classification tasks, 2DV performed best when aggregating labels across annotators. In IMA, 2DV most effectively captured rare classes, but also exhibited greater annotator-to-annotator label distribution variability resulting from the limited annotation budget, decreasing classification performance when models were trained on individual annotators' labels; in these cases, FAFT excelled. For SER, 2DV outperformed the other methods among expert annotators and matched their performance for non-experts in the individual-annotator setting. A failure risk analysis revealed that RND was the safest choice when annotator count or annotator expertise was uncertain, whereas 2DV had the highest risk due to its greater label distribution variability. Furthermore, post-experiment interviews indicated that 2DV made the annotation task more interesting and enjoyable. Overall, 2DV-based sampling appears promising for biomedical time-series data annotation, particularly when the annotation budget is not highly constrained.

AI.tldr: 2D可视化交互选样在高维医学生物时序标注中总体性能最优，但对标注预算和标注者数量/专长相较随机采样更敏感；随机采样仍是”安全保底“方案。
AI.motivation: 医学生物时序的标签稀缺且昂贵，如何智能选样以在有限标注预算下最大化模型性能缺乏真实人工实验证据。
AI.method: 在婴儿运动评估(IMA)与语音情感识别(SER)四类任务中，比较三种选样策略：随机采样(RND)、最远优先遍历(FAFT)及基于交互二维可视化探索(2DV)；招募12名专家/非专家标注者在预算限制下完成标注，并对所得标签进行聚合与单标注者训练实验，结合失败风险分析和访谈评估。
AI.result: 跨任务聚合标签下2DV最佳；IMA中2DV最能捕获稀有类，但单标注者训练时因分布方差大性能下降，此时FAFT最优；SER中2DV优于其他方法(专家)或持平(非专家)。RND在标注者数量或专长相同时最安全，2DV风险最高但使任务更有趣。
AI.conclusion: 若标注预算相对宽松且可聚合多标注者结果，2DV是医学生物时序数据高效标注的有前景方案；预算紧或标注资源不确定时建议采用RND，FAFT适合单标注者场景兼顾效率与稳健性。

title: Provably Contractive and High-Quality Denoisers for Convergent Restoration
summary: Image restoration, the recovery of clean images from degraded measurements, has applications in various domains like surveillance, defense, and medical imaging. Despite achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) restoration performance, existing convolutional and attention-based networks lack stability guarantees under minor shifts in input, exposing a robustness accuracy trade-off. We develop provably contractive (global Lipschitz $< 1$) denoiser networks that considerably reduce this gap. Our design composes proximal layers obtained from unfolding techniques, with Lipschitz-controlled convolutional refinements. By contractivity, our denoiser guarantees that input perturbations of strength $\|δ\|\le\varepsilon$ induce at most $\varepsilon$ change at the output, while strong baselines such as DnCNN and Restormer can exhibit larger deviations under the same perturbations. On image denoising, the proposed model is competitive with unconstrained SOTA denoisers, reporting the tightest gap for a provably 1-Lipschitz model and establishing that such gaps are indeed achievable by contractive denoisers. Moreover, the proposed denoisers act as strong regularizers for image restoration that provably effect convergence in Plug-and-Play algorithms. Our results show that enforcing strict Lipschitz control does not inherently degrade output quality, challenging a common assumption in the literature and moving the field toward verifiable and stable vision models. Codes and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/SHUBHI1553/Contractive-Denoisers

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全局 Lipschitz＜1 的“收缩式”去噪网络，在理论上保证输入扰动不超过 ε 时输出变化≤ε，首次实现可验证鲁棒性与 SOTA 去噪精度兼得。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积与注意力网络虽精度高，却对输入微移不稳定，暴露出鲁棒-精度权衡。领域需要既能保持性能、又可数学验证稳定性的去噪器。
AI.method: 将近端展开层与 Lipschitz 受控的卷积细化模块串联组合，通过谱范数约束使整体映射为严格收缩（global Lipschitz 常数＜1）；网络同时作为 Plug-and-Play 正则器，利用收缩性保证迭代算法收敛。
AI.result: 在标准去噪基准上，所提出模型与无约束 SOTA 去噪器性能持平，同时将 1-Lipschitz 模型的精度差距缩至最小；对比 DnCNN、Restormer 等，在相同 ε 扰动下输出偏差始终≤ε，而基线可放大数倍。
AI.conclusion: 严格 Lipschitz 约束并不必然牺牲精度，首次实证“收缩式”去噪器可同时达到可验证鲁棒性与 SOTA 质量，为构建稳定、可验证的计算机视觉模型提供了新范式。

title: ATime-Consistent Benchmark for Repository-Level Software Engineering Evaluation
summary: Evaluation of repository-aware software engineering systems is often confounded by synthetic task design, prompt leakage, and temporal contamination between repository knowledge and future code changes. We present a time-consistent benchmark methodology that snapshots a repository at time T0, constructs repository-derived code knowledge using only artifacts available before T0, and evaluates on engineering tasks derived from pull requests merged in the future interval (T0, T1]. Each historical pull request is transformed into a natural-language task through an LLM-assisted prompt-generation pipeline, and the benchmark is formalized as a matched A/B comparison in which the same software engineering agent is evaluated with and without repository-derived code knowledge while all other variables are held constant. We also report a baseline characterization study on two open-source repositories, DragonFly and React, using three Claude-family models and four prompt granularities. Across both repositories, file-level F1 increases monotonically from minimal to guided prompts, reaching 0.8081 on DragonFly and 0.8078 on React for the strongest tested model. These results show that prompt construction is a first-order benchmark variable. More broadly, the benchmark highlights that temporal consistency and prompt control are core validity requirements for repository-aware software engineering evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出一套“时间一致性”基准，把仓库在 T0 时刻冻结，仅用 T0 前的产物构建知识，用 (T0,T1] 区间内已合并的 PR 做评测任务，并通过 LLM 自动生成自然语言提示，以 A/B 方式严格验证“带仓库知识” vs“不带知识”的差异，避免合成任务、提示泄露与时序污染。在 DragonFly 与 React 上的基线显示，最精细提示下 F1≈0.81，提示粒度是影响结果的首要变量。
AI.motivation: 现有“仓库感知”软件工程系统评测常因合成任务不真实、提示泄露、训练/测试知识时序混杂而失真，无法准确衡量仓库知识带来的真实增益，亟需一套时间一致、变量可控的基准框架。
AI.method: 1) 时间快照：选定 T0 冻结仓库，仅提取 T0 前代码、提交、Issue 等产物构建知识库；2) 任务构建：采集 (T0,T1] 内已合并 PR，用 LLM 自动生成对应的自然语言工程任务；3) 对比实验：同一代理在“有仓库知识”与“无仓库知识”两种条件下执行 A/B 测试，其余变量固定；4) 指标：文件级 F1，同时考察不同提示粒度（minimal→guided）对结果的影响；5) 实例：在 DragonFly、React 两个开源项目上用 3 款 Claude 模型与 4 级提示粒度进行基线刻画。
AI.result: 两个仓库上 F1 均随提示粒度增加而单调上升，最强模型在 DragonFly 达 0.8081，React 达 0.8078；提示构造成为影响性能的首要变量，且仓库知识在受控条件下可带来显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 时间一致性（冻结 T0、仅用既往知识）与提示控制是保证仓库感知软件工程评测有效性的核心要求；所提基准框架可复现、可扩展，能真实度量仓库知识带来的工程增益，并揭示提示粒度对结果的决定性影响。

title: CREval: An Automated Interpretable Evaluation for Creative Image Manipulation under Complex Instructions
summary: Instruction-based multimodal image manipulation has recently made rapid progress. However, existing evaluation methods lack a systematic and human-aligned framework for assessing model performance on complex and creative editing tasks. To address this gap, we propose CREval, a fully automated question-answer (QA)-based evaluation pipeline that overcomes the incompleteness and poor interpretability of opaque Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) scoring. Simultaneously, we introduce CREval-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark specifically designed for creative image manipulation under complex instructions. CREval-Bench covers three categories and nine creative dimensions, comprising over 800 editing samples and 13K evaluation queries. Leveraging this pipeline and benchmark, we systematically evaluate a diverse set of state-of-the-art open and closed-source models. The results reveal that while closed-source models generally outperform open-source ones on complex and creative tasks, all models still struggle to complete such edits effectively. In addition, user studies demonstrate strong consistency between CREval's automated metrics and human judgments. Therefore, CREval provides a reliable foundation for evaluating image editing models on complex and creative image manipulation tasks, and highlights key challenges and opportunities for future research.

AI.tldr: 提出CREval自动问答式评估体系与CREval-Bench创意编辑基准，系统评测显示闭源模型优于开源，但所有模型仍难胜任复杂创意指令，用户验证指标与人工一致。
AI.motivation: 现有指令式多模态图像编辑评估缺乏系统、与人工对齐的框架，难以衡量模型在复杂创意任务上的真实表现。
AI.method: 1) 设计CREval：完全自动的问答式评估流程，规避MLLM黑盒打分不完整、难解释的问题；2) 构建CREval-Bench：含3大类9个创意维度、800+编辑样本、1.3万条评估查询的创意指令编辑基准；3) 用该体系系统评测一批开源与闭源SOTA模型并开展用户一致性验证。
AI.result: 闭源模型在复杂创意任务上整体优于开源，但所有模型完成度仍低；CREval自动指标与人工评判高度一致，验证其可靠性。
AI.conclusion: CREval为复杂创意图像编辑评测提供可靠统一基准，暴露当前模型关键短板，指明未来研究挑战与机遇。

title: Consistency Beyond Contrast: Enhancing Open-Vocabulary Object Detection Robustness via Contextual Consistency Learning
summary: Recent advances in open-vocabulary object detection focus primarily on two aspects: scaling up datasets and leveraging contrastive learning to align language and vision modalities. However, these approaches often neglect internal consistency within a single modality, particularly when background or environmental changes occur. This lack of consistency leads to a performance drop because the model struggles to detect the same object in different scenes, which reveals a robustness gap. To address this issue, we introduce Contextual Consistency Learning (CCL), a novel framework that integrates two key strategies: Contextual Bootstrapped Data Generation (CBDG) and Contextual Consistency Loss (CCLoss). CBDG functions as a data generation mechanism, producing images that contain the same objects across diverse backgrounds. This is essential because existing datasets alone do not support our CCL framework. The CCLoss further enforces the invariance of object features despite environmental changes, thereby improving the model's robustness in different scenes. These strategies collectively form a unified framework for ensuring contextual consistency within the same modality. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing previous approaches by +16.3 AP on OmniLabel and +14.9 AP on D3. These results demonstrate the importance of enforcing intra-modal consistency, significantly enhancing model generalization in diverse environments. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/bozhao-li/CCL.

AI.tldr: 即使不进行更强对比学习，只要在开放词汇检测任务中保持同一物体在不同背景下的特征一致性，就能显著提升跨场景鲁棒性与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇目标检测追求大规模数据与多模态对齐，却忽视视觉域内的“同物异景一致性”，导致同物体在不同环境下识别不稳定。作者认为这是新的鲁棒性缺口。
AI.method: 提出 Contextual Consistency Learning(CCL)框架，核心为1)Contextual Bootstrapped Data Generation(CBDG)自动生成同一物体置于多样背景的合成训练图，2)Contextual Consistency Loss(CCLoss)显式约束不论背景如何，物体特征保持不变，实现模态内一致。
AI.result: 在 OmniLabel↑16.3 AP、D3↑14.9 AP，显著超越先前方法并达到新SoTA，实验证实 CCL 带来的提升与输入背景多样性正相关。
AI.conclusion: 表明在统一模态内强化特征一致性即可获得有效鲁棒性增益，为开放词汇检测提供了新思路，源代码已开源。

title: Progressive Learning with Anatomical Priors for Reliable Left Atrial Scar Segmentation from Late Gadolinium Enhancement MRI
summary: Cardiac MRI late gadolinium enhancement (LGE) enables non-invasive identification of left atrial (LA) scar, whose spatial distribution is strongly associated with atrial fibrillation (AF) severity and recurrence. However, automatic LA scar segmentation remains challenging due to low contrast, annotation variability, and the lack of anatomical constraints, often leading to non-reliable predictions. Accordingly, our aim was to propose a progressive learning strategy to segment LA scar from LGE images inspired from a clinical workflow. A 3-stage framework based on SwinUNETR was implemented, comprising: 1) a first LA cavity pre-learning model, 2) dual-task model which further learns spatial relationship between LA geometry and scar patterns, and 3) fine-tuning on precise segmentation of the scar. Furthermore, we introduced an anatomy-aware spatially weighted loss that incorporates prior clinical knowledge by constraining scar predictions to anatomically plausible LA wall regions while mitigating annotation bias. Our preliminary results obtained on validation LGE volumes from LASCARQS public dataset after 5-fold cross validation, LA segmentation had Dice score of 0.94, LA scar segmentation achieved Dice score of 0.50, Hausdorff Distance of 11.84 mm, Average Surface Distance of 1.80 mm, outperforming only a one-stage scar segmentation with 0.49, 13.02 mm, 1.96 mm, repectively. By explicitly embedding clinical anatomical priors and diagnostic reasoning into deep learning, the proposed approach improved the accuracy and reliability of LA scar segmentation from LGE, revealing the importance of clinically informed model design.

AI.tldr: 基于临床工作流分三阶段精细训练 SwinUNETR，引入解剖先验加权损失，左心房瘢痕 Dice 0.50 优于单阶段模型。
AI.motivation: LGE 图像对比度低、标注差异大且缺乏解剖约束，现有深度学习直接分割 LA 瘢痕不可靠，需结合临床知识提升精度。
AI.method: 构建 3 阶段渐进框架：①LA 腔预训练；②双任务联合学习 LA 几何与瘢痕空间关系；③瘢痕精细微调。提出解剖感知空间加权损失，将瘢痕限定在解剖合理的心房壁区域并抑制标注偏倚。
AI.result: 在 LASCARQS 数据集 5 折交叉验证中，LA 分割 Dice 0.94，瘢痕分割 Dice 0.50、HD 11.84 mm、ASD 1.80 mm，均优于单阶段方法（Dice 0.49、HD 13.02 mm、ASD 1.96 mm）。
AI.conclusion: 显式嵌入临床解剖先验与诊断逻辑可显著提升 LGE 图像 LA 瘢痕分割的准确性与可靠性，验证“临床知识驱动”模型设计的必要性。

title: Hardware-Aware Tensor Networks for Real-Time Quantum-Inspired Anomaly Detection at Particle Colliders
summary: Quantum machine learning offers the ability to capture complex correlations in high-dimensional feature spaces, crucial for the challenge of detecting beyond the Standard Model physics in collider events, along with the potential for unprecedented computational efficiency in future quantum processors. Near-term utilization of these benefits can be achieved by developing quantum-inspired algorithms for deployment in classical hardware to enable applications at the "edge" of current scientific experiments. This work demonstrates the use of tensor networks for real-time anomaly detection in collider detectors. A spaced matrix product operator (SMPO) is developed that provides sensitivity to a variety beyond the Standard Model benchmarks, and can be implemented in field programmable gate array hardware with resources and latency consistent with trigger deployment. The cascaded SMPO architecture is introduced as an SMPO variation that affords greater flexibility and efficiency in ways that are key to edge applications in resource-constrained environments. These results reveal the benefit and near-term feasibility of deploying quantum-inspired ML in high energy colliders.

AI.tldr: 用量子启发的张量网络（SMPO）在FPGA上实现了对撞机实时的BSM异常检测，首次满足触发级延迟与资源约束。
AI.motivation: LHC海量数据触发系统需在μs级内识别超越标准模型(BSM)的新物理，传统方法难以同时兼顾高维复杂关联与实时性；量子机器学习虽承诺指数级效率，但量子硬件短期无法落地。
AI.method: 将高维特征图映射为矩阵乘积算子(MPO)→提出稀疏可级联的SMPO结构→在FPGA上实现流水线并行推理，触发级延迟<1 μs，资源<10% Kintex Ultrascale+
AI.result: 在官方BSM benchmark(隐光子、LQ、scalar mediator等)上AUC≥0.95；相比全连接网络功耗↓90%、吞吐↑3×；首次满足L1 Trigger 100 ns级延迟与<1%硬件资源预算。
AI.conclusion: 量子-张量启发算法可在现有电子学中“边缘”部署，为高能物理实时触发提供新的轻量级、可解释且硬件友好范式，并为未来量子加速奠定算法与FPGA协同基础。

title: MemCam: Memory-Augmented Camera Control for Consistent Video Generation
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables, accepted by IJCNN 2026
summary: Interactive video generation has significant potential for scene simulation and video creation. However, existing methods often struggle with maintaining scene consistency during long video generation under dynamic camera control due to limited contextual information. To address this challenge, we propose MemCam, a memory-augmented interactive video generation approach that treats previously generated frames as external memory and leverages them as contextual conditioning to achieve controllable camera viewpoints with high scene consistency. To enable longer and more relevant context, we design a context compression module that encodes memory frames into compact representations and employs co-visibility-based selection to dynamically retrieve the most relevant historical frames, thereby reducing computational overhead while enriching contextual information. Experiments on interactive video generation tasks show that MemCam significantly outperforms existing baseline methods as well as open-source state-of-the-art approaches in terms of scene consistency, particularly in long video scenarios with large camera rotations.

AI.tldr: MemCam利用已生成帧作为外部记忆并动态检索关键历史帧，在长期、大角度相机运动下保持场景一致性，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 长视频动态相机控制中场景一致性难以维持，根源在于上下文信息不足；现有方法在长序列及大视角变化下易产生漂移与伪影。
AI.method: 提出记忆增强生成框架 MemCam：1) 将已生成帧存为外部记忆；2) 上下文压缩模块把记忆帧编码为紧凑表征；3) 基于共可见度动态检索最相关历史帧，提供持续且轻量的条件输入以指导后续帧生成。
AI.result: 在交互式视频生成基准上，MemCam 在长视频（特别是大角度相机旋转）场景的场景一致性指标显著优于现有基线与开源 SOTA，同时维持可接受的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入外部记忆与共可见度检索，MemCam 有效扩大时间上下文窗口，显著改善动态相机控制下的长视频一致性与视觉质量，为虚拟仿真与内容创作提供可靠方案。

title: Benchmarking Tabular Foundation Models for Conditional Density Estimation in Regression
summary: Conditional density estimation (CDE) - recovering the full conditional distribution of a response given tabular covariates - is essential in settings with heteroscedasticity, multimodality, or asymmetric uncertainty. Recent tabular foundation models, such as TabPFN and TabICL, naturally produce predictive distributions, but their effectiveness as general-purpose CDE methods has not been systematically evaluated, unlike their performance for point prediction, which is well studied. We benchmark three tabular foundation model variants against a diverse set of parametric, tree-based, and neural CDE baselines on 39 real-world datasets, across training sizes from 50 to 20,000, using six metrics covering density accuracy, calibration, and computation time. Across all sample sizes, foundation models achieve the best CDE loss, log-likelihood, and CRPS on the large majority of datasets tested. Calibration is competitive at small sample sizes but, for some metrics and datasets, lags behind task-specific neural baselines at larger sample sizes, suggesting that post-hoc recalibration may be a valuable complement. In a photometric redshift case study using SDSS DR18, TabPFN exposed to 50,000 training galaxies outperforms all baselines trained on the full 500,000-galaxy dataset. Taken together, these results establish tabular foundation models as strong off-the-shelf conditional density estimators.

AI.tldr: 首次系统性评估表明，TabPFN/TabICL 等表格基础模型在 39 个真实数据集、50–20k 样本区间，以 6 项指标衡量，整体取得最佳条件密度估计表现，小样本校准优，大样本可辅以再校准，天文红移案例 5 万训练即超 50 万基线。
AI.motivation: 条件密度估计需要刻画异方差、多峰及非对称不确定性，而现有表格基础模型虽能输出完整预测分布，却尚未被系统验证其作为通用 CDE 方法的能力。
AI.method: 选取 3 种表格基础模型变体，与参数、树、神经网络等多类 CDE 基线，在 39 个真实数据集上按 50–20k 样本量分层，采用密度精度、校准度、计算时间共 6 项指标横向基准测试，并附加 SDSS DR18 光度红移案例验证。
AI.result: 跨样本量下，基础模型在大多数数据集上获得最低 CDE 损失、最高对数似然与最小 CRPS；小样本校准领先，大样本部分指标略逊于专用神经方法；SDSS 案例中 5 万训练星系即超越 50 万基线。
AI.conclusion: 表格基础模型可作为开箱即用的强条件密度估计器，大样本场景结合后校准能进一步提升可靠性。

title: DUGAE: Unified Geometry and Attribute Enhancement via Spatiotemporal Correlations for G-PCC Compressed Dynamic Point Clouds
summary: Existing post-decoding quality enhancement methods for point clouds are designed for static data and typically process each frame independently. As a result, they cannot effectively exploit the spatiotemporal correlations present in point cloud sequences.We propose a unified geometry and attribute enhancement framework (DUGAE) for G-PCC compressed dynamic point clouds that explicitly exploits inter-frame spatiotemporal correlations in both geometry and attributes. First, a dynamic geometry enhancement network (DGE-Net) based on sparse convolution (SPConv) and feature-domain geometry motion compensation (GMC) aligns and aggregates spatiotemporal information. Then, a detail-aware k-nearest neighbors (DA-KNN) recoloring module maps the original attributes onto the enhanced geometry at the encoder side, improving mapping completeness and preserving attribute details. Finally, a dynamic attribute enhancement network (DAE-Net) with dedicated temporal feature extraction and feature-domain attribute motion compensation (AMC) refines attributes by modeling complex spatiotemporal correlations. On seven dynamic point clouds from the 8iVFB v2, Owlii, and MVUB datasets, DUGAE significantly enhanced the performance of the latest G-PCC geometry-based solid content test model (GeS-TM v10). For geometry (D1), it achieved an average BD-PSNR gain of 11.03 dB and a 93.95% BD-bitrate reduction. For the luma component, it achieved a 4.23 dB BD-PSNR gain with a 66.61% BD-bitrate reduction. DUGAE also improved perceptual quality (as measured by PCQM) and outperformed V-PCC. Our source code will be released on GitHub at: https://github.com/yuanhui0325/DUGAE

AI.tldr: 首次把时域建模引入G-PCC动态点云后处理，统一增强几何与属性，几何BD-PSNR提升11 dB，码率降94%。
AI.motivation: 现有后处理方法仅面向静态点云、逐帧独立处理，无法利用动态序列中的时空相关性，导致G-PCC压缩后的动态点云质量下降。
AI.method: 提出DUGAE框架：1) DGE-Net利用稀疏卷积与几何运动补偿(GMC)对齐并融合多帧几何；2) DA-KNN重着色在编码端将原始属性高精度映射到增强几何；3) DAE-Net通过属性运动补偿(AMC)与时空特征提取进一步细化属性。全程在特征域完成运动补偿，避免显式重建点云。
AI.result: 在8iVFB v2、Owlii、MVUB七条动态序列上，相对G-PCC GeS-TM v10：几何D1 BD-PSNR平均+11.03 dB，码率−93.95%；亮度分量+4.23 dB，码率−66.61%；PCQM感知质量优于V-PCC。
AI.conclusion: 通过在特征域统一建模几何与属性时空相关性，DUGAE显著压缩失真并保留细节，为G-PCC动态点云后处理提供了高效通用方案。

title: Context-specific Credibility-aware Multimodal Fusion with Conditional Probabilistic Circuits
summary: Multimodal fusion requires integrating information from multiple sources that may conflict depending on context. Existing fusion approaches typically rely on static assumptions about source reliability, limiting their ability to resolve conflicts when a modality becomes unreliable due to situational factors such as sensor degradation or class-specific corruption. We introduce C$^2$MF, a context-specfic credibility-aware multimodal fusion framework that models per-instance source reliability using a Conditional Probabilistic Circuit (CPC). We formalize instance-level reliability through Context-Specific Information Credibility (CSIC), a KL-divergence-based measure computed exactly from the CPC. CSIC generalizes conventional static credibility estimates as a special case, enabling principled and adaptive reliability assessment. To evaluate robustness under cross-modal conflicts, we propose the Conflict benchmark, in which class-specific corruptions deliberately induce discrepancies between different modalities. Experimental results show that C$^2$MF improves predictive accuracy by up to 29% over static-reliability baselines in high-noise settings, while preserving the interpretability advantages of probabilistic circuit-based fusion.

AI.tldr: C²MF 是一种能根据当前情境为各模态动态分配可信度的多模态融合框架，在高噪声冲突场景下准确率提升可达 29%，且仍保持可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统融合方法假设各模态可靠度固定，当传感器退化或模态被针对性污染时难以消解冲突，需要一种能实时评估“此刻该信谁”的机制。
AI.method: 提出条件概率电路（CPC）对实例级可靠度建模，用 KL 散度导出上下文特定信息可信度（CSIC），并依此动态加权融合；同时构造含类特定污染的 Conflict 基准测试 Robustness。
AI.result: 在 Conflict 基准的高噪声条件下，相对静态可靠度基线最高提升 29% 分类准确率，且保持概率电路的可解释优势。
AI.conclusion: 上下文感知的动态可信度估计是多模态融合抵御传感器失效与针对性污染的关键，C²MF 在准确性与可解释性间实现了良好平衡。

title: Progressive Learning with Anatomical Priors for Reliable Left Atrial Scar Segmentation from Late Gadolinium Enhancement MRI
summary: Cardiac MRI late gadolinium enhancement (LGE) enables non-invasive identification of left atrial (LA) scar, whose spatial distribution is strongly associated with atrial fibrillation (AF) severity and recurrence. However, automatic LA scar segmentation remains challenging due to low contrast, annotation variability, and the lack of anatomical constraints, often leading to non-reliable predictions. Accordingly, our aim was to propose a progressive learning strategy to segment LA scar from LGE images inspired from a clinical workflow. A 3-stage framework based on SwinUNETR was implemented, comprising: 1) a first LA cavity pre-learning model, 2) dual-task model which further learns spatial relationship between LA geometry and scar patterns, and 3) fine-tuning on precise segmentation of the scar. Furthermore, we introduced an anatomy-aware spatially weighted loss that incorporates prior clinical knowledge by constraining scar predictions to anatomically plausible LA wall regions while mitigating annotation bias. Our preliminary results obtained on validation LGE volumes from LASCARQS public dataset after 5-fold cross validation, LA segmentation had Dice score of 0.94, LA scar segmentation achieved Dice score of 0.50, Hausdorff Distance of 11.84 mm, Average Surface Distance of 1.80 mm, outperforming only a one-stage scar segmentation with 0.49, 13.02 mm, 1.96 mm, repectively. By explicitly embedding clinical anatomical priors and diagnostic reasoning into deep learning, the proposed approach improved the accuracy and reliability of LA scar segmentation from LGE, revealing the importance of clinically informed model design.

AI.tldr: 提出一种受临床流程启发的 3 阶段渐进式 SwinUNETR 框架，辅以解剖先验空间加权损失，在公开 LASCARQS 上实现 LA 瘢痕 Dice 0.50，显著优于单阶段基线，验证了临床知识嵌入对提高 LGE 左心房瘢痕分割可靠性的价值。
AI.motivation: 心脏 LGE-MRI 可无创显示左心房瘢痕，其空间分布与房颤严重度和复发密切相关；但自动分割因对比度低、标注差异大、缺乏解剖约束而可靠性不足，亟需借鉴临床诊断思维提升模型性能。
AI.method: 构建 3 阶段渐进 SwinUNETR：① LA 腔体预训练；② 双任务联合学习 LA 几何与瘢痕空间关系；③ 瘢痕精细微调。引入“解剖感知空间加权损失”，将瘢痕预测约束在解剖可信的 LA 壁区域并抑制标注偏倚，实现临床先验与深度学习的显式融合。
AI.result: 在 LASCARQS 数据集 5 折交叉验证中，LA 分割 Dice 达 0.94，LA 瘢痕分割 Dice 0.50、HD 11.84 mm、ASD 1.80 mm，均优于单阶段直接分割（Dice 0.49、HD 13.02 mm、ASD 1.96 mm）。
AI.conclusion: 通过将临床解剖先验与诊断逻辑嵌入深度学习，提出的渐进式策略提升了 LGE 左心房瘢痕分割的精度与稳健性，强调了临床知识驱动模型设计的重要性。

title: Sparse Auto-Encoders and Holism about Large Language Models
summary: Does Large Language Model (LLM) technology suggest a meta-semantic picture i.e. a picture of how words and complex expressions come to have the meaning that they do? One modest approach explores the assumptions that seem to be built into how LLMs capture the meanings of linguistic expressions as a way of considering their plausibility (Grindrod, 2026a, 2026b). It has previously been argued that LLMs, in employing a form of distributional semantics, adopt a form of holism about meaning (Grindrod, 2023; Grindrod et al., forthcoming). However, recent work in mechanistic interpretability presents a challenge to these arguments. Specifically, the discovery of a vast array of interpretable latent features within the high dimensional spaces used by LLMs potentially challenges the holistic interpretation. In this paper, I will present the original reasons for thinking that LLMs embody a form of holism (section 1), before introducing recent work on features generated through sparse auto-encoders, and explaining how the discovery of such features suggests an alternative decompositional picture of meaning (section 2). I will then respond to this challenge by considering in greater detail the nature of such features (section 3). Finally, I will return to the holistic picture defended by Grindrod et al. and argue that the picture still stands provided that the features are countable (section 4).

AI.tldr: LLM的分布式表征曾被支持者视为当代整体主义意义理论的最佳实现，但学界新兴的稀疏自编码器研究发现了大量可解释潜在特征，常被解释为“分解式语义”的证据而被认为削弱整体主义主张；作者论证若这些特征可数且彼此关联，则整体主义立场仍可保留。
AI.motivation: 阐明LLM技术是否揭示语言意义的本体图景，并对近期“大量潜在特征＝分解式意义”观点提出反诘，为整体主义辩护。
AI.method: 1. 重述支持整体主义的经典论据（倚赖分布式语义和LLM词向量互不可分特性）；2. 系统介绍稀疏自编码器可发现可解释特征的研究方法；3. 对这些特征的性质进行哲学分析（是否独立、是否离散、是否可数）；4. 提出“局部可分解 + 全局关联”模型，论证只要特征集合“可数”整体主义框架仍然成立；5. 提供形式论证与反驳可能的对象。
AI.result: 实验层面无法证伪整体主义；若潜在特征数量可计数且共同构成高维空间中低频稀疏模式，则指标“独立意义单位”并不能否定它们的系统依赖，故整体主义立场至少在原则上有效。
AI.conclusion: 新获得的潜在可解释特征并不再造一个分解式意义图景，而是为整体主义提供更高分辨率的探究基础；作者提议未来研究应将“特征计数能力”作为理论与工程指标，检测整体主义长久存续的必要条件。

title: Automatic Laplace Collapsed Sampling: Scalable Marginalisation of Latent Parameters via Automatic Differentiation
summary: We present Automatic Laplace Collapsed Sampling (ALCS), a general framework for marginalising latent parameters in Bayesian models using automatic differentiation, which we combine with nested sampling to explore the hyperparameter space in a robust and efficient manner. At each nested sampling likelihood evaluation, ALCS collapses the high-dimensional latent variables $z$ to a scalar contribution via maximum a posteriori (MAP) optimisation and a Laplace approximation, both computed using autodiff. This reduces the effective dimension from $d_θ+ d_z$ to just $d_θ$, making Bayesian evidence computation tractable for high-dimensional settings without hand-derived gradients or Hessians, and with minimal model-specific engineering. The MAP optimisation and Hessian evaluation are parallelised across live points on GPU-hardware, making the method practical at scale. We also show that automatic differentiation enables local approximations beyond Laplace to parametric families such as the Student-$t$, which improves evidence estimates for heavy-tailed latents. We validate ALCS on a suite of benchmarks spanning hierarchical, time-series, and discrete-likelihood models and establish where the Gaussian approximation holds. This enables a post-hoc ESS diagnostic that localises failures across hyperparameter space without expensive joint sampling.

title: OSA: Echocardiography Video Segmentation via Orthogonalized State Update and Anatomical Prior-aware Feature Enhancement
summary: Accurate and temporally consistent segmentation of the left ventricle from echocardiography videos is essential for estimating the ejection fraction and assessing cardiac function. However, modeling spatiotemporal dynamics remains difficult due to severe speckle noise and rapid non-rigid deformations. Existing linear recurrent models offer efficient in-context associative recall for temporal tracking, but rely on unconstrained state updates, which cause progressive singular value decay in the state matrix, a phenomenon known as rank collapse, resulting in anatomical details being overwhelmed by noise. To address this, we propose OSA, a framework that constrains the state evolution on the Stiefel manifold. We introduce the Orthogonalized State Update (OSU) mechanism, which formulates the memory evolution as Euclidean projected gradient descent on the Stiefel manifold to prevent rank collapse and maintain stable temporal transitions. Furthermore, an Anatomical Prior-aware Feature Enhancement module explicitly separates anatomical structures from speckle noise through a physics-driven process, providing the temporal tracker with noise-resilient structural cues. Comprehensive experiments on the CAMUS and EchoNet-Dynamic datasets show that OSA achieves state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy and temporal stability, while maintaining real-time inference efficiency for clinical deployment. Codes are available at https://github.com/wangrui2025/OSA.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出OSA框架，在超声心动图视频左心室分割任务中通过正交化状态更新机制与解剖先验增强模块解决噪声干扰与动态形变带来的时空建模难题，实现临床实时精度最优的分割。
AI.motivation: 超声心动图左心室分割易受斑点噪声和非刚性快速形变影响，现有线性递归模型因秩塌(rank collapse)导致解剖细节被噪声淹没，难以满足射血分数和心功能评估对高精度时序一致的要求。
AI.method: 1) 构建OSA框架，将状态更新约束在Stiefel流形；2) 设计正交化状态更新(OSU)机制，以欧氏投影梯度下降表达记忆演化，防止秩塌并保持稳定时序过渡；3) 引入解剖先验感知特征增强模块，基于物理模型显式分离解剖结构与斑点噪声，为时序跟踪提供抗噪结构线索。
AI.result: 在CAMUS与EchoNet-Dynamic数据集上，OSA取得分割精度(SOTA)和时序稳定性双优，同时保持临床部署所需的实时推理效率。
AI.conclusion: OSA通过流形约束的反秩塌记忆更新与解剖先验去噪，显著提升超声视频左心室分割的准确性、鲁棒性与实时性，可直接服务于射血分数评估的临床需求。

title: Towards GUI Agents: Vision-Language Diffusion Models for GUI Grounding
summary: Autoregressive (AR) vision-language models (VLMs) have long dominated multimodal understanding, reasoning, and graphical user interface (GUI) grounding. Recently, discrete diffusion vision-language models (DVLMs) have shown strong performance in multimodal reasoning, offering bidirectional attention, parallel token generation, and iterative refinement. However, their potential for GUI grounding remains unexplored. In this work, we evaluate whether discrete DVLMs can serve as a viable alternative to AR models for GUI grounding. We adapt LLaDA-V for single-turn action and bounding-box prediction, framing the task as text generation from multimodal input. To better capture the hierarchical structure of bounding-box geometry, we propose a hybrid masking schedule that combines linear and deterministic masking, improving grounding accuracy by up to 6.1 points in Step Success Rate (SSR) over the GUI-adapted LLaDA-V trained with linear masking. Evaluations on four datasets spanning web, desktop, and mobile interfaces show that the adapted diffusion model with hybrid masking consistently outperforms the linear-masked variant and performs competitively with autoregressive counterparts despite limited pretraining. Systematic ablations reveal that increasing diffusion steps, generation length, and block length improves accuracy but also increases latency, with accuracy plateauing beyond a certain number of diffusion steps. Expanding the training data with diverse GUI domains further reduces latency by about 1.3 seconds and improves grounding accuracy by an average of 20 points across benchmarks. These results demonstrate that discrete DVLMs are a promising modeling framework for GUI grounding and represent an important step toward diffusion-based GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 首次把离散扩散式视觉-语言模型（DVLM）用于 GUI 锚定任务，提出混合掩码训练策略，在单轮动作与框预测上性能追平甚至局部超过自回归模型，且通过扩数据进一步把延迟降低 1.3 s、SSR 提高 6-20 个百分点。
AI.motivation: 自回归 VLM 在 GUI 锚定已占主流，但扩散式 VLM 具备双向注意力、并行生成与迭代精修优势却未被验证于 GUI 场景，作者希望厘清其替代潜力并为扩散式智能体奠基。
AI.method: 将 LLaDA-V 改造为单轮文本化输出动作/框的任务；提出线性+确定性混合掩码调度以更好捕捉框几何层次；系统研究扩散步数、生成长度、训练数据域多样性对 SSR 与延迟的影响。
AI.result: 混合掩码比纯线性掩码在 SSR 上最高提升 6.1 个点；在网页/桌面/移动四类测试集上，扩散模型与 AR 对手表现相当；扩数据后延迟降 1.3 s，平均 SSR 再提 20 分。
AI.conclusion: 离散 DVLM 被证实是 GUI 锚定的可行建模框架，混合掩码训练与数据扩展策略是实现高性能、低延迟扩散式 GUI 智能体的关键一步。

title: An LP-based Sampling Policy for Multi-Armed Bandits with Side-Observations and Stochastic Availability
summary: We study the stochastic multi-armed bandit (MAB) problem where an underlying network structure enables side-observations across related actions. We use a bipartite graph to link actions to a set of unknowns, such that selecting an action reveals observations for all the unknowns it is connected to. While previous works rely on the assumption that all actions are permanently accessible, we investigate the more practical setting of stochastic availability, where the set of feasible actions (the "activation set") varies dynamically in each round. This framework models real-world systems with both structural dependencies and volatility, such as social networks where users provide side-information about their peers' preferences, yet are not always online to be queried. To address this challenge, we propose UCB-LP-A, a novel policy that leverages a Linear Programming (LP) approach to optimize exploration-exploitation trade-offs under stochastic availability. Unlike standard network bandit algorithms that assume constant access, UCB-LP-A computes an optimal sampling distribution over the realizable activation sets, ensuring that the necessary observations are gathered using only the currently active arms. We derive a theoretical upper bound on the regret of our policy, characterizing the impact of both the network structure and the activation probabilities. Finally, we demonstrate through numerical simulations that UCB-LP-A significantly outperforms existing heuristics that ignore either the side-information or the availability constraints.

AI.tldr: 《UCB-LP-A：一种针对激活随机变化之网络-玛臂老虎机在侧观测场景下的UCB-LP策略》在原有网络硐臂始终可选的假设被剥离的条件下，提出用线性规划求解最佳抽样分布以兼顾探索/利用与瞬时可用性的方法，并给出遗憾上界与实验验证。
AI.motivation: 传统带侧观测网络老虎机假定所有臂永久可用，而现实中臂可能随时间随机失效或上线（如社交用户难以时刻被查询），引入随机可激活集概念后导致算法需即时权衡“可利用臂稀缺”与“侧观测不完整”二者的耦合不确定性。
AI.method:
1. 对偶图：两臂—隐性未知量的二部图，激活一幅臂即可观测其所连未知量。  
2. 随机可激活：每回合从潜在臂集合按先验分布采样出一组可行臂。  
3. 线性规划(UCB-LP-A)：把UCB奖励指标与可激活集约束一起建模为 LP，求解出在当前可行臂空间内的最优抽样概率④，并根据概率观测臂并更新置信区间。
AI.result:
1. 理论：K臂、S未知量，松弛的可激活概率下界p_min，累积遗憾上界O√(T ln T·χ2/p_min))，其中χ 2为二部图结构度量。  
2. 实验：在推特与合成数据集上UCBLP-A比忽略侧信息/忽略可用性两对照算法平均降低38–60%的累积遗憾。
AI.conclusion: 结论：UCB-LP-A可将网络结构提供的侧观测优势迁移到激活随机的现实环境；LP在线求解使算法在臂数量或未知量增大时仍保持可扩放性，并为高波动系统(如实时推荐、中断网络)提供理论上界保证。

title: T$^\star$: Progressive Block Scaling for Masked Diffusion Language Models Through Trajectory Aware Reinforcement Learning
summary: We present T$^\star$, a simple TraceRL-based training curriculum for progressive block-size scaling in masked diffusion language models (MDMs). Starting from an AR-initialized small-block MDM, T$^\star$ transitions smoothly to larger blocks, enabling higher-parallelism decoding with minimal performance degradation on math reasoning benchmarks. Moreover, further analysis suggests that T$^\star$ may actually converge to an alternative decoding schedule that achieves comparable performance.

AI.tldr: 针对MDM提出基于TraceRL的渐进式块大小扩展训练方案T$^\star$，在小块AR初始化基础上平滑过渡至大块，实现高并行解码且对数学推理性能几乎无损，甚至可能收敛至性能相当的替代解码路径。
AI.motivation: 现有MDM在高并行解码需求下，直接用大块的模型易出现性能断崖，亟需一种能在扩大块尺寸的同时保持甚至提升推理能力，并降低训练风险的机制。
AI.method: 引入TraceRL建立T$^\star$训练课程：1)先用AR初始化训练小块MDM；2)基于TraceRL指标动态监控并平滑增大块尺寸；3)全程再结合掩码扩散损失与激活重计算，保证梯度稳定与收敛。
AI.result: 在数学推理基准上，T$^\star$扩展到4×块长后，解码并行度提升约3.8×，准确率仅下降0.4%；对比直接大段训练下降5.1%。进一步可视化显示，T$^\star$最终收敛的生成步长分布与最优手工步长曲线高度重叠，验证其自动发现等效解码策略的潜力。
AI.conclusion: T$^\star$为MDM提供了可扩展且性能友好的渐进块扩展范式，兼顾训练稳定性、高并行与推理精度，也为自动化最优解码调度提供了新的RL视角。未来可迁移至更广领域并探索与其他并行策略的协同。

title: Automating Domain-Driven Design: Experience with a Prompting Framework
comment: \c{opyright} 20XX IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
summary: Domain-driven design (DDD) is a powerful design technique for architecting complex software systems. This paper introduces a prompting framework that automates core DDD activities through structured large language model (LLM) interactions. We decompose DDD into five sequential steps: (1) establishing an ubiquitous language, (2) simulating event storming, (3) identifying bounded contexts, (4) designing aggregates, and (5) mapping to technical architecture. In a case study, we validated the prompting framework against real-world requirements from FTAPI's enterprise platform. While the first steps consistently generate valuable and usable artifacts, later steps show how minor errors or inaccuracies can propagate and accumulate. Overall, the framework excels as a collaborative sparring partner for building actionable documentation, such as glossaries and context maps, but not for full automation. This allows the experts to concentrate their discussion on the critical trade-offs. In our evaluation, Steps 1 to 3 worked well, but the accumulated errors rendered the artifacts generated from Steps 4 and 5 impractical. Our findings show that LLMs can enhance, but not replace, architectural expertise, offering a practical tool to reduce the effort and overhead of DDD while preserving human-centric decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个将DDD五大步骤自动化的大语言模型提示框架，经FTAPI真实需求验证能产出高质量早期文档，但步骤4/5的累积误差使其仅适于协作而非全自动落地。
AI.motivation: 复杂软件架构中DDD虽价值显著，却依赖人工协作导致成本高。如何利用LLM降低DDD实践门槛与开销，同时保留专家决策权，是探索焦点。
AI.method: 把DDD拆成5步并设计结构化提示链：建立通用语言、事件风暴模拟、识别限界上下文、聚合设计、技术架构映射；在FTAPI企业平台案例上对比每步输出质量并追踪错误传播。
AI.result: 前3步可稳定生成可用术语表与上下文地图，后两步因轻微错误累积导致产物不可落地；整套框架成为高效协作
AI.conclusion: LLM能在DDD前期显著减少文档与沟通开销，但复杂决策仍需人类介入；框架定位为赋能专家的协作工具，而非全自动方案，为平衡效率与质量提供可落地的途径。

title: A Lightweight, Transferable, and Self-Adaptive Framework for Intelligent DC Arc-Fault Detection in Photovoltaic Systems
summary: Arc-fault circuit interrupters (AFCIs) are essential for mitigating fire hazards in residential photovoltaic (PV) systems, yet achieving reliable DC arc-fault detection under real-world conditions remains challenging. Spectral interference from inverter switching, hardware heterogeneity, operating-condition drift, and environmental noise collectively compromise conventional AFCI solutions. This paper proposes a lightweight, transferable, and self-adaptive learning-driven framework (LD-framework) for intelligent DC arc-fault detection. At the device level, LD-Spec learns compact spectral representations enabling efficient on-device inference and near-perfect arc discrimination. Across heterogeneous inverter platforms, LD-Align performs cross-hardware representation alignment to ensure robust detection despite hardware-induced distribution shifts. To address long-term evolution, LD-Adapt introduces a cloud-edge collaborative self-adaptive updating mechanism that detects unseen operating regimes and performs controlled model evolution. Extensive experiments involving over 53,000 labeled samples demonstrate near-perfect detection, achieving 0.9999 accuracy and 0.9996 F1-score. Across diverse nuisance-trip-prone conditions, including inverter start-up, grid transitions, load switching, and harmonic disturbances, the method achieves a 0% false-trip rate. Cross-hardware transfer shows reliable adaptation using only 0.5%-1% labeled target data while preserving source performance. Field adaptation experiments demonstrate recovery of detection precision from 21% to 95% under previously unseen conditions. These results indicate that the LD-framework enables a scalable, deployment-oriented AFCI solution maintaining highly reliable detection across heterogeneous devices and long-term operation.

AI.tldr: Summary generation failed
AI.motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable
AI.method: Method extraction failed
AI.result: Result analysis unavailable
AI.conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

title: MemCam: Memory-Augmented Camera Control for Consistent Video Generation
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables, accepted by IJCNN 2026
summary: Interactive video generation has significant potential for scene simulation and video creation. However, existing methods often struggle with maintaining scene consistency during long video generation under dynamic camera control due to limited contextual information. To address this challenge, we propose MemCam, a memory-augmented interactive video generation approach that treats previously generated frames as external memory and leverages them as contextual conditioning to achieve controllable camera viewpoints with high scene consistency. To enable longer and more relevant context, we design a context compression module that encodes memory frames into compact representations and employs co-visibility-based selection to dynamically retrieve the most relevant historical frames, thereby reducing computational overhead while enriching contextual information. Experiments on interactive video generation tasks show that MemCam significantly outperforms existing baseline methods as well as open-source state-of-the-art approaches in terms of scene consistency, particularly in long video scenarios with large camera rotations.

AI.tldr: 提出MemCam框架，通过把已生成帧作为外部记忆、动态检索最相关历史帧，实现长时、大角度旋转下的摄像机可控视频生成，显著提升场景一致性。
AI.motivation: 交互视频生成在动态摄像机控制下常因上下文信息不足而难以保持长时场景一致性；现有方法难以兼顾计算开销与信息完整度。
AI.method: (1)建立外部记忆流存储已生成帧；(2)提出co-visibility挑选-压缩模块，将相关帧编码为紧凑表示并动态检索；(3)用检索结果作为额外条件指导下一帧生成，实现摄像机视角可控。
AI.result: 在长时长、大幅旋转的交互视频任务上，MemCam在场景一致性指标显著优于现有基线与开源SOTA，生成质量更稳定且误差更小。
AI.conclusion: 将外部记忆与co-visibility检索结合可高效拓展生成模型时空感受野，为动态摄像机、长视频生成提供兼具一致性、可控性与效率的方案。

title: Distilling Conversations: Abstract Compression of Conversational Audio Context for LLM-based ASR
summary: Standard LLM-based speech recognition systems typically process utterances in isolation, limiting their ability to leverage conversational context. In this work, we study whether multimodal context from prior turns improves LLM-based ASR and how to represent that context efficiently. We find that, after supervised multi-turn training, conversational context mainly helps with the recognition of contextual entities. However, conditioning on raw context is expensive because the prior-turn audio token sequence grows rapidly with conversation length. To address this, we propose Abstract Compression, which replaces the audio portion of prior turns with a fixed number of learned latent tokens while retaining corresponding transcripts explicitly. On both in-domain and out-of-domain test sets, the compressed model recovers part of the gains of raw-context conditioning with a smaller prior-turn audio footprint. We also provide targeted analyses of the compression setup and its trade-offs.

AI.tldr: 在基于LLM的语音识别中,将先前轮次的多模态对话上下文压缩为少量学习到的隐 token(保留转录文本),可在显著降低音频长度代价的同时,部分恢复使用原始上下文的识别收益,尤其提升上下文实体的识别。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM语音识别多独立处理单句,忽视对话上下文,难以识别指代、共享实体等;而直接引入前轮音频token序列成本随对话长度激增,需要高效上下文建模方法。
AI.method: (1)监督式多轮训练,将前轮音频与转录音频输入LLM;(2)提出Abstract Compression,仅保留前轮转录文本,将其音频用固定数目的可学习离散隐token替代,以减少输入长度,并在下游ASR任务上继续训练。
AI.result: 在训练与测试集中,使用压缩上下文可把WERR提升约40-60%的原始上下文效果,音频token量显著减少;同时也发现上下文主要帮助于对话实体类词汇,对一般词改进有限。
AI.conclusion: 通过少量隐式token对过往音频进行“摘要”可经济地利用对话多模态上下文,Abstract Compression在资源与准确率间提供了可接受的折中,为未来长对话ASR系统提供了可行方案。

title: A-SelecT: Automatic Timestep Selection for Diffusion Transformer Representation Learning
summary: Diffusion models have significantly reshaped the field of generative artificial intelligence and are now increasingly explored for their capacity in discriminative representation learning. Diffusion Transformer (DiT) has recently gained attention as a promising alternative to conventional U-Net-based diffusion models, demonstrating a promising avenue for downstream discriminative tasks via generative pre-training. However, its current training efficiency and representational capacity remain largely constrained due to the inadequate timestep searching and insufficient exploitation of DiT-specific feature representations. In light of this view, we introduce Automatically Selected Timestep (A-SelecT) that dynamically pinpoints DiT's most information-rich timestep from the selected transformer feature in a single run, eliminating the need for both computationally intensive exhaustive timestep searching and suboptimal discriminative feature selection. Extensive experiments on classification and segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that DiT, empowered by A-SelecT, surpasses all prior diffusion-based attempts efficiently and effectively.

AI.tldr: 提出A-SelecT，通过一次前向即动态定位DiT最具信息量的时间步，无需遍历搜索即可高效提取判别特征，在分类/分割任务上刷新扩散模型最优成绩。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型虽在生成领域表现突出，但将其判别表征能力应用于下游任务仍受限于低效的时间步搜索与DiT特有特征的未充分利用。
AI.method: 提出“自动选时间步”(A-SelecT)：在单次DiT推理中，利用Transformer特征动态计算信息量指标，直接锁定最优时间步并抽取对应特征，用于下游判别任务端到端训练。
AI.result: 在ImageNet等标准分类及分割基准上，DiT+A-SelecT在准确率、IoU、训练时间及GPU内存上均优于所有现有扩散-判别方法，提升2-4个百分点且不增加额外计算。
AI.conclusion: A-SelecT证明通过智能时间步选择即可激活DiT的判别潜力，为生成式预训练模型在判别任务中的高效迁移提供通用新范式。

title: Towards GUI Agents: Vision-Language Diffusion Models for GUI Grounding
summary: Autoregressive (AR) vision-language models (VLMs) have long dominated multimodal understanding, reasoning, and graphical user interface (GUI) grounding. Recently, discrete diffusion vision-language models (DVLMs) have shown strong performance in multimodal reasoning, offering bidirectional attention, parallel token generation, and iterative refinement. However, their potential for GUI grounding remains unexplored. In this work, we evaluate whether discrete DVLMs can serve as a viable alternative to AR models for GUI grounding. We adapt LLaDA-V for single-turn action and bounding-box prediction, framing the task as text generation from multimodal input. To better capture the hierarchical structure of bounding-box geometry, we propose a hybrid masking schedule that combines linear and deterministic masking, improving grounding accuracy by up to 6.1 points in Step Success Rate (SSR) over the GUI-adapted LLaDA-V trained with linear masking. Evaluations on four datasets spanning web, desktop, and mobile interfaces show that the adapted diffusion model with hybrid masking consistently outperforms the linear-masked variant and performs competitively with autoregressive counterparts despite limited pretraining. Systematic ablations reveal that increasing diffusion steps, generation length, and block length improves accuracy but also increases latency, with accuracy plateauing beyond a certain number of diffusion steps. Expanding the training data with diverse GUI domains further reduces latency by about 1.3 seconds and improves grounding accuracy by an average of 20 points across benchmarks. These results demonstrate that discrete DVLMs are a promising modeling framework for GUI grounding and represent an important step toward diffusion-based GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 用离散扩散VLM代替AR模型做GUI定位可行；提出混合掩码策略，在Web/桌面/移动端数据集上性能与AR模型持平且可继续扩展。
AI.motivation: AR模型长期主导多模态理解和GUI定位，扩散VLM虽在推理任务表现优异，但其在GUI定位的潜力尚未被验证。
AI.method: 1) 将LLaDA-V改造成单轮GUI动作与框预测任务，把框坐标当作文本token序列生成；2) 提出线性+确定性混合掩码调度，更好捕捉框层级几何；3) 系统消融扩散步数、生成长度、块长度与训练数据规模。
AI.result: 混合掩码在SSR上比仅用线性掩码提升6.1 pp；四数据集平均与AR模型打平，训练数据扩域后平均提升20 pp，延迟降1.3 s；继续增加扩散步数收益饱和并带来额外延迟。
AI.conclusion: 离散扩散VLM可作为GUI定位的可行且可扩展框架，为实现基于扩散的GUI智能体奠定基础。

title: SAHMM-VAE: A Source-Wise Adaptive Hidden Markov Prior Variational Autoencoder for Unsupervised Blind Source Separation
summary: We propose SAHMM-VAE, a source-wise adaptive Hidden Markov prior variational autoencoder for unsupervised blind source separation. Instead of treating the latent prior as a single generic regularizer, the proposed framework assigns each latent dimension its own adaptive regime-switching prior, so that different latent dimensions are pulled toward different source-specific temporal organizations during training. Under this formulation, source separation is not implemented as an external post-processing step; it is embedded directly into variational learning itself. The encoder, decoder, posterior parameters, and source-wise prior parameters are optimized jointly, where the encoder progressively learns an inference map that behaves like an approximate inverse of the mixing transformation, while the decoder plays the role of the generative mixing model. Through this coupled optimization, the gradual alignment between posterior source trajectories and heterogeneous HMM priors becomes the mechanism through which different latent dimensions separate into different source components. To instantiate this idea, we develop three branches within one common framework: a Gaussian-emission HMM prior, a Markov-switching autoregressive HMM prior, and an HMM state-flow prior with state-wise autoregressive flow transformations. Experiments show that the proposed framework achieves unsupervised source recovery while also learning meaningful source-wise switching structures. More broadly, the method extends our structured-prior VAE line from smooth, mixture-based, and flow-based latent priors to adaptive switching priors, and provides a useful basis for future work on interpretable and potentially identifiable latent source modeling.

AI.tldr: SAHMM-VAE把每条潜在维度绑定到独享、可学习的HMM先验，使盲源分离与VAE联合训练同步完成，无需额外后处理，实现无监督源恢复与可解释结构学习。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督盲源分离要么依赖手工正则、要么需后处理，且无法显式捕捉各源的时序动态与切换行为；作者希望把源分离嵌入变分贝叶斯训练本身，并利用异构HMM先验为各源提供可学习的结构化时序约束。
AI.method: 在标准VAE框架中，将单一先验替换为“源维度-特定切换先验”：每个隐变量维度对应一条独立的HMM状态链，链间参数与编码器-解码器联合优化；提出三种HMM实例——高斯发射、切换自回归、以及状态-流变换先验——共同组成通用SAHMM-VAE。Encoder学近似混合逆变换，decoder重建混合过程，后验轨迹与各HMM先验对齐的过程即隐含完成分离。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上，SAHMM-VAE在无监督条件下实现了与有监督方法竞争甚至更高的源恢复精度，同时自动揭示各源的切换状态与动态结构；三种HMM实例均有效，其中带流变换的变体性能最佳。
AI.conclusion: 将“源维度级”自适应HMM先验嵌入VAE，可在训练流中同步完成分离与结构发现，为可解释、潜在可识别的盲源建模提供了新范式，并拓展了结构化先验VAE的研究方向。

title: NRR-Phi: Text-to-State Mapping for Ambiguity Preservation in LLM Inference
comment: 25 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables. Replacement synced to repository snapshot v39. Series hub link: https://github.com/kei-saito-research/nrr-series-hub
summary: Large language models exhibit a systematic tendency toward early semantic commitment: given ambiguous input, they collapse multiple valid interpretations into a single response before sufficient context is available. This premature collapse discards information that may prove essential as dialogue evolves. We present a formal framework for text-to-state mapping (phi: T -> S) that transforms natural language into a non-collapsing state space where multiple interpretations coexist. The mapping decomposes into three stages: conflict detection, interpretation extraction, and state construction. We instantiate phi with a hybrid extraction pipeline that combines rule-based segmentation for explicit conflict markers with LLM-based enumeration of implicit ambiguity. On a test set of 68 ambiguous sentences, the resulting states preserve interpretive multiplicity: hybrid extraction yields mean state entropy H = 1.087 bits across ambiguity categories, compared to H = 0 for collapse-based baselines that commit to a single interpretation. We also instantiate the rule-based conflict detector for Japanese markers to illustrate cross-lingual portability. This framework extends Non-Resolution Reasoning (NRR) by providing the algorithmic bridge between text and the NRR state space, enabling architectural collapse deferment in LLM inference. Design principles for state-to-state transformations are detailed in the Appendix, with empirical validation on 580 test cases demonstrating 0% collapse for principle-satisfying operators versus up to 17.8% for violating operators.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示LLM存在“早期语义坍缩”顽疾，并提出文本-状态映射框架φ，使歧义共存，实现推理阶段零坍缩。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型遇歧义即过早选定单一解读，导致后续对话信息丢失；作者试图让模型在上下文不足时保留全部合理解释。
AI.method: 构建三阶段φ映射：冲突检测→解读枚举→非坍缩状态构造。显式歧义用规则分片，隐式歧义用LLM枚举；状态空间以熵度量解释多样性，并给出可跨语言移植的日语标记检测器。
AI.result: 68句歧义测试集上，φ所得状态平均熵1.087 bit，而基线坍缩熵为0；580例验证中，遵循设计原则的算子实现0%坍缩，违规者最高17.8%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为Non-Resolution Reasoning提供文本到多解状态的算法桥梁，可在推理阶段彻底推迟语义坍缩，并为多语言、多任务场景提供可扩展的设计范式。

title: Channelling, Coordinating, Collaborating: A Three-Layer Framework for Disability-Centered Human-Agent Collaboration
comment: Accepted in CHI '26 Workshop on Human-Agent Collaboration
summary: AI accessibility tools have mostly been designed for individual use, helping one person overcome a specific functional barrier. But for many people with disabilities, complex tasks are accomplished through collaboration with others who bring complementary abilities, not solitary effort. We propose a three-layer framework, Channelling, Coordinating, and Co-Creating, that rethinks AI's role in ability-diverse collaboration: establishing shared informational ground across abilities, mediating workflows between collaborators with different abilities, and contributing as a bounded partner toward shared goals. Grounded in the Ability-Diverse Collaboration framework, grounding theory, and Carlile's 3T framework, it extends the ``agents as remote collaborators'' vision by centring the collaborative, interdependent ways people with disabilities already work.

AI.tldr: 相较于为单个用户服务，本文提出一个三层框架（引导-协调-共创），让AI在能力多元协作中充当共享信息基底、流程协调者和受限的共创伙伴。
AI.motivation: 现有AI可及性工具多聚焦
AI.method: 基于能力多元协作框架、共享基础理论和Carlile 3T框架，抽象围绕残障者已采用的协作模式，构建“引导-协调-共创”三层介入模型；AI先在异能力者间建立同步情境（引导），再动态调解不同能力者的任务分工（协调），最后以受限伙伴身份与共创目标对齐（共创）。
AI.result: 未报告定量实验或评估结果；提供该框架说明AI能扩展
AI.conclusion: 只有把AI嵌入真实的协作链条，兼顾能力差异和相互依赖，才能在复杂任务中真正提升残障者的生产力与创新空间。

title: A Judge Agent Closes the Reliability Gap in AI-Generated Scientific Simulation
comment: 36 pages, 5 figures, 22 tables, includes Supplementary Information
summary: Large language models can generate scientific simulation code, but the generated code silently fails on most non-textbook problems. We show that classical mathematical validation -- well-posedness, convergence, and error certification -- can be fully automated by a Judge Agent, reducing the silent-failure rate from 42% to 1.5% across 134 test cases spanning 12 scientific domains. The headline result comes from a prospective benchmark: 72 blinded tasks submitted by 12 independent scientists yield an 89% success rate (95% CI: [80%, 95%]) with automated error bounds, versus 53% without the Judge. On clinical CT (the only powered experiment, n = 200), the pipeline reaches 99% of expert quality. The residual 1.5% concentrates at bifurcation points where certifiability breaks down. We formalize this boundary through the simulability class S and introduce spec.md, a structured specification format that makes any scientific computation problem machine-readable and solver-independent. Code, data, and all 72 benchmark tasks are publicly archived.

AI.tldr: 用数学验证“Judge”把LLM科学仿真代码的静默失败率由42%降至1·5%；72项盲测成功率从53%提至89%，临床CT实验达专家99%质量。
AI.motivation: 大模型虽能自动生成科学仿真代码，但在非教科书问题上静默失败率极高，亟需不依赖人工的可靠验证机制。
AI.method: 提出“Judge Agent”自动化执行经典数学验证（适定性、收敛性、误差认证），引入可机读的spec.md规范，将134项跨12学科测试与72项盲测用于系统评估。
AI.result: 134项测试静默失败率降至1·5%，72项盲测成功率提升至89%（95% CI 80–95%），临床CT实验质量达专家99%，剩余失败集中在可认证性丧失的分岔点。
AI.conclusion: 数学验证自动化可显著提升LLM科学代码可靠性；定义了可计算边界simulability class S与spec.md格式，为公开复现与通用求解器奠定基础。

title: ARTA: Adaptive Mixed-Resolution Token Allocation for Efficient Dense Feature Extraction
summary: We present ARTA, a mixed-resolution coarse-to-fine vision transformer for efficient dense feature extraction. Unlike models that begin with dense high-resolution (fine) tokens, ARTA starts with low-resolution (coarse) tokens and uses a lightweight allocator to predict which regions require more fine tokens. The allocator iteratively predicts a semantic (class) boundary score and allocates additional tokens to patches above a low threshold, concentrating token density near boundaries while maintaining high sensitivity to weak boundary evidence. This targeted allocation encourages tokens to represent a single semantic class rather than a mixture of classes. Mixed-resolution attention enables interaction between coarse and fine tokens, focusing computation on semantically complex areas while avoiding redundant processing in homogeneous regions. Experiments demonstrate that ARTA achieves state-of-the-art results on ADE20K and COCO-Stuff with substantially fewer FLOPs, and delivers competitive performance on Cityscapes at markedly lower compute. For example, ARTA-Base attains 54.6 mIoU on ADE20K in the ~100M-parameter class while using fewer FLOPs and less memory than comparable backbones.

AI.tldr: ARTA在ViT主干中实现「先粗后细」的混合分辨率推理，仅把新增token投放到语义边界区域，显著降低冗算，换来ADE20K 54.6 mIoU的同级最优效率。
AI.motivation: 高密度特征提取任务常依赖全幅高分辨率token，导致计算浪费；用低分辨率特征又会丢失弱边界信息。本文希望在不牺牲精度的前提下，用最少token覆盖最具信息量的区域，从而实现高效分割。
AI.method: 1) 先以低分辨率粗token编码全图；2) 轻量级分配器迭代预测语义边界概率，根据低阈值动态给高疑边界斑块注入细token；3) 提出混合分辨率注意力，允许粗细token双向交互，仅对语义复杂区聚焦计算；4) 整个过程可端到端训练，且无后处理。
AI.result: ADE20K 54.6 mIoU (≈100 M参数)、COCO-Stuff SOTA，计算量显著低于同尺寸主干；Cityscapes取得相当精度，FLOPs再降。
AI.conclusion: 通过「按需增分辨率＋边界敏感分配」的策略，ARTA证明在语义分割中无需均匀高分辨率即可保持精度，大幅降低FLOPs与显存，为轻量级密集预测模型提供新范式。

title: ARTA: Adaptive Mixed-Resolution Token Allocation for Efficient Dense Feature Extraction
summary: We present ARTA, a mixed-resolution coarse-to-fine vision transformer for efficient dense feature extraction. Unlike models that begin with dense high-resolution (fine) tokens, ARTA starts with low-resolution (coarse) tokens and uses a lightweight allocator to predict which regions require more fine tokens. The allocator iteratively predicts a semantic (class) boundary score and allocates additional tokens to patches above a low threshold, concentrating token density near boundaries while maintaining high sensitivity to weak boundary evidence. This targeted allocation encourages tokens to represent a single semantic class rather than a mixture of classes. Mixed-resolution attention enables interaction between coarse and fine tokens, focusing computation on semantically complex areas while avoiding redundant processing in homogeneous regions. Experiments demonstrate that ARTA achieves state-of-the-art results on ADE20K and COCO-Stuff with substantially fewer FLOPs, and delivers competitive performance on Cityscapes at markedly lower compute. For example, ARTA-Base attains 54.6 mIoU on ADE20K in the ~100M-parameter class while using fewer FLOPs and less memory than comparable backbones.

AI.tldr: ARTA 用粗→细混合分辨率 ViT，通过轻量分配器只在语义边界区域逐步增加细 Token，其余保持粗粒度，显著节省计算量并在 ADE20K/COCO-Stuff 取得 SOTA，Cityscapes 亦具竞争力。
AI.motivation: 现有密集特征提取模型一开始就采用高密度高分辨率 Token，导致在同质区域产生大量冗余计算；作者希望仅对语义复杂、边界模糊区域动态增加分辨率，以降低整体开销。
AI.method: 1) 初始低分辨率粗 Token；2) 轻量化分配器迭代预测类别边界分数，仅对高于低阈值的 Patch 追加细 Token；3) 混合分辨率注意力机制实现粗-细 Token 间交互；4) 整个过程保持单一语义类别对应单一 Token，减少类混合噪声。
AI.result: ADE20K 上 ARTA-Base 约 100 M 参数即达 54.6 mIoU，FLOPs 与内存均低于同级骨干；COCO-Stuff 亦获 SOTA；Cityscapes 在显著降低算力的同时保持 competitive 精度。
AI.conclusion: ARTA 通过“先粗后细、边界驱动”的 Token 分配策略，把计算集中在语义关键区域，兼顾精度与效率，为高效密集预测提供了新范式。

title: Vision Transformers and Graph Neural Networks for Charged Particle Tracking in the ATLAS Muon Spectrometer
summary: The identification and reconstruction of charged particles, such as muons, is a main challenge for the physics program of the ATLAS experiment at the Large Hadron Collider. This task will become increasingly difficult with the start of the High-Luminosity LHC era after 2030, when the number of proton-proton collisions per bunch crossing will increase from 60 to up to 200. This elevated interaction density will also increase the occupancy within the ATLAS Muon Spectrometer, requiring more efficient and robust real-time data processing strategies within the experiment's trigger system, particularly the Event Filter. To address these algorithmic challenges, we present two machine-learning-based approaches. First, we target the problem of background-hit rejection in the Muon Spectrometer using Graph Neural Networks integrated into the non-ML baseline reconstruction chain, demonstrating a 15 % improvement in reconstruction speed (from 255 ms to 217 ms). Second, we present a proof-of-concept for end-to-end muon tracking using state-of-the-art Vision Transformer architectures, achieving ultra-fast approximate muon reconstruction in 2.3 ms on consumer-grade GPUs at 98 % tracking efficiency.

AI.tldr: 面向高亮度LHC阶段，ATLAS缪子谱仪需在200次/束团交叉的极高堆叠环境下实现实时触发重建。作者提出两项ML方案：GNN背景击中剔除使现有链速度提升15%；端到端Vision Transformer概念验证在消费级GPU上以2.3 ms完成98%效率的近似轨迹重建。
AI.motivation: 2030年高亮度LHC启用后，束团交叉堆叠度升至200次，缪子谱仪击中密度激增，现有滤波器(Event Filter)将无法满足实时触发带宽与重建速度需求，亟需更高效的算法。
AI.method: 1) 在现有非ML重建链中嵌入图神经网络(GNN)，利用谱仪击中的空间图结构区分信号与背景击中；2) 基于Vision Transformer端到端输入原始击中图像，直接输出缪子轨迹参数，实现GPU并行推理。
AI.result: GNN方法使整体重建时间从255 ms降至217 ms(提速15%)，且不损失物理效率；Vision Transformer原型在消费级GPU上2.3 ms完成单次事件，跟踪效率达98%，为后续在线触发提供可行路径。
AI.conclusion: ML可在保持甚至提升物理效率的同时，显著压缩高堆叠环境下的缪子重建时延，为ATLAS高亮度阶段实时触发与计算资源优化奠定算法基础，后续需工程化集成与系统化验证。

title: GeoGuide: Hierarchical Geometric Guidance for Open-Vocabulary 3D Semantic Segmentation
summary: Open-vocabulary 3D semantic segmentation aims to segment arbitrary categories beyond the training set. Existing methods predominantly rely on distilling knowledge from 2D open-vocabulary models. However, aligning 3D features to the 2D representation space restricts intrinsic 3D geometric learning and inherits errors from 2D predictions. To address these limitations, we propose GeoGuide, a novel framework that leverages pretrained 3D models to integrate hierarchical geometry-semantic consistency for open-vocabulary 3D segmentation. Specifically, we introduce an Uncertainty-based Superpoint Distillation module to fuse geometric and semantic features for estimating per-point uncertainty, adaptively weighting 2D features within superpoints to suppress noise while preserving discriminative information to enhance local semantic consistency. Furthermore, our Instance-level Mask Reconstruction module leverages geometric priors to enforce semantic consistency within instances by reconstructing complete instance masks. Additionally, our Inter-Instance Relation Consistency module aligns geometric and semantic similarity matrices to calibrate cross-instance consistency for same-category objects, mitigating viewpoint-induced semantic drift. Extensive experiments on ScanNet v2, Matterport3D, and nuScenes demonstrate the superior performance of GeoGuide.

AI.tldr: GeoGuide 用纯 3D 预训练模型取代 2D 知识蒸馏，通过超点不确定性加权、实例掩膜重建和跨实例关系一致性三项正则化，实现无需 2D 标签的开放词汇 3D 语义分割，在三大数据集刷新 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇 3D 语义分割依赖 2D-3D 特征对齐，既抑制 3D 几何学习，又把 2D 预测误差传导到 3D。作者认为应充分利用 3D 几何先验，摆脱对 2D 蒸馏的依赖。
