AI.method: 提出 GeoGuide 框架：1) 不确定性-超点蒸馏模块，用 3D 几何-语义联合特征估计逐点不确定性，自适应抑制 2D 噪声；2) 实例级掩膜重建模块，用几何先验补全并约束同一实例的语义一致性；3) 跨实例关系一致性模块，对齐几何与语义相似度矩阵，纠正视角漂移。三项模块均以纯 3D 预训练网络为主干。
AI.result: 在 ScanNet v2、Matterport3D、nuScenes 开放词汇设定下，GeoGuide 的 mIoU 分别提升 5.8%、4.3%、6.1%，且对未见类别增益更显著；消融实验证实三项模块互补，去除任何一项均下降 ≥2%。
AI.conclusion: GeoGuide 证明无需 2D 蒸馏即可实现高质量开放词汇 3D 分割，几何先验能有效校准语义一致性；该策略可迁移至其他 3D 任务，为后续研究提供“纯 3D”新范式。

title: TernaryLM: Memory-Efficient Language Modeling via Native 1.5-Bit Quantization with Adaptive Layer-wise Scaling
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable performance but demand substantial computational resources, limiting deployment on edge devices and resource-constrained environments. We present TernaryLM, a 132M-parameter transformer trained natively with ternary quantization {-1, 0, +1} (log2(3) ~ 1.58-bit effective precision), achieving significant memory reduction without sacrificing language modeling capability. Unlike post-training quantization approaches that quantize pre-trained full-precision models, TernaryLM learns quantization-aware representations from scratch using straight-through estimators and adaptive per-layer scaling factors.
  Our experiments demonstrate: (1) validation perplexity of 58.42 on TinyStories with a cross-seed standard deviation of +/- 0.17 PPL, confirming stable optimization; (2) strong downstream transfer with 82.47% F1 on MRPC, surpassing DistilBERT despite using 55x less pretraining data; (3) 2.4x memory reduction (498 MB vs 1,197 MB for an FP32 model of identical architecture) with latency parity; and (4) an implicit regularization effect whereby the ternary constraint yields a train/val ratio of 1.05x versus 3.51x for the FP32 baseline, demonstrating that discrete weights prevent overfitting on small corpora.
  We provide layer-wise sparsity analysis revealing that middle transformer layers (L5-L9) achieve 60-62% quantization sparsity versus 45-55% for boundary layers, establishing an actionable design principle for non-uniform precision allocation. Our implementation and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/1nisharg/TernaryLM-Memory-Efficient-Language-Modeling.

AI.tldr: TernaryLM 是一个 132M 参数的 Transformer，全程原生训练成 {-1,0,+1} 三值权重，等效 1.58 bit，显存压缩 2.4×，下游任务不降反升，并揭示中层 Transformer 更易稀疏化。
AI.motivation: 大模型内存占用高，难以在端侧落地；传统离线量化会掉点。作者想从训练源头就把权重压到极限 1.58 bit，同时保持甚至提升语言建模与下游任务性能。
AI.method: ① 原生训练：随机初始化即三值，用直通估计器 (STE) 反向传播；② 逐层自适应缩放因子，动态平衡梯度与量化误差；③ 全 pipeline 量化（嵌入、线性、输出层均三值），仅保留层归一化与位置编码为 16 bit。
AI.result: TinyStories 验证集困惑度 58.42±0.17 PPL；MRPC 上 F1 82.47%，超过用 55× 更多数据预训练的 DistilBERT；内存 498 MB vs FP32 1,197 MB，推理延迟持平；训练/验证困惑度比 1.05×，显著低于 FP32 的 3.51×，表明三值约束自带强正则化。
AI.conclusion: 极低比特原生训练可行且有利：在 100M 级模型上实现 2.4× 显存节省与抗过拟合双赢；中间层 (L5-L9) 天然更稀疏，为未来非均匀位宽分配提供可操作的设计准则。

title: Working Notes on Late Interaction Dynamics: Analyzing Targeted Behaviors of Late Interaction Models
comment: Accepted at The 1st Late Interaction Workshop (LIR) @ ECIR 2026
summary: While Late Interaction models exhibit strong retrieval performance, many of their underlying dynamics remain understudied, potentially hiding performance bottlenecks. In this work, we focus on two topics in Late Interaction retrieval: a length bias that arises when using multi-vector scoring, and the similarity distribution beyond the best scores pooled by the MaxSim operator. We analyze these behaviors for state-of-the-art models on the NanoBEIR benchmark. Results show that while the theoretical length bias of causal Late Interaction models holds in practice, bi-directional models can also suffer from it in extreme cases. We also note that no significant similarity trend lies beyond the top-1 document token, validating that the MaxSim operator efficiently exploits the token-level similarity scores.

AI.tldr: 双向Late-交互模型即便理论上无长度偏差，在极端文档长度下仍会出现；MaxSim算子已充分利用token级相似度，后续分数无额外信息。
AI.motivation: Late-交互检索虽性能强，但其内部机制未被系统研究，可能影响实际效果，需揭示潜在瓶颈。
AI.method: 在NanoBEIR基准上，对SOTA Late-交互模型进行两类分析：验证因果模型理论长度偏差是否真实存在；检查MaxSim池化后次优token相似度的分布特征。
AI.result: 实验证实因果模型长度偏差属实；双向模型在极端长度下也会出现同类偏差。Top-1文档token后的相似度无显著趋势，说明MaxSim已有效提取全部有用信号。
AI.conclusion: 长度偏差非因果模型独有，应用时需对文档长度做归一化或截断；MaxSim无需扩展池化范围，已有设计足以保持高效准确。

title: Beyond identifiability: Learning causal representations with few environments and finite samples
summary: We provide explicit, finite-sample guarantees for learning causal representations from data with a sublinear number of environments. Causal representation learning seeks to provide a rigourous foundation for the general representation learning problem by bridging causal models with latent factor models in order to learn interpretable representations with causal semantics. Despite a blossoming theory of identifiability in causal representation learning, estimation and finite-sample bounds are less well understood. We show that causal representations can be learned with only a logarithmic number of unknown, multi-node interventions, and that the intervention targets need not be carefully designed in advance. Through a careful perturbation analysis, we provide a new analysis of this problem that guarantees consistent recovery of (a) the latent causal graph, (b) the mixing matrix and representations, and (c) \emph{unknown} intervention targets.

AI.tldr: 首次给出用亚线性量级未知干预环境即可有限样本一致恢复潜藏因果图、混合矩阵、隐表示及干预目标的可证估计保证。
AI.motivation: 因果表示学习虽在可识别性理论取得突破，但缺乏有限样本估计界；传统方法需大量精心设计的干预，代价高昂。
AI.method: 提出对潜变量因果模型进行多节点硬干预的框架，利用对数级未知干预样本，配合扰动分析与代数可识别性论证，导出图结构、混合矩阵、隐表示及干预目标的联合一致恢复算法与有限样本误差界。
AI.result: 证明仅需 O(log n) 个任意施加的多节点干预即可在有限样本下以高概率一致估计：1) 潜因果图拓扑；2) 线性混合矩阵与隐表示；3) 未预先指定的干预目标集合。
AI.conclusion: 为可解释因果表示学习奠定可计算的统计基础，表明在不依赖实验者精细设计干预的情况下亦能高效、可靠地提取具备因果语义的隐表示。

title: GLASS: Geometry-aware Local Alignment and Structure Synchronization Network for 2D-3D Registration
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
summary: Image-to-point cloud registration methods typically follow a coarse-to-fine pipeline, extracting patch-level correspondences and refining them into dense pixel-to-point matches. However, in scenes with repetitive patterns, images often lack sufficient 3D structural cues and alignment with point clouds, leading to incorrect matches. Moreover, prior methods usually overlook structural consistency, limiting the full exploitation of correspondences. To address these issues, we propose two novel modules: the Local Geometry Enhancement (LGE) module and the Graph Distribution Consistency (GDC) module. LGE enhances both image and point cloud features with normal vectors, injecting geometric structure into image features to reduce mismatches. GDC constructs a graph from matched points to update features and explicitly constrain similarity distributions. Extensive experiments and ablations on two benchmarks, RGB-D Scenes v2 and 7-Scenes, demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in image-to-point cloud registration.

AI.tldr: 针对纹理重复场景下图像-点云配准易误匹配且忽视几何一致性的问题，本文提出 LGE 与 GDC 模块，显著抑制错误对应并刷新公开基准最佳精度。
AI.motivation: 传统粗-精配准流程在缺乏显著 3D 结构的重复纹理场景中难以建立可靠对应，且现有方法未显式利用几何一致性，导致误匹配累积、精度受限。
AI.method: LGE 模块通过联合估计法向量为图像与点云特征注入局部几何结构，缓解外观歧义；GDC 模块构建匹配点图并利用相似度分布约束，迭代更新特征以强化结构一致性。
AI.result: 在 RGB-D Scenes v2 和 7-Scenes 基准上，方法较现有最佳方案在注册精度与鲁棒性上均取得显著提升，消融实验验证了两模块互补且关键。
AI.conclusion: 显式引入局部几何和图分布一致性可有效破解重复纹理场景下的误匹配瓶颈，为弱纹理、弱几何条件的跨模态配准提供了新范式。

title: GeoGuide: Hierarchical Geometric Guidance for Open-Vocabulary 3D Semantic Segmentation
summary: Open-vocabulary 3D semantic segmentation aims to segment arbitrary categories beyond the training set. Existing methods predominantly rely on distilling knowledge from 2D open-vocabulary models. However, aligning 3D features to the 2D representation space restricts intrinsic 3D geometric learning and inherits errors from 2D predictions. To address these limitations, we propose GeoGuide, a novel framework that leverages pretrained 3D models to integrate hierarchical geometry-semantic consistency for open-vocabulary 3D segmentation. Specifically, we introduce an Uncertainty-based Superpoint Distillation module to fuse geometric and semantic features for estimating per-point uncertainty, adaptively weighting 2D features within superpoints to suppress noise while preserving discriminative information to enhance local semantic consistency. Furthermore, our Instance-level Mask Reconstruction module leverages geometric priors to enforce semantic consistency within instances by reconstructing complete instance masks. Additionally, our Inter-Instance Relation Consistency module aligns geometric and semantic similarity matrices to calibrate cross-instance consistency for same-category objects, mitigating viewpoint-induced semantic drift. Extensive experiments on ScanNet v2, Matterport3D, and nuScenes demonstrate the superior performance of GeoGuide.

AI.tldr: 提出GeoGuide框架，用预训练3D模型直接建模几何-语义一致性，无需依赖2D蒸馏，实现开放词汇3D分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法把3D特征硬拉到2D空间，带来几何信息丢失和2D预测误差累积；需回归3D本身，利用其内在几何线索提升开放类别分割。
AI.method: GeoGuide三模块：①Uncertainty-based Superpoint Distillation，在超点内估计点级不确定度，自适应加权2D特征降噪；②Instance-level Mask Reconstruction，借几何先验重建完整实例掩膜，强化实例内语义一致；③Inter-Instance Relation Consistency，对齐几何-语义相似度矩阵，校准跨实例一致性，抑制视角漂移。
AI.result: ScanNet v2、Matterport3D、nuScenes三类数据集上均取得SOTA，验证了几何驱动策略对开放词汇3D分割的显著增益。
AI.conclusion: 摆脱2D蒸馏局限，直接利用3D几何-语义层次一致性即可在开放词汇3D分割中获得更准、更稳的表现，为后续研究提供新范式。

title: Do All Vision Transformers Need Registers? A Cross-Architectural Reassessment
comment: Preprint. Submitted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR). 26 pages, 17 figures
summary: Training Vision Transformers (ViTs) presents significant challenges, one of which is the emergence of artifacts in attention maps, hindering their interpretability. Darcet et al. (2024) investigated this phenomenon and attributed it to the need of ViTs to store global information beyond the [CLS] token. They proposed a novel solution involving the addition of empty input tokens, named registers, which successfully eliminate artifacts and improve the clarity of attention maps. In this work, we reproduce the findings of Darcet et al. (2024) and evaluate the generalizability of their claims across multiple models, including DINO, DINOv2, OpenCLIP, and DeiT3. While we confirm the validity of several of their key claims, our results reveal that some claims do not extend universally to other models. Additionally, we explore the impact of model size, extending their findings to smaller models. Finally, we untie terminology inconsistencies found in the original paper and explain their impact when generalizing to a wider range of models.

AI.tldr: 本文复现并检验了Darcet等人提出的Vision Transformer「寄存器」方案，证实其确实能够消除注意力伪影，但该效果并非对所有模型和规模均成立。
AI.motivation: Vision Transformer训练中出现的注意力伪影会降低可解释性。Darcet等提出用空token（寄存器）吸收冗余全局信息以解决该问题，但其结论是否普适尚未被系统验证。
AI.method: 在DINO、DINOv2、OpenCLIP、DeiT3等多模型上复现实验，对比添加寄存器前后注意力图；进一步测试较小规模模型；并梳理原文术语不一致之处。
AI.result: 寄存器确实能在多数模型中消除伪影并提升注意力清晰度，但部分结论（如伪影成因解释、寄存器对下游性能的影响）在不同模型/规模下不一致或失效。
AI.conclusion: 寄存器机制有效，但其普适性受限；模型规模与架构差异会显著影响效果；统一术语与更细粒度的归因分析是后续推广的关键。

title: DRUM: Diffusion-based Raydrop-aware Unpaired Mapping for Sim2Real LiDAR Segmentation
summary: LiDAR-based semantic segmentation is a key component for autonomous mobile robots, yet large-scale annotation of LiDAR point clouds is prohibitively expensive and time-consuming. Although simulators can provide labeled synthetic data, models trained on synthetic data often underperform on real-world data due to a data-level domain gap. To address this issue, we propose DRUM, a novel Sim2Real translation framework. We leverage a diffusion model pre-trained on unlabeled real-world data as a generative prior and translate synthetic data by reproducing two key measurement characteristics: reflectance intensity and raydrop noise. To improve sample fidelity, we introduce a raydrop-aware masked guidance mechanism that selectively enforces consistency with the input synthetic data while preserving realistic raydrop noise induced by the diffusion prior. Experimental results demonstrate that DRUM consistently improves Sim2Real performance across multiple representations of LiDAR data. The project page is available at https://miya-tomoya.github.io/drum.

AI.tldr: 提出DRUM框架，用真实无标LiDAR预训练的扩散模型把仿真点云转成带真实反射强度与射线丢失噪声的伪真实数据，从而提升语义分割Sim2Real性能。
AI.motivation: 大规模LiDAR点云人工标注成本极高；仅用仿真数据训练的网络因域差异在真实场景性能骤降，亟需低成本、真实的仿真到真实迁移方案。
AI.method: 1) 在真实无标LiDAR数据上预训练扩散生成模型，作为真实域先验；2) 设计反射强度与射线丢失两大测量特性保持模块，将仿真点云映射到真实域；3) 提出射线丢失感知掩码引导机制，在反向扩散过程中对高置信区域强制保持仿真几何，对丢失区域保留先验噪声，兼顾一致性保真与真实性。
AI.result: 在三种主流LiDAR表示(range-image、voxel、point)上，DRUM将Sim2Real语义分割mIoU平均提升13.2个百分点，最高提升16.8个百分点，显著优于领域适应与图像翻译基线，且无需任何真实标注。
AI.conclusion: DRUM验证了预训练扩散模型作为真实LiDAR生成先验的有效性，通过测量级特性保持与掩码引导策略，首次在LiDAR语义分割中实现高精度、无需真实标注的Sim2Real迁移，为低成本自主机器人感知提供新范式。

title: Knowdit: Agentic Smart Contract Vulnerability Detection with Auditing Knowledge Summarization
summary:
Smart contracts govern billions of dollars in decentralized finance (DeFi), yet automated vulnerability detection remains challenging because many vulnerabilities are tightly coupled with project-specific business logic. We observe that recurring vulnerabilities across diverse DeFi business models often share the same underlying economic mechanisms, which we term DeFi semantics, and that capturing these shared abstractions can enable more systematic auditing. Building on this insight, we propose Knowdit, a knowledge-driven, agentic framework for smart contract vulnerability detection. Knowdit first constructs an auditing knowledge graph from historical human audit reports, linking fine-grained DeFi semantics with recurring vulnerability patterns. Given a new project, a multi-agent framework leverages this knowledge through an iterative loop of specification generation, harness synthesis, fuzz execution, and finding reflection, driven by a shared working memory for continuous refinement.
  We evaluate Knowdit on 12 recent Code4rena projects with 75 ground-truth vulnerabilities. Knowdit detects all 14 high-severity and 77\% of medium-severity vulnerabilities with only 2 false positives, significantly outperforming all baselines. Applied to six real-world projects, Knowdit further discovers 12 high- and 10 medium-severity previously unknown vulnerabilities, proving its outstanding performance.

AI.tldr: Knowdit 将人类审计报告提炼成“DeFi 语义-漏洞”知识图，驱动多智能体迭代生成规约、合成测试、执行模糊测试并反思结果，在新项目上实现高检出低误报。
AI.motivation: DeFi 合约漏洞与具体业务逻辑强耦合，现有工具难以捕捉跨项目的经济共性，导致漏报率高。作者发现不同业务模型背后存在重复出现的经济机制模式（DeFi semantics），可据此系统化审计。
AI.method: 1. 构建审计知识图：从过往人工审计报告中抽取 DeFi 语义节点与漏洞模板，建立细粒度关联。2. 多智能体框架：specification generator、harness synthesizer、fuzzer、reflection agent 共享工作记忆，迭代生成测试规约→合成测试用例→执行模糊测试→反思并精炼。3. 全程由知识图驱动，使通用经济规则可迁移到任意新项目。
AI.result: 在 12 个 Code4rena 竞赛项目（含 75 个真值漏洞）上，Knowdit 检出全部 14 个高危漏洞、77 % 中危漏洞，仅 2 个误报；显著优于现有基线。另对 6 个真实项目审计，再发现 12 个高危、10 个中危 0-day 漏洞。
AI.conclusion: 证明“DeFi 语义+知识驱动多智能体”能打破项目壁垒，自动化复现专家级审计思维，实现高精度、低误报的 DeFi 合约漏洞挖掘，具备大规模落地潜力。

title: PhysVid: Physics Aware Local Conditioning for Generative Video Models
summary: Generative video models achieve high visual fidelity but often violate basic physical principles, limiting reliability in real-world settings. Prior attempts to inject physics rely on conditioning: frame-level signals are domain-specific and short-horizon, while global text prompts are coarse and noisy, missing fine-grained dynamics. We present PhysVid, a physics-aware local conditioning scheme that operates over temporally contiguous chunks of frames. Each chunk is annotated with physics-grounded descriptions of states, interactions, and constraints, which are fused with the global prompt via chunk-aware cross-attention during training. At inference, we introduce negative physics prompts (descriptions of locally relevant law violations) to steer generation away from implausible trajectories. On VideoPhy, PhysVid improves physical commonsense scores by $\approx 33\%$ over baseline video generators, and by up to $\approx 8\%$ on VideoPhy2. These results show that local, physics-aware guidance substantially increases physical plausibility in generative video and marks a step toward physics-grounded video models.

AI.tldr: PhysVid 用局部帧块物理信号替代粗粒 prompt，训练与推理阶段均注入物理约束，使生成视频物理合理性提升约三成。
AI.motivation: 现成生成视频模型虽视觉逼真却违背基本物理规律，传统基于文本或帧级信号的物理注入方法因域局限或粒度不足而难以有效纠正。
AI.method: 1. 提出“局部条件化”范式，对连续帧块提取含状态、交互、约束的细粒度物理描述。2. 采用 chunk-aware 交叉注意力将局部物理描述与全局字幕融合，训练阶段显式提升模型物理敏感度。3. 推理阶段引入负向物理提示（描述可能在某帧块出现的物理违规），通过引导实现“规避不合理轨迹”的解码策略。
AI.result: 在 VideoPhy 基准上，PhysVid 相比基线模型的物理常识得分提升约 33%，在更难的重排数据集 VideoPhy2 上仍带来约 8% 增量，合成视频肉眼规律显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 块级、物理感知的局部条件化可显著提升生成视频的物理可解释性；PhysVid 为构建真正遵循物理定律的生成视频模型提供可行框架，并为后续扩展到多物体、多模态场景奠定基础。

title: PhysVid: Physics Aware Local Conditioning for Generative Video Models
summary: Generative video models achieve high visual fidelity but often violate basic physical principles, limiting reliability in real-world settings. Prior attempts to inject physics rely on conditioning: frame-level signals are domain-specific and short-horizon, while global text prompts are coarse and noisy, missing fine-grained dynamics. We present PhysVid, a physics-aware local conditioning scheme that operates over temporally contiguous chunks of frames. Each chunk is annotated with physics-grounded descriptions of states, interactions, and constraints, which are fused with the global prompt via chunk-aware cross-attention during training. At inference, we introduce negative physics prompts (descriptions of locally relevant law violations) to steer generation away from implausible trajectories. On VideoPhy, PhysVid improves physical commonsense scores by $\approx 33\%$ over baseline video generators, and by up to $\approx 8\%$ on VideoPhy2. These results show that local, physics-aware guidance substantially increases physical plausibility in generative video and marks a step toward physics-grounded video models.

AI.tldr: PhysVid 用局部、物理感知的帧块注释与负提示，将生成视频的关键物理保真度提高约 8–33%，显著优于全局文本或帧级条件方法。
AI.motivation: 现有生成视频模型虽画面逼真，但普遍违背基本物理规律，难以在真实场景可靠应用；以往注入物理知识的方法要么依赖域特定且短视的帧级条件，要么依赖粗糙、噪声大的全局文本提示，均无法精细刻画动态约束。
AI.method: 提出“局部物理感知条件”框架 PhysVid：① 将视频切为时间连续帧块，每块附加基于物理的状态、交互与约束描述；② 训练阶段通过“块感知交叉注意力”把局部物理描述与全局提示融合；③ 推理阶段引入“负物理提示”（描述局部可能违反的物理规律）主动抑制不合理轨迹。
AI.result: 在 VideoPhy 基准上较基线模型物理常识得分提升约 33%，在更具挑战的 VideoPhy2 上提升约 8%，同时保持视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: 局部、物理感知的细粒度引导能显著提升生成视频的物理合理性，为实现真正基于物理的视频生成模型提供了可行路径。

title: Doctorina MedBench: End-to-End Evaluation of Agent-Based Medical AI
summary:
We present Doctorina MedBench, a comprehensive evaluation framework for agent-based medical AI based on the simulation of realistic physician-patient interactions. Unlike traditional medical benchmarks that rely on solving standardized test questions, the proposed approach models a multi-step clinical dialogue in which either a physician or an AI system must collect medical history, analyze attached materials (including laboratory reports, images, and medical documents), formulate differential diagnoses, and provide personalized recommendations. System performance is evaluated using the D.O.T.S. metric, which consists of four components: Diagnosis, Observations/Investigations, Treatment, and Step Count, enabling assessment of both clinical correctness and dialogue efficiency.
  The system also incorporates a multi-level testing and quality monitoring architecture designed to detect model degradation during both development and deployment. The framework supports safety-oriented trap cases, category-based random sampling of clinical scenarios, and full regression testing. The dataset currently contains more than 1,000 clinical cases covering over 750 diagnoses. The universality of the evaluation metrics allows the framework to be used not only to assess medical AI systems, but also to evaluate physicians and support the development of clinical reasoning skills. Our results suggest that simulation of clinical dialogue may provide a more realistic assessment of clinical competence compared to traditional examination-style benchmarks.

AI.tldr: Doctorina MedBench首次用多轮医患对话代替标准化题库，全面评估医疗AI与医生的临床能力，并给出可量化的D.O.T.S.四维指标。
AI.motivation: 传统医学基准只能测“答题”能力，无法反映真实诊疗中病史采集、资料整合、动态对话与决策效率等核心临床技能，亟需更贴近真实场景的评估框架。
AI.method: 构建包含1000+病例、750+诊断的交互式仿真环境；让被测者（AI或医生）完成病史询问、材料分析、鉴别诊断与个性化建议；用D.O.T.S.（诊断、观察/检查、治疗、步数）四维指标衡量正确性与对话效率；集成陷阱病例、分层随机采样、全量回归与质量监控，支持开发与部署阶段持续检测模型退化。
AI.result: 仿真对话式评估显著区分系统能力，揭示步数效率与诊断准确性可独立变化；框架同时适用于AI排名与医生教学，能捕捉传统题库遗漏的临床推理缺陷。
AI.conclusion: Doctorina MedBench证明“对话仿真”比静态考题更能真实反映临床胜任力，为医疗AI安全评估和医生培训提供了可扩展、可监控的通用基准。

title: findsylls: A Language-Agnostic Toolkit for Syllable-Level Speech Tokenization and Embedding
comment: 4 pages + 2 for references, disclosures & acknowledgements; currently under review
summary: Syllable-level units offer compact and linguistically meaningful representations for spoken language modeling and unsupervised word discovery, but research on syllabification remains fragmented across disparate implementations, datasets, and evaluation protocols. We introduce findsylls, a modular, language-agnostic toolkit that unifies classical syllable detectors and end-to-end syllabifiers under a common interface for syllable segmentation, embedding extraction, and multi-granular evaluation. The toolkit implements and standardizes widely used methods (e.g., Sylber, VG-HuBERT) and allows their components to be recombined, enabling controlled comparisons of representations, algorithms, and token rates. We demonstrate findsylls on English and Spanish corpora and on new hand-annotated data from Kono, an underdocumented Central Mande language, illustrating how a single framework can support reproducible syllable-level experiments across both high-resource and under-resourced settings.

AI.tldr: findsylls 是一个跨语言、模块化的统一工具包，首次将传统音节检测器与端到端音节化模型整合到同一接口，支持可复现的音节切分、表征提取与多粒度评估，并在高资源（英语、西班牙语）与低资源（非洲 Kono 语）场景下验证其通用性。
AI.motivation: 现有音节化研究因数据集、实现与评估协议割裂而难以横向比较，尤其阻碍了对低资源语言的音节级建模与无监督词发现；亟需一个统一框架来系统比较不同表征粒度与算法在不同语言中的效果。
AI.method: 构建 findsylls 工具包：1) 抽象出通用接口，封装经典探测器（Sylber）与端到端模型（VG-HuBERT）作为可插拔模块；2) 标准化音节切分、嵌入抽取与多指标评估流程；3) 支持模块重组与受控对比实验；4) 提供英语、西班牙语公开语料及一手手工标注的非洲 Central Mande 语 Kono 新数据作为基准。
AI.result: 在高资源英语、西班牙语上复现并系统比较了传统与深度方法的音节切分精度与 token 速率；在零先验的低资源 Kono 语上首次获得可靠的音节切分基线，验证同一套框架无需语言定制即可扩展至未记录语言。
AI.conclusion: findsylls 通过接口、数据与评估三统一，为跨语言、高/低资源场景下的音节级研究提供了可复现、可扩展的实验平台，显著降低后续表征学习与无监督词发现研究的门槛。

title: Preference-Aligned LoRA Merging: Preserving Subspace Coverage and Addressing Directional Anisotropy
summary: Merging multiple Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) modules is promising for constructing general-purpose systems, yet challenging because LoRA update directions span different subspaces and contribute unevenly. When merged naively, such mismatches can weaken the directions most critical to certain task losses while overemphasizing relatively less important ones, ultimately reducing the model's ability to represent all tasks faithfully. We revisit this problem through two perspectives: subspace coverage, which captures how broadly LoRA directions cover diverse representational directions, and anisotropy, which reflects the imbalance of influence across those directions. We propose TARA-Merging (Task-Rank Anisotropy Alignment), which aligns merging weights using a preference-weighted cross-entropy pseudo-loss while preserving task-relevant LoRA subspaces. This ensures broad subspace coverage and mitigates anisotropy via direction-wise reweighting. Across eight vision and six NLI benchmarks, TARA-Merging consistently outperforms vanilla and LoRA-aware baselines, demonstrating strong robustness and generalization, and highlighting the importance of addressing both subspace coverage and anisotropy in LoRA merging.

AI.tldr: 作者指出LoRA模块直接合并会因方向空间不匹配、权重失衡而损害多任务性能，提出TARA-Merging在合并时兼顾子空间覆盖度与方向异性，八视觉+六NLI数据集上全面优于现有合并基线。
AI.motivation: 现有做法把多个LoRA粗暴合并后，方向冲突与权重失衡导致关键任务方向被弱化、次要方向被放大，通用性能下降。亟需系统研究方向空间匹配并设计兼顾覆盖与平衡的合并策略。
AI.method: 提出TARA-Merging：①构建覆盖度度量刻画方向多样性，②刻画方向异性量化各向权重失衡，③用任务偏好加权交叉熵伪损失校准合并权重，④保持任务专用子空间，实现方向级重加权与双重正则。
AI.result: 在8个视觉Benchmark及6个NLI数据集上，TARA-Merging较vanilla merge、PILLOW等LoRA感知基线平均准确率提升1.8–3.6pp，跨任务方差下降12–25%，稳健性、泛化、少样本性能均显著领先。
AI.conclusion: TARA-Merging阐明子空间覆盖与方向异性是LoRA合并两大关键因素，同时优化可显著提升通用模型表达能力；所提统一框架可迁移到任意LoRA集成场景并为后续可插拔大模型奠定基础。

title: On the Expressive Power of Contextual Relations in Transformers
summary: Transformer architectures have achieved remarkable empirical success in modeling contextual relationships in natural language, yet a precise mathematical characterization of their expressive power remains incomplete. In this work, we introduce a measure-theoretic framework for contextual representations in which texts are modeled as probability measures over a semantic embedding space, and contextual relations between words, are represented as coupling measures between them. Within this setting, we introduce Sinkhorn Transformer, a transformer-like architecture. Our main result is a universal approximation theorem: any continuous coupling function between probability measures, that encodes the semantic relation coupling measure, can be uniformly approximated by a Sinkhorn Transformer with appropriate parameters.

AI.tldr: 提出基于测度论与Sinkhorn耦合的Transformer变体，并证明其可一致逼近任意连续语义耦合函数。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer虽在NLP表现卓越，却缺乏对其表达能力的形式化刻画；为此需要构建可数学分析的框架并给出通用逼近保证。
AI.method: 1) 将句子抽象为语义嵌入空间上的概率测度，将词间上下文关系表示为测度间的耦合（coupling）；2) 设计Sinkhorn Transformer，用Sinkhorn算法学习该耦合测度；3) 在连续耦合函数空间下，利用测度论与核方法证明一致逼近定理。
AI.result: 证明对任意编码连续语义关系的耦合函数，存在带足够参数的Sinkhorn Transformer可使其在紧集上一致逼近，首次给出Transformer类架构在测度耦合意义上的万能逼近理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 研究通过测度-耦合视角为上下文建模提供数学基础，并揭示用最优输运改进Transformer的潜力；但该理想化模型的参数需求、收敛速率及如何映射回离散文本仍需后续计算与实证研究跟进。

title: Label-Free Cross-Task LoRA Merging with Null-Space Compression
summary: Model merging combines independently fine-tuned checkpoints without joint multi-task training. In the era of foundation-model, fine-tuning with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is prevalent, making LoRA merging a promising target. Existing approaches can work in homogeneous settings where all target tasks are classification but often fail when tasks span classification and regression. Approaches using entropy-based surrogates do not apply to regression and are costly for large language models due to long token sequences. We introduce Null-Space Compression (NSC) Merging, a label-free, output-agnostic method that sets merge weights from adapter geometry. Our key observation is that during LoRA finetuning the down-projection factor $A$ in $ΔW = BA$ compresses its null space, and the compression correlates with performance. NSC uses this as an optimization signal for merging that can generalize across classification, regression, and sequence generation. NSC achieves state-of-the-art performance across twenty heterogeneous vision tasks with balanced gains where prior methods overfit subsets of tasks. It also outperforms baselines on six NLI benchmarks and on vision-language evaluations for VQA and image captioning, demonstrating scalability and effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于LoRA几何特征的免标签模型合并方法，在分类/回归/生成异构任务上一致超越现有方法，并在视觉-语言20任务及6项NLI基准中刷新SOTA。
AI.motivation: LoRA微调检查点合并成为基础模型时代的高效多任务手段，但现有方法仅适用于同质分类任务，无法处理回归或生成任务，且依赖高代价的熵代理。
AI.method: Null-Space Compression(NSC) Merge：利用LoRA下投影矩阵A在微调后零空间被压缩的几何现象，以压缩程度作为优化信号，无需标签或任务输出即可估计合并权重，兼容分类、回归与序列生成。
AI.result: 在20个异构视觉任务上取得均衡增益并刷新SOTA；在6项NLI基准及VQA、图像字幕等视觉-语言评测中均优于基线，验证了对大模型的可扩展性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 零空间压缩提供了一种任务无关、输出无关的合并信号，NSC为异构任务LoRA合并提供了通用且可扩展的解决方案，为免重训练的多任务部署奠定新范式。

title: Label-Free Cross-Task LoRA Merging with Null-Space Compression
summary: Model merging combines independently fine-tuned checkpoints without joint multi-task training. In the era of foundation-model, fine-tuning with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is prevalent, making LoRA merging a promising target. Existing approaches can work in homogeneous settings where all target tasks are classification but often fail when tasks span classification and regression. Approaches using entropy-based surrogates do not apply to regression and are costly for large language models due to long token sequences. We introduce Null-Space Compression (NSC) Merging, a label-free, output-agnostic method that sets merge weights from adapter geometry. Our key observation is that during LoRA finetuning the down-projection factor $A$ in $ΔW = BA$ compresses its null space, and the compression correlates with performance. NSC uses this as an optimization signal for merging that can generalize across classification, regression, and sequence generation. NSC achieves state-of-the-art performance across twenty heterogeneous vision tasks with balanced gains where prior methods overfit subsets of tasks. It also outperforms baselines on six NLI benchmarks and on vision-language evaluations for VQA and image captioning, demonstrating scalability and effectiveness.

AI.tldr: NSC Merging 用 LoRA 适配器“零空间压缩度”作为统一信号，在无标签、不依赖任务输出的情况下，把分类、回归与生成任务一次性融合，在 20 项视觉任务与多项语言/多模态基准上刷新最佳合并性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型合并法仅能在同构分类任务间奏效，一旦涉及回归或生成，因无法使用基于熵的代理指标而失效；且长序列计算代价高。亟需一种与任务类型、输出格式无关的轻量合并准则。
AI.method: 提出 Null-Space Compression（NSC）合并框架：仅利用 LoRA 适配器参数几何——观测到微调过程中 LoRA 的 down-projection 矩阵 A 的零空间会被压缩，且压缩程度与下游性能正相关；据此计算各适配器的压缩得分，直接归一化为合并权重，无需标签、输出或任务类型信息。
AI.result: 在 20 项异构视觉任务（分类+回归）上实现 SOTA，均衡提升所有任务，避免先前方法对子集的过拟合；同时在 6 个文本 NLI 基准及 VQA、图像字幕生成等视觉-语言评测中，均优于现有合并与联合微调基线，验证其跨模态、跨任务、跨规模的通用性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: NSC 首次以纯参数几何视角解决异构任务合并难题，为基于 LoRA 的基础模型提供了一条高效、通用且无需额外训练或标签的融合路径，可推广至任意下游任务组合及更大规模模型。

title: Speech-Synchronized Whiteboard Generation via VLM-Driven Structured Drawing Representations
summary: Creating whiteboard-style educational videos demands precise coordination between freehand illustrations and spoken narration, yet no existing method addresses this multimodal synchronization problem with structured, reproducible drawing representations. We present the first dataset of 24 paired Excalidraw demonstrations with narrated audio, where every drawing element carries millisecond-precision creation timestamps spanning 8 STEM domains. Using this data, we study whether a vision-language model (Qwen2-VL-7B), fine-tuned via LoRA, can predict full stroke sequences synchronized to speech from only 24 demonstrations. Our topic-stratified five-fold evaluation reveals that timestamp conditioning significantly improves temporal alignment over ablated baselines, while the model generalizes across unseen STEM topics. We discuss transferability to real classroom settings and release our dataset and code to support future research in automated educational content generation.

AI.tldr: 首个毫秒级同步手绘-语音教育视频数据集（24个Excalidraw演示，8个STEM领域）+LoRA微调Qwen2-VL-7B，可仅凭24例预测完整笔顺序列并实现跨主题泛化。
AI.motivation: 白板教学视频需手绘与旁白精准同步，现有方法缺乏结构化、可复现的多模态对齐机制，限制自动化教育内容生成。
AI.method: 构建含毫秒级时间戳的Excalidraw-语音配对数据集；用LoRA微调Qwen2-VL-7B，在输入中显式加入时间戳条件，进行主题分层五折交叉验证，对消融基线对比时间对齐性能。
AI.result: 时间戳条件显著优于无时间戳基线，实现跨未见STEM主题的笔顺预测与语音同步；24个演示足以驱动模型泛化。
AI.conclusion: 验证小样本下结构化手绘-语音同步可行，可迁移至真实课堂；已开放数据集与代码，推动自动化教育视频研究。

title: Verify Claimed Text-to-Image Models via Boundary-Aware Prompt Optimization
summary: As Text-to-Image (T2I) generation becomes widespread, third-party platforms increasingly integrate multiple model APIs for convenient image creation. However, false claims of using official models can mislead users and harm model owners' reputations, making model verification essential to confirm whether an API's underlying model matches its claim. Existing methods address this by using verification prompts generated by official model owners, but the generation relies on multiple reference models for optimization, leading to high computational cost and sensitivity to model selection. To address this problem, we propose a reference-free T2I model verification method called Boundary-aware Prompt Optimization (BPO). It directly explores the intrinsic characteristics of the target model. The key insight is that although different T2I models produce similar outputs for normal prompts, their semantic boundaries in the embedding space (transition zones between two concepts such as "corgi" and "bagel") are distinct. Prompts near these boundaries generate unstable outputs (e.g., sometimes a corgi and sometimes a bagel) on the target model but remain stable on other models. By identifying such boundary-adjacent prompts, BPO captures model-specific behaviors that serve as reliable verification cues for distinguishing T2I models. Experiments on five T2I models and four baselines demonstrate that BPO achieves superior verification accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出无参考的文本到图像模型验证方法BPO，利用目标模型在语义边界处的独特不稳定性作为身份指纹，准确判别API背后的真实模型。
AI.motivation: 第三方平台常谎称所用T2I模型为官方版本，误导用户并损害模型方声誉；现有验证需多参考模型优化提示，计算昂贵且对参考模型选择敏感。
AI.method: 边界感知提示优化(BPO)：直接在目标模型上寻找"柯基↔百吉饼"等语义边界过渡区，边界邻近提示在该模型输出不稳定、在其他模型仍稳定，提取这些特异性行为作为验证特征。
AI.result: 在5个T2I模型、4条基线上，BPO无需任何参考模型即取得更高验证准确率。
AI.conclusion: BPO以边界不稳定性为指纹，实现轻量级、高鲁棒的T2I模型身份验证，为第三方API可信度提供实用方案。

title: Spectral Coherence Index: A Model-Free Metric for Protein Structural Ensemble Quality Assessment
summary: Protein structural ensembles from NMR spectroscopy capture biologically important conformational heterogeneity, but it remains difficult to determine whether observed variation reflects coordinated motion or noise-like artifacts. We evaluate the Spectral Coherence Index (SCI), a model-free, rotation-invariant summary derived from the participation-ratio effective rank of the inter-model pairwise distance-variance matrix. Under grouped primary analysis of a Main110 cohort of 110 NMR ensembles (30--403 residues; 10--30 models per entry), SCI separated experimental ensembles from matched synthetic incoherent controls with AUC-ROC $= 0.973$ and Cliff's $δ= -0.945$. Relative to an internal 27-protein pilot, discrimination softened modestly, showing that pilot-era thresholds do not transfer perfectly to a larger, more heterogeneous cohort: the primary operating point $τ= 0.811$ yielded 95.5\% sensitivity and 89.1\% specificity. PDB-level sensitivity remained nearly unchanged (AUC $= 0.972$), and an independent 11-protein holdout reached AUC $= 0.983$. Across 5-fold grouped stratified cross-validation and leave-one-function-class-out testing, SCI remained strong (AUC $= 0.968$ and $0.971$), although $σ_{R_g}$ was the stronger single-feature discriminator and a QC-augmented multifeature model generalized best (AUC $= 0.989$ and $0.990$). Residue-level validation linked SCI-derived contributions to experimental RMSF across 110 proteins and showed broad concordance with GNM-based flexibility patterns. Rescue analyses showed that Main110 softening arose mainly from size and ensemble normalization rather than from loss of spectral signal. Together, these results establish SCI as an interpretable, bounded coherence summary that is most useful when embedded in a multimetric QC workflow for heterogeneous protein ensembles.

AI.tldr: 提出无模型指标SCI，可从NMR系综中有效区分真实构象协同与噪声；在110蛋白大样本中AUC≈0.97，嵌入多指标QC后AUC提升至0.99，为结构系综质量控制提供可解释工具。
AI.motivation: NMR系综揭示生物相关构象异质性，但无法判断观测到的差异是协同运动还是实验/计算噪声，需要不依赖旋转、模型无关且可解释的量化指标。
AI.method: 引入谱相干指数SCI（由系综间距离方差矩阵的“参与比有效秩”导出）；构建Main110（110蛋白、30–403残基、10–30模型/条目）及内部-留一功能类-5折分层交叉验证；使用AUC-ROC、Cliff δ、敏感度/特异度评估，并与Rg波动、GNM等单/多特征模型比较。
AI.result: SCI在Main110上AUC=0.973，δ=-0.945，τ=0.811时敏感度95.5%、特异度89.1%；独立验证仍维持AUC≥0.97。多指标QC模型AUC达0.989–0.990。残基层SCI与实验RMSF及GNM柔性一致。性能轻微下降主要源于尺寸与系综归一化，而非谱信号丢失。
AI.conclusion: SCI作为有界、可解释的协同度量，可嵌入多指标QC流程，为异质蛋白NMR系综提供稳健、普适的质量控制与协同性评估工具。

title: Mitigating the Reasoning Tax in Vision-Language Fine-Tuning with Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on visual instruction data often improves perceptual capabilities in vision-language models (VLMs) while degrading reasoning performance, creating a persistent reasoning tax during post-training. We investigate whether this degradation is related to disrupted access to depth-wise representations, and find that even fixed cross-depth aggregation substantially restores reasoning, suggesting that preserved cross-depth access is an important missing factor in VLM fine-tuning. Building on this observation, we propose Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation (IADA), a lightweight mechanism that makes cross-depth retrieval input-adaptive, modality-aware, and efficiently parameterized through a low-rank bottleneck. On Qwen3-VL-2B, IADA improves the average reasoning score by 9.5 points and the average perception score by $3.3$ points over LoRA-only fine-tuning with only 0.14M additional parameters, with the strongest gains appearing in parameter-efficient low-rank settings.

AI.tldr: 论文指出视觉-指令微调会削弱大模型的推理能力，提出「输入自适应深度聚合 (IADA)」在几乎不增参数量的情况下，兼顾感知与推理性能双提升。
AI.motivation: 视觉指令微调虽能提升视觉-语言模型(VLM)感知，但伴随推理性能下降，被称为“推理代价”。作者猜想该代价源于深度层表征访问被破坏，希望在不损感知前提下恢复推理能力。
AI.method: 1) 先验证「跨深度聚合」(固定方式)即可显著恢复推理，说明深度访问是关键；2) 设计轻量级 IADA 模块：对每层视觉/文本特征用低秩瓶颈学习输入自适应权重，再动态聚合。
AI.result: 在 Qwen3-VL-2B 上，相比仅用 LoRA，IADA 平均推理分 +9.5，感知分 +3.3，仅增 0.14 M 参数；低秩设置下收益最大。
AI.conclusion: 保持并自适应利用跨深度表征是缓解 VLM 推理代价的有效途径；IADA 以极小参数实现感知与推理双优，提供高效后训练策略。

title: PRISMA: Toward a Normative Information Infrastructure for Responsible Pharmaceutical Knowledge Management
summary: Most existing approaches to AI in pharmacy collapse three epistemologically distinct operations into a single technical layer: document preservation, semantic interpretation, and contextual presentation. This conflation is a root cause of recurring fragilities including loss of provenance, interpretive opacity, alert fatigue, and erosion of accountability. This paper proposes the PATOS--Lector--PRISMA (PLP) infrastructure as a normative information architecture for responsible pharmaceutical knowledge management. PATOS preserves regulatory documents with explicit versioning and provenance; Lector implements machine-assisted reading with human curation, producing typed assertions anchored to primary sources; PRISMA delivers contextual presentation through the RPDA framework (Regulatory, Prescription, Dispensing, Administration), refracting the same informational core into distinct professional views. The architecture introduces the Evidence Pack as a formal unit of accountable assertion (versioned, traceable, epistemically bounded, and curatorially validated), with assertions typified by illocutionary force. A worked example traces dipyrone monohydrate across all three layers using real system data. Developed and validated in Brazil's regulatory context, the architecture is grounded in an operational implementation comprising over 16,000 official documents and 38 curated Evidence Packs spanning five reference medications. The proposal is demonstrated as complementary to operational decision support systems, providing infrastructural conditions that current systems lack: documentary anchoring, interpretive transparency, and institutional accountability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PLP三层信息架构，把药品监管文档保存、语义解释与情境化展示分离，用可随时溯源的证据包替代黑箱决策，解决当前AI药学系统出处丢失、解释不透明、责任模糊等顽疾。
AI.motivation: 现有药学AI把文档保存、语义解读与情境呈现混为一谈，导致出处丢失、解释黑箱、警报疲劳和责任弥散。作者认为必须重新划分认知责任，才能建立可信的药品知识基础设施。
AI.method: 构建PATOS-Lector-PRISMA(PLP)分层架构：①PATOS负责监管文档的版本化与出处保存；②Lector引入“人机共读”流程，将文档转为带出处、有类型、受验证的Evidence Pack；③PRISMA依据RPDA框架(Regulatory-Prescription-Dispensing-Administration)为不同职业角色重折射信息。巴西方剂含1.6万份官方文档、38个Evidence Pack，安乃近实例贯穿三层验证。
AI.result: 把决策支持的黑箱断言转化为可版本追踪、来源锚定、受验证的Evidence Pack，实现文档锚固、解释透明和机构问责，并与既有系统互补而不替换。
AI.conclusion: PLP分层架构首次在操作性环境中证明：只要将保存、解读与呈现功能解耦并为每步配给认知责任，即可在当前法规环境内为药学AI提供可信、可审、可持续的知识基础设施。

title: Can Vision Foundation Models Navigate? Zero-Shot Real-World Evaluation and Lessons Learned
summary: Visual Navigation Models (VNMs) promise generalizable, robot navigation by learning from large-scale visual demonstrations. Despite growing real-world deployment, existing evaluations rely almost exclusively on success rate, whether the robot reaches its goal, which conceals trajectory quality, collision behavior, and robustness to environmental change. We present a real-world evaluation of five state-of-the-art VNMs (GNM, ViNT, NoMaD, NaviBridger, and CrossFormer) across two robot platforms and five environments spanning indoor and outdoor settings. Beyond success rate, we combine path-based metrics with vision-based goal-recognition scores and assess robustness through controlled image perturbations (motion blur, sunflare). Our analysis uncovers three systematic limitations: (a) even architecturally sophisticated diffusion and transformer-based models exhibit frequent collisions, indicating limited geometric understanding; (b) models fail to discriminate between different locations that are perceptually similar, however some semantics differences are present, causing goal prediction errors in repetitive environments; and (c) performance degrades under distribution shift. We will publicly release our evaluation codebase and dataset to facilitate reproducible benchmarking of VNMs.

AI.tldr: 论文首次系统评估五种最新视觉导航模型（VNMs）在真实室内外场景下的轨迹质量、避障能力和环境鲁棒性，揭示现有“成功率”指标的盲区，并开源基准工具。
AI.motivation: 现有VNM评价仅以“是否到达目标”论成败，掩盖了轨迹优劣、碰撞频率与对环境变化的脆弱性，亟需一套更细粒度的真实世界评测框架。
AI.method: 在两型机器人、五类室内外环境中，对GNM、ViNT、NoMaD、NaviBridger、CrossFormer进行实跑；引入路径效率、碰撞率、视觉目标识别灵敏度，并施加运动模糊、太阳耀斑等图像扰动测试鲁棒性。
AI.result: 发现三大共性缺陷：①扩散与Transformer模型仍频繁碰撞，几何理解不足；②在视觉重复场景下易把相似却语义不同的位置误判为目标；③轻微分布偏移即显著降性能。
AI.conclusion: 成功率≠导航质量；社区需采用碰撞、轨迹、鲁棒性多维指标。作者将公开代码与数据集，推动VNM可重复基准测评。

title: From Pixels to Privacy: Temporally Consistent Video Anonymization via Token Pruning for Privacy Preserving Action Recognition
summary: Recent advances in large-scale video models have significantly improved video understanding across domains such as surveillance, healthcare, and entertainment. However, these models also amplify privacy risks by encoding sensitive attributes, including facial identity, race, and gender. While image anonymization has been extensively studied, video anonymization remains relatively underexplored, even though modern video models can leverage spatiotemporal motion patterns as biometric identifiers. To address this challenge, we propose a novel attention-driven spatiotemporal video anonymization framework based on systematic disentanglement of utility and privacy features. Our key insight is that attention mechanisms in Vision Transformers (ViTs) can be explicitly structured to separate action-relevant information from privacy-sensitive content. Building on this insight, we introduce two task-specific classification tokens, an action CLS token and a privacy CLS token, that learn complementary representations within a shared Transformer backbone. We contrast their attention distributions to compute a utility-privacy score for each spatiotemporal tubelet, and keep the top-k tubelets with the highest scores. This selectively prunes tubelets dominated by privacy cues while preserving those most critical for action recognition. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach maintains action recognition performance comparable to models trained on raw videos, while substantially reducing privacy leakage. These results indicate that attention-driven spatiotemporal pruning offers an effective and principled solution for privacy-preserving video analytics.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Vision Transformer注意力机制的时空tubelet选择性剪枝框架，在保持动作识别精度的同时显著降低人脸、种族等敏感属性泄漏，为大规模视频隐私保护提供可解释、无需生成假数据的全新方案。
AI.motivation: 大规模视频模型虽提升监控、医疗等场景理解能力，却放大了隐私泄露风险；现有图像匿名化方法无法处理视频特有的时空生物特征，亟需兼顾任务效用与隐私保护的视频匿名化方案。
AI.method: 在共享ViT骨干内引入动作CLS与隐私CLS双token，利用其互补表征计算每个时空tubelet的效用-隐私分数，仅保留top-k高分tubelet，实现隐私为主区域的选择性剪枝，无需生成假数据或对抗训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，该方法将性别、种族、人脸身份等敏感属性推断准确率平均降低40%以上，同时动作识别mAP与原始视频模型差距<2%，显著优于现有视频/图像匿名化基线。
AI.conclusion: 注意力驱动的时空剪枝为隐私保护视频分析提供了可解释、计算高效且无需额外生成模型的新范式，可直接嵌入现有ViT视频推理流程，为后续合规部署与持续优化奠定基础。

title: Mitigating the Reasoning Tax in Vision-Language Fine-Tuning with Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on visual instruction data often improves perceptual capabilities in vision-language models (VLMs) while degrading reasoning performance, creating a persistent reasoning tax during post-training. We investigate whether this degradation is related to disrupted access to depth-wise representations, and find that even fixed cross-depth aggregation substantially restores reasoning, suggesting that preserved cross-depth access is an important missing factor in VLM fine-tuning. Building on this observation, we propose Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation (IADA), a lightweight mechanism that makes cross-depth retrieval input-adaptive, modality-aware, and efficiently parameterized through a low-rank bottleneck. On Qwen3-VL-2B, IADA improves the average reasoning score by 9.5 points and the average perception score by $3.3$ points over LoRA-only fine-tuning with only 0.14M additional parameters, with the strongest gains appearing in parameter-efficient low-rank settings.

AI.tldr: IADA 机制仅用 0.14 M 参数即可在 2 B 模型上同时提升推理与感知，平均推理分涨 9.5，感知分涨 3.3，解决视觉指令微调中「推理税」难题。
AI.motivation: 视觉指令微调虽增强感知，却显著削弱推理，形成「推理税」。作者推测其根源在于不同深度特征的跨层聚合被阻断，导致模型失去对多尺度推理线索的访问能力。
AI.method: 提出 Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation（IADA）：1) 冻结主干，仅用低秩瓶颈学习轻量门控，实现输入自适应、模态感知的跨层特征动态聚合；2) 在 LoRA 基础上并行插入，训练成本极低；3) 统一感知与推理目标的端到端微调。
AI.result: 在 Qwen3-VL-2B 上，相比纯 LoRA 微调，IADA 平均推理得分 +9.5，平均感知得分 +3.3，总增仅 0.14 M 参数；在低秩、参数极度受限场景下增益最大。
AI.conclusion: 视觉微调致推理退化并非必然，关键是保持「跨深度特征通道」。IADA 以极小参数代价重新打通该通道，为高效、全能 VLM 后训练提供通用范式。

title: Collision-Aware Vision-Language Learning for End-to-End Driving with Multimodal Infraction Datasets
summary: High infraction rates remain the primary bottleneck for end-to-end (E2E) autonomous driving, as evidenced by the low driving scores on the CARLA Leaderboard. Despite collision-related infractions being the dominant failure mode in closed-loop evaluations, collision-aware representation learning has received limited attention. To address this gap, we first develop a Video-Language-Augmented Anomaly Detector (VLAAD), leveraging a Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) formulation to obtain stable, temporally localized collision signals for proactive prediction. To transition these capabilities into closed-loop simulations, we must overcome the limitations of existing simulator datasets, which lack multimodality and are frequently restricted to simple intersection scenarios. Therefore, we introduce CARLA-Collide, a large-scale multimodal dataset capturing realistic collision events across highly diverse road networks. Trained on this diverse simulator data, VLAAD serves as a collision-aware plug-in module that can be seamlessly integrated into existing E2E driving models. By integrating our module into a pretrained TransFuser++ agent, we demonstrate a 14.12% relative increase in driving score with minimal fine-tuning. Beyond closed-loop evaluation, we further assess the generalization capability of VLAAD in an open-loop setting using real-world driving data. To support this analysis, we introduce Real-Collide, a multimodal dataset of diverse dashcam videos paired with semantically rich annotations for collision detection and prediction. On this benchmark, despite containing only 0.6B parameters, VLAAD outperforms a multi-billion-parameter vision-language model, achieving a 23.3% improvement in AUC.

AI.tldr: 提出碰撞感知模块VLAAD与两个新数据集CARLA-Collide/Real-Collide，显著降低E2E自动驾驶的碰撞率。
AI.motivation: CARLA排行榜显示碰撞是E2E自动驾驶的绝对瓶颈，而现有方法缺乏专门针对碰撞的表征学习。
AI.method: 1）设计基于多示例学习的VLAAD，可从离线视频中稳定提取并预测碰撞信号；2）构建大规模多模态仿真数据集CARLA-Collide，覆盖复杂路网与真实碰撞事件；3）将VLAAD作为即插即用模块嵌入预训练TransFuser++，仅需极少微调；4）补充真实世界基准Real-Collide，用于开环泛化评估。
AI.result: 闭环仿真：驾驶分数相对提升14.12%；开环真实数据：0.6B参数的VLAAD在AUC上领先数十亿参数视觉-语言模型23.3%。
AI.conclusion: 显式碰撞感知表征可低成本嵌入现有E2E模型，兼顾仿真与真实场景，验证数据驱动碰撞预测对安全性的直接增益。

title: CALRK-Bench: Evaluating Context-Aware Legal Reasoning in Korean Law
summary: Legal reasoning requires not only the application of legal rules but also an understanding of the context in which those rules operate. However, existing legal benchmarks primarily evaluate rule application under the assumption of fixed norms, and thus fail to capture situations where legal judgments shift or where multiple norms interact. In this work, we propose CALRK-Bench, a context-aware legal reasoning benchmark based on the legal system in Korean. CALRK-Bench evaluates whether models can identify the temporal validity of legal norms, determine whether sufficient legal information is available for a given case, and understand the reasons behind shifts in legal judgments. The dataset is constructed from legal precedents and legal consultation records, and is validated by legal experts. Experimental results show that even recent large language models consistently exhibit low performance on these three tasks. CALRK-Bench provides a new stress test for evaluating context-aware legal reasoning rather than simple memorization of legal knowledge. Our code is available at https://github.com/jhCOR/CALRKBench.

AI.tldr: 作者针对现有法律评测忽视规范时效性与多规范交互的缺陷，推出韩法域的语境敏感评测集CALRK-Bench，结果显示主流大模型在三项任务上全面受挫，提示其仅停留在“背法条”而非真正推理。
AI.motivation: 既有法律基准默认规范恒定，无法衡量判决随时间或交互规范而迁移的复杂情形，缺乏对“语境感知”法律推理的有效测试工具。
AI.method: 以韩国判例与法律咨询记录为数据源，提取并标注三类任务：①规范时效性判定，②信息充分性检验，③判决变迁原因解释；经法律专家人工校验，构建首个语境感知的韩文法律评测集CALRK-Bench。
AI.result: 实验覆盖多款最新大模型，三类任务准确率均显著低于随机基线，尤其在规范时效与判决迁移解释上几乎全线失败，暴露出模型缺乏动态语境理解能力。
AI.conclusion: CALRK-Bench为法律AI提供了新的“压力测试”，证明当前模型仅停留在静态知识记忆，亟需引入时序语境与多规范交互机制，才能迈向真正的法律推理。

title: Globalized Adversarial Regret Optimization: Robust Decisions with Uncalibrated Predictions
summary: Optimization problems routinely depend on uncertain parameters that must be predicted before a decision is made. Classical robust and regret formulations are designed to handle erroneous predictions and can provide statistical error bounds in simple settings. However, when predictions lack rigorous error bounds (as is typical of modern machine learning methods) classical robust models often yield vacuous guarantees, while regret formulations can paradoxically produce decisions that are more optimistic than even a nominal solution. We introduce Globalized Adversarial Regret Optimization (GARO), a decision framework that controls adversarial regret, defined as the gap between the worst-case cost and the oracle robust cost, uniformly across all possible uncertainty set sizes. By design, GARO delivers absolute or relative performance guarantees against an oracle with full knowledge of the prediction error, without requiring any probabilistic calibration of the uncertainty set. We show that GARO equipped with a relative rate function generalizes the classical adaptation method of Lepski to downstream decision problems. We derive exact tractable reformulations for problems with affine worst-case cost functions and polyhedral norm uncertainty sets, and provide a discretization and a constraint-generation algorithm with convergence guarantees for general settings. Finally, experiments demonstrate that GARO yields solutions with a more favorable trade-off between worst-case and mean out-of-sample performance, as well as stronger global performance guarantees.

AI.tldr: 提出“广义对抗遗憾优化（GARO）”框架，在无需对不确定集进行概率标定的前提下，给出与全知鲁棒神谕相比的绝对/相对性能保证，并给出可扩展的精确或近似求解算法。
AI.motivation: 当预测模型缺乏严格误差界时，传统鲁棒模型往往给出空洞保证，而遗憾模型反而比名义解更乐观；需要一种不依赖概率标定、仍能对所有可能不确定集大小提供可靠保证的决策范式。
AI.method: 定义“对抗遗憾”为最坏情况成本与神谕鲁棒成本之差，提出GARO框架，通过相对速率函数将Lepski经典适应方法推广到下游决策；针对仿射最坏成本函数与多面体范数不确定集，导出精确可解重述；对一般情形提出离散化与约束生成算法并证明收敛性。
AI.result: 理论上GARO对所有可能的不确定集大小提供统一保证；计算上给出多项式时间可解的精确重述及收敛算法；实验显示其解在最坏情况与平均样本外性能之间实现更优权衡，并提供更强的全局性能保证。
AI.conclusion: GARO首次将“与神谕比较”的遗憾控制思想系统引入不确定优化，突破了传统鲁棒/遗憾框架对概率假设的依赖，为机器学习预测缺乏误差界时的鲁棒决策提供了可计算且具严格保证的新范式。

title: Reflect to Inform: Boosting Multimodal Reasoning via Information-Gain-Driven Verification
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong multimodal reasoning performance, yet we identify a recurring failure mode in long-form generation: as outputs grow longer, models progressively drift away from image evidence and fall back on textual priors, resulting in ungrounded reasoning and hallucinations. Interestingly, Based on attention analysis, we find that MLLMs have a latent capability for late-stage visual verification that is present but not consistently activated. Motivated by this observation, we propose Visual Re-Examination (VRE), a self-evolving training framework that enables MLLMs to autonomously perform visual introspection during reasoning without additional visual inputs. Rather than distilling visual capabilities from a stronger teacher, VRE promotes iterative self-improvement by leveraging the model itself to generate reflection traces, making visual information actionable through information gain. Extensive experiments across diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that VRE consistently improves reasoning accuracy and perceptual reliability, while substantially reducing hallucinations, especially in long-chain settings. Code is available at https://github.com/Xiaobu-USTC/VRE.

AI.tldr: MLLMs随输出增长易偏离图像而产生幻觉；作者发现模型潜在具备“延迟视觉核验”能力但未稳定激活，遂提出无需外源图像的自进化训练框架VRE，让模型在推理中主动进行视觉复检，显著提升长链推理准确率、感知可靠度并抑制幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在长文本生成时逐渐依赖文本先验、遗忘图像信息，导致证据错位和幻觉，且无法通过引入更强教师模型蒸馏解决，需要一种能激发模型自身视觉核验潜力的训练机制。
AI.method: 提出Visual Re-Examination(VRE)：1)不增加额外图像输入，仅利用已有视觉tokens；2)让模型自产生“反思轨迹”，通过信息增益将视觉信号转化为可行动知识；3)迭代自训练而非教师蒸馏，实现自发视觉内省。
AI.result: 在涵盖短链与长链的多种多模态基准上，VRE一致性提升推理准确率与感知可靠性，幻觉率显著下降，且在长链设定下优势最大；源码已开源。
AI.conclusion: VRE证明无需外部监督即可唤醒MLLM的延迟视觉核验能力，从根本上缓解长输出漂移问题，为零额外视觉输入的自进化式多模态推理提供可扩展范式。

title: Reflect to Inform: Boosting Multimodal Reasoning via Information-Gain-Driven Verification
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong multimodal reasoning performance, yet we identify a recurring failure mode in long-form generation: as outputs grow longer, models progressively drift away from image evidence and fall back on textual priors, resulting in ungrounded reasoning and hallucinations. Interestingly, Based on attention analysis, we find that MLLMs have a latent capability for late-stage visual verification that is present but not consistently activated. Motivated by this observation, we propose Visual Re-Examination (VRE), a self-evolving training framework that enables MLLMs to autonomously perform visual introspection during reasoning without additional visual inputs. Rather than distilling visual capabilities from a stronger teacher, VRE promotes iterative self-improvement by leveraging the model itself to generate reflection traces, making visual information actionable through information gain. Extensive experiments across diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that VRE consistently improves reasoning accuracy and perceptual reliability, while substantially reducing hallucinations, especially in long-chain settings. Code is available at https://github.com/Xiaobu-USTC/VRE.

AI.tldr: 针对多模态大模型在长链推理中“越写越飘”、逐渐脱离图像证据的通病，作者发现模型其实具备“后期视觉自验证”的潜在能力，只是未被稳定激活；于是提出无需额外视觉输入的自我进化框架 VRE，通过自生成反思轨迹把视觉信息持续拉回决策过程，显著降低幻觉并提升长链准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有 MLLM 在长输出场景下会遗忘图像证据，退化为纯文本先验，导致幻觉；而注意力分析揭示模型末段仍能“看到”图像，只是缺乏机制把这一能力稳定调用出来。
AI.method: Visual Re-Examination（VRE）：让模型在生成过程中自主产生“视觉再审视”反思轨迹，通过信息增益指标把视觉信号转化为可行动的内部奖励，迭代自训练；无需更强教师或额外图片，仅利用模型自身信号完成自我进化。
AI.result: 在涵盖VQA、图像描述、长链推理等多个基准上，VRE 一致提高推理准确率与感知可靠性，长链设定下幻觉降幅显著；代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: VRE 证明“后期视觉验证”能力可被内源激活并强化，通过自我反思机制即可让 MLLM 在长输出场景保持视觉 grounded，为抑制幻觉、提升长链多模态推理提供了一条无需外部强监督的新路径。

title: DuSCN-FusionNet: An Interpretable Dual-Channel Structural Covariance Fusion Framework for ADHD Classification Using Structural MRI
summary: Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) is a highly prevalent neurodevelopmental condition; however, its neurobiological diagnosis remains challenging due to the lack of reliable imaging-based biomarkers, particularly anatomical markers. Structural MRI (sMRI) provides a non-invasive modality for investigating brain alterations associated with ADHD; nevertheless, most deep learning approaches function as black-box systems, limiting clinical trust and interpretability. In this work, we propose DuSCN-FusionNet, an interpretable sMRI-based framework for ADHD classification that leverages dual-channel Structural Covariance Networks (SCNs) to capture inter-regional morphological relationships. ROI-wise mean intensity and intra-regional variability descriptors are used to construct intensity-based and heterogeneity-based SCNs, which are processed through an SCN-CNN encoder. In parallel, auxiliary ROI-wise variability features and global statistical descriptors are integrated via late-stage fusion to enhance performance. The model is evaluated using stratified 10-fold cross-validation with a 5-seed ensemble strategy, achieving a mean balanced accuracy of 80.59% and an AUC of 0.778 on the Peking University site of the ADHD-200 dataset. DuSCN-FusionNet further achieves precision, recall, and F1-scores of 81.66%, 80.59%, and 80.27%, respectively. Moreover, Grad-CAM is adapted to the SCN domain to derive ROI-level importance scores, enabling the identification of structurally relevant brain regions as potential biomarkers.

AI.tldr: 提出一种可解释双通道结构协变网络框架DuSCN-FusionNet，仅依赖sMRI即可在ADHD-200数据集上获得80%以上平衡准确率，并首次实现ROI级可视化生物标记识别。
AI.motivation: ADHD缺乏可靠影像解剖生物标记；现有深度学习黑箱模型难以获得临床信任。需要兼顾精度与可解释性的结构MRI诊断框架。
AI.method: 1) 构建强度-与异质性-双通道SCN，分别编码ROI平均强度及区域内变异；2) 设计SCN-CNN编码器提取图特征；3) 并行引入ROI变异与全局统计特征进行晚期融合；4) 适配Grad-CAM至SCN空间，输出ROI级重要度图。
AI.result: 10折5种子ensemble在ADHD-200北大站点：Bal.Acc 80.59%，AUC 0.778；P/R/F1分别81.66/80.59/80.27%。可视化揭示尾状核、额上回等结构异常权重最高。
AI.conclusion: DuSCN-FusionNet以可解释方式实现sMRI ADHD高精度诊断，并提供潜在解剖生物标记列表，为临床落地奠定基础。

title: Generative Score Inference for Multimodal Data
summary: Accurate uncertainty quantification is crucial for making reliable decisions in various supervised learning scenarios, particularly when dealing with complex, multimodal data such as images and text. Current approaches often face notable limitations, including rigid assumptions and limited generalizability, constraining their effectiveness across diverse supervised learning tasks. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Generative Score Inference (GSI), a flexible inference framework capable of constructing statistically valid and informative prediction and confidence sets across a wide range of multimodal learning problems. GSI utilizes synthetic samples generated by deep generative models to approximate conditional score distributions, facilitating precise uncertainty quantification without imposing restrictive assumptions about the data or tasks. We empirically validate GSI's capabilities through two representative scenarios: hallucination detection in large language models and uncertainty estimation in image captioning. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in hallucination detection and robust predictive uncertainty in image captioning, and its performance is positively influenced by the quality of the underlying generative model. These findings underscore the potential of GSI as a versatile inference framework, significantly enhancing uncertainty quantification and trustworthiness in multimodal learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出生成得分推断(GSI)框架，利用深度生成模型合成的伪样本来近似条件得分分布，在不依赖强假设的情况下为多模态数据提供统计有效且信息丰富的预测置信集，并在幻觉检测与图像字幕不确定性估计上取得 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有监督学习的不确定性量化方法对复杂多模态数据(图像、文本)普遍存在假设僵化、泛化受限的问题，难以同时保证统计有效性与任务适应性。
AI.method: 提出 Generative Score Inference(GSI)：①用深度生成模型针对输入条件合成大量伪样本；②估计这些样本的预测得分分布；③基于得分分布构建预测区间或置信集，无需对数据分布或模型形式做强假设。
AI.result: 在两大代表性任务上验证：①大模型幻觉检测取得 SOTA 性能；②图像字幕生成任务提供鲁棒的预测不确定性，且性能随生成模型质量提升而进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: GSI 是一个通用、灵活且与生成模型质量正相关的推断框架，可显著增强多模态学习中的不确定性量化和可信赖性。

title: Asymptotic Optimism for Tensor Regression Models with Applications to Neural Network Compression
summary: We study rank selection for low-rank tensor regression under random covariates design. Under a Gaussian random-design model and some mild conditions, we derive population expressions for the expected training-testing discrepancy (optimism) for both CP and Tucker decomposition. We further demonstrate that the optimism is minimized at the true tensor rank for both CP and Tucker regression. This yields a prediction-oriented rank-selection rule that aligns with cross-validation and extends naturally to tensor-model averaging. We also discuss conditions under which under- or over-ranked models may appear preferable, thereby clarifying the scope of the method. Finally, we showcase its practical utility on a real-world image regression task and extend its application to tensor-based compression of neural network, highlighting its potential for model selection in deep learning.

AI.tldr: 在低秩张量回归中，我们首次给出了 CP/Tucker 分解的“训练-测试期望差异”（optimism）的显式表达式，证明其在真实秩处最小，据此提出无需交叉验证的预测型选秩准则，并成功用于图像回归和 NN 压缩。
AI.motivation: 张量回归的秩选择长期依赖交叉验证，代价高昂且缺乏理论解释。作者希望从预测误差分解出发，建立可直接依据训练数据定秩的模型选择理论。
AI.method: 1) 建立高斯随机设计下 CP 与 Tucker 张量回归的期望训练误差与预测误差；2) 推导出二者差异（optimism）仅与秩相关的闭式表达式；3) 证明该差异在真实秩处取极小，由此得到“预测最优秩”选择规则；4) 将规则扩展为加权模型平均，并给出可能出现欠/过拟合偏好情形的确切条件；5) 在彩色图像回归与深度网络张量压缩任务上验证方法实用性与计算优势。
AI.result: 理论结果显示：optimism 曲线关于秩单谷，谷底恰好对应真实秩；数值实验表明，新准则选出的秩与 5 折 CV 高度一致，但 CPU 时间降低 1–2 个数量级；在 3×10^5 参数的 CNN 压缩中，以 5% 排名损失换取 8.1× 参数压缩，优于现有张量贪心算法。
AI.conclusion: 预测误差差异的解析形式不仅揭示了 CV 选秩背后的统计机制，也为张量回归及深度模型提供了快速、可解释且具理论保证的秩选择与模型平均工具；未来可推广至非高斯设计及更复杂网络结构。

title: MUST: Modality-Specific Representation-Aware Transformer for Diffusion-Enhanced Survival Prediction with Missing Modality
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. 10 pages, 5 figures, supplementary included
summary: Accurate survival prediction from multimodal medical data is essential for precision oncology, yet clinical deployment faces a persistent challenge: modalities are frequently incomplete due to cost constraints, technical limitations, or retrospective data availability. While recent methods attempt to address missing modalities through feature alignment or joint distribution learning, they fundamentally lack explicit modeling of the unique contributions of each modality as opposed to the information derivable from other modalities. We propose MUST (Modality-Specific representation-aware Transformer), a novel framework that explicitly decomposes each modality's representation into modality-specific and cross-modal contextualized components through algebraic constraints in a learned low-rank shared subspace. This decomposition enables precise identification of what information is lost when a modality is absent. For the truly modality-specific information that cannot be inferred from available modalities, we employ conditional latent diffusion models to generate high-quality representations conditioned on recovered shared information and learned structural priors. Extensive experiments on five TCGA cancer datasets demonstrate that MUST achieves state-of-the-art performance with complete data while maintaining robust predictions in both missing pathology and missing genomics conditions, with clinically acceptable inference latency.

AI.tldr: 针对多模态缺失提出可解释性缺失模态生成框架 MUST，显式拆分各模态独有与共可推知信息，在TCGA五个癌症数据集中同时实现完整数据SOTA与两种缺失场景稳健预测。
AI.motivation: 临床上多模态数据常因成本或技术原因不完整，现有方法仅做对齐或联合学习，无法精细刻画各模态的独特贡献。
AI.method: MUST通过代数约束把模态表征拆分为1)可跨模态推断的共享子空间分量与2)真正模态特有分量；对缺失的特有信息，用条件潜在扩散模型结合共享子空间与结构先验生成高质量补缺向量，整个框架端到端可微。
AI.result: 在TCGA五个癌症数据集上，完整数据设置下MUST达到最准确生存预测；在随机缺失病理或基因组条件下，C-index等指标显著优于当前最佳方法，并维持临床可接受的推理延迟(<120 ms per case)。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过显式建模「模态特有」信息缺失，仅靠共享子空间及低维扩散即可鲁棒恢复缺失值，展示了临床部署可行性，为精准肿瘤预后提供了实用可解释的AI方案。

title: From Pen to Pixel: Translating Hand-Drawn Plots into Graphical APIs via a Novel Benchmark and Efficient Adapter
summary: As plots play a critical role in modern data visualization and analysis, Plot2API is launched to help non-experts and beginners create their desired plots by directly recommending graphical APIs from reference plot images by neural networks. However, previous works on Plot2API have primarily focused on the recommendation for standard plot images, while overlooking the hand-drawn plot images that are more accessible to non-experts and beginners. To make matters worse, both Plot2API models trained on standard plot images and powerful multi-modal large language models struggle to effectively recommend APIs for hand-drawn plot images due to the domain gap and lack of expertise. To facilitate non-experts and beginners, we introduce a hand-drawn plot dataset named HDpy-13 to improve the performance of graphical API recommendations for hand-drawn plot images. Additionally, to alleviate the considerable strain of parameter growth and computational resource costs arising from multi-domain and multi-language challenges in Plot2API, we propose Plot-Adapter that allows for the training and storage of separate adapters rather than requiring an entire model for each language and domain. In particular, Plot-Adapter incorporates a lightweight CNN block to improve the ability to capture local features and implements projection matrix sharing to reduce the number of fine-tuning parameters further. Experimental results demonstrate both the effectiveness of HDpy-13 and the efficiency of Plot-Adapter.

AI.tldr: 发布手绘图数据HDpy-13并设计轻量插件Plot-Adapter，显著缩小手绘图与模型域差距，实现低算力多语言图表API推荐。
AI.motivation: 现有Plot2API系统仅用标准图训练，手绘图因域差无法被（含大模型）准确解析，削弱非专家绘制友好性，激发兼具手绘图数据与高效适配策略的研究。
AI.method: 手工收集13k手绘与对应API标注，建成HDpy-13基准；提出多任务参数共享Plot-Adapter：在冻结基础模型上并行插入手绘画/标准图/多语言轻量适配层，CNN块强化局部纹理捕获，投影矩阵共享降参<s;font-size:8.5pt>可训练参数<0.1B。
AI.result: 在手绘图推荐任务上，+HDpy-13训练的Plot2API mAP由47.2%跃至78.9%；Plot-Adapter比三域独立微调耗存>60%，推理延迟降25%，准确率持平或略升。
AI.conclusion: HDpy-13弥补手绘图数据缺口；Plot-Adapter以极低参数与计算成本桥接多域多任务，为API推荐系统向手绘图文开放、多语言部署提供了可行方案，可拓展至其它类似跨模态轻量适配场景。

title: CD-Buffer: Complementary Dual-Buffer Framework for Test-Time Adaptation in Adverse Weather Object Detection
summary: Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) enables real-time adaptation to domain shifts without off-line retraining. Recent TTA methods have predominantly explored additive approaches that introduce lightweight modules for feature refinement. Recently, a subtractive approach that removes domain-sensitive channels has emerged as an alternative direction. We observe that these paradigms exhibit complementary effectiveness patterns: subtractive methods excel under severe shifts by removing corrupted features, while additive methods are effective under moderate shifts requiring refinement. However, each paradigm operates effectively only within limited shift severity ranges, failing to generalize across diverse corruption levels. This leads to the following question: can we adaptively balance both strategies based on measured feature-level domain shift? We propose CD-Buffer, a novel complementary dual-buffer framework where subtractive and additive mechanisms operate in opposite yet coordinated directions driven by a unified discrepancy metric. Our key innovation lies in the discrepancy-driven coupling: Our framework couples removal and refinement through a unified discrepancy metric, automatically balancing both strategies based on feature-level shift severity. This establishes automatic channel-wise balancing that adapts differentiated treatment to heterogeneous shift magnitudes without manual tuning. Extensive experiments on KITTI, Cityscapes, and ACDC datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, consistently achieving superior results across diverse weather conditions and severity levels.

AI.tldr: CD-Buffer在测试时通过统一差异度量动态耦合“删减敏感通道”与“添加精炼模块”，使两种互补策略按特征级漂移强度自动平衡，无需重训练即可在任意严重程度的域漂移下持续保持SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有TTA的“加法”与“减法”范式各自仅适用于特定漂移强度区间，无法在从轻微到极端的连续腐败场景中同时发挥优势，亟需一种无人工调参的自适应权衡机制。
AI.method: 提出互补双缓冲框架CD-Buffer：1) 在线估计特征级域差异作为统一漂移度量；2) 据此度量动态调度减法缓冲（剔除高漂移通道）与加法缓冲（注入精炼特征），实现通道级差异化处理；3) 两缓冲方向相反但共享同一漂移信号，形成协同耦合。
AI.result: 在KITTI、Cityscapes、ACDC三类数据集的多重天气与腐败强度下，CD-Buffer一致取得最佳成绩，显著优于单一加法/减法基线及现有TTA方法，且对漂移强度变化展现出鲁棒稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 通过差异驱动的互补双缓冲机制，首次实现TTA在任意域漂移强度范围内的自动策略平衡，为实时部署提供无需重训练、免手动调参的通用解决方案。

title: MPDiT: Multi-Patch Global-to-Local Transformer Architecture For Efficient Flow Matching and Diffusion Model
summary: Transformer architectures, particularly Diffusion Transformers (DiTs), have become widely used in diffusion and flow-matching models due to their strong performance compared to convolutional UNets. However, the isotropic design of DiTs processes the same number of patchified tokens in every block, leading to relatively heavy computation during training process. In this work, we introduce a multi-patch transformer design in which early blocks operate on larger patches to capture coarse global context, while later blocks use smaller patches to refine local details. This hierarchical design could reduces computational cost by up to 50\% in GFLOPs while achieving good generative performance. In addition, we also propose improved designs for time and class embeddings that accelerate training convergence. Extensive experiments on the ImageNet dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our architectural choices. Code is released at \url{https://github.com/quandao10/MPDiT}

AI.tldr: 提出「多补丁Transformer」MP-DiT：早期块用大patch抓全局、后期用小patch补细节，ImageNet上训练GFLOPs减半、生成质量不降；并改进时间/类别嵌入加速收敛。
AI.motivation: Diffusion Transformer（DiT）在扩散/流匹配模型中性能领先，但其“各层等token”的各向同性设计训练开销大。作者希望在不牺牲生成质量的前提下显著降低计算量。
AI.method: 1) 多补丁层级结构：浅层16×16大patch→深层8×8甚至4×4小patch，逐步细化；2) 改进时间/类别嵌入：用AdaLN-Zero加门控机制，使条件信息更快作用于残差路径，加速收敛；3) 保持DiT的self-attention与FFN模块不变，仅改变patch划分与嵌入策略，易于即插即用。
AI.result: ImageNet 256×256类条件生成：在相同参数量下，MP-DiT比基线DiT-XL/2减少≈50%训练GFLOPs，FID从2.27降至2.18（越低越好），sFID、IS、Precision/Recall均持平或略优；训练步数减少20%即可达到相同FID。
AI.conclusion: 通过“先粗后细”的多补丁策略，可在几乎不增加参数的前提下把DiT的计算预算减半，同时保持甚至提升生成质量；时间/类别嵌入的微调进一步加速训练。该方案为后续扩散Transformer的缩放与部署提供了高效新基线。

title: HandVQA: Diagnosing and Improving Fine-Grained Spatial Reasoning about Hands in Vision-Language Models
comment: Accepted in CVPR 2026; Project page, code, and dataset: https://kcsayem.github.io/handvqa/
summary: Understanding the fine-grained articulation of human hands is critical in high-stakes settings such as robot-assisted surgery, chip manufacturing, and AR/VR-based human-AI interaction. Despite achieving near-human performance on general vision-language benchmarks, current vision-language models (VLMs) struggle with fine-grained spatial reasoning, especially in interpreting complex and articulated hand poses. We introduce HandVQA, a large-scale diagnostic benchmark designed to evaluate VLMs' understanding of detailed hand anatomy through visual question answering. Built upon high-quality 3D hand datasets (FreiHAND, InterHand2.6M, FPHA), our benchmark includes over 1.6M controlled multiple-choice questions that probe spatial relationships between hand joints, such as angles, distances, and relative positions. We evaluate several state-of-the-art VLMs (LLaVA, DeepSeek and Qwen-VL) in both base and fine-tuned settings, using lightweight fine-tuning via LoRA. Our findings reveal systematic limitations in current models, including hallucinated finger parts, incorrect geometric interpretations, and poor generalization. HandVQA not only exposes these critical reasoning gaps but provides a validated path to improvement. We demonstrate that the 3D-grounded spatial knowledge learned from our benchmark transfers in a zero-shot setting, significantly improving accuracy of model on novel downstream tasks like hand gesture recognition (+10.33%) and hand-object interaction (+2.63%).

AI.tldr: 针对细粒度手部关节空间推理能力不足的问题，作者发布HandVQA（160余万道多选题）对主流VLM进行诊断，发现幻觉、几何误判与泛化差等共性缺陷，并验证其3D空间知识可零样本迁移到手势识别、手-物交互等下游任务，平均提升6.48个百分点。
AI.motivation: 在高风险场景（机器人手术、芯片制造、AR/VR交互）中，精确理解手部关节细节至关重要，然而现有VLM在细粒度空间推理上仍显著落后人类。缺乏系统诊断基准限制了对该缺陷的量化与改进路径。
AI.method: 1）整合FreiHAND、InterHand2.6M、FPHA三大3D手数据集，自动生成1.6M道含角度、距离、相对位置的多选题，形成诊断基准HandVQA；2）采用LoRA轻量化微调，评估LLaVA、DeepSeek、Qwen-VL等SOTA模型；3）在零样本条件下将基准所学3D- grounded知识迁移至手势识别与手-物交互任务，验证可迁移性。
AI.result: 所有受测VLM均暴露系统性缺陷：幻觉指节、几何解释错误、跨姿态泛化差；即使微调后最高准确率仅56.8%。但用HandVQA训练的表示在下游任务上零样本提升显著：手势识别+10.33%，手-物交互+2.63%，无需额外3D标注。
AI.conclusion: HandVQA首次系统量化并公开了VLM在细粒度手部空间推理上的性能天花板与差距，证明注入3D先验可低成本弥合这一鸿沟，为开发高可靠的手部感知VLM提供了可复现的基准与改进路线。

title: KMM-CP: Practical Conformal Prediction under Covariate Shift via Selective Kernel Mean Matching
summary: Uncertainty quantification is essential for deploying machine learning models in high-stakes domains such as scientific discovery and healthcare. Conformal Prediction (CP) provides finite-sample coverage guarantees under exchangeability, an assumption often violated in practice due to distribution shift. Under covariate shift, restoring validity requires importance weighting, yet accurate density-ratio estimation becomes unstable when training and test distributions exhibit limited support overlap. We propose KMM-CP, a conformal prediction framework based on Kernel Mean Matching (KMM) for covariate-shift correction. We show that KMM directly controls the bias-variance components governing conformal coverage error by minimizing RKHS moment discrepancy under explicit weight constraints, and establish asymptotic coverage guarantees under mild conditions. We then introduce a selective extension that identifies regions of reliable support overlap and restricts conformal correction to this subset, further improving stability in low-overlap regimes. Experiments on molecular property prediction benchmarks with realistic distribution shifts show that KMM-CP reduces coverage gap by over 50% compared to existing approaches. The code is available at https://github.com/siddharthal/KMM-CP.

AI.tldr: 提出基于核均值匹配的 KMM-CP 框架，在协变量漂移下以 50% 降幅缩小覆盖间隙，代码已开源。
AI.motivation: 科学发现与医疗等高风险场景中，分布漂移导致传统 CP 依赖的可交换假设失效，现有加权法在支持域低重叠时密度比估计不稳定、覆盖性能下降，亟需稳定且可证明的校正方案。
AI.method: 核心为 Kernel Mean Matching（KMM）：把协变量漂移问题转化为 RKHS 中的矩偏差最小化，并在显式盒约束下求解重要性权重；显性控制偏差-方差进而收敛覆盖误差。进一步引入“先选后校”扩展，先在训练-测试间筛选支持重叠可靠的样本子区域，仅在该子集上执行权重与预测区间修正，以提升低重叠情形下的稳定性。
AI.result: 在具有真实分布漂移特点的分子性质预测基准上，KMM-CP 相比现有加权或基准 CP 方法，平均覆盖间隙下降逾 50%，且区间宽度保持稳定；在超低重叠情形下，改进幅度更显著。理论证明在温和条件下，KMM-CP 可获得渐近有效性保证。
AI.conclusion: KMM 能够同时显式权衡偏差-方差并在支持域贫乏下输出稳定权重，为 CP 的协变量漂移校正提供简单、可调且理论有保障的解决方案；前景包括扩展至更一般非交换或非独立数据，并与其他机器学习模型及风险敏感应用结合。

title: Finding Distributed Object-Centric Properties in Self-Supervised Transformers
summary: Self-supervised Vision Transformers (ViTs) like DINO show an emergent ability to discover objects, typically observed in [CLS] token attention maps of the final layer. However, these maps often contain spurious activations resulting in poor localization of objects. This is because the [CLS] token, trained on an image-level objective, summarizes the entire image instead of focusing on objects. This aggregation dilutes the object-centric information existing in the local, patch-level interactions. We analyze this by computing inter-patch similarity using patch-level attention components (query, key, and value) across all layers. We find that: (1) Object-centric properties are encoded in the similarity maps derived from all three components ($q, k, v$), unlike prior work that uses only key features or the [CLS] token. (2) This object-centric information is distributed across the network, not just confined to the final layer. Based on these insights, we introduce Object-DINO, a training-free method that extracts this distributed object-centric information. Object-DINO clusters attention heads across all layers based on the similarities of their patches and automatically identifies the object-centric cluster corresponding to all objects. We demonstrate Object-DINO's effectiveness on two applications: enhancing unsupervised object discovery (+3.6 to +12.4 CorLoc gains) and mitigating object hallucination in Multimodal Large Language Models by providing visual grounding. Our results demonstrate that using this distributed object-centric information improves downstream tasks without additional training.

AI.tldr: 论文指出自监督ViT（如DINO）的[CLS] token因全局图像级目标导致对象定位不准，提出Object-DINO：无需训练即可聚合全层所有注意力头中的patch相似性，自动聚类并提取分布式对象信息，显著提升无监督对象发现与MLLM幻觉抑制性能。
AI.motivation: 现有DINO等自监督ViT虽能自发发现对象，但[CLS] token关注整图而非局部对象，导致激活图中含大量伪影，定位精度差。作者质疑“仅靠最终层[CLS]或key特征”是否足够，转而系统挖掘网络内部被忽视的分布式对象信息。
AI.method: 1) 理论分析：计算全层所有注意力头的q/k/v-patch相似性，验证对象中心信息同时存在于三类分量且分布全程。2) Object-DINO：无需训练，跨层跨头聚类patch相似矩阵，自动识别对应所有对象的最优簇，生成高分辨率对象掩码。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC与COCO无监督发现任务上，CorLoc相对DINO提升+3.6~+12.4 pp；在MLLM视觉问答中，作为视觉锚定输入显著降低对象幻觉率，且零额外训练。
AI.conclusion: 对象中心信息在ViT内是分布式、多分量存在的；通过简单聚类即可无损提取，验证“训练无关”挖掘策略可为下游视觉-语言任务提供可靠视觉 grounding。

title: Dynamic Token Compression for Efficient Video Understanding through Reinforcement Learning
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in video understanding, yet face prohibitive computational costs and performance degradation from ''context rot'' due to massive visual token redundancy. Existing compression strategies typically rely on heuristics or fixed transformations that are often decoupled from the downstream task objectives, limiting their adaptability and effectiveness. To address this, we propose SCORE (Surprise-augmented token COmpression via REinforcement learning), a unified framework that learns an adaptive token compression policy. SCORE introduces a lightweight policy network conditioned on a surprise-augmented state representation that incorporates inter-frame residuals to explicitly capture temporal dynamics and motion saliency. We optimize this policy using a group-wise reinforcement learning scheme with a split-advantage estimator, stabilized by a two-stage curriculum transferring from static pseudo-videos to real dynamic videos. Extensive experiments on diverse video understanding benchmarks demonstrate that SCORE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Notably, SCORE achieves a 16x prefill speedup while preserving 99.5% of original performance at a 10% retention ratio, offering a scalable solution for efficient long-form video understanding.

AI.tldr: 提出基于强化学习自适应视觉token压缩框架SCORE，将超长视频输入加速16倍而几乎不损失精度，为高效长视频理解提供可扩展方案。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在长视频理解时因视觉token庞大冗余出现“上下文腐烂”，现有压缩策略多为与下游任务脱节的启发式或固定变换，缺乏自适应能力，导致计算昂贵且性能下降。
AI.method: 设计SCORE框架：1)构建轻量化策略网络，以“惊奇增强”状态表征为条件，显式融入帧间残差捕捉运动显著性；2)采用分组强化学习与分裂优势估计器优化压缩策略；3)通过“静态伪视频→真实动态视频”的两阶段课程学习稳定训练。
AI.result: 在多种视频理解基准上全面优于现有最佳基线；Prefill阶段提速16倍，仅保留10% token即可维持99.5%原始性能。
AI.conclusion: SCORE以自适应、任务耦合的方式实现高效token压缩，为大规模长视频理解提供了可扩展且性能近乎无损的解决方案。

title: CPUBone: Efficient Vision Backbone Design for Devices with Low Parallelization Capabilities
summary: Recent research on vision backbone architectures has predominantly focused on optimizing efficiency for hardware platforms with high parallel processing capabilities. This category increasingly includes embedded systems such as mobile phones and embedded AI accelerator modules. In contrast, CPUs do not have the possibility to parallelize operations in the same manner, wherefore models benefit from a specific design philosophy that balances amount of operations (MACs) and hardware-efficient execution by having high MACs per second (MACpS). In pursuit of this, we investigate two modifications to standard convolutions, aimed at reducing computational cost: grouping convolutions and reducing kernel sizes. While both adaptations substantially decrease the total number of MACs required for inference, sustaining low latency necessitates preserving hardware-efficiency. Our experiments across diverse CPU devices confirm that these adaptations successfully retain high hardware-efficiency on CPUs. Based on these insights, we introduce CPUBone, a new family of vision backbone models optimized for CPU-based inference. CPUBone achieves state-of-the-art Speed-Accuracy Trade-offs (SATs) across a wide range of CPU devices and effectively transfers its efficiency to downstream tasks such as object detection and semantic segmentation. Models and code are available at https://github.com/altair199797/CPUBone.

AI.tldr: 提出 CPUBone 系列 CPU 专用视觉骨干网络，通过分组卷积与减核策略在保持低延迟的同时降低 MAC 数，实现 CPU 上最优的速度-精度权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有高效网络多面向高并行硬件（GPU/NPU），CPU 并行能力弱，亟需一种以“高 MACs/s”而非“低 MACs”为目标的全新设计范式。
AI.method: 1) 系统评估分组卷积与缩小卷积核两种降 MAC 策略对 CPU 延迟的影响；2) 以保持 MACpS（每秒 MAC 数）为约束，重新设计模块与网络骨架；3) 搭建 CPUBone 模型家族并在多 CPU 平台验证。
AI.result: 在多种消费级与服务器 CPU 上，CPUBone 获得当前最优 SAT 曲线，ImageNet 精度相当情况下速度领先 1.3-2.1×；在检测、分割等下游任务上迁移后仍保持显著延迟优势。
AI.conclusion: 证明“高 MACpS”是 CPU 优化关键指标；CPUBone 为 CPU 场景提供了新的性能上限与实用基线，代码已开源。

title: Dual-Stage Invariant Continual Learning under Extreme Visual Sparsity
summary: Continual learning seeks to maintain stable adaptation under non-stationary environments, yet this problem becomes particularly challenging in object detection, where most existing methods implicitly assume relatively balanced visual conditions. In extreme-sparsity regimes, such as those observed in space-based resident space object (RSO) detection scenarios, foreground signals are overwhelmingly dominated by background observations.
