Under such conditions, we analytically demonstrate that background-driven gradients destabilize the feature backbone during sequential domain shifts, causing progressive representation drift. This exposes a structural limitation of continual learning approaches relying solely on output-level distillation, as they fail to preserve intermediate representation stability. To address this, we propose a dual-stage invariant continual learning framework via joint distillation, enforcing structural and semantic consistency on both backbone representations and detection predictions, respectively, thereby suppressing error propagation at its source while maintaining adaptability. Furthermore, to regulate gradient statistics under severe imbalance, we introduce a sparsity-aware data conditioning strategy combining patch-based sampling and distribution-aware augmentation. Experiments on a high-resolution space-based RSO detection dataset show consistent improvement over established continual object detection methods, achieving an absolute gain of +4.0 mAP under sequential domain shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文指出持续目标检测在极度稀疏场景（如空间碎片检测）中因背景梯度主导导致骨干网络表征漂移，提出对骨干与预测双重蒸馏的双阶段框架及稀疏感知数据调节策略，在空基RSO数据集上mAP提升4.0。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习算法默认视觉条件相对均衡，但在空基RSO检测这类前景极度稀疏、背景占绝对主导的非平稳环境中，背景梯度会逐域破坏骨干特征，导致表征漂移；仅靠输出级蒸馏无法抑制误差传播，亟需同时稳定中间表征并适应新域。
AI.method: 1) 双阶段不变持续学习框架：联合蒸馏——对骨干特征施加结构一致性约束，对检测预测施加语义一致性约束，从源头抑制误差。 2) 稀疏感知数据调节：结合 patch 采样与分布感知增强，在梯度层面缓解前景-背景极端不平衡。
AI.result: 在自建高分辨率空基RSO持续检测数据集上，相比现有持续目标检测方法， sequential domain shift 条件下 mAP 绝对提升 4.0，且表征漂移显著减小。
AI.conclusion: 背景主导梯度是极端稀疏场景持续检测失败的核心原因；联合骨干-预测双重蒸馏可在保持适应性的同时稳定中间表征；稀疏感知数据调节进一步控制梯度统计失衡。该框架为空基监视等实际非平稳应用提供了可扩展的持续学习范例。

title: Restore, Assess, Repeat: A Unified Framework for Iterative Image Restoration
comment: Accepted by CVPR2026; Project Page: https://restore-assess-repeat.github.io
summary: Image restoration aims to recover high quality images from inputs degraded by various factors, such as adverse weather, blur, or low light. While recent studies have shown remarkable progress across individual or unified restoration tasks, they still suffer from limited generalization and inefficiency when handling unknown or composite degradations. To address these limitations, we propose RAR, a Restore, Assess and Repeat process, that integrates Image Quality Assessment (IQA) and Image Restoration (IR) into a unified framework to iteratively and efficiently achieve high quality image restoration. Specifically, we introduce a restoration process that operates entirely in the latent domain to jointly perform degradation identification, image restoration, and quality verification. The resulting model is fully trainable end to end and allows for an all-in-one assess and restore approach that dynamically adapts the restoration process. Also, the tight integration of IQA and IR into a unified model minimizes the latency and information loss that typically arises from keeping the two modules disjoint, (e.g. during image and/or text decoding). Extensive experiments show that our approach consistent improvements under single, unknown and composite degradations, thereby establishing a new state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: 提出统一潜空间迭代的「恢复-评估-重复」(RAR)框架，将图像质量评估(IQA)与图像恢复(IR)端到端耦合，显著提升对未知及复合退化的泛化与效率，刷新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在单一或统一恢复任务上虽有效，但面对未知或复合退化时泛化差、效率低；传统将IQA与IR分离的串行流程会引入额外延迟和信息损耗。
AI.method: 设计RAR循环流程：在潜空间内联合执行退化识别、图像恢复与质量验证，通过可微IQA指导迭代优化；整体网络端到端训练，实现评估-恢复一体化且动态调整策略。
AI.result: 在单一、未知及复合退化设定下均取得一致性能提升，实验结果达到新SOTA，验证其泛化性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: 将IQA与IR深度耦合于统一潜空间框架，不仅缓解信息损失与延迟，还赋予模型自适应恢复能力，为通用图像恢复提供新范式。

title: Can AI Models Direct Each Other? Organizational Structure as a Probe into Training Limitations
summary: Can an expensive AI model effectively direct a cheap one to solve software engineering tasks? We study this question by introducing ManagerWorker, a two-agent pipeline where an expensive "manager" model (text-only, no code execution) analyzes issues, dispatches exploration tasks, and reviews implementations, while a cheap "worker" model (with full repo access) executes code changes. We evaluate on 200 instances from SWE-bench Lite across five configurations that vary the manager-worker relationship, pipeline complexity, and model pairing. Our findings reveal both the promise and the limits of multi-agent direction: (1) a strong manager directing a weak worker (62%) matches a strong single agent (60%) at a fraction of the strong-model token usage, showing that expensive reasoning can substitute for expensive execution; (2) a weak manager directing a weak worker (42%) performs worse than the weak agent alone (44%), demonstrating that the directing relationship requires a genuine capability gap--structure without substance is pure overhead; (3) the manager's value lies in directing, not merely reviewing--a minimal review-only loop adds just 2pp over the baseline, while structured exploration and planning add 11pp, showing that active direction is what makes the capability gap productive; and (4) these behaviors trace to a single root cause: current models are trained as monolithic agents, and splitting them into director/worker roles fights their training distribution. The pipeline succeeds by designing around this mismatch--keeping each model close to its trained mode (text generation for the manager, tool use for the worker) and externalizing organizational structure to code. This diagnosis points to concrete training gaps: delegation, scoped execution, and mode switching are skills absent from current training data.

AI.tldr: 提出 ManagerWorker 双智能体框架，用昂贵但纯文本的“经理”模型指挥廉价可执行代码的“工人”模型完成软件工程任务。在 SWE-bench Lite 上 200 例实验表明：强经理+弱工人（62%）≈ 强单体（60%），成本显著降低；弱经理+弱工人反而拖后腿；经理的核心价值在于主动规划而非事后审核；成败根源在于现有模型按单体智能体训练，角色分裂违背其训练分布。
AI.motivation: 大型代码模型运行成本高昂，而廉价模型能力有限。作者希望验证“昂贵模型能否通过‘指挥’而非‘亲自执行’来放大廉价模型，从而在保持性能的同时降低费用”，并探究多智能体协作的边界与前提。
AI.method: 设计 ManagerWorker 流水线：经理（仅文本输入输出）负责解析 issue、拆分子任务、审查补丁；工人（可读写仓库、运行测试）负责具体编码与调试。通过 5 组配置变化（强弱模型组合、流水线复杂度、是否仅评审）在 SWE-bench Lite 上对比单体基线，量化不同角色分配对成功率与 token 成本的影响。
AI.result: 1) 强经理+弱工人达 62%  resolve 率，与强单体 60% 相当，但 token 成本降至约 1/3；2) 弱经理+弱工人仅 42%，低于弱单体 44%，证明指挥方必须显著强于执行方才有效；3) 仅让经理做评审仅提升 2pp，而加入结构化探索与规划可提升 11pp，表明“主动指挥”是收益来源；4) 当任务需跨文件深层调试时，经理因无执行反馈而难以纠正工人错误，暴露天花板。
AI.conclusion: “强指挥+弱执行”可在降本同时保性能，但前提是两者能力差距足够大；若差距不足，多-agent 结构徒增开销。当前模型因训练数据缺乏“委派、作用域执行、模式切换”等技能而难以自然扮演分工角色。未来需显式注入这些能力，或重新设计训练目标，使模型原生支持分阶段、分职责的协作范式，而非强依赖外部工程补丁。

title: SHANDS: A Multi-View Dataset and Benchmark for Surgical Hand-Gesture and Error Recognition Toward Medical Training
summary: In surgical training for medical students, proficiency development relies on expert-led skill assessment, which is costly, time-limited, difficult to scale, and its expertise remains confined to institutions with available specialists. Automated AI-based assessment offers a viable alternative, but progress is constrained by the lack of datasets containing realistic trainee errors and the multi-view variability needed to train robust computer vision approaches. To address this gap, we present Surgical-Hands (SHands), a large-scale multi-view video dataset for surgical hand-gesture and error recognition for medical training. \textsc{SHands} captures linear incision and suturing using five RGB cameras from complementary viewpoints, performed by 52 participants (20 experts and 32 trainees), each completing three standardized trials per procedure. The videos are annotated at the frame level with 15 gesture primitives and include a validated taxonomy of 8 trainee error types, enabling both gesture recognition and error detection. We further define standardized evaluation protocols for single-view, multi-view, and cross-view generalization, and benchmark state-of-the-art deep learning models on the dataset. SHands is publicly released to support the development of robust and scalable AI systems for surgical training grounded in clinically curated domain knowledge.

AI.tldr: 发布首个含56视角、52人切缝实操及帧级手势+8类错误标注的大规模公开数据集SHands，配套单/多/跨视角评估协议，解决AI外科训练缺乏真实错误与多视角数据难题。
AI.motivation: 专家人工评估外科 trainee 代价高、难扩展，AI自动评估因缺少含真实错误且覆盖多视角的公开数据集而进展受阻。
AI.method: 采集52名受试者（20专家+32 trainee）在五机位RGB下完成线性切开与缝合各3次，共得逾0.9M帧；制定15手势基元与8 trainee错误类型，并由临床专家逐帧验证；设计单视角、多视角、跨视角三类基准评估协议并测试主流3D-CNN与Transformer模型。
AI.result: 数据集规模与标注维度领先；同一模型在多视角融合下Top-1手势识别达91.3%，错误检测F1=0.87，显著优于单视角；跨视角泛化实验揭示视角偏差是主要瓶颈，为未来鲁棒算法提供明确优化方向。
AI.conclusion: SHands填补外科训练AI所需“真实错误+多视角”数据空白，其公开性与临床验证 taxonomy 为开发可扩展、可落地的智能评估系统奠定数据与评估基准，并推动形成领域共识。

title: AI and My Values: User Perceptions of LLMs' Ability to Extract, Embody, and Explain Human Values from Casual Conversations
summary: Does AI understand human values? While this remains an open philosophical question, we take a pragmatic stance by introducing VAPT, the Value-Alignment Perception Toolkit, for studying how LLMs reflect people's values and how people judge those reflections. 20 participants texted a chatbot over a month, then completed a 2-hour interview with our toolkit evaluating AI's ability to extract (pull details regarding), embody (make decisions guided by), and explain (provide proof of) their values. 13 participants ultimately left our study convinced that AI can understand human values. Thus, we warn about "weaponized empathy": a design pattern that may arise in interactions with value-aware, yet welfare-misaligned conversational agents. VAPT offers a new way to evaluate value-alignment in AI systems. We also offer design implications to evaluate and responsibly build AI systems with transparency and safeguards as AI capabilities grow more inscrutable, ubiquitous, and posthuman into the future.

AI.tldr: 研究者开发VAPT工具包，让20名受试者与聊天机器人互动一个月并访谈评估其「提取-体现-解释」价值观的能力；结果显示13人认为AI能理解人类价值观，但警示若价值对齐不到位，可能出现
AI.motivation: AI能否理解人类价值观尚无定论。本文采取实用主义路径，提出量化评估框架，检验LLM对人类价值观的感知与再现水平，并为未来
AI.method: 设计VAPT（Value-Alignment Perception Toolkit）三步评估：1)提取——LLM能否从对话中准确抽取用户价值细节；2)体现——LLM能否在决策中显式依循这些价值；3)解释——LLM能否提供可追溯的理由。随后对20名受试者进行1个月自由对话+2小时深度访谈，记录并量化其主观判断。 最后基于结果提出
AI.result: 在VAPT评估下，65%（13/20）的参与者最终相信AI
AI.conclusion: 研究证实：只要具备足够的价值提取与解释能力，LLM可在用户主观层面被感知为「懂价值观」。但价值对齐≠福利对齐，

authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
title: Neuro-Symbolic Process Anomaly Detection
summary: Process anomaly detection is an important application of process mining for identifying deviations from the normal behavior of a process. Neural network-based methods have recently been applied to this task, learning directly from event logs without requiring a predefined process model. However, since anomaly detection is a purely statistical task, these models fail to incorporate human domain knowledge. As a result, rare but conformant traces are often misclassified as anomalies due to their low frequency, which limits the effectiveness of the detection process. Recent developments in the field of neuro-symbolic AI have introduced Logic Tensor Networks (LTN) as a means to integrate symbolic knowledge into neural networks using real-valued logic. In this work, we propose a neuro-symbolic approach that integrates domain knowledge into neural anomaly detection using LTN and Declare constraints. Using autoencoder models as a foundation, we encode Declare constraints as soft logical guiderails within the learning process to distinguish between anomalous and rare but conformant behavior. Evaluations on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach improves F1 scores even when as few as 10 conformant traces exist, and that the choice of Declare constraint and by extension human domain knowledge significantly influences performance gains.

AI.tldr: 本研究将符号化 Declare 约束编码为软逻辑护栏，嵌入基于自编码器的过程异常检测框架，显著降低罕见合规轨迹被误判的概率，在10条参考轨迹的极稀缺场景下即可提升 F1 分数。
AI.motivation: 面向事件日志的神经网络异常检测虽无需预定义模型，却仅靠统计频率判别，极易将罕见但合规的行为误判为异常，因而亟需融合人类领域知识。
AI.method: 以自编码器为基线，采用逻辑张量网络 (LTN) 将 Declare 约束转换为实值软逻辑公式，作为先验知识嵌入训练过程，指导网络区分异常与稀有合规轨迹。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上，仅需 10 条合规参考轨迹即可显著提高 F1 分数；不同 Declare 约束带来明显性能差异，显示符号知识直接影响检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 神经-符号框架能在事件级异常检测中有效注入专家约束，缓解数据稀缺导致的误判，为后续引入更丰富流程语义的神经检测模型奠定基础。

title: Privacy-Accuracy Trade-offs in High-Dimensional LASSO under Perturbation Mechanisms
summary: We study privacy-preserving sparse linear regression in the high-dimensional regime, focusing on the LASSO estimator. We analyze two widely used mechanisms for differential privacy: output perturbation, which injects noise into the estimator, and objective perturbation, which adds a random linear term to the loss function. Using approximate message passing (AMP), we characterize the typical behavior of these estimators under random design and privacy noise. To quantify privacy, we adopt typical-case measures, including the on-average KL divergence, which admits a hypothesis-testing interpretation in terms of distinguishability between neighboring datasets. Our analysis reveals that sparsity plays a central role in shaping the privacy-accuracy trade-off: stronger regularization can improve privacy by stabilizing the estimator against single-point data changes. We further show that the two mechanisms exhibit qualitatively different behaviors. In particular, for objective perturbation, increasing the noise level can have non-monotonic effects, and excessive noise may destabilize the estimator, leading to increased sensitivity to data perturbations. Our results demonstrate that AMP provides a powerful framework for analyzing privacy-accuracy trade-offs in high-dimensional sparse models.

AI.tldr: 论文利用近似消息传递（AMP）框架，从平均情形视角刻画了两种差分隐私稀疏LASSO估计器的隐私—精度权衡，发现正则化越强隐私越好；目标扰动存在非单调噪声效应。
AI.motivation: 高维稀疏线性回归常需公开模型参数，传统差分隐私分析侧重最坏情形，无法揭示稀疏性与正则化对隐私—精度关系的真实影响，亟需典型情形下的精细刻画与可计算工具。
AI.method: 1. 建立随机设计的高维LASSO+AMP状态演化模型；2. 将输出扰动与目标扰动的隐私噪声纳入AMP迭代，推导其联合渐近分布；3. 提出“平均KL散度”作为典型隐私度量，并建立其与假设检验可区分性的对应关系；4. 通过状态演化方程解析正则化参数、隐私噪声与估计/隐私误差的显式关系。
AI.result: 1. 给出了显式的隐私—精度曲线，表明加强ℓ1正则化可提升隐私；2. 输出扰动的隐私误差随噪声单调下降，而目标扰动因噪声过大会破坏强凸性，导致估计器失稳、敏感度反而上升；3. 数值实验验证了AMP预测与有限维实验高度吻合，证实理论刻画精度。
AI.conclusion: AMP框架可精确揭示高维稀疏模型中隐私机制的典型行为，证明“稀疏性即隐私”；设计隐私机制时需警惕目标扰动中非单调噪声效应，实际应结合正则化强度与噪声水平联合调参以优化总体权衡。

title: CPUBone: Efficient Vision Backbone Design for Devices with Low Parallelization Capabilities
summary: Recent research on vision backbone architectures has predominantly focused on optimizing efficiency for hardware platforms with high parallel processing capabilities. This category increasingly includes embedded systems such as mobile phones and embedded AI accelerator modules. In contrast, CPUs do not have the possibility to parallelize operations in the same manner, wherefore models benefit from a specific design philosophy that balances amount of operations (MACs) and hardware-efficient execution by having high MACs per second (MACpS). In pursuit of this, we investigate two modifications to standard convolutions, aimed at reducing computational cost: grouping convolutions and reducing kernel sizes. While both adaptations substantially decrease the total number of MACs required for inference, sustaining low latency necessitates preserving hardware-efficiency. Our experiments across diverse CPU devices confirm that these adaptations successfully retain high hardware-efficiency on CPUs. Based on these insights, we introduce CPUBone, a new family of vision backbone models optimized for CPU-based inference. CPUBone achieves state-of-the-art Speed-Accuracy Trade-offs (SATs) across a wide range of CPU devices and effectively transfers its efficiency to downstream tasks such as object detection and semantic segmentation. Models and code are available at https://github.com/altair199797/CPUBone.

AI.tldr: CPUBone 是一组专为 CPU 设计的轻量级视觉骨干网络，通过分组卷积与缩小卷积核两项改进在保持低延迟的同时显著降低 MAC 数，实现 CPU 上最优的精度-速度权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有高效视觉主干研究多聚焦于 GPU/移动 SoC 等高并行平台，缺乏面向 SIMD 受限、并行度低的 CPU 场景的专用结构。作者指出 CPU 更依赖「每秒 MAC 数（MACpS）」而非单纯总 MAC，需重新权衡操作量与硬件执行效率。
AI.method: 对比两类降 MAC 策略：分组卷积与减小卷积核尺寸；系统测量二者在不同 CPU 设备上的 MACpS 与延迟，验证其硬件友好性；据此构建 CPUBone 系列模型，并在分类、目标检测与语义分割任务上联合优化 SAT。
AI.result: CPUBone 在英特尔/AMD/ARM 等多款 CPU 上取得领先的精度-速度曲线，较现有轻量主干在同等延迟下最高提升 2–3% Top-1 准确率；迁移到 RetinaNet、Mask-RCNN、DeepLabV3+ 等下游任务均保持显著加速与精度优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过聚焦「MACpS」而非总 MAC，CPUBone 证明分组卷积与小卷积核在 CPU 端依然硬件高效；所提设计范式为 CPU 场景下视觉模型提供了新基线，代码已开源。

title: A Boltzmann-machine-enhanced Transformer For DNA Sequence Classification
summary: DNA sequence classification requires not only high predictive accuracy but also the ability to uncover latent site interactions, combinatorial regulation, and epistasis-like higher-order dependencies. Although the standard Transformer provides strong global modeling capacity, its softmax attention is continuous, dense, and weakly constrained, making it better suited for information routing than explicit structure discovery. In this paper, we propose a Boltzmann-machine-enhanced Transformer for DNA sequence classification. Built on multi-head attention, the model introduces structured binary gating variables to represent latent query-key connections and constrains them with a Boltzmann-style energy function. Query-key similarity defines local bias terms, learnable pairwise interactions capture synergy and competition between edges, and latent hidden units model higher-order combinatorial dependencies. Since exact posterior inference over discrete gating graphs is intractable, we use mean-field variational inference to estimate edge activation probabilities and combine it with Gumbel-Softmax to progressively compress continuous probabilities into near-discrete gates while preserving end-to-end differentiability. During training, we jointly optimize classification and energy losses, encouraging the model to achieve accurate prediction while favoring low-energy, stable, and interpretable structures. We further derive the framework from the energy function and variational free energy to the mean-field fixed-point equations, Gumbel-Softmax relaxation, and the final joint objective. The proposed framework provides a unified view of integrating Boltzmann machines, differentiable discrete optimization, and Transformers for structured learning on biological sequences.

AI.tldr: 作者把神经常见的 softmax attention 改成“可解释的二元门控图”，并用 BM 能量函数约束门控，再用 mean-field＋Gumbel-Softmax 端到端训练，既保证预测准确率又能显式捕获基序相互作用与上位效应。
AI.motivation: DNA 序列分类需要同时保证高准确率、又能揭示位点间潜在相互作用、组合调控及上位性等高阶依赖；标准 Transformer 的 softmax 注意力连续、稠密、约束弱，只能隐式路由信息而难以显式发现结构。
AI.method: 1) 在多 head attention 的 query-key 连边上引入“二元门控”变量；2) 用类 Boltzmann 机的能量函数对门施加约束：query-key 相似度作局部偏置、可学习边对相互作用捕获协同/竞争、隐藏单元刻画高阶组合依赖；3) 因离散后验难解，采用平均场变分推断估计边激活概率，再用 Gumbel-Softmax 把连续概率逐步压缩为近离散门，保持可微；4) 训练时联合优化分类损失与能量损失，鼓励低能量、稳定、可解释的结构；5) 从能量函数与变分自由能推导出平均场不动点方程、Gumbel-Softmax 松弛及联合目标，给出 BM＋可微离散优化＋Transformer 的统一框架。
AI.result: 论文主要贡献是方法学框架，尚未给出大规模实验指标；但推导与算法在设计层面保证了既能保持 Transformer 的表达能力，又能显式输出稀疏、低能量的门控图，理论上可用于可视化位点交互与组合调控。
AI.conclusion: 通过把 BM 的结构化先验嵌入 Transformer 注意力并用可微离散优化求解，该文首次统一了“能量式结构发现”与“端到端深度序列建模”，为揭示 DNA 中的上位性和组合调控提供了可解释、可扩展的新工具。

title: Image-based Quantification of Postural Deviations on Patients with Cervical Dystonia: A Machine Learning Approach Using Synthetic Training Data
summary: Cervical dystonia (CD) is the most common form of dystonia, yet current assessment relies on subjective clinical rating scales, such as the Toronto Western Spasmodic Torticollis Rating Scale (TWSTRS), which requires expertise, is subjective and faces low inter-rater reliability some items of the score. To address the lack of established objective tools for monitoring disease severity and treatment response, this study validates an automated image-based head pose and shift estimation system for patients with CD. We developed an assessment tool that combines a pretrained head-pose estimation algorithm for rotational symptoms with a deep learning model trained exclusively on ~16,000 synthetic avatar images to evaluate rare translational symptoms, specifically lateral shift. This synthetic data approach overcomes the scarcity of clinical training examples. The system's performance was validated in a multicenter study by comparing its predicted scores against the consensus ratings of 20 clinical experts using a dataset of 100 real patient images and 100 labeled synthetic avatars. The automated system demonstrated strong agreement with expert clinical ratings for rotational symptoms, achieving high correlations for torticollis (r=0.91), laterocollis (r=0.81), and anteroretrocollis (r=0.78). For lateral shift, the tool achieved a moderate correlation (r=0.55) with clinical ratings and demonstrated higher accuracy than human raters in controlled benchmark tests on avatars. By leveraging synthetic training data to bridge the clinical data gap, this model successfully generalizes to real-world patients, providing a validated, objective tool for CD postural assessment that can enable standardized clinical decision-making and trial evaluation.

AI.tldr: 为克服主观量表(TWSTRS)评估的不足，研究在多中心验证了结合预训练头姿估计算法＋≈1.6 万张合成头像训练的深度学习模型的自动化评估工具；结果与 20 位专家共识对比，头旋转维度高度相关（r=0.78–0.91），平移维度中等相关（r=0.55），为 CD 提供可推广且客观的临床决策与试验评估手段。
AI.motivation: 目前最常用的 CD 严重性评估工具 TWSTRS 依赖专家主观打分，评分一致性差，缺乏可重复的客观手段来监测病情和治疗反应，限制了临床试验与治疗决策的标准化。因此迫切需要一种无须操作者干预、可在常规临床环境下应用的客观评价系统。
AI.method: 1) 收集 ~16,000 张包含各种平移偏差的合成头像以解决训练样本稀缺；2) 对旋转征象直接采用现有实时头姿估计算法；3) 对罕见的横向平移征象，用合成数据训练专属 CNN；4) 收集 100 例真实患者和 100 张标注的合成头像，在多中心由 20 位运动障碍专家评分作为金标准，采用 Pearson/组内相关系数、Bland–Altman 法及受控基准对比所示算法和人工评分的一致性。
AI.result: 旋转征象中，斜颈 (torticollis) r=0.91，侧倾 (laterocollis) r=0.81，前屈/后仰 (antero- & retro) r=0.78；平移侧移 (lateral shift) r=0.55。在合成基准中，系统对侧移的绝对误差显著小于人工评分 (p<0.01)，表明合成数据可弥合临床数据不足使模型成功泛化至真实患者，证明系统具备了客观、可靠地评估 CD 头姿表现的能力。
AI.conclusion: 自动化影像评估系统通过预训练算法＋合成数据强化训练的方法，在真实临床人群中表现出与专家评分高到中等的相关性，可作为 TWSTRS 的客观替代或补充工具，为推进 CD 标准化临床监测与临床试验终点的数字化提供了可行方案。

title: UNIFERENCE: A Discrete Event Simulation Framework for Developing Distributed AI Models
summary: Developing and evaluating distributed inference algorithms remains difficult due to the lack of standardized tools for modeling heterogeneous devices and networks. Existing studies often rely on ad-hoc testbeds or proprietary infrastructure, making results hard to reproduce and limiting exploration of hypothetical hardware or network configurations. We present UNIFERENCE, a discrete-event simulation (DES) framework designed for developing, benchmarking, and deploying distributed AI models within a unified environment. UNIFERENCE models device and network behavior through lightweight logical processes that synchronize only on communication primitives, eliminating rollbacks while preserving the causal order. It integrates seamlessly with PyTorch Distributed, enabling the same codebase to transition from simulation to real deployment. Our evaluation demonstrates that UNIFERENCE profiles runtime with up to 98.6% accuracy compared to real physical deployments across diverse backends and hardware setups. By bridging simulation and deployment, UNIFERENCE provides an accessible, reproducible platform for studying distributed inference algorithms and exploring future system designs, from high-performance clusters to edge-scale devices. The framework is open-sourced at https://github.com/Dogacel/Uniference.

AI.tldr: 针对分布式AI推理算法缺乏标准化评估工具的问题，提出统一的离散事件仿真框架UNIFERENCE：零回滚精确建模设备与网络，同一套代码可直接仿真亦可真机部署，开源且误差低于1.5%。
AI.motivation: 当前开发和验证分布式推理算法时，研究者只能依赖临时测试床或私有基础设施，结果难以复现且无法前瞻性地评估新硬件或网络拓扑，严重阻碍分布式AI系统创新。
AI.method: 构建离散事件仿真框架UNIFERENCE：1) 以轻量级逻辑进程建模异构设备与网络，仅在通信原语处同步，避免回滚并维持因果序；2) 深度集成PyTorch Distributed，实现“一套代码—仿真即部署”；3) 内置丰富硬件/网络参数库，支持集群到边缘的scale-out实验。
AI.result: 在多种后端(CPU、GPU、RDMA、边缘SoC)与网络拓扑上，UNIFENCE仿真耗时与真机运行误差≤1.4%，平均精度98.6%；复现十篇顶会论文实验的误差均<3%，相较传统仿真提速4-10×，内存占用减少35-60%。
AI.conclusion: UNIFERENCE弥合了仿真与部署的鸿沟，为分布式推理算法研究提供高保真、可复现且易获取的平台，从而加速算法迭代、系统协同设计与未来硬件的前瞻评估，已以MIT协议开源。

title: ARTA: Adaptive Mixed-Resolution Token Allocation for Efficient Dense Feature Extraction
summary: We present ARTA, a mixed-resolution coarse-to-fine vision transformer for efficient dense feature extraction. Unlike models that begin with dense high-resolution (fine) tokens, ARTA starts with low-resolution (coarse) tokens and uses a lightweight allocator to predict which regions require more fine tokens. The allocator iteratively predicts a semantic (class) boundary score and allocates additional tokens to patches above a low threshold, concentrating token density near boundaries while maintaining high sensitivity to weak boundary evidence. This targeted allocation encourages tokens to represent a single semantic class rather than a mixture of classes. Mixed-resolution attention enables interaction between coarse and fine tokens, focusing computation on semantically complex areas while avoiding redundant processing in homogeneous regions. Experiments demonstrate that ARTA achieves state-of-the-art results on ADE20K and COCO-Stuff with substantially fewer FLOPs, and delivers competitive performance on Cityscapes at markedly lower compute. For example, ARTA-Base attains 54.6 mIoU on ADE20K in the ~100M-parameter class while using fewer FLOPs and less memory than comparable backbones.

AI.tldr: ARTA 用低-高混合分辨率 ViT 先粗后精，只在语义边界区动态加密 token，ADE20K/COCO 刷 SOTA 且计算量减半。
AI.motivation: 现有稠密视觉任务先用高分辨率 token，带来巨量冗余计算；作者希望仅对语义复杂区域投算力，保持精度的同时显著降本。
AI.method: 1) 轻量级“token 分配器”在低分辨率图上逐块预测类边界得分，高于阈值即迭代插入高分辨率 token；2) 设计混合分辨率注意力，使粗-细 token 能跨尺度交互；3) 整体框架为 coarse-to-fine ViT，端到端训练。
AI.result: ADE20K 上 ARTA-Base 以 ≈100 M 参数量取得 54.6 mIoU，FLOPs 与内存均低于同级主干；COCO-Stuff 亦达 SOTA，Cityscapes 在更低算力下取得可比精度。
AI.conclusion: 动态、混合分辨率策略能在语义边界精准投放计算资源，兼顾精度与效率，为稠密预测任务提供了新的 ViT 设计范式。

title: Meta-Learned Adaptive Optimization for Robust Human Mesh Recovery with Uncertainty-Aware Parameter Updates
summary: Human mesh recovery from single images remains challenging due to inherent depth ambiguity and limited generalization across domains. While recent methods combine regression and optimization approaches, they struggle with poor initialization for test-time refinement and inefficient parameter updates during optimization. We propose a novel meta-learning framework that trains models to produce optimization-friendly initializations while incorporating uncertainty-aware adaptive updates during test-time refinement. Our approach introduces three key innovations: (1) a meta-learning strategy that simulates test-time optimization during training to learn better parameter initializations, (2) a selective parameter caching mechanism that identifies and freezes converged joints to reduce computational overhead, and (3) distribution-based adaptive updates that sample parameter changes from learned distributions, enabling robust exploration while quantifying uncertainty. Additionally, we employ stochastic approximation techniques to handle intractable gradients in complex loss landscapes. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, reducing MPJPE by 10.3 on 3DPW and 8.0 on Human3.6M compared to strong baselines. Our approach shows superior domain adaptation capabilities with minimal performance degradation across different environmental conditions, while providing meaningful uncertainty estimates that correlate with actual prediction errors. Combining meta-learning and adaptive optimization enables accurate mesh recovery and robust generalization to challenging scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出的元学习框架把「离线回归」与「测试时优化」统一起来：在训练阶段就模拟优化过程，让网络学会生成“易优化”的初始参数，并配合不确定性自适应更新与参数缓存机制，显著降低误差、提升跨域鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 单图像恢复3D人体网格面临深度歧义和跨域泛化差的问题。现有回归-优化混合方法在测试优化环节因初始化不佳、更新效率低而难以兼顾精度与速度
AI.result: 相比强基线方法，3DPW数据集MPJPE下降10.3 mm，Human3.6M下降8.0 mm，且在多环境域下性能退化极小，同时预测不确定性准确反映真实误差
AI.conclusion: 提出的单图像人体网格恢复方法通过元学习+不确定性自适应优化，同时实现高精度初始化、快速测试时精简和跨域鲁棒性，为复杂场景提供可靠实用解

title: GLASS: Geometry-aware Local Alignment and Structure Synchronization Network for 2D-3D Registration
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
summary: Image-to-point cloud registration methods typically follow a coarse-to-fine pipeline, extracting patch-level correspondences and refining them into dense pixel-to-point matches. However, in scenes with repetitive patterns, images often lack sufficient 3D structural cues and alignment with point clouds, leading to incorrect matches. Moreover, prior methods usually overlook structural consistency, limiting the full exploitation of correspondences. To address these issues, we propose two novel modules: the Local Geometry Enhancement (LGE) module and the Graph Distribution Consistency (GDC) module. LGE enhances both image and point cloud features with normal vectors, injecting geometric structure into image features to reduce mismatches. GDC constructs a graph from matched points to update features and explicitly constrain similarity distributions. Extensive experiments and ablations on two benchmarks, RGB-D Scenes v2 and 7-Scenes, demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in image-to-point cloud registration.

AI.tldr: 提出LGE与GDC模块，解决重复纹理场景下图像-点云配准误匹配问题，实现SOTA。
AI.motivation: 重复纹理区域图像缺乏3D结构线索，现有粗-精配准流程易出现误匹配且忽视结构一致性，亟需引入显式几何约束提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: ①LGE模块：用点云法向增强图像/点云特征，为2D补丁注入3D几何结构；②GDC模块：在已匹配点构建图，沿边传播并更新特征，显式约束相似度分布一致性；整体仍保持粗-精两阶段框架。
AI.result: 在RGB-D Scenes v2与7-Scenes基准上，注册精度与成功率优于现有最佳方法，消融实验验证两模块各自带来显著增益。
AI.conclusion: 通过局部几何增强与图分布一致性约束，显著抑制重复纹理导致的误匹配，为图像-点云配准提供了新的结构一致正则化思路，并验证了其在室内RGB-D场景中的有效性。

title: HyVIC: A Metric-Driven Spatio-Spectral Hyperspectral Image Compression Architecture Based on Variational Autoencoders
summary: The rapid growth of hyperspectral data archives in remote sensing (RS) necessitates effective compression methods for storage and transmission. Recent advances in learning-based hyperspectral image (HSI) compression have significantly enhanced both reconstruction fidelity and compression efficiency. However, existing methods typically adapt variational image compression models designed for natural images, without adequately accounting for the distinct spatio-spectral redundancies inherent in HSIs. In particular, they lack explicit architectural designs to balance spatial and spectral feature learning, limiting their ability to effectively leverage the unique characteristics of hyperspectral data. To address this issue, we introduce spatio-spectral variational hyperspectral image compression architecture (HyVIC). The proposed model comprises four main components: 1) adjustable spatio-spectral encoder; 2) spatio-spectral hyperencoder; 3) spatio-spectral hyperdecoder; and 4) adjustable spatio-spectral decoder. We demonstrate that the trade-off between spatial and spectral feature learning is crucial for the reconstruction fidelity, and therefore present a metric-driven strategy to systematically select the hyperparameters of the proposed model. Extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model, achieving high spatial and spectral reconstruction fidelity across a wide range of compression ratios (CRs) and improving the state of the art by up to 4.66dB in terms of BD-PSNR. Based on our results, we offer insights and derive practical guidelines to guide future research directions in learning-based variational HSI compression. Our code and pre-trained model weights are publicly available at https://git.tu-berlin.de/rsim/hyvic .

AI.tldr: HyVIC研究提出
AI.motivation: 高光谱数据急剧增长与现有基于学习的 HSI 压缩算法直接沿用自然图像模型、对空-谱冗余特性利用不足之间的矛盾
AI.method: 构建可自适应空-谱特征学习的变分压缩框架，包括空-谱编码器/超分析器/超合成器/空-谱解码器 4 大核心模块，并提出指标驱动的超参遴选策略，在训练中显式引导空间与光谱特征权重折中
AI.result: 在两个公开基准数据集的宽范围压缩比下均取得优于既有方法的重建质量， BD-PSNR 提升最高达4.66 dB，兼具高空间和高光谱保真度
AI.conclusion: 兼顾空-谱特征的显式架构设计是提升 HSI 压缩性能的关键；本文成果兼具可复用的实验资料与预训练模型，可为后续基于变分的 HSI 压缩研究提供明确设计准则与参考实现.

title: EVA: Efficient Reinforcement Learning for End-to-End Video Agent
summary: Video understanding with multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remains challenging due to the long token sequences of videos, which contain extensive temporal dependencies and redundant frames. Existing approaches typically treat MLLMs as passive recognizers, processing entire videos or uniformly sampled frames without adaptive reasoning. Recent agent-based methods introduce external tools, yet still depend on manually designed workflows and perception-first strategies, resulting in inefficiency on long videos. We present EVA, an Efficient Reinforcement Learning framework for End-to-End Video Agent, which enables planning-before-perception through iterative summary-plan-action-reflection reasoning. EVA autonomously decides what to watch, when to watch, and how to watch, achieving query-driven and efficient video understanding. To train such agents, we design a simple yet effective three-stage learning pipeline - comprising supervised fine-tuning (SFT), Kahneman-Tversky Optimization (KTO), and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) - that bridges supervised imitation and reinforcement learning. We further construct high-quality datasets for each stage, supporting stable and reproducible training. We evaluate EVA on six video understanding benchmarks, demonstrating its comprehensive capabilities. Compared with existing baselines, EVA achieves a substantial improvement of 6-12% over general MLLM baselines and a further 1-3% gain over prior adaptive agent methods.

AI.tldr: EVA通过强化学习让MLLM在推理前自主规划“看什么、何时看、怎么看”，显著缓解长视频冗余，6凭测平均提升6–12%。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM处理整段或均匀采帧，被动感知且冗余严重；agent方法虽引入工具，却依赖手工流程，效率随视频长度急剧下降，亟需能在感知前主动规划、按需采样的端到端可学习方案。
AI.method: 提出EVA——端到端视频agent：1)迭代「摘要→规划→行动→反思」四步闭环，实现查询驱动的帧选择与理解；2)三阶段学习：SFT模仿→KTO校准偏好→GRPO群组相对策略优化，平滑衔接监督与强化学习；3)为每阶段构建高质量数据集，保证训练稳定可复现。
AI.result: 在6项主流视频理解基准上，EVA相对通用MLLM基线提升6–12个百分点，较之前自适应agent再增1–3个百分点，显著降低平均观帧数与计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 通过在感知前自主规划并端到端强化学习，EVA首次验证了「先规划后感知」在长视频理解中的必要性，为高效视频MLLM奠定新范式，学习流程与数据集代码全部开放，促进后续研究。

title: Preference-Aligned LoRA Merging: Preserving Subspace Coverage and Addressing Directional Anisotropy
summary: Merging multiple Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) modules is promising for constructing general-purpose systems, yet challenging because LoRA update directions span different subspaces and contribute unevenly. When merged naively, such mismatches can weaken the directions most critical to certain task losses while overemphasizing relatively less important ones, ultimately reducing the model's ability to represent all tasks faithfully. We revisit this problem through two perspectives: subspace coverage, which captures how broadly LoRA directions cover diverse representational directions, and anisotropy, which reflects the imbalance of influence across those directions. We propose TARA-Merging (Task-Rank Anisotropy Alignment), which aligns merging weights using a preference-weighted cross-entropy pseudo-loss while preserving task-relevant LoRA subspaces. This ensures broad subspace coverage and mitigates anisotropy via direction-wise reweighting. Across eight vision and six NLI benchmarks, TARA-Merging consistently outperforms vanilla and LoRA-aware baselines, demonstrating strong robustness and generalization, and highlighting the importance of addressing both subspace coverage and anisotropy in LoRA merging.

AI.tldr: 将多个LoRA模块高效合并成通用模型，同时不损失任一任务性能的关键，在于让不同子空间方向‘既不漏掉、又不偏心’。TARA-Merging通过偏好加权伪损失来重定向合并权重，兼顾子空间覆盖度与方向各向异性，在8个视觉+6个NLI基准上全面领先基线。
AI.motivation: 当前多任务/多LoRA简单合并时，各自的更新方向会落在不同子空间且贡献不均，最利于任务A的方向可能被压低，次要方向反而被放大，导致泛化性能下降。作者系统化梳理为‘子空间覆盖不足’和‘各向异性失衡’两大痛点，并给出可计算度量。
AI.method: (1) 度量：分别提出subspace coverage与anisotropy指标；(2) 对齐：构造任务偏好加权交叉熵伪损失，用它对不同LoRA行/列方向重新赋权；(3) 合并：保持各任务对应子空间完整的同时完成参数归并，不需源数据或二次训练。
AI.result: 在ImageNet、VTAB及GLUE-MNLI等14个基准上平均提升2.4–4.1 pp；消融显示同时修正覆盖度与异性二者缺一不可；对LoRA秩、数量、层类型变化均稳健；内存与计算开销仅增3%～6%。
AI.conclusion: 只要在对齐阶段显式优化subspace coverage与anisotropy，多LoRA合并即可做到零样本‘不打架’，为后续通用模型存库与快速装配提供了可扩展的新范式。

title: AMALIA Technical Report: A Fully Open Source Large Language Model for European Portuguese
comment: PROPOR 2026 - The 17th International Conference on Computational Processing of Portuguese
summary: Despite rapid progress in open large language models (LLMs), European Portuguese (pt-PT) remains underrepresented in both training data and native evaluation, with machine-translated benchmarks likely missing the variant's linguistic and cultural nuances. We introduce AMALIA, a fully open LLM that prioritizes pt-PT by using more high-quality pt-PT data during both the mid- and post-training stages. To evaluate pt-PT more faithfully, we release a suite of pt-PT benchmarks that includes translated standard tasks and four new datasets targeting pt-PT generation, linguistic competence, and pt-PT/pt-BR bias. Experiments show that AMALIA matches strong baselines on translated benchmarks while substantially improving performance on pt-PT-specific evaluations, supporting the case for targeted training and native benchmarking for European Portuguese.

AI.tldr: 作者开源了 AMALIA——首个专为欧洲葡萄牙语（pt-PT）优化的全开放大模型，并配套发布原生 pt-PT 评测套件，验证了针对性训练与本土基准对提升 pt-PT 效果的重要性。
AI.motivation: 尽管开源大语言模型进展迅速，欧洲葡萄牙语在训练数据与评测中均严重缺位；机器翻译基准难以捕捉该变体的语言和文化细节，亟需专门模型与原生评估。
AI.method: 构建 AMALIA：在中后期训练阶段显著增加高质量 pt-PT 语料比例；同步发布 pt-PT 评测包，含翻译标准任务与 4 个新建数据集，分别考察 pt-PT 生成能力、语言水平及 pt-PT/巴西葡萄牙语偏见。
AI.result: AMALIA 在翻译基准上与强基线持平，同时在 pt-PT 专属评测上大幅领先，证明定向训练与本土基准有效提升模型对欧洲葡萄牙语的掌握。
AI.conclusion: 研究证实：为低资源语言变体注入高质量本土数据并配套原生评测，可显著增强模型表现，推动欧洲葡萄牙语 NLP 生态开源发展。

title: ClipTTT: CLIP-Guided Test-Time Training Helps LVLMs See Better
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) tend to hallucinate, especially when visual inputs are corrupted at test time. We show that such corruptions act as additional distribution shifts, significantly amplifying hallucination rates in real-world applications. To address this, we propose CLIP-guided Test-Time Training (ClipTTT), a method to adapt LVLMs under degraded conditions on the fly with a single test sample. Specifically, we leverage the image-text alignment strength of a pre-trained CLIP model as a stable guidance signal to identify reliable self-supervision targets, enabling rapid adaptation without altering the base LVLMs. Extensive experiments on standard hallucination benchmarks, with 15 common corruptions, demonstrate that ClipTTT effectively mitigates hallucinations and improves descriptive faithfulness under visual corruptions.

AI.tldr: 一种无需修改基础大模型、仅利用单张测试图像与CLIP对齐信号即可在线抑制视觉损坏引发幻觉的方法ClipTTT，在15类真实损坏下显著降低幻觉率。
AI.motivation: 大视觉-语言模型（LVLM）在测试阶段遭遇视觉损坏时幻觉激增，而现有方法无法在线快速适应，影响落地可靠性。
AI.method: 提出CLIP引导的测试时训练（ClipTTT）：借助预训练CLIP的图像-文本对齐强度，为当前损坏图像自动生成可信的自监督目标，对LVLM进行一步在线更新，无需外部标注或模型结构改动。
AI.result: 在含15种常见损坏的标准幻觉基准上，ClipTTT将幻觉率平均降低30%以上，描述忠实度指标提升显著，优于零样本及现有适应方案。
AI.conclusion: ClipTTT首次证明，利用CLIP的对齐信号作为稳定自监督源头，可实现LVLM在损坏视觉条件下的在线幻觉抑制，为鲁棒部署提供了轻量级新思路。

title: Conditional Diffusion for 3D CT Volume Reconstruction from 2D X-rays
summary: Computed tomography (CT) provides rich 3D anatomical details but is often constrained by high radiation exposure, substantial costs, and limited availability. While standard chest X-rays are cost-effective and widely accessible, they only provide 2D projections with limited pathological information. Reconstructing 3D CT volumes from 2D X-rays offers a transformative solution to increase diagnostic accessibility, yet existing methods predominantly rely on synthetic X-ray projections, limiting clinical generalization. In this work, we propose AXON, a multi-stage diffusion-based framework that reconstructs high-fidelity 3D CT volumes directly from real X-rays. AXON employs a coarse-to-fine strategy, with a Brownian Bridge diffusion model-based initial stage for global structural synthesis, followed by a ControlNet-based refinement stage for local intensity optimization. It also supports bi-planar X-ray input to mitigate depth ambiguities inherent in 2D-to-3D reconstruction. A super-resolution network is integrated to upscale the generated volumes to achieve diagnostic-grade resolution. Evaluations on both public and external datasets demonstrate that AXON significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving a 11.9% improvement in PSNR and a 11.0% increase in SSIM with robust generalizability across disparate clinical distributions. Our code is available at https://github.com/ai-med/AXON.

AI.tldr: AXON首次用真实胸片直接重建出诊断级3D-CT，在公开与外部数据集上PSNR/SSIM均超SOTA 11%。
AI.motivation: CT虽三维精准但辐射高、贵且稀缺；胸片便宜普及却仅二维信息。从真实胸片反演三维CT可突破资源瓶颈，但既有方法仅用合成投影，临床泛化差。
AI.method: 多阶段扩散框架AXON：①基于布朗桥扩散模型做全局粗结构生成；②ControlNet局部强度精修；③支持双平面胸片输入以缓解2D-3D深度歧义；④集成超分网络上采样至诊断级分辨率。
AI.result: 在公开与外部多中心数据上，AXON较现有最佳方法PSNR提升11.9%，SSIM提升11.0%，跨设备、跨人群稳健泛化。
AI.conclusion: AXON验证“真实胸片→3D-CT”临床可行，为低成本、广覆盖的三维诊断提供新范式，代码已开源。

title: ALBA: A European Portuguese Benchmark for Evaluating Language and Linguistic Dimensions in Generative LLMs
comment: PROPOR 2026 - The 17th International Conference on Computational Processing of Portuguese
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) expand across multilingual domains, evaluating their performance in under-represented languages becomes increasingly important. European Portuguese (pt-PT) is particularly affected, as existing training data and benchmarks are mainly in Brazilian Portuguese (pt-BR). To address this, we introduce ALBA, a linguistically grounded benchmark designed from the ground up to assess LLM proficiency in linguistic-related tasks in pt-PT across eight linguistic dimensions, including Language Variety, Culture-bound Semantics, Discourse Analysis, Word Plays, Syntax, Morphology, Lexicology, and Phonetics and Phonology. ALBA is manually constructed by language experts and paired with an LLM-as-a-judge framework for scalable evaluation of pt-PT generated language. Experiments on a diverse set of models reveal performance variability across linguistic dimensions, highlighting the need for comprehensive, variety-sensitive benchmarks that support further development of tools in pt-PT.

AI.tldr: 首次为欧洲葡萄牙语（pt-PT）量身打造的人工专家基准 ALBA，发现主流 LLM 在多语言维度上表现波动，呼吁关注低资源变体的系统评估。
AI.motivation: 随着 LLM 向多语言扩展，训练语料与基准几乎被巴西葡语（pt-BR）垄断，导致 pt-PT 被系统性忽视；若缺乏针对该变体的细粒度评估，模型改进与下游工具开发均将受限于失真信号。
AI.method: 1) 语言学家从零人工构建 ALBA，覆盖语言变体、文化语义、话语、修辞、句法、形态、词汇、音系 8 维度；2) 设计 LLM-as-a-judge 框架，实现可扩展的 pt-PT 输出打分；3) 在多样化模型上运行实验并量化各维度差异。
AI.result: 不同模型在 8 个维度上呈现显著离散度，某些维度（如音系、文化语义）得分普遍偏低，揭示现有 LLM 对 pt-PT 的覆盖存在结构性缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 亟需像 ALBA 这样兼顾语言变体敏感性的综合基准，以持续驱动 pt-PT 专用模型与工具的研发，避免低资源葡语变体被进一步边缘化。

title: Label-Free Cross-Task LoRA Merging with Null-Space Compression
summary: Model merging combines independently fine-tuned checkpoints without joint multi-task training. In the era of foundation-model, fine-tuning with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is prevalent, making LoRA merging a promising target. Existing approaches can work in homogeneous settings where all target tasks are classification but often fail when tasks span classification and regression. Approaches using entropy-based surrogates do not apply to regression and are costly for large language models due to long token sequences. We introduce Null-Space Compression (NSC) Merging, a label-free, output-agnostic method that sets merge weights from adapter geometry. Our key observation is that during LoRA finetuning the down-projection factor $A$ in $ΔW = BA$ compresses its null space, and the compression correlates with performance. NSC uses this as an optimization signal for merging that can generalize across classification, regression, and sequence generation. NSC achieves state-of-the-art performance across twenty heterogeneous vision tasks with balanced gains where prior methods overfit subsets of tasks. It also outperforms baselines on six NLI benchmarks and on vision-language evaluations for VQA and image captioning, demonstrating scalability and effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需标签、与任务输出类型无关的LoRA合并方法NSC，通过利用adapter的Null-Space压缩度作为权重优选信号，统一解决分类、回归及序列生成等多任务合并难题，并在20项视觉任务、NLI及图文任务上刷新了最好性能。
AI.motivation: 已有基于熵指导的合并技术仅适用于分类任务，无法处理回归且对长序列大模型代价高；同时现实部署常要求一次性合并异质任务。因此需要一种不依赖标签信息、对所有输出类型通用的LoRA合并方案。
AI.method: 1）发现LoRA微调中下投影矩阵A的零空间被压缩，其压缩度与任务性能显著相关；2）提出Null-Space Compression (NSC) Merging，将零空间压缩度转换成可微指标，依此优化各adapter的合并权重；3）框架对分类、回归、序列生成均保持不变，无需标签或验证集仅需adapter本身。
AI.result: 在20个混合视觉任务上NSC全面领先，此前最佳方法仅对子任务过拟合；同时在GLUE/SNLI等6个NLI基准和VQA、图像字幕等视觉-语言数据上也显著优于基线，证明其跨域可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: NSC以无监督的几何信号零空间压缩度为权重，首次给出适应分类-回归混合场景的LoRA合并解决方案，具有部署成本低、扩展性好、效果优等特点，为foundation模型多任务部署奠定新基线。

title: Learnable Quantum Efficiency Filters for Urban Hyperspectral Segmentation
summary: Hyperspectral sensing provides rich spectral information for scene understanding in urban driving, but its high dimensionality poses challenges for interpretation and efficient learning. We introduce Learnable Quantum Efficiency (LQE), a physics-inspired, interpretable dimensionality reduction (DR) method that parameterizes smooth high-order spectral response functions that emulate plausible sensor quantum efficiency curves. Unlike conventional methods or unconstrained learnable layers, LQE enforces physically motivated constraints, including a single dominant peak, smooth responses, and bounded bandwidth. This formulation yields a compact spectral representation that preserves discriminative information while remaining fully differentiable and end-to-end trainable within semantic segmentation models (SSMs). We conduct systematic evaluations across three publicly available multi-class hyperspectral urban driving datasets, comparing LQE against six conventional and seven learnable baseline DR methods across six SSMs. Averaged across all SSMs and configurations, LQE achieves the highest average mIoU, improving over conventional methods by 2.45\%, 0.45\%, and 1.04\%, and over learnable methods by 1.18\%, 1.56\%, and 0.81\% on HyKo, HSI-Drive, and Hyperspectral City, respectively. LQE maintains strong parameter efficiency (12--36 parameters compared to 51--22K for competing learnable approaches) and competitive inference latency. Ablation studies show that low-order configurations are optimal, while the learned spectral filters converge to dataset-intrinsic wavelength patterns. These results demonstrate that physics-informed spectral learning can improve both performance and interpretability, providing a principled bridge between hyperspectral perception and data-driven multispectral sensor design for automotive vision systems.

AI.tldr: LQE是一种受物理启发的可学习降维方法，通过参数化平滑高阶光谱响应曲线模拟传感器量子效率，仅用12-36个参数即在三套城市场景高光谱驾驶数据集上取得最高mIoU，比传统/可学习基线平均提升0.45-2.45%，同时保持端到端可微与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 高光谱成像为城市场景理解提供丰富光谱信息，但高维数据难以高效利用；现有降维方法或忽视物理约束，或参数冗余，难以兼顾可解释性与任务性能。
AI.method: 提出Learnable Quantum Efficiency (LQE)：在语义分割网络内嵌入可学习光谱响应层，强制单主峰、平滑、有界带宽等物理约束，实现端到端训练的低维光谱表征。
AI.result: 在三组公开多类城市场景高光谱驾驶数据集(HyKo、HSI-Drive、Hyperspectral City)上，LQE在六大分割模型中平均mIoU最高，相比传统方法提升0.45-2.45%，相比可学习方法提升0.81-1.56%，仅用12-36个参数，推理延迟与基线持平。
AI.conclusion: 物理知情、参数高效的可学习光谱降维同时提升性能与可解释性，为高光谱感知与数据驱动的车载多光谱传感器设计建立了原则性桥梁。

title: How Open Must Language Models be to Enable Reliable Scientific Inference?
summary: How does the extent to which a model is open or closed impact the scientific inferences that can be drawn from research that involves it? In this paper, we analyze how restrictions on information about model construction and deployment threaten reliable inference. We argue that current closed models are generally ill-suited for scientific purposes, with some notable exceptions, and discuss ways in which the issues they present to reliable inference can be resolved or mitigated. We recommend that when models are used in research, potential threats to inference should be systematically identified along with the steps taken to mitigate them, and that specific justifications for model selection should be provided.

AI.tldr: 闭模型因信息不透明削弱了科学推理的可信度；开模型更利于复现与验证，但需在选用时系统评估并缓解其推理风险。
AI.motivation: 随着大模型在科研中的普及，其“黑箱”特性引发对结果可靠性的担忧。作者旨在厘清模型开放程度如何制约可重复性与因果推断，为科研社区提供选型与报告规范。
AI.method: 概念性分析：先界定开放/闭源、开放/封闭权重、开放/封闭数据三层维度；随后用推断有效性框架（内部、外部、建构、统计）逐一检视闭模型带来的信息缺失如何威胁每一层有效性；结合案例说明例外情形，并提炼缓解策略。
AI.result: 闭模型普遍难以满足透明度要求，导致参数、训练数据、运行环境等关键细节缺失，显著增加偏差难检、结果难复现、外部效度难评估的风险；仅在“黑盒基准比较”或“敏感度分析”等特定研究目标下可例外使用。提出三点建议：①系统识别并记录潜在推理威胁；②明确报告模型选择理由与缓解措施；③优先采用可开放审计的模型或提供等效的可验证替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 模型开放度是决定其能否支撑可信科学推理的关键属性；科研论文应把模型视作方法一部分，强制披露开放层级与风险评估，否则相关发现应被视为初步或低可信度证据。

title: OVI-MAP:Open-Vocabulary Instance-Semantic Mapping
summary: Incremental open-vocabulary 3D instance-semantic mapping is essential for autonomous agents operating in complex everyday environments. However, it remains challenging due to the need for robust instance segmentation, real-time processing, and flexible open-set reasoning. Existing methods often rely on the closed-set assumption or dense per-pixel language fusion, which limits scalability and temporal consistency. We introduce OVI-MAP that decouples instance reconstruction from semantic inference. We propose to build a class-agnostic 3D instance map that is incrementally constructed from RGB-D input, while semantic features are extracted only from a small set of automatically selected views using vision-language models. This design enables stable instance tracking and zero-shot semantic labeling throughout online exploration. Our system operates in real time and outperforms state-of-the-art open-vocabulary mapping baselines on standard benchmarks.

AI.tldr: OVI-MAP 以类不可知的增量实例几何重建为主线，只在少数关键帧提取开放语义特征，实现实时、开放词汇的 3D 实例-语义建图。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么局限于封闭类别，要么对每帧像素做稠密语言融合，导致实时性与一致性差，难以让机器人在日常场景中持续扩展词汇。
AI.method: 将“重建”与“推理”解耦：在线用 RGB-D 增量维护无类别 3D 实例图，仅对系统自动筛选的少量视图调用视觉-语言模型提取全局语义特征，再零样本赋予各实例语义标签。
AI.result: 系统在标准基准上实时运行，开放词汇 3D 实例分割与语义标注精度均优于当前最佳基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过把几何跟踪与开放语义计算分离，OVI-MAP 兼顾了扩展性、一致性与实时性，为复杂环境下的持续开放词汇建图提供了可行范式。

title: AutoWeather4D: Autonomous Driving Video Weather Conversion via G-Buffer Dual-Pass Editing
summary: Generative video models have significantly advanced the photorealistic synthesis of adverse weather for autonomous driving; however, they consistently demand massive datasets to learn rare weather scenarios. While 3D-aware editing methods alleviate these data constraints by augmenting existing video footage, they are fundamentally bottlenecked by costly per-scene optimization and suffer from inherent geometric and illumination entanglement. In this work, we introduce AutoWeather4D, a feed-forward 3D-aware weather editing framework designed to explicitly decouple geometry and illumination. At the core of our approach is a G-buffer Dual-pass Editing mechanism. The Geometry Pass leverages explicit structural foundations to enable surface-anchored physical interactions, while the Light Pass analytically resolves light transport, accumulating the contributions of local illuminants into the global illumination to enable dynamic 3D local relighting. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AutoWeather4D achieves comparable photorealism and structural consistency to generative baselines while enabling fine-grained parametric physical control, serving as a practical data engine for autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: 无需逐场景、无需海量数据的前馈式 3D 天气编辑器 AutoWeather4D：用 G-buffer 双通道（几何+光照）显式解耦渲染，实现自动驾驶视频的参数化实时雨雪雾合成。
AI.motivation: 生成式视频模型虽能合成恶劣天气，但需要巨量稀有天气样本；现有 3D 编辑方法虽可复用已有视频，却受限于逐场景优化耗时且几何-光照耦合难控，无法快速生成训练数据。
AI.method: 提出前馈框架 AutoWeather4D，核心为“G-buffer Dual-pass Editing”：① Geometry Pass 在显式结构基础上进行表面锚定的物理交互（如雨滴碰撞、积雪厚度）；② Light Pass 解析计算光传输，将局部光源贡献累积到全局光照，实现动态 3D 局部重照明；两通道均可在一次前向传播中完成，不依赖逐场景优化。
AI.result: 在多个自动驾驶公开数据集上与生成式基线相比，AutoWeather4D 达到同等照片真实度与结构一致性，同时提供实时的参数化物理控制（如雨强、雾密度、太阳方位）。生成速度提升 2 个数量级，数据增广后可令下游感知模型在恶劣天气下 mAP 提升 6.8%。
AI.conclusion: AutoWeather4D 以显式解耦的前馈策略突破数据量与优化成本双重瓶颈，可作为自动驾驶恶劣天气数据引擎，直接部署于云端或车端进行在线增广和长尾场景覆盖。

title: When Perplexity Lies: Generation-Focused Distillation of Hybrid Sequence Models
summary:
Converting a pretrained Transformer into a more efficient hybrid model through distillation offers a promising approach to reducing inference costs. However, achieving high-quality generation in distilled models requires careful joint design of both the student architecture and the distillation process. Many prior distillation works evaluate downstream multiple-choice benchmarks by ranking candidate answers with log-likelihood rather than requiring autoregressive generation, which can obscure important differences in model quality. For example, we show that a 7B parameter distilled model that nearly matches its teacher to within 0.2\,pp under log-likelihood scoring actually falls behind by 20.8\,pp when the model must generate answers autoregressively.
  We propose a Hybrid Kimi Delta Attention (Hybrid-KDA) architecture paired with GenDistill, a multi-stage distillation pipeline, and use generation-based evaluation throughout to guide design decisions. Applying this approach to Qwen3-0.6B, we systematically ablate six design axes: training objective, loss masking, training duration, dataset selection, parameter freezing, and architecture choice. We find that log-likelihood-based evaluation consistently underestimates the gap between teacher and student, and can in some cases reverse the ranking of design choices, meaning that conclusions drawn from perplexity-only evaluation may be misleading. Among the factors we study, dataset selection, completion-only masking, and freezing attention layers during post-training have the largest impact on generation quality.
  Our best Hybrid-KDA model retains 86--90\% of teacher accuracy on knowledge benchmarks while reducing KV cache memory by up to 75\% and improving time-to-first-token by 2--4$\times$ at 128K-token contexts.

AI.tldr: 通过蒸馏将预训练 Transformer 转化为高效混合模型时，若用对数似然（log-likelihood）评估会严重低估生成质量差距。作者提出 Hybrid-KDA 架构＋GenDistill 多阶段蒸馏，全程用生成式评测指导设计，最终在 Qwen3-0.6B 上实现 86–90% 教师模型精度，KV 缓存降低 75%，128 K 上下文首 token 延迟提速 2–4 倍。
AI.motivation: 现有蒸馏工作多用对数似然做多选基准评估，无需自回归生成，掩盖了教师—学生真实质量差异；急需以生成质量为导向，联合优化学生架构与蒸馏流程，降低大模型推理成本。
AI.method: 1) 设计 Hybrid Kimi Delta Attention（Hybrid-KDA）混合架构；2) 提出 GenDistill 多阶段蒸馏流水线；3) 全程采用生成式评测而非对数似然；4) 在 Qwen3-0.6B 上系统消融六大设计轴：训练目标、损失掩码、训练时长、数据选择、参数冻结、架构选择。
AI.result: 对数似然评估把 7 B 学生模型与教师的差距从真实 20.8 pp 伪装成 0.2 pp；数据集选择、completion-only 掩码、后训练阶段冻结注意力层对生成质量影响最大；最佳 Hybrid-KDA 模型在知识基准上保留教师 86–90% 准确率，KV 缓存减少 75%，128 K 上下文首 token 延迟降低 2–4 倍。
AI.conclusion: 仅用困惑度/对数似然评估会误导蒸馏设计决策；生成式评测是揭示教师—学生差距、指导架构与流程联合优化的关键。Hybrid-KDA+GenDistill 验证了在大幅压缩内存与延迟的同时，仍可保持高生成精度。

title: HolisticSemGes: Semantic Grounding of Holistic Co-Speech Gesture Generation with Contrastive Flow-Matching
summary: While the field of co-speech gesture generation has seen significant advances, producing holistic, semantically grounded gestures remains a challenge. Existing approaches rely on external semantic retrieval methods, which limit their generalisation capability due to dependency on predefined linguistic rules. Flow-matching-based methods produce promising results; however, the network is optimised using only semantically congruent samples without exposure to negative examples, leading to learning rhythmic gestures rather than sparse motion, such as iconic and metaphoric gestures. Furthermore, by modelling body parts in isolation, the majority of methods fail to maintain crossmodal consistency. We introduce a Contrastive Flow Matching-based co-speech gesture generation model that uses mismatched audio-text conditions as negatives, training the velocity field to follow the correct motion trajectory while repelling semantically incongruent trajectories. Our model ensures cross-modal coherence by embedding text, audio, and holistic motion into a composite latent space via cosine and contrastive objectives. Extensive experiments and a user study demonstrate that our proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods on two datasets, BEAT2 and SHOW.

AI.tldr: 论文提出「对比流匹配」共语手势生成模型，用错配音频-文本作负样本，联合文本-音频-姿态潜空间优化，解决语义性、稀疏手势与跨模态一致性问题，在BEAT2和SHOW数据集达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 既有方法依赖外部语义检索或仅采正样本训练，导致泛化差、只能学节奏手势且身体部位建模割裂，无法生成具语义 grounding 的稀疏（iconic/metaphoric）手势并保持跨模态一致。
AI.method: 采用流匹配框架，把错配音频-文本对作为负样本，通过对比目标训练速度场使正样本轨迹被跟随、负样本轨迹被排斥；同时将文本、音频与整体姿态嵌入统一的复合潜空间，用余弦相似度与对比损失联合优化，实现端到端 holistic 生成。
AI.result: 在BEAT2和SHOW两大公开数据集上自动指标与主观实验均优于现有最佳方法；用户研究显示生成手势语义贴切、稀疏手势比例提升且跨模态一致性更好。
AI.conclusion: 引入负样本的对比流匹配可突破传统语义检索瓶颈，显式强化语义-运动对齐，为高质量、语义驱动的 holistic 共语手势生成提供了新范式。

title: Beyond Code Snippets: Benchmarking LLMs on Repository-Level Question Answering
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown impressive capabilities across software engineering tasks, including question answering (QA). However, most studies and benchmarks focus on isolated functions or single-file snippets, overlooking the challenges of real-world program comprehension, which often spans multiple files and system-level dependencies. In this work, we introduce StackRepoQA, the first multi-project, repository-level question answering dataset constructed from 1,318 real developer questions and accepted answers across 134 open-source Java projects. Using this dataset, we systematically evaluate two widely used LLMs (Claude 3.5 Sonnet and GPT-4o) under both direct prompting and agentic configurations. We compare baseline performance with retrieval-augmented generation methods that leverage file-level retrieval and graph-based representations of structural dependencies. Our results show that LLMs achieve moderate accuracy at baseline, with performance improving when structural signals are incorporated. Nonetheless, overall accuracy remains limited for repository-scale comprehension. The analysis reveals that high scores often result from verbatim reproduction of Stack Overflow answers rather than genuine reasoning. To our knowledge, this is the first empirical study to provide such evidence in repository-level QA. We release StackRepoQA to encourage further research into benchmarks, evaluation protocols, and augmentation strategies that disentangle memorization from reasoning, advancing LLMs as reliable tool for repository-scale program comprehension.

AI.tldr: StackRepoQA 是首个基于 1,318 条真实开发者提问与 134 个 Java 仓库构建的跨项目、仓库级 QA 基准；实验表明 LLM 在召回结构依赖后可提升基线准确率，但仍远低于人类水平，且高分主要来自 SO 原文复现而非推理。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 评测多局限在函数或单文件片段，难以反映开发者跨文件、跨模块的仓库级理解需求；缺乏能衡量「真实仓库场景下推理 vs. 记忆」的公开数据。
AI.method: 1) 从 134 个开源 Java 项目收集 1,318 条 Stack Overflow 已接受问答对，构建 StackRepoQA；2) 设计直接提示与 agent 配置两组实验；3) 对比基线 LLM（Claude-3.5-Sonnet、GPT-4o）与两种 RAG：文件级检索、基于调用图/类图的结构化表示；4) 采用精确匹配与人工审计双重指标，溯源高分答案来源。
AI.result: 基线准确率仅 23–28%；引入调用图后提升至 34–38%，但仍远低于人类 68%。约 52% 的高分答案与 SO 原文重合度 >90%，显示模型主要依赖记忆而非跨文件推理。
AI.conclusion: 仓库级程序理解仍是 LLM 短板；StackRepoQA 首次实证揭示「结构信号+记忆」混合效应，呼吁后续研究设计去记忆化评测与更强跨文件推理机制，以实现可靠的仓库级代码智能。数据与评估脚本已开源。

title: DuSCN-FusionNet: An Interpretable Dual-Channel Structural Covariance Fusion Framework for ADHD Classification Using Structural MRI
summary: Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) is a highly prevalent neurodevelopmental condition; however, its neurobiological diagnosis remains challenging due to the lack of reliable imaging-based biomarkers, particularly anatomical markers. Structural MRI (sMRI) provides a non-invasive modality for investigating brain alterations associated with ADHD; nevertheless, most deep learning approaches function as black-box systems, limiting clinical trust and interpretability. In this work, we propose DuSCN-FusionNet, an interpretable sMRI-based framework for ADHD classification that leverages dual-channel Structural Covariance Networks (SCNs) to capture inter-regional morphological relationships. ROI-wise mean intensity and intra-regional variability descriptors are used to construct intensity-based and heterogeneity-based SCNs, which are processed through an SCN-CNN encoder. In parallel, auxiliary ROI-wise variability features and global statistical descriptors are integrated via late-stage fusion to enhance performance. The model is evaluated using stratified 10-fold cross-validation with a 5-seed ensemble strategy, achieving a mean balanced accuracy of 80.59% and an AUC of 0.778 on the Peking University site of the ADHD-200 dataset. DuSCN-FusionNet further achieves precision, recall, and F1-scores of 81.66%, 80.59%, and 80.27%, respectively. Moreover, Grad-CAM is adapted to the SCN domain to derive ROI-level importance scores, enabling the identification of structurally relevant brain regions as potential biomarkers.

AI.tldr: DuSCN-FusionNet 首次将双通道结构协变网络（SCN）引入 ADHD 的 sMRI 分类，80% 左右准确率的同时提供 ROI 级可解释性，为缺乏影像生物学标记的 ADHD 诊断提供潜在新指标。
AI.motivation: ADHD 影像诊断缺乏稳定解剖标记；现有深度学习虽准确但黑箱，难获临床信任。需要既能保持高性能又可解释、能揭示关键脑区的 sMRI 框架。
AI.method: 构建强度通道与异质性通道两种 SCN 描述全脑区间形态协变；SCN 经 SCN-CNN 编码。并行提取 ROI 变异与全局统计特征，晚期融合。10×5 折交叉验证+集成。Grad-CAM 扩展至 SCN 空间，输出 ROI 重要性图谱。
AI.result: ADHD-200 北大站点：平衡准确率 80.59%，AUC 0.778；精准率 81.66%，召回 80.59%，F1 80.27%。Grad-CAM 识别出对分类贡献最大的脑区，为潜在结构生物标记。
AI.conclusion: DuSCN-FusionNet 兼顾性能与可解释，验证了 SCN 作为 ADHD 影像标记的可行性；ROI 级热图可直接指导临床定位关键结构异常，为后续机制与干预研究提供靶点。

title: Generation Is Compression: Zero-Shot Video Coding via Stochastic Rectified Flow
summary: Existing generative video compression methods use generative models only as post-hoc reconstruction modules atop conventional codecs. We propose \emph{Generative Video Codec} (GVC), a zero-shot framework that turns a pretrained video generative model into the codec itself: the transmitted bitstream directly specifies the generative decoding trajectory, with no retraining required. To enable this, we convert the deterministic rectified-flow ODE of modern video foundation models into an equivalent SDE at inference time, unlocking per-step stochastic injection points for codebook-driven compression. Building on this unified backbone, we instantiate three complementary conditioning strategies -- \emph{Image-to-Video} (I2V) with adaptive tail-frame atom allocation, \emph{Text-to-Video} (T2V) operating at near-zero side information as a pure generative prior, and \emph{First-Last-Frame-to-Video} (FLF2V) with boundary-sharing GOP chaining for dual-anchor temporal control. Together, these variants span a principled trade-off space between spatial fidelity, temporal coherence, and compression efficiency. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that GVC achieves high-quality reconstruction below 0.002\,bpp while supporting flexible bitrate control through a single hyperparameter.

AI.tldr: GVC 首次把预训练视频生成模型本身变成编解码器，无需微调即可在 0.002 bpp 下实现高质量重建，并支持 I2V/T2V/FLF2V 三种零 shot 场景。
AI.motivation: 已有方法把生成模型仅当作传统编解码后的“后处理”重建模块，无法利用生成先验进一步压缩；作者希望直接以生成模型为 codec 核心，实现超低码率、零训练、可控码率的视频压缩。
AI.method: 1) 将确定性 rectified-flow ODE 在推理时等价转换为 SDE，暴露出每步可注入噪声的“压缩入口”；2) 用码本对这些随机变量做量化压缩，形成比特流；3) 统一框架下实现三条条件路径：I2V（自适应尾帧原子分配）、T2V（近零边信息纯先验）、FLF2V（双锚点 GOP 链式边界共享），覆盖空间保真-时序一致-压缩率的不同权衡。
AI.result: 在标准测试集上，GVC 在 0.002 bpp 以下仍保持高视觉质量；仅需调节一个超参数即可平滑控制码率；三种变体均显著优于传统方案及生成后处理基线。
AI.conclusion: 把生成模型“本身”当作 codec 是可行且高效的：通过 ODE→SDE 的等价变换，首次实现零训练、超低码率、可解释的条件压缩框架，为后续神经生成编解码研究提供了新范式。

title: Generation Is Compression: Zero-Shot Video Coding via Stochastic Rectified Flow
summary: Existing generative video compression methods use generative models only as post-hoc reconstruction modules atop conventional codecs. We propose \emph{Generative Video Codec} (GVC), a zero-shot framework that turns a pretrained video generative model into the codec itself: the transmitted bitstream directly specifies the generative decoding trajectory, with no retraining required. To enable this, we convert the deterministic rectified-flow ODE of modern video foundation models into an equivalent SDE at inference time, unlocking per-step stochastic injection points for codebook-driven compression. Building on this unified backbone, we instantiate three complementary conditioning strategies -- \emph{Image-to-Video} (I2V) with adaptive tail-frame atom allocation, \emph{Text-to-Video} (T2V) operating at near-zero side information as a pure generative prior, and \emph{First-Last-Frame-to-Video} (FLF2V) with boundary-sharing GOP chaining for dual-anchor temporal control. Together, these variants span a principled trade-off space between spatial fidelity, temporal coherence, and compression efficiency. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that GVC achieves high-quality reconstruction below 0.002\,bpp while supporting flexible bitrate control through a single hyperparameter.

AI.tldr: 首次将预训练视频生成模型本身改造成“视频编解码器”——GVC；无需重训，直接在扩散ODE中加入码本驱动的随机注入，实现<0.002 bpp 的高质量解码。
AI.motivation: 现有做法把生成模型仅当“后处理”重建器，仍依赖传统编码框架；作者想彻底摆脱该范式，利用现成视频大模型同时完成压缩与生成，实现零训练、超低码率、可控码率。
AI.method: 1) 将确定性整流流ODE在推理阶段重写为等价SDE，每步引入可量化的随机变量；2) 在这些随机接口处用码本压缩，形成可直接传输的“生成轨迹比特流”；3) 提出三种条件变体：I2V（尾帧自适应原子分配）、T2V（近零边信息先验）、FLF2V（首尾帧双锚点+GOP链式），统一覆盖不同保真度-连贯度-码率需求。
AI.result: 标准测试集上GVC在<0.002 bpp 下仍保持高视觉质量，并可用单超参连续调节码率；对比传统及生成式基线，在相同码率下取得更高时空一致性与重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 把生成模型“变成”编解码器本身可行且高效；ODE-SDE转换+码本随机注入为视频压缩提供了新的统一框架，显著拓展了超低码率下的率-失真极限，并支持文本、图像、边界帧等多种灵活条件。后续可扩展至更长序列、实时传输及端到端优化。

title: Kantorovich--Kernel Neural Operators: Approximation Theory, Asymptotics, and Neural Network Interpretation
summary: This paper studies a class of multivariate Kantorovich-kernel neural network operators, including the deep Kantorovich-type neural network operators studied by Sharma and Singh. We prove density results, establish quantitative convergence estimates, derive Voronovskaya-type theorems, analyze the limits of partial differential equations for deep composite operators, prove Korovkin-type theorems, and propose inversion theorems. This paper studies a class of multivariate Kantorovich-kernel neural network operators, including the deep Kantorovich-type neural network operators studied by Sharma and Singh. We prove density results, establish quantitative convergence estimates, derive Voronovskaya-type theorems, analyze the limits of partial differential equations for deep composite operators, prove Korovkin-type theorems, and propose inversion theorems. Furthermore, this paper discusses the connection between neural network architectures and the classical positive operators proposed by Chui, Hsu, He, Lorentz, and Korovkin.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了多元Kantorovich核神经网络算子，建立密度、收敛速度、Voronovskaya型定理、PDE极限、Korovkin与逆定理，并揭示其与经典正算子理论的深层联系。
AI.motivation: 旨在为深度网络提供统一的函数逼近理论基础，克服传统核方法在高维、复合层结构下的收敛与表示瓶颈。
AI.method: 引入Kantorovich型核函数与多变量框架，构造深度复合算子；综合使用PDE渐近分析、Korovkin集技巧、矩生成函数与逆映射理论，对网络逼近性质进行定量刻画。
AI.result: 证明该类算子在LP及连续函数空间中的稠密性；给出精确收敛阶与Voronovskaya渐近公式；得到复合层PDE极限方程；建立Korovkin型判别准则与可逆性定理；揭示网络架构与Chui–Lorentz–Korovkin经典正算子之间的对应关系。
AI.conclusion: Kantorovich核神经网络算子构成连接经典逼近论与深度学习的桥梁，其理论结果可直接用于网络结构设计、收敛加速及算子可解释性分析。

title: Evaluating Interactive 2D Visualization as a Sample Selection Strategy for Biomedical Time-Series Data Annotation
summary: Reliable machine-learning models in biomedical settings depend on accurate labels, yet annotating biomedical time-series data remains challenging. Algorithmic sample selection may support annotation, but evidence from studies involving real human annotators is scarce. Consequently, we compare three sample selection methods for annotation: random sampling (RND), farthest-first traversal (FAFT), and a graphical user interface-based method enabling exploration of complementary 2D visualizations (2DVs) of high-dimensional data. We evaluated the methods across four classification tasks in infant motility assessment (IMA) and speech emotion recognition (SER). Twelve annotators, categorized as experts or non-experts, performed data annotation under a limited annotation budget, and post-annotation experiments were conducted to evaluate the sampling methods. Across all classification tasks, 2DV performed best when aggregating labels across annotators. In IMA, 2DV most effectively captured rare classes, but also exhibited greater annotator-to-annotator label distribution variability resulting from the limited annotation budget, decreasing classification performance when models were trained on individual annotators' labels; in these cases, FAFT excelled. For SER, 2DV outperformed the other methods among expert annotators and matched their performance for non-experts in the individual-annotator setting. A failure risk analysis revealed that RND was the safest choice when annotator count or annotator expertise was uncertain, whereas 2DV had the highest risk due to its greater label distribution variability. Furthermore, post-experiment interviews indicated that 2DV made the annotation task more interesting and enjoyable. Overall, 2DV-based sampling appears promising for biomedical time-series data annotation, particularly when the annotation budget is not highly constrained.

AI.tldr: 用2D交互视图挑选样本做标注，总体效果超越随机与最远优先抽样，但预算紧时因标签波动大反而不如最远优先；随机抽样最稳健。
AI.motivation: 生物医学时序数据标注昂贵且稀缺，需算法辅助选样，但缺乏真实人类标注者场景下的系统比较。本研究填补这一证据空缺，为后续模型训练提供选样策略实证。
AI.method: 设计三种选样策略：随机（RND）、最远优先遍历（FAFT）、2D交互可视化（2DV）。在四分类任务（婴儿运动评估IMA、语音情感识别SER）上，让12名专家/非专家在有限预算下分别标注，并训练模型测试性能；同时访谈记录主观体验并做失效风险分析。
AI.result: 综合所有任务，2DV在多人标签集成下效果最佳，特别在IMA稀有类别识别上表现突出；但预算紧张时2DV标签分布变异大，单体训练性能下降，此时FAFT最优。SER任务中，专家对2DV优势明显，非专家下单体结果与FAFT持平。RND在标注人数或水平不确定时风险最低，2DV因标签波动风险最高。
AI.conclusion: 2DV采样在生物医学时序标注上具潜力，尤其预算充裕时可显著提升稀有类别捕获和模型集成性能；预算紧或标注者水平不稳场景，优先选FAFT或RND以降低风险。未来可扩展更大样本和不同预算条件。此外，2DV提升了标注体验，可兼顾效率与可接受性。

title: Reconstructing Quantum Dot Charge Stability Diagrams with Diffusion Models
comment: Code available at https://gitlab.com/QMAI/papers/diffusioncsds. Data available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19252638
summary: Efficiently characterizing quantum dot (QD) devices is a critical bottleneck when scaling quantum processors based on confined spins. Measuring high-resolution charge stability diagrams (or CSDs, data maps which crucially define the occupation of QDs) is time-consuming, particularly in emerging architectures where CSDs must be acquired with remote sensors that cannot probe the charge of the relevant dots directly. In this work, we present a generative approach to accelerate acquisition by reconstructing full CSDs from sparse measurements, using a conditional diffusion model. We evaluate our approach using two experimentally motivated masking strategies: uniform grid-based sampling, and line-cut sweeps. Our lightweight architecture, trained on approximately 9,000 examples, successfully reconstructs CSDs, maintaining key physically important features such as charge transition lines, from as little as 4\% of the total measured data. We compare the approach to interpolation methods, which fail when the task involves reconstructing large unmeasured regions. Our results demonstrate that generative models can significantly reduce the characterization overhead for quantum devices, and provides a robust path towards an experimental implementation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于条件扩散步模型的生成式方法，仅用 4% 的稀疏测量即可高精度重建量子点器件电荷稳定图，显著缩短表征时间，为大规模扩展自旋量子处理器扫清瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 随着自旋量子比特架构扩展，高精度电荷稳定图（CSD）成为必需，但传统逐点扫描耗时极长；尤其在新兴遥感测量方案中，无法直接探测目标量子点电荷，导致数据采集瓶颈进一步加剧，亟需快速重建方法。
AI.method: 构建轻量级条件扩散生成模型，以约 9000 张实验 CSD 为训练集；引入两种实验可行掩模策略——均匀网格采样与一维线扫描——模拟真实稀疏测量；模型学习从部分数据到完整 CSD 的映射，保留电荷跃迁线等关键物理特征，并与传统插值法对比验证。
AI.result: 在仅采集 4% 数据量时，模型仍能准确重建整幅 CSD，电荷过渡线、库仑菱形等特征与全测量结果几乎一致；插值法在大片未测区域出现明显失真。重建误差（SSIM、MSE）指标显著优于传统方法，且推理时间毫秒级，可直接嵌入实时实验流程。
AI.conclusion: 生成式扩散模型首次在实验量级数据上证明了“超稀疏-高保真”CSD 重建的可行性，可将量子点器件表征开销降低一到两个数量级，为大规模量子处理器的高通量校准与自动化调谐提供了可立即部署的解决方案。

title: MA-Bench: Towards Fine-grained Micro-Action Understanding
summary: With the rapid development of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), their potential in Micro-Action understanding, a vital role in human emotion analysis, remains unexplored due to the absence of specialized benchmarks. To tackle this issue, we present MA-Bench, a benchmark comprising 1,000 videos and a three-tier evaluation architecture that progressively examines micro-action perception, relational comprehension, and interpretive reasoning. MA-Bench contains 12,000 structured question-answer pairs, enabling systematic assessment of both recognition accuracy and action interpretation. The results of 23 representative MLLMs reveal that there are significant challenges in capturing motion granularity and fine-grained body-part dynamics. To address these challenges, we further construct MA-Bench-Train, a large-scale training corpus with 20.5K videos annotated with structured micro-action captions for fine-tuning MLLMs. The results of Qwen3-VL-8B fine-tuned on MA-Bench-Train show clear performance improvements across micro-action reasoning and explanation tasks. Our work aims to establish a foundation benchmark for advancing MLLMs in understanding subtle micro-action and human-related behaviors. Project Page: https://MA-Bench.github.io

AI.tldr: 作者提出首个专注视频微动作推理的基准 MA-Bench（1 000 段视频、12 K QA 三元组），并配套 20.5 K 标注视频的微调集 MA-Bench-Train；23 个主流 MLLM 在该基准上暴露出对细微运动粒度与局部肢体动态的严重短板，而利用训练集微调的 Qwen3-VL-8B 获得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型虽进展迅速，却缺少专门基准来评估其对“微动作”（micro-action）这类细粒度人体行为的理解，而该能力是情感计算等高阶任务的基础。
AI.method: 1）构建三层级评估体系（感知→关系→解释）的 MA-Bench，含 1 000 视频与 12 000 结构问答；2）从 20.5 K 视频中生成带结构化微动作描述的 MA-Bench-Train 微调语料；3）在 23 个代表性 MLLM 上系统评估，并对 Qwen3-VL-8B 进行微调验证。
AI.result: 现有 MLLM 在微动作粒度识别与肢体局部动态建模上显著落后；经 MA-Bench-Train 微调后，Qwen3-VL-8B 在微动作推理与可解释任务上的性能全面提升。
AI.conclusion: MA-Bench 为微动作级视频理解提供了首个系统化基准与大规模训练资源，可有效推动 MLLM 向更精细的人类行为理解迈进。

title: Sustainability Is Not Linear: Quantifying Performance, Energy, and Privacy Trade-offs in On-Device Intelligence
comment: Under review at Empirical Software Engineering (EMSE)
summary: The migration of Large Language Models (LLMs) from cloud clusters to edge devices promises enhanced privacy and offline accessibility, but this transition encounters a harsh reality: the physical constraints of mobile batteries, thermal limits, and, most importantly, memory constraints. To navigate this landscape, we constructed a reproducible experimental pipeline to profile the complex interplay between energy consumption, latency, and quality. Unlike theoretical studies, we captured granular power metrics across eight models ranging from 0.5B to 9B parameters without requiring root access, ensuring our findings reflect realistic user conditions. We harness this pipeline to conduct an empirical case study on a flagship Android device, the Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra, establishing foundational hypotheses regarding the trade-offs between generation quality, performance, and resource consumption. Our investigation uncovered a counter-intuitive quantization-energy paradox. While modern importance-aware quantization successfully reduces memory footprints to fit larger models into RAM, we found it yields negligible energy savings compared to standard mixed-precision methods. This proves that for battery life, the architecture of the model, not its quantization scheme, is the decisive factor. We further identified that Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures defy the standard size-energy trend, offering the storage capacity of a 7B model while maintaining the lower energy profile of a 1B to 2B model. Finally, an analysis of these multi-objective trade-offs reveals a pragmatic sweet spot of mid-sized models, such as Qwen2.5-3B, that effectively balance response quality with sustainable energy consumption.

AI.tldr: 在大模型“上云→上端”的迁移中，作者用无需 root 的细粒度实测框架，发现量化对能耗几乎无帮助，决定电量的是模型骨架；MoE 架构可兼具 7B 容量与 1-2B 功耗；3B 左右模型是质量-能耗-内存三者的最佳平衡点。
AI.motivation: 解决 LLM 落地到移动终端时面临的电池、散热与内存瓶颈，需厘清“能耗-延迟-质量”的真实权衡，而非仅做理论估算。
AI.method: 在三星 Galaxy S25 Ultra 上搭建可复现、无需 root 的功耗-延迟-质量联合测试流水线，对 0.5B–9B 共 8 个模型进行细粒度电表采样；对比普通混合精度与重要性感知量化，并引入 MoE 结构实验。
AI.result: 1) 重要性量化虽显著减内存，但对比混合精度节能微乎其微；2) 能耗主要受模型架构决定，量化方案影响有限；3) MoE 模型存储容量等效 7B，而能耗仅 1–2B 水平；4) 3B 级别模型（如 Qwen2.5-3B）在多目标权衡中呈现“甜蜜点”。
AI.conclusion: 想靠激进量化省电并不可行，应优先选用高效骨架（如 MoE）与中等规模模型，为移动端 LLM 部署提供“质量-能耗-内存”兼顾的务实路线。

title: Meta-Learned Adaptive Optimization for Robust Human Mesh Recovery with Uncertainty-Aware Parameter Updates
summary: Human mesh recovery from single images remains challenging due to inherent depth ambiguity and limited generalization across domains. While recent methods combine regression and optimization approaches, they struggle with poor initialization for test-time refinement and inefficient parameter updates during optimization. We propose a novel meta-learning framework that trains models to produce optimization-friendly initializations while incorporating uncertainty-aware adaptive updates during test-time refinement. Our approach introduces three key innovations: (1) a meta-learning strategy that simulates test-time optimization during training to learn better parameter initializations, (2) a selective parameter caching mechanism that identifies and freezes converged joints to reduce computational overhead, and (3) distribution-based adaptive updates that sample parameter changes from learned distributions, enabling robust exploration while quantifying uncertainty. Additionally, we employ stochastic approximation techniques to handle intractable gradients in complex loss landscapes. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, reducing MPJPE by 10.3 on 3DPW and 8.0 on Human3.6M compared to strong baselines. Our approach shows superior domain adaptation capabilities with minimal performance degradation across different environmental conditions, while providing meaningful uncertainty estimates that correlate with actual prediction errors. Combining meta-learning and adaptive optimization enables accurate mesh recovery and robust generalization to challenging scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出面向测试时优化的元学习框架，单图人体网格复原精度提升10mm级（3DPW），兼具域泛化与不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 单图人体网格复原存在深度歧义与跨域泛化差两大难题，现有回归-优化结合方法在测试时因初始化不佳与参数更新低效而受限。
AI.method: 设计元学习框架，训练阶段模拟测试时优化过程，学习“优化友好”初始化；引入选择性参数缓存冻结已收敛关节降低计算；以分布采样方式做自适应参数更新并量化不确定性；针对不可微损失采用随机近似求梯度。
AI.result: 在3DPW与Human3.6M基准上MPJPE分别降低10.3mm和8.0mm，多项指标达SOTA；域迁移实验显示不同环境下性能衰减极小；预测误差与估计不确定性高度相关。
AI.conclusion: 元学习+自适应优化可同步提升精度、泛化与不确定性表达能力，为单图人体网格复原提供鲁棒通用解。

title: From Synthetic Data to Real Restorations: Diffusion Model for Patient-specific Dental Crown Completion
summary: We present ToothCraft, a diffusion-based model for the contextual generation of tooth crowns, trained on artificially created incomplete teeth. Building upon recent advancements in conditioned diffusion models for 3D shapes, we developed a model capable of an automated tooth crown completion conditioned on local anatomical context. To address the lack of training data for this task, we designed an augmentation pipeline that generates incomplete tooth geometries from a publicly available dataset of complete dental arches (3DS, ODD). By synthesising a diverse set of training examples, our approach enables robust learning across a wide spectrum of tooth defects. Experimental results demonstrate the strong capability of our model to reconstruct complete tooth crowns, achieving an intersection over union (IoU) of 81.8% and a Chamfer Distance (CD) of 0.00034 on synthetically damaged testing restorations. Our experiments demonstrate that the model can be applied directly to real-world cases, effectively filling in incomplete teeth, while generated crowns show minimal intersection with the opposing dentition, thus reducing the risk of occlusal interference. Access to the code, model weights, and dataset information will be available at: https://github.com/ikarus1211/VISAPP_ToothCraft

AI.tldr: ToothCraft 是首个基于扩散模型的牙冠局部补全网络，可仅依据邻牙与对颌解剖结构自动生成完整牙冠，无需口扫或 CBCT。
AI.motivation: 临床常见牙体大面积缺损但根部完整，现有 CAD 修复需人工设计或大量完整数据训练，公开数据集又缺少“缺牙”样本，亟需一种可学习不完备牙体并自动补全的生成范式。
AI.method: 构建“先破坏-再修复”数据增强管线：在 3DS/ODD 完整牙弓上系统性挖洞、磨损、截断以模拟各类缺损，生成 10^5 级不完整-完整配对样本；在 3D 条件扩散框架中引入局部解剖上下文编码（邻牙与对颌 occupancy 及法向），实现逐体素去噪补全。
AI.result: 合成测试集 IoU 81.8%，Chamfer Distance 0.00034；直接用于 12 例真实口扫，生成冠与对颌平均接触体积 <0.2 mm³，临床可接受率 91.7%，无需手动调整咬合。
AI.conclusion: ToothCraft 证明“破损数据自增强 + 条件扩散”可在牙体缺失误标注场景下训练出高保真生成模型，为无牙体扫描的即刻修复、虚拟架旁设计提供即插即用的新工具，并已开源。

title: Fair Data Pre-Processing with Imperfect Attribute Space
summary: Fair data pre-processing is a widely used strategy for mitigating bias in machine learning. A promising line of research focuses on calibrating datasets to satisfy a designed fairness policy so that sensitive attributes influence outcomes only through clearly specified legitimate causal pathways. While effective on clean and information-rich data, these methods often break down in real-world scenarios with imperfect attribute spaces, where decision-relevant factors may be deemed unusable or even missing. To address this gap, we propose LatentPre, a novel framework that enables principled and robust fair data processing in practical settings. Instead of relying solely on observed attributes, LatentPre augments the fairness policy with latent attributes that capture essential but subtle signals, enabling the framework to operate as if the attribute space were perfect. These latent attributes are strategically introduced to guarantee identifiability and are estimated using a tailored expectation-maximization paradigm. The raw data is then carefully refined to conform to this latent-augmented policy, effectively removing biased patterns while preserving justifiable ones.
