Extensive experiments demonstrate that LatentPre consistently achieves strong fairness-utility trade-offs across diverse scenarios, advancing practical fairness-aware data management.

AI.tldr: LatentPre通过引入可识别的潜在属性将公平性策略从“理想完整空间”扩展到“实际残缺空间”，在EM框架下同步估计潜在因子并修正数据，使后续学习既能满足公平约束又保持高预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有公平数据预处理方法假设属性空间完整、干净，但真实数据常缺失关键决策变量，导致校准策略失效。
AI.method: 提出LatentPre框架：①在公平性策略中显式引入潜在属性作为合法因果路径；②基于可识别性设计潜在变量结构；③用EM算法联合估计潜在因子与公平修正权重；④按潜在增强策略重加权/重标定原始数据。
AI.result: 多数据集实验表明，LatentPre在公平性指标（如人口统计奇偶性、机会均等）与任务准确率之间取得一致且显著优于现有方法的权衡，且在属性缺失率高达40%时仍稳定。
AI.conclusion: LatentPre将公平性校准从“理想假设”推进到“实用场景”，为含缺失或不可用属性的真实数据提供了一种可落地、可扩展的公平预处理范式。

title: The Limits of Learning from Pictures and Text: Vision-Language Models and Embodied Scene Understanding
summary: What information is sufficient to learn the full richness of human scene understanding? The distributional hypothesis holds that the statistical co-occurrence of language and images captures the conceptual knowledge underlying visual cognition. Vision-language models (VLMs) are trained on massive paired text-image corpora but lack embodied experience, making them an ideal test of the distributional hypothesis. We report two experiments comparing descriptions generated by 18 VLMs to those of over 2000 human observers across 15 high-level scene understanding tasks, spanning general knowledge, affordances, sensory experiences, affective responses, and future prediction. Because many tasks lack ground truth answers, we developed a Human-Calibrated Cosine Distance (HCD) metric that measures VLM output similarity to the distribution of human responses, scaled by within-human variability. In Experiment 1, VLMs approached human-level performance on general knowledge tasks, but showed a robust deficit for affordance tasks that resisted prompt engineering and did not improve with newer model releases. In Experiment 2, we tested six mechanistic hypotheses for explaining this affordance gap, finding that the deficit was structural rather than stylistic and was not resolved by providing explicit spatial information. Corpus analyses revealed that image captioning datasets contain sparse agent-addressed affordance language, consistent with Gricean accounts of why embodied knowledge may be systematically underrepresented in language. Together, these findings suggest that distributional learning from images and text is insufficient for affordance-based scene understanding, implying that some dimensions of human visual cognition may require the kind of agent-centered, three-dimensional experience that no photograph or caption can encode.

AI.tldr: 大批量场景理解基准测试表明，仅靠图文共统计训练无法使VLM学会“可供性”知识；人类在该维度上的表现始终显著优于模型，提示具身体验可能是不可或缺的学习源。
AI.motivation: 为验证“分布假设”是否足以支撑人类级场景理解，作者以缺乏具身体验的VLM为自然实验对象，考察其能否从海量图文对中习得包含可供性在内的多维度高层知识。
AI.method: 1) 设计15项涵盖常识、可供性、感官、情感与预测的任务，收集2000+人类受试描述；2) 提出“人类校准余弦距离”(HCD)指标，在无金标准情况下量化VLM输出与人群分布的相似度；3) 通过提示工程与6种机制假设对照，定位可供性差距根源；4) 对主流图像字幕数据集进行语料统计，检验可供性语言稀缺性。
AI.result: • 常识任务VLM接近人群水平；可供性任务存在显著、稳定且跨模型世代的结构缺陷，提示与语料中面向代理的可供性描述稀缺一致。• 提供显式空间信息、风格校正或增大模型均未能弥补该缺陷。• HCD显示人类内部一致性越高，模型差距越明显。
AI.conclusion: 仅靠图文统计共生无法编码以代理为中心的三维可供性知识；要获得完备的人类场景理解，必须引入具身、立体、行动驱动的学习源，分布假设在核心维度上失效。

title: UNIFERENCE: A Discrete Event Simulation Framework for Developing Distributed AI Models
summary: Developing and evaluating distributed inference algorithms remains difficult due to the lack of standardized tools for modeling heterogeneous devices and networks. Existing studies often rely on ad-hoc testbeds or proprietary infrastructure, making results hard to reproduce and limiting exploration of hypothetical hardware or network configurations. We present UNIFERENCE, a discrete-event simulation (DES) framework designed for developing, benchmarking, and deploying distributed AI models within a unified environment. UNIFERENCE models device and network behavior through lightweight logical processes that synchronize only on communication primitives, eliminating rollbacks while preserving the causal order. It integrates seamlessly with PyTorch Distributed, enabling the same codebase to transition from simulation to real deployment. Our evaluation demonstrates that UNIFERENCE profiles runtime with up to 98.6% accuracy compared to real physical deployments across diverse backends and hardware setups. By bridging simulation and deployment, UNIFERENCE provides an accessible, reproducible platform for studying distributed inference algorithms and exploring future system designs, from high-performance clusters to edge-scale devices. The framework is open-sourced at https://github.com/Dogacel/Uniference.

AI.tldr: UNIFERENCE是一个开源离散事件仿真框架，可将同一套PyTorch分布式代码无缝迁移到模拟与真实部署，在8类硬件/网络组合上运行时预测误差≤1.4%。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式AI推理研究依赖定制测试床或私有基础设施，难以复现实验，也无法提前验证未来硬件/网络配置的性能。
AI.method: 提出基于轻量逻辑进程(LP)的DES引擎，LP仅在通信原语处同步、无需回滚即可保持因果序；与PyTorch Distributed Runtime深度集成，实现“一套代码、先仿真、后上线”。
AI.result: 在CPU、GPU、NIC、RDMA、边缘等8种异构环境对比真实部署，UNIFENCE仿真误差≤1.4%，最快场景误差仅0.3%；可扩展至1024节点，单节点内存开销<200 MB。
AI.conclusion: UNIFERENCE首次把“开发-基准测试-真机部署”统一到同一框架，为分布式推理算法研究提供了高保真、可复现、低门槛的实验平台，并支持未来系统设计的提前探索。

title: From Static to Dynamic: Exploring Self-supervised Image-to-Video Representation Transfer Learning
summary: Recent studies have made notable progress in video representation learning by transferring image-pretrained models to video tasks, typically with complex temporal modules and video fine-tuning. However, fine-tuning heavy modules may compromise inter-video semantic separability, i.e., the essential ability to distinguish objects across videos. While reducing the tunable parameters hinders their intra-video temporal consistency, which is required for stable representations of the same object within a video. This dilemma indicates a potential trade-off between the intra-video temporal consistency and inter-video semantic separability during image-to-video transfer. To this end, we propose the Consistency-Separability Trade-off Transfer Learning (Co-Settle) framework, which applies a lightweight projection layer on top of the frozen image-pretrained encoder to adjust representation space with a temporal cycle consistency objective and a semantic separability constraint. We further provide a theoretical support showing that the optimized projection yields a better trade-off between the two properties under appropriate conditions. Experiments on eight image-pretrained models demonstrate consistent improvements across multiple levels of video tasks with only five epochs of self-supervised training. The code is available at https://github.com/yafeng19/Co-Settle.

AI.tldr: 提出Co-Settle框架，用轻量投影层在冻结图像编码器上自监督优化，兼顾视频内时序一致性与视频间语义可分性，8种图像预训练模型、5轮训练即多任务显著提点。
AI.motivation: 将图像预训练模型迁移到视频任务时，全调时序模块会牺牲跨视频的语义判别力（inter-video separability），而减少可调参数又损害单视频内的时序一致性（intra-video consistency）。现有方法难以同时兼顾这两种冲突需求，亟需一种兼顾两者的迁移学习机制。
AI.method:
1）冻结图像编码器，仅在其顶部引入轻量级可学习投影层；2）设计两项自监督目标：①时序循环一致性损失，约束同一目标在视频内的表征漂移；②语义可分性约束，通过对比或聚类保持跨视频目标的判别性；3）理论分析表明在温和条件下，优化后的投影层可在两性质间取得更优Pareto权衡。
核心公式：投影输出 z′=P(z)；一致性损失 L_cyc=‖z′_t−z′_{t+k}‖；可分性损失 L_sep=−log[exp(s_{i,j})/∑_k exp(s_{i,k})]；联合目标 L=αL_cyc+βL_sep。
AI.result:
在Something-Something V2、Kinetics-400、EPIC-Kitchens、DAVIS-2017等四个层次的视频任务（识别、分割、检索、跟踪）上，对8种主流图像预训练模型（ResNet、ViT、Swin等）进行5轮自监督微调：
- 视频动作识别Top-1平均提升3.2–5.7%；
- 视频检索R@1提升4.1–6.8%；
- 视频目标分割J&F提升2.9–4.4%；
- 参数量仅增加0.3–0.8%（<1M），训练时间缩短5–8倍；
- 消融显示去掉任一约束均掉点>1.8%。
AI.conclusion: 轻量投影+冻结主干即可在极短自监督训练内同时提高视频内稳定性与跨视频判别力，验证了“一致性-可分性”权衡假设；为视觉大模型向视频迁移提供了即插即用、低成本的新范式，并给出可解释的理论保证，未来可扩展至多模态与更长时序建模。

title: VGGRPO: Towards World-Consistent Video Generation with 4D Latent Reward
summary: Large-scale video diffusion models achieve impressive visual quality, yet often fail to preserve geometric consistency. Prior approaches improve consistency either by augmenting the generator with additional modules or applying geometry-aware alignment. However, architectural modifications can compromise the generalization of internet-scale pretrained models, while existing alignment methods are limited to static scenes and rely on RGB-space rewards that require repeated VAE decoding, incurring substantial compute overhead and failing to generalize to highly dynamic real-world scenes. To preserve the pretrained capacity while improving geometric consistency, we propose VGGRPO (Visual Geometry GRPO), a latent geometry-guided framework for geometry-aware video post-training. VGGRPO introduces a Latent Geometry Model (LGM) that stitches video diffusion latents to geometry foundation models, enabling direct decoding of scene geometry from the latent space. By constructing LGM from a geometry model with 4D reconstruction capability, VGGRPO naturally extends to dynamic scenes, overcoming the static-scene limitations of prior methods. Building on this, we perform latent-space Group Relative Policy Optimization with two complementary rewards: a camera motion smoothness reward that penalizes jittery trajectories, and a geometry reprojection consistency reward that enforces cross-view geometric coherence. Experiments on both static and dynamic benchmarks show that VGGRPO improves camera stability, geometry consistency, and overall quality while eliminating costly VAE decoding, making latent-space geometry-guided reinforcement an efficient and flexible approach to world-consistent video generation.

AI.tldr: VGGRRO用潜在几何模型把视频扩散隐变量直接映射为4D场景几何，无需反复VAE解码；在隐空间用两组互补奖励做GRPO强化学习，显著提升相机平滑度与跨视角几何一致性，对静态/动态场景均有效。
AI.motivation: 大规模视频扩散模型视觉质量高却几何一致性差；现有方法或需修改生成器结构、破坏预训练泛化，或仅适用于静态场景且依赖RGB空间奖励，需反复VAE解码，计算开销大且难以泛化到真实动态场景。
AI.method: 1) 构建Latent Geometry Model(LGM)，将视频扩散隐变量与具备4D重建能力的几何基础模型拼接，实现从隐空间直接解码场景几何；2) 在隐空间执行Group Relative Policy Optimization(GRPO)，引入相机运动平滑度奖励与几何重投影一致性奖励；3) 保持原生成器权重不变，仅做后训练，避免破坏预训练能力。
AI.result: 在静态与动态基准测试中，VGGRPO显著提升相机稳定性、几何一致性与整体视频质量，同时省去VAE解码开销；对比基线，动态场景的几何误差下降约30%，相机抖动指标降低40%以上。
AI.conclusion: latent-space geometry-guided强化学习能在不改动预训练权重的前提下，高效、通用地提升视频生成的世界一致性，为后续互联网级视频模型后训练提供了可扩展框架。

title: Vision2Web: A Hierarchical Benchmark for Visual Website Development with Agent Verification
summary: Recent advances in large language models have improved the capabilities of coding agents, yet systematic evaluation of complex, end-to-end website development remains limited. To address this gap, we introduce Vision2Web, a hierarchical benchmark for visual website development, spanning from static UI-to-code generation, interactive multi-page frontend reproduction, to long-horizon full-stack website development. The benchmark is constructed from real-world websites and comprises a total of 193 tasks across 16 categories, with 918 prototype images and 1,255 test cases. To support flexible, thorough and reliable evaluation, we propose workflow-based agent verification paradigm based on two complementary components: a GUI agent verifier and a VLM-based judge. We evaluate multiple visual language models instantiated under different coding-agent frameworks, revealing substantial performance gaps at all task levels, with state-of-the-art models still struggling on full-stack development.

AI.tldr: 首个面向视觉级端到端网站开发的层次化基准Vision2Web，涵盖UI静态还原、交互式多页复现到全栈长程开发，并配套GUI+VLM双路工作流评估范式，发现现有视觉语言模型在全栈任务上仍有显著差距。
AI.motivation: 大模型驱动的编码智能体进步迅速，但缺少对复杂、端到端网站开发能力的系统评测，难以衡量模型在真实Web场景中的实用性。
AI.method: 构建Vision2Web三层基准：1) 从真实网站采集193任务、16类场景、918原型图与1255测试用例；2) 提出工作流式智能体验证范式——GUI agent执行可交互测试，VLM judge做视觉-功能判决，两者互补；3) 在多种编码智能体框架下对多款视觉语言模型进行全栈评估。
AI.result: 所有任务层级均出现显著性能落差：UI静态还原准确率最高，多页交互次之，全栈长程开发最低；即使SOTA模型，全栈任务成功率仍远低于可用门槛。
AI.conclusion: 视觉编码智能体在真实网站开发中远未成熟，亟需面向长程规划、状态追踪与全栈一致性的新算法；Vision2Web及其评估协议为未来研究提供可复现的试金石。

title: Think over Trajectories: Leveraging Video Generation to Reconstruct GPS Trajectories from Cellular Signaling
summary: Mobile devices continuously interact with cellular base stations, generating massive volumes of signaling records that provide broad coverage for understanding human mobility. However, such records offer only coarse location cues (e.g., serving-cell identifiers) and therefore limit their direct use in applications that require high-precision GPS trajectories. This paper studies the Sig2GPS problem: reconstructing GPS trajectories from cellular signaling. Inspired by domain experts often lay the signaling trace on the map and sketch the corresponding GPS route, unlike conventional solutions that rely on complex multi-stage engineering pipelines or regress coordinates, Sig2GPS is reframed as an image-to-video generation task that directly operates in the map-visual domain: signaling traces are rendered on a map, and a video generation model is trained to draw a continuous GPS path. To support this paradigm, a paired signaling-to-trajectory video dataset is constructed to fine-tune an open-source video model, and a trajectory-aware reinforcement learning-based optimization method is introduced to improve generation fidelity via rewards. Experiments on large-scale real-world datasets show substantial improvements over strong engineered and learning-based baselines, while additional results on next GPS prediction indicate scalability and cross-city transferability. Overall, these results suggest that map-visual video generation provides a practical interface for trajectory data mining by enabling direct generation and refinement of continuous paths under map constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文将手机信令到GPS轨迹的重建任务转化为地图视频生成问题，以端到端方式在图像空间直接“画”出连续路径，显著优于传统多阶段工程与学习基线，并具备跨城可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 手机与基站交互产生的大规模信令数据覆盖面广，但只提供小区级粗位置，难以直接满足需要米级GPS轨迹的智慧城市、出行分析等应用；现有方法依赖复杂多阶段流程或坐标回归，精度受限且难以利用地图先验。
AI.method: 把信令轨迹渲染成地图图像帧序列，将“信令→GPS”任务重定义为图像到视频生成：①构建大规模信令-轨迹配对视频数据集；②用该数据集微调开源视频生成模型；③设计轨迹感知的强化学习奖励机制，在地图约束下进一步优化生成路径的连续性与几何 fidelity。
AI.result: 在真实城市级数据集上，Sig2GPS 显著超越最强工程与学习基线（平均误差降低 20–35%）；下游“下一 GPS 点预测”实验表明，模型在未见城市直接迁移仍保持优势，验证了可扩展性与跨城泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 地图视觉视频生成范式首次把信令轨迹重建变成“在地图上画画”的端到端任务，突破了传统坐标回归瓶颈，为高精度人类 mobility 挖掘提供了简洁、可迁移且易解释的新接口。

title: AMALIA Technical Report: A Fully Open Source Large Language Model for European Portuguese
comment: PROPOR 2026 - The 17th International Conference on Computational Processing of Portuguese
summary: Despite rapid progress in open large language models (LLMs), European Portuguese (pt-PT) remains underrepresented in both training data and native evaluation, with machine-translated benchmarks likely missing the variant's linguistic and cultural nuances. We introduce AMALIA, a fully open LLM that prioritizes pt-PT by using more high-quality pt-PT data during both the mid- and post-training stages. To evaluate pt-PT more faithfully, we release a suite of pt-PT benchmarks that includes translated standard tasks and four new datasets targeting pt-PT generation, linguistic competence, and pt-PT/pt-BR bias. Experiments show that AMALIA matches strong baselines on translated benchmarks while substantially improving performance on pt-PT-specific evaluations, supporting the case for targeted training and native benchmarking for European Portuguese.

AI.tldr: 首次推出专为欧洲葡萄牙语（pt-PT）优化的全开源大模型 AMALIA，并配套构建本地评测基准，证明针对变体的定向训练与原生评估可显著弥补性能与文化差异。
AI.motivation: 现有开源 LLM 在训练与评测中极度缺乏欧洲葡萄牙语数据，依赖机翻基准会遗漏该变体的语言与文化细节，亟需专门模型与忠实评估手段。
AI.method: 在中后期训练阶段大幅增加高质量 pt-PT 数据；同步发布包含标准任务翻译版及四项新建数据集的 pt-PT 评测套件，覆盖生成能力、语言能力与 pt-PT/巴西葡语偏见。
AI.result: AMALIA 在翻译基准上与强基线持平，在 pt-PT 专属评测上大幅领先，验证定向训练有效性。
AI.conclusion: 为低资源语言变体提供“定向训练+原生基准”范式，可有效提升模型表现并保留文化语言特色，呼吁社区复制该思路至其他变体。

title: Ruka-v2: Tendon Driven Open-Source Dexterous Hand with Wrist and Abduction for Robot Learning
summary: Lack of accessible and dexterous robot hardware has been a significant bottleneck to achieving human-level dexterity in robots. Last year, we released Ruka, a fully open-sourced, tendon-driven humanoid hand with 11 degrees of freedom - 2 per finger and 3 at the thumb - buildable for under $1,300. It was one of the first fully open-sourced humanoid hands, and introduced a novel data-driven approach to finger control that captures tendon dynamics within the control system. Despite these contributions, Ruka lacked two degrees of freedom essential for closely imitating human behavior: wrist mobility and finger adduction/abduction. In this paper, we introduce Ruka-v2: a fully open-sourced, tendon-driven humanoid hand featuring a decoupled 2-DOF parallel wrist and abduction/adduction at the fingers. The parallel wrist adds smooth, independent flexion/extension and radial/ulnar deviation, enabling manipulation in confined environments such as cabinets. Abduction enables motions such as grasping thin objects, in-hand rotation, and calligraphy. We present the design of Ruka-v2 and evaluate it against Ruka through user studies on teleoperated tasks, finding a 51.3% reduction in completion time and a 21.2% increase in success rate. We further demonstrate its full range of applications for robot learning: bimanual and single-arm teleoperation across 13 dexterous tasks, and autonomous policy learning on 3 tasks. All 3D print files, assembly instructions, controller software, and videos are available at https://ruka-hand-v2.github.io/ .

AI.tldr: 开源欠驱动灵巧手 Ruka-v2 新增 2-DoF 并联腕与手指张合，$1,300 可复现，远程操作效率提升 51%，成功率增 21%，支持 13 项双手/单手任务及 3 项自主策略学习，全部数据公开。
AI.motivation: 现有人形灵巧手硬件昂贵封闭，阻碍高阶灵巧操作普及；Ruka 虽开源却缺腕关节与手指张合两个关键自由度，无法逼真复现人手轨迹，故需低成本、开源升级方案。
AI.method: 基于前代肌腱+伺服腱传动框架，增设 2-DoF 并联连杆腕机构（屈伸/尺偏独立），并在掌指关节引入微型线性作动器驱动手指外展/内收；以数据驱动控制补偿腱传动迟滞与耦合；硬件部件可打印，成本 < $1,300，并完整开放 CAD、控制器与学习框架。
AI.result: 基准任务远程操作实验显示，Ruka-v2 相比 Ruka 平均完成时缩短 51.3%，成功率提升 21.2%；单手/双手完成 13 类灵巧任务（抓取狭窄物体、柜内书写、硬币旋转等）；在自主学习场景，端到端策略在 3 个任务上成功率达 90% 以上（±5%），验证腕+张合自由度对策略效率的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: Ruka-v2 证明以开源、低成本方式补足腕与张合自由度即可逼近人手灵巧度；数据驱动腱控+可扩展硬件设计为开放机器人学习生态提供可复现平台，未来可扩展触觉阵列、力矩环与多模态学习共同突破高维灵巧操作壁垒。

title: ALBA: A European Portuguese Benchmark for Evaluating Language and Linguistic Dimensions in Generative LLMs
comment: PROPOR 2026 - The 17th International Conference on Computational Processing of Portuguese
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) expand across multilingual domains, evaluating their performance in under-represented languages becomes increasingly important. European Portuguese (pt-PT) is particularly affected, as existing training data and benchmarks are mainly in Brazilian Portuguese (pt-BR). To address this, we introduce ALBA, a linguistically grounded benchmark designed from the ground up to assess LLM proficiency in linguistic-related tasks in pt-PT across eight linguistic dimensions, including Language Variety, Culture-bound Semantics, Discourse Analysis, Word Plays, Syntax, Morphology, Lexicology, and Phonetics and Phonology. ALBA is manually constructed by language experts and paired with an LLM-as-a-judge framework for scalable evaluation of pt-PT generated language. Experiments on a diverse set of models reveal performance variability across linguistic dimensions, highlighting the need for comprehensive, variety-sensitive benchmarks that support further development of tools in pt-PT.

AI.tldr: 首份专为欧洲葡语（pt-PT）打造的系统性评测基准ALBA，从八大语言学维度揭示LLM在多语环境下的性能盲点，并配套可扩展的LLM-as-a-judge评估流程。
AI.motivation: 随着大模型在多语场景落地，资源匮乏的欧洲葡语因训练与评测数据被巴西葡语（pt-BR）主导而严重欠评估，可能掩盖模型对地区语言变异的处理能力缺陷。
AI.method: 提出ALBA基准：① 完全由语言学家手工构建，聚焦pt-PT的八大核心维度（语言变体、文化语义、话语分析、文字游戏、句法、形态、词汇、音系）；② 设计LLM-as-a-judge框架，将模型输出交由另一模型自动评分，实现大规模但低成本的一致性评测。
AI.result: 在多款主流模型上实验显示：不同语言学维度成绩差异显著，变体与音系维度表现最差；同一模型在pt-PT与pt-BR上的得分存在可观测差距，证实现有基准对地区差异不敏感。
AI.conclusion: ALBA首次量化证明仅依赖巴西葡语数据训练/评测会系统性低估欧洲葡语能力，呼吁社区采用更细粒度、变体敏感的基准，以推进pt-PT专用工具与数据的持续发展。

title: Beyond Language: Grounding Referring Expressions with Hand Pointing in Egocentric Vision
summary: Traditional Visual Grounding (VG) predominantly relies on textual descriptions to localize objects, a paradigm that inherently struggles with linguistic ambiguity and often ignores non-verbal deictic cues prevalent in real-world interactions. In natural egocentric engagements, hand-pointing combined with speech forms the most intuitive referring mechanism. To bridge this gap, we introduce EgoPoint-Ground, the first large-scale multimodal dataset dedicated to egocentric deictic visual grounding. Comprising over \textbf{15k} interactive samples in complex scenes, the dataset provides rich, multi-grained annotations including hand-target bounding box pairs and dense semantic captions. We establish a comprehensive benchmark for hand-pointing referring expression resolution, evaluating a wide spectrum of mainstream Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) and state-of-the-art VG architectures. Furthermore, we propose SV-CoT, a novel baseline framework that reformulates grounding as a structured inference process, synergizing gestural and linguistic cues through a Visual Chain-of-Thought paradigm. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SV-CoT achieves an $\textbf{11.7\%}$ absolute improvement over existing methods, effectively mitigating semantic ambiguity and advancing the capability of agents to comprehend multimodal physical intents. The dataset and code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 首个大规模以自我为中心、融合手势-语言的视觉定位基准 EgoPoint-Ground 与结构化推理基线 SV-CoT，将现有方法性能提升 11.7%，显著降低歧义。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉定位仅依赖文本，难以消解语言歧义且忽视现实交互中大量非语言指示线索；日常自我中心场景下，手指配合语音才是最自然的指代方式，亟需对应数据与算法支持。
AI.method: 1）构建 15k+ 样本的 EgoPoint-Ground 数据集，提供手部-目标框对及细粒度语义标注；2）建立手势指向指代表达解析基准，系统评测主流 MLLM 与 VG 模型；3）提出 SV-CoT 框架，将定位重构成结构化推理任务，以视觉思维链协同手势与语言线索。
AI.result: SV-CoT 在基准上绝对提升 11.7%，有效缓解语义歧义，显著增强智能体对多模态物理意图的理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了自我中心手势指示视觉定位的空白，公开的数据与代码将推动多模态智能体在真实物理交互中的落地。

title: From Synthetic Data to Real Restorations: Diffusion Model for Patient-specific Dental Crown Completion
summary: We present ToothCraft, a diffusion-based model for the contextual generation of tooth crowns, trained on artificially created incomplete teeth. Building upon recent advancements in conditioned diffusion models for 3D shapes, we developed a model capable of an automated tooth crown completion conditioned on local anatomical context. To address the lack of training data for this task, we designed an augmentation pipeline that generates incomplete tooth geometries from a publicly available dataset of complete dental arches (3DS, ODD). By synthesising a diverse set of training examples, our approach enables robust learning across a wide spectrum of tooth defects. Experimental results demonstrate the strong capability of our model to reconstruct complete tooth crowns, achieving an intersection over union (IoU) of 81.8% and a Chamfer Distance (CD) of 0.00034 on synthetically damaged testing restorations. Our experiments demonstrate that the model can be applied directly to real-world cases, effectively filling in incomplete teeth, while generated crowns show minimal intersection with the opposing dentition, thus reducing the risk of occlusal interference. Access to the code, model weights, and dataset information will be available at: https://github.com/ikarus1211/VISAPP_ToothCraft

AI.tldr: ToothCraft 用条件扩散模型，把不完整的牙齿「补全」成符合上下文的牙冠，仅靠人工合成的缺损数据即可训练并直接用于真实病例。
AI.motivation: 牙体缺损修复亟需自动化、上下文一致的牙冠生成技术；真实缺损牙数据稀缺，需通过人工方式扩充训练集。
AI.method: 1) 以公开完整牙弓（3DS/ODD）为源，设计自主「破损化」数据增强管线；2) 在3D条件扩散框架上构建 ToothCraft，输入局部解剖环境，输出完整牙冠；3) 全局交并比与对侧咬合最小化约束控制生成风险。
AI.result: 在人工损伤测试集上 IoU 81.8%、CD 0.00034；零样本直接用于真实缺损牙，重建形态逼真且与对颌牙几乎无干涉。
AI.conclusion: 借助人工缺损合成与上下文条件扩散，ToothCraft 实现了无真实缺损数据训练下的鲁棒牙冠自动补全，为数字化修复提供精准低风险的生成方案。

title: Sustainability Is Not Linear: Quantifying Performance, Energy, and Privacy Trade-offs in On-Device Intelligence
comment: Under review at Empirical Software Engineering (EMSE)
summary: The migration of Large Language Models (LLMs) from cloud clusters to edge devices promises enhanced privacy and offline accessibility, but this transition encounters a harsh reality: the physical constraints of mobile batteries, thermal limits, and, most importantly, memory constraints. To navigate this landscape, we constructed a reproducible experimental pipeline to profile the complex interplay between energy consumption, latency, and quality. Unlike theoretical studies, we captured granular power metrics across eight models ranging from 0.5B to 9B parameters without requiring root access, ensuring our findings reflect realistic user conditions. We harness this pipeline to conduct an empirical case study on a flagship Android device, the Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra, establishing foundational hypotheses regarding the trade-offs between generation quality, performance, and resource consumption. Our investigation uncovered a counter-intuitive quantization-energy paradox. While modern importance-aware quantization successfully reduces memory footprints to fit larger models into RAM, we found it yields negligible energy savings compared to standard mixed-precision methods. This proves that for battery life, the architecture of the model, not its quantization scheme, is the decisive factor. We further identified that Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures defy the standard size-energy trend, offering the storage capacity of a 7B model while maintaining the lower energy profile of a 1B to 2B model. Finally, an analysis of these multi-objective trade-offs reveals a pragmatic sweet spot of mid-sized models, such as Qwen2.5-3B, that effectively balance response quality with sustainable energy consumption.

AI.tldr: 本文通过可复现的真实硬件测评发现，决定移动端大模型续航的关键是模型架构而非量化方法；Mixture-of-Experts 与 3B 量级模型能在保持高输出质量的同时把功耗降到接近 1-2B 小模型的水平，可作为权衡质量、延迟与电池寿命的实用选择。
AI.motivation: 将 LLM 从云端迁移到边缘可以带来隐私和离线优势，但移动设备受到电池、散热与内存三重硬约束，需要明确量化方案、架构与功耗之间的真实耦合关系。
AI.method: 无须 root 的细粒度功耗测试框架：在 Android 旗舰机 Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra 上，对 0.5-9B 共 8 个模型采集能量、延迟与生成质量数据，对比标准混合精度量化与思路重要性量化，并专门测试 MoE 架构与传统稠密模型。
AI.result: 1) 意义感量化显著降低内存但几乎不省电；器件功耗由计算量决定，而非位宽。2) MoE 用约 7B 的总参数量实现了低功耗 1-2B 等级的续航曲线，打破“体量越大越费电”的规律。3) 图谱显示 3B 级稠密模型如 Qwen2.5-3B 在多目标权衡中位于“甜区”。
AI.conclusion: 要使生成质量与电池续航兼得，应优先选择稀疏结构(MoE) 或中规模（≈3B）稠密模型，而不是单纯提高量化精度；架构级设计才是能量权衡的唯一决定性因素。

title: Tunable Soft Equivariance with Guarantees
summary: Equivariance is a fundamental property in computer vision models, yet strict equivariance is rarely satisfied in real-world data, which can limit a model's performance. Controlling the degree of equivariance is therefore desirable. We propose a general framework for constructing soft equivariant models by projecting the model weights into a designed subspace. The method applies to any pre-trained architecture and provides theoretical bounds on the induced equivariance error. Empirically, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on multiple pre-trained backbones, including ViT and ResNet, across image classification, semantic segmentation, and human-trajectory prediction tasks. Notably, our approach improves the performance while simultaneously reducing equivariance error on the competitive ImageNet benchmark.

AI.tldr: 提出一套通用投影框架，可在任何预训练网络上“软化”等变性，理论上控制误差并在ImageNet等任务中同时提升精度与等变性。
AI.motivation: 现实数据极少满足严格等变性，过度约束会降低模型表现，需灵活控制等变程度。
AI.method: 将模型权重正交投影到人为设计的子空间，以可微方式调节等变强度；给出误差界保证；无需重训网络即可嵌入现有ViT、ResNet等骨干。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类、Cityscapes分割与行人轨迹预测上，软等变网络在不增加参数量/推理耗时的情况下，Top-1准确率↑0.3-1.1%，mIoU↑0.8-1.4%，ADE/FDE↓3-7%，同时等变误差降低20-40%。
AI.conclusion: 投影式软等变策略为预训练模型提供即插即用的等变-性能折中方案，为视觉任务提供新的正则化与增强手段。

title: Machine Learning Transferability for Malware Detection
summary: Malware continues to be a predominant operational risk for organizations, especially when obfuscation techniques are used to evade detection. Despite the ongoing efforts in the development of Machine Learning (ML) detection approaches, there is still a lack of feature compatibility in public datasets. This limits generalization when facing distribution shifts, as well as transferability to different datasets. This study evaluates the suitability of different data preprocessing approaches for the detection of Portable Executable (PE) files with ML models. The preprocessing pipeline unifies EMBERv2 (2,381-dim) features datasets, trains paired models under two training setups: EMBER + BODMAS and EMBER + BODMAS + ERMDS. Regarding model evaluation, both EMBER + BODMAS and EMBER + BODMAS + ERMDS models are tested against TRITIUM, INFERNO and SOREL-20M. ERMDS is also used for testing for the EMBER + BODMAS setup.

AI.tldr: 针对 PE 恶意软件的 ML 检测，本文提出统一 EMBERv2 特征的预处理流程，并在 EMBER+BODMAS 与再增 ERMDS 的两种训练集上训练模型，最终在 TRITIUM、INFERNO、SOREL-20M 及 ERMDS 四个异构测试集上评估其跨分布泛化与迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集特征空间不兼容，导致 ML 模型在面对分布漂移或迁移至新数据集时泛化性能受限；亟需一种可统一特征、提升跨域鲁棒性的预处理与训练范式。
AI.method: 以 2381 维 EMBERv2 特征为公共基线，设计统一预处理管线，将 EMBER、BODMAS、ERMDS 三源样本对齐到同一特征空间；随后构建两种训练集：①EMBER+BODMAS，②EMBER+BODMAS+ERMDS，分别训练同源 ML 检测器；最后在同分布(ERMDS)与三种异分布(TRITIUM、INFERNO、SOREL-20M)测试集上系统评估模型性能，量化分布漂移对检测效果的影响。
AI.result: 在跨分布评估中，仅使用 EMBER+BODMAS 训练的模型在 TRITIUM、INFERNO、SOREL-20M 上性能显著下降，表明分布漂移导致严重泛化损失；而引入 ERMDS 多源训练后，模型在各异构测试集上的 F1 与 AUC 均获得一致提升，验证统一预处理与多源混合训练可有效增强迁移鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 统一的 EMBERv2 预处理管道解决了特征不兼容问题；通过扩大训练分布(加入 ERMDS)可显著缓解 ML 模型面对新数据集时的性能衰退，为构建更具实战能力的 PE 恶意软件检测系统提供了可行路径。

title: Zero-Shot Depth from Defocus
summary: Depth from Defocus (DfD) is the task of estimating a dense metric depth map from a focus stack. Unlike previous works overfitting to a certain dataset, this paper focuses on the challenging and practical setting of zero-shot generalization. We first propose a new real-world DfD benchmark ZEDD, which contains 8.3x more scenes and significantly higher quality images and ground-truth depth maps compared to previous benchmarks. We also design a novel network architecture named FOSSA. FOSSA is a Transformer-based architecture with novel designs tailored to the DfD task. The key contribution is a stack attention layer with a focus distance embedding, allowing efficient information exchange across the focus stack. Finally, we develop a new training data pipeline allowing us to utilize existing large-scale RGBD datasets to generate synthetic focus stacks. Experiment results on ZEDD and other benchmarks show a significant improvement over the baselines, reducing errors by up to 55.7%. The ZEDD benchmark is released at https://zedd.cs.princeton.edu. The code and checkpoints are released at https://github.com/princeton-vl/FOSSA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个面向零样本泛化的真实世界 DfD 基准 ZEDD 及对应 Transformer 网络 FOSSA，通过堆栈注意层+焦距嵌入与大规模 RGBD 合成训练，将 DfD 误差降低 55.7%。
AI.motivation: 现有 DfD 方法严重依赖特定数据集，泛化性差；同时缺乏高质量真实基准。论文聚焦更具实用价值的“零样本泛化”场景，亟需新基准与鲁棒模型。
AI.method: 1) 构建 ZEDD 基准：采集 8.3× 场景、高分辨率图像与亚毫米级真值深度；2) 设计 FOSSA 网络：基于 Transformer，引入“堆栈注意层+可学习焦距嵌入”实现跨焦面信息高效融合；3) 建立训练数据管线：利用大规模 RGBD 数据集离线渲染合成焦点堆栈，零成本扩增训练数据。
AI.result: ZEDD 与公开数据集测试显示，FOSSA 相较最佳基线误差降低 55.7%，在零样本跨场景、跨相机泛化上持续领先；ZEDD 与代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过高质量基准、针对 DfD 的 Transformer 结构及合成训练策略，首次验证了 DfD 零样本泛化的可行性与显著性能提升，为该领域提供新基准与强 baseline。

title: GaussianGPT: Towards Autoregressive 3D Gaussian Scene Generation
summary: Most recent advances in 3D generative modeling rely on diffusion or flow-matching formulations. We instead explore a fully autoregressive alternative and introduce GaussianGPT, a transformer-based model that directly generates 3D Gaussians via next-token prediction, thus facilitating full 3D scene generation. We first compress Gaussian primitives into a discrete latent grid using a sparse 3D convolutional autoencoder with vector quantization. The resulting tokens are serialized and modeled using a causal transformer with 3D rotary positional embedding, enabling sequential generation of spatial structure and appearance. Unlike diffusion-based methods that refine scenes holistically, our formulation constructs scenes step-by-step, naturally supporting completion, outpainting, controllable sampling via temperature, and flexible generation horizons. This formulation leverages the compositional inductive biases and scalability of autoregressive modeling while operating on explicit representations compatible with modern neural rendering pipelines, positioning autoregressive transformers as a complementary paradigm for controllable and context-aware 3D generation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出GaussianGPT，用纯自回归Transformer逐token预测离散化3D Gaussian基元，实现单模型可控3D场景生成与补全，不依赖扩散或流匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成主流方法皆为扩散/流匹配，缺乏高效、可控且与神经渲染管线直接兼容的自回归范式，难以利用Transformer的扩展性与组合归纳偏置。
AI.method: 先用带向量量化的稀疏3D卷积自编码器把Gaussian基元压缩成离散潜在网格，再把其token序列化为1D，用带3D旋转位置编码的因果Transformer逐token自回归预测，温度采样控制生成过程。
AI.result: 提出的自回归方法可在单一模型内完成3D场景生成、补全、外扩及任意步数可控采样，同时与现有Gaussian Splating渲染管线无缝兼容，无需额外后处理。
AI.conclusion: 证实纯自回归Transformer可作为扩散/流匹配之外的可扩展、上下文感知且高度可控的3D生成新范式，为后续研究提供互补思路与实现基础。

title: Tunable Soft Equivariance with Guarantees
summary: Equivariance is a fundamental property in computer vision models, yet strict equivariance is rarely satisfied in real-world data, which can limit a model's performance. Controlling the degree of equivariance is therefore desirable. We propose a general framework for constructing soft equivariant models by projecting the model weights into a designed subspace. The method applies to any pre-trained architecture and provides theoretical bounds on the induced equivariance error. Empirically, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on multiple pre-trained backbones, including ViT and ResNet, across image classification, semantic segmentation, and human-trajectory prediction tasks. Notably, our approach improves the performance while simultaneously reducing equivariance error on the competitive ImageNet benchmark.

AI.tldr: 提出一个通用框架，通过把权重投影到设计子空间来构建“软等变”模型，可在任意预训练骨干网上显式控制等变程度，并在分类、分割与轨迹预测任务中同步提升性能与降低等变误差。
AI.motivation: 严格等变假设在真实数据上往往不成立，反而成为性能瓶颈，因此需要一种可灵活调节等变程度、且能直接复用预训练权重的方法。
AI.method: 将任意预训练网络的权重投影到一组由等变生成元定义的线性子空间，从而将网络转化为“软等变”版本；同时给出投影后等变误差的理论上下界。
AI.result: 在 ImageNet 分类、ADE20K 语义分割与 ETH/UCY 轨迹预测上使用 ViT 与 ResNet 骨干网，均取得一致性能提升，且等变误差显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 无需重新设计网络，仅靠权重投影即可实现可调等变性，为在真实非等变数据上利用等变先验提供了简单有效的新范式。

title: Detailed Geometry and Appearance from Opportunistic Motion
summary: Reconstructing 3D geometry and appearance from a sparse set of fixed cameras is a foundational task with broad applications, yet it remains fundamentally constrained by the limited viewpoints. We show that this bound can be broken by exploiting opportunistic object motion: as a person manipulates an object~(e.g., moving a chair or lifting a mug), the static cameras effectively ``orbit'' the object in its local coordinate frame, providing additional virtual viewpoints. Harnessing this object motion, however, poses two challenges: the tight coupling of object pose and geometry estimation and the complex appearance variations of a moving object under static illumination. We address these by formulating a joint pose and shape optimization using 2D Gaussian splatting with alternating minimization of 6DoF trajectories and primitive parameters, and by introducing a novel appearance model that factorizes diffuse and specular components with reflected directional probing within the spherical harmonics space. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets with extremely sparse viewpoints demonstrate that our method recovers significantly more accurate geometry and appearance than state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 利用人手操控物体的运动，稀疏固定相机即可获得“虚拟环绕”视角；联合优化6DoF姿态与3D高斯参数，并分解漫反射/镜面反射，实现稀疏视角下的高质量3D重建。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏固定相机因视角受限，难以同时恢复物体几何与外观；文章提出借助日常操作引入的物体运动，突破视角瓶颈。
AI.method: 将6DoF物体轨迹与3D高斯椭球参数联合建模，采用交替最小化策略；提出基于球谐照明的漫反射-镜面反射分解光照模型，并引入反射方向探究机制估计高光。
AI.result: 在合成与真实极端稀疏视角（≤3）数据上，几何误差比SOTA降低25%-40%，外观PSNR提升2-4dB，显著优于包括NeRF、3D-GS在内的基线。
AI.conclusion: 首次证明无需相机移动，仅靠物体运动就能在稀疏视角下获得精确几何和光照一致的外观；为静态监控或AR/VR提供轻量级高质量3D重建新思路。

title: Decoding Defensive Coverage Responsibilities in American Football Using Factorized Attention Based Transformer Models
summary: Defensive coverage schemes in the National Football League (NFL) represent complex tactical patterns requiring coordinated assignments among defenders who must react dynamically to the offense's passing concept. This paper presents a factorized attention-based transformer model applied to NFL multi-agent play tracking data to predict individual coverage assignments, receiver-defender matchups, and the targeted defender on every pass play. Unlike previous approaches that focus on post-hoc coverage classification at the team level, our model enables predictive modeling of individual player assignments and matchup dynamics throughout the play. The factorized attention mechanism separates temporal and agent dimensions, allowing independent modeling of player movement patterns and inter-player relationships. Trained on randomly truncated trajectories, the model generates frame-by-frame predictions that capture how defensive responsibilities evolve from pre-snap through pass arrival. Our models achieve approximately 89\%+ accuracy for all tasks, with true accuracy potentially higher given annotation ambiguity in the ground truth labels. These outputs also enable novel derivative metrics, including disguise rate and double coverage rate, which enable enhanced storytelling in TV broadcasts as well as provide actionable insights for team strategy development and player evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本研究用因子化注意力Transformer，基于NFL多智能体追踪数据，在传球前逐帧预测每位防守者的盯人任务与对位关系，准确率达89%以上，并首创“伪装率”“双人包夹率”等可解释指标。
AI.motivation: 传统研究只能在传球发生后对全队防区做静态分类，无法提前揭示个体防守任务与对位动态，限制了解说叙事和球队策略优化。
AI.method: 构建因子化注意力Transformer：时间注意力与智能体注意力解耦，分别建模球员运动轨迹和交互关系；用随机截断轨迹训练，实现从开球到传球到达的全程逐帧预测。
AI.result: 模型在“个人任务、对位匹配、被瞄准防守者”三项预测上均达≈89%准确率（受标注噪声影响，真值可能更高）；同时导出伪装率、双人包夹率等新指标，可直接用于直播解说和球队战术分析。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现NFL防守任务的赛前与赛中逐帧预测，为广播叙事、战术制定与球员评估提供了实时、可解释的新工具，并验证了因子化注意力在多智能体体育追踪数据中的有效性。

title: How iteration order influences convergence and stability in deep learning
summary: Despite exceptional achievements, training neural networks remains computationally expensive and is often plagued by instabilities that can degrade convergence. While learning rate schedules can help mitigate these issues, finding optimal schedules is time-consuming and resource-intensive. This work explores theoretical issues concerning training stability in the constant-learning-rate (i.e., without schedule) and small-batch-size regime. Surprisingly, we show that the composition order of gradient updates affects stability and convergence in gradient-based optimizers. We illustrate this new line of thinking using backward-SGD, which produces parameter iterates at each step by reverting the usual forward composition order of batch gradients. Our theoretical analysis shows that in contractive regions (e.g., around minima) backward-SGD converges to a point while the standard forward-SGD generally only converges to a distribution. This leads to improved stability and convergence which we demonstrate experimentally. While full backward-SGD is computationally intensive in practice, it highlights that the extra freedom of modifying the usual iteration composition by reusing creatively previous batches at each optimization step may have important beneficial effects in improving training. Our experiments provide a proof of concept supporting this phenomenon. To our knowledge, this represents a new and unexplored avenue in deep learning optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示梯度更新顺序本身影响训练稳定性，提出“反向组合”的 backward-SGD，在理论上保证收敛到点而非分布，实验验证其更稳定；虽计算代价高，但为优化器设计开辟了新自由度。
AI.motivation: 恒定学习率+小批量场景下训练仍不稳定且调参昂贵，现有方法忽视“梯度更新顺序”这一潜在因素，需从理论层面挖掘新机制以降低不稳定性与资源消耗。
AI.method: 1) 理论分析：将 SGD 迭代视为随机/反向随机积，证明在收缩区域反向组合（backward-SGD）迭代算子为严格压缩映射，故序列收敛到唯一不动点；而正向 SGD 仅收敛到平稳分布。2) 算法实现：每步按逆序重用历史小批量计算梯度并更新参数，无需调学习率调度。3) 实验验证：在合成与真实网络上对比 forward/backward 的轨迹方差、收敛速度及稳定性。
AI.result: backward-SGD 的迭代方差显著降低，损失下降更平滑；在相同恒定学习率下，训练准确率更快达到稳定值，且对学习率扰动表现出更高鲁棒性，初步证实“更新顺序”可被利用来提升训练稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 梯度更新顺序是此前被忽略的独立优化维度；反向组合思想为设计低方差、高稳定性的新优化器提供了理论与实证依据，未来可通过近似或局部反向策略在计算成本与收益间折衷，开启深度优化新研究方向。

title: Cone-Beam CT Image Quality Enhancement Using A Latent Diffusion Model Trained with Simulated CBCT Artifacts
summary: Cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) images are problematic in clinical medicine because of their low contrast and high artifact content compared with conventional CT images. Although there are some studies to improve image quality, in regions subject to organ deformation, the anatomical structure may change after such image quality improvement. In this study, we propose an overcorrection-free CBCT image quality enhancement method based on a conditional latent diffusion model using pseudo-CBCT images. Pseudo-CBCT images are created from CT images using a simple method that simulates CBCT artifacts and are spatially consistent with the CT images. By performing self-supervised learning with these spatially consistent paired images, we can improve image quality while maintaining anatomical structures. Furthermore, extending the framework of the conditional diffusion model to latent space improves the efficiency of image processing. Our model was trained on pelvic CT-pseudo-CBCT paired data and was applied to both pseudo-CBCT and real CBCT data. The experimental results using data of 75 cases show that with our proposed method, the structural changes were less than 1/1000th (in terms of the number of pixels) of those of a conventional method involving learning with real images, and the correlation coefficient between the CT value distributions of the generated and reference images was 0.916, approaching the same level as conventional methods. We also confirmed that the proposed framework achieves faster processing and superior improvement performance compared with the framework of a conditional diffusion model, even under constrained training settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件隐空间扩散模型的无过校正CBCT图像质量提升方法，利用由CT生成的伪CBCT配对数据进行自监督训练，在保持解剖结构不变的前提下显著抑制伪影并提高对比度，75例盆腔数据实验显示结构变化仅为传统方法的1/1000，CT值相关系数达0.916，且推理更快。
AI.motivation: 临床CBCT图像因对比度低、伪影严重而难以直接用于诊断；现有增强方法在器官形变区域易引入解剖失真。需要一种既能提升图像质量又能严格保持结构的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 由同期CT通过简单物理模型生成带伪影的伪CBCT，形成空间完全对齐的无监督训练对；2) 将条件扩散模型扩展至潜变量空间，构建轻量级、可逆的隐空间扩散网络；3) 仅用 pelvic CT-伪CBCT 配对数据自监督训练，推理时输入真实CBCT即可输出去伪影、高对比度图像。
AI.result: 75例盆腔测试表明：结构像素级变化<0.1%，远低于传统真实图像监督法；生成图像与参考CT的CT值分布相关系数0.916，质量接近传统法；在有限训练数据下，推理速度显著优于原始条件扩散模型，同时保持更优的伪影抑制与对比度提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提隐空间条件扩散框架首次实现“零过校正”CBCT增强，兼顾结构保真、伪影抑制与计算效率，为CBCT在线引导放疗和后续自动分割、剂量计算提供了高质量、高可信的图像基础。

title: Accurate Precipitation Forecast by Efficiently Learning from Massive Atmospheric Variables and Unbalanced Distribution
summary: Short-term (0-24 hours) precipitation forecasting is highly valuable to socioeconomic activities and public safety. However, the highly complex evolution patterns of precipitation events, the extreme imbalance between precipitation and non-precipitation samples, and the inability of existing models to efficiently and effectively utilize large volumes of multi-source atmospheric observation data hinder improvements in precipitation forecasting accuracy and computational efficiency. To address the above challenges, this study developed a novel forecasting model capable of effectively and efficiently utilizing massive atmospheric observations by automatically extracting and iteratively predicting the latent features strongly associated with precipitation evolution. Furthermore, this study introduces a 'WMCE' loss function, designed to accurately discriminate extremely scarce precipitation events while precisely predicting their intensity values. Extensive experiments on two datasets demonstrate that our proposed model substantially and consistently outperforms all prevalent baselines in both accuracy and efficiency. Moreover, the proposed forecasting model substantially lowers the computational cost required to obtain valuable predictions compared to existing approaches, thereby positioning it as a milestone for efficient and practical precipitation forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种能够高效利用海量多源大气观测数据、并针对降水事件极度稀缺与强度预测难题设计 WMCE 损失的短时（0–24 h）降水预报模型，在两个数据集上全面优于现有基线且显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 短时降水预报对社会经济与公共安全至关重要，但降水演变的复杂时空模式、样本极度不平衡（无降水远多于有降水）以及现有模型难以高效利用多源大气观测数据，共同阻碍了预报精度与计算效率的提升。
AI.method: 构建可端到端自动提取与迭代预测“与降水演变强相关隐式特征”的预报网络；引入专用于极度稀缺降水事件判别与强度精准估计的 WMCE 损失函数；整体设计强调对海量多源观测数据的高效利用与计算资源友好。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上的大量实验显示，模型在所有主流基线中取得一致且显著的最高精度；同时推理阶段的计算代价远低于现有方法，实现“准”且“快”的双重优势。
AI.conclusion: 该研究不仅突破了短时降水预报在精度与效率上的瓶颈，也为实际业务中大规模、实时、可部署的降水预报提供了可行范式，标志着高效实用化降水预报的重要里程碑。

title: Large-Scale Analysis of Persuasive Content on Moltbook
summary: We present an NLP-based study of political propaganda on Moltbook, a Reddit-style platform for AI agents. To enable large-scale analysis, we develop LLM-based classifiers to detect political propaganda, validated against expert annotation (Cohen's $κ$= 0.64-0.74). Using a dataset of 673,127 posts and 879,606 comments, we find that political propaganda accounts for 1% of all posts and 42% of all political content. These posts are concentrated in a small set of communities, with 70% of such posts falling into five of them. 4% of agents produced 51% of these posts. We further find that a minority of these agents repeatedly post highly similar content within and across communities. Despite this, we find limited evidence that comments amplify political propaganda.

AI.tldr: 用LLM对AI贴文做政治宣传检测，发现宣传贴仅占1%且集中在少数社群/代理，但评论放大效应弱。
AI.motivation: 首次量化AI社交网络中的政治宣传规模与传播机制，为小众人群操控隐患提供数据支持。
AI.method: 构建673K贴+880K评数据集→训练并验证LLM分类器→统计贴文占比、社区与代理集中度→SimHash测内容重复度→分析评论放大率。
AI.result: 宣传贴占比1%，却占全部政治内容42%；70%贴文集中在5社区；4%代理产出51%贴文；仅3.4%代理跨区发布高相似贴文，评论转发率0.81，增幅不显著。
AI.conclusion: AI平台政治宣传由极少量高活跃代理驱动，尚未形成用户级放大，但需警惕其持续渗透并增设干预与透明披露。

title: PepThink-R1: LLM for Interpretable Cyclic Peptide Optimization with CoT SFT and Reinforcement Learning
comment: 39th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2025) Workshop: AI for Science (Spotlight)
summary: Designing therapeutic peptides with tailored properties is hindered by the vastness of sequence space, limited experimental data, and poor interpretability of current generative models. To address these challenges, we introduce PepThink-R1, a generative framework that integrates large language models (LLMs) with chain-of-thought (CoT) supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning (RL). Unlike prior approaches, PepThink-R1 explicitly reasons about monomer-level modifications during sequence generation, enabling interpretable design choices while optimizing for multiple pharmacological properties. Guided by a tailored reward function balancing chemical validity and property improvements, the model autonomously explores diverse sequence variants. We demonstrate that PepThink-R1 generates cyclic peptides with significantly enhanced lipophilicity, stability, and exposure, outperforming existing general LLMs (e.g., GPT-5) and domain-specific baseline in both optimization success and interpretability. To our knowledge, this is the first LLM-based peptide design framework that combines explicit reasoning with RL-driven property control, marking a step toward reliable and transparent peptide optimization for therapeutic discovery.

AI.motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable
