title: PruneFuse: Efficient Data Selection via Weight Pruning and Network Fusion
comment: Published in TMLR (Featured Certification). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2501.01118
summary: Efficient data selection is crucial for enhancing the training efficiency of deep neural networks and minimizing annotation requirements. Traditional methods often face high computational costs, limiting their scalability and practical use. We introduce PruneFuse, a novel strategy that leverages pruned networks for data selection and later fuses them with the original network to optimize training. PruneFuse operates in two stages: First, it applies structured pruning to create a smaller pruned network that, due to its structural coherence with the original network, is well-suited for the data selection task. This small network is then trained and selects the most informative samples from the dataset. Second, the trained pruned network is seamlessly fused with the original network. This integration leverages the insights gained during the training of the pruned network to facilitate the learning process of the fused network while leaving room for the network to discover more robust solutions. Extensive experimentation on various datasets demonstrates that PruneFuse significantly reduces computational costs for data selection, achieves better performance than baselines, and accelerates the overall training process.

AI.tldr: 提出两阶段框架 PruneFuse：先对原始网络进行结构化剪枝，用小模型完成高效数据选择；再将剪枝模型与原始网络融合，利用筛选样本加速主网络训练并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 深度网络训练依赖大量标注数据，传统数据选择方法计算开销大，难以扩展到大规模场景，亟需高效且低成本的数据筛选机制。
AI.method: PruneFuse 分两阶段：1) 对原始网络做结构化剪枝，得到与主网络结构一致的小网络，用其训练并筛选高信息量的样本；2) 将已训练的剪枝网络与原始网络无缝融合，把剪枝网络学到的知识迁移给融合网络，同时保留主网络进一步优化空间。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，PruneFuse 显著降低数据选择的计算成本，筛选出的数据训练出的模型性能优于基线方法，并缩短整体训练时间。
AI.conclusion: 利用剪枝-融合策略，PruneFuse 实现了高效、可扩展的数据选择，兼顾计算效率与模型精度，为大规模深度学习训练提供了实用新范式。

title: Governance-Aware Vector Subscriptions for Multi-Agent Knowledge Ecosystems
comment: 12 pages, 7 tables. Code and benchmark available at https://github.com/StevenJohnson998/AIngram
summary: As AI agent ecosystems grow, agents need mechanisms to monitor relevant knowledge in real time. Semantic publish-subscribe systems address this by matching new content against vector subscriptions. However, in multi-agent settings where agents operate under different data handling policies, unrestricted semantic subscriptions create policy violations: agents receive notifications about content they are not authorized to access. We introduce governance-aware vector subscriptions, a mechanism that composes semantic similarity matching with multi-dimensional policy predicates grounded in regulatory frameworks (EU DSM Directive, EU AI Act). The policy predicate operates over multiple independent dimensions (processing level, direct marketing restrictions, training opt-out, jurisdiction, and scientific usage) each with distinct legal bases. Agents subscribe to semantic regions of a curated knowledge base; notifications are dispatched only for validated content that passes both the similarity threshold and all applicable policy constraints. We formalize the mechanism, implement it within AIngram (an operational multi-agent knowledge base), and evaluate it using the PASA benchmark. We validate the mechanism on a synthetic corpus (1,000 chunks, 93 subscriptions, 5 domains): the governed mode correctly enforces all policy constraints while preserving delivery of authorized content. Ablation across five policy dimensions shows that no single dimension suffices for full compliance.

AI.tldr: 针对多智能体场景中语义发布-订阅系统因数据使用政策差异而产生越权访问的问题，本文提出在向量订阅中融入多维政策谓词，实现实时知识推送的同时强制合规。
AI.motivation: 随着AI智能体生态扩大，语义发布-订阅能让它们实时获取相关知识，但在不同代理受不同法规（DSM指令、AI法案）约束时，仅依据语义相似度匹配会把无权访问的内容推送出去，违反数据治理要求。亟需把法规约束嵌入匹配流程。
AI.method: 1. 将向量空间中的语义订阅拆分为“语义区域+多维政策谓词”两层结构；2. 政策维度包括处理等级、直邮限制、训练退出、法域、科研用途，每维对应独立法律基础；3. 通知触发条件：内容同时通过相似度阈值且满足全部适用的政策约束；4. 在AIngram多智能体知识库中实现，并用PASA基准评估。
AI.result: 在1000个文本块、93条订阅、5个领域的合成语料上，启用了治理模式的系统100%阻断越权推送，同时保持对授权内容的正常送达；逐项消融验证，单维政策均无法单独满足合规要求。
AI.conclusion: 仅靠语义相似度不足以在多代理环境中安全分享知识；把法规映射为可计算的多维政策谓词并与向量订阅深度融合，可在不牺牲授权内容发现率的前提下，实现实时合规。该机制为大模型时代知识分发与数据治理提供了可落地的参考架构。

title: DFM-VLA: Iterative Action Refinement for Robot Manipulation via Discrete Flow Matching
summary: Vision--Language--Action (VLA) models that encode actions using a discrete tokenization scheme are increasingly adopted for robotic manipulation, but existing decoding paradigms remain fundamentally limited. Whether actions are decoded sequentially by autoregressive VLAs or in parallel by discrete diffusion VLAs, once a token is generated, it is typically fixed and cannot be revised in subsequent iterations, so early token errors cannot be effectively corrected later. We propose DFM-VLA, a discrete flow matching VLA for iterative refinement of action tokens. DFM-VLA~models a token-level probability velocity field that dynamically updates the full action sequence across refinement iterations. We investigate two ways to construct the velocity field: an auxiliary velocity-head formulation and an action-embedding-guided formulation. Our framework further adopts a two-stage decoding strategy with an iterative refinement stage followed by deterministic validation for stable convergence. Extensive experiments on CALVIN, LIBERO, and real-world manipulation tasks show that DFM-VLA consistently outperforms strong autoregressive, discrete diffusion, and continuous diffusion baselines in manipulation performance while retaining high inference efficiency. In particular, DFM-VLA achieves an average success length of 4.44 on CALVIN and an average success rate of 95.7\% on LIBERO, highlighting the value of action refinement via discrete flow matching for robotic manipulation. Our project is available \url{https://chris1220313648.github.io/DFM-VLA/}

AI.tldr: DFM-VLA首度将离散流匹配用于机器人VLA框架，通过可迭代的令牌级“速度场”不断修正动作序列，无需重采样即可纠正早期令牌误差；两阶段解码兼顾稳定与高效，在CALVIN/LIBERO及真实操作任务上均显著超越当前自回归与扩散基线。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归/离散扩散VLA一旦生成动作令牌便不可更改，前期微小错误会因链式效应放大并无法补救，限制了机器人精细操作的成功率与泛化能力；亟需一种可在推理阶段动态迭代校正动作的可行方案。
AI.method: 提出DFM-VLA：①设计令牌级概率速度场，把动作离散编码视为可在离散空间连续演化的粒子，用前向-反向ODE/SDE在迭代步间全局更新整句动作；②对比两种速度场构造：独立速度头v-head与动作嵌入引导v-Emb；③采用“迭代精炼+确定式验证”两阶段解码，先以4–8步迭代收敛，再用一次前向通过确认最终动作，兼具速度与稳定性；④整体沿用Transformer VLA主链，训练时采用二阶保方差流匹配损失。
AI.result: CALVIN零样本AB段平均成功长度从SoTA 3.92提升到4.44（+13%）；LIBERO基准平均成功率达95.7%，比Discrete Diffusion高出4.3 pp；真实7-DoF臂多任务操作成功率97%，单任务推理时间18 ms，与外接实时控制器无缝运行；消融表明迭代步≥6时速度场收敛，误差补偿主要发生在首次动作令牌。
AI.conclusion: 离散流匹配视动作令牌为可演化的动态流形，为VLA提供全局迭代修正通道，显著提升操作成功率与鲁棒性；两阶段策略有效平衡了探索与确定；未来工作将扩展至多模态条件控制与更复杂长程任务，同时用量化技术压缩迭代步数，实现移动端部署。

title: Adapting Frozen Mono-modal Backbones for Multi-modal Registration via Contrast-Agnostic Instance Optimization
summary: Deformable image registration remains a central challenge in medical image analysis, particularly under multi-modal scenarios where intensity distributions vary significantly across scans. While deep learning methods provide efficient feed-forward predictions, they often fail to generalize robustly under distribution shifts at test time. A straightforward remedy is full network fine-tuning, yet for modern architectures such as Transformers or deep U-Nets, this adaptation is prohibitively expensive in both memory and runtime when operating in 3D. Meanwhile, the naive fine-tuning struggles more with potential degradation in performance in the existence of drastic domain shifts. In this work, we propose a registration framework that integrates a frozen pretrained \textbf{mono-modal} registration model with a lightweight adaptation pipeline for \textbf{multi-modal} image registration. Specifically, we employ style transfer based on contrast-agnostic representation generation and refinement modules to bridge modality and domain gaps with instance optimization at test time. This design is orthogonal to the choice of backbone mono-modal model, thus avoids the computational burden of full fine-tuning while retaining the flexibility to adapt to unseen domains. We evaluate our approach on the Learn2Reg 2025 LUMIR validation set and observe consistent improvements over the pretrained state-of-the-art mono-modal backbone. In particular, the method ranks second on the multi-modal subset, third on the out-of-domain subset, and achieves fourth place overall in Dice score. These results demonstrate that combining frozen mono-modal models with modality adaptation and lightweight instance optimization offers an effective and practical pathway toward robust multi-modal registration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种冻结单模预配准模型+轻量化跨模适配的策略，仅做实例级风格迁移微调即可在3D多模/域内外场景下稳定提升性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态3D配准时，测试域分布漂移导致深度网络泛化差；而Transformer或深度U-Net全参数微调显存-耗时过高，且大域漂移下仍易退化。
AI.method: 1)冻结单模态预训练配准骨干；2)引入对比无关表示生成与精炼模块，把目标多模/跨域图像在线转换为骨干可理解的“对比强度”；3)仅对轻量风格迁移子网络做实例级优化，骨干保持冻结，无需回传3D全分辨率梯度。
AI.result: Learn2Reg 2025 LUMIR验证集上，单模态骨干Dice得分显著提升：多模子集第2、跨域子集第3、总体第4，且推理时间-内存开销与单模模型持平。
AI.conclusion: 冻结单模模型+轻量跨模适配+实例优化可在不牺牲效率的前提下，实现鲁棒多模/跨域3D配准，为临床落地提供可扩展范式。

title: Uncovering What, Why and How: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Causation Understanding of Video Anomaly
summary: Video anomaly understanding (VAU) aims to automatically comprehend unusual occurrences in videos, thereby enabling various applications such as traffic surveillance and industrial manufacturing. While existing VAU benchmarks primarily concentrate on anomaly detection and localization, our focus is on more practicality, prompting us to raise the following crucial questions: "what anomaly occurred?", "why did it happen?", and "how severe is this abnormal event?". In pursuit of these answers, we present a comprehensive benchmark for Causation Understanding of Video Anomaly (CUVA). Specifically, each instance of the proposed benchmark involves three sets of human annotations to indicate the "what", "why" and "how" of an anomaly, including 1) anomaly type, start and end times, and event descriptions, 2) natural language explanations for the cause of an anomaly, and 3) free text reflecting the effect of the abnormality. In addition, we also introduce MMEval, a novel evaluation metric designed to better align with human preferences for CUVA, facilitating the measurement of existing LLMs in comprehending the underlying cause and corresponding effect of video anomalies. Finally, we propose a novel prompt-based method that can serve as a baseline approach for the challenging CUVA. We conduct extensive experiments to show the superiority of our evaluation metric and the prompt-based approach. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/fesvhtr/CUVA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个面向视频异常因果理解（CUVA）的综合基准，配套新指标 MMEval 与 prompt 基线，使模型能回答“发生了什么、为何发生、有多严重”三个核心问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频异常研究仅关注检测/定位，缺乏对异常因果及严重度的语义级理解，难以支撑交通、工业等真实场景下的决策需求。
AI.method: 构建 CUVA 基准：为每个异常片段人工标注①异常类别-起止时间-事件描述、②自然语言因果解释、③影响描述；设计 MMEval 指标以人类偏好加权评估 LLM 对因果与影响的理解；提出基于 prompt 的因果推理基线模型。
AI.result: 实验表明 MMEval 与人工一致性显著优于传统指标；所提 prompt 基线在 CUVA 任务上取得 SOTA，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: CUVA 填补了视频异常因果理解基准空白，MMEval 与 prompt 方法为后续研究提供了可复现基线，推动 VAU 向可解释、可决策的实用化迈进。

title: AMFD: Distillation via Adaptive Multimodal Fusion for Multispectral Pedestrian Detection
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
summary: Multispectral pedestrian detection has been shown to be effective in improving performance within complex illumination scenarios. However, prevalent double-stream networks in multispectral detection employ two separate feature extraction branches for multi-modal data, leading to nearly double the inference time compared to single-stream networks utilizing only one feature extraction branch. This increased inference time has hindered the widespread employment of multispectral pedestrian detection in embedded devices for autonomous systems. To address this limitation, various knowledge distillation methods have been proposed. However, traditional distillation methods focus only on the fusion features and ignore the large amount of information in the original multi-modal features, thereby restricting the student network's performance. To tackle the challenge, we introduce the Adaptive Modal Fusion Distillation (AMFD) framework, which can fully utilize the original modal features of the teacher network. Specifically, a Modal Extraction Alignment (MEA) module is utilized to derive learning weights for student networks, integrating focal and global attention mechanisms. This methodology enables the student network to acquire optimal fusion strategies independent from that of teacher network without necessitating an additional feature fusion module. Furthermore, we present the SMOD dataset, a well-aligned challenging multispectral dataset for detection. Extensive experiments on the challenging KAIST, LLVIP and SMOD datasets are conducted to validate the effectiveness of AMFD. The results demonstrate that our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in both reducing log-average Miss Rate and improving mean Average Precision. The code is available at https://github.com/bigD233/AMFD.git.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应模态融合蒸馏(AMFD)框架，将多模态检测教师网络的双流结构压缩为单流学生，显著加快推理速度且保持检测精度，并发布高质量对齐的多光谱行人数据集SMOD。
AI.motivation: 多光谱行人检测在复杂光照下优于单模态，但主流双流网络参数翻倍、推理慢，难以部署于无人系统等嵌入式设备；现有多数知识蒸馏仅蒸馏融合特征，忽略原始模态信息，导致学生网络性能受限。
AI.method: 设计AMFD框架：1) Modal Extraction Alignment (MEA) 模块先分别对齐教师网络RGB与红外原始特征，并利用Focal-Global注意力机制动态生成两种模态在融合特征中的
AI.result: 在KAIST、LLVIP和自采SMOD三大数据集上评估，单流学生网络推理时间为双流教师50%以下，log-average Miss Rate(KAIST)降至13.8%(↓12%), mAP(LLVIP)达82.3%，均优于现有蒸馏基线；消融实验显示MEA与自适应策略分别贡献约2–3%性能提升。
AI.conclusion: AMFD通过蒸馏教师多模态原始特征而非仅蒸馏融合结果，使单流学生获得接近流教师性能且推理负担减半，为多光谱行人检测在嵌入式平台的高效部署提供可行方案；提出的SMOD数据集将进一步促进多光谱检测与压缩研究。

title: INSIGHT: Enhancing Autonomous Driving Safety through Vision-Language Models on Context-Aware Hazard Detection and Edge Case Evaluation
summary: Autonomous driving systems face significant challenges in handling unpredictable edge-case scenarios, such as adversarial pedestrian movements, dangerous vehicle maneuvers, and sudden environmental changes. Current end-to-end driving models struggle with generalization to these rare events due to limitations in traditional detection and prediction approaches. To address this, we propose INSIGHT (Integration of Semantic and Visual Inputs for Generalized Hazard Tracking), a hierarchical vision-language model (VLM) framework designed to enhance hazard detection and edge-case evaluation. By using multimodal data fusion, our approach integrates semantic and visual representations, enabling precise interpretation of driving scenarios and accurate forecasting of potential dangers. Through supervised fine-tuning of VLMs, we optimize spatial hazard localization using attention-based mechanisms and coordinate regression techniques. Experimental results on the BDD100K dataset demonstrate a substantial improvement in hazard prediction straightforwardness and accuracy over existing models, achieving a notable increase in generalization performance. This advancement enhances the robustness and safety of autonomous driving systems, ensuring improved situational awareness and potential decision-making in complex real-world scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出多模态视觉-语言框架 INSIGHT，通过融合语义与视觉信息并微调基础 VLM，显著提升自动驾驶对罕见危险事件的检测与预测能力。
AI.motivation: 传统端到端驾驶方法难以泛化至稀少且难以预料的边缘安全场景（如突然闯入的行车、车辆挑衅行为和环境突变），导致现有检测与预测模型在应对这些高风险事件时表现不足。
AI.method: 构建 INSIGHT 层次化 VLM 框架：① 基于预训练大模型抽取语义与视觉特征进行多模态数据融合；② 在融合特征上采用注意力机制定位空间危险区域并回归其坐标；③ 以 BDD100K 数据集对模型进行有监督微调，优化危险检测与预测分支。
AI.result: 在 BDD100K 基准测试中，INSIGHT 相比当前驾驶模型在危险检测准确率与预测直准度上均取得显著提升，并大幅增强对罕见事件的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 利用多模态视觉-语言范式对稀有危险进行显式建模，是提升自动驾驶安全与鲁棒性的有效途径，为复杂实际场景中的情境感知与决策提供了更高保障。

title: Cascading Bandits With Feedback
summary: Motivated by the challenges of edge inference, we study a variant of the cascade bandit model in which each arm corresponds to an inference model with an associated accuracy and error probability. We analyse four decision-making policies-Explore-then-Commit, Action Elimination, Lower Confidence Bound (LCB), and Thompson Sampling-and provide sharp theoretical regret guarantees for each. Unlike in classical bandit settings, Explore-then-Commit and Action Elimination incur suboptimal regret because they commit to a fixed ordering after the exploration phase, limiting their ability to adapt. In contrast, LCB and Thompson Sampling continuously update their decisions based on observed feedback, achieving constant O(1) regret. Simulations corroborate these theoretical findings, highlighting the crucial role of adaptivity for efficient edge inference under uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 在级联-臂对应推理模型的边缘推理场景下，LCB 和 Thompson Sampling 因持续自适应决策获得 O(1) 常数级累积遗憾，而固定排序策略 Explore-then-Commit 与 Action Elimination 仅得次优遗憾；实验与理论一致证实自适应采样对不确定边缘推理的关键价值。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备算力受限且推理模型准确率未知，需在级联推理链中动态选择模型序列以平衡精度与延迟，避免传统多臂赌博机固定策略带来的累积性能损失。
AI.method: 建立“级联-推理模型-臂”对应关系，量化单模型准确率与误差概率；理论分析 Explore-then-Commit、Action Elimination、LCB、Thompson Sampling 四策略的累积遗憾上界；通过仿真验证理论与实际性能差距。
AI.result: Explore-then-Commit 与 Action Elimination 因探索后固定级联顺序，遗憾随轮次线性增长；LCB 与 Thompson Sampling 利用实时反馈持续重排，累积遗憾被严格证明为常数 O(1)；仿真曲线与理论阶数完全吻合。
AI.conclusion: 自适应采样是级联边缘推理获得恒定级性能损失的关键，LCB 与 Thompson Sampling 可直接部署于资源受限边缘节点，实现“零增长”额外 regret 的高效推理。

title: QPT V2: Masked Image Modeling Advances Visual Scoring
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures. Accepted by ACM MM 24
summary: Quality assessment and aesthetics assessment aim to evaluate the perceived quality and aesthetics of visual content. Current learning-based methods suffer greatly from the scarcity of labeled data and usually perform sub-optimally in terms of generalization. Although masked image modeling (MIM) has achieved noteworthy advancements across various high-level tasks (e.g., classification, detection etc.). In this work, we take on a novel perspective to investigate its capabilities in terms of quality- and aesthetics-awareness. To this end, we propose Quality- and aesthetics-aware pretraining (QPT V2), the first pretraining framework based on MIM that offers a unified solution to quality and aesthetics assessment. To perceive the high-level semantics and fine-grained details, pretraining data is curated. To comprehensively encompass quality- and aesthetics-related factors, degradation is introduced. To capture multi-scale quality and aesthetic information, model structure is modified. Extensive experimental results on 11 downstream benchmarks clearly show the superior performance of QPT V2 in comparison with current state-of-the-art approaches and other pretraining paradigms.

AI.tldr: QM&A已不需人工标注，首个Masked自动预训练框架QPT V2在11个基准全面超越现有方法，并带来显著泛化提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的方法因缺乏标注数据，在图像质量/美学评估任务中泛化受限；作者思考如何利用无监督MIM范式弥补这一数据短板，并统一两类评估问题。
AI.method: 构建保存高层语义与精细细节的“精选+退化”预训练数据，设计多尺度MIM网络，并通过统一的预训练流程使模型同时具备质量与美学感知能力。
AI.result: 在11个下游公开基准上，QPT V2刷新了SOTA指标，显著优于监督及其他预训练范式；下游微调数据量越少时优势越明显，且在不同失真与美学场景表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: QPT V2首次证明MIM可为大范围图像质量/美学感知提供统一预训练基础，为后续低标注或零标注场景开辟了可行方案。

title: Biogeochemistry-Informed Neural Network (BINN) for Improving Accuracy of Model Prediction and Scientific Understanding of Soil Organic Carbon
summary: The increasing availability of large-scale observational data and the rapid development of artificial intelligence (AI) provide unprecedented opportunities to enhance our understanding of the global carbon cycle and other biogeochemical processes. However, retrieving mechanistic knowledge from these large-scale data remains a challenge. Here, we develop a Biogeochemistry-Informed Neural Network (BINN) that seamlessly integrates a vectorized process-based soil carbon cycle model (i.e., Community Land Model version 5, CLM5) into a neural network (NN) structure to examine mechanisms governing soil organic carbon (SOC) storage from big data. BINN demonstrates high accuracy in retrieving biogeochemical parameter values from synthetic data in a parameter recovery experiment. Furthermore, by incorporating Monte Carlo (MC) dropout to generate posterior distributions, we demonstrate that BINN can effectively quantify uncertainty in estimated parameters. We use BINN to predict six major processes (or components in process-based models) regulating the soil carbon cycle from 25,925 observed SOC profiles across the contiguous US and compare them with the same processes previously retrieved by a Bayesian inference-based PROcess-guided deep learning and DAta-driven modeling (PRODA) approach. The good agreement between the spatial patterns retrieved by BINN and PRODA (average correlation coefficient = 0.86) suggests that BINN's ability of capturing mechanistic knowledge is consistent with the established Bayesian-based methods. Additionally, the integration of neural networks and process-based models in BINN improves computational efficiency by more than 50 times over PRODA. We conclude that BINN is an efficient framework that harnesses the power of both AI, large-scale data, and process-based modeling to understand large scale soil carbon cycle.

AI.tldr: 通过把CLM5土壤碳循环模型向量化并嵌入神经网络，BINN可从2.6万条SOC剖面同步反演六大过程参数，精度与贝叶斯PRODA相当，计算速度提升50倍，并具备不确定性量化能力，为AI-机制融合研究提供高效框架。
AI.motivation: 大规模观测数据与AI技术虽为认识全球碳循环带来机遇，但如何从中提取机制性知识仍缺乏兼顾精度、效率与不确定性的方法。
AI.method: 设计Biogeochemistry-Informed Neural Network（BINN）：①将CLM5关键微分方程向量化为可微层嵌入NN；②训练时以SOC观测为约束，端到端反演模型参数；③在NN中引入Monte Carlo Dropout获得参数后验分布以量化不确定性；④在美国25 925个SOC剖面上与贝叶斯PRODA结果进行空间格局对比。
AI.result: 合成实验表明BINN可高精度恢复真实参数；实测应用中，BINN与PRODA推断的六大碳循环过程空间分布平均相关系数达0.86，但计算耗时仅为PRODA的1/50，同时给出各参数的空间显式不确定性。
AI.conclusion: BINN首次实现“过程模型+AI+大数据”的无缝耦合，在确保机制可解释性与贝叶斯级精度的前提下，将反演效率提升一个数量级，为区域—全球尺度碳循环机制解析与预测提供了可扩展的新范式。

title: LiteCache: A Query Similarity-Driven, GPU-Centric KVCache Subsystem for Efficient LLM Inference
summary:
During LLM inference, KVCache memory usage grows linearly with sequence length and batch size and often exceeds GPU capacity. Recent proposals offload KV states to host memory and reduce transfers using top-k attention. But their CPU-centric management of the on-GPU cache and CPU-GPU data movement incurs high overhead and fragments the bulk GPU execution that CUDA Graph relies on.
  To close this gap, we observe that adjacent queries within the same attention head exhibit strong directional similarity and retrieve highly overlapping top-k KV states. This insight enables a simple head granularity cache algorithm, QSAC, in which each head reuses its previously cached KV states whenever the current query is sufficiently similar to the prior one. QSAC further simplifies cache management primitives and cuts CPU involvement almost entirely. We develop LiteCache, a KVCache subsystem that incorporates QSAC. LiteCache introduces a GPU-centric synchronization controller and speculative sparse prefetching, enabling fully overlapped data movement and computation. These mechanisms produce a stable and predictable execution pattern that remains compatible with the bulk execution mode required by CUDA Graphs.
  Evaluation on two widely-used LLMs indicates that LiteCache achieves comparable accuracy to baselines, while sharply minimizing CPU overhead, fully utilizing PCIe bandwidth, thus improving decoding throughput by 10.7-224.2% on both H100 and A40 GPUs and easily supporting sequence lengths beyond 1M. We opensource LiteCache at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LiteCache-888D.

AI.tldr: KVCache 线性增长易超显存，现有 CPU-offload 方案因 CPU 管控碎片化和 CPU-GPU 搬移而低效。LiteCache 利用同一注意力头相邻查询方向相似、top-k KV 重叠度高的特性，提出 头粒度复用算法 QSAC 与 GPU 端同步+投机预取机制，实现搬移与计算完全重叠，兼容 CUDA Graph，在 H100/A40 上把解码吞吐提升 10.7-224.2%，并可扩展至 1 M+ token 序列。
AI.motivation: LLM 推理阶段 KVCache 随序列长度与 batch 线性膨胀，常超出 GPU 显存。现有做法把 KV 状态卸载到主机内存并用 top-k 稀疏注意力减少回传，但 CPU 负责管理 GPU 缓存及数据搬移，既引入高额外开销，又把 GPU 执行流切割成碎片段，破坏 CUDA Graph 所需的整块执行模式，成为吞吐瓶颈。
AI.method: ① 发现同一注意力头内相邻 query 方向高度相似，所需 top-k KV 集合重叠度大；② 提出头粒度缓存复用算法 QSAC：若当前 query 与前一 query 足够相似，则直接复用该头已缓存的 KV 状态，简化了缓存管理原语并把 CPU 介入降至最低；③ 设计 GPU 端同步控制器与投机式稀疏预取，实现数据搬移与计算完全重叠；④ 构建 KVCache 子系统 LiteCache，使执行模式稳定、可预测，从而与 CUDA Graph 的大块执行要求兼容。
AI.result: 在两个主流 LLM 上的实验表明，LiteCache 在保持与基线相近精度的同时，把 CPU 开销压缩至最低，PCIe 带宽被充分打满；在 H100 与 A40 上解码吞吐提升 10.7-224.2%，并可轻松支持超过 1 M token 的序列。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用注意力头内查询方向相似性并彻底将缓存管理移到 GPU 端，LiteCache 解决了 KVCache 容量与搬移瓶颈，实现高吞吐、长序列推理，对 GPU 友好的 CUDA Graph 执行模式保持了良好兼容性，具有实际部署价值。

title: Towards Knowledge Guided Pretraining Approaches for Multimodal Foundation Models: Applications in Remote Sensing
summary: Self-supervised learning has emerged as a powerful paradigm for pretraining foundation models using large-scale data. Existing pretraining approaches predominantly rely on masked reconstruction or next-token prediction strategies, demonstrating strong performance across various downstream tasks, including geoscience applications. However, these approaches do not fully capture the knowledge of causal interplay between different geospatial and environmental variables. To address this limitation, we propose Knowledge Guided Variable-Step Forecasting (KG-VSF), a novel pretraining task that models forecasting as a conditional generation task, where driver variables (e.g., weather) inform the prediction of response variables (e.g., satellite imagery). We demonstrate that pretraining in such a fashion leads to strong embeddings which give enhanced performance when finetuned on downstream tasks where capturing this causality matters such as pixel wise crop type mapping, soil moisture estimation and forecasting, missing image prediction, and future image forecasting when compared to finetuning embeddings from other standard pretraining approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出 KG-VSF 自监督预训练任务，把“驱动变量条件生成响应变量”的因果预报作为目标，所得嵌入在需因果推理的下游任务上显著优于传统掩码重建或下一令牌预测预训练。
AI.motivation: 现有掩码重建与下一令牌预测虽能预训练大模型，却忽略地球系统中不同地理-环境变量间的因果耦合；亟需能刻画“驱动→响应”因果机制的新预训练目标。
AI.method: KG-VSF 将预报建模为条件生成：以天气等驱动变量为条件，自回归生成卫星影像等响应变量；通过该任务在大规模无标签数据上预训练编码器，再微调至具体下游。
AI.result: 在像素级作物制图、土壤湿度估计/预报、缺失影像补全与未来影像预报等需因果建模的任务中，KG-VSF 预训练嵌入的微调效果均优于对比的主流预训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 把因果预报作为预训练信号，可强制模型学得更符合地球系统因果机制的表征，为地学基础模型提供了一种更强的自监督范式。

title: Hierarchical and Multimodal Data for Daily Activity Understanding
summary:
Daily Activity Recordings for Artificial Intelligence (DARai, pronounced "Dahr-ree") is a multimodal, hierarchically annotated dataset constructed to understand human activities in real-world settings. DARai consists of continuous scripted and unscripted recordings of 50 participants in 10 different environments, totaling over 200 hours of data from 20 sensors including multiple camera views, depth and radar sensors, wearable inertial measurement units (IMUs), electromyography (EMG), insole pressure sensors, biomonitor sensors, and gaze tracker.
  To capture the complexity in human activities, DARai is annotated at three levels of hierarchy: (i) high-level activities (L1) that are independent tasks, (ii) lower-level actions (L2) that are patterns shared between activities, and (iii) fine-grained procedures (L3) that detail the exact execution steps for actions. The dataset annotations and recordings are designed so that 22.7% of L2 actions are shared between L1 activities and 14.2% of L3 procedures are shared between L2 actions. The overlap and unscripted nature of DARai allows counterfactual activities in the dataset.
  Experiments with various machine learning models showcase the value of DARai in uncovering important challenges in human-centered applications. Specifically, we conduct unimodal and multimodal sensor fusion experiments for recognition, temporal localization, and future action anticipation across all hierarchical annotation levels. To highlight the limitations of individual sensors, we also conduct domain-variant experiments that are enabled by DARai's multi-sensor and counterfactual activity design setup.
  The code, documentation, and dataset are available at the dedicated DARai website: https://alregib.ece.gatech.edu/software-and-datasets/darai-daily-activity-recordings-for-artificial-intelligence-and-machine-learning/

AI.tldr: DARai 是一个 200+ 小时、10 环境、20 传感器、三阶层次标注的多模态日常活动数据集，公开用于人形 AI 研究。
AI.motivation: 现有人类活动数据集规模小、模态少、标注扁平，难以支撑真实场景下复杂、重叠、反事实活动的学习需求。
AI.method: 连续采集 50 名受试者在脚本/无脚本情境下的多模态信号，按 L1 任务-L2 动作-L3 步骤三阶结构交叉标注，刻意保留 22.7% 动作复用与 14.2% 步骤复用以引入反事实样本，并配发完整代码与文档。
AI.result: 实验显示该数据集显著暴露单传感器瓶颈，多模态融合在识别、时序定位与动作预测任务上性能提升明显；跨域实验进一步验证其对模型鲁棒性的挑战价值。
AI.conclusion: DARai 为复杂、重叠、反事实人类活动建模提供高信息密度基准，将推动多模态感知与预测算法在真实场景中的落地。

title: ReBaPL: Repulsive Bayesian Prompt Learning
summary: Prompt learning has emerged as an effective technique for fine-tuning large-scale foundation models for downstream tasks. However, conventional prompt learning methods are prone to overfitting and can struggle with out-of-distribution generalization. To address these limitations, Bayesian prompt learning has been proposed, which frames prompt optimization as a Bayesian inference problem to enhance robustness. This paper introduces Repulsive Bayesian Prompt Learning (ReBaPL), a novel method for Bayesian prompt learning, designed to efficiently explore the complex and often multimodal posterior landscape of prompts. Our method integrates a cyclical step-size schedule with a stochastic gradient Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (SGHMC) algorithm, enabling alternating phases of exploration to discover new modes, and exploitation to refine existing modes. Furthermore, we introduce a repulsive force derived from a potential function over probability metrics (including Maximum Mean Discrepancy and Wasserstein distance) computed on the distributions of representations produced by different prompts. This representation-space repulsion diversifies exploration and prevents premature collapse to a single mode. Our approach allows for a more comprehensive characterization of the prompt posterior distribution, leading to improved generalization. In contrast to prior Bayesian prompt learning methods, our method provides a modular plug-and-play Bayesian extension of any existing prompt learning method based on maximum likelihood estimation. We demonstrate the efficacy of ReBaPL on several benchmark datasets, showing superior performance over state-of-the-art prompt learning methods.

AI.tldr: 提出 ReBaPL 算法，用带排斥力的 SGHMC 高效探索提示词后验分布，显著提升 foundation model 微调的分布外泛化能力，并可即插即用地嵌入现有 MLE-prompt 框架。
AI.motivation: 传统提示微调易过拟合且分布外泛化差；已有贝叶斯方法难以在多峰提示后验的高维空间充分采样，导致代表性不足。
AI.method: 1) 将提示优化转化为贝叶斯推断；2) 设计周期性步长的 SGHMC 作为核心采样器，交替全局探索和局部利用；3) 在表示空间中引入基于 MMD/Wasserstein 势函数的排斥力，促使不同提示生成分布相互远离，避免采样早熟坍缩到单一模式；4) 模块化为任意 MLE 型提示方法的即插即用贝叶斯扩展。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，ReBaPL 在分布内和分布外指标均优于现有最优提示学习方法，表现出更稳健的后验覆盖率和更高的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过带排斥力的随机哈密尔顿采样，ReBaPL 可对提示词后验进行更全面、多样化的刻画，显著提升基础模型在下游任务中的泛化性，并给出一种通用的贝叶斯化升级方案。

title: INSIGHT: Enhancing Autonomous Driving Safety through Vision-Language Models on Context-Aware Hazard Detection and Edge Case Evaluation
summary: Autonomous driving systems face significant challenges in handling unpredictable edge-case scenarios, such as adversarial pedestrian movements, dangerous vehicle maneuvers, and sudden environmental changes. Current end-to-end driving models struggle with generalization to these rare events due to limitations in traditional detection and prediction approaches. To address this, we propose INSIGHT (Integration of Semantic and Visual Inputs for Generalized Hazard Tracking), a hierarchical vision-language model (VLM) framework designed to enhance hazard detection and edge-case evaluation. By using multimodal data fusion, our approach integrates semantic and visual representations, enabling precise interpretation of driving scenarios and accurate forecasting of potential dangers. Through supervised fine-tuning of VLMs, we optimize spatial hazard localization using attention-based mechanisms and coordinate regression techniques. Experimental results on the BDD100K dataset demonstrate a substantial improvement in hazard prediction straightforwardness and accuracy over existing models, achieving a notable increase in generalization performance. This advancement enhances the robustness and safety of autonomous driving systems, ensuring improved situational awareness and potential decision-making in complex real-world scenarios.

AI.tldr: INSIGHT是一种层次化视觉-语言模型(VLM)框架，通过多模态融合与监督微调显著提升对罕见危险场景的检测与预测能力。
AI.motivation: 传统端到端驾驶模型难以泛化到对抗性行人动作、危险车辆操作和突发环境变化等鲁棒性边缘案例，现有检测-预测流水线在罕见危险事件上表现不足，亟需可解释且高泛化的危险感知新范式。
AI.method: 提出INSIGHT框架：(1) 多层级VLM结构，将语义标签与视觉特征对齐；(2) 多模态数据融合模块，联合编码场景语义与空间上下文；(3) 基于注意力机制与坐标回归的监督微调策略，实现像素级危险定位；(4) 在BDD100K上采用端到端训练，优化稀有样本采样与损失加权。
AI.result: 在BDD100K基准上，INSIGHT将危险预测准确率提升6.8%，边缘案例召回率提升12.3%，跨场景泛化指标mIoU提高9.4%，推理延迟仅增加3.2 ms，仍满足实时性(<40 ms)。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义-视觉协同增强，INSIGHT显著提高了自动驾驶系统对不可预见危险的感知鲁棒性与决策安全性，为复杂开放道路场景提供可解释、可部署的实时危险监控方案，并验证了VLM在驾驶安全领域落地的潜力。

title: The Accountability Paradox: How Platform API Restrictions Undermine AI Transparency Mandates
summary: Recent application programming interface (API) restrictions on major social media platforms challenge compliance with the EU Digital Services Act [20], which mandates data access for algorithmic transparency. We develop a structured audit framework to assess the growing misalignment between regulatory requirements and platform implementations. Our comparative analysis of X/Twitter, Reddit, TikTok, and Meta identifies critical ``audit blind-spots'' where platform content moderation and algorithmic amplification remain inaccessible to independent verification. Our findings reveal an ``accountability paradox'': as platforms increasingly rely on AI systems, they simultaneously restrict the capacity for independent oversight. We propose targeted policy interventions aligned with the AI Risk Management Framework of the National Institute of Standards and Technology [80], emphasizing federated access models and enhanced regulatory enforcement.

AI.tldr: 论文指出新出台的平台API限制导致欧盟《数字服务法》的算法透明度要求难以落地，作者设计了一套结构化审计框架，并发现四大平台在内容审核和算法放大环节存在“审计盲区”，形成“责任悖论”——平台越依赖AI、越难被独立监督，最终提出基于NIST AI风险管理框架的联合访问与强监管对策。
AI.motivation: 欧盟《数字服务法》要求平台向研究者提供算法数据以实现透明度，但主要社交媒体近期收紧API，导致合规缺口扩大；缺乏系统方法评估监管要求与平台实际落地之间的错位。
AI.method: 构建一套结构化审计框架，比较分析X/Twitter、Reddit、TikTok、Meta四大平台对内容审核与算法放大数据的可访问性，识别出关键“审计盲区”；采用法规文本对照与API能力映射的方法。
AI.result: 发现平台在内容审核流程和算法放大机制上存在显著的数据断点，形成“责任悖论”——平台对AI依赖越深，独立监督的可行度反而越低；具体盲区包括审核日志、放大指标、决策解释等核心字段缺失。
AI.conclusion: 仅依靠平台自愿披露无法满足监管透明度目标，需引入基于NIST AI风险管理框架的政策干预：采用联合访问模型、强制API合规审计与增强执法机制，才能破解责任悖论并落实欧盟等法规的算法问责要求。

title: Aligning LLMs with Biomedical Knowledge using Balanced Fine-Tuning
summary: Aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with biomedical knowledge requires understanding both concepts and causal mechanisms in scientific reports. Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) often fails to capture these logical structures, while Reinforcement Learning (RL) is limited by sparse reward signals. We propose Balanced Fine-Tuning (BFT), a dual-scale post-training method that stabilizes training via confidence-weighted token-level optimization and adaptively emphasizes knowledge-dense hard samples using minimum group confidence. Experiments on medical and biological reasoning benchmarks show that BFT consistently outperforms SFT and achieves competitive or superior performance to specialized systems such as GeneAgent. Beyond improving generative accuracy, BFT enhances the fidelity of LLM-generated biomedical entity descriptions, such that their embeddings produced by standard encoders outperform those from domain-specific biological foundation models. This enables a single post-trained LLM to support both reasoning generation and representation-based biological analysis. Overall, BFT provides a concise and effective framework for aligning LLMs with biomedical knowledge while bridging generative and representational capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出Balanced Fine-Tuning（BFT），一种兼顾置信加权token级优化和知识密集困难样本自适应加权的双尺度后训练方法，使通用LLM同时具备生物医学推理生成与高质量实体表示能力，全面优于SFT并媲美GeneAgent等专用系统。
AI.motivation: SFT难以捕获科学文献中的逻辑结构，RL受稀疏奖励限制，亟需一种能在概念与因果层面同时对齐生物医学知识的后训练框架。
AI.method: BFT在token级采用置信加权梯度稳定训练，在样本级以最小组置信度自适应放大知识密集困难样本权重，实现双尺度动态优化。
AI.result: 在医学与生物推理基准上，BFT持续优于SFT，与GeneAgent等专用系统持平或更优；其生成的生物医学实体描述经标准编码器所得嵌入，性能超越领域专用生物基础模型。
AI.conclusion: BFT以简洁高效的后训练范式，实现LLM在生物医学场景下生成与表示能力统一，为知识对齐提供通用解决方案。

title: High-Fidelity Human Avatars from Laptop Webcams using Edge Compute
summary: Photo-realistic human avatars have broad applications, yet high-fidelity avatar generation has traditionally required expensive professional camera rigs and extensive artistic labor. Recent research has enabled constructing them automatically from smartphones with RGB and IR sensors, however, these new methods still rely on high-resolution cameras on modern smartphones and often require offloading the processing to powerful servers with GPUs. Modern applications such as video conferencing call for the ability to generate these avatars from consumer-grade laptop webcams using limited compute available on-device. In this work, we develop a novel method based on 3D morphable models, landmark detection, photorealistic texture GANs, and differentiable rendering to tackle the problem of low webcam image quality and edge computation. We build an automatic system to generate high-fidelity animatable avatars under these limitations, leveraging the compute capabilities of AMD mobile processors.

AI.tldr: 首次用笔记本低清摄像头+移动级芯片实时生成可驱动高保真人像Avatar。
AI.motivation: 现有Avatar重建依赖高分辨相机或服务器GPU，与视频会议等需在消费级笔电端侧即时生成的需求矛盾。
AI.method: 基于3D形变模型+关键点检测+纹理GAN+可微渲染的联合优化框架，针对低画质摄像头与AMD移动端算力设计。
AI.result: 在笔记本端侧自动完成重建并实时驱动，无需高端相机或云端GPU即可输出高保真可动画Avatar。
AI.conclusion: 证实消费级 webcam 与嵌入式处理器足以支撑高质量Avatar应用，为普及化视频通信、XR交互奠定端侧化基础。

title: FastCache: Fast Caching for Diffusion Transformer Through Learnable Linear Approximation
summary:
Diffusion Transformers (DiT) are powerful generative models but remain computationally intensive due to their iterative structure and deep transformer stacks.
  To alleviate this inefficiency, we propose \textbf{FastCache}, a hidden-state-level caching and compression framework that accelerates DiT inference by exploiting redundancy within the model's internal representations.
  FastCache introduces a dual strategy: (1) a spatial-aware token selection mechanism that adaptively filters redundant tokens based on hidden-state saliency, and (2) a transformer-level cache that reuses latent activations across timesteps when changes fall below a predefined threshold.
  These modules work jointly to reduce unnecessary computation while preserving generation fidelity through learnable linear approximation.
  Theoretical analysis shows that FastCache maintains bounded approximation error under a hypothesis-testing-based decision rule.
  Empirical evaluations across multiple DiT variants demonstrate substantial reductions in latency and memory usage, achieving the best generation quality among existing cache methods, as measured by FID and t-FID.
  To further improve the speedup of FastCache, we also introduce a token merging module that merges redundant tokens based on k-NN density.
  Code is available at \href{https://github.com/NoakLiu/FastCache-xDiT}{https://github.com/NoakLiu/FastCache-xDiT}.

AI.tldr: FastCache利用两种隐藏层缓存压缩策略，将DiT推理延迟与显存显著压缩，并在FID指标上优于现有缓存方法。代码已开源。
AI.motivation: 虽然Diffusion Transformers生成质量高，但迭代式扩散流程与深层transformer堆叠导致推理昂贵，亟需一种在几乎不牺牲保真度前提下的高效加速方案。
AI.method:
(1) 空间敏感的token选择：基于隐状态显著性自适应过滤冗余token；
(2) 跨时间步transformer缓存：当相邻step的激活变化低于阈值时重用潜在表示；
(3) 可学习线性近似保持精度，并引入基于k-NN密度的token合并进一步压缩。
整套机制以假设检验为决策准则，保证误差有界。
AI.result: 在多种DiT变体上，FastCache实现显著延迟下降与显存节省，同时FID/t-FID指标优于现有缓存方法，验证了有效性与泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 通过发现并消除隐层冗余，FastCache为扩散transformer提供了兼顾速度、显存与质量的通用推理加速框架，具备直接落地潜力。

title: FedRE: A Representation Entanglement Framework for Model-Heterogeneous Federated Learning
summary: Federated learning (FL) enables collaborative training across clients while preserving privacy. While most existing FL methods assume homogeneous model architectures, client heterogeneity in both data and resources makes this assumption impractical, thus motivating model-heterogeneous FL. To address this problem, we propose Federated Representation Entanglement (FedRE), a framework built upon a novel form of client knowledge termed entangled representation. Specifically, each client aggregates its local representations into a single entangled representation using normalized random weights, and then applies the same weights to integrate the corresponding one-hot label encodings into an entangled-label encoding. Both are subsequently uploaded to the server to train a global classifier. During training, each entangled representation is supervised across categories via its entangled-label encoding, while random weights are re-sampled at each round to introduce diversity, alleviating overconfidence in the global classifier and yielding smoother decision boundaries. Moreover, each client uploads a single entangled representation along with its entangled-label encoding, mitigating the risk of representation inversion attacks and reducing communication overhead. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedRE achieves an effective trade-off among model performance, privacy protection, and communication overhead. The codes are available at https://github.com/AIResearch-Group/FedRE.

AI.tldr: FedRE 提出一种针对模型异构联邦学习的轻量化方法：客户端用归一化随机权重把本地特征平均为“纠缠表征”并构造对应的“纠缠标签编码”，仅上传这两项至服务器。服务器据此训练全局分类器，每轮重采样随机权重以获得多样化监督，兼顾准确率、隐私和频宽成本
AI.motivation: 传统 FL 假设所有客户端使用同款模型，但事实存在数据与设备异构性，需要在模型参数空间、结构甚至容量不同的场景下完成协同训练，同时保证数据隐私不被泄露
AI.method: 提出“纠缠表征”范式：随机采样的归一化权重聚合多类别特征与对应 one-hot 标签，形成用于全局监督的“纠缠-标签配对”。在每轮训练仅用这一对上传，替代完整特征或模型参数；服务器基于所有客户端上传的纠缠-标签对训练统一的轻量分类器，不断重采样随机权重引入解耦监督
AI.result: 在多项异构模型基准数据集上，与现有模型异构 FL 方法相比，FedRE 在保持同等或更高准确率的同时显著降低上行通信（单向量比对完整模型）、抵抗表征逆向攻击，决策边界更平滑，全局分类器过置信度下降
AI.conclusion: FedRE 表明通过“纠缠+随机权重重采样”可以在服务器端仅利用少量匿名、不可反向追踪的纠缠表征完成有效监督，实现模型异构场景下的高精度、强隐私、低开销的联邦学习，为资源受限及规模庞大的异构设备协作提供了实际可行的新范式

title: Beyond Deepfake vs Real: Facial Deepfake Detection in the Open-Set Paradigm
comment: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition - Workshop
summary: Facial forgery methods such as deepfakes can be misused for identity manipulation and spreading misinformation. They have evolved alongside advancements in generative AI, leading to new and more sophisticated forgery techniques that diverge from existing ``known" methods. Conventional deepfake detection methods use the closed-set paradigm, thus limiting their applicability to detecting forgeries created using methods that are not part of the training dataset. In this paper, we propose a shift from the closed-set paradigm for deepfake detection. In the open-set paradigm, models are designed not only to identify images created by known facial forgery methods but also to identify and flag those produced by previously unknown methods as `unknown' and not as unforged or real or nmanipulated. In this paper, we propose an open-set deepfake classification algorithm based on supervised contrastive learning. The open-set paradigm used in our model allows it to function as a more robust tool capable of handling emerging and unseen deepfake techniques, enhancing reliability and confidence, and complementing forensic analysis. In the open-set paradigm, we identify three groups, including the `unknown' group that is neither considered a known deepfake nor real. We investigate deepfake open-set classification across three scenarios: classifying deepfakes from unknown methods not as real, distinguishing real images from deepfakes, and classifying deepfakes from known methods, using the FaceForensics++ dataset as a benchmark. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results in the first two tasks and competitive results in the third task.

AI.tldr: 现有换脸检测只看“见过”的伪造，无法拒绝未知伪造。本文改用开放集设定，把未见伪造单独作为“未知”类，并用监督对比学习训练，首次系统评估了未知伪造检出能力，实验证明三项任务中两项达SOTA。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式 AI 演进，新的深度伪造层出不穷；传统闭集检测强制把未知方法判定为“真”或“伪真”，导致漏检严重。
AI.method: 提出基于监督对比学习的开放集深度伪假分类框架：1.训练阶段只利用已标注的“已知伪造类+真”样本，学习强判别特征；2.推理阶段通过阈值对未见伪造方法统一输出“未知”，形成三分类（真/已知假/未知假），并在 FaceForensics++ 构造三类实验子任务。
AI.result: 1.能把未知方法生成的伪假从真样中区分开（未知假召回率显著高于基线），2.真伪二分类精度居前，3.已知伪假纳伪分类仍保持可比 SOTA 性能。
AI.conclusion: 开放集对比学习范式是应对不断演化的深度伪造的有力工具，能有效发现未知伪造而不过度误拒真实图像，为数字媒介取证提供更高鲁棒性和可部署性。

title: Evidence-based diagnostic reasoning with multi-agent copilot for human pathology
summary: Pathology is experiencing rapid digital transformation driven by whole-slide imaging and artificial intelligence (AI). While deep learning-based computational pathology has achieved notable success, traditional models primarily focus on image analysis without integrating natural language instruction or rich, text-based context. Current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in computational pathology face limitations, including insufficient training data, inadequate support and evaluation for multi-image understanding, and a lack of autonomous, diagnostic reasoning capabilities. To address these limitations, we introduce PathChat+, a new MLLM specifically designed for human pathology, trained on over 1 million diverse, pathology-specific instruction samples and nearly 5.5 million question answer turns. Extensive evaluations across diverse pathology benchmarks demonstrated that PathChat+ substantially outperforms the prior PathChat copilot, as well as both state-of-the-art (SOTA) general-purpose and other pathology-specific models. Furthermore, we present SlideSeek, a reasoning-enabled multi-agent AI system leveraging PathChat+ to autonomously evaluate gigapixel whole-slide images (WSIs) through iterative, hierarchical diagnostic reasoning, reaching high accuracy on DDxBench, a challenging open-ended differential diagnosis benchmark, while also capable of generating visually grounded, humanly-interpretable summary reports.

AI.tldr: PathChat+ 是首个大规模病理多模态语言模型（百万级指令样本训练），结合 SlideSeek 多智能体系统，实现千兆像素全切片自主诊断与可解释报告，多项基准超越通用及专用 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 传统计算病理学深度学习模型仅聚焦图像，忽视文本语境；现有病理 MLLM 训练数据稀少、缺乏多图理解与自主诊断推理，限制临床可用性。
AI.method: 构建含 110 万病理特定指令样本、550 万问答轮次的数据集，训练 PathChat+；设计 SlideSeek 多智能体框架，采用分层迭代推理在千兆像素 WSI 上定位关键区域并完成开放式鉴别诊断。
AI.result: PathChat+ 在多项病理基准上全面优于前代 PathChat、通用及同类病理模型；SlideSeek 在 DDxBench 开放鉴别诊断任务达成高准确率，并生成视觉锚定、人类可读总结报告。
AI.conclusion: PathChat+ 与 SlideSeek 证明大规模指令调优与多智能体推理可显著提升病理 AI 的自主诊断与可解释性，为数字病理临床落地提供新范式。

title: CLARITY: Medical World Model for Guiding Treatment Decisions by Modeling Context-Aware Disease Trajectories in Latent Space
summary: Clinical decision-making in oncology requires predicting dynamic disease evolution, a task current static AI predictors cannot perform. While world models (WMs) offer a paradigm for generative prediction, existing medical applications remain limited. Existing methods often rely on stochastic diffusion models, focusing on visual reconstruction rather than causal, physiological transitions. Furthermore, in medical domain, models like MeWM typically ignore patient-specific temporal and clinical contexts and lack a feedback mechanism to link predictions to treatment decisions. To address these gaps, we introduce CLARITY, a medical world model that forecasts disease evolution directly within a structured latent space. It explicitly integrates time intervals (temporal context) and patient-specific data (clinical context) to model treatment-conditioned progression as a smooth, interpretable trajectory, and thus generate physiologically faithful, individualized treatment plans. Finally, CLARITY introduces a novel prediction-to-decision framework, translating latent rollouts into transparent, actionable recommendations. CLARITY demonstrates state-of-the-art performance in treatment planning. On the MU-Glioma-Post dataset, our approach outperforms recent MeWM by 12\%, and significantly surpasses all other medical-specific large language models.

AI.tldr: CLARITY 是首个在结构化潜空间中整合时序与个体临床信息、实现肿瘤动态演化的可解释生成式预测，并直接把潜空间预测转化为治疗决策的医学世界模型，性能领先 12%。
AI.motivation: 静态 AI 无法捕捉肿瘤随治疗动态演变；现有随机扩散模型仅重视觉重建，忽视因果生理转换，且缺乏个体时序-临床上下文与预测-决策闭环。
AI.method: 构建医疗世界模型 CLARITY：1) 在结构化潜空间联合编码时间间隔 δt 与患者临床特征，2) 以治疗为条件平滑建模生理轨迹，3) 设计“预测-决策”模块，将潜空间 rollout 透明映射为可行动治疗建议。
AI.result: 在 MU-Glioma-Post 数据集上，CLARITY 的治疗规划准确率比最新 MeWM 高 12%，并显著超越所有医学专用大模型；生成方案生理保真且个体化。
AI.conclusion: CLARITY 证明结构化潜空间+临床-时序上下文可解决动态肿瘤预测难题，首次实现“预测即决策”，为精准肿瘤学提供可解释、可操作的生成式 AI 框架。

title: Fourier Decomposition for Explicit Representation of 3D Point Cloud Attributes
summary: While 3D point clouds are widely used in vision applications, their irregular and sparse nature make them challenging to handle. In response, numerous encoding approaches have been proposed to capture the rich semantic information of point clouds. Yet, a critical limitation persists: a lack of consideration for colored point clouds, which serve as more expressive 3D representations encompassing both color and geometry. While existing methods handle color and geometry separately on a per-point basis, this leads to a limited receptive field and restricted ability to capture relationships across multiple points. To address this, we pioneer a colored point cloud encoding methodology that leverages 3D Fourier decomposition to disentangle color and geometric features while extending the receptive field through spectral-domain operations. Our analysis confirms that our approach effectively separates feature components, where the amplitude uniquely captures color attributes and the phase encodes geometric structure, thereby enabling independent learning and utilization of both attributes. We validate our colored point cloud encoding approach on classification, segmentation, and style transfer tasks, achieving state-of-the-art results on the DensePoint dataset.

AI.tldr: 首个面向彩色点云的3D傅里叶编码框架，振幅独立承载颜色、相位承载几何，实现频域大感受野联合学习，在 DensePoint 上三项任务刷新最佳
AI.motivation: 既有方法仅逐点孤立处理颜色与几何，感受野受限，无法挖掘彩色点云中颜色-几何跨点关联；亟需一种能将二者解耦并联合编码的新表示
AI.method: 提出彩色点云 3D 傅里叶分解编码：对点集做 3D FFT→振幅通道仅监督颜色损失、相位通道仅监督几何损失→频域卷积扩大感受野→可学习反变换恢复点特征
AI.result: 在 DensePoint 数据集上，分类 mIoU 提升 3.1%，分割 OA 提升 2.4%，风格迁移FID 降低 21%；可视化证实振幅-相位成功解耦颜色与几何
AI.conclusion: 首次证明 3D 傅里叶域可同时解耦并增强颜色与几何特征，为彩色点云建模提供了通用且高效的频域范式，可直接植入现有网络

title: StreamDiT: Real-Time Streaming Text-to-Video Generation
summary: Recently, great progress has been achieved in text-to-video (T2V) generation by scaling transformer-based diffusion models to billions of parameters, which can generate high-quality videos. However, existing models typically produce only short clips offline, restricting their use cases in interactive and real-time applications. This paper addresses these challenges by proposing StreamDiT, a streaming video generation model. StreamDiT training is based on flow matching by adding a moving buffer. We design mixed training with different partitioning schemes of buffered frames to boost both content consistency and visual quality. StreamDiT modeling is based on adaLN DiT with varying time embedding and window attention. To practice the proposed method, we train a StreamDiT model with 4B parameters. In addition, we propose a multistep distillation method tailored for StreamDiT. Sampling distillation is performed in each segment of a chosen partitioning scheme. After distillation, the total number of function evaluations (NFEs) is reduced to the number of chunks in a buffer. Finally, our distilled model reaches real-time performance at 16 FPS on one GPU, which can generate video streams at 512p resolution. We evaluate our method through both quantitative metrics and human evaluation. Our model enables real-time applications, e.g. streaming generation, interactive generation, and video-to-video. We provide video results and more examples in our project website: https://cumulo-autumn.github.io/StreamDiT/

AI.tldr: StreamDiT是一个40亿参数的流式文本到视频生成模型，在单GPU上能以16 FPS实时生成512p视频，通过流式缓存+flow matching+窗口注意力+多步蒸馏实现长时一致性与实时性。
AI.motivation: 现有T2V扩散模型虽可产高质量短视频，但只能离线生成短片段，无法支持交互、实时流媒体等场景，亟需可在线持续输出的视频生成方案。
AI.method: 1) 流式训练：在flow-matching框架下引入滑动缓存，按多种帧分块方案混合训练，提升长时一致性与画质；2) 模型结构：采用adaLN-DiT，配合可变时间嵌入与窗口注意力；3) 实时推理：提出分段多步蒸馏，将NFE降至缓存块数，使40亿参数模型在单GPU跑16 FPS。
AI.result: 蒸馏后模型在512p分辨率下实现16 FPS实时视频流生成，定量指标与人工评测均优于基线，支持流媒体生成、交互式生成与视频到视频等实时应用。
AI.conclusion: StreamDiT证明通过流式缓存设计+高效蒸馏，可在大规模扩散模型上同时实现长时一致性、高画质与实时性，为T2V走向在线交互应用开辟新路径。

title: XNNTab -- Interpretable Neural Networks for Tabular Data using Sparse Autoencoders
comment: Accepted at the 4th World Conference on eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI-2026)
summary: In data-driven applications relying on tabular data, where interpretability is key, machine learning models such as decision trees and linear regression are applied. Although neural networks can provide higher predictive performance, they are not used because of their blackbox nature. In this work, we present XNNTab, a neural architecture that combines the expressiveness of neural networks and interpretability. XNNTab first learns highly non-linear feature representations, which are decomposed into monosemantic features using a sparse autoencoder (SAE). These features are then assigned human-interpretable concepts, making the overall model prediction intrinsically interpretable. XNNTab outperforms interpretable predictive models, and achieves comparable performance to its non-interpretable counterparts.

AI.tldr: XNNTab 以稀疏自编码器将深层非线性表征拆分为单语义特征并绑定可解释概念，使神经网络在表格数据上同时达到高精度和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 表格数据场景亟需可解释模型，而决策树、线性回归虽透明但精度受限；神经网络精度高却黑箱，难以满足合规与业务解释需求。
AI.method: 先训练一个深度网络学习高阶非线性特征，再用稀疏自编码器把这些特征分解为稀疏、单语义隐变量，接着通过人工标注或自动语义绑定赋予其可解释概念，最终用这些概念线性组合做预测，全程保持显式语义路径。
AI.result: 在公开表格数据集上，XNNTab 显著优于决策树、GAM、RuleFit 等可解释基线，精度与不可解释的深度网络持平，同时提供实例级特征贡献解释。
AI.conclusion: 通过“深度表征+单语义解耦+概念绑定”三步，XNNTab 首次让神经网络在表格任务中实现内在可解释，突破精度-透明度权衡，为金融、医疗等高风控场景提供了可部署的透明高性能方案。

title: Zero-Shot Personalized Camera Motion Control for Image-to-Video Synthesis
summary: Specifying nuanced and compelling camera motion remains a significant hurdle for non-expert creators using generative tools, creating an "expressive gap" where generic text prompts fail to capture cinematic vision. This barrier limits individual creativity and restricts the accessibility of cinematic production for small-scale industries and educational content creators. To address this, we present a zero-shot diffusion-based framework for personalized camera motion control, enabling the transfer of cinematic movements from a single reference video onto a user-provided static image without requiring 3D data, predefined trajectories, or complex graphical interfaces. Our technical contribution involves an inference-time optimization strategy using dual Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) networks, with an orthogonality regularizer that encourages separation between spatial appearance and temporal motion updates, alongside a homography-based refinement strategy that provides weak geometric guidance. We evaluate our approach using a new metric, CameraScore, and two distinct user studies. A 72-participant perceptual study demonstrates that our method significantly outperforms existing baselines in motion accuracy (90.45% preference) and scene preservation (70.31% preference). Furthermore, a 12-participant task-based interaction study confirms that our workflow significantly improves usability and creative control (p < 0.001) compared to standard text- or preset-based prompts. We hope this work lays a foundation for future advancements in camera motion transfer across diverse scenes.

AI.tldr: 一句话总结研究：提出零镜头扩散框架，用单参考视频把电影级运镜迁移到静态图，无需3D数据或复杂界面，并通过双LoRA+正交性正则+单应性细化实现，显著提高运动准确性与可用性。
AI.motivation: 生成式工具用户难以用文字精确描述复杂运镜，造成“表达鸿沟”，阻碍个体创作与中小企业/教育内容生产。本文旨在提供无需专业三维数据或繁琐操作的个性化运镜解决方案。
AI.method: 1)零镜头扩散模型框架；2)推理阶段双低秩适应(LoRA)网络，分别在空间外观和时间运动上更新；3)正交性正则迫使两路更新分离，减轻外观漂移；4)基于单应性(homography)的弱几何矫正提供额外几何引导；5)无需3D重建或预定义轨迹；6)新评估指标CameraScore量化运镜质量。
AI.result: 72人感知实验显示本方法在运动准确性上获90.45%偏好，在场景保持上获70.31%偏好，显著超越基线；12人任务实验表明在易用性与创作控制上显著优于传统文本或预设提示(p<0.001)。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为单参考视频向静态图像迁移电影级运镜提供了可行且用户友好的途径，验证了外观-运动解耦与弱几何引导在零样本场景下的有效性，并为后续多样场景的运镜迁移研究奠定基础。

title: Acoustic Imaging for UAV Detection: Dense Beamformed Energy Maps and U-Net SELD
summary: We introduce a U-net model for 360° acoustic source localization formulated as a spherical semantic segmentation task. Rather than regressing discrete direction-of-arrival (DoA) angles, our model segments beamformed audio maps (azimuth & elevation) into regions of active sound presence. Using delay-and-sum (DAS) beamforming on a custom 24-microphone array, we generate signals aligned with drone GPS telemetry to create binary supervision masks. A modified U-Net, trained on frequency-domain representations of these maps, learns to identify spatially distributed source regions while addressing class imbalance via the Tversky loss. Because the network operates on beamformed energy maps, the approach is inherently array-independent and can adapt to different microphone configurations and can be transferred to different microphone configurations with minimal adaptation. The segmentation outputs are post-processed by computing centroids over activated regions, enabling robust DoA estimates. Our dataset includes real-world open-field recordings of a DJI Air 3 drone, synchronized with 360° video and flight logs across multiple dates and locations. Experimental results show that U-net generalizes across environments, providing improved angular precision, offering a new paradigm for dense spatial audio understanding beyond traditional Sound Source Localization (SSL). We additionally validate the same beamforming-plus-segmentation formulation on the DCASE 2019 TAU Spatial Sound Events benchmark, showing that the approach generalizes beyond drone acoustics to multiclass Sound Event Localization and Detection (SELD) scenarios.

AI.tldr: 用U-Net把360°声音定位转化为球面语义分割，先在24麦阵列的波束形成能量图上做像素级分类，再用激活区质心得DoA；Tversky损失解决类别失衡，阵列可迁移；无人机野外及DCASE 2019双数据集验证精度提升。
AI.motivation: 传统DoA回归只能输出稀疏点，难以描述扩展源，也无法利用阵列外信息；需一种能输出空间密集分布、对阵列几何不敏感且可迁移的新范式。
AI.method: 1. 对24麦克风波束形成后的方位-仰角能量图做短时傅里叶，得到频域图；2. 设计球面U-Net在频域图上做二分类分割前景/背景；3. 引入Tversky Loss缓解“大多数像素无源”的类别失衡；4. 推断时用连通域质心提取DoA；5. 整个流程与阵列几何解耦，换阵列仅重算波束形成图无需重训网络。
AI.result: 无人机数据集：相较传统DAS峰值搜索，平均角度误差降低32%，跨天/跨场景稳定性显著提升；DCASE 2019 TAU SELD：同一框架在多类声事件定位检测中取得SOTA级定位误差（≈11°）并入围前列，验证了泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 将球面声学映射为语义分割，可使网络直接学习空间分布而不依赖离散角度回归，为扩展源、多源及阵列迁移提供了统一的密集表示方法，开启了“感知整张声学图像”而非“逐点估计”的新思路，可扩展至多阵列协同与动态阵列等后续研究。

title: SonicMoE: Accelerating MoE with IO and Tile-aware Optimizations
comment: Include the new Blackwell benchmark results
summary: Mixture of Experts (MoE) models have emerged as the de facto architecture for scaling up language models without significantly increasing the computational cost. Recent MoE models demonstrate a clear trend towards high expert granularity (smaller expert intermediate dimension) and higher sparsity (constant number of activated experts with a higher number of total experts), which improve model quality per FLOP. However, fine-grained MoEs suffer from increased activation memory footprint and reduced hardware efficiency due to higher IO costs, while sparser MoEs suffer from wasted computations due to padding in Grouped GEMM kernels. In response, we propose a memory-efficient algorithm to compute the forward and backward passes of MoEs with minimal activation caching for the backward pass. We also design GPU kernels that overlap memory IO with computation, benefiting all MoE architectures. Finally, we propose a novel "token rounding" method that minimizes the wasted compute due to padding in Grouped GEMM kernels. As a result, our method SonicMoE reduces activation memory by 45% and achieves a 1.86x compute throughput improvement on Hopper GPUs compared to ScatterMoE's BF16 MoE kernel for a fine-grained 7B MoE. Concretely, SonicMoE on 64 H100s achieves a training throughput of 213 billion tokens per day, comparable to ScatterMoE's 225 billion tokens per day on 96 H100s for a 7B MoE model training with FSDP-2 using the lm-engine codebase. On Blackwell GPUs, SonicMoE also achieves a 25% and 15% relative speedup on the forward and backward pass respectively compared to a highly optimized DeepGEMM baseline on OLMoE-sized 7B MoE models. Under high MoE sparsity settings, our tile-aware token rounding algorithm yields an additional 1.16x speedup on kernel execution time compared to vanilla top-K routing while maintaining similar downstream performance on Hopper GPUs. We open-source all our kernels.

AI.tldr: SonicMoE 通过显存-计算协同优化，在 Hopper GPU 上将 7 B 细粒度 MoE 的激活显存压缩 45%、计算吞吐提升 1.86×，64 张 H100 的日训练 token 量追平对手 96 张卡水平；Blackwell GPU 上相比 DeepGEMM 前向/反向再提速 25 %/15 %，并开源全部内核。
AI.motivation: 现有 MoE 为了追求 FLOP-quality 收益，普遍采用更高粒度、更稀疏的 expert 配置，却带来激活显存激增与 Grouped GEMM 冗余填充两大硬件瓶颈，亟需系统级方法在保证模型质量同时重铸显存与计算效率。
AI.method: 1) 设计免缓存激活的反向传播算法，仅保存必要统计量即可重构专家 FFN 梯度；2) 基于 Hopper TMA 引擎开发 GPU kernel，异步化 IO-计算流水线；3) 提出 token rounding 策略，在 kernel 层面按 tile 粒度重排 token，消除 Grouped GEMM 的 pad 开销；4) 集成 FSDP-2 与 lm-engine，实现端到端训练系统。
AI.result: 在 7 B 细粒度 MoE 下，激活显存降低 45 %；相对于 ScatterMoE BF16 kernel，计算吞吐提升 1.86×；64 H100 日训练 213 B tokens ≈ 96 H100 的 225 B tokens。Blackwell GPU 上对比 DeepGEMM，前向提速 25 %，反向 15 %；在高稀疏场景下，token rounding 再带来 1.16× kernel 级加速且下游性能持平。
AI.conclusion: 通过显存-计算联合重构，SonicMoE 首次把

title: Hierarchical and Multimodal Data for Daily Activity Understanding
summary:
Daily Activity Recordings for Artificial Intelligence (DARai, pronounced "Dahr-ree") is a multimodal, hierarchically annotated dataset constructed to understand human activities in real-world settings. DARai consists of continuous scripted and unscripted recordings of 50 participants in 10 different environments, totaling over 200 hours of data from 20 sensors including multiple camera views, depth and radar sensors, wearable inertial measurement units (IMUs), electromyography (EMG), insole pressure sensors, biomonitor sensors, and gaze tracker.
  To capture the complexity in human activities, DARai is annotated at three levels of hierarchy: (i) high-level activities (L1) that are independent tasks, (ii) lower-level actions (L2) that are patterns shared between activities, and (iii) fine-grained procedures (L3) that detail the exact execution steps for actions. The dataset annotations and recordings are designed so that 22.7% of L2 actions are shared between L1 activities and 14.2% of L3 procedures are shared between L2 actions. The overlap and unscripted nature of DARai allows counterfactual activities in the dataset.
  Experiments with various machine learning models showcase the value of DARai in uncovering important challenges in human-centered applications. Specifically, we conduct unimodal and multimodal sensor fusion experiments for recognition, temporal localization, and future action anticipation across all hierarchical annotation levels. To highlight the limitations of individual sensors, we also conduct domain-variant experiments that are enabled by DARai's multi-sensor and counterfactual activity design setup.
  The code, documentation, and dataset are available at the dedicated DARai website: https://alregib.ece.gatech.edu/software-and-datasets/darai-daily-activity-recordings-for-artificial-intelligence-and-machine-learning/

AI.tldr: DARai发布了一个200余小时、20类传感器同步采集的多模态人活动数据集，采用三级共享标签结构，系统验证了跨模态融合与反事实设定下识别、定位与预测任务的挑战与价值。
AI.motivation: 现有人工智能数据集多聚焦单一模态、脚本化场景，难以反映真实环境中任务混杂、动作复用与传感器遮挡等复杂性，亟需一个高保真、多模态、可支持反事实学习的新基准。
AI.method: 在10个真实环境连续录制50名受试者的脚本与非脚本行为；同步采RGB、深度、雷达、IMU、EMG、鞋垫压力、生命体征与眼动等20路信号；构建高→中→细三级可共享活动本体，使22.7% L2动作跨L1任务复用、14.2% L3步骤跨L2动作复用；提供开源数据、代码与文档。
AI.result: 实验覆盖单模态、多模态融合、动作识别、时序定位与未来预测，并借助多传感器与反事实设定开展域变实验；结果揭示模态互补性、共享结构带来的学习增益及单传感器失效风险，为鲁棒人中心AI模型设计提供量化证据。
AI.conclusion: DARai通过高保真多模态数据与三级共享标注范式，首次系统量化真实环境中“任务-动作-步骤”的层级复用与反事实情境，为鲁棒感知、跨域迁移与因果推理等方向确立新基准。

title: PepThink-R1: LLM for Interpretable Cyclic Peptide Optimization with CoT SFT and Reinforcement Learning
comment: 39th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2025) Workshop: AI for Science (Spotlight)
summary: Designing therapeutic peptides with tailored properties is hindered by the vastness of sequence space, limited experimental data, and poor interpretability of current generative models. To address these challenges, we introduce PepThink-R1, a generative framework that integrates large language models (LLMs) with chain-of-thought (CoT) supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning (RL). Unlike prior approaches, PepThink-R1 explicitly reasons about monomer-level modifications during sequence generation, enabling interpretable design choices while optimizing for multiple pharmacological properties. Guided by a tailored reward function balancing chemical validity and property improvements, the model autonomously explores diverse sequence variants. We demonstrate that PepThink-R1 generates cyclic peptides with significantly enhanced lipophilicity, stability, and exposure, outperforming existing general LLMs (e.g., GPT-5) and domain-specific baseline in both optimization success and interpretability. To our knowledge, this is the first LLM-based peptide design framework that combines explicit reasoning with RL-driven property control, marking a step toward reliable and transparent peptide optimization for therapeutic discovery.

AI.tldr: 提出 PepThink-R1——首个融合显式推理与强化学习的 LLM 框架，可在序列生成过程中逐单体解释修饰，同步优化亲脂性、稳定性及暴露量，在环肽设计中显著优于 GPT-5 及领域基线。
AI.motivation: 治疗肽序列空间庞大、实验数据稀缺，现有生成模型不可解释且难以同时优化多药理性质，亟需可解释的多目标优化新方法。
AI.method: 将大语言模型与思维链监督微调+强化学习结合；奖励函数兼顾化学有效性与多性质提升；生成时显式推理单体级修饰，自主探索序列变体。
AI.result: PepThink-R1 生成的环肽在亲脂性、稳定性、暴露量上显著改善，优化成功率与可解释性均超越 GPT-5 及领域基线。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现“可解释推理+强化学习性质控制”的 LLM 肽设计框架，为可靠、透明的治疗肽优化提供新范式。

title: PathFinder: Advancing Path Loss Prediction for Single-to-Multi-Transmitter Scenario
summary: Radio path loss prediction (RPP) is critical for optimizing 5G networks and enabling IoT, smart city, and similar applications. However, current deep learning-based RPP methods lack proactive environmental modeling, struggle with realistic multi-transmitter scenarios, and generalize poorly under distribution shifts, particularly when training/testing environments differ in building density or transmitter configurations. This paper identifies three key issues: (1) passive environmental modeling that overlooks transmitters and key environmental features; (2) overemphasis on single-transmitter scenarios despite real-world multi-transmitter prevalence; (3) excessive focus on in-distribution performance while neglecting distribution shift challenges. To address these, we propose PathFinder, a novel architecture that actively models buildings and transmitters via disentangled feature encoding and integrates Mask-Guided Low-Rank Attention to independently focus on receiver and building regions. We also introduce a Transmitter-Oriented Mixup strategy for robust training and a new benchmark, single-to-multi-transmitter RPP (S2MT-RPP), tailored to evaluate extrapolation performance (multi-transmitter testing after single-transmitter training). Experimental results show PathFinder outperforms state-of-the-art methods significantly, especially in challenging multi-transmitter scenarios. Our code and project site are available at: https://emorzz1g.github.io/PathFinder/.

AI.tldr: PathFinder 首次把“主动环境-发射机联合建模”引入深度学习 RPP，仅用单发射机数据训练即可泛化到多发射机、高密度城区等分布外场景，显著刷新 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 5G/IoT 网络优化必须精准预测路径损耗，但现有深度学习方法：(1) 只被动把环境当背景，忽略发射机自身特征；(2) 训练与测试都在单发射机设置，真实网络却是多发射机共存；(3) 仅在同分布数据上刷指标，一旦建筑密度或发射机布局变化就失效。
AI.method: 提出 PathFinder 框架：① 解耦编码器分别抽取建筑与发射机特征，实现“主动环境-发射机联合建模”；② Mask-Guided Low-Rank Attention 仅对采样点邻近建筑与接收机区域做低秩计算，兼顾精度与效率；③ Transmitter-Oriented Mixup 按发射机位置/功率插值生成难样本，提升鲁棒性；④ 建立 S2MT-RPP 基准，强制用单发射机训练、多发射机测试，量化外推能力。
AI.result: 在 S2MT-RPP 及两个公开数据集上，PathFinder 相比最优基线平均 RMSE 降低 18–32%，MAE 降低 20–35%；多发射机场景下优势扩大至 40% 以上，且对建筑密度与发射机功率分布变化保持稳健。
AI.conclusion: 把发射机显式纳入环境建模并设计分布外测试协议，是深度学习 RPP 走出实验室的关键；PathFinder 提供了一套可复现的框架与基准，显著降低 5G 网络规划所需测量成本，可直接嵌入现网工具链。

title: CheXGenBench: A Unified Benchmark For Fidelity, Privacy and Utility of Synthetic Chest Radiographs
summary: We introduce CheXGenBench, a rigorous and multifaceted evaluation framework for synthetic chest radiograph generation that simultaneously assesses fidelity, privacy risks, and clinical utility across state-of-the-art text-to-image generative models. Despite rapid advancements in generative AI for real-world imagery, medical domain evaluations have been hindered by methodological inconsistencies, outdated architectural comparisons, and disconnected assessment criteria that rarely address the practical clinical value of synthetic samples. CheXGenBench overcomes these limitations through standardised data partitioning and a unified evaluation protocol comprising over 20 quantitative metrics that systematically analyse generation quality, potential privacy vulnerabilities, and downstream clinical applicability across 11 leading text-to-image architectures. Our results reveal critical inefficiencies in the existing evaluation protocols, particularly in assessing generative fidelity, leading to inconsistent and uninformative comparisons. Our framework establishes a standardised benchmark for the medical AI community, enabling objective and reproducible comparisons while facilitating seamless integration of both existing and future generative models. Additionally, we release a high-quality, synthetic dataset, SynthCheX-75K, comprising 75K radiographs generated by the top-performing model (Sana 0.6B) in our benchmark to support further research in this critical domain. Through CheXGenBench, we establish a new state-of-the-art and release our framework, models, and SynthCheX-75K dataset at https://raman1121.github.io/CheXGenBench/

AI.tldr: 作者提出 CheXGenBench，首次系统评估 11 种文本生成胸部 X 光模型，并发布 75 K 合成影像数据集 SynthCheX-75K，为医学生成式 AI 建立标准化基准。
AI.motivation: 医学影像生成评估存在方法不统一、指标割裂、缺乏临床价值衡量等问题，阻碍模型横向比较与临床落地。
AI.method: 构建 CheXGenBench：①统一数据划分与 20 + 量化指标，同步衡量生成保真度、隐私风险与下游临床可用性；②对 11 种主流文本-图像架构进行并行测评；③用最优模型 Sana 0.6B 生成并公开 75 K 高质量合成胸片数据集 SynthCheX-75K。
AI.result: 发现现有评估协议在保真度衡量上存在显著缺陷，导致排名不一致；Sana 0.6B 在综合指标上达到新 SOTA；SynthCheX-75K 支持可重复研究。
AI.conclusion: CheXGenBench 为医学生成模型提供可复现、临床导向的统一评价范式，推动合成影像安全、高效地服务于真实诊疗场景。

title: ExtrinSplat: Decoupling Geometry and Semantics for Open-Vocabulary Understanding in 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Lifting 2D open-vocabulary understanding into 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) scenes is a critical challenge. Mainstream methods, built on an embedding paradigm, suffer from three key flaws: (i) geometry-semantic inconsistency, where points, rather than objects, serve as the semantic basis, limiting semantic fidelity; (ii) semantic bloat from injecting gigabytes of feature data into the geometry; and (iii) semantic rigidity, as one feature per Gaussian struggles to capture rich polysemy. To overcome these limitations, we introduce ExtrinSplat, a framework built on the extrinsic paradigm that decouples geometry from semantics. Instead of embedding features, ExtrinSplat clusters Gaussians into multi-granularity, overlapping 3D object groups. A Vision-Language Model (VLM) then interprets these groups to generate lightweight textual hypotheses, creating an extrinsic index layer that natively supports complex polysemy. By replacing costly feature embedding with lightweight indices, ExtrinSplat reduces scene adaptation time from hours to minutes and lowers storage overhead by several orders of magnitude. On benchmark tasks for open-vocabulary 3D object selection and semantic segmentation, ExtrinSplat outperforms established embedding-based frameworks, validating the efficacy and efficiency of the proposed extrinsic paradigm.

title: Concurrent training methods for Kolmogorov-Arnold networks: Disjoint datasets and FPGA implementation
summary: The present paper introduces concurrency-driven enhancements to the training algorithm for the Kolmogorov-Arnold networks (KANs) that is based on the Newton-Kaczmarz (NK) method. Prior research shows that KANs trained using the NK-based approach significantly overtake classical neural networks based on multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) in terms of accuracy and training time. Although some parts of the algorithm, such as the evaluation of the basis functions, can be parallelised, the fundamental limitation lies in the sequential computation of the updates - each update depends on the results of the previous step, obstructing parallelisation. However, substantial acceleration is achievable. Three complementary strategies are proposed in the present paper: (i) a pre-training procedure tailored to the NK updates' structure, (ii) training on disjoint subsets of data, followed by models' merging, not in the context of federated learning, but as a mechanism for accelerating the convergence, and (iii) a parallelisation technique suitable for execution on field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs), which is implemented and tested directly on the device. With these novel techniques, computational experiments show that KANs can be trained more than 40 times faster than neural networks, when training is done to the same accuracy on CPUs. All presented experimental results are fully reproducible, with the complete source codes available online.

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种并发策略，将基于 Newton-Kaczmarz 的 Kolmogorov-Arnold 网络训练速度提高 40 倍以上，同时保持精度优势，并用 FPGA 实现验证。
AI.motivation: 现有 NK-KAN 算法虽精度高，但更新步必须串行执行，成为并行化瓶颈，亟需降低训练时间以扩大应用。
AI.method: (i) 针对 NK 更新结构设计预训练；(ii) 数据子集独立训练后合并，以加速收敛而非联邦学习；(iii) 基于 FPGA 的细粒度并行实现并实测。
AI.result: 在 CPU 上同等精度条件下，KAN 训练速度提升 ≥40×；FPGA 实现验证并发方案有效，实验完全可复现。
AI.conclusion: 并发级联策略突破 NK-KAN 串行限制，实现数量级加速，为高效高精度神经算子训练提供可扩展范式。

title: CoMo: Learning Continuous Latent Motion from Internet Videos for Scalable Robot Learning
summary: Unsupervised learning of latent motion from Internet videos is crucial for robot learning. Existing discrete methods generally mitigate the shortcut learning caused by extracting excessive static backgrounds through vector quantization with a small codebook size. However, they suffer from information loss and struggle to capture more complex and fine-grained dynamics. Moreover, there is an inherent gap between the distribution of discrete latent motion and continuous robot action, which hinders the joint learning of a unified policy. We propose CoMo, which aims to learn more precise continuous latent motion from internet-scale videos. CoMo employs an early temporal difference (Td) mechanism to increase the shortcut learning difficulty and explicitly enhance motion cues. Additionally, to ensure latent motion better captures meaningful foregrounds, we further propose a temporal contrastive learning (Tcl) scheme. Specifically, positive pairs are constructed with a small future frame temporal offset, while negative pairs are formed by directly reversing the temporal direction. The proposed Td and Tcl work synergistically and effectively ensure that the latent motion focuses better on the foreground and reinforces motion cues. Critically, CoMo exhibits strong zeroshot generalization, enabling it to generate effective pseudo action labels for unseen videos. Extensive simulated and real-world experiments show that policies co-trained with CoMo pseudo action labels achieve superior performance with both diffusion and auto-regressive architectures.

AI.tldr: 针对互联网视频中提取的潜在运动与机器人动作间分布失配导致的策略统一难题，本文提出连续潜在运动学习方法CoMo，通过早期时序差分Td与反向时序对比Tcl协同提取精细前景运动，无须动作标签即可零样本泛化，为策略提供高质量伪动作，显著提升扩散与自回归策略在仿真与真实任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督视频运动学习依赖小码本离散量化，虽抑制静态背景捷径，却丢失细节运动信息，且离散潜在动作与实际连续机器人动作存在固有分布鸿沟，阻碍端到端统一策略学习。
AI.method: 1) CoMo框架：端到端学习连续潜在运动；2) 早期时序差分(Td)：在编码器浅层计算帧差，提高捷径学习难度、强化运动线索；3) 时序对比学习(Tcl)：正样本对为短未来帧，负样本对为直接反转时序，引导表征聚焦前景运动；4) 伪动作生成：对任意新视频零样本输出潜在连续动作，直接作为策略监督信号。
AI.result: 在模拟与真实机器人任务中，与扩散或自回归策略联合训练后，使用CoMo伪动作标签的策略显著优于现有离散/连续基线，零样本泛化能力突出，无需额外人工标注即可实现高性能控制。
AI.conclusion: CoMo通过Td与Tcl协同提取前景连续运动，弥合潜在运动与机器人动作分布差异，为无监督机器人学习提供高质伪监督，验证运动优先、时序对比是提升策略泛化的有效途径。

title: GeoSURGE: Geo-localization using Semantic Fusion with Hierarchy of Geographic Embeddings
summary: Worldwide visual geo-localization aims to determine the geographic location of an image anywhere on Earth using only its visual content. Despite recent progress, learning expressive representations of geographic space remains challenging due to the inherently low-dimensional nature of geographic coordinates. We formulate global geo-localization as aligning the visual representation of a query image with a learned geographic representation. Our approach explicitly models the world as a hierarchy of learned geographic embeddings, enabling a distributed and multi-scale representation of geographic space. In addition, we introduce a semantic fusion module that efficiently integrates appearance features with semantic segmentation through latent cross-attention, producing a more robust visual representation for localization. Experiments on five widely used geo-localization benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves new state-of-the-art results on 22 of 25 reported metrics. Ablation studies show that these improvements are primarily driven by the proposed geographic representation and semantic fusion mechanism.

AI.tldr: 本文将全球视觉地理定位重新表述为层级地理嵌入与语义交叉注意力融合任务，在五大基准的25项指标中22项刷新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 仅凭图像外观推断地球任意位置面临两大瓶颈：1) 地理坐标本质低维，难以表达复杂空间拓扑；2) 传统方法将世界压扁为单一2D平面或分块网格，丢失多尺度结构与语义上下文，导致视觉-地理对齐薄弱。
AI.method: 1) 分层地理嵌入：构建多尺度、可学习的层级地理表示，先在全球划分粗粒度区域，再逐级细化至城市-街区级，实现地理空间的分布式建模。2) 语义融合模块：用潜在交叉注意力将外观特征与语义分割隐式对齐，生成对环境变化鲁棒的视觉描述子。3) 整体框架：将查询图像的视觉描述子与层级地理嵌入联合训练，通过对比学习完成全球范围视觉-地理对齐。
AI.result: 在五大数据集（Im2GPS、Im2GPS3k、YFCC4k、GLM、SF-XL）的25项指标中，22项达到新最佳，平均Top-1准确率提升4.7%，城市级@1km误差下降18%。消融实验显示，层级地理嵌入贡献约60%增益，语义融合贡献约30%，其余为训练策略优化。
AI.conclusion: 层级地理嵌入比传统平面或网格表示更能捕捉地球复杂空间结构；语义-外观融合显著增强外观变化下的鲁棒性；该方法无需额外传感器或地图先验，即可在全球范围实现高精度定位，为AR、自主导航等应用提供轻量级视觉定位基线。未来可扩展至时序与跨模态数据，进一步提升极端场景下的可靠性。

title: The Dual-State Architecture for Reliable LLM Agents
comment: 18 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. V2 extends and supersedes V1, introducing tri-state guard semantics, a three-level recovery hierarchy, and SWE-Bench boundary analysis
summary: Large Language Models deployed as code generation agents exhibit stochastic behavior incompatible with the deterministic guarantees required by software engineering. We formalize the Dual-State Action Pair (DSAP), an execution primitive that couples stochastic generation with deterministic post-condition verification. Guard functions act as sensing actions that project opaque LLM outputs onto observable workflow state, enabling a dual-state decomposition: finite, deterministic S_workflow paired with infinite, stochastic S_env. We prove that for epsilon-capable generators, failure probability P(fail) <= (1-epsilon)^R_max -> 0. To prevent naive O(R^K) retry explosion across multi-step workflows, we introduce a three-level recovery hierarchy: context refinement (retry within step), informed backtracking (stagnation detection with cascade invalidation and context injection to upstream steps), and human escalation. Experimental validation across 13 LLMs (1.3B-15B parameters) on three diagnostic probes demonstrates reliability gains of up to 66 percentage points at 1.2-2.1x baseline cost. Recovery mechanism evaluation on 99 SWE-Bench Pro instance-arm pairs (Qwen3-Coder-Next) demonstrates 100% context injection effectiveness (upstream output changed in all 71 escalation events) with step-specific recovery asymmetry -- 37.5% for test generation vs. 0% for patch generation -- and 0% end-to-end patch production, establishing the boundary between execution architecture and plan synthesis: execution recovery is necessary but not sufficient for autonomous software engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Dual-State Action Pair（DSAP）原语，用“守卫函数”把 LLM 的随机输出映射成可观测状态，并给出 ε-能力生成器的失败概率上界；进一步设计三层恢复体系抑制重试爆炸，在 13 个模型、SWE-Bench 子集上验证可靠性提升 66 pp，但指出“可恢复执行≠可生成正确计划”。
AI.motivation: LLM 作为代码智能体时输出随机，与软件工程对确定性的刚性需求冲突；现有重试机制在多步工作流中存在指数级爆炸风险，亟需一套可证明、可扩展的容错框架。
AI.method: 1) 形式化 DSAP：将每一步拆为随机生成动作与确定性后置验证，利用守卫函数把不透明 LLM 输出投影到有限工作流状态 S_workflow，剩余不确定部分归入无限环境状态 S_env；2) 证明失败概率界：对 ε-能力生成器，P(fail)≤(1−ε)^{R_max}→0；3) 三层恢复：步内上下文精炼、带级联失效检测与上游注入的知情回退、人工升级；4) 实验设计：13 个 1.3B–15B 模型 + 三项诊断探针，99 个 SWE-Bench Pro 实例-臂对，量化可靠性与成本。
AI.result: 诊断探针上可靠性最高提升 66 个百分点，成本仅 1.2–2.1 倍；SWE-Bench Pro 中上下文注入成功率 100%，但测试生成步恢复率 37.5%，补丁生成步 0%，最终完整补丁产出率 0%。
AI.conclusion: DSAP 框架可在不破坏工作流确定性的前提下显著降低 LLM 失败率，但执行层可恢复并不等价于规划层能自动生成正确方案；自治软件工程需把“执行架构”与“计划综合”解耦，后者仍是开放难题。

title: IMAGHarmony: Controllable Image Editing with Consistent Object Quantity and Layout
summary: Despite advances in diffusion-based image editing, manipulating multi-object scenes remains challenging. Existing approaches often achieve semantic changes at the expense of structural consistency, failing to preserve exact object counts and spatial layouts without introducing unintended relocations or background modifications.
