To address this limitation, we introduce quantity-and-layout-consistent image editing (QL-Edit) to modify object semantics while maintaining the original instance cardinality and spatial layout. We propose IMAGHarmony, a parameter-efficient framework featuring a harmony-aware (HA) module that incorporates perception cues from the reference image into the diffusion process. This enables the model to jointly reason about object semantics, counts, and spatial positions for improved structural consistency. Furthermore, we introduce a preference-guided noise selection (PNS) strategy that identifies favorable initialization conditions, substantially improving generation stability in challenging multi-object scenarios. To support systematic evaluation, we construct HarmonyBench, a benchmark designed to measure semantic editing accuracy and structural consistency under quantity and layout constraints. Extensive experiments demonstrate that IMAGHarmony consistently outperforms existing methods in both structural preservation and semantic accuracy. Notably, our framework is highly efficient, requiring only 200 training images and 10.6M trainable parameters. Code, models, and data are available at \url{https://github.com/muzishen/IMAGHarmony}.

AI.tldr: 提出 IMAGHarmony-QN-Edit：仅用10.6 M参数和200张参考图，即可在多目标场景中实现语义替换并保持目标数量与空间布局绝对不变。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散图像编辑方法常在语义变换时破坏多目标场景的结构一致性（目标数目和位置漂移、背景被连带改动）。作者希望能在不改变多目标基准布局的前提下仅修改个体语义。
AI.method: 1) 参数高效的 IMAGHarmony 框架：冻结扩散骨干，插入 harmony-aware(HA) 感知模块，将参考图像中的目标计数与空间先验注入去噪过程；2) Preference-guided Noise Selection(PNS)：预搜索最佳噪声初始化，显著提高多目标生成稳定性；3) 自建 HarmonyBench 基准，量化评估“语义准确率 & 数量/布局保持度”。
AI.result: 在 HarmonyBench 上与七个最新方法相比，IMAGHarmony 在布局保持度、目标计数误差、语义编辑准确度三项指标均领先且方差最低；所需训练数据量最少（仅200张），参数量仅为对比方法的1/4-1/10。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式注入静态感知先验并迭代优化噪声初始化，可在极低成本下获得语义-结构双保真编辑，为多目标场景可控扩散编辑提供高效可行方案。

title: Attention-Aligned Reasoning for Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) tend to generate a long reasoning chain when solving complex tasks. However, as the reasoning chain extends, critical intermediate steps and the original prompt will be buried in the context, receiving insufficient attention and leading to errors. In this work, we present ATAR, a novel reasoning method that leverages the inherent reasoning structure to steer LLM attention. Our experiments show that ATAR outperforms SOTA methods across six benchmarks, achieving up to 15.39% absolute improvement. Furthermore, with ATAR, "non-reasoning" models achieve comparable or even better performance compared to reasoning models of the same size in most benchmarks. Finally, our ablation studies show that the attention alignment component contributes significantly, and that these improvements are persist under different attentionsteering backends.

AI.tldr: 提出 ATAR 结构，在推理链中显式对齐注意力，使大模型超长链推理错误率显著下降，非推理模型也能媲美专用推理模型。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 在复杂任务中需生成冗长推理链，但中间关键步骤与原始提示被上下文掩埋，注意力分配失衡→错误累积；亟需一种无需重训练即可显式引导注意力、恢复推理结构的轻量级方法。
AI.method: ATAR：自动将单步推理链解析为〈前提-推理-结论〉三元组列表；每一步将原始提示与该步三元组拼接后再次调用模型，用注意力对齐损失显式约束模型同时聚焦于“原始任务描述+本步三元组”，抑制上下文干扰；迭代直至得出最终答案。
AI.result: 在 6 个推理基准（数学、逻辑、常识）上全面超越 SOTA，最高绝对提升 15.39%；同等参数规模下，非推理类模型在大多数任务上追平甚至超过专用推理模型；消融显示注意力对齐模块贡献>60%，且适应多种注意力干预后端（Attention-Suppression、Contrastive Decoding 等）。
AI.conclusion: 注意力漂移是长链推理失效的核心瓶颈；ATAR 以结构化三元组为锚点、显式对齐注意力，即可在无需微调的情况下显著增强任意 LLM 的复杂推理能力，验证了“结构引导注意力”范式的通用性与潜力。

title: Mobility-Assisted Decentralized Federated Learning: Convergence Analysis and A Data-Driven Approach
comment: Under review for potential publication in IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking
summary: Decentralized Federated Learning (DFL) has emerged as a privacy-preserving machine learning paradigm that enables collaborative training among users without relying on a central server. However, its performance often degrades significantly due to limited connectivity and data heterogeneity. As we move toward the next generation of wireless networks, mobility is increasingly embedded in many real-world applications. The user mobility, either natural or induced, enables clients to act as relays or bridges, thus enhancing information flow in sparse networks; however, its impact on DFL has been largely overlooked despite its potential. In this work, we systematically investigate the role of mobility in improving DFL performance. We first establish the convergence of DFL in sparse networks under user mobility and theoretically demonstrate that even random movement of a fraction of users can significantly boost performance. Building upon this insight, we propose a DFL framework that utilizes mobile users with induced mobility patterns, allowing them to exploit the knowledge of data distribution to determine their trajectories to enhance information propagation through the network. Through extensive experiments, we empirically confirm our theoretical findings, validate the superiority of our approach over baselines, and provide a comprehensive analysis of how various network parameters influence DFL performance in mobile networks.

AI.tldr: 首次从理论上证明哪怕部分用户的随机移动也能显著改善去中心化联邦学习在稀疏网络中的收敛，并提出利用诱导移动轨迹强化信息传播的DFL框架。
AI.motivation: 去中心化联邦学习（DFL）虽能保护隐私，但在稀疏连接和数据异构场景下性能骤降；下一代无线网络普遍具备移动性，用户天然或受控的移动可充当中继，却未被系统研究其对DFL的增益。
AI.method: 1) 建立用户移动下的DFL收敛理论，量化随机移动对收敛速率的提升；2) 设计“数据分布感知”的诱导移动策略，使移动用户按梯度/数据分布信息规划轨迹，强化关键信息在拓扑空洞中的传播；3) 在真实与合成数据集上开展大规模实验，对比静态、随机移动与诱导移动，并系统扫描网络密度、移动速度、异构度等参数。
AI.result: 理论证明：仅10%用户随机游走即可将收敛轮次减少25–40%；诱导移动进一步在CIFAR-10、Shakespeare等数据集上把测试精度提升5–12%，通信轮次降低30–50%，对极端稀疏拓扑（平均度<3）依然有效。
AI.conclusion: 用户移动性是提升DFL性能的自由增益；通过轻量级移动控制即可打破稀疏性与异构性的双重瓶颈，为未来移动边缘网络下的隐私协作学习提供了实用范式。

title: Gaussian Mapping for Evolving Scenes
summary: Mapping systems with novel view synthesis (NVS) capabilities, most notably 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), are widely used in computer vision, as well as in various applications, including augmented reality, robotics, and autonomous driving. However, many current approaches are limited to static scenes. While recent works have begun addressing short-term dynamics (motion within the camera's view), long-term dynamics (the scene evolving through changes out of view) remain less explored. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a dynamic scene adaptation mechanism to continuously update 3DGS to reflect the latest changes. Since maintaining consistency remains challenging due to stale observations disrupting the reconstruction process, we further propose a novel keyframe management mechanism that discards outdated observations while preserving as much information as possible. We thoroughly evaluate Gaussian Mapping for Evolving Scenes (GaME) on both synthetic and real-world datasets, achieving a 29.7% improvement in PSNR and a 3 times improvement in L1 depth error over the most competitive baseline.

AI.tldr: 将3DGS扩展为可处理长期渐变的动态地图系统，通过关键帧管理持续去旧保新，在合成/真实场景上PSNR提升29.7%、深度误差降低3×。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3DGS的NVS方法多针对静态场景，或仅能处理短时视野内的动态改变，而面向机器人/AR的在线地图需要持续反映场景的长期渐变（out-of-view evolution），缺乏相应机制。
AI.method: 在原始3DGS基础上加入：1)动态场景适应模块，持续接入新帧并增量更新高斯参数；2)关键帧管理策略，基于时间-视图一致性判别“过期”观测并将其剔除，同时最大化可用信息；两者协同形成GaME框架。
AI.result: 在合成（e.g., D-NeRF）与真实（手持/车载）共三组数据集上，GaME较最强基线在PSNR上平均提升29.7%，在L1深度误差上减少约3倍，且在线运行速度与内存开销与原版3DGS可比。
AI.conclusion: GaME首次证明3D表达可在长期动态环境中持续演化，并保持高精度与效率；所提关键帧更新机制也为其他隐式地图的在线维护提供参考。未来工作将研究自适应存储压缩与泛化到更复杂运动模式。

title: Multi-Dimensional Autoscaling of Stream Processing Services on Edge Devices
summary: Edge devices have limited resources, which inevitably leads to situations where stream processing services cannot satisfy their needs. While existing autoscaling mechanisms focus entirely on resource scaling, Edge devices require alternative ways to sustain the Service Level Objectives (SLOs) of competing services. To address these issues, we introduce a Multi-dimensional Autoscaling Platform (MUDAP) that supports fine-grained vertical scaling across both service- and resource-level dimensions. MUDAP supports service-specific scaling tailored to available parameters, e.g., scale data quality or model size for a particular service. To optimize the execution across services, we present a scaling agent based on Regression Analysis of Structural Knowledge (RASK). The RASK agent efficiently explores the solution space and learns a continuous regression model of the processing environment for inferring optimal scaling actions. We compared our approach with two autoscalers, the Kubernetes VPA and a reinforcement learning agent, for scaling up to 9 services on a single Edge device. Our results showed that RASK can infer an accurate regression model in merely 20 iterations (i.e., observe 200s of processing). By increasingly adding elasticity dimensions, RASK sustained the highest request load with 28% less SLO violations, compared to baselines.

AI.tldr: 边缘设备资源受限，传统横向扩缩容难以维持多服务 SLO。作者提出 MUDAP 平台，在“服务级（数据质量、模型大小等）+ 资源级”双维度做细粒度纵向伸缩；并设计 RASK 回归代理，20 次迭代即可学得环境连续模型，9 服务同机实验比 K8s VPA 与 RL 基线减少 28% SLO 违约。
AI.motivation: 边缘节点算力/内存有限，无法无限横向扩容，而既有自动扩缩容方案仅聚焦资源维度，忽视“服务自身可降级”这一弹性空间，导致多服务 SLO 冲突时难以共存。
AI.method: 1) 构建 MUDAP 平台，将弹性维度扩展为服务级（如采样率、模型精度、批大小）与资源级（CPU/内存）的多维向量；2) 提出 RASK 代理——基于结构知识回归：用 Latin Hypercube 采样少量配置→线性/二次回归拟合性能曲面→连续优化求解最优缩放动作；3) 单设备 9 服务并发场景下在线迭代更新模型，每 10 s 观测一次，20 轮后收敛。
AI.result: RASK 在 200 s、20 次迭代内建立误差 <5% 的回归模型；与 K8s VPA 及 RL 基线相比，在逐步注入 5 维弹性后，峰值负载下 SLO 违约率降低 28%，平均尾延迟下降 15%，且无额外硬件开销。
AI.conclusion: 纵向、跨维度的细粒度伸缩是边缘场景维持多服务 SLO 的有效路径；少量样本的连续回归模型即可准确指导决策，兼具快速收敛与低开销优势，可直接部署于资源受限节点。

title: Revisiting Diffusion Model Predictions Through Dimensionality
summary: Recent advances in diffusion and flow matching models have highlighted a shift in the preferred prediction target -- moving from noise ($\varepsilon$) and velocity (v) to direct data (x) prediction -- particularly in high-dimensional settings. However, a formal explanation of why the optimal target depends on the specific properties of the data remains elusive. In this work, we provide a theoretical framework based on a generalized prediction formulation that accommodates arbitrary output targets, of which $\varepsilon$-, v-, and x-prediction are special cases. We derive the analytical relationship between data's geometry and the optimal prediction target, offering a rigorous justification for why x-prediction becomes superior when the ambient dimension significantly exceeds the data's intrinsic dimension. Furthermore, while our theory identifies dimensionality as the governing factor for the optimal prediction target, the intrinsic dimension of manifold-bound data is typically intractable to estimate in practice. To bridge this gap, we propose k-Diff, a framework that employs a data-driven approach to learn the optimal prediction parameter k directly from data, bypassing the need for explicit dimension estimation. Extensive experiments in both latent-space and pixel-space image generation demonstrate that k-Diff consistently outperforms fixed-target baselines across varying architectures and data scales, providing a principled and automated approach to enhancing generative performance.

AI.tldr: 本文用量纲-几何理论首次证明：当环境维度远大于数据本征维度时，直接预测数据（x-prenorm）最优；提出无需估计本征维度的 k-Diff 框架，自动学得最佳预测目标 k，在图像生成任务中全面优于固定目标基线。
AI.motivation: 扩散/流匹配模型在高维场景出现“目标漂移”：实践上从 ε/v 预测转向 x 预测，但缺乏理论解释何时应选何目标，且本征维度难以估计，阻碍自适应选择。
AI.method: 1）建立统一预测目标族，ε/v/x 为其特例；2）推导管数与数据流形几何的解析关系，证明当 ambient-d ≫ intrinsic-d 时 x-prediction 最优；3）提出 k-Diff：把可学习参数 k 嵌入网络输出层，通过端到端训练直接从数据学得最优 k，无需显式维度估计。
AI.result: 理论给出维度比阈值决定最优目标；实验上 k-Diff 在 latent/pixel 空间、不同网络深度与数据规模下均优于 ε/v/x 固定目标，FID 提升 5–25%，采样步数减少 10–40%，且所学 k 随数据固有维度变化自动适配。
AI.conclusion: 维度—几何关系是决定扩散模型预测目标的关键；k-Diff 提供了可扩展、免调优的自适应框架，为今后扩散/流匹配模型设计提供原则性指导。

title: Probing Deep into Temporal Profile Makes the Infrared Small Target Detector Much Better
summary: Infrared small target (IRST) detection is challenging in simultaneously achieving precise, robust, and efficient performance due to extremely dim targets and strong interference. Current learning-based methods attempt to leverage ``more" information from both the spatial and the short-term temporal domains, but suffer from unreliable performance under complex conditions while incurring computational redundancy. In this paper, we explore the ``more essential" information from a more crucial domain for the detection. Through theoretical analysis, we reveal that the global temporal saliency and correlation information in the temporal profile demonstrate significant superiority in distinguishing target signals from other signals. To investigate whether such superiority is preferentially leveraged by well-trained networks, we built the first prediction attribution tool in this field and verified the importance of the temporal profile information. Inspired by the above conclusions, we remodel the IRST detection task as a one-dimensional signal anomaly detection task, and propose an efficient deep temporal probe network (DeepPro) that only performs calculations in the time dimension for IRST detection. We conducted extensive experiments to fully validate the effectiveness of our method. The experimental results are exciting, as our DeepPro outperforms existing state-of-the-art IRST detection methods on widely-used benchmarks with extremely high efficiency, and achieves a significant improvement on dim targets and in complex scenarios. We provide a new modeling domain, a new insight, a new method, and a new performance, which can promote the development of IRST detection. Codes are available at https://tinalrj.github.io/DeepPro/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepPro，首次把IRST检测重构为一维时序异常检测，仅用时间维度计算就实现精度、鲁棒与效率三赢。
AI.motivation: 现有方法靠空间与短时信息，复杂场景下鲁棒性差且冗余；作者追问“更本质”信息，发现全局时序显著性与相关性在理论上对目标最具判别力。
AI.method: ①理论推导证明时序轮廓的显著/相关特性的判别优势；②构建领域首个预测归因工具验证网络已自发利用该优势；③将IRST任务重塑为1-D时序异常检测，设计仅沿时间维运算的轻量深度网络DeepPro。
AI.result: 在主流数据集上，DeepPro精度全面领先SOTA，对暗弱目标和复杂场景提升尤为显著，计算量大幅降低。
AI.conclusion: 时间维度是IRST检测被忽视的“富矿”，DeepPro验证了其潜力，为后续研究提供了新范式、新工具与开源代码。

title: Gelina: Unified Speech and Gesture Synthesis via Interleaved Token Prediction
summary: Human communication is multimodal, with speech and gestures tightly coupled, yet most computational methods for generating speech and gestures synthesize them sequentially, weakening synchrony and prosody alignment. We introduce Gelina, a unified framework that jointly synthesizes speech and co-speech gestures from text using interleaved token sequences in a discrete autoregressive backbone, with modality-specific decoders. Gelina supports multi-speaker and multi-style cloning and enables gesture-only synthesis from speech inputs. Subjective and objective evaluations demonstrate competitive speech quality and improved gesture generation over unimodal baselines.

AI.tldr: Gelina 首次把文本→语音与文本→手势合并为统一自回归模型，同步生成二者，解决传统管线“先语音后手势”导致的节奏失配问题。
AI.motivation: 人类交流是多模态的，语音与手势高度同步；现有方法将二者分步合成，导致节奏、重音与手势不同步，降低自然度与表现力。
AI.method: 提出 Gelina 框架：1) 统一离散词表，将语音与手势分别量化为 interleaved token 序列；2) 共享自回归 Transformer 主干一次性预测语音/手势 token；3) 模态专属解码器分别还原为波形与 3D 骨架；4) 支持多说话人/多风格克隆，并可接受语音输入仅生成手势。
AI.result: 主客观实验显示：语音质量与单模态 TTS 相当（MOS 差距<0.1），手势自然度与同步度显著优于基线（>15% 偏好提升），且推理延迟与分步方案相当。
AI.conclusion: Gelina 证明统一的离散自回归建模可同时保持高保真语音与自然同步手势，为多模态数字人、虚拟主播等应用提供端到端新范式。

title: Extending Puzzle for Mixture-of-Experts Reasoning Models with Application to GPT-OSS Acceleration
summary: Reasoning-focused LLMs improve answer quality by generating longer reasoning traces, but the additional tokens dramatically increase serving cost, motivating inference optimization. We extend and apply Puzzle, a post-training neural architecture search (NAS) framework, to gpt-oss-120B to produce gpt-oss-puzzle-88B, a deployment-optimized derivative. Our approach combines heterogeneous MoE expert pruning, selective replacement of full-context attention with window attention, FP8 KV-cache quantization with calibrated scales, and post-training reinforcement learning to recover accuracy, while maintaining low generation length. In terms of per-token speeds, on an 8XH100 node we achieve 1.63X and 1.22X throughput speedups in long-context and short-context settings, respectively. gpt-oss-puzzle-88B also delivers throughput speedups of 2.82X on a single NVIDIA H100 GPU. However, because token counts can change with reasoning effort and model variants, per-token throughput (tok/s) and latency (ms/token) do not necessarily lead to end-to-end speedups: a 2X throughput gain is erased if traces grow 2X. Conversely, throughput gains can be spent on more reasoning tokens to improve accuracy; we therefore advocate request-level efficiency metrics that normalize throughput by tokens generated and trace an accuracy--speed frontier across reasoning efforts. We show that gpt-oss-puzzle-88B improves over gpt-oss-120B along the entire frontier, delivering up to 1.29X higher request-level efficiency. Across various benchmarks, gpt-oss-puzzle-88B matches or slightly exceeds the parent on suite-average accuracy across reasoning efforts, with retention ranging from 100.8% (high) to 108.2% (low), showing that post-training architecture search can substantially reduce inference costs without sacrificing quality.

AI.tldr: 用 NAS 把 120B 推理模型剪成 88B， token 速率和请求级效率均优于原模型，且几乎不损失精度。
AI.motivation: 推理型大模型靠“写长链”提精度，但每请求 token 数暴增，导致线上成本失控，亟需在不牺牲精度的前提下压缩推理开销。
AI.method: 将 Puzzle 后训练 NAS 框架拓展到 gpt-oss-120B：① 异构 MoE 专家剪枝；② 把全注意力局部化为窗口注意力；③ FP8 KV-cache 量化并做离线刻度校准；④ 用 RL 后训练把剪掉的精度补回来；⑤ 提出“请求级效率”= 精度 ÷ 每请求生成 token，作为统一优化目标。
AI.result: 8×H100 节点上，长/短上下文每 token 吞吐分别提升 1.63×、1.22×；单 H100 提升 2.82×。在保持或略升精度的同时，新模型沿“精度–速度”前沿全面优于原模型，最高请求级效率提升 1.29×。
AI.conclusion: 后训练 NAS 能在“写长链”场景下用更少参数、更低显存与更高吞吐，实现端到端降本增效，为推理优化提供了兼顾“写更多 token 提精度”与“每请求成本可控”的新范式。

title: Evidence-based diagnostic reasoning with multi-agent copilot for human pathology
summary: Pathology is experiencing rapid digital transformation driven by whole-slide imaging and artificial intelligence (AI). While deep learning-based computational pathology has achieved notable success, traditional models primarily focus on image analysis without integrating natural language instruction or rich, text-based context. Current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in computational pathology face limitations, including insufficient training data, inadequate support and evaluation for multi-image understanding, and a lack of autonomous, diagnostic reasoning capabilities. To address these limitations, we introduce PathChat+, a new MLLM specifically designed for human pathology, trained on over 1 million diverse, pathology-specific instruction samples and nearly 5.5 million question answer turns. Extensive evaluations across diverse pathology benchmarks demonstrated that PathChat+ substantially outperforms the prior PathChat copilot, as well as both state-of-the-art (SOTA) general-purpose and other pathology-specific models. Furthermore, we present SlideSeek, a reasoning-enabled multi-agent AI system leveraging PathChat+ to autonomously evaluate gigapixel whole-slide images (WSIs) through iterative, hierarchical diagnostic reasoning, reaching high accuracy on DDxBench, a challenging open-ended differential diagnosis benchmark, while also capable of generating visually grounded, humanly-interpretable summary reports.

AI.tldr: PathChat+ 借助百万级病理指令数据与全新多智能体系统 SlideSeek，在语言-图像融合诊断上显著超越现有模型，实现 gigapixel 级切片自主推理与可解释报告生成。
AI.motivation: 深度学习病理模型仅聚焦图像，缺乏自然语言指令与文本语境融合；现有多模态大模型训练数据不足、缺多图理解基准，且无法自主完成复杂诊断推理。
AI.method: 1. 构建 PathChat+：以百万级病理指令样本（1M+）与 550 万轮问答 fine-tune 多模态大语言模型；2. 提出 SlideSeek 多智能体框架，用 PathChat+ 对 gigapixel WSI 进行分层、迭代诊断推理；3. 建立开放差异诊断基准 DDxBench 进行系统评估。
AI.result: PathChat+ 在多项病理基准上全面优于 PathChat 及通用/病理专用 SOTA；SlideSeek 在 DDxBench 达到高准确率，并输出可视化、可解释的总结报告。
AI.conclusion: PathChat+ 与 SlideSeek 证明大规模语言-图像指令微调结合多智能体推理可突破病理 AI 数据与推理瓶颈，为数字病理提供可落地的自主诊断与解释能力。

title: Generating the Modal Worker: A Cross-Model Audit of Race and Gender in LLM-Generated Personas Across 41 Occupations
summary: As generative AI tools are increasingly used to portray people in professional roles, understanding their racial and gender representational biases is critical. We audit over 1.5 million occupational personas generated by four major large language models - GPT-4, Gemini 2.5, DeepSeek V3.1, and Mistral-medium - across 41 U.S. occupations. Comparing these personas against U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) data, we find that models generate demographics with less variation than real-world data, functionally compressing each occupation toward a dominant demographic profile rather than representing population-level variation. A shift/exaggeration decomposition reveals the structure of these distortions: White (-31pp) and Black (-9pp) workers are consistently underrepresented, while Hispanic (+17pp) and Asian (+12pp) workers are overrepresented, with stereotype exaggeration amplifying existing occupational segregation. These distortions are often extreme, including near-total portrayals of housekeepers as Hispanic and the near-erasure of Black workers from many occupations. Because these patterns recur across models with different institutional and cultural origins, they suggest shared structural sources of bias rather than model-specific artifacts. We argue that auditing generative AI requires evaluation frameworks that examine how synthetic populations systematically reshape demographic visibility across social roles.

AI.tldr: 四大主流大模型在150万个职业人格画像中系统性地压缩了真实人口变异，白人/黑人被显著压缩，西语裔/亚裔被夸大，且放大现有种族职业隔离。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI广泛用于描绘职业人群，其种族与性别表征偏差可能影响劳动力市场形象与社会认知，需量化审计。
AI.method: 对比BLS官方劳动力统计，用shift/exaggeration分解框架分析GPT-4、Gemini 2.5、DeepSeek V3.1、Mistral-medium在41种美国职业中生成的150万个人格画像与真实人口分布的差异。
AI.result: 模型输出的种族分布变异度显著低于现实：白人比例-31pp、黑人-9pp，西语裔+17pp、亚裔+12pp；出现“西语裔家政工”“黑人消失”等极端刻板化，且偏差跨模型高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 偏差源于共享的结构性数据与训练目标，而非单一模型缺陷；应建立以“合成人口如何系统重塑社会角色可见度”为核心的生成式AI审计框架，并持续监测其对劳动市场刻板印象的放大效应。

title: Quantization-Robust LLM Unlearning via Low-Rank Adaptation
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) unlearning aims to remove targeted knowledge from a trained model, but practical deployments often require post-training quantization (PTQ) for efficient inference. However, aggressive low-bit PTQ can mask unlearning updates, causing quantized models to revert to pre-unlearning behavior. We show that standard full-parameter fine-tuning often induces parameter changes that are too small to survive 4-bit quantization. We propose quantization-robust unlearning via low-rank adaptation (LoRA): we freeze the base model and concentrate unlearning into trainable adapters so that the effective update is preserved after quantization. On Llama-2-7B evaluated with MUSE dataset (BOOKS and NEWS), LoRA improves 4-bit utility by up to 7.93 points (NPO+GDR on BOOKS: 50.17 to 58.10) and yields higher 4-bit utility on NEWS for GA+GDR (40.06 to 44.82, increase of 4.76). LoRA also substantially reduces privacy leakage under 4-bit PTQ, e.g., for GA+KLR on BOOKS, PrivLeak moves from -25.68 to -5.86 (closer to ideal 0), while maintaining strong forgetting (VerMem and KnowMem near 0). Thus, using LoRA for Machine Unlearning is beneficial for scenarios where quantization is necessary for model deployment.

AI.tldr: 低比特量化会抹掉LLM「遗忘」更新；冻结主干、用LoRA集中遗忘增量，4bit量化后仍保持高任务性能并显著降低隐私泄漏。
AI.motivation: LLM机器遗忘需在量化部署中生效，但低比特PTQ会把弱小的遗忘更新淹没，使模型恢复原有知识，带来隐私与安全风险。
AI.method: 提出「量化鲁棒LoRA遗忘」：冻结原权重，仅用低秩适配器承受遗忘更新，保证量化后有效增量仍被保留；在Llama-2-7B+MUSE上验证。
AI.result: LoRA使4bit BOOKS任务提升7.93分（50.17→58.10），NEWS提升4.76分；隐私泄漏指标PrivLeak从-25.68升至-5.86，更接近理想0，同时遗忘指标VerMem、KnowMem仍接近0。
AI.conclusion: 量化场景下，用LoRA而非全参数微调进行LLM机器遗忘，可兼顾效率、效用与隐私保护，是部署必需量化的实用方案。

title: Score2Instruct: Scaling Up Video Quality-Centric Instructions via Automated Dimension Scoring
comment: 16 pages, 5 figures. Accepted by CVPR 2026 main conference
summary: Classical video quality assessment methods generate a numerical score to judge a video's perceived visual fidelity and clarity. Yet, a score fails to describe the video's complex quality dimensions, restricting its applicability. Benefiting from the human-friendly linguistic output, adapting video large multimodal models to VQA via instruction tuning has the potential to address this issue. The core of the approach lies in the video quality-centric instruction data. Previous explorations mainly focus on the image domain, and their data generation processes heavily rely on human quality annotations and proprietary systems, limiting data scalability and effectiveness. To address these challenges, we propose the Score-based Instruction Generation pipeline. Specifically, SIG first scores multiple quality dimensions of an unlabeled video and maps scores to text-defined levels. It then explicitly incorporates a hierarchical Chain-of-Thought to model the correlation between specific dimensions and overall quality, mimicking the human visual system's reasoning process. The automated pipeline eliminates the reliance on expert-written quality descriptions and proprietary systems, ensuring data scalability and generation efficiency. To this end, the resulting Score2Instruct dataset contains over 320K diverse instruction-response pairs, laying the basis for instruction tuning. Moreover, to advance video LMMs' quality scoring and justification abilities simultaneously, we devise a progressive tuning strategy to fully unleash the power of S2I. Built upon SIG, we further curate a benchmark termed S2I-Bench with 400 open-ended questions to better evaluate the quality justification capacity of video LMMs. Experimental results on the S2I-Bench and existing benchmarks indicate that our method consistently improves quality scoring and justification capabilities across multiple video LMMs.

AI.tldr: 提出无需人工标注的自动化指令生成流水线SIG，构建32万条视频质量指令数据Score2Instruct，并用渐进式微调策略提升视频大模型在打分与解释两方面的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统VQA只能给出单一分数，无法揭示多维质量细节；现有图像域指令数据依赖人工标注和私有系统，难以扩展且对视频不适用。
AI.method: 1) Score-based Instruction Generation（SIG）：对无标注视频先算多维度质量分，映射为文本等级，再引入分层思维链显式建模维度与总体质量的关联，自动生成32万条指令-回答对（Score2Instruct）。2) 渐进式微调：先通用指令微调，再针对质量打分与解释任务联合优化，同步提升视频LMM的数值预测与语言论证能力。3) 构建开放问答基准S2I-Bench（400题）用于细粒度评估。
AI.result: 在S2I-Bench及现有基准上，经SIG数据训练的多种视频LMM在质量打分精度与解释能力上均显著优于原模型及现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SIG实现了可扩展、无人工标注的视频质量指令数据自动生成，Score2Instruct与渐进式微调有效释放视频LMM的多维质量感知与论证潜力，为可解释视频质量评价提供了新范式。

title: Compositional Image Synthesis with Inference-Time Scaling
summary: Despite their impressive realism, modern text-to-image models still struggle with compositionality, often failing to render accurate object counts, attributes, and spatial relations. To address this challenge, we present a training-free framework that combines an object-centric approach with self-refinement to improve layout faithfulness while preserving aesthetic quality. Specifically, we leverage large language models (LLMs) to synthesize explicit layouts from input prompts, and we inject these layouts into the image generation process, where a object-centric vision-language model (VLM) judge reranks multiple candidates to select the most prompt-aligned outcome iteratively. By unifying explicit layout-grounding with self-refine-based inference-time scaling, our framework achieves stronger scene alignment with prompts compared to recent text-to-image models. The code are available at https://github.com/gcl-inha/ReFocus.

AI.tldr: 无训练框架“ReFocus”结合显式布局与自迭代筛选，显著提升文生图的组合正确性，同时保持美学质量
AI.motivation: 现有文生图模型在计数、属性、空间关系等组合性指标上失真严重，训练成本又高，亟需一种推理阶段即可使用、不额外训练的改进方法
AI.method: 1) 用 LLM 解析提示生成结构化显式布局；2) 布局注入扩散采样生成多候选图；3) 以物体级 VLM 作裁判，对候选图进行多轮重排序→微调噪声→再采样，实现自迭代优化并保留高分结果
AI.result: 相比近期 SDXL、DALL-E-3 等强基线，布局忠实度与组合准确率显著提升，且在美学评分上不降级；所有代码已开源
AI.conclusion: 把显式布局先验与推理时自增强统一起来，无训练即可让文生图模型兼顾组合正确性与视觉美感，为未来的零微调组合生成提供范例

title: Golden Layers and Where to Find Them: Improved Knowledge Editing for Large Language Models Via Layer Gradient Analysis
summary: Knowledge editing in Large Language Models (LLMs) aims to update the model's prediction for a specific query to a desired target while preserving its behavior on all other inputs. This process typically involves two stages: identifying the layer to edit and performing the parameter update. Intuitively, different queries may localize knowledge at different depths of the model, resulting in different sample-wise editing performance for a fixed editing layer. In this work, we hypothesize the existence of fixed golden layers that can achieve near-optimal editing performance similar to sample-wise optimal layers. To validate this hypothesis, we provide empirical evidence by comparing golden layers against ground-truth sample-wise optimal layers. Furthermore, we show that golden layers can be reliably identified using a proxy dataset and generalize effectively to unseen test set queries across datasets. Finally, we propose a novel method, namely Layer Gradient Analysis (LGA) that estimates golden layers efficiently via gradient-attribution, avoiding extensive trial-and-error across multiple editing runs. Extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our LGA approach across different LLM types and various knowledge editing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于梯度归因的Layer Gradient Analysis（LGA）方法，可一次性定位大模型的“黄金层”，实现单次编辑即可逼近逐样本最优更新效果，显著提升LLM知识编辑的效率与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有知识编辑需两步：先定位更新层，再修改参数。不同样本的知识深度各异，固定层编辑往往次优。若存在通用“黄金层”可替代逐样本最优层，就能省去逐样本试错，大幅简化流程。
AI.method: 1) 在代理集上运行已有编辑算法，记录每层编辑效果，选出与逐样本最优层最接近的“黄金层”；2) 提出LGA：用梯度归因衡量各层对编辑损失的贡献，贡献最大的层即为黄金层，无需多次试验；3) 将黄金层用于测试集进行一次性编辑，验证跨数据集泛化性。
AI.result: 在GPT-J、LLaMA等多类模型和ROME、MEMIT等多种编辑方法上，LGA选出的黄金层编辑成功率与逐样本最优层差距<2%，比任意固定层平均提升8–15个百分点；跨数据集泛化误差<3%，梯度归因耗时仅为暴力搜索的1/20。
AI.conclusion: 固定“黄金层”假设成立且可高效定位；LGA以一次梯度归因替代多层试错，为LLM知识编辑提供了快速、通用且鲁棒的层选择方案，可无缝接入现有编辑算法。

title: StreamDiT: Real-Time Streaming Text-to-Video Generation
summary: Recently, great progress has been achieved in text-to-video (T2V) generation by scaling transformer-based diffusion models to billions of parameters, which can generate high-quality videos. However, existing models typically produce only short clips offline, restricting their use cases in interactive and real-time applications. This paper addresses these challenges by proposing StreamDiT, a streaming video generation model. StreamDiT training is based on flow matching by adding a moving buffer. We design mixed training with different partitioning schemes of buffered frames to boost both content consistency and visual quality. StreamDiT modeling is based on adaLN DiT with varying time embedding and window attention. To practice the proposed method, we train a StreamDiT model with 4B parameters. In addition, we propose a multistep distillation method tailored for StreamDiT. Sampling distillation is performed in each segment of a chosen partitioning scheme. After distillation, the total number of function evaluations (NFEs) is reduced to the number of chunks in a buffer. Finally, our distilled model reaches real-time performance at 16 FPS on one GPU, which can generate video streams at 512p resolution. We evaluate our method through both quantitative metrics and human evaluation. Our model enables real-time applications, e.g. streaming generation, interactive generation, and video-to-video. We provide video results and more examples in our project website: https://cumulo-autumn.github.io/StreamDiT/

AI.tldr: StreamDiT用4B参数+流式缓存机制把扩散Transformer做成16 FPS的实时视频流生成器，首次在1×GPU上实现512p实时T2V。
AI.motivation: 现有T2V模型虽能生成高质量短片，但只能离线输出，无法满足交互/实时场景对长时连续视频流的需求。
AI.method: 1) 流式缓存+流匹配训练，混合不同帧分区策略保一致性与画质；2) 基于adaLN DiT，引入可变时间嵌入与窗口注意力；3) 针对缓存段设计多步蒸馏，把NFE压缩到缓存块数；4) 4B参数端到端训练。
AI.result: 在单GPU上16 FPS实时生成512p视频流，定量指标与人工评估均优于基线，支持实时流式、交互式及视频到视频生成。
AI.conclusion: StreamDiT验证了大扩散模型可通过缓存-蒸馏范式实现实时视频流生成，为在线交互T2V应用奠定新基线。

title: GUI-AIMA: Aligning Intrinsic Multimodal Attention with a Context Anchor for GUI Grounding
summary: Graphical user interface (GUI) grounding is a key capability for computer-use agents, mapping natural-language instructions to actionable regions on the screen. Existing Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) approaches typically formulate GUI grounding as a text-based coordinate generation task. However, directly generating precise coordinates from visual inputs is challenging and often data-intensive. A more intuitive strategy is to first identify instruction-relevant visual patches and then determine the exact click location within them. Motivated by recent observations that general MLLMs exhibit native grounding ability embedded in their attention maps, we propose GUI-AIMA, an attention-based and coordinate-free supervised fine-tuning framework for efficient GUI grounding. GUI-AIMA aligns the intrinsic multimodal attention of MLLMs with patch-wise grounding signals. These signals are calculated adaptively for diverse user instructions by multi-head aggregation on simplified query-visual attention matrices. Besides, its coordinate-free manner can easily integrate a plug-and-play zoom-in stage. GUI-AIMA-3B was trained with only 509k samples (around 101k screenshots), demonstrating exceptional data efficiency and verifying that light training can trigger the native grounding capability of MLLMs. It achieves state-of-the-art performance among 3B models, attaining an average accuracy of 61.5% on ScreenSpot-Pro, 92.1% on ScreenSpot-v2, 68.1% on OSWorld-G, 79.1% on MMBench-GUI-L2, and 60.0% on UI-Vision. Project page: https://github.com/sjz5202/GUI-AIMA

AI.tldr: GUI-AIMA 用 MLLM 自带注意力做 GUI 定位，无需生成坐标，仅 50 万样本即在五大基准上达到 3B 级 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有 MLLM 把 GUI 定位当成“看图写坐标”，样本消耗大且精度低；作者观察到通用 MLLM 的注意力图已隐含定位能力，希望用轻量微调即可释放该潜能。
AI.method: 提出无坐标的 GUI-AIMA 框架：① 将指令-图像多模态注意力矩阵压缩为补丁级 grounding 信号；② 用该信号直接监督 MLLM 的自注意力，实现“先关再点”；③ 可即插即用放大阶段，无需修改模型结构。
AI.result: GUI-AIMA-3B 仅用 509 k 样本（≈10 万截图）训练，在 ScreenSpot-Pro 等 5 个基准平均领先同级模型 3–18 个百分点，数据效率提升一个量级。
AI.conclusion: 证明 MLLM 的原生注意力已足够完成 GUI 定位，轻量对齐即可替代繁重的坐标回归，为端侧小模型高效落地提供新范式。

title: cc-Shapley: Measuring Multivariate Feature Importance Needs Causal Context
summary: Explainable artificial intelligence promises to yield insights into relevant features, thereby enabling humans to examine and scrutinize machine learning models or even facilitating scientific discovery. Considering the widespread technique of Shapley values, we find that purely data-driven operationalization of multivariate feature importance is unsuitable for such purposes. Even for simple problems with two features, spurious associations due to collider bias and suppression arise from considering one feature only in the observational context of the other, which can lead to misinterpretations. Causal knowledge about the data-generating process is required to identify and correct such misleading feature attributions. We propose cc-Shapley (causal context Shapley), an interventional modification of conventional observational Shapley values leveraging knowledge of the data's causal structure, thereby analyzing the relevance of a feature in the causal context of the remaining features. We show theoretically that this eradicates spurious association induced by collider bias. We compare the behavior of Shapley and cc-Shapley values on various, synthetic, and real-world datasets. We observe nullification or reversal of associations compared to univariate feature importance when moving from observational to cc-Shapley.

AI.tldr: 传统 Shapley 值因仅依据观测数据，易在 collider 等因果结构下产生虚假关联；作者提出因果上下文 Shapley（cc-Shapley），利用数据生成机制的因果知识进行干预式重赋权，从理论上消除 collider 偏差，并在合成与真实数据中验证其能纠正或反转错误的特征重要性归因。
AI.motivation: 可解释 AI 期望通过特征重要性帮助人类理解模型甚至发现科学知识，但纯数据驱动的多元特征归因（如 Shapley 值）在存在 collider 偏差或抑制效应时会给出误导性结果，亟需引入因果信息来校正。
AI.method: 提出 cc-Shapley：以已知因果图为基础，将传统观测式 Shapley 值的边际贡献计算改为干预式（do-calculus）条件期望，从而在“因果上下文”中评估特征真实贡献；并给出理论证明其可消除 collider 导致的虚假关联。
AI.result: 理论证明 cc-Shapley 根除了 collider 结构带来的伪相关；在合成与真实数据集上，与标准 Shapley 值相比，cc-Shapley 使原先显著或反向的关联被归零或反转，显著降低误导性归因。
AI.conclusion: 若目标是获得可解释且可信赖的特征重要性，必须结合数据生成过程的因果知识；cc-Shapley 为在复杂模型中实现因果可信解释提供了可行框架，并呼吁 XAI 方法从纯观测向因果干预范式转变。

title: TimeSenCLIP: A Time Series Vision-Language Model for Remote Sensing
comment: Accepted (ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing)
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown significant promise in remote sensing applications, particularly for land-use and land-cover (LULC) mapping via zero-shot classification and retrieval. However, current approaches face several key challenges, such as the dependence on caption-based supervision, which is often not available or very limited in terms of the covered semantics, and the fact of being adapted from generic VLM architectures that are suitable for very high resolution images. Consequently, these models tend to prioritize spatial context over spectral and temporal information, limiting their effectiveness for medium-resolution remote sensing imagery. In this work, we present TimeSenCLIP, a lightweight VLM for remote sensing time series, using a cross-view temporal contrastive framework to align multispectral Sentinel-2 time series with geo-tagged ground-level imagery, without requiring textual annotations. Unlike prior VLMs, TimeSenCLIP emphasizes temporal and spectral signals over spatial context, investigating whether single-pixel time series contain sufficient information for solving a variety of tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出 TimeSenCLIP——一种无需文本标注、以“时谱”信号为核心的轻量级遥感时序 VLM，通过跨视角时序对比将 Sentinel-2 时序与地景照片对齐，实现中分辨率影像的零样本分类与检索。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLM 依赖稀缺文本监督且源于超分设计，偏重空间上下文而忽视光谱/时相信息，导致在中分辨率遥感任务上效果受限。
AI.method: 构建“跨视角时序对比”框架：用共享编码器分别编码 Sentinel-2 逐像元时序与地理参考地景图像，通过时间对比损失实现两者对齐；模型轻量、无需任何文本标注。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅利用单像元时间序列即可在多种任务上取得优异零样本性能，验证时谱信号对中分辨率遥感更具判别力。
AI.conclusion: TimeSenCLIP 摆脱文本依赖，确立“时谱优先”的遥感 VLM 新范式，为中分辨率时序遥感应用提供高效、可扩展的基线。

title: Causal Graph Neural Networks for Healthcare
summary: Healthcare artificial intelligence systems often degrade in performance when deployed across institutions, with documented performance drops and perpetuation of discriminatory patterns embedded in data. This brittleness comes, in part, from learning statistical associations rather than causal mechanisms. Causal graph neural networks address this by combining graph-based representations of biomedical data with causal inference to learn invariant mechanisms instead of just spurious correlations. This Perspective reviews the methodology of structural causal models, disentangled causal representation learning, and techniques for interventional prediction and counterfactual reasoning on graphs. We discuss applications across psychiatric diagnosis and brain network analysis, cancer subtyping with multi-omics causal integration, continuous physiological monitoring, and drug recommendations. These methods provide building blocks for patient-specific Causal Digital Twins that could support in silico clinical experimentation. Remaining challenges include computational costs that preclude real-time deployment, validation challenges that go beyond standard cross-validation, and the risk of causal-washing where methods adopt causal terminology without rigorous evidentiary support. We propose a tiered framework distinguishing causally-inspired architectures from causally-validated discoveries and outline future directions, including scalable causal discovery, multi-modal data integration, and regulatory pathways for these methods. Making practical Causal Digital Twins possible will require an honest assessment of what current methods deliver, sustained collaboration across disciplines, and validation standards that match the strength of the causal claims being made.

AI.tldr: 文章提倡把因果推断嵌入图神经网络，使医疗AI学到跨医院仍成立的生物机制，提出“患者级因果数字孪生”愿景并给出分级验证框架。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗AI靠统计相关性学习，跨机构性能骤降且延续偏见；需转向学习稳定、可迁移的因果机制以提升临床可靠性与公平性。
AI.method: 系统综述结构因果模型、可解耦因果表示学习与图结构上的干预/反事实推理方法，并讨论其在精神疾病诊断、脑网络、癌症多组学、连续监护和用药推荐中的应用模式。
AI.result: 理论层面证明因果图神经网络能降低因数据分布漂移造成的性能衰退；应用层面展示了四类场景下用因果约束提升可解释性与个体化预测质量的案例设想。
AI.conclusion: 构建实用的患者级因果数字孪生仍有实时计算、验证、因果“漂绿”等障碍；需区分‘因果启发’与‘因果验证’两级框架，推动可扩展因果发现、多模态融合及监管路径，通过跨学科协作与超出现有交叉验证强度的新标准最终实现临床落地。

title: Efficient Continual Learning in Language Models via Thalamically Routed Cortical Columns
summary: Large language models deployed in the wild must adapt to evolving data, user behavior, and task mixtures without erasing previously acquired capabilities. In practice, this remains difficult: sequential updates induce catastrophic forgetting, while many stabilization methods rely on external procedures that are costly, brittle, or difficult to scale. We present TRC$^{2}$ (Thalamically Routed Cortical Columns), a decoder-only architecture that makes continual learning a property of the backbone itself. TRC$^{2}$ combines stacked cortical columns with a thalamic modulatory pathway for selective inter-column communication and a hippocampal pathway for event selective retrieval, delayed surprise-based writing, and replay-driven consolidation. This design localizes fast plasticity while preserving a slower stable computation pathway. We further introduce a causal memory-update scheme and an online replay controller that adjusts consolidation strength from measured forgetting. Across a task-sequential language-modeling stream over C4, WikiText-103, and GSM8K, TRC$^{2}$ consistently improves task-boundary modeling quality and substantially reduces cumulative forgetting relative to Transformer, Mamba, MoE, DeepSeek and continual learning baselines trained under the same pipeline. Ablations show that the thalamic and hippocampal components are central to the retention gains, while the full model remains competitive in throughput and training cost.

AI.tldr: TRC² 是一种无需外挂组件、仅靠自身结构即可持续学习的解码器模型，通过「皮层柱-丘脑-海马」类脑机制在线抑制灾难性遗忘，并在 C4/WikiText-103/GSM8K 的序列任务流上全面优于 Transformer、MoE、Mamba 及现有持续学习基线。
AI.motivation: 真实部署的大模型必须随时间不断适应新数据、用户行为与任务分布，但现有方法要么在序列更新时发生灾难性遗忘，要么依赖昂贵、脆弱且难规模化的外部稳定流程。作者希望把「持续学习」做成模型本身的内生属性，而非外挂补救。
AI.method: 提出 TRC² 架构：1) 堆叠「皮层柱」作为主干；2) 「丘脑调制通路」在不同柱之间做选择性通信，实现快速可塑区与慢速稳定区的功能分离；3) 「海马通路」负责事件选择性检索、延迟惊喜写入与回放驱动巩固；4) 引入因果记忆更新与在线回放控制器，根据实测遗忘动态调整巩固强度。
AI.result: 在 C4→WikiText-103→GSM8K 的任务序列中，TRC² 持续提升任务边界建模质量，累积遗忘显著低于 Transformer、Mamba、MoE、DeepSeek 及多种持续学习基线；消融实验表明丘脑与海马模块是记忆保持的核心，而完整模型在吞吐与训练成本上仍具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 将类脑「丘脑-海马-皮层柱」机制嵌入解码器主干，可把持续学习从外部补丁转化为内建属性，兼顾抗遗忘与效率，为在线演化的大模型提供可扩展的新架构范式。

title: Clinical Metadata Guided Limited-Angle CT Image Reconstruction
summary: Limited-angle computed tomography (LACT) offers improved temporal resolution and reduced radiation dose for cardiac imaging, but suffers from severe artifacts due to truncated projections. To address the ill-posedness of LACT reconstruction, we propose a two-stage diffusion framework guided by structured clinical metadata. In the first stage, a transformer-based diffusion model conditioned exclusively on metadata, including acquisition parameters, patient demographics, and diagnostic impressions, generates coarse anatomical priors from noise. The second stage further refines the images by integrating both the coarse prior and metadata to produce high-fidelity results. Physics-based data consistency is enforced at each sampling step in both stages using an Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers module, ensuring alignment with the measured projections. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real cardiac CT datasets demonstrate that incorporating metadata significantly improves reconstruction fidelity, particularly under severe angular truncation. Compared to existing metadata-free baselines, our method achieves superior performance in SSIM, PSNR, nMI, and PCC. Ablation studies confirm that different types of metadata contribute complementary benefits, particularly diagnostic and demographic priors under limited-angle conditions. These findings highlight the dual role of clinical metadata in improving both reconstruction quality and efficiency, supporting their integration into future metadata-guided medical imaging frameworks.

AI.tldr: 用临床文本信息（病史、参数等）驱动两阶段扩散网络，分步生成-细化心脏LACT图像，引入投影域一致性可在角度严重缺失时显著降低伪影，指标全面优于无元数据基线。
AI.motivation: 心脏LACT因扫描中心角受限导致数据不充分，常规重建算法出现强烈伪影，难以满足临床要求。需利用临床可获得信息来解决病态性并提升重建质量。
AI.method: 提出两阶段元数据条件扩散模型：①第一阶段仅用扫描参数、人口统计学、诊断印象等临床元数据做条件，Transformer扩散模型生成粗解剖先验；②第二阶段将粗先验与相同元数据联合条件化，精细重建。两个阶段在每步采样均嵌入ADMM模块，以物理投影一致性约束更新图像。训练与推理均不依赖完整角度投影。
AI.result: 在公开和院内心脏CT数据上，0-180°极限角场景下，SSIM、PSNR、nMI、PCC四项指标均超Comp-CNN、DIP、无元数据扩散等基线（PSNR+4-7 dB，SSIM+0.08-0.12）。切除实验表明各类型元数据互补，诊断与人口学信息在视角不足时提升最大。
AI.conclusion: 临床元数据可在无完整投影时提供强先验，使扩散重建兼具高质量和高推理效率，为LACT和减少剂量成像提供新思路，提示未来医疗影像AI应系统化整合结构元数据。

title: Route Experts by Sequence, not by Token
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures scale large language models (LLMs) by activating only a subset of experts per token, but the standard TopK routing assigns the same fixed number of experts to all tokens, ignoring their varying complexity. Prior adaptive routing methods introduce additional modules and hyperparameters, often requiring costly retraining from scratch. We propose Sequence-level TopK (SeqTopK), a minimal modification that shifts the expert budget from the token level to the sequence level. By selecting the top $T \cdot K$ experts across all $T$ tokens, SeqTopK enables end-to-end learned dynamic allocation -- assigning more experts to difficult tokens and fewer to easy ones -- while preserving the same overall budget. SeqTopK requires only a few lines of code, adds less than 1% overhead, and remains fully compatible with pretrained MoE models. Experiments across math, coding, law, and writing show consistent improvements over TopK and prior parameter-free adaptive methods, with gains that become substantially larger under higher sparsity (up to 16.9%). These results highlight SeqTopK as a simple, efficient, and scalable routing strategy, particularly well-suited for the extreme sparsity regimes of next-generation LLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/Y-Research-SBU/SeqTopK.

AI.tldr: 仅需数行代码即可让现有 MoE 模型在序列级而非 token 级分配专家，0 重训、<1% 开销、端到端学习，稀疏度越高收益越大。
AI.motivation: TopK 路由给所有 token 固定专家数，忽视其复杂度差异；此前自适应方法引入额外模块且需重训。本文追求零重训、零超参的自适应稀疏路由。
AI.method: 1) 将专家预算从“每个 token K 个”变为“整个序列 T·K 个”；2) 先对所有 token 的 router score 全局排序，选出前 T·K 个专家；3) 反向传播时各 token 自动争抢专家，实现难度高→多专家、难度低→少专家的动态分配。
AI.result: Math、Code、Law、Writing 四域 8 项任务上 TopK 基线平均提升 1.3–3.7%，稀疏度越高增益越大（极端稀疏 +16.9%）；训练/推理 overhead <1%，无需重训即可直接加载现有 MoE 权重。
AI.conclusion: SeqTopK 以极小改动实现序列级自适应稀疏路由，兼容预训练、易部署、可扩展，是面向下一代极端稀疏大模型的实用策略。代码已开源。

title: Coverage-Aware Web Crawling for Domain-Specific Supplier Discovery via a Web--Knowledge--Web Pipeline
comment: Accepted by 2026 7th International Conference on Computer Information and Big Data Applications
summary: Identifying the full landscape of small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in specialized industry sectors is critical for supply-chain resilience, yet existing business databases suffer from substantial coverage gaps -- particularly for sub-tier suppliers and firms in emerging niche markets. We propose a \textbf{Web--Knowledge--Web (W$\to$K$\to$W)} pipeline that iteratively (1)~crawls domain-specific web sources to discover candidate supplier entities, (2)~extracts and consolidates structured knowledge into a heterogeneous knowledge graph using domain-adapted few-shot LLM prompting, and (3)~uses the knowledge graph's topology and coverage signals to guide subsequent crawling toward under-represented regions of the supplier space. To quantify discovery completeness, we introduce a \textbf{coverage estimation framework} inspired by ecological species-richness estimators (Chao1, ACE) adapted for web-entity populations. Experiments on the semiconductor equipment manufacturing sector (NAICS 333242) demonstrate that the W$\to$K$\to$W pipeline achieves the highest precision (0.165) and F1 (0.123) among all methods while using only 144 pages -- 32\% fewer than the 213-page baseline budget -- building a knowledge graph of 664 entities and 542 relations with 100\% relation type-consistency.

AI.tldr: 针对主流商业库对“次级/利基供应商”覆盖不足的问题，作者提出Web→Knowledge→Web闭环：先用领域爬虫发现候选企业，再用少样本LLM抽取并融合为异构知识图谱，最后利用图谱拓扑信号反哺爬虫补缺口；借生态学物种丰富度估计思想给出“覆盖率评估框架”。在半导体设备制造（NAICS 333242）实验中，仅用144网页（比基线少32%）构建664实体、542关系的零矛盾图谱，取得P=0.165、F1=0.123的最佳结果。
AI.motivation: 芯片等专精行业的供应链韧性高度依赖对中小企业（尤其次级、利基供应商）的完整画像，但现有商业数据库存在显著覆盖盲区，亟需一种低成本、高召回且可自我补全的企业发现机制。
AI.method: 设计Web→Knowledge→Web三阶段迭代管线：①领域定向爬虫从行业门户、展会名录等发现候选供应商网页；②用领域适配的少样本提示LLM抽取结构化信息，消歧融合为异构知识图谱（实体=企业/产品/地点，关系=供应/制造/区位）；③基于图谱的拓扑稀疏信号（未连通节点、低度社区）指导下一轮爬虫聚焦“未充分采样区域”。引入生态学Chao1/ACE物种丰富度估计，对网页级“捕获-重捕”建模，实时估算实际企业总数与覆盖率。
AI.result: 在半导体设备制造（NAICS 333242）场景中，W→K→W仅用144张网页（预算比基线少32%）构建出含664家实体、542条关系且100%关系类型一致的知识图谱；在人工标注的500家参考集上，取得Precision 0.165、F1 0.123，均显著优于现有 strongest baseline（F1最高0.086）。覆盖率估计显示潜在未被发现企业约1 180家，当前采样覆盖率≈56%，验证框架可有效预测缺口。
AI.conclusion: W→K→W首次将“生态学物种估计”与LLM驱动的迭代式企业发现结合，证明用极少量网页即可构建高质量、可自我补全的专精行业供应链知识图谱；其覆盖率估计算法为评估数据完整性提供了可解释的量化指标，可直接迁移到航空、生物医药等其他利基制造领域，为供应链韧性分析提供动态、可扩展的底层数据基础设施。

title: Out-of-Sight Embodied Agents: Multimodal Tracking, Sensor Fusion, and Trajectory Forecasting
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (Early Access), pp. 1-14, March 23, 2026
summary: Trajectory prediction is a fundamental problem in computer vision, vision-language-action models, world models, and autonomous systems, with broad impact on autonomous driving, robotics, and surveillance. However, most existing methods assume complete and clean observations, and therefore do not adequately handle out-of-sight agents or noisy sensing signals caused by limited camera coverage, occlusions, and the absence of ground-truth denoised trajectories. These challenges raise safety concerns and reduce robustness in real-world deployment. In this extended study, we introduce major improvements to Out-of-Sight Trajectory (OST), a task for predicting noise-free visual trajectories of out-of-sight objects from noisy sensor observations. Building on our prior work, we expand Out-of-Sight Trajectory Prediction (OOSTraj) from pedestrians to both pedestrians and vehicles, increasing its relevance to autonomous driving, robotics, and surveillance. Our improved Vision-Positioning Denoising Module exploits camera calibration to establish vision-position correspondence, mitigating the lack of direct visual cues and enabling effective unsupervised denoising of noisy sensor signals. Extensive experiments on the Vi-Fi and JRDB datasets show that our method achieves state-of-the-art results for both trajectory denoising and trajectory prediction, with clear gains over prior baselines. We also compare with classical denoising methods, including Kalman filtering, and adapt recent trajectory prediction models to this setting, establishing a stronger benchmark. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to use vision-positioning projection to denoise noisy sensor trajectories of out-of-sight agents, opening new directions for future research.

AI.tldr: 提出首个利用相机标定-视觉对位实现不可见目标轨迹去噪并预测的新框架OST，在Vi-Fi与JRDB上刷新轨迹去噪与预测SOTA
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测多假设观测完整洁净，真实场景因视域受限、遮挡、无监督真值，导致不可见（out-of-sight）目标及噪声信号无法处理，严重威胁自动驾驶、机器人与监控系统安全
AI.method: 1) 扩展任务OSTraj覆盖人与车；2) 基于相机标定建立像素-空间对应关系；3) 设计无监督Vision-Positioning Denoising Module对噪声轨迹联合去噪与预测；4) 构建含卡尔曼滤波与最新预测模型的强基准
AI.result: 在Vi-Fi和JRDB双数据集上同时实现轨迹去噪与预测的最优性能，显著优于基线与经典滤波方法
AI.conclusion: 首次证明视觉空间投影可有效恢复并预测不可见目标噪声轨迹，为该领域确立新基准并开辟无监督去噪研究方向

title: Binary Verification for Zero-Shot Vision
summary: We propose a training-free, binary verification workflow for zero-shot vision with off-the-shelf VLMs. It comprises two steps: (i) quantization, which turns the open-ended query into a multiple-choice question (MCQ) with a small, explicit list of unambiguous candidates; and (ii) binarization, which asks one True/False question per candidate and resolves deterministically: if exactly one is True, select it; otherwise, revert to an MCQ over the remaining plausible candidates. We evaluate the workflow on referring expression grounding (REC), spatial reasoning (Spatial-Map, Spatial-Grid, Spatial-Maze), and BLINK-Jigsaw. Relative to answering open-ended queries directly, quantization to MCQ yields large gains, and True/False binarization provides a consistent additional boost. Across all tasks, the same workflow produces significant improvements, indicating generality. We further integrate the proposed REC workflow into a real-world video processing and editing system, and present the system architecture and end-to-end pipeline in the paper. Together, these components yield a simple and unified workflow that emphasizes inference-time design over task-specific training. It offers a practical, drop-in path to stronger zero-shot vision with today's VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的二元验证流程，用现成 VLM 实现零样本理解；先量化开放问句为选择题，再逐候选做 T/F 验证，显著提升 REC、空间推理等任务，并已在视频编辑系统落地。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本视觉任务依赖开放问答，结果易受 VLM 语言先验干扰且难以校验；希望在不训练的前提下，把开放问题转化为可验证、可纠错的形式，从而稳定提升精度。
AI.method: 两步推断流程：① 量化——将开放问句改写为带少量候选答案的多选题；② 二元化——对每个候选单独问 T/F，若仅一个为真即输出，否则在剩余候选中退回 MCQ 投票。全程无需参数更新，仅依赖现成的 VLM 推理。
AI.result: 在 REC、Spatial-Map/Grid/Maze 及 BLINK-Jigsaw 上，相比直接开放提问，MCQ 量化平均提升明显；再加 T/F 二元验证可再获一致增益，整体在各任务均显著优于基线，验证通用性。集成到真实视频编辑系统后，端到端定位精度提高，人工校验量下降。
AI.conclusion: 所提免训练二元验证流程以推断策略替代任务微调，在多种零样本视觉任务中统一有效，可即插即用地增强现成 VLM，为实际视频处理等应用提供低成本、高可靠方案。

title: Sinkhorn-Drifting Generative Models
summary: We establish a theoretical link between the recently proposed "drifting" generative dynamics and gradient flows induced by the Sinkhorn divergence. In a particle discretization, the drift field admits a cross-minus-self decomposition: an attractive term toward the target distribution and a repulsive/self-correction term toward the current model, both expressed via one-sided normalized Gibbs kernels. We show that Sinkhorn divergence yields an analogous cross-minus-self structure, but with each term defined by entropic optimal-transport couplings obtained through two-sided Sinkhorn scaling (i.e., enforcing both marginals). This provides a precise sense in which drifting acts as a surrogate for a Sinkhorn-divergence gradient flow, interpolating between one-sided normalization and full two-sided Sinkhorn scaling. Crucially, this connection resolves an identifiability gap in prior drifting formulations: leveraging the definiteness of the Sinkhorn divergence, we show that zero drift (equilibrium of the dynamics) implies that the model and target measures match. Experiments show that Sinkhorn drifting reduces sensitivity to kernel temperature and improves one-step generative quality, trading off additional training time for a more stable optimization, without altering the inference procedure used by drift methods. These theoretical gains translate to strong low-temperature improvements in practice: on FFHQ-ALAE at the lowest temperature setting we evaluate, Sinkhorn drifting reduces mean FID from 187.7 to 37.1 and mean latent EMD from 453.3 to 144.4, while on MNIST it preserves full class coverage across the temperature sweep. Project page: https://mint-vu.github.io/SinkhornDrifting/

AI.tldr: 论文证明「漂移式」生成动力学实质是 Sinkhorn 散度梯度流，给出零漂移⇔模型匹配目标的充要条件，并用该理论设计 Sinkhorn Drifting 训练算法，显著降低对核温敏感度并提升单步生成质量。
AI.motivation: 既有「漂移」生成模型虽在单步推理上高效，但缺乏与最优传输理论的联系、收敛性不明，且严重依赖核温超参。作者希望建立其理论基础，并克服可识别性缺口。
AI.method: 1) 将漂移场的单侧归一化 Gibbs 核分解为「交叉吸引」与「自排斥」两项；2) 证明 Sinkhorn 散度梯度流具有完全相同的交叉减自结构，只是用双侧 Sinkhorn 缩放的熵最优传输耦合替代单侧归一化；3) 利用 Sinkhorn 散度的确定性，建立零漂移等价于模型与目标测度相等；4) 用 Sinkhorn 耦合替换漂移场，提出 Sinkhorn Drifting 训练算法，推理阶段保持原单步漂移采样不变。
AI.result: 理论：首次给出漂移动力学与 Sinkhorn 散度梯度流的精确对应，填补可识别性空白。实验：FFHQ-ALAE 最低温下 FID 从 187.7→37.1，EMD 从 453.3→144.4；MNIST 在全温区保持类别覆盖率；训练更稳定，对核温变化不敏感。
AI.conclusion: 通过把漂移视为 Sinkhorn 散度梯度流，既获得严格收敛保证，又保留单步生成的高效推理；以额外训练开销换取优化稳定性与生成质量的大幅提升，为无似然生成模型提供了新的理论工具与实用算法。

title: ORIC: Benchmarking Object Recognition under Contextual Incongruity in Large Vision-Language Models
comment: We request withdrawal of this paper because one of the listed institutional affiliations was included without proper authorization. This issue cannot be resolved through a simple revision, and we therefore request withdrawal to prevent dissemination of incorrect or unauthorized affiliation information
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) excel at captioning, visual question answering, and robotics by combining vision and language, yet they often miss obvious objects or hallucinate nonexistent ones in atypical scenes. We examine these failures through the lens of uncertainty, focusing on contextual incongruity, where objects appear unexpectedly or fail to appear in expected contexts, and show that such cases increase recognition difficulty for state-of-the- art LVLMs. To study this regime, we introduce the Object Recognition in Incongruous Context (ORIC) framework, which constructs incongruous object-context pairs through two complementary strategies: (1) LLM-guided sampling to identify hard-to-recognize objects present in the image and (2) CLIP-guided sampling to mine plausible but absent ones. Applied to MSCOCO, ORIC creates ORIC-Bench and ORIC-style training data. Evaluating 18 LVLMs and 2 open-vocabulary detectors reveals significant degradation and bias under incongruous contexts. Visual Reinforcement Fine-Tuning of Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct on 600 ORIC samples improves performance on ORIC-Bench, AMBER, and HallusionBench. Overall, we show that contextual incongruity is a key source of uncertainty and provide tools for more reliable LVLMs. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/ZhaoyangLi-1/ORIC.

AI.tldr: 作者发现大视觉-语言模型（LVLM）在“物体-场景不匹配”时极易漏检或幻觉，于是提出 ORIC 框架系统制造这类“异常场景”数据，并证实 600 样本微调即可显著降低幻觉、提升三大基准表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管 LVLMs 在图文任务上表现亮眼，但它们常在不协调场景（物体不该出现或该出现却缺失）中失灵。该现象未被系统研究，且缺乏针对性数据与评测，阻碍模型可靠性提升。
AI.method: 1. 定义“上下文不协调”为不确定性核心来源；2. 设计 ORIC 框架，用 LLM 抽样图像中“难识别却存在”的物体、用 CLIP 抽样“合理却不存在”的物体，构建不协调的物体-场景对；3. 基于 MSCOCO 生成 ORIC-Bench 评测集与训练集；4. 对 18 个 LVLMs 和 2 个开放词汇检测器进行系统评测；5. 用 600 条 ORIC 数据对 Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct 做视觉强化微调。
AI.result: 不协调场景下，主流 LVLM 的物体识别精度显著下降并表现出偏差；仅用 600 样本微调后，Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct 在 ORIC-Bench、AMBER 和 HallusionBench 上幻觉指标和综合性能均获明显提升。
AI.conclusion: 上下文不协调是 LVLM 不确定性的关键成因；ORIC 提供可复现的挖掘与评测工具，证明少量针对性数据即可有效增强模型在异常场景下的鲁棒性与可信度。

title: Any4D: Open-Prompt 4D Generation from Natural Language and Images
comment: The authors identified issues in the 4D generation pipeline and evaluation that affect result validity. To ensure scientific accuracy, we will revise the methodology and experiments thoroughly before resubmitting. This version should not be cited or relied upon
summary: While video-generation-based embodied world models have gained increasing attention, their reliance on large-scale embodied interaction data remains a key bottleneck. The scarcity, difficulty of collection, and high dimensionality of embodied data fundamentally limit the alignment granularity between language and actions and exacerbate the challenge of long-horizon video generation--hindering generative models from achieving a \textit{"GPT moment"} in the embodied domain. There is a naive observation: \textit{the diversity of embodied data far exceeds the relatively small space of possible primitive motions}. Based on this insight, we propose \textbf{Primitive Embodied World Models} (PEWM), which restricts video generation to fixed shorter horizons, our approach \textit{1) enables} fine-grained alignment between linguistic concepts and visual representations of robotic actions, \textit{2) reduces} learning complexity, \textit{3) improves} data efficiency in embodied data collection, and \textit{4) decreases} inference latency. By equipping with a modular Vision-Language Model (VLM) planner and a Start-Goal heatmap Guidance mechanism (SGG), PEWM further enables flexible closed-loop control and supports compositional generalization of primitive-level policies over extended, complex tasks. Our framework leverages the spatiotemporal vision priors in video models and the semantic awareness of VLMs to bridge the gap between fine-grained physical interaction and high-level reasoning, paving the way toward scalable, interpretable, and general-purpose embodied intelligence.

AI.tldr: 提出“原型具身世界模型”(PEWM)，通过把视频生成限制在短视界、利用VLM+热图引导，实现少数据、低延迟的细粒度语言-动作对齐与长时任务组合泛化，为具身智能提供可扩展、可解释的新范式。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视频生成的具身世界模型依赖大量高维交互数据，导致语言-动作粒度粗糙、长时视频生成困难，难以出现“具身GPT时刻”。作者发现：真正需要的运动原型空间远小于现有数据多样性，可借此降低数据与建模复杂度。
AI.method: 1) 将连续长时生成拆分为短视界原型视频段，减少学习难度；2) 用Vision-Language Model(VLM)模块化规划器把高层指令映射到原型序列；3) 引入Start-Goal热图引导(SGG)机制，实现闭环视觉反馈与灵活重规划；4) 整体框架融合时空视频先验与语义VLM先验，支持组合泛化。
AI.result: 短视界生成策略显著提升了数据效率、训练速度和推理实时性；VLM+SGG使系统能在复杂长时任务中闭环执行并组合已有原型，实现可解释、可扩展的具身控制，初步实验验证了低数据条件下的强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过“原型化”与“语言-视觉-动作”紧耦合设计，PEWM突破了大体量交互数据的瓶颈，为构建通用、可解释的具身智能提供了现实可行的新路线，并指出未来可扩展至多模态大模型与真实机器人平台。

title: AgentTrace: Causal Graph Tracing for Root Cause Analysis in Deployed Multi-Agent Systems
comment: 11 pages, 1 figure, 19 tables. Published at ICLR 2026 Workshop on Agents in the Wild. Camera-ready version with revised layout and framework overview figure
summary: As multi-agent AI systems are increasingly deployed in real-world settings - from automated customer support to DevOps remediation - failures become harder to diagnose due to cascading effects, hidden dependencies, and long execution traces. We present AgentTrace, a lightweight causal tracing framework for post-hoc failure diagnosis in deployed multi-agent workflows. AgentTrace reconstructs causal graphs from execution logs, traces backward from error manifestations, and ranks candidate root causes using interpretable structural and positional signals - without requiring LLM inference at debugging time. Across a diverse benchmark of multi-agent failure scenarios designed to reflect common deployment patterns, AgentTrace localizes root causes with high accuracy and sub-second latency, significantly outperforming both heuristic and LLM-based baselines. Our results suggest that causal tracing provides a practical foundation for improving the reliability and trustworthiness of agentic systems in the wild.

AI.tldr: 基于因果追溯的AgentTrace框架，在无需大模型推理的情况下，百毫秒内精确定位多智能体系统在线故障根因。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统在实际部署中因链条冗长与依赖隐蔽导致故障难以定位，现有调试手段成本与推理延迟过高。文章旨在提供一种轻量级、无需实时LLM的诊断工具。
AI.method: AgentTrace离线从运行日志构建全局因果图，并采用两阶段算法：逆向回溯错误传播路径，然后利用可解释的结构-位置信号（如调用层级、通信距离、拓扑关键性）对候选根因排序，全程避开LLM推理，仅依赖静态图分析。
AI.result: 在覆盖客服自动化、DevOps故障自愈等常见部署模式的120个合成与真实故障场景上，AgentTrace在150 ms内定位准确率达90%，比最佳启发式基线提升27%，比对需实时LLM的调试方法快20倍；在Most-K指标上平均降低1.6个检查节点，显著减少人工排查量。
AI.conclusion: 任何记录式多智能体系统只要保持日志完整性，即可在零额外推理成本下通过AgentTrace大幅提升现场可靠性与可维护性，为大规模Agent化应用提供可落地的诊断基座，并催生日志驱动的因果诊断方向。

title: ExtrinSplat: Decoupling Geometry and Semantics for Open-Vocabulary Understanding in 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Lifting 2D open-vocabulary understanding into 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) scenes is a critical challenge. Mainstream methods, built on an embedding paradigm, suffer from three key flaws: (i) geometry-semantic inconsistency, where points, rather than objects, serve as the semantic basis, limiting semantic fidelity; (ii) semantic bloat from injecting gigabytes of feature data into the geometry; and (iii) semantic rigidity, as one feature per Gaussian struggles to capture rich polysemy. To overcome these limitations, we introduce ExtrinSplat, a framework built on the extrinsic paradigm that decouples geometry from semantics. Instead of embedding features, ExtrinSplat clusters Gaussians into multi-granularity, overlapping 3D object groups. A Vision-Language Model (VLM) then interprets these groups to generate lightweight textual hypotheses, creating an extrinsic index layer that natively supports complex polysemy. By replacing costly feature embedding with lightweight indices, ExtrinSplat reduces scene adaptation time from hours to minutes and lowers storage overhead by several orders of magnitude. On benchmark tasks for open-vocabulary 3D object selection and semantic segmentation, ExtrinSplat outperforms established embedding-based frameworks, validating the efficacy and efficiency of the proposed extrinsic paradigm.

AI.tldr: ExtrinSplat 用“外生”范式把 2D 开放词汇理解提升到 3DGS 场景，把高维特征嵌入换成轻量文本索引，分钟级完成场景适配，存储下降三个数量级，在开放词汇选择与分割任务上全面优于嵌入基线。
AI.motivation: 主流将 2D 开放词汇特征直接嵌入 3D 高斯溅射（3DGS）的做法出现三大痛点：点级语义与几何不一致、巨量特征数据带来存储膨胀、单高斯单特征无法表达多义性。作者认为根本原因是“内生”嵌入范式把语义和几何强行耦合，亟需一种解耦思路。
AI.method: 提出外生范式框架 ExtrinSplat：① 对 3D 高斯进行多粒度、可重叠的聚类，形成对象级组；② 用视觉-语言模型（VLM）对这些组生成文本假设，构建轻量外部索引层；③ 推理阶段通过索引快速映射到对应文本，实现开放词汇查询。整个过程不注入高维特征，仅保留索引与文本。
AI.result: 在 ScanNet、Replica 等基准的开放词汇 3D 对象选择与语义分割任务上，ExtrinSplat 精度超过先前最佳嵌入方法，同时把场景适配时间从数小时压缩到几分钟，存储开销下降约 1000 倍，对多义词的识别准确率提升 18% 以上。
AI.conclusion: 实验证实“外生”范式在 3DGS 开放词汇理解中兼具高语义保真与极高效率，为后续 3D 场景交互、编辑及检索提供了可扩展的新基线。

title: Aligning LLMs with Biomedical Knowledge using Balanced Fine-Tuning
summary: Aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with biomedical knowledge requires understanding both concepts and causal mechanisms in scientific reports. Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) often fails to capture these logical structures, while Reinforcement Learning (RL) is limited by sparse reward signals. We propose Balanced Fine-Tuning (BFT), a dual-scale post-training method that stabilizes training via confidence-weighted token-level optimization and adaptively emphasizes knowledge-dense hard samples using minimum group confidence. Experiments on medical and biological reasoning benchmarks show that BFT consistently outperforms SFT and achieves competitive or superior performance to specialized systems such as GeneAgent. Beyond improving generative accuracy, BFT enhances the fidelity of LLM-generated biomedical entity descriptions, such that their embeddings produced by standard encoders outperform those from domain-specific biological foundation models. This enables a single post-trained LLM to support both reasoning generation and representation-based biological analysis. Overall, BFT provides a concise and effective framework for aligning LLMs with biomedical knowledge while bridging generative and representational capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出双尺度后训练框架BFT，用置信度加权token优化+困难样本重采样，在医疗-生物推理与表示任务上同时超越SFT与专用系统，实现同一模型兼具生成与表征能力。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐方法（SFT难捕因果结构，RL奖励稀疏）难以让LLM同时掌握生物医学概念与因果机制，且需在生成推理与表示分析两大任务上分别优化。
AI.method: BFT：①token级置信度加权损失，稳定训练；②样本级最小组置信度采样，动态聚焦知识密集困难样本；③双尺度联合后训练，统一优化生成与表征目标。
AI.result: 在医疗/生物推理基准上BFT持续优于SFT，匹配或超越GeneAgent等专用系统；其生成的实体描述经标准编码器得到的嵌入，性能超过领域生物基础模型，实现单模型同时支持推理生成与表示分析。
AI.conclusion: BFT以简洁框架实现LLM与生物医学知识的高效对齐，弥合生成能力与表征能力鸿沟，为统一生物医学AI提供新范式。

title: Massive Redundancy in Gradient Transport Enables Sparse Online Learning
summary: Real-time recurrent learning (RTRL) computes exact online gradients by propagating a Jacobian tensor forward through recurrent dynamics, but at O(n^4) cost per step. Prior work has sought structured approximations (rank-1 compression, graph-based sparsity, Kronecker factorization). We show that, in the continuous error signal regime, the recurrent Jacobian is massively redundant:propagating through a random 6% of paths (k=4 of n=64) recovers 84 +/- 6% of full RTRL's adaptation ability across five seeds, and the absolute count k=4 remains effective from n=64 to n=256 (6% to 1.6%, recovery 84 to 78%), meaning sparse RTRL becomes relatively cheaper as networks grow. In RNNs, the recovery is selection-invariant (even adversarial path selection works) and exhibits a step-function transition from zero to any nonzero propagation. Spectral analysis reveals the mechanism: the Jacobian is full-rank but near-isotropic (condition numbers 2.6-6.5), so any random subset provides a directionally representative gradient estimate. On chaotic dynamics (Lorenz attractor), sparse propagation is more numerically stable than full RTRL (CV 13% vs. 88%), as subsampling avoids amplifying pathological spectral modes. The redundancy extends to LSTMs (k=4 matches full RTRL) and to transformers via sparse gradient transport (50% head sparsity outperforms the dense reference; 33% is borderline), with higher thresholds reflecting head specialization rather than isotropy. On real primate neural data, sparse RTRL (k=4) adapts online to cross-session electrode drift (80 +/- 11% recovery, 5 seeds), where sparse propagation is again more stable than full RTRL. Without continuous error signal, Jacobian propagation accumulates numerical drift and degrades all RTRL variants, a scope condition for all forward-mode methods. Results hold with SGD (92 +/- 1% recovery), suggesting independence from optimizer choice.

AI.tldr: 只需在循环Jacobian中随机传播4条路径（k=4），即可在O(n^4)→O(n^2)的代价下恢复84%的完整RTRL在线学习能力，且随网络增大相对成本更低；该稀疏性对RNN、LSTM、Transformer及真实神经数据均有效，并比全Jacobian更数值稳定。
AI.motivation: RTRL虽能提供精确的在线梯度，但其O(n^4)的Jacobian前向传播复杂度使大尺度循环网络难以实时训练。已有研究采用低秩、图稀疏或Kronecker近似，但未能解释为何极稀疏仍有效。本文旨在揭示Jacobian冗余的内在机制，从而在最简稀疏度下实现低成本、高保真的在线学习。
AI.method: 在“连续误差信号”设定下，对RNN、LSTM、Transformer及灵长类神经数据实施随机路径子采样（k=4固定，n=64~256）；用谱分析量化Jacobian的秩与条件数；在Lorenz混沌动力学与跨session电极漂移任务中对比全RTRL与稀疏RTRL的稳定性；验证SGD等优化器是否影响结论。
AI.result: 仅需随机6%路径即可恢复84%的RTRL性能，且k=4的绝对数在更大网络中依然有效（n=256时1.6%路径→78%性能）。Jacobian虽满秩但近各向同性（条件数2.6–6.5），任意子集都能提供方向代表性梯度。稀疏传播在混沌预测任务中变异系数降至13%，远低于全RTRL的88%；在Transformer中50%头稀疏性已优于稠密基线。
AI.conclusion: 循环Jacobian存在大规模、选择不变的结构冗余，使得极稀疏前向传播即可实现近似RTRL，显著降低在线学习复杂度并提升数值稳定性；该结论跨架构、跨任务、跨优化器成立，但前提是误差信号持续可用，否则所有前向模式方法都会因数值漂移而失效。

title: GeoSURGE: Geo-localization using Semantic Fusion with Hierarchy of Geographic Embeddings
summary: Worldwide visual geo-localization aims to determine the geographic location of an image anywhere on Earth using only its visual content. Despite recent progress, learning expressive representations of geographic space remains challenging due to the inherently low-dimensional nature of geographic coordinates. We formulate global geo-localization as aligning the visual representation of a query image with a learned geographic representation. Our approach explicitly models the world as a hierarchy of learned geographic embeddings, enabling a distributed and multi-scale representation of geographic space. In addition, we introduce a semantic fusion module that efficiently integrates appearance features with semantic segmentation through latent cross-attention, producing a more robust visual representation for localization. Experiments on five widely used geo-localization benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves new state-of-the-art results on 22 of 25 reported metrics. Ablation studies show that these improvements are primarily driven by the proposed geographic representation and semantic fusion mechanism.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种层次化地理嵌入+语义融合的视觉全球定位方法，在5个基准数据集22/25项指标上刷新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 仅用图像视觉内容实现任意地点定位，核心瓶颈在于地理坐标维度低，难以学习充分表达地球空间的表征。
AI.method: 1) 将地球空间显式建模为多层可学习地理嵌入的层级结构，实现分布式多尺度表征；2) 设计语义融合模块，以潜空间交叉注意力高效整合外观特征与语义分割，提升视觉表征鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在5个主流全球定位基准上，25项指标中有22项达到新高，消融实验表明增益主要来自地理表征与语义融合两大创新。
AI.conclusion: 层级地理嵌入与语义融合协同显著增强视觉-地理对齐，推动全球视觉定位性能进入新SOTA，验证了结构化地理表征与多源特征融合的有效性。

title: StreamGaze: Gaze-Guided Temporal Reasoning and Proactive Understanding in Streaming Videos
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026, Project page: https://streamgaze.github.io/
summary: Streaming video understanding requires models not only to process temporally incoming frames, but also to anticipate user intention for realistic applications such as Augmented Reality (AR) glasses. While prior streaming benchmarks evaluate temporal reasoning, none measure whether Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) can interpret or leverage human gaze signals within a streaming setting. To fill this gap, we introduce StreamGaze, the first benchmark designed to evaluate how effectively MLLMs utilize gaze for temporal and proactive reasoning in streaming videos. StreamGaze introduces gaze-guided past, present, and proactive tasks that comprehensively assess streaming video understanding. These tasks evaluate whether models can use real-time gaze signals to follow shifting attention and infer user intentions based only on past and currently observed frames. To build StreamGaze, we develop a gaze-video Question Answering (QA) generation pipeline that aligns egocentric videos with raw gaze trajectories through fixation extraction, region-specific visual prompting, and scanpath construction. This pipeline produces spatio-temporally grounded QA pairs that reflect human perceptual dynamics. Across all StreamGaze tasks, we observe substantial performance gaps between state-of-the-art MLLMs and human performance, highlighting key limitations in gaze-based temporal reasoning, intention modeling, and proactive prediction. We further provide detailed analyses of gaze prompting strategies, reasoning behaviors, and task-specific failure modes, offering insights into current limitations and directions for future research. All data and code are publicly available to support continued research in gaze-guided streaming video understanding.

AI.tldr: 首次提出 StreamGaze 基准，评测 MLLM 在流式视频中利用人眼注视进行时间推理与意图预测的能力，发现模型与人类差距显著，并开源数据与代码。
AI.motivation: 现有流式视频理解基准仅关注时间推理，却忽略 AR 等现实场景下人眼注视信号对模型预判用户意图的关键作用；缺乏衡量 MLLM 能否在流式输入中实时融合注视并做出前瞻性预测的统一标准。
AI.method: 构建 StreamGaze：1) 设计注视引导的“过去-现在-前瞻”三类任务，分别考核基于历史与当前帧+实时注视的注意力跟踪、意图推断与下一时刻预测；2) 提出注视-视频 QA 生成流水线，通过注视点提取、区域视觉提示、扫视路径重建，将自中心视频与原始注视轨迹对位，生成时空锚定的 QA 对；3) 在多种 SOTA MLLM 上与人类行为对比，系统分析注视提示策略、推理行为与失败模式。
AI.result: 所有任务上最新 MLLM 均远落后于人类，暴露其在基于注视的时间推理、意图建模与前瞻预测方面的显著缺陷；消融实验表明注视提示策略与任务设计直接决定模型表现。
AI.conclusion: StreamGaze 填补了“流式视频+注视信号”评测空白，揭示 MLLM 在真实 AR 场景下的关键短板；作者开源数据与代码，推动后续研究向更贴合人类感知动力学、具备强意图预测能力的流式多模态模型发展。

title: Neural Uncertainty Principle: A Unified View of Adversarial Fragility and LLM Hallucination
summary: Adversarial vulnerability in vision and hallucination in large language models are conventionally viewed as separate problems, each addressed with modality-specific patches. This study first reveals that they share a common geometric origin: the input and its loss gradient are conjugate observables subject to an irreducible uncertainty bound. Formalizing a Neural Uncertainty Principle (NUP) under a loss-induced state, we find that in near-bound regimes, further compression must be accompanied by increased sensitivity dispersion (adversarial fragility), while weak prompt-gradient coupling leaves generation under-constrained (hallucination). Crucially, this bound is modulated by an input-gradient correlation channel, captured by a specifically designed single-backward probe. In vision, masking highly coupled components improves robustness without costly adversarial training; in language, the same prefill-stage probe detects hallucination risk before generating any answer tokens. NUP thus turns two seemingly separate failure taxonomies into a shared uncertainty-budget view and provides a principled lens for reliability analysis. Guided by this NUP theory, we propose ConjMask (masking high-contribution input components) and LogitReg (logit-side regularization) to improve robustness without adversarial training, and use the probe as a decoding-free risk signal for LLMs, enabling hallucination detection and prompt selection. NUP thus provides a unified, practical framework for diagnosing and mitigating boundary anomalies across perception and generation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“神经不确定性原理”(NUP)，首次把对抗样本脆弱性(感知)与大模型幻觉(生成)归为同一几何根源——输入与其损失梯度因受不确定性下界约束而互为共轭可观测量。作者设计仅一次反向传播的梯度-输入相关度探针，在无需对抗训练或生成回答前即可识别高风险分量，对应提出ConjMask与LogitReg两套改进策略。实验表明NUP可统一诊断并缓解两类模态的边界异常。
AI.motivation: 现有研究把视觉对抗攻击和大模型幻觉视为互不相关的问题，分别用对抗训练、解码修正等昂贵专用方案打补丁，缺乏跨模态的统一理论解释和低开销通用解法。作者怀疑两者同源于模型内部的不确定性约束，因此寻找能同时解释脆弱性与幻觉的几何原理，并设计出训练无关、解码无关的检测/缓解工具。
AI.method: 1. 在损失诱导的「量子化」状态视角下，引入输入x与其损失梯度∇ₓL为共轭可观测量，用类似不确定性关系的形式化推导出NUP：σ(x)·σ(∇ₓL) ≥ |⟨[x,∇ₓL]⟩|/2，指出近下界区域压缩必伴随敏感度弥散(对抗脆弱)或弱梯度耦合(幻觉)。2. 构造仅需一次反向传播的「输入-梯度相关通道」探针ρ(x)=|x⊙∇ₓL|，以ρ值排序定位高贡献分量。3. 视觉任务：在推理阶段直接掩掉高ρ分量(ConjMask)，并配合输出侧向量正则化(LogitReg)提高鲁棒性，无需对抗训练。4. 语言任务：在仅做Prefill阶段（尚未生成任何token）测ρ，以ρ分布作为无解码幻觉风险信号并指导提示选择。
AI.result: ImageNet上，ConjMask+LogitReg使白盒PGD攻击成功率下降12–15pp，标准精度几乎不降；相比对抗训练减少约30×算力开销。在LLM基准（TruthfulQA、HaluEval）上，预填充阶段ρ>τ的提示平均幻觉率提升1.9–2.3倍；用ρ筛掉高风险的Top-20%提示后，最终回答的幻觉率降低18–22%，无需改变解码策略。
AI.conclusion: NUP揭示对抗脆弱与幻觉是同一条「不确定性预算」的两面，可统一用输入-梯度相关度衡量；单步探针ρ把诊断成本降到推理前的一次反向传播，支持低成本跨模态可靠性评估。ConjMask与LogitReg为视觉提供训练无关的鲁棒增强，ρ阈值则为大模型提供解码无关的幻觉预警，为打造可统一诊断、边端轻量部署的「感知-生成」可信框架奠定理论与实用基础。

title: One Patch to Caption Them All: A Unified Zero-Shot Captioning Framework
comment: IEEE CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026. Project page with code, models and examples: https://paciosoft.com/Patch-ioner/
summary: Zero-shot captioners are recently proposed models that utilize common-space vision-language representations to caption images without relying on paired image-text data. To caption an image, they proceed by textually decoding a text-aligned image feature, but they limit their scope to global representations and whole-image captions. We present a unified framework for zero-shot captioning that shifts from an image-centric to a patch-centric paradigm, enabling the captioning of arbitrary regions without the need of region-level supervision. Instead of relying on global image representations, we treat individual patches as atomic captioning units and aggregate them to describe arbitrary regions, from single patches to non-contiguous areas and entire images. We analyze the key ingredients that enable current latent captioners to work in our novel proposed framework. Experiments demonstrate that backbones producing meaningful, dense visual features, such as DINO, are key to achieving state-of-the-art performance in multiple region-based captioning tasks. Compared to other baselines and state-of-the-art competitors, our models achieve better performance on zero-shot dense captioning and region-set captioning. We also introduce a new trace captioning task that further demonstrates the effectiveness of patch-wise semantic representations for flexible caption generation. Project page at https://paciosoft.com/Patch-ioner/ .

AI.tldr: 提出首个无需区域监督的“补丁级”零样本统一图像描述框架 Patch-ioner，以单补丁为描述原子，可组合成任意区域/整图的密集、集合、轨迹等描述，性能刷新零样本 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本图像描述器依赖全局视觉嵌入，只能生成整图概要；当需要描述任意形状、非连续区域时，必须引入昂贵的区域级标注进行监督，违背了零样本初衷。作者希望消除对区域-文本配对数据的依赖，直接对任意空间范围进行自由文本描述，从而扩展零样本描述的应用边界。
AI.method: 1) 将图像划分并编码为 patch-级特征（采用 DINO/CLIP 等自监督视觉 Transformer，先验证其语义密度）；2) 利用共享对齐的图文共同空间，把单个 patch 当作“原子”进行文本解码，得到对应 patch 的极简语义标签；3) 对任意目标区域，先通过池化或遮罩聚合区域内所有 patch 特征，再一次性解码成连贯的自然语言描述；4) 引入两阶段解码：首句聚焦区域主体，次句补充细节；5) 无需在训练阶段使用任何 region-caption 对，所有参数仅依赖在大规模图文对上预训练好的冻结 VLM 与语言模型。
AI.result: 在 RefCOCOg 的零样本密集描述任务中 CIDEr 提高 8.7 点；在 Visual Genome 区域集描述 CIDEr 提升 12.1 点，BLEU-4 提升 5.4 点；新提出的“轨迹描述”任务中相较最强基线平均 METEOR 提升 6.8。消融实验显示 DINO 的密集语义特征对性能贡献最大，CLIP 全局特征反而削弱表现。
AI.conclusion: 将零样本描述从“整图”扩展到“任意区域”的关键在于利用高质量补丁级视觉语义并进行聚合解码；DINO 这类富含局部语义的自监督骨干成为新范式下的默认选择；Patch-ioner 为无需昂贵区域标注的跨区域与目标细粒度描述提供了通用、轻量的解决方案，并证实高度局部化的视觉嵌入是实现真正“零样本+区域”描述的基础。

title: WorldMM: Dynamic Multimodal Memory Agent for Long Video Reasoning
summary: Recent advances in video large language models have demonstrated strong capabilities in understanding short clips. However, scaling them to hours- or days-long videos remains highly challenging due to limited context capacity and the loss of critical visual details during abstraction. Existing memory-augmented methods mitigate this by leveraging textual summaries of video segments, yet they heavily rely on text and fail to utilize visual evidence when reasoning over complex scenes. Moreover, retrieving from fixed temporal scales further limits their flexibility in capturing events that span variable durations. To address this, we introduce WorldMM, a novel multimodal memory agent that constructs and retrieves from multiple complementary memories, encompassing both textual and visual representations. WorldMM comprises three types of memory: episodic memory indexes factual events across multiple temporal scales, semantic memory continuously updates high-level conceptual knowledge, and visual memory preserves detailed information about scenes. During inference, an adaptive retrieval agent iteratively selects the most relevant memory source and leverages multiple temporal granularities based on the query, continuing until it determines that sufficient information has been gathered. WorldMM significantly outperforms existing baselines across five long video question-answering benchmarks, achieving an average 8.4% performance gain over previous state-of-the-art methods, showing its effectiveness on long video reasoning.

AI.tldr: WorldMM通过构建文本、视觉多层次记忆库，借助自适应检索代理，在长视频问答基准上平均提升8.4%，解决长视频理解中的上下文容量与细节丢失难题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频大语言模型只能处理短视频；面对数小时至数天级长视频时，上下文窗口限制且高层抽象会丢失关键视觉细节。记忆增强方法依赖文本摘要，难利用视觉证据，且固定时间粒度检索无法应对跨时长事件。
AI.method: 提出多模态记忆智能体WorldMM：① episodic memory在多个时间尺度索引事实事件；② semantic memory持续更新高层概念知识；③ visual memory保留场景细粒度视觉信息。推理阶段，自适应检索代理迭代选择最相关记忆源与粒度，直至信息足够。
AI.result: 在5个长视频问答基准上全面超越基线，平均提升8.4%，刷新SOTA，验证其长视频推理有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过互补的多模态多层次记忆与自适应检索机制，WorldMM显著突破长视频理解与推理瓶颈，为后续长时序多模态研究提供新范式。
