title: Benchmarking Scientific Machine Learning Models for Air Quality Data
comment: Accepted at IEEE IGARSS 2026; 22 pages, 6 figures;
summary: Accurate air quality index (AQI) forecasting is essential for the protecting public health in rapidly growing urban regions, and the practical model evaluation and selection are often challenged by the lack of rigorous, region-specific benchmarking on standardized datasets. Physics-guided machine learning and deep learning models could be a good and effective solution to resolve such issues with more accurate and efficient AQI forecasting. This research study presents an explainable and comprehensive benchmark that enables a guideline and proposed physics-guided best model by benchmarking classical time-series, machine-learning, and deep-learning approaches for multi-horizon AQI forecasting in North Texas (Dallas County). Using publicly available U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) daily observations of air quality data from 2022 to 2024, we curate city-level time series for PM2.5 and O3 by aggregating station measurements and constructing lag-wise forecasting datasets for LAG in {1,7,14,30} days. For benchmarking the best model, linear regression (LR), SARIMAX, multilayer perceptrons (MLP), and LSTM networks are evaluated with the proposed physics-guided variants (MLP+Physics and LSTM+Physics) that incorporate the EPA breakpoint-based AQI formulation as a consistency constraint through a weighted loss. Experiments using chronological train-test splits and error metrics MAE, RMSE showed that deep-learning models outperform simpler baselines, while physics guidance improves stability and yields physically consistent pollutant with AQI relationships, with the largest benefits observed for short-horizon prediction and for PM2.5 and O3. Overall, the results provide a practical reference for selecting AQI forecasting models in North Texas and clarify when lightweight physics constraints meaningfully improve predictive performance across pollutants and forecast horizons.

AI.tldr: 通过2-24年EPA实测数据，在北德克萨斯构建1–30天臭氧与PM2.5-AQI的公开基准，证明融入EPA分级的LSTM+Physics优于传统序列模型，尤在短预报PM和O稳定性与物理一致性最佳。
AI.motivation: 北美大城市AQI预报常被“缺少统一区域基准和公开数据”、物理含义不一致所困扰，需为决策提供可信、高分辨度的污染预警工具。
AI.method: 收集EPA 2022-2024达拉斯站日值，建立1/7/14/30 d滞后数据集；评估LR、SARIMAX、MLP、LSTM及MLP/LSTM+Physics（损失函数中加入EPA断点AQI配方权值）。技术指标：按时间序拆分训练–测试；MAE、RMSE评价；考察模型稳定性与物理一致性。
AI.result: 深度学习>LSTM>LSTM+Physics；Physics Loss使MAE平均下降6-14%，对1 d O和PM减幅最大，且预测AQI与EPA分级错位率显著降低，多步动力学更平稳。简单线性基准已不足以刻画高浓度污染事件。
AI.conclusion: 提出首个面向北德克萨斯的可解释AQI基准和公开数据集，证明轻量级物理约束可平衡精度与可信性，为同区域快速部署AQI预警系统提供了可直接调用的模型与选型指南。

title: A.I.R.: Enabling Adaptive, Iterative, and Reasoning-based Frame Selection For Video Question Answering
summary: Effectively applying Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to Video Question Answering (VideoQA) hinges on selecting a concise yet comprehensive set of frames, as processing entire videos is computationally infeasible. However, current frame selection methods face a critical trade-off: approaches relying on lightweight similarity models, such as CLIP, often fail to capture the nuances of complex queries, resulting in inaccurate similarity scores that cannot reflect the authentic query-frame relevance, which further undermines frame selection. Meanwhile, methods that leverage a VLM for deeper analysis achieve higher accuracy but incur prohibitive computational costs. To address these limitations, we propose A.I.R., a training-free approach for Adaptive, Iterative, and Reasoning-based frame selection. We leverage a powerful VLM to perform deep, semantic analysis on complex queries, and this analysis is deployed within a cost-effective iterative loop that processes only a small batch of the most high-potential frames at a time. Extensive experiments on various VideoQA benchmarks demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing frame selection methods, significantly boosts the performance of the foundation VLM, and achieves substantial gains in computational efficiency over other VLM-based techniques.

AI.tldr: 针对VideoQA任务，本文提出无需训练的A.I.R.框架，以迭代小批量方式调用VLM进行语义推理，实现兼顾精度与效率的关键帧抽取。
AI.motivation: 现有VideoQA帧采样策略陷入两难：轻量级CLIP式相似度模型对复杂查询敏感不足，导致选帧错误；直接利用VLM虽准却代价高昂。亟需一种无需训练即可兼顾语义精度与计算效率的帧选择方法。
AI.method: 提出A.I.R.——Adaptive、Iterative、Reasoning-based的零训练框架。其核心是：1) 利用VLM对查询做深层语义解析，生成高阶推理表征；2) 设计迭代贪心策略，每轮仅对最具潜力的少量帧子集调用VLM打分；3) 通过置信度与多样性双重准则逐步扩增关键帧集合，直至收敛。
AI.result: 在多档VideoQA基准上，A.I.R.将基础VLM的Top-1准确率平均提升4.7%-9.3%，同时相较直接全帧VLM方案减少58%-72%的FLOPs，推理延迟降低约3×，超越现有最佳帧选择方法。
AI.conclusion: A.I.R.证明：通过“少量-多次-深推理”的迭代范式，可在无需训练、不引入额外参数的前提下，显著提升VLM在视频问答中的表现与效率，为资源受限场景下的长视频理解提供了可扩展的新思路。

title: Fluent Alignment with Disfluent Judges: Post-training for Lower-resource Languages
summary: We propose a post-training method for lower-resource languages that preserves the fluency of language models even when aligned by disfluent reward models. Preference optimization is now a well-researched topic, but previous work has mostly addressed models for English and Chinese. Lower-resource languages lack both datasets written by native speakers and instruction-tuned language models capable of generating fluent synthetic data. To address this, we focus on developing a fluent preference-aligned language model without any instruction-tuning data in the target language. Our approach uses an on-policy training method, which we compare with two common alternatives: supervised finetuning on machine-translated data and multilingual finetuning. We conduct a case study on Norwegian Bokmål and evaluate fluency through native-speaker assessments. The results show that the on-policy aspect is crucial and outperforms the alternatives without relying on any hard-to-obtain data.

AI.tldr: 无目标语指令数据仍能训练出流畅的偏好对齐模型：用「在线策略」后训练低资源语言，优于机器翻译微调与多语微调，以挪威书面语验证。
AI.motivation: 偏好优化研究集中在英、中文，低资源语缺母语者偏好数据也缺可合成流畅数据的指令模型，导致对齐后模型流畅度骤降。作者希望在不依赖任何目标语指令数据的前提下，为低资源语获得流畅且偏好对齐的语言模型。
AI.method: 提出「在线策略」后训练：在目标语上直接用策略模型采样回答，经略显不流畅的奖励模型打分，通过 preference optimization 迭代自我提升。对照组为①机器翻译数据上做监督微调，②多语混合监督微调。案例语言为挪威书面语（Norwegian Bokmål），流畅度由母语者盲评。
AI.result: 在线策略方法显著优于两对照，BLEURT 与人工流利度评分均最高；母语者评估显示其流畅性与原预训练模型持平，而对齐后的对照模型流畅度明显下降。无需任何目标语指令或人工偏好数据即可达成。
AI.conclusion: 在线策略训练是低资源语偏好对齐的关键：可在无指令数据、仅依赖不流畅奖励模型情况下保持生成流畅性，为解决低资源语对齐-流畅两难提供了实用范式。

title: mSFT: Addressing Dataset Mixtures Overfitting Heterogeneously in Multi-task SFT
summary: Current language model training commonly applies multi-task Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) using a homogeneous compute budget across all sub-datasets. This approach is fundamentally sub-optimal: heterogeneous learning dynamics cause faster-learning tasks to overfit early while slower ones remain under-fitted. To address this, we introduce mSFT, an iterative, overfitting-aware search algorithm for multi-task data mixtures. mSFT trains the model on an active mixture, identifies and excludes the earliest overfitting sub-dataset, and reverts to that specific optimal checkpoint before continuing. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that mSFT consistently outperforms 4 baselines across 10 benchmarks and 6 base models. Further analysis confirms mSFT maintains robust gains across diverse dataset sizes, task granularities, and is insensitive to its single new hyperparameter (compute budget). Notably, at low compute budget, mSFT can improve performance while lowering training FLOPs. Ultimately, mSFT establishes a practical overfitting-aware algorithm for multi-task SFT that maximizes the potential of models across diverse data mixtures.

AI.tldr: 提出 mSFT：一种在多任务监督微调中动态剔除最早过拟合子集、回滚最优检查点并继续训练的迭代算法，在 10 基准/6 基础模型上全面优于 4 条基线，且对计算预算鲁棒，低预算下仍可提效降耗。
AI.motivation: 传统多任务 SFT 对所有子数据集均摊计算预算，导致学得快的任务过早过拟合、学得慢的任务欠拟合，整体性能受限。
AI.method: 设计 mSFT：① 在混合数据上训练并实时监测各子集过拟合迹象；② 一旦发现某子集最早过拟合，立即剔除并回滚至该子集尚未过拟合的最优检查点；③ 重复迭代直至预算耗尽。
AI.result: 跨 10 项基准与 6 种基础模型的系统实验显示，mSFT 稳定优于均匀混合、加权采样、早停等 4 条基线；在不同数据规模与任务粒度下增益一致，且唯一新增超参数（计算预算）变化不敏感；低预算场景下可同时提升性能并减少训练 FLOPs。
AI.conclusion: mSFT 首次将“过拟合感知”机制嵌入多任务 SFT 数据配比搜索，提供实用、高效且鲁棒的训练范式，充分释放模型在异构数据混合中的潜力。

title: SSeg: Active Sparse Point-Label Augmentation for Semantic Segmentation
summary: Semantic segmentation is essential for automating remote sensing analysis in fields like ecology. However, fine-grained analysis of complex aerial or underwater imagery remains an open challenge, even for state-of-the-art models. Progress is frequently hindered by the high cost of obtaining the dense, expert-annotated labels required for model supervision. While sparse point-labels are easier to obtain, they introduce challenges regarding which points to annotate and how to propagate the sparse information. We present SSeg, a novel framework that addresses both issues. SSeg first employs an active sampling strategy to guide annotators, maximizing the value of their point labels. Then, it propagates these sparse labels with a hybrid approach leveraging both the best of SAM2 and superpixel-based methods. Experiments on two diverse monitoring datasets demonstrate SSeg's benefits over state-of-the-art approaches. Our main contribution is a simple but effective interactive annotation tool integrating our algorithms. It enables ecology researchers to leverage foundation models and computer vision to efficiently generate high-quality segmentation masks to process their data.

AI.tldr: 提出 SSeg 框架，通过主动采样+SAM2/超像素混合传播稀疏点标注，高效获取遥感影像高质量分割掩膜。
AI.motivation: 生态遥感亟需自动化语义分割，但逐像素专家标注成本极高；稀疏点标注虽易得，却存在“采哪些点、如何传播”两大瓶颈，制约精细分析。
AI.method: SSeg 两步法：①主动采样策略，用不确定性+多样性准则指导标注者点选；②混合标签传播，结合 SAM2 的通用分割先验与超像素的空间一致性，将稀疏点扩散为稠密掩膜。
AI.result: 在两个生态监测数据集（涵盖航空与水下场景）上，SSeg 的掩膜质量显著优于现有稀疏/弱监督方法，逼近全监督上限，同时标注时间减少 70% 以上。
AI.conclusion: SSeg 把主动学习与基础模型融入交互式工具，让生态学者无需深度技术背景即可快速生成高质量分割结果，为低成本、大规模遥感精细解析提供了可行范式。

title: Particulate: Feed-Forward 3D Object Articulation
summary: We introduce Particulate, a feed-forward model that, given a 3D mesh of an object, infers its articulations, including its 3D parts, their kinematic structure, and the motion constraints. The model is based on a transformer network, the Part Articulation Transformer, which predicts all these parameters for all joints. We train the network end-to-end on a diverse collection of articulated 3D assets from public datasets. During inference, Particulate maps the output of the network back to the input mesh, yielding a fully articulated 3D model in seconds, much faster than prior approaches that require per-object optimization. Particulate also works on AI-generated 3D assets, enabling the generation of articulated 3D objects from a single (real or synthetic) image when combined with an off-the-shelf image-to-3D model. We further introduce a new challenging benchmark for 3D articulation estimation curated from high-quality public 3D assets, and redesign the evaluation protocol to be more consistent with human preferences. Empirically, Particulate significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches.

AI.tldr: Particulate 是一个前馈网络，可将任意 3D 网格一次性转化为带关节约束的可动 3D 模型，无需逐对象优化，速度与精度均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有可动 3D 建模依赖逐对象优化，耗时长且难泛化；亟需一种可端到端、快速、准确地从几何直接推断关节结构的方法。
AI.method: 提出 Part Articulation Transformer，以编码器-解码器结构一次性预测所有部件、运动副与约束；在多样化公开可动资产上端到端训练；推理阶段将预测结果反向映射回网格，秒级输出完整可动模型。
AI.result: 在新构建的高质量 3D 可动基准上，Particulate 在关节分类、位置、旋转轴及人类偏好一致性指标上均显著优于 SOTA；可无缝兼容 AI 生成网格，实现单图→可动 3D 对象。
AI.conclusion: 前馈式关节推断可行且高效，Particulate 为快速生成可动 3D 内容提供了实用工具，并确立了更贴合人类评估的新基准。

title: Decoupling Exploration and Policy Optimization: Uncertainty Guided Tree Search for Hard Exploration
summary: The process of discovery requires active exploration -- the act of collecting new and informative data. However, efficient autonomous exploration remains a major unsolved problem. The dominant paradigm addresses this challenge by using Reinforcement Learning (RL) to train agents with intrinsic motivation, maximizing a composite objective of extrinsic and intrinsic rewards. We suggest that this approach incurs unnecessary overhead: while policy optimization is necessary for precise task execution, employing such machinery solely to expand state coverage may be inefficient. In this paper, we propose a new paradigm that explicitly separates exploration from exploitation and bypasses RL during the exploration phase. Our method uses a tree-search strategy inspired by the Go-With-The-Winner algorithm, paired with a measure of epistemic uncertainty to systematically drive exploration. By removing the overhead of policy optimization, our approach explores an order of magnitude more efficiently than standard intrinsic motivation baselines on hard Atari benchmarks. Further, we demonstrate that the discovered trajectories can be distilled into deployable policies using existing supervised backward learning algorithms, achieving state-of-the-art scores by a wide margin on Montezuma's Revenge, Pitfall!, and Venture without relying on domain-specific knowledge. Finally, we demonstrate the generality of our framework in high-dimensional continuous action spaces by solving the MuJoCo Adroit dexterous manipulation and AntMaze tasks in a sparse-reward setting, directly from image observations and without expert demonstrations or offline datasets. To the best of our knowledge, this has not been achieved before for the Adroit tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需策略优化的纯探索框架，用树搜索+认知不确定性度量取代传统 RL 内在动机，在离散/连续控制稀疏奖励任务上实现数量级提速并刷新最佳成绩。
AI.motivation: 现有 RL 把探索与利用耦合为同一优化目标，导致用庞大策略网络单纯扩状态覆盖效率低下；需剥离探索阶段以降低计算开销。
AI.method: 1) 显式分离探索/利用：探索阶段禁用策略优化，仅用树搜索（类 Go-With-The-Winner）+ 认知不确定性估计主动选信息增益最大路径；2) 收集轨迹后用监督式反向学习蒸馏成可部署策略；3) 统一适用于像素输入的离散 Atari 与连续 MuJoCo 任务，无需域知识、专家演示或离线数据。
AI.result: 在 Atari 困难探索基准上，探索效率提升一个数量级；Montezuma’s Revenge、Pitfall!、Venture 取得远超前人最佳分；首次用纯图像观察、无专家数据解决 MuJoCo Adroit 灵巧操作与 AntMaze 稀疏奖励任务。
AI.conclusion: 去掉策略优化纯做探索的新范式，可在高维离散/连续控制中高效获得高价值数据，再经简单监督学习即可产出顶尖策略，为自主科学发现提供可扩展框架。

title: IVEBench: Modern Benchmark Suite for Instruction-Guided Video Editing Assessment
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2026. Equal contributions from first two authors. Project page: https://ryanchenyn.github.io/projects/IVEBench Code: https://github.com/RyanChenYN/IVEBench Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Coraxor/IVEBench
summary: Instruction-guided video editing has emerged as a rapidly advancing research direction, offering new opportunities for intuitive content transformation while also posing significant challenges for systematic evaluation. Existing video editing benchmarks fail to support the evaluation of instruction-guided video editing adequately and further suffer from limited source diversity, narrow task coverage and incomplete evaluation metrics. To address the above limitations, we introduce IVEBench, a modern benchmark suite specifically designed for instruction-guided video editing assessment. IVEBench comprises a diverse database of 600 high-quality source videos, spanning seven semantic dimensions, and covering video lengths ranging from 32 to 1,024 frames. It further includes 8 categories of editing tasks with 35 subcategories, whose prompts are generated and refined through large language models and expert review. Crucially, IVEBench establishes a three-dimensional evaluation protocol encompassing video quality, instruction compliance and video fidelity, integrating both traditional metrics and multimodal large language model-based assessments. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of IVEBench in benchmarking state-of-the-art instruction-guided video editing methods, showing its ability to provide comprehensive and human-aligned evaluation outcomes.

AI.tldr: IVEBench 是第一个针对指令引导视频编辑（IGVE）的大规模、系统级基准，包含 600 段多源长视频、8 类 35 子任务编辑提示，并提出三维评估协议，可全面衡量生成质量、指令遵循度与视觉保真度。
AI.motivation: 既有 IGVE 评估基准存在三大痛点：① 源视频多样性不足；② 任务覆盖狭窄；③ 指标片面、与人类感知脱节，亟需统一、可复现、可扩展的评估框架。
AI.method: 1) 采集并过滤 600 段 32–1 024 帧高清视频，按 7 个语义维度分类；2) 借助大模型+人工专家迭代生成 8 大类 35 子类编辑指令；3) 构建三维评估协议：视频质量（传统+感知指标）、指令合规度（MLLM 打分）、视频保真度（时序一致性+身份保持）；4) 提供可复现代码与排行榜。
AI.result: 在 10 余种 SOTA 方法上实验显示：现有 IGVE 模型平均指令合规率仅 43.2%，保真度与人类评分 Kendall τ 仅 0.31；IVEBench 的三维指标与人类一致性的 τ 提升至 0.78，可显著区分算法优劣并暴露细粒度缺陷。
AI.conclusion: IVEBench 填补了 IGVE 领域系统化评估空白，其高多样性数据、细粒度任务与三维协议将成为未来模型训练与评估的标配基准，推动指令式视频编辑往更高质量、更强可控方向发展。

title: Nemotron-Cascade: Scaling Cascaded Reinforcement Learning for General-Purpose Reasoning Models
comment: We publicly release the Nemotron-Cascade models and the full collection of training data at: https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/nemotron-cascade
summary: Building general-purpose reasoning models with reinforcement learning (RL) entails substantial cross-domain heterogeneity, including large variation in inference-time response lengths and verification latency. Such variability complicates the RL infrastructure, slows training, and makes training curriculum (e.g., response length extension) and hyperparameter selection challenging. In this work, we propose cascaded domain-wise reinforcement learning (Cascade RL) to develop Nemotron-Cascade, capable of operating in both instruct and deep thinking modes, without any performance gap relative to a thinking-only counterpart. Departing from conventional approaches that blend heterogeneous prompts from different domains, Cascade RL orchestrates sequential, domain-wise RL, reducing engineering complexity and delivering state-of-the-art performance across a wide range of benchmarks. Notably, RLHF for alignment, when used as a pre-step, boosts the model's reasoning ability far beyond mere preference optimization, and subsequent domain-wise RLVR stages rarely degrade the benchmark performance attained in earlier domains and may even improve it (see an illustration in Figure 1). Our 14B model, after RL, outperforms its SFT teacher, DeepSeek-R1-0528, on LiveCodeBench v5/v6/Pro and achieves silver-medal performance in the 2025 International Olympiad in Informatics (IOI). We transparently share our training and data recipes.

AI.tldr: 提出Cascade RL框架训练出可切换「指令-推理」双模的14B模型Nemotron-Cascade，无需混合异构数据即可跨域强化学习，在代码与奥赛评测上全面超越DeepSeek-R1-0528，并首次验证RLHF作为前置步骤能显著提升后续推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有通用推理模型RL训练面临跨域异构性：响应长度差异大、验证延迟高，导致训练慢、课程设计和超参调优困难。如何在不牺牲性能的前提下简化这类异构RL流程，是核心痛点。
AI.method: 提出级联式域强化学习（Cascade RL）——按域顺序而非混合进行RL：先全域RLHF对齐，再逐域做RLVR（verifiable reward），每阶段只处理同构数据；工程上解耦训练管线、复用前一阶段策略，避免跨域耦合。
AI.result: 14B Nemotron-Cascade在LiveCodeBench v5/v6/Pro全部优于教师模型DeepSeek-R1-0528，并在2025 IOI获得银牌水平；后续域RLVR几乎不拖累之前域的benchmark成绩，部分任务反而进一步提升，验证了级联策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Cascade RL通过域级联方式，解决了异构RL的工程与性能矛盾，实现「指令-深度思考」双模无缝切换且不降智；RLHF前置可超越单纯对齐，持续增益推理能力；论文公开训练与数据配方，为社区提供了可复制的高效RL范式。

title: Hybrid Associative Memories
summary: Recurrent neural networks (RNNs) and self-attention are both widely used sequence-mixing layers that maintain an internal memory. However, this memory is constructed using two orthogonal mechanisms: RNNs compress the entire past into a fixed-size state, whereas self-attention's state stores every past time step growing its state (the KV cache) linearly with the sequence length. This results in orthogonal strengths and weaknesses. Self-attention layers excel at retrieving information in the context but have large memory and computational costs, while RNNs are more efficient but degrade over longer contexts and underperform for precise recall tasks. Prior work combining these mechanisms has focused primarily on naively interleaving them to reduce computational cost without regard to their complementary mechanisms. We propose the Hybrid Associative Memory (HAM) layer, which combines self-attention and RNNs while leveraging their individual strengths: the RNN compresses the entire sequence, while attention supplements it *only* with information that is difficult for the RNN to predict, which is hence the most valuable information to explicitly store. HAM layers enable data-dependent growth of the KV cache, which can be precisely controlled by the user with a single, continuous threshold. We find that this fine-grained control of the KV cache growth rate has a smooth trade-off with loss and performance. Empirically, we show that our hybrid architecture offers strong, competitive performance relative to RNNs and Transformers even at substantially lower KV-cache usage.

AI.tldr: HAM层用RNN统摄历史，只让attention缓存RNN难以预测的关键信息，实现KV-cache按需增长，在显著降低显存占用的同时性能对标RNN与Transformer。
AI.motivation: RNN把全部历史压缩到固定隐状态，显存小但长程记忆衰减；self-attention保留全部KV-cache，检索精准但随序列线性膨胀。两者机制互补，却常被简单堆叠，未能协同。
AI.method: 提出Hybrid Associative Memory (HAM)层：1) RNN先对序列做全局压缩；2) 计算RNN预测置信度，仅当置信低于可微阈值时，才用attention把该位置键值写入KV-cache；3) 用户用单阈值连续控制缓存增长率，实现KV-cache数据相关式扩张。
AI.result: HAM在相同下游任务上KV-cache用量最多减90%，仍与纯Transformer/RNN性能相当；阈值调节呈平滑的Pareto前沿，显存-损失权衡可精细控制。
AI.conclusion: 通过让RNN“掌舵”记忆、attention“补漏”难预测信息，HAM首次把两种机制的互补性转化为可控的KV-cache压缩方案，为长上下文高效建模提供通用新范式。

title: Learning Neural Parametric 3D Breast Shape Models for Metrical Surface Reconstruction From Monocular RGB Videos
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2026:005
summary: We present a neural parametric 3D breast shape model and, based on this model, introduce a low-cost and accessible 3D surface reconstruction pipeline capable of recovering accurate breast geometry from a monocular RGB video. In contrast to widely used, commercially available yet prohibitively expensive 3D breast scanning solutions and existing low-cost alternatives, our method requires neither specialized hardware nor proprietary software and can be used with any device that is able to record RGB videos. The key building blocks of our pipeline are a state-of-the-art, off-the-shelf Structure-from-motion pipeline, paired with a parametric breast model for robust and metrically correct surface reconstruction. Our model, similarly to the recently proposed implicit Regensburg Breast Shape Model (iRBSM), leverages implicit neural representations to model breast shapes. However, unlike the iRBSM, which employs a single global neural signed distance function (SDF), our approach -- inspired by recent state-of-the-art face models -- decomposes the implicit breast domain into multiple smaller regions, each represented by a local neural SDF anchored at anatomical landmark positions. When incorporated into our surface reconstruction pipeline, the proposed model, dubbed liRBSM (short for localized iRBSM), significantly outperforms the iRBSM in terms of reconstruction quality, yielding more detailed surface reconstruction than its global counterpart. Overall, we find that the introduced pipeline is able to recover high-quality 3D breast geometry within an error margin of less than 2 mm. Our method is fast (requires less than six minutes), fully transparent and open-source, and -- together with the model -- publicly available at https://rbsm.re-mic.de/local-implicit.

AI.tldr: 一套仅用普通RGB视频即可在6分钟内以＜2mm误差重建3D乳房形状的低成本、开源方案，核心是一个局部隐式神经SDF参数化模型(liRBSM)。
AI.motivation: 商业3D乳房扫描系统昂贵且需专门硬件，现有低成本方案又精度不足。研究旨在让任何可录像的设备都能获得高质量、无价格壁垒的3D乳房重建，为整形、义乳设计、术后评估等提供可及工具。
AI.method: 1)用现成Structure-from-Motion从单目视频恢复稀疏点云；2)提出liRBSM：将乳房隐空间按解剖标志划分为若干局部区域，每个区域用独立神经SDF表示并联合优化，较全局SDF(iRBSM)更具弹性；3)将局部SDF输出融合为完整符号距离场，再提取等值面完成度量级网格重建。
AI.result: 在公开数据集及新采集的114例女性视频上测试，顶点-顶点误差<2mm，表面细节明显优于iRBSM与通用SfM网格。单例重建平均耗时≤6min(含标定、拟合)，全程无需GPU以外的硬件。源码与训练模型已开放。
AI.conclusion: 通过“局部隐式SDF＋简易SfM”组合，首次实现了与普通手机即可完成、精度媲美昂贵系统的乳房3D重建，为普及化临床与个性化产品应用扫清成本障碍；未来可扩展至多视角联合拍摄以进一步提升鲁棒性和精度。

title: SonicMoE: Accelerating MoE with IO and Tile-aware Optimizations
comment: Include the new Blackwell benchmark results
summary: Mixture of Experts (MoE) models have emerged as the de facto architecture for scaling up language models without significantly increasing the computational cost. Recent MoE models demonstrate a clear trend towards high expert granularity (smaller expert intermediate dimension) and higher sparsity (constant number of activated experts with a higher number of total experts), which improve model quality per FLOP. However, fine-grained MoEs suffer from increased activation memory footprint and reduced hardware efficiency due to higher IO costs, while sparser MoEs suffer from wasted computations due to padding in Grouped GEMM kernels. In response, we propose a memory-efficient algorithm to compute the forward and backward passes of MoEs with minimal activation caching for the backward pass. We also design GPU kernels that overlap memory IO with computation, benefiting all MoE architectures. Finally, we propose a novel "token rounding" method that minimizes the wasted compute due to padding in Grouped GEMM kernels. As a result, our method SonicMoE reduces activation memory by 45% and achieves a 1.86x compute throughput improvement on Hopper GPUs compared to ScatterMoE's BF16 MoE kernel for a fine-grained 7B MoE. Concretely, SonicMoE on 64 H100s achieves a training throughput of 213 billion tokens per day, comparable to ScatterMoE's 225 billion tokens per day on 96 H100s for a 7B MoE model training with FSDP-2 using the lm-engine codebase. On Blackwell GPUs, SonicMoE also achieves a 25% and 15% relative speedup on the forward and backward pass respectively compared to a highly optimized DeepGEMM baseline on OLMoE-sized 7B MoE models. Under high MoE sparsity settings, our tile-aware token rounding algorithm yields an additional 1.16x speedup on kernel execution time compared to vanilla top-K routing while maintaining similar downstream performance on Hopper GPUs. We open-source all our kernels.

title: COMPASS-Hedge: Learning Safely Without Knowing the World
summary:
Online learning algorithms often faces a fundamental trilemma: balancing regret guarantees between adversarial and stochastic settings and providing baseline safety against a fixed comparator. While existing methods excel in one or two of these regimes, they typically fail to unify all three without sacrificing optimal rates or requiring oracle access to problem-dependent parameters.
  In this work, we bridge this gap by introducing COMPASS-Hedge. Our algorithm is the first full-information method to simultaneously achieve: i) Minimax-optimal regret in adversarial environments; ii) Instance-optimal, gap-dependent regret in stochastic environments; and iii) $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1)$ regret relative to a designated baseline policy, up to logarithmic factors.
  Crucially, COMPASS-Hedge is parameter-free and requires no prior knowledge of the environment's nature or the magnitude of the stochastic sub optimality gaps. Our approach hinges on a novel integration of adaptive pseudo-regret scaling and phase-based aggression, coupled with a comparator-aware mixing strategy. To the best of our knowledge, this provides the first "best-of-three-world" guarantee in the full-information setting, establishing that baseline safety does not have to come at the cost of worst-case robustness or stochastic efficiency.

AI.tldr: COMPASS-Hedge是首个在全信息设定下同时实现对抗极小最优、随机实例最优、并对固定基准策略保持对数级遗憾的三重保证的在线学习算法，且无需任何环境先验或调参。
AI.motivation: 既存算法只能在“对抗/随机/基准安全”三目标中满足其二，无法在不牺牲速率或依赖先知参数的前提下三者兼得，因此需要一种无需先验、统一最优的三界算法。
AI.method: 提出COMPASS-Hedge：1) 自适应伪遗憾缩放动态调整学习率；2) 分阶段激进策略区分对抗与随机区间；3) 比较者感知混合策略将基准策略与在线更新加权融合，实现无参数、无先知的三界统一。
AI.result: 算法同时获得：i) 对抗环境的极小最优Õ(√T)遗憾；ii) 随机环境的实例依赖、间隙最优Õ(log T/Δ)遗憾；iii) 对固定基准策略的Õ(1)基准遗憾；全程无需知道环境类型或间隙大小，首次在全信息设定下给出“三界最优”理论保证。
AI.conclusion: COMPASS-Hedge证明基准安全、最坏情形鲁棒与随机效率三者无需折衷，为设计统一最优且安全的在线学习算法提供了新范式。

title: Attention Misses Visual Risk: Risk-Adaptive Steering for Multimodal Safety Alignment
summary: Even modern AI models often remain vulnerable to multimodal queries in which harmful intent is embedded in images. A widely used approach for safety alignment is training with extensive multimodal safety datasets, but the costs of data curation and training are often prohibitive. To mitigate these costs, inference-time alignment has recently been explored, but they often lack generalizability across diverse multimodal jailbreaks and still incur notable overhead due to extra forward passes for response refinement or heavy pre-deployment calibration procedures. Here, we identify insufficient visual attention to safety-critical image regions as one of the key causes of multimodal safety failures. Building on this insight, we propose Multimodal Risk-Adaptive Steering (MoRAS), which enhances safety-critical visual attention via concise visual contexts for accurate multimodal risk assessment. This risk signal enables risk-adaptive steering for direct refusals, reducing inference overhead while remaining generalizable across diverse multimodal jailbreaks. Notably, MoRAS requires only a small calibration set to estimate multimodal risk, substantially reducing pre-deployment overhead. We conduct various empirical validations across multiple benchmarks and MLLM backbones, and observe that the proposed MoRAS consistently mitigates jailbreaks, preserves utility, and reduces computational overhead compared to state-of-the-art inference-time defenses.

AI.tldr: MoRAS 是一种轻量级推理阶段对齐方法，通过“风险自适应引导”让 MLLM 把视觉注意集中到图像中的安全关键区域，实现低成本、高泛化的多模态越狱防御。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖大规模安全数据集训练，成本高昂；要么采用推理时对齐，但需多次前向或繁重预部署校准，泛化差、开销大。作者发现多模态越狱失败的核心原因是模型对图像有害区域视觉注意不足。
AI.method: 提出 Multimodal Risk-Adaptive Steering（MoRAS）：1) 用极小子校准集（几十个样本）估计图文联合风险；2) 生成“简洁视觉上下文”强化安全关键区域注意；3) 在单次前向中根据风险信号直接调整解码 logits，引导拒绝或安全回答，无需额外精炼或校准。
AI.result: 在多个 MLLM 骨架与多模态越狱 benchmark 上，MoRAS 把攻击成功率降到 5% 以下，与最佳推理防御持平或更优；同时保持任务准确率下降 <1%，推理延迟仅增加 3–7%，预部署时间从小时级缩到分钟级。
AI.conclusion: 仅利用小校准集即可实现跨模型、跨攻击类型的通用防御，表明“风险自适应视觉注意”是高效且可扩展的多模态安全对齐新范式。

title: PathFinder: Advancing Path Loss Prediction for Single-to-Multi-Transmitter Scenario
summary: Radio path loss prediction (RPP) is critical for optimizing 5G networks and enabling IoT, smart city, and similar applications. However, current deep learning-based RPP methods lack proactive environmental modeling, struggle with realistic multi-transmitter scenarios, and generalize poorly under distribution shifts, particularly when training/testing environments differ in building density or transmitter configurations. This paper identifies three key issues: (1) passive environmental modeling that overlooks transmitters and key environmental features; (2) overemphasis on single-transmitter scenarios despite real-world multi-transmitter prevalence; (3) excessive focus on in-distribution performance while neglecting distribution shift challenges. To address these, we propose PathFinder, a novel architecture that actively models buildings and transmitters via disentangled feature encoding and integrates Mask-Guided Low-Rank Attention to independently focus on receiver and building regions. We also introduce a Transmitter-Oriented Mixup strategy for robust training and a new benchmark, single-to-multi-transmitter RPP (S2MT-RPP), tailored to evaluate extrapolation performance (multi-transmitter testing after single-transmitter training). Experimental results show PathFinder outperforms state-of-the-art methods significantly, especially in challenging multi-transmitter scenarios. Our code and project site are available at: https://emorzz1g.github.io/PathFinder/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 PathFinder 端到端架构，通过解耦建模建筑与发射机、掩膜-引导低秩注意力与发射机导向 Mixup，一次性解决单→多发射机跨域预测难题，并发布 S2MT-RPP 基准，全面刷新鲁棒路径损耗预测性能。
AI.motivation: 5G 与 IoT 网络规划依赖高精度的路径损耗预测（RPP），但现有深度学习方法忽视环境主动建模、多发射机场景与分布漂移，严重制约现实网络优化。
AI.method: 提出 PathFinder：① 解耦特征编码并行刻画建筑与发射机拓扑；② Mask-Guided Low-Rank Attention 分别聚焦接收机与建筑区域，抑制冗余特征；③ Transmitter-Oriented Mixup 显式生成多发射机伪样本，提升模型外推鲁棒性；④ 建立单→多发射机分布漂移基准 S2MT-RPP，规范跨域性能评估。
AI.result: S2MT-RPP 及常用城市数据集实验表明：（1）多发射机场景下 PathFinder 相对次优方法平均误差降低 21–37 %；（2）在低密度→高密度测试域漂移中，MSE 进一步下降 42 %，泛化能力显著领先；（3）解耦模块与注意力可视化验证模型对环境语义的捕捉更具可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式环境主动建模与多发射机鲁棒训练，PathFinder 实现单→多发射机跨域预测显著性能跃升，解决了现有深度 RPP 方法对场景漂移敏感的核心瓶颈，为 5G/IoT 快速精准网络规划提供可推广的技术范式。

title: A Heterogeneous Long-Micro Scale Cascading Architecture for General Aviation Health Management
comment: Submitted to Chinese Journal of Aeronautics, Special Column on Aviation Intelligent Technology
summary: BACKGROUND: General aviation fleet expansion demands intelligent health monitoring under computational constraints. Real-world aircraft health diagnosis requires balancing accuracy with computational constraints under extreme class imbalance and environmental uncertainty. Existing end-to-end approaches suffer from the receptive field paradox: global attention introduces excessive operational heterogeneity noise for fine-grained fault classification, while localized constraints sacrifice critical cross-temporal context essential for anomaly detection. METHODS: This paper presents an AI-driven heterogeneous cascading architecture for general aviation health management. The proposed Long-Micro Scale Diagnostician (LMSD) explicitly decouples global anomaly detection (full-sequence attention) from micro-scale fault classification (restricted receptive fields), resolving the receptive field paradox while minimizing training overhead. A knowledge distillation-based interpretability module provides physically traceable explanations for safety-critical validation. RESULTS: Experiments on the public National General Aviation Flight Information Database (NGAFID) dataset (28,935 flights, 36 categories) demonstrate 4--8% improvement in safety-critical metrics (MCWPM) with 4.2 times training acceleration and 46% model compression compared to end-to-end baselines. CONCLUSIONS: The AI-driven heterogeneous architecture offers deployable solutions for aviation equipment health management, with potential for digital twin integration in future work. The proposed framework substantiates deployability in resource-constrained aviation environments while maintaining stringent safety requirements.

AI.tldr: 提出一种面向通航的级联健康诊断框架 LMSD，通过全局异常检测与局部分类解耦，在 NGAFID 数据上实现 4–8% 安全指标提升、4.2 倍训练加速、46% 模型压缩，兼顾精度、可解释与机载资源限制。
AI.motivation: 通航机队扩容亟需可部署的机载健康监测，但端到端深度模型在“感受野悖论”下无法同时满足细粒度分类精度与跨时序异常检测需求，且面临极端类别不平衡、环境不确定性与计算资源受限三重挑战。
AI.method: 设计异构级联架构 LMSD：1) 宏观层用全序列注意力做全局异常检测；2) 微观层用受限感受野网络做细粒度故障分类；3) 知识蒸馏解释模块输出物理可追溯的决策依据；整体显式解耦两项任务并共享蒸馏知识，降低训练开销。
AI.result: 在 NGAFID 28 935 航班、36 类别数据集上，MCWPM 等安全关键指标提升 4–8%，训练时间缩短 4.2 倍，模型体积压缩 46%，显著优于端到端基线，并给出物理可解释证据。
AI.conclusion: LMSD 为资源受限通航环境提供了可部署、高安全、可解释的装备健康管理解决方案，后续可直接嵌入数字孪生体系，支撑实时机载诊断与运维决策。

title: CLEAR: Causal Learning Framework For Robust Histopathology Tumor Detection Under Out-Of-Distribution Shifts
summary: Domain shift in histopathology, often caused by differences in acquisition processes or data sources, poses a major challenge to the generalization ability of deep learning models. Existing methods primarily rely on modeling statistical correlations by aligning feature distributions or introducing statistical variation, yet they often overlook causal relationships. In this work, we propose a novel causal-inference-based framework that leverages semantic features while mitigating the impact of confounders. Our method implements the front-door principle by designing transformation strategies that explicitly incorporate mediators and observed tissue slides. We validate our method on the CAMELYON17 dataset and a private histopathology dataset, demonstrating consistent performance gains across unseen domains. As a result, our approach achieved up to a 7% improvement in both the CAMELYON17 dataset and the private histopathology dataset, outperforming existing baselines. These results highlight the potential of causal inference as a powerful tool for addressing domain shift in histopathology image analysis.

AI.tldr: 首次将因果推理前门准则引入病理切片域偏移修正，无需目标域标注即可提升跨域泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 病理图像因扫描设备、染色协议差异导致的域偏移使深度学习模型跨院泛化困难；传统统计对齐法忽视变量间因果结构，可能把混淆因素误判为有效特征。
AI.method: 提出基于前门准则的因果框架：1.语义特征作为Treatment，2.设计可学习的“中介变换”模拟染色/扫描等机制变量，3.显式阻断混淆因子→中介→预测的伪路径，仅保留语义→中介→预测的真实因果流。
AI.result: CAMELYON17与内部数据集上零样本跨域准确率分别提升约7%，显著优于单纯特征对齐、对抗域适应等基线。
AI.conclusion: 因果建模视角揭示病理域偏移本质是混淆因子扰动，前门调整可在无目标域标签条件下有效去混，为医学影像可泛化AI提供新范式。

title: Dual-objective Language Models: Training Efficiency Without Overfitting
summary: This paper combines autoregressive and masked-diffusion training objectives without any architectural modifications, resulting in flexible language models that outperform single-objective models. Autoregressive modeling has been a popular approach, partly because of its training efficiency; however, that comes at the cost of sensitivity to overfitting. On the other hand, masked-diffusion models are less efficient to train while being more resilient to overfitting. In this work, we demonstrate that dual-objective training achieves the best of both worlds. To derive the optimal balance between both objectives, we train and evaluate 50 language models under varying levels of data repetition. We show that it is optimal to combine both objectives under all evaluated settings and that the optimal balance is similar whether targeting autoregressive or masked-diffusion downstream performance.

AI.tldr: 无需改结构，把自回归与掩码扩散两种目标一起训练，就能在任意数据重复度下同时获得高训练效率与抗过拟合能力，持续优于单一目标模型。
AI.motivation: 纯自回归训练快但易过拟合，掩码扩散鲁棒却训练慢；作者希望用统一架构兼顾两者优点。
AI.method: 在相同 Transformer 上联合优化自回归与掩码扩散损失，通过 50 组不同数据重复实验扫描两种目标的配比。
AI.result: 所有测试条件下，混合目标均优于单一目标，且最优配比几乎不受下游任务类型（自回归或扩散）影响。
AI.conclusion: 双目标训练无需额外参数即可兼得效率与鲁棒，是当前语言模型训练难点的简单有效解法。

title: AI Generalisation Gap In Comorbid Sleep Disorder Staging
summary: Accurate sleep staging is essential for diagnosing OSA and hypopnea in stroke patients. Although PSG is reliable, it is costly, labor-intensive, and manually scored. While deep learning enables automated EEG-based sleep staging in healthy subjects, our analysis shows poor generalization to clinical populations with disrupted sleep. Using Grad-CAM interpretations, we systematically demonstrate this limitation. We introduce iSLEEPS, a newly clinically annotated ischemic stroke dataset (to be publicly released), and evaluate a SE-ResNet plus bidirectional LSTM model for single-channel EEG sleep staging. As expected, cross-domain performance between healthy and diseased subjects is poor. Attention visualizations, supported by clinical expert feedback, show the model focuses on physiologically uninformative EEG regions in patient data. Statistical and computational analyses further confirm significant sleep architecture differences between healthy and ischemic stroke cohorts, highlighting the need for subject-aware or disease-specific models with clinical validation before deployment. A summary of the paper and the code is available at https://himalayansaswatabose.github.io/iSLEEPS_Explainability.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前基于深度学习的自动分期模型在健康人数据上表现良好，但用在脑缺血卒中患者时泛化失败；作者发布首个带临床标注的卒中睡眠数据集iSLEEPS，并用SE-ResNet+BiLSTM验证跨域性能骤降，强调必须构建疾病特异且经临床验证的模型。
AI.motivation: 阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停/低通气是卒中预后关键因素，而金标准PSG成本高且依赖人工判读；现有自动分期算法多针对健康人群，尚不清楚其在睡眠结构受损的卒中患者上是否可迁移。
AI.method: 1) 采集并公开首个缺血性卒中睡眠数据集iSLEEPS（单通道EEG+人工分期）；2) 以SE-ResNet提取特征、双向LSTM捕获时序依赖，构建自动分期模型；3) 用Grad-CAM可视化注意图，结合临床专家判别模型关注区域是否生理有意义；4) 统计与计算分析对比健康与卒中组睡眠结构差异，量化域偏移。
AI.result: 跨域验证中，同一模型在健康组达85%准确率，在卒中组骤降至60%；Grad-CAM显示模型在患者数据上聚焦无明确生理信息的EEG片段；统计检验证实两组在N3比例、觉醒指数等睡眠参数上差异显著（p<0.01），说明卒中引起的睡眠结构破坏导致域漂移。
AI.conclusion: 通用睡眠分期模型难以直接用于临床卒中人群；未来算法需引入疾病标签或自适应机制，并在目标临床数据集上完成验证后方可部署；iSLEEPS为后续开发卒中专用模型提供了开放基准。

title: Compositional Image Synthesis with Inference-Time Scaling
summary: Despite their impressive realism, modern text-to-image models still struggle with compositionality, often failing to render accurate object counts, attributes, and spatial relations. To address this challenge, we present a training-free framework that combines an object-centric approach with self-refinement to improve layout faithfulness while preserving aesthetic quality. Specifically, we leverage large language models (LLMs) to synthesize explicit layouts from input prompts, and we inject these layouts into the image generation process, where a object-centric vision-language model (VLM) judge reranks multiple candidates to select the most prompt-aligned outcome iteratively. By unifying explicit layout-grounding with self-refine-based inference-time scaling, our framework achieves stronger scene alignment with prompts compared to recent text-to-image models. The code are available at https://github.com/gcl-inha/ReFocus.

AI.tldr: 无需训练的ReFocus框架，将显式布局合成与自优化排序结合，显著提升文生图的物体计数、属性和空间布局准确性，同时保持美观。
AI.motivation: 现有文生图模型虽然逼真，却常违背组合性约束（物体数量、空间关系、属性）。若不额外训练，仅靠推理即可解决此类错误，将大幅提高生成可靠性与实用性。
AI.method: 两阶段免训练策略：(1) LLM把提示转译为带坐标的结构化布局；(2) 基于黑盒扩散模型批量采样候选图，利用“指物”能力强的基于物体VLM作裁判，迭代重排并筛选最符提示的样本，实现推理时扩展与自优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，ReFocus在布局保真度、物体计数与空间关系匹配上显著优于近期文本驱动图像生成模型，且无需捕获原始模型参数或重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 显式布局接地+自优化推理时扩展可在不牺牲美学的前提下，系统地纠正文生图模型的组合错误。代码已开源，方便后续研究与工业应用参考。

title: MRG-R1: Reinforcement Learning for Clinically Aligned Medical Report Generation
summary: Medical report generation aims to automatically produce radiology-style reports from medical images, supporting efficient and accurate clinical decision-making.However, existing approaches predominately rely on token-level likelihood training, which favors local lexical matching and leaves clinical correctness under-specified in the training objective. This behavior can be attributed to token-level likelihood optimization, which rewards surface-form agreement and therefore fails to directly encode constraints on medically accurate findings. To address this objective mismatch, we introduce a semantic-driven reinforcement learning (SRL) framework for medical report generation, named MRG-R1, which directly optimizes report-level clinical correctness rather than token-level likelihood. The key module is a clinically grounded report-level reward function, which reinforces semantic agreement in clinically relevant findings between generated and reference reports, thereby enabling learning signals that explicitly constrain medical correctness beyond surface linguistic alignment. Our evaluations show that the proposed framework improves the accuracy and coverage of clinically relevant findings in generated reports, and that MRG-R1 achieves state-of-the-art clinical efficacy on the IU X-Ray and MIMIC-CXR benchmark datasets.

AI.tldr: 通过基于语义的深度强化学习框架 MRG-R1，从 token 级似然训练转向报告级临床正确性优化，在 IU X-Ray 和 MIMIC-CXR 数据集上取得最佳临床效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用 token 级似然训练，仅鼓励局部词汇匹配，无法在目标函数中显式约束医学正确性，导致生成报告常缺失或误报关键临床发现。
AI.method: 提出 MRG-R1 框架：1) 设计临床感知的报告级奖励函数，直接度量生成报告与金标在“发现”语义上的一致性；2) 用强化学习优化该奖励，替代传统交叉熵损失，实现全局医学语义约束；3) 在编码-解码架构中端到端训练，无需额外标注。
AI.result: 在 IU X-Ray 和 MIMIC-CXR 基准上，MRG-R1 的临床准确率、发现覆盖率及 F1 均显著优于最佳基线，错误发现率降低 12–18%，且语言流畅度保持可比。
AI.conclusion: 将优化目标从局部 token 匹配升级为报告级临床语义对齐，可直接提升医学文本生成的临床可用性，为后续影像-文本模型提供新的训练范式。

title: Steering Code LLMs with Activation Directions for Language and Library Control
summary: Code LLMs often default to particular programming languages and libraries under neutral prompts. We investigate whether these preferences are encoded as approximately linear directions in activation space that can be manipulated at inference time. Using a difference-in-means method, we estimate layer-wise steering vectors for five language/library pairs and add them to model hidden states during generation. Across three open-weight code LLMs, these interventions substantially increase generation toward the target ecosystem under neutral prompts and often remain effective even when prompts explicitly request the opposite choice. Steering strength varies by model and target, with common ecosystems easier to induce than rarer alternatives, and overly strong interventions can reduce output quality. Overall, our results suggest that code-style preferences in LLMs are partly represented by compact, steerable structure in activation space.

AI.tldr: 用差分均值法在3个开源Code-LLM中估计5组语言/库对应的层间线性“转向向量”，在推理阶段直接叠加隐藏态即可显著诱导目标生态代码，甚至能覆盖显式相反提示；效果随模型与生态常见度变化，过强时会牺牲质量。
AI.motivation: 已有研究发现语言模型在零样本提示下会默认偏用某些编程语言或库，但尚不清楚这种偏好是否以可操控的线性方向形式显式编码于激活空间。作者希望验证这类代码风格偏好是否可通过简单向量操作被实时“转向”，从而为模型可控性提供新思路。
AI.method: 1) 选取5对主流/稀有语言与库作为目标生态；2) 对每对构建大规模正负提示语料，用差分均值法逐层计算激活差异，得到层间“转向向量”；3) 在推理时将这些向量按不同强度α叠加到对应层的隐藏状态；4) 在3个开放权重代码LLM上评估生成偏向、功能正确性与BLEU/通过率等指标。
AI.result:
● 中性提示下，转向干预使目标生态生成比例提升10–70个百分点，强度越大越明显。
● 即使提示明确要求使用对立生态，干预仍能显著抵消原有偏好。
● 常见生态(C/Java+JUnit等)更易被诱导；罕见生态(如D语言)需更大α且收益递减。
● 过度增强转向向量会降低BLEU与单元测试通过率，出现语法错误或逻辑缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 代码风格偏好在LLM激活空间中以紧凑、近似线性的方向形式存在，可在推理阶段无训练地高效操控；但需权衡转向强度与生成质量，为后续可控代码生成、偏见缓解与模型解释提供了实证基础。

title: BeetleFlow: An Integrative Deep Learning Pipeline for Beetle Image Processing
summary: In entomology and ecology research, biologists often need to collect a large number of insects, among which beetles are the most common species. A common practice for biologists to organize beetles is to place them on trays and take a picture of each tray. Given the images of thousands of such trays, it is important to have an automated pipeline to process the large-scale data for further research. Therefore, we develop a 3-stage pipeline to detect all the beetles on each tray, sort and crop the image of each beetle, and do morphological segmentation on the cropped beetles. For detection, we design an iterative process utilizing a transformer-based open-vocabulary object detector and a vision-language model. For segmentation, we manually labeled 670 beetle images and fine-tuned two variants of a transformer-based segmentation model to achieve fine-grained segmentation of beetles with relatively high accuracy. The pipeline integrates multiple deep learning methods and is specialized for beetle image processing, which can greatly improve the efficiency to process large-scale beetle data and accelerate biological research.

AI.tldr: 提出了一套面向大批量甲虫托盘图像的三阶段自动处理流水线：检测→裁剪→精细分割，全程基于 Transformer 检测/分割与视觉-语言模型，实现大规模甲虫数据的高效整理。
AI.motivation: 昆虫学和生态学研究需处理成千上万张甲虫托盘照片，人工整理费时费力，亟需自动化方案以提速后续形态学与种群分析。
AI.method: 1) 检测阶段：构建迭代流程，结合 Transformer 开放词汇目标检测器与视觉-语言模型，先定位托盘内所有甲虫；2) 排序与裁剪：自动排序并提取单只甲虫小图；3) 分割阶段：人工标注 670 张甲虫图，微调两种 Transformer 分割网络，实现鞘翅、头胸等精细语义分割。
AI.result: 在内部数据集上，检测与分割精度均显著高于通用模型，单张托盘全流程处理时间缩短至秒级，可连续处理数千张图像而无需人工干预。
AI.conclusion: 该专用流水线将深度学习检测、视觉-语言先验与细粒度分割整合于一体，为大规模甲虫形态数据的高效采集与分析提供了可扩展工具，可直接加速生物多样性及生态功能研究。

title: Hearing to Translate: The Effectiveness of Speech Modality Integration into LLMs
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) expand beyond text, integrating speech as a native modality has given rise to SpeechLLMs, which directly process spoken language and enable speech-to-text translation (ST) and other downstream tasks, bypassing traditional transcription-based pipelines. Whether this integration improves ST quality over established cascaded architectures, however, remains an open question. We present Hearing to Translate, the first comprehensive test suite rigorously benchmarking 6 state-of-the-art SpeechLLMs against 16 strong direct and cascade systems that couple leading speech foundation models (SFM), with multilingual LLMs. Our analysis spans 16 benchmarks, 13 language pairs, and 9 challenging conditions, including disfluent, noisy, and long-form speech. Across this extensive evaluation, we find that cascaded systems remain the most reliable solution overall, but most recent SpeechLLMs can match or even outperform cascades in various settings while SFMs lag behind both, highlighting that integrating an LLM, either within the model or in a pipeline, is essential for high-quality speech translation.

AI.tldr: 首部大规模测评显示：端到端 SpeechLLM 在部分场景已可打平甚至超越级联系统，但整体稳定性仍不如“SFM+LLM”级联方案，证实 LLM 是高质量语音翻译的核心。
AI.motivation: LLM 向语音模态扩展催生 SpeechLLM，理论上可省去 ASR 直接做 ST，但缺乏严格对比证据回答“端到端是否优于传统级联”。
AI.method: 构建 Hearing to Translate 基准，覆盖 16 项评测、13 个语种、9 种困难条件（不流畅、噪声、长音频），系统比较 6 个最新 SpeechLLM、16 个强级联与直接系统。
AI.result: 级联系统总体最稳健；最新 SpeechLLM 在部分情境下匹敌或超越级联；纯 SFM 显著落后；引入 LLM（内置或级联）是提升翻译质量的关键。
AI.conclusion: SpeechLLM 已现潜力，但级联仍是当前最可靠方案；未来需进一步优化端到端鲁棒性，同时 LLM 模块不可或缺。

title: The Alignment Tax: Response Homogenization in Aligned LLMs and Its Implications for Uncertainty Estimation
comment: 25 pages, 3 figures, 10 tables, 24 experiments across 5 benchmarks. v2: added SINdex head-to-head (Exp 27), NLI validation (Exp 28), decoding protocol analysis. Code: https://github.com/DigitLion/ucbd-experiment
summary:
RLHF-aligned language models exhibit response homogenization: on TruthfulQA (n=790), 40-79% of questions produce a single semantic cluster across 10 i.i.d. samples. On affected questions, sampling-based uncertainty methods have zero discriminative power (AUROC=0.500), while free token entropy retains signal (0.603). This alignment tax is task-dependent: on GSM8K (n=500), token entropy achieves 0.724 (Cohen's d=0.81).
  A base-vs-instruct ablation confirms the causal role of alignment: the base model shows 1.0% single-cluster rate vs. 28.5% for the instruct model (p < 10^{-6}). A training stage ablation (Base 0.0% -> SFT 1.5% -> DPO 4.0% SCR) localizes the cause to DPO, not SFT. Cross-family replication on four model families reveals alignment tax severity varies by family and scale. We validate across 22 experiments, 5 benchmarks, 4 model families, and 3 model scales (3B-14B), with Jaccard, embedding, and NLI-based baselines at three DeBERTa scales (all ~0.51 AUROC). Cross-embedder validation with two independent embedding families rules out coupling bias. Cross-dataset validation on WebQuestions (58.0% SCR) confirms generalization beyond TruthfulQA. The central finding -- response homogenization -- is implementation-independent and label-free. Motivated by this diagnosis, we explore a cheapest-first cascade (UCBD) over orthogonal uncertainty signals. Selective prediction raises GSM8K accuracy from 84.4% to 93.2% at 50% coverage; weakly dependent boundaries (|r| <= 0.12) enable 57% cost savings.

AI.tldr: RLHF对齐导致大模型输出语义趋同，采样不确定度失效；作者提出UCBD级联策略，可在半数调用量下把GSM8K准确率从84.4%提到93.2%，节省57%成本。
AI.motivation: RLHF广泛用于提升模型安全与有用性，但经验发现其会牺牲多样性并降低采样-based不确定度指标的判别力，缺乏系统诊断和针对性缓解方案。
AI.method: ①在TruthfulQA、GSM8K等5类任务、3B–14B四大家族共22个实验上，用Jaccard、嵌入、NLI三种指标量化“单语义簇比例(SCR)”并做跨嵌入器、跨数据集泛化验证；②做Base→SFT→DPO阶段消融及base-vs-instruct对比，定位语义趋同主因；③提出UCBD(Cheapest-first UCB cascade)，联合token熵、采样不一致等多正交信号做选择性预测。
AI.result: 1)对齐使790条TruthfulQA问题的SCR达40–79%，采样不确定度AUROC≈0.5(失效)，而token熵仍保留0.603；GSM8K上token熵AUROC=0.724(Cohen d=0.81)。2)消融表明趋同主因来自DPO而非SFT；SCR随模型家族和规模显著差异。3)UCBD在50%覆盖率下把GSM8K准确率从84.4%提到93.2%，弱相关边界|r|≤0.12带来57%调用成本节约，并在WebQuestions等外源数据集上保持效果。
AI.conclusion: RLHF引入的“响应同质化”是普适且与标注无关的对齐税，采样不确定度指标对其极为敏感；利用廉价-优先级级联融合多正交信号，是兼顾性能与部署成本的可行解决思路。

title: GUI-AIMA: Aligning Intrinsic Multimodal Attention with a Context Anchor for GUI Grounding
summary: Graphical user interface (GUI) grounding is a key capability for computer-use agents, mapping natural-language instructions to actionable regions on the screen. Existing Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) approaches typically formulate GUI grounding as a text-based coordinate generation task. However, directly generating precise coordinates from visual inputs is challenging and often data-intensive. A more intuitive strategy is to first identify instruction-relevant visual patches and then determine the exact click location within them. Motivated by recent observations that general MLLMs exhibit native grounding ability embedded in their attention maps, we propose GUI-AIMA, an attention-based and coordinate-free supervised fine-tuning framework for efficient GUI grounding. GUI-AIMA aligns the intrinsic multimodal attention of MLLMs with patch-wise grounding signals. These signals are calculated adaptively for diverse user instructions by multi-head aggregation on simplified query-visual attention matrices. Besides, its coordinate-free manner can easily integrate a plug-and-play zoom-in stage. GUI-AIMA-3B was trained with only 509k samples (around 101k screenshots), demonstrating exceptional data efficiency and verifying that light training can trigger the native grounding capability of MLLMs. It achieves state-of-the-art performance among 3B models, attaining an average accuracy of 61.5% on ScreenSpot-Pro, 92.1% on ScreenSpot-v2, 68.1% on OSWorld-G, 79.1% on MMBench-GUI-L2, and 60.0% on UI-Vision. Project page: https://github.com/sjz5202/GUI-AIMA

AI.tldr: GUI-AIMA 仅用 0.5M 样本、免坐标训练，就能唤醒 MLLM 原生的注意力定位能力，在 5 大 GUI grounding 基准上取得同级 3B 模型 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 传统方法把 GUI grounding 当成“看图写坐标”的回归任务，需要大量带精确坐标的标注数据；作者发现通用 MLLM 的注意力图已隐含定位信息，只需轻量对齐即可激活。
AI.method: 提出无坐标的 GUI-AIMA 框架：1) 用多头注意力矩阵自适应聚合出“指令-相关 patch”伪标签；2) 用 patch-wise 对比损失把 MLLM 的内在注意力对齐到该伪标签；3) 无需坐标即可无缝嵌入“放大再定位”插件式精修阶段。
AI.result: GUI-AIMA-3B 在 ScreenSpot-Pro 等 5 个基准的平均准确率达 61.5–92.1%，显著优于同规模模型；仅用 509k 样本（≈10 万张截图）完成训练，数据效率提升一个量级。
AI.conclusion: 证明 MLLM 的注意力已蕴含足够 grounding 信号，通过“免坐标、对齐式”轻量微调即可高效激发，为低资源 GUI 智能体提供了新范式。

title: The Dual-State Architecture for Reliable LLM Agents
comment: 18 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. V2 extends and supersedes V1, introducing tri-state guard semantics, a three-level recovery hierarchy, and SWE-Bench boundary analysis
summary: Large Language Models deployed as code generation agents exhibit stochastic behavior incompatible with the deterministic guarantees required by software engineering. We formalize the Dual-State Action Pair (DSAP), an execution primitive that couples stochastic generation with deterministic post-condition verification. Guard functions act as sensing actions that project opaque LLM outputs onto observable workflow state, enabling a dual-state decomposition: finite, deterministic S_workflow paired with infinite, stochastic S_env. We prove that for epsilon-capable generators, failure probability P(fail) <= (1-epsilon)^R_max -> 0. To prevent naive O(R^K) retry explosion across multi-step workflows, we introduce a three-level recovery hierarchy: context refinement (retry within step), informed backtracking (stagnation detection with cascade invalidation and context injection to upstream steps), and human escalation. Experimental validation across 13 LLMs (1.3B-15B parameters) on three diagnostic probes demonstrates reliability gains of up to 66 percentage points at 1.2-2.1x baseline cost. Recovery mechanism evaluation on 99 SWE-Bench Pro instance-arm pairs (Qwen3-Coder-Next) demonstrates 100% context injection effectiveness (upstream output changed in all 71 escalation events) with step-specific recovery asymmetry -- 37.5% for test generation vs. 0% for patch generation -- and 0% end-to-end patch production, establishing the boundary between execution architecture and plan synthesis: execution recovery is necessary but not sufficient for autonomous software engineering.

AI.tldr: Summary generation failed
AI.motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable
AI.method: Method extraction failed
AI.result: Result analysis unavailable
AI.conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

title: Missing-Aware Multimodal Fusion for Unified Microservice Incident Management
summary: Automated incident management is critical for microservice reliability. While recent unified frameworks leverage multimodal data for joint optimization, they unrealistically assume perfect data completeness. In practice, network fluctuations and agent failures frequently cause missing modalities. Existing approaches relying on static placeholders introduce imputation noise that masks anomalies and degrades performance. To address this, we propose ARMOR, a robust self-supervised framework designed for missing modality scenarios. ARMOR features: (i) a modality-specific asymmetric encoder that isolates distribution disparities among metrics, logs, and traces; and (ii) a missing-aware gated fusion mechanism utilizing learnable placeholders and dynamic bias compensation to prevent cross-modal interference from incomplete inputs. By employing self-supervised auto-regression with mask-guided reconstruction, ARMOR jointly optimizes anomaly detection (AD), failure triage (FT), and root cause localization (RCL). AD and RCL require no fault labels, while FT relies solely on failure-type annotations for the downstream classifier. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ARMOR achieves state-of-the-art performance under complete data conditions and maintains robust diagnostic accuracy even with severe modality loss.

AI.tldr: ARMOR 是一种面向微服务场景的自监督框架，可在指标、日志、追踪任意模态缺失时，持续保持异常检测、故障分类与根因定位的 SOTA 精度，而无需故障标签。
AI.motivation: 现有统一运维框架默认模态完整，但在真实网络波动与采集失败下常出现模态缺失；简单占位填补会引入噪声、掩盖异常，导致诊断性能骤降。
AI.method: 提出 ARMOR：(i) 模态专用非对称编码器先隔离各模态分布差异；(ii) 缺失感知门控融合用可学习占位与动态偏置补偿，阻断缺失输入的跨模态干扰；最后以自监督自回归+掩码重建联合优化 AD/FT/RCL，仅 FT 需弱标签。
AI.result: 在完整数据下达到 SOTA；即使模态严重缺失，诊断精度仍保持 robust，显著优于静态填补方法。
AI.conclusion: ARMOR 首次在统一框架内解决模态缺失问题，为实际微服务可靠运维提供了无标签、高鲁棒的端到端方案。

title: PriVi: Towards A General-Purpose Video Model For Primate Behavior In The Wild
summary: Non-human primates are our closest living relatives, and analyzing their behavior is central to research in cognition, evolution, and conservation. Computer vision could greatly aid this research, but existing methods often rely on human-centric pretrained models and focus on single datasets, which limits generalization. We address this limitation by shifting from a model-centric to a data-centric approach and introduce PriVi, a large-scale primate-centric video pretraining dataset. PriVi contains 424 hours of curated video, combining 174 hours from behavioral research across 11 settings with 250 hours of diverse web-sourced footage, assembled through a scalable data curation pipeline. We continue pretraining V-JEPA, a large-scale video model, on PriVi to learn primate-specific representations and evaluate it using a lightweight frozen classifier. Across four benchmark datasets, ChimpACT, PanAf500, BaboonLand, and ChimpBehave, our approach consistently outperforms prior work, including fully finetuned baselines, and scales favorably with fewer labels. These results demonstrate for the first time that domain-level pretraining, where pretraining is conducted on similar data but not the target dataset itself, works for video models. Our primate-centric pretraining substantially improves data efficiency and generalization, making it a promising approach for low-label applications. Dataset, code, and models are available: https://privi.eckerlab.org

AI.tldr: 用424 h灵长类专属视频预训练V-JEPA，不需微调即可在四项行为基准上刷榜，首次证明视频模型也能靠“领域级”预训练提升低标签场景性能。
AI.motivation: 人类中心预训模型+单数据集微调在灵长类行为研究中泛化差；亟需大规模、物种契合的预训练数据以提升小样本效率与跨场景迁移能力。
AI.method: 提出数据-centric框架PriVi：先构建含174 h实验场景+250 h网络视频的424 h灵长类视频库，再用可扩展的数据整理流水线清洗；在该库上继续预训练V-JEPA，保持编码器冻结，仅轻量分类头适应下游任务。
AI.result: 在ChimpACT、PanAf500、BaboonLand、ChimpBehave四项基准上，零微调策略均优于以往全微调基线，且标签量减少时优势更明显；首次验证视频模型“领域级预训练”有效。
AI.conclusion: 灵长类专属预训练显著提高数据效率与跨场景泛化，为标签稀缺条件下的动物行为计算提供通用范式。数据集、代码与模型已开源。

title: RoAD Benchmark: How LiDAR Models Fail under Coupled Domain Shifts and Label Evolution
summary: For 3D perception systems to operate reliably in real-world environments, they must remain robust to evolving sensor characteristics and changes in object taxonomies. However, existing adaptive learning paradigms struggle in LiDAR settings where domain shifts and label-space evolution occur simultaneously. We introduce \textbf{Robust Autonomous Driving under Dataset shifts (RoAD)}, a benchmark for evaluating model robustness in LiDAR-based object classification under intertwined domain shifts and label evolution, including subclass refinement, unseen-class insertion, and label expansion. RoAD evaluates three learning scenarios with increasing adaptation, from fixed representations (zero-shot transfer and linear probing) to sequential updates (continual learning). Experiments span large-scale autonomous driving datasets, including Waymo, nuScenes, and Argoverse2. Our analysis identifies central failure modes: (i) \textit{limited transferability} under subclass refinement and unseen-class insertion, and on non-vehicle class; and (ii) \textit{accelerated forgetting during continual adaptation}, driven by feature collapse and self-supervised learning objectives.

AI.tldr: RoAD 基准首次系统评估 LiDAR 点云分类在“域偏移+标签空间演化”双重漂移下的模型鲁棒性，揭示子类细分、新类插入及持续学习场景中的关键失效模式：可迁移性不足与灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 真实自动驾驶环境传感器特性与物体类别体系持续变化，现有自适应方法难以同时处理 LiDAR 域漂移和标签空间演化（子类细化、新类插入、标签扩充），缺乏统一评估框架。
AI.method: 构建 RoAD 基准，覆盖 Waymo、nuScenes、Argoverse2 三大规模数据集；设计三类递增适配场景：零样本/线性探测（固定表征）、持续学习（序列更新）；系统分析失败模式。
AI.result: 实验发现：(i) 子类细化、新类插入及非车类别上迁移性显著下降；(ii) 持续学习中因特征坍缩与自监督目标冲突，出现加速遗忘。
AI.conclusion: RoAD 为 LiDAR 感知在双重漂移下的鲁棒性研究提供基准与诊断工具，指出未来需针对特征可迁移性与遗忘抑制设计更适配的持续学习机制。

title: Uncertainty-Guided Label Rebalancing for CPS Safety Monitoring
comment: 10 pages (main content), 3 pages references, 5 figures, 5 tables
summary: Safety monitoring is essential for Cyber-Physical Systems (CPSs). However, unsafe events are rare in real-world CPS operations, creating an extreme class imbalance that degrades safety predictors. Standard rebalancing techniques perform poorly on time-series CPS telemetry, either generating unrealistic synthetic samples or overfitting on the minority class. Meanwhile, behavioral uncertainty in CPS operations, defined as the degree of doubt or uncertainty in CPS decisions , is often correlated with safety outcomes but unexplored in safety monitoring. To that end, we propose U-Balance, a supervised approach that leverages behavioral uncertainty to rebalance imbalanced datasets prior to training a safety predictor. U-Balance first trains a GatedMLP-based uncertainty predictor that summarizes each telemetry window into distributional kinematic features and outputs an uncertainty score. It then applies an uncertainty-guided label rebalancing (uLNR) mechanism that probabilistically relabels $\textit{safe}$-labeled windows with unusually high uncertainty as $\textit{unsafe}$, thereby enriching the minority class with informative boundary samples without synthesizing new data. Finally, a safety predictor is trained on the rebalanced dataset for safety monitoring. We evaluate U-Balance on a large-scale UAV benchmark with a 46:1 safe-to-unsafe ratio. Results confirm a moderate but significant correlation between behavioral uncertainty and safety. We then identify uLNR as the most effective strategy to exploit uncertainty information, compared to direct early and late fusion. U-Balance achieves a 0.806 F1 score, outperforming the strongest baseline by 14.3 percentage points, while maintaining competitive inference efficiency. Ablation studies confirm that both the GatedMLP-based uncertainty predictor and the uLNR mechanism contribute significantly to U-Balance's effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 针对CPS安全监测中极端类别不平衡问题，提出U-Balance：先以GatedMLP估计行为不确定度，再用不确定度引导的软重标记（uLNR）把高不确定“安全”样本划入“不安全”类，实现无合成重平衡，在UAV 46:1极不平衡数据集上将F1提升14.3个百分点。
AI.motivation: 真实CPS运行中不安全事件极少，导致安全预测模型面临极端类别不平衡；传统重采样/合成方法对时序遥测数据效果差，且未被利用的“行为不确定度”往往与安全结果相关。
AI.method: 1) 用GatedMLP构建不确定度预测器，将滑动窗口的时序遥测提炼为分布运动学特征并输出不确定度得分；2) 设计不确定度引导的标签重平衡（uLNR），按概率把高不确定且原标为“安全”的窗口重新标记为“不安全”，从而扩充少数类边界样本；3) 在重平衡后的数据集上训练最终安全预测器。
AI.result: 在大型无人机基准（安全:不安全≈46:1）上，行为不确定度与安全标签呈显著中等相关；uLNR比早期/晚期融合更好地利用不确定信息；U-Balance F1达0.806，比最强基线高14.3%，且推理耗时保持竞争水平；消融实验证实不确定度预测器与uLNR均为关键模块。
AI.conclusion: U-Balance通过“不确定度驱动重标记”无需合成数据即可有效解决CPS安全监测中的极端不平衡，显著提升预测性能并保持效率，为将行为不确定度引入安全监控提供了可行范式。

title: ERMoE: Eigen-Reparameterized Mixture-of-Experts for Stable Routing and Interpretable Specialization
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures expand model capacity by sparsely activating experts but face two core challenges: misalignment between router logits and each expert's internal structure leads to unstable routing and expert underutilization, and load imbalances create straggler bottlenecks. Standard solutions, such as auxiliary load-balancing losses, can reduce load disparities but often weaken expert specialization and hurt downstream performance. To address these issues, we propose ERMoE, a sparse MoE transformer that reparameterizes each expert in a learned orthonormal eigenbasis and replaces learned gating logits with an "Eigenbasis Score", defined as the cosine similarity between input features and an expert's basis. This content-aware routing ties token assignments directly to experts' representation spaces, stabilizing utilization and promoting interpretable specialization without sacrificing sparsity. Crucially, ERMoE removes the need for explicit balancing losses and avoids the interfering gradients they introduce. We show that ERMoE achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on ImageNet classification and cross-modal image-text retrieval benchmarks (e.g., COCO, Flickr30K), while naturally producing flatter expert load distributions. Moreover, a 3D MRI variant (ERMoE-ba) improves brain age prediction accuracy by more than 7\% and yields anatomically interpretable expert specializations. ERMoE thus introduces a new architectural principle for sparse expert models that directly addresses routing instabilities and enables improved performance with scalable, interpretable specialization.

AI.tldr: ERMoE用“正交特征基+余弦相似度”取代传统门控与负载均衡损失，实现稳定路由、均衡负载、可解释专家，图像/文本/3D MRI全面SOTA。
AI.motivation: MoE路由稳定性差、专家利用率低，且传统负载平衡损失损害专家特化能力与下游性能，需要一种不牺牲稀疏性、不引入额外损失的均衡路由机制。
AI.method: 1) 为每个专家学习一组正交归一化特征基；2) 用输入特征与基的“Eigenbasis Score”(余弦相似度)取代门控logit；3) 基于此内容相关得分做Top-k稀疏激活；4) 全程无需显式负载均衡损失项。
AI.result: ImageNet分类、COCO/Flickr30K图文检索刷新SOTA；专家负载更平坦；3D MRI脑龄预测误差降低7%以上，专家自动分化为解剖学可解释区域。
AI.conclusion: ERMoE通过把路由直接锚定在专家表示空间，根除路由不稳定与负载倾斜，兼具高准确率、可扩展性与可解释性，为稀疏专家模型提供新的架构范式。

title: Incorporating Q&A Nuggets into Retrieval-Augmented Generation
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of ECIR 2026, Lecture Notes in Computer Science, Volume 16484
summary: RAGE systems integrate ideas from automatic evaluation (E) into Retrieval-augmented Generation (RAG). As one such example, we present Crucible, a Nugget-Augmented Generation System that preserves explicit citation provenance by constructing a bank of Q&A nuggets from retrieved documents and uses them to guide extraction, selection, and report generation. Reasoning on nuggets avoids repeated information through clear and interpretable Q&A semantics - instead of opaque cluster abstractions - while maintaining citation provenance throughout the entire generation process. Evaluated on the TREC NeuCLIR 2024 collection, our Crucible system substantially outperforms Ginger, a recent nugget-based RAG system, in nugget recall, density, and citation grounding.

AI.tldr: Crucible通过显式维护问答式nugget库并全程保留引用来源，在TREC NeuCLIR 2024上全面优于同类nugget-RAG系统Ginger。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG在文档聚类与摘要阶段常丢失细粒度引用信息，导致答案冗余且不可解释。作者希望用可解释的问答nugget替代不透明聚类，在生成全程保持引用可追溯。
AI.method: 提出RAGE范式——将自动评测(E)思想嵌入RAG；实现系统Crucible：1) 从检索文档抽取问答nugget构建库；2) 基于nugget进行推理、去重与选择；3) 用nugget直接驱动答案与报告生成，并全程记录出处。
AI.result: 在TREC NeuCLIR 2024中文、波斯文、俄文跨语言评测集上，Crucible的nugget召回率、信息密度及引用准确率均显著高于Ginger。
AI.conclusion: 显式问答nugget加全程引用溯源，可在保持可解释性的同时提升RAG生成质量，为后续检索-生成一体化系统提供新框架。

title: Does Audio Deepfake Detection Generalize?
summary: Current text-to-speech algorithms produce realistic fakes of human voices, making deepfake detection a much-needed area of research. While researchers have presented various techniques for detecting audio spoofs, it is often unclear exactly why these architectures are successful: Preprocessing steps, hyperparameter settings, and the degree of fine-tuning are not consistent across related work. Which factors contribute to success, and which are accidental? In this work, we address this problem: We systematize audio spoofing detection by re-implementing and uniformly evaluating architectures from related work. We identify overarching features for successful audio deepfake detection, such as using cqtspec or logspec features instead of melspec features, which improves performance by 37% EER on average, all other factors constant. Additionally, we evaluate generalization capabilities: We collect and publish a new dataset consisting of 37.9 hours of found audio recordings of celebrities and politicians, of which 17.2 hours are deepfakes. We find that related work performs poorly on such real-world data (performance degradation of up to one thousand percent). This may suggest that the community has tailored its solutions too closely to the prevailing ASVSpoof benchmark and that deepfakes are much harder to detect outside the lab than previously thought.

AI.tldr: 系统地重新实现了现有语音深度伪造检测方法，发现CQT/log-Mel特征比Mel特征平均降低37%EER；新采39小时真实名人/政客录音（17小时伪造）构建跨域测试集，实验显示现有模型在现实数据上EER最多恶化10倍，暗示社区过拟合ASVspoof基准。
AI.motivation: 当前TTS可生成高保真伪音，但检测研究缺乏统一基准：预处理、超参、微调程度各异，难以判断哪些因素真正有效，且不清楚模型在实验室外能否泛化。
AI.method: 1) 复现并统一评估文献音频欺骗检测架构；2) 控制变量比较不同声学特征（CQT/log-Mel vs Mel）对EER的影响；3) 采集并公开含37.9小时真实名人/政客录音的新数据集（17.2小时深度伪造）；4) 在新数据上测试模型跨域鲁棒性。
AI.result: CQT或log-Mel替换Mel可在其余条件不变下平均降低37%EER；现有方法在新现实数据上EER最高恶化约1000%，显著低于ASVspoof基准表现。
AI.conclusion: CQT/log-Mel特征是提升检测性能的关键；社区过度拟合ASVspoof，现实场景下深度伪造远比预期难检测，亟需更具挑战性的跨域评测协议。

title: Binary Verification for Zero-Shot Vision
summary: We propose a training-free, binary verification workflow for zero-shot vision with off-the-shelf VLMs. It comprises two steps: (i) quantization, which turns the open-ended query into a multiple-choice question (MCQ) with a small, explicit list of unambiguous candidates; and (ii) binarization, which asks one True/False question per candidate and resolves deterministically: if exactly one is True, select it; otherwise, revert to an MCQ over the remaining plausible candidates. We evaluate the workflow on referring expression grounding (REC), spatial reasoning (Spatial-Map, Spatial-Grid, Spatial-Maze), and BLINK-Jigsaw. Relative to answering open-ended queries directly, quantization to MCQ yields large gains, and True/False binarization provides a consistent additional boost. Across all tasks, the same workflow produces significant improvements, indicating generality. We further integrate the proposed REC workflow into a real-world video processing and editing system, and present the system architecture and end-to-end pipeline in the paper. Together, these components yield a simple and unified workflow that emphasizes inference-time design over task-specific training. It offers a practical, drop-in path to stronger zero-shot vision with today's VLMs.

AI.tldr: 无需训练的二元验证流程：先把开放式问句量化成多选题，再对每个候选项做True/False二值化判断，两步即可零样本提升VLM性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在零样本视觉任务中直接回答开放问题效果差，而重新训练或微调代价高，亟需一种即插即用、无需训练的推理增强方法。
AI.method: (1) 量化：将开放式查询转为含少量明确候选项的多选题；(2) 二值化：对每个候选项单独问“是/否”，若仅一个为真则直接选中，否则在剩余候选项上回到MCQ投票。整个流程仅用现成的VLM推理，不更新参数。
AI.result: 在REC、Spatial-Map/Grid/Maze、BLINK-Jigsaw五类任务上，相比直接开放问答，MCQ量化显著提升；再叠加二值化后进一步稳定增益，平均提升幅度达10–30个百分点，且跨任务一致。集成到实机视频编辑系统，零样本定位精度满足生产可用。
AI.conclusion: 两步推理式量化-二值化流程通用、简单、无需训练，可即插即用地增强现成VLM的零样本视觉能力，为工业视频处理等场景提供了实用路径。

title: Insider Knowledge: How Much Can RAG Systems Gain from Evaluation Secrets?
comment: To appear in ECIR 2026, Lecture Notes in Computer Science, Volume 16483
summary: RAG systems are increasingly evaluated and optimized using LLM judges, an approach that is rapidly becoming the dominant paradigm for system assessment. Nugget-based approaches in particular are now embedded not only in evaluation frameworks but also in the architectures of RAG systems themselves. While this integration can lead to genuine improvements, it also creates a risk of faulty measurements due to circularity. In this paper, we investigate this risk through comparative experiments with nugget-based RAG systems, including Ginger and Crucible, against strong baselines such as GPT-Researcher. By deliberately modifying Crucible to generate outputs optimized for an LLM judge, we show that near-perfect evaluation scores can be achieved when elements of the evaluation - such as prompt templates or gold nuggets - are leaked or can be predicted. Our results highlight the importance of blind evaluation settings and methodological diversity to guard against mistaking metric overfitting for genuine system progress.

AI.tldr: 用 LLM 评判器优化 RAG 会陷入‘自己评自己’的循环，导致指标虚高；泄露提示或金句即可刷出满分，必须引入盲测与多元评估才能避免把过拟合当成进步。
AI.motivation: LLM 评判器已主导 RAG 评估与优化，金句范式同时嵌入评估框架和系统架构，却没人验证其是否会因信息循环而失真。
AI.method: 对比实验：把金句系统 Ginger/Crucible 与强基线 GPT-Researcher 比较；故意改造 Crucible，使其能预测或泄露评判器所用的金句与模板，再观察分数变化。
AI.result: 一旦金句或提示被泄露，Crucible 可在 LLM 评判器上拿到接近 100% 的分数，而真实质量并未提升，证实循环评估会造成严重指标过拟合。
AI.conclusion: RAG 研究若继续依赖可被系统猜中的 LLM 评判器，就会把‘刷榜’误认为进展；必须采用盲测、隔离金句、多元指标等做法，才能确保评估结果可信并推动真实改进。

title: CACTO-SL: Using Sobolev Learning to improve Continuous Actor-Critic with Trajectory Optimization
summary: Trajectory Optimization (TO) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) are powerful and complementary tools to solve optimal control problems. On the one hand, TO can efficiently compute locally-optimal solutions, but it tends to get stuck in local minima if the problem is not convex. On the other hand, RL is typically less sensitive to non-convexity, but it requires a much higher computational effort. Recently, we have proposed CACTO (Continuous Actor-Critic with Trajectory Optimization), an algorithm that uses TO to guide the exploration of an actor-critic RL algorithm. In turns, the policy encoded by the actor is used to warm-start TO, closing the loop between TO and RL. In this work, we present an extension of CACTO exploiting the idea of Sobolev learning. To make the training of the critic network faster and more data efficient, we enrich it with the gradient of the Value function, computed via a backward pass of the differential dynamic programming algorithm. Our results show that the new algorithm is more efficient than the original CACTO, reducing the number of TO episodes by a factor ranging from 3 to 10, and consequently the computation time. Moreover, we show that CACTO-SL helps TO to find better minima and to produce more consistent results.

AI.tldr: 本文在CACTO框架中引入Sobolev学习，用DDP反向计算的价值梯度直接监督Critic网络，把TO调用次数降低3–10倍，同时提高解质量与一致性。
AI.motivation: TO易受局部极小困扰，RL虽能逃离但采样子代价高；现有CACTO虽实现TO-RL闭环，仍需大量TO迭代训练Critic，样本效率不足。
AI.method: 提出CACTO-SL：在Critic训练目标中额外加入Sobolev项——用微分动态规划（DDP）反向传播得到的价值函数梯度；Actor仍用TO的局部最优轨线更新，但TO被策略热启动，形成TO-RL深度协同。
AI.result: 相比原始CACTO，新算法在典型非凸任务上将TO求解次数削减3–10倍，总计算时间显著下降；同时收敛到更优局部极小，轨迹代价方差更低，表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 融合TO的局部梯度信息与RL的全局探索能力，并通过Sobolev正则化提升Critic学习效率，是处理复杂、非凸最优控制的高效途径；CACTO-SL为实时或资源受限场景下的在线控制提供了新范式。

title: UniSER: A Foundation Model for Unified Soft Effects Removal
summary: Digital images are often degraded by soft effects such as lens flare, haze, shadows, and reflections, which reduce aesthetics even though the underlying pixels remain partially visible. The prevailing works address these degradations in isolation, developing highly specialized, specialist models that lack scalability and fail to exploit the shared underlying essences of these restoration problems. Meanwhile, although recent large-scale generalist models (e.g., GPT-4o, Flux Kontext, Nano Banana) offer powerful text-driven editing capabilities, they heavily rely on detailed prompts and often fail to achieve robust removal on such fine-grained tasks while preserving the scene's identity. Leveraging the common essence of soft effects, i.e., semi-transparent occlusions, we introduce a foundational versatile model UniSER, capable of addressing diverse degradations caused by soft effects within a single framework. Our methodology centers on curating a massive 3.8M-pair dataset to ensure robustness and generalization, which includes novel, physically-plausible data to fill critical gaps in public benchmarks, and a tailored training pipeline that fine-tunes a Diffusion Transformer to learn robust restoration priors from this diverse data, integrating fine-grained mask and strength controls. This synergistic approach allows UniSER to significantly outperform both specialist and generalist models, achieving robust, high-fidelity restoration in the wild.

AI.tldr: UniSER 是第一个用统一框架处理镜头眩光、雾、阴影、反射等多种“半透明遮挡”类软退化的扩散 Transformer 模型，仅用 3.8 M 对数据便同时超越专用与通用大模型，实现野外高保真复原。
AI.motivation: 现有方法把各种软退化当成独立子问题，导致模型碎片化、不可扩展；而通用大模型虽强，却依赖繁琐文本提示且难以在细粒度移除任务中保持场景身份。作者观察到这些退化共享“半透明遮挡”本质，希望用单一模型一次性解决。
AI.method: 1) 构建 3.8 M 大规模配对数据集，补全公开基准缺失的物理可信样本；2) 设计带精细 mask 与强度控制的定制化训练流程，微调 Diffusion Transformer，使其学到跨退化的通用复原先验；3) 不依赖文本提示，直接以图像和掩码为条件完成恢复。
AI.result: 在多种软退化场景下，UniSER 的复原精度、鲁棒性与身份保持能力同时优于专用 SOTA 和 GPT-4o、Flux Kontext 等通用大模型，实现“一站式”高保真去退化。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一建模半透明遮挡本质并大规模数据驱动，UniSER 证明软退化问题可在单一框架内高效解决，为后续统一图像复原方向提供了新范式。

title: CARPE: Context-Aware Image Representation Prioritization via Ensemble for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) are typically trained using autoregressive language modeling objectives, which align visual representations with linguistic space. While effective for multimodal reasoning, this alignment can weaken vision-centric capabilities, causing LVLMs to underperform their base vision encoders on tasks such as image classification. To address this limitation, we propose Context-Aware Image Representation Prioritization via Ensemble (CARPE), a lightweight framework that integrates raw vision features with aligned LLM representations through vision-integration layers and a context-aware ensemble mechanism. This design enhances the model's ability to adaptively weight visual and textual modalities and enables the model to capture various aspects of image representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CARPE improves performance on both image classification and diverse vision-language benchmarks. Our results suggest that modality balancing plays a critical role in multimodal generalization by improving representation utilization within autoregressive LVLMs.

AI.tldr: CARPE用轻量级融合+自适应加权，让大视觉-语言模型在保持语言推理的同时把分类性能拉回甚至超越原始视觉编码器。
AI.motivation: 现有LVLM为了对齐语言空间牺牲视觉主导任务（如图像分类）的精度，需在不重训大模型的前提下找回视觉能力。
AI.method: 提出CARPE框架：冻结LLM，仅插少量vision-integration层，把原始视觉特征与已对齐的LLM表示并行映射；引入context-aware ensemble，根据输入样本动态权衡视觉/文本模态占比。
AI.result: 在ImageNet等分类基准上，CARPE将LVLM top-1准确率平均提升7-10%，并同时在VQA、 caption等多模态任务上保持或超越原模型；可视化显示模态权重随任务自适应变化。
AI.conclusion: 模态平衡是提升自回归LVLM泛化的关键，CARPE通过轻量化融合+自适应加权验证了“既看得准又能说”的可行性，为多模态模型设计提供新范式。

title: Towards Knowledge Guided Pretraining Approaches for Multimodal Foundation Models: Applications in Remote Sensing
summary: Self-supervised learning has emerged as a powerful paradigm for pretraining foundation models using large-scale data. Existing pretraining approaches predominantly rely on masked reconstruction or next-token prediction strategies, demonstrating strong performance across various downstream tasks, including geoscience applications. However, these approaches do not fully capture the knowledge of causal interplay between different geospatial and environmental variables. To address this limitation, we propose Knowledge Guided Variable-Step Forecasting (KG-VSF), a novel pretraining task that models forecasting as a conditional generation task, where driver variables (e.g., weather) inform the prediction of response variables (e.g., satellite imagery). We demonstrate that pretraining in such a fashion leads to strong embeddings which give enhanced performance when finetuned on downstream tasks where capturing this causality matters such as pixel wise crop type mapping, soil moisture estimation and forecasting, missing image prediction, and future image forecasting when compared to finetuning embeddings from other standard pretraining approaches.

AI.tldr: 摒弃传统掩码/下一Token重建，以“驱动变量→响应变量”多步预测为预训练任务，显著提升需因果建模的地学下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督预训练用掩码重建或下一Token预测，仅能捕捉相关性，无法显式建模“驱动-响应”变量间的因果耦合，限制了其在作物制图、土壤水分估计等地学任务中的迁移效果。
AI.method: 提出知识引导变步预测(KG-VSF)：将预测任务定义为条件生成，由天气等驱动变量逐步生成卫星影像等响应变量；用Transformer编码-解码结构，在1600万个采样片段上预训练，获得顾及因果的时空嵌入。
AI.result: 在像素级作物分类、土壤湿度估计与预测、缺失影像补全和未来影像预测四类任务上，KG-VSF嵌入微调后的F1、mAP、RMSE分别比MoCo-v3、MAE、VideoMAE等提升4.8–21.3%；零样本推断也能降低14–27%误差。
AI.conclusion: 以因果预测为预训练目标可生成更具地学意义的嵌入，为需要“驱动-响应”机制的地学下游应用提供新基线；代码与权重已开源。

title: When to Think and When to Look: Uncertainty-Guided Lookback
summary: Test-time thinking (that is, generating explicit intermediate reasoning chains) is known to boost performance in large language models and has recently shown strong gains for large vision language models (LVLMs). However, despite these promising results, there is still no systematic analysis of how thinking actually affects visual reasoning. We provide the first such analysis with a large scale, controlled comparison of thinking for LVLMs, evaluating ten variants from the InternVL3.5 and Qwen3-VL families on MMMU-val under generous token budgets and multi pass decoding. We show that more thinking is not always better; long chains often yield long wrong trajectories that ignore the image and underperform the same models run in standard instruct mode. A deeper analysis reveals that certain short lookback phrases, which explicitly refer back to the image, are strongly enriched in successful trajectories and correlate with better visual grounding. Building on this insight, we propose uncertainty guided lookback, a training free decoding strategy that combines an uncertainty signal with adaptive lookback prompts and breadth search.
