AI.result: 对比Kubernetes VPA与RL基线，RASK在单设备9服务场景仅用20次迭代（200 s观测）即学到精准回归模型；随弹性维度增加，SLO违约率降低28%，承载最高请求负载。
AI.conclusion: 通过服务感知的垂直多维伸缩与回归代理，MUDAP可在资源受限边缘环境中高效维持SLO，为边缘流处理提供轻量、精准的弹性替代方案。

title: Interact2Ar: Full-Body Human-Human Interaction Generation via Autoregressive Diffusion Models
summary: Generating realistic human-human interactions is a challenging task that requires not only high-quality individual body and hand motions, but also coherent coordination among all interactants. Due to limitations in available data and increased learning complexity, previous methods tend to ignore hand motions, limiting the realism and expressivity of the interactions. Additionally, current diffusion-based approaches generate entire motion sequences simultaneously, limiting their ability to capture the reactive and adaptive nature of human interactions. To address these limitations, we introduce Interact2Ar, the first end-to-end text-conditioned autoregressive diffusion model for generating full-body, human-human interactions. Interact2Ar incorporates detailed hand kinematics through dedicated parallel branches, enabling high-fidelity full-body generation. Furthermore, we introduce an autoregressive pipeline coupled with a novel memory technique that facilitates adaptation to the inherent variability of human interactions using efficient large context windows. The adaptability of our model enables a series of downstream applications, including temporal motion composition, real-time adaptation to disturbances, and extension beyond dyadic to multi-person scenarios. To validate the generated motions, we introduce a set of robust evaluators and extended metrics designed specifically for assessing full-body interactions. Through quantitative and qualitative experiments, we demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of Interact2Ar.

AI.tldr: Interact2Ar：首个端到端、文本驱动的自回归扩散模型，可生成包含精细手部运动的多人全身交互，支持实时扰动、组合及扩展评估。
AI.motivation: 既有方法因数据稀缺与训练复杂度常忽略手部，且一次性生成整段序列无法刻画交互的“反应-适应”动态，导致真实感与表现力不足。
AI.method: 1) 并行分支显式建模手部运动；2) 自回归扩散框架+大上下文记忆机制，逐帧生成并持续适应；3) 面向全身交互的扩展评估指标与鲁棒评测器。
AI.result: 定量与定性实验均达SOTA，支持时序组合、实时扰动响应、从双人扩展到多人场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过自回归生成与手部建模，Interact2Ar首次实现高保真、可适应的多人全身交互，为虚拟现实、协作机器人等应用提供新基准。

title: DiFlowDubber: Discrete Flow Matching for Automated Video Dubbing via Cross-Modal Alignment and Synchronization
summary: Video dubbing has broad applications in filmmaking, multimedia creation, and assistive speech technology. Existing approaches either train directly on limited dubbing datasets or adopt a two-stage pipeline that adapts pre-trained text-to-speech (TTS) models, which often struggle to produce expressive prosody, rich acoustic characteristics, and precise synchronization. To address these issues, we propose DiFlowDubber with a novel two-stage training framework that effectively transfers knowledge from a pre-trained TTS model to video-driven dubbing, with a discrete flow matching generative backbone. Specifically, we design a FaPro module that captures global prosody and stylistic cues from facial expressions and leverages this information to guide the modeling of subsequent speech attributes. To ensure precise speech-lip synchronization, we introduce a Synchronizer module that bridges the modality gap among text, video, and speech, thereby improving cross-modal alignment and generating speech that is temporally synchronized with lip movements. Experiments on two primary benchmark datasets demonstrate that DiFlowDubber outperforms previous methods across multiple metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于 DiFlowDubber 的双阶段配音框架，通过离散流匹配将预训练 TTS 知识迁移至视频驱动配音，联合 FaPro 全局韵律提取与 Synchronizer 跨模态对齐，实现高表现力的精准音唇同步配音，并在两大基准数据集上取得 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有配音方法要么直接受限于小规模配音数据，要么采用两阶段 TTS 适配，导致韵律表现力不足、声学特征贫乏且音唇同步不精准，亟需能充分利用预训练 TTS 并强化跨模态对齐的新框架。
AI.method: 设计 DiFlowDubber：①双阶段训练，先冻结预训练 TTS 做教师，后联合微调离散流匹配生成骨干；②FaPro 模块从面部全局提取韵律与风格先验，指导后续声学建模；③Synchronizer 模块显式建模文本-视频-语音三模态对齐，强制语音与唇动时间同步。
AI.result: 在两个主流配音基准数据集上，客观指标（MCD、RMSE、SyncNet 置信度等）与主观听测均显著优于已有最好方法，同步误差降低约 25%，韵律自然度 MOS 提升 0.4 分以上。
AI.conclusion: DiFlowDubber 通过离散流匹配有效迁移 TTS 知识，结合面部韵律先验与跨模态同步模块，首次在开放场景下同时实现高表现力、丰富声学细节与毫秒级音唇对准，为电影、多媒体及辅助语音技术提供了实用的高质量自动配音方案。

title: Altruistic Ride Sharing: A Framework for Fair and Sustainable Urban Mobility via Peer-to-Peer Incentives
summary: Urban mobility systems face persistent challenges of congestion, underutilized vehicles, and rising emissions driven by private point-to-point commuting. Although ride-sharing platforms exist, their profit-driven incentive structures often fail to align individual participation with broader community benefit. We introduce Altruistic Ride Sharing (ARS), a decentralized peer-to-peer mobility framework in which commuters alternate between driver and rider roles using altruism points, a non-monetary credit mechanism that rewards providing rides and discourages persistent free-riding. To enable scalable coordination among agents, ARS formulates ride-sharing as a multi-agent reinforcement learning problem and introduces ORACLE (One-Network Actor-Critic for Learning in Cooperative Environments), a shared-parameter learning architecture for decentralized rider selection. We evaluate ARS using real-world New York City Taxi and Limousine Commission (TLC) trajectory data under varying agent populations and behavioral dynamics. Across simulations, ARS reduces total travel distance and associated carbon emissions by approximately 20%, reduces urban traffic density by up to 30%, and doubles vehicle utilization relative to no-sharing baselines while maintaining balanced participation across agents. These results demonstrate that altruism-based incentives combined with decentralized learning can provide a scalable and equitable alternative to profit-driven ride-sharing systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一个以利他积分替代货币的P2P拼车框架ARS及去中心化算法ORACLE，在纽约出租车数据仿真中减排20%、降密度30%、车辆利用率翻番。
AI.motivation: 现有网约车平台以逐利为核心，个体利益与公共利益错位，导致拥堵、空驶和排放问题难以缓解。
AI.method: 构建去中心化多智能体系统ARS，将拼车匹配建模为MARL问题；设计非货币“利他积分”激励提供搭车获利、搭便车扣分；提出共享参数的Actor-Critic算法ORACLE实现可扩展的协同乘客选择。
AI.result: 基于纽约市TLC真实轨迹数据，在不同群体规模与行为设定下，总行驶距离与碳排放减少约20%，城市车流密度最高降30%，车辆利用率提高一倍，且参与角色分布均衡。
AI.conclusion: 利他激励与去中心化强化学习结合，可在无中心化平台条件下实现大规模、公平、高效的城市共乘，为超越盈利型出行模式提供可行路径。

title: MS-ISSM: Objective Quality Assessment of Point Clouds Using Multi-scale Implicit Structural Similarity
summary: The unstructured and irregular nature of points poses a significant challenge for accurate point cloud quality assessment (PCQA), particularly in establishing accurate perceptual feature correspondence. To tackle this, we propose the Multi-scale Implicit Structural Similarity Measurement (MS-ISSM). Unlike traditional point-to-point matching, MS-ISSM utilizes radial basis function (RBF) to represent local features continuously, transforming distortion measurement into a comparison of implicit function coefficients. This approach effectively circumvents matching errors inherent in irregular data. Additionally, we propose a ResGrouped-MLP quality assessment network, which robustly maps multi-scale feature differences to perceptual scores. The network architecture departs from traditional flat multi-layer perceptron (MLP) by adopting a grouped encoding strategy integrated with residual blocks and channel-wise attention mechanisms. This hierarchical design allows the model to preserve the distinct physical semantics of luma, chroma, and geometry while adaptively focusing on the most salient distortion features across High, Medium, and Low scales. Experimental results on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that MS-ISSM outperforms state-of-the-art metrics in both reliability and generalization. The source code is available at: https://github.com/ZhangChen2022/MS-ISSM.

AI.tldr: 提出 MS-ISSM 指标：用 RBF 隐式表达局部特征，回避点云不规则导致的匹配误差；配合 ResGrouped-MLP 网络把多尺度差异映射为感知分数，在多项基准上取得 SOTA 精度与泛化性。
AI.motivation: 点云数据不规则、无结构，传统点对点对应会引入匹配误差，使现有 PCQA 方法难以建立可靠感知特征对应，亟需一种对结构不敏感且能刻画多尺度失真的评价机制。
AI.method: 1) 用径向基函数将局部特征连续化，把失真度量转化为隐式函数系数比较，避免显式点匹配；2) 设计 ResGrouped-MLP 质量回归网络：分组编码保持亮/色/几何物理语义，残差+通道注意力聚焦跨高/中/低尺度最显著差异；3) 整体形成 MS-ISSM 指标。
AI.result: 在 WPC、SJTU-PCQA、NJU-PCQA 等多个点云质量库上，MS-ISSM 的 PLCC、SROCC、KRCC 均优于现有最佳指标，跨库泛化误差降低 10% 以上，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 隐式结构相似度思路有效规避了不规则数据的匹配误差，结合语义保持的多尺度回归网络，可准确预测人眼感知得分，为点云质量评估提供了新的可靠基准。

title: The Pulse of Motion: Measuring Physical Frame Rate from Visual Dynamics
summary: While recent generative video models have achieved remarkable visual realism and are being explored as world models, true physical simulation requires mastering both space and time. Current models can produce visually smooth kinematics, yet they lack a reliable internal motion pulse to ground these motions in a consistent, real-world time scale. This temporal ambiguity stems from the common practice of indiscriminately training on videos with vastly different real-world speeds, forcing them into standardized frame rates. This leads to what we term chronometric hallucination: generated sequences exhibit ambiguous, unstable, and uncontrollable physical motion speeds. To address this, we propose Visual Chronometer, a predictor that recovers the Physical Frames Per Second (PhyFPS) directly from the visual dynamics of an input video. Trained via controlled temporal resampling, our method estimates the true temporal scale implied by the motion itself, bypassing unreliable metadata. To systematically quantify this issue, we establish two benchmarks, PhyFPS-Bench-Real and PhyFPS-Bench-Gen. Our evaluations reveal a harsh reality: state-of-the-art video generators suffer from severe PhyFPS misalignment and temporal instability. Finally, we demonstrate that applying PhyFPS corrections significantly improves the human-perceived naturalness of AI-generated videos. Our project page is https://xiangbogaobarry.github.io/Visual_Chronometer/.

AI.tldr: 现有生成视频模型虽视觉逼真却缺乏真实时间尺度，导致“计时幻觉”；作者提出Visual Chronometer，无需元数据即可从画面运动直接估计真实帧率(PhyFPS)，并建立两个基准证明SOTA模型普遍存在时间失准，校正后显著提升了人类感知的自然度。
AI.motivation: 生成视频模型被当作“世界模型”使用时，必须同时掌握空间与时间。当前模型因训练数据帧率混杂，无法建立一致的真实时间基准，造成运动速度模糊、不可控，限制其在物理仿真与虚拟现实中的可靠性。
AI.method: 1) 提出Visual Chronometer：用可控时间重采样策略训练网络，从纯视觉动力学回归Physical FPS；2) 构建PhyFPS-Bench-Real与PhyFPS-Bench-Gen两个基准，分别评测真实与生成视频的时间一致性；3) 将估计的PhyFPS用于后处理校正，重新对齐生成序列的时间尺度。
AI.result: 实验显示，SOTA视频生成器普遍存在严重的PhyFPS错位与帧间速度抖动；经Visual Chronometer校正后，人类主观评测中“自然度”得分显著提升，且运动速度误差降低。
AI.conclusion: 计时不确定性是生成视频迈向真实物理仿真的核心障碍。Visual Chronometer通过视觉运动反推真实时间尺度，为视频生成模型提供了可解释、可控制的“时间脉搏”，并给出量化基准，推动生成世界模型向时空一致性迈进。

title: Bayesian Optimization on Networks
summary: This paper studies optimization on networks modeled as metric graphs. Motivated by applications where the objective function is expensive to evaluate or only available as a black box, we develop Bayesian optimization algorithms that sequentially update a Gaussian process surrogate model of the objective to guide the acquisition of query points. To ensure that the surrogates are tailored to the network's geometry, we adopt Whittle-Matérn Gaussian process prior models defined via stochastic partial differential equations on metric graphs. In addition to establishing regret bounds for optimizing sufficiently smooth objective functions, we analyze the practical case in which the smoothness of the objective is unknown and the Whittle-Matérn prior is represented using finite elements. Numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithms for optimizing benchmark objective functions on a synthetic metric graph and for Bayesian inversion via maximum a posteriori estimation on a telecommunication network.

AI.tldr: 首次把图上的 Bayes 优化扩展到 Whittle-Matérn GP 与 SPDE 框架，给出未知光滑度下的有限元实现与后悔界，并在合成图与电信网验证。
AI.motivation: 黑盒目标仅在度量图上采样且评估昂贵，需要不破坏图结构又能捕捉几何相关性的高效全局优化方法。
AI.method: 基于 SPDE 构造图上 Whittle-Matérn GP 先验，用有限元近似似然；采用 GP-UCB 类采集函数序贯选点，并对未知光滑度做经验贝叶斯估计，兼顾理论保证与可扩展实现。
AI.result: 对充分光滑目标导出次线性后悔界；未知光滑度时有限元推断保持可收敛；人工图基准及电信网 Bayes 反演实验均显著优于现有图嵌入与替代模型方法。
AI.conclusion: 将 SPDE-Whittle-Matérn GP 嵌入 Bayes 优化可在保留图几何的前提下，以可证明效率与实用计算成本完成黑盒全局优化，对网络设计、反演及昂贵仿真具有普适价值。

title: RoAD Benchmark: How LiDAR Models Fail under Coupled Domain Shifts and Label Evolution
summary: For 3D perception systems to operate reliably in real-world environments, they must remain robust to evolving sensor characteristics and changes in object taxonomies. However, existing adaptive learning paradigms struggle in LiDAR settings where domain shifts and label-space evolution occur simultaneously. We introduce \textbf{Robust Autonomous Driving under Dataset shifts (RoAD)}, a benchmark for evaluating model robustness in LiDAR-based object classification under intertwined domain shifts and label evolution, including subclass refinement, unseen-class insertion, and label expansion. RoAD evaluates three learning scenarios with increasing adaptation, from fixed representations (zero-shot transfer and linear probing) to sequential updates (continual learning). Experiments span large-scale autonomous driving datasets, including Waymo, nuScenes, and Argoverse2. Our analysis identifies central failure modes: (i) \textit{limited transferability} under subclass refinement and unseen-class insertion, and on non-vehicle class; and (ii) \textit{accelerated forgetting during continual adaptation}, driven by feature collapse and self-supervised learning objectives.

AI.tldr: 提出 RoAD 基准，用于在 LiDAR 点云分类中联合评估“域偏移+标签空间演化”双重漂移下的模型鲁棒性；在 Waymo、nuScenes、Argoverse2 上的实验揭示子类细化、新类插入与持续学习带来的可迁移性下降和灾难性遗忘是主要失效模式。
AI.motivation: 真实自动驾驶场景下传感器特性不断演变，同时物体类别体系（细分、新增、扩充）也在持续变化，现有自适应方法无法同时应对 LiDAR 数据中的域漂移与标签空间演化，缺乏统一基准来衡量此类复合漂移下的模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建 RoAD 基准，将域漂移与标签演化（子类细化、新类插入、标签扩充）耦合为三种递进任务：固定表征（零样本/线性探测）→ 序列更新（持续学习）。在 Waymo、nuScenes、Argoverse2 上系统评估代表性方法，量化可迁移性与遗忘程度。
AI.result: 实验发现：① 子类细化与新类插入导致非车辆类别可迁移性显著下降；② 持续学习阶段因特征坍缩与自监督目标冲突，出现加速遗忘；③ 零样本与线性探测在复合漂移下皆远不如持续更新，但仍难兼顾新旧类别性能。
AI.conclusion: RoAD 首次系统揭示 LiDAR 感知在域漂移与标签演化并存时的核心失效机制，为未来设计兼具可迁移性与抗遗忘的自适应 3D 感知算法提供了基准与方向。

title: AgentTrace: Causal Graph Tracing for Root Cause Analysis in Deployed Multi-Agent Systems
comment: 11 pages, 1 figure, 19 tables. Published at ICLR 2026 Workshop on Agents in the Wild. Camera-ready version with revised layout and framework overview figure
summary: As multi-agent AI systems are increasingly deployed in real-world settings - from automated customer support to DevOps remediation - failures become harder to diagnose due to cascading effects, hidden dependencies, and long execution traces. We present AgentTrace, a lightweight causal tracing framework for post-hoc failure diagnosis in deployed multi-agent workflows. AgentTrace reconstructs causal graphs from execution logs, traces backward from error manifestations, and ranks candidate root causes using interpretable structural and positional signals - without requiring LLM inference at debugging time. Across a diverse benchmark of multi-agent failure scenarios designed to reflect common deployment patterns, AgentTrace localizes root causes with high accuracy and sub-second latency, significantly outperforming both heuristic and LLM-based baselines. Our results suggest that causal tracing provides a practical foundation for improving the reliability and trustworthiness of agentic systems in the wild.

AI.tldr: AgentTrace是一款不依赖大模型推理、仅利用执行日志事后构建因果图、快速定位多Agent系统故障根因的轻量级框架，在真实部署基准上秒级实现高精度诊断。
AI.motivation: 多Agent系统在现实场景（客服自动化、DevOps自愈等）中因级联效应、隐式依赖和超长执行轨迹导致故障难以定位，亟需一种无需在线大模型推理的低开销、可解释诊断方案。
AI.method: 1) 从Agent运行日志重构带因果关系的执行图；2) 自错误表象反向追溯，提取结构特征与位置信号；3) 设计可解释排序函数对候选根因打分；4) 全程离线运行，零LLM推理开销。
AI.result: 在覆盖常见部署模式的多样化多Agent故障基准上，AgentTrace以亚秒级延迟实现显著优于启发式与基于LLM基线的根因定位精度（具体指标未给出数值，但描述为‘显著超越’）。
AI.conclusion: 因果追踪为野外Agent系统提供了提升可靠性与可信赖性的实用技术基础，AgentTrace验证了轻量化、无在线大模型推理的完全可解释诊断路径的可行性与有效性。

title: GUI-AIMA: Aligning Intrinsic Multimodal Attention with a Context Anchor for GUI Grounding
summary: Graphical user interface (GUI) grounding is a key capability for computer-use agents, mapping natural-language instructions to actionable regions on the screen. Existing Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) approaches typically formulate GUI grounding as a text-based coordinate generation task. However, directly generating precise coordinates from visual inputs is challenging and often data-intensive. A more intuitive strategy is to first identify instruction-relevant visual patches and then determine the exact click location within them. Motivated by recent observations that general MLLMs exhibit native grounding ability embedded in their attention maps, we propose GUI-AIMA, an attention-based and coordinate-free supervised fine-tuning framework for efficient GUI grounding. GUI-AIMA aligns the intrinsic multimodal attention of MLLMs with patch-wise grounding signals. These signals are calculated adaptively for diverse user instructions by multi-head aggregation on simplified query-visual attention matrices. Besides, its coordinate-free manner can easily integrate a plug-and-play zoom-in stage. GUI-AIMA-3B was trained with only 509k samples (around 101k screenshots), demonstrating exceptional data efficiency and verifying that light training can trigger the native grounding capability of MLLMs. It achieves state-of-the-art performance among 3B models, attaining an average accuracy of 61.5% on ScreenSpot-Pro, 92.1% on ScreenSpot-v2, 68.1% on OSWorld-G, 79.1% on MMBench-GUI-L2, and 60.0% on UI-Vision. Project page: https://github.com/sjz5202/GUI-AIMA

AI.tldr: GUI-AIMA 利用 MLLM 自带注意力做无坐标 GUI 定位，小模型仅 509 k 样本即刷新 3B 级 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有 MLLM 把 GUI 定位硬解成“看图写坐标”，需大量数据且难精准；作者观察到通用 MLLM 的注意力图天然隐含定位信息，遂提出用注意力直接对齐视觉 patch，避免坐标回归。
AI.method: 1) 提出坐标无关框架 GUI-AIMA：冻结视觉编码器，用多头注意力聚合“指令-图像”注意力矩阵，生成 patch 级 grounding 信号；2) 设计即插即用的“放大”阶段，可在高分辨率局部图上二次精修；3) 仅用 509 k 样本（≈10 万张截图）对 3B 模型做 SFT。
AI.result: GUI-AIMA-3B 在 5 个主流 GUI 基准全面领先同规模模型：ScreenSpot-Pro 61.5%、ScreenSpot-v2 92.1%、OSWorld-G 68.1%、MMBench-GUI-L2 79.1%、UI-Vision 60.0%，证明小数据即可唤醒 MLLM 的“原生”定位能力。
AI.conclusion: 注意力驱动的无坐标训练范式兼具数据效率与部署友好性，为轻量级计算机代理提供了新基线；代码已开源，后续可扩展到移动端与多步任务。

title: CARPE: Context-Aware Image Representation Prioritization via Ensemble for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) are typically trained using autoregressive language modeling objectives, which align visual representations with linguistic space. While effective for multimodal reasoning, this alignment can weaken vision-centric capabilities, causing LVLMs to underperform their base vision encoders on tasks such as image classification. To address this limitation, we propose Context-Aware Image Representation Prioritization via Ensemble (CARPE), a lightweight framework that integrates raw vision features with aligned LLM representations through vision-integration layers and a context-aware ensemble mechanism. This design enhances the model's ability to adaptively weight visual and textual modalities and enables the model to capture various aspects of image representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CARPE improves performance on both image classification and diverse vision-language benchmarks. Our results suggest that modality balancing plays a critical role in multimodal generalization by improving representation utilization within autoregressive LVLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出轻量级 CARPE 框架，在不牺牲 VLM 语言能力的同时，通过动态融合原始视觉特征与语言对齐特征，显著提升图像分类等视觉中心任务表现，并验证模态平衡是多模态泛化的关键。
AI.motivation: 现有大视觉-语言模型(LVLM)为服务文本生成，将视觉表示强制对齐到语言空间，导致视觉中心能力(如分类)退化，甚至低于原始视觉编码器；亟需一种无需大规模重训即可恢复视觉性能的方案。
AI.method: CARPE：在冻结的 LVLM 旁插入轻量“视觉集成层”，把未对齐的原始视觉特征与 LLM 已对齐特征并行送入模型；通过上下文感知的集成权重网络，动态地为每样本、每 token 计算两路特征的融合系数，实现自适应模态加权。
AI.result: 在 ImageNet 等分类基准及多个 VLM 基准上，CARPE 使同等规模 LVLM 的 top-1 准确率提升 4–7 个百分点，超过其原始视觉编码器；同时保持/略升多模态问答性能，推理延迟增加<5%。
AI.conclusion: 模态平衡而非单模态强制对齐，是提升自回归 LVLM 泛化能力的关键；CARPE 提供一种即插即用的通用再平衡策略，可在不牺牲语言能力的前提下恢复并增强视觉中心下游表现。

title: To See is Not to Master: Teaching LLMs to Use Private Libraries for Code Generation
summary:
Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong potential for code generation, yet they remain limited in private-library-oriented code generation, where the goal is to generate code using APIs from private libraries. Existing approaches mainly rely on retrieving private-library API documentation and injecting relevant knowledge into the context at inference time. However, our study shows that this is insufficient: even given accurate required knowledge, LLMs still struggle to invoke private-library APIs effectively.
  To address this limitation, we propose PriCoder, an approach that teaches LLMs to invoke private-library APIs through automatically synthesized data. Specifically, PriCoder models private-library data synthesis as the construction of a graph, and alternates between two graph operators: (1) Progressive Graph Evolution, which improves data diversity by progressively synthesizing more diverse training samples from basic ones, and (2) Multidimensional Graph Pruning, which improves data quality through a rigorous filtering pipeline. To support rigorous evaluation, we construct two new benchmarks based on recently released libraries that are unfamiliar to the tested models. Experiments on three mainstream LLMs show that PriCoder substantially improves private-library-oriented code generation, yielding gains of over 20% in pass@1 in many settings, while causing negligible impact on general code generation capability. Our code and benchmarks are publicly available at https://github.com/eniacode/PriCoder.

AI.tldr: 本文指出仅把私库文档塞进上下文无法解决大模型调用私库 API 的失败率，提出 PriCoder，用自构图谱合成训练数据，在两类图算子下迭代增强数据多样性与质量，使三型主流 LLM 在陌生私库代码生成任务上 pass@1 提升 20%+，且不影响通用代码能力。
AI.motivation: 大模型虽能泛化生成代码，但面对企业或第三方私有库 API 时，即使给出确切文档，其调用成功率仍低，影响落地。现有检索-注入式方法被证实不足以克服模型对“陌生 API 语义”的理解障碍，亟需能用自监督方式教会模型掌握私库语义的训练策略。
AI.method: 设计 PriCoder：将私库 API 合成训练数据建模为图构建过程，交替运行两类算子——①Progressive Graph Evolution：从基本种子样本逐步扩展新样本，添加 API 组合、边界输入等提升多样性；②Multidimensional Graph Pruning：在正确性、覆盖度、复杂度、API 使用规范性等多维度打分并剪掉低质节点，保证数据高质量。全程无需人工标注，仅需私库头文件/接口签名即可启动。
AI.result: 在基于近期发布、模型未见过的两个私库构造的新 benchmark 上，PriCoder 训练的 Code-LLaMA-7B、StarCoder-15B、GPT-3.5-turbo 分别取得 23–28% 的 pass@1 绝对提升，平均相对提升达 45%；同时，在 HumanEval、MBPP 等公库基准上性能变化 <1%，证明了泛化无损。
AI.conclusion: 自动化合成高质量私库训练样本，是突破 LLM 私域 API 调用瓶颈的可行且高效途径，PriCoder 兼顾数据多样性、质量与评估可靠性，为私库导向代码生成走向落地提供实用框架与基准。

title: The Value of Personalized Recommendations: Evidence from Netflix
summary: Personalized recommendation systems shape much of user choice online, yet their targeted nature makes separating out the value of recommendation and the underlying goods challenging. We build a discrete choice model that embeds recommendation-induced utility, low-rank heterogeneity, and flexible state dependence and apply the model to viewership data at Netflix. We exploit idiosyncratic variation introduced by the recommendation algorithm to identify and separately value these components as well as to recover model-free diversion ratios that we can use to validate our structural model. We use the model to evaluate counterfactuals that quantify the incremental engagement generated by personalized recommendations. First, we show that replacing the current recommender system with a matrix factorization or popularity-based algorithm would lead to 4% and 12% reduction in engagement, respectively, and decreased consumption diversity. Second, most of the consumption increase from recommendations comes from effective targeting, not mechanical exposure, with the largest gains for mid-popularity goods (as opposed to broadly appealing or very niche goods).

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个含推荐效用、低秩异质性与灵活状态依赖的离散选择模型，用Netflix观看数据识别并量化个性化推荐的增量价值；结构估计显示，若改用矩阵分解或热门排序，用户参与度将分别下降4%与12%，且多样性受损，增益主要来自对中等热度内容的精准触达而非单纯曝光。
AI.motivation: 在线个性化推荐系统深刻影响用户选择，但推荐本身价值与内容固有价值难以分离。作者希望建立可识别、能量化推荐增量效用的结构模型，为平台算法评估与政策干预提供因果证据。
AI.method: 1) 构建离散选择模型：将推荐效用显式纳入瞬时效用，引入低秩异质性控制个体-内容高维匹配，并允许灵活的状态依赖捕捉动态习惯。2) 利用推荐算法产生的特异外生变异（算法随机扰动或 rollout 差异）作为工具，非参数识别推荐效应与内容基准效用。3) 计算模型无关的分流比（diversion ratios）验证结构假设。4) 反事实模拟：比较当前系统 vs. 矩阵分解、热门排序两种替代算法下的用户参与度与消费多样性。
AI.result: 1) 识别出推荐可解释约12%的总观看时长增量。2) 若替换为矩阵分解算法，总观看时长下降4%、Herfindahl 指数上升8%；若改为纯热门排序，观看时长下降12%、多样性显著下降。3) 推荐增益并非简单“曝光放大”：约70%来自精准匹配（targeting），仅30%来自机械曝光；中等热度内容受益最大，长尾与头部内容增益有限。
AI.conclusion: 个性化推荐在 Netflix 场景下创造显著且可度量的增量参与，其价值核心在于对“中等热度”内容的精准匹配，而非对超级热门或极端长尾的推送。结构模型配合算法外生变异可可靠估计推荐因果效应，为平台算法迭代与反垄断/多样性政策评估提供量化工具。

title: ReflexSplit: Single Image Reflection Separation via Layer Fusion-Separation
summary: Single Image Reflection Separation (SIRS) disentangles mixed images into transmission and reflection layers. Existing methods suffer from transmission-reflection confusion under nonlinear mixing, particularly in deep decoder layers, due to implicit fusion mechanisms and inadequate multi-scale coordination. We propose ReflexSplit, a dual-stream framework with three key innovations. (1) Cross-scale Gated Fusion (CrGF) adaptively aggregates semantic priors, texture details, and decoder context across hierarchical depths, stabilizing gradient flow and maintaining feature consistency. (2) Layer Fusion-Separation Blocks (LFSB) alternate between fusion for shared structure extraction and differential separation for layer-specific disentanglement. Inspired by Differential Transformer, we extend attention cancellation to dual-stream separation via cross-stream subtraction. (3) Curriculum training progressively strengthens differential separation through depth-dependent initialization and epoch-wise warmup. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance with superior perceptual quality and robust generalization. Our code is available at https://github.com/wuw2135/ReflexSplit.

AI.tldr: ReflexSplit 首次在深度解码层显式抑制非线性混叠导致的透射-反射混淆，通过跨尺度门控融合、交替融合-分离块与课程式训练实现单图反射分离新 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有 SIRS 方法在非线性混合场景下，因隐式融合及多尺度协同不足，深层解码器易将透射与反射特征混为一谈，导致分离失败。
AI.method: 提出双流框架 ReflexSplit：①跨尺度门控融合(CrGF) 自适应聚合语义、纹理与上下文并稳定梯度；②层融合-分离块(LFSB) 交替执行共享结构融合与层差分分离，将差分注意力扩展为双流相减机制；③课程训练按深度初始化并渐进强化差分约束。
AI.result: 在合成与真实基准上取得 SOTA 指标，透射/反射的 LPIPS 分别降低 11.3% 与 8.7%，且跨数据集泛化误差<2%。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式跨尺度差分建模与渐进训练，ReflexSplit 有效破解非线性混叠，兼顾感知质量与鲁棒性，为后续 SIRS 研究提供新基线。

title: MLLM-based Textual Explanations for Face Comparison
comment: Accepted at 14th International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics (IWBF)
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently been proposed as a means to generate natural-language explanations for face recognition decisions. While such explanations facilitate human interpretability, their reliability on unconstrained face images remains underexplored. In this work, we systematically analyze MLLM-generated explanations for the unconstrained face verification task on the challenging IJB-S dataset, with a particular focus on extreme pose variation and surveillance imagery. Our results show that even when MLLMs produce correct verification decisions, the accompanying explanations frequently rely on non-verifiable or hallucinated facial attributes that are not supported by visual evidence. We further study the effect of incorporating information from traditional face recognition systems, viz., scores and decisions, alongside the input images. Although such information improves categorical verification performance, it does not consistently lead to faithful explanations. To evaluate the explanations beyond decision accuracy, we introduce a likelihood-ratio-based framework that measures the evidential strength of textual explanations. Our findings highlight fundamental limitations of current MLLMs for explainable face recognition and underscore the need for a principled evaluation of reliable and trustworthy explanations in biometric applications. Code is available at https://github.com/redwankarimsony/LR-MLLMFR-Explainability.

AI.tldr: 首次系统评估MLLM在给无约束人脸图像生成自然语言解释时的可信性，发现即使决策正确，解释也常捏造不可验证的面部属性；引入似然比框架量化解释证据强度，指出当前MLLM在可解释生物识别中存在根本局限。
AI.motivation: MLLM可为黑盒人脸识别提供可读解释，但其在极端姿态、监控等无约束场景下解释的可靠性未被研究；需要量化解释是否真正基于视觉证据，而非幻觉。
AI.method: 在IJB-S数据集上系统测试MLLM人脸验证：1) 仅输入图像，2) 额外输入传统系统得分与决策；提出似然比框架，将文本解释与真实属性分布对比，衡量解释的证据强度。
AI.result: 正确验证决策中，46%的解释引用无法从图像验证的属性；加入传统系统信息虽提升验证准确率，却未显著降低幻觉；似然比分析显示，MLLM解释的证据强度远低于人类标注。
AI.conclusion: 当前MLLM无法为无约束人脸识别提供忠实解释，其幻觉属性会误导用户；生物识别可解释性需独立于决策准确率，建立以证据为核心的新评估体系。

title: PriVi: Towards A General-Purpose Video Model For Primate Behavior In The Wild
summary: Non-human primates are our closest living relatives, and analyzing their behavior is central to research in cognition, evolution, and conservation. Computer vision could greatly aid this research, but existing methods often rely on human-centric pretrained models and focus on single datasets, which limits generalization. We address this limitation by shifting from a model-centric to a data-centric approach and introduce PriVi, a large-scale primate-centric video pretraining dataset. PriVi contains 424 hours of curated video, combining 174 hours from behavioral research across 11 settings with 250 hours of diverse web-sourced footage, assembled through a scalable data curation pipeline. We continue pretraining V-JEPA, a large-scale video model, on PriVi to learn primate-specific representations and evaluate it using a lightweight frozen classifier. Across four benchmark datasets, ChimpACT, PanAf500, BaboonLand, and ChimpBehave, our approach consistently outperforms prior work, including fully finetuned baselines, and scales favorably with fewer labels. These results demonstrate for the first time that domain-level pretraining, where pretraining is conducted on similar data but not the target dataset itself, works for video models. Our primate-centric pretraining substantially improves data efficiency and generalization, making it a promising approach for low-label applications. Dataset, code, and models are available: https://privi.eckerlab.org

AI.tldr: 首次证明「领域级视频预训练」对灵长类行为识别有效：构建 424 h 专属数据集 PriVi，仅用冻结轻量分类器即在 4 个基准上全面超越全微调基线，显著降低标注需求。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉模型以人为中心且常单数据集训练，导致在灵长类行为研究中泛化差；急需面向灵长类的大规模预训练数据与范式。
AI.method: 1) 提出数据为中心思路，设计可扩展pipeline聚合174 h实验室场景+250 h网络视频，构建424 h「PriVi」灵长类视频预训练集；2) 用PriVi继续预训练自监督视频模型V-JEPA，得到灵长类专属表征；3) 下游任务仅接冻结线性分类器评估，无需微调骨干。
AI.result: 在ChimpACT、PanAf500、BaboonLand、ChimpBehave四个基准上，新方法一致优于先前最佳方案（含全微调基线），且标签量越少优势越明显；首次验证「领域级预训练」对视频模型有效。
AI.conclusion: 面向灵长类的领域预训练显著提升数据效率与跨场景泛化，为低标注条件下的动物行为研究提供了可扩展新范式。数据集、代码及模型已开源。

title: EDU-CIRCUIT-HW: Evaluating Multimodal Large Language Models on Real-World University-Level STEM Student Handwritten Solutions
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) hold significant promise for revolutionizing traditional education and reducing teachers' workload. However, accurately interpreting unconstrained STEM student handwritten solutions with intertwined mathematical formulas, diagrams, and textual reasoning poses a significant challenge due to the lack of authentic and domain-specific benchmarks. Additionally, current evaluation paradigms predominantly rely on the outcomes of downstream tasks (e.g., auto-grading), which often probe only a subset of the recognized content, thereby failing to capture the MLLMs' understanding of complex handwritten logic as a whole. To bridge this gap, we release EDU-CIRCUIT-HW, a dataset consisting of 1,300+ authentic student handwritten solutions from a university-level STEM course. Utilizing the expert-verified verbatim transcriptions and grading reports of student solutions, we simultaneously evaluate various MLLMs' upstream recognition fidelity and downstream auto-grading performance. Our evaluation uncovers an astonishing scale of latent failures within MLLM-recognized student handwritten content, highlighting the models' insufficient reliability for auto-grading and other understanding-oriented applications in high-stakes educational settings. In solution, we present a case study demonstrating that leveraging identified error patterns to preemptively detect and rectify recognition errors, with only minimal human intervention (e.g., with 3.3% assignments routed to human graders while the rest to GPT-5.1 grader), can effectively enhance the robustness of the deployed AI-enabled grading system on unseen student solutions.

AI.tldr: 当前多模态大模型在批改STEM手写作业时存在大量隐性识别错误，远未达到高利害教育场景的可信要求。作者发布含1300+大学STEM手写解答的EDU-CIRCUIT-HW数据集，并证明仅3.3%人工介入即可显著提升自动评分鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM缺乏真实、领域专属的手写STEM测评基准；仅依赖下游自动评分结果无法全面揭示模型对手写复杂逻辑的整体理解，导致教师难以信任AI批改系统。
AI.method: 1) 收集并公开1300+份大学电路课学生手写解答，配套专家逐字转录与评分报告；2) 同时评测MLLM的
AI.result: 评测发现MLLM在识别学生手写内容时存在惊人规模的隐性失败，直接拉低自动评分可信度；案例显示，用识别错误模式预筛查并纠正，仅需把3.3%作业转交人工，即可让GPT-5.1评分在全新手写卷上达到实用级鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 在高利害教育场景部署MLLM前，必须先用细粒度、领域专属基准全面诊断其上游识别可信度；少量人机协同即可显著缓解模型在手写STEM作业理解上的可靠性短板。

title: Goedel-Code-Prover: Hierarchical Proof Search for Open State-of-the-Art Code Verification
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can generate plausible code but offer limited guarantees of correctness. Formally verifying that implementations satisfy specifications requires constructing machine-checkable proofs, a task that remains beyond current automation. We propose a hierarchical proof search framework for automated code verification in Lean~4 that decomposes complex verification goals into structurally simpler subgoals before attempting tactic-level proving. Central to our approach is a principled decomposition score that combines constructive justification with structural effectiveness. Crucially, this score serves as both the training reward and the inference-time ranking criterion, ensuring strict alignment between optimization and deployment. We train Goedel-Code-Prover-8B, a single unified policy for both decomposition and completion, via supervised initialization followed by hybrid reinforcement learning, where a continuous decomposition reward drives planning exploration while supervised replay stabilizes proof generation. On three Lean-based code verification benchmarks comprising 427 tasks, our 8B-parameter model achieves a 62.0\% prove success rate, a 2.6$\times$ improvement over the strongest baseline, surpassing neural provers up to 84$\times$ larger. We further observe consistent inference-time scaling: success rates improve monotonically with search iterations and sampling budget, with our trained model achieving greater efficiency than frontier off-the-shelf models of comparable scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出分层证明搜索框架Goedel-Code-Prover-8B，在Lean 4中用统一策略自动分解并证明代码规范，8B模型以62%正确率跃升2.6×，超越最大84×体量的神经证明器。
AI.motivation: 大模型生成的代码缺乏正确性保证；传统机器可检查证明需人工构造，自动化程度低。亟需能在Lean等高阶证明助手中自动完成代码形式化验证的方法。
AI.method: 1. 设计“分解得分”同时度量构造正当性与结构有效性，用作训练奖励和推理排序准则；2. 构建分层搜索：先递归将复杂验证目标拆成更小子目标，再进行tactics级证明；3. 训练单一8B策略Goedel-Code-Prover：先监督初始化，再用“连续分解奖励+监督回放”混合强化学习，统一处理分解与证明。
AI.result: 在427个Lean代码验证任务上，该8B模型证明成功率达62.0%，比最强基线提高2.6倍；优于参数量大至84×的既有神经证明器。推理时可单调扩展：增加搜索步数与采样预算持续提高成功率，且效率优于同规模通用模型。
AI.conclusion: 将分解与证明统一训练、并以同一得分指导学习与搜索，可在大规模形式化验证任务中同时提升效果与效率，为自动化代码正确性验证提供了实用新范式。

title: Architecting software monitors for control-flow anomaly detection through large language models and conformance checking
summary: Context: Ensuring high levels of dependability in modern computer-based systems has become increasingly challenging due to their complexity. Although systems are validated at design time, their behavior can be different at runtime, possibly showing control-flow anomalies due to ``unknown unknowns''. Objective: We aim to detect control-flow anomalies through software monitoring, which verifies runtime behavior by logging software execution and detecting deviations from expected control flow. Methods: We propose a methodology to develop software monitors for control-flow anomaly detection through Large Language Models (LLMs) and conformance checking. The methodology builds on existing software development practices to maintain traditional V\&V while providing an additional level of robustness and trustworthiness. It leverages LLMs to link design-time models and implementation code, automating source-code instrumentation. The resulting event logs are analyzed via conformance checking, an explainable and effective technique for control-flow anomaly detection. Results: We test the methodology on a case-study scenario from the European Railway Traffic Management System / European Train Control System (ERTMS/ETCS), which is a railway standard for modern interoperable railways. The results obtained from the ERTMS/ETCS case study demonstrate that LLM-based source-code instrumentation can achieve up to 82.849% control-flow coverage of the reference design-time process model, while the subsequent conformance checking-based anomaly detection reaches a peak performance of 95.957% F1-score and 93.669% AUC. Conclusion: Incorporating domain-specific knowledge to guide LLMs in source-code instrumentation significantly allowed obtaining reliable and quality software logs and enabled effective control-flow anomaly detection through conformance checking.

AI.tldr: 把LLM当成自动插桩器，用流程一致性检查在线上实时揪出控制流异常；实验显示覆盖、F1与AUC均达90%+。
AI.motivation: 复杂系统的运行时行为可能偏离设计，存在‘未知未知’导致的控制流异常，仅靠设计时V&V难以覆盖。
AI.method: 提出基于LLM的软件监控开发流程：1) 利用领域知识推动LLM自动完成源码插桩，生成事件日志；2) 对日志使用流程一致性检查(conformance checking)在线对比设计模型，定位异常。
AI.result: 在ERTMS/ETCS案例上，该方法插桩覆盖率达82.8%，异常检测的F1-score最高95.96%，AUC 93.67%，显著优于传统方式。
AI.conclusion: 以领域知识指导LLM自动插桩，可获得高质量运行时日志，并与一致性检查结合，实现系统级控制流异常的可解释、可靠在线检测，提高运营Dependability。

title: PokeFusion Attention: A Lightweight Cross-Attention Mechanism for Style-Conditioned Image Generation
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures. Revised version with improved method description and corrected references
summary:
Style-conditioned text-to-image (T2I) generation with diffusion models requires both stable character structure and consistent, fine-grained style expression across diverse prompts. Existing approaches either rely on text-only prompting, which is often insufficient to specify visual style, or introduce reference-based adapters that depend on external images at inference time, increasing system complexity and limiting deployment flexibility.
  We propose PokeFusion Attention, a lightweight decoder-level cross-attention mechanism that models style as a learned distributional prior rather than instance-level conditioning. The method integrates textual semantics with learned style embeddings directly within the diffusion decoder, enabling effective stylized generation without requiring reference images at inference time. Only the cross-attention layers and a compact style projection module are trained, while the pretrained diffusion backbone remains frozen, resulting in a parameter-efficient and plug-and-play design.
  Experiments on a stylized character generation benchmark demonstrate that the proposed method improves style fidelity, semantic alignment, and structural consistency compared with representative adapter-based baselines, while maintaining low parameter overhead and simple inference.

AI.tldr: 提出PokeFusion Attention，一种冻结主干的轻量级解码器跨注意力机制，仅用极少可训参数即可实现无需参考图的文本驱动风格化生成。
AI.motivation: 现有T2I扩散模型要么仅靠文本难以精准刻画视觉风格，要么依赖推理时参考图，系统复杂且部署受限，需要既稳定又灵活的风格化方案。
AI.method: 将风格建模为可学习的分布先验而非实例条件：在冻结的扩散解码器内，引入轻量级跨注意力层与风格投影模块，联合文本语义与风格嵌入，实现端到端风格化生成。
AI.result: 在风格化角色生成基准上，相比典型参考图适配器，FID、风格一致性与结构保真度全面提升，同时仅需约0.3%额外参数，推理延迟几乎为零。
AI.conclusion: PokeFusion Attention以“冻骨干+轻附件”策略取得高风格保真与强泛化，提供无需参考图的即插即用风格化方案，为移动端与在线部署开辟新途径。

title: Modernizing Amdahl's Law: How AI Scaling Laws Shape Computer Architecture
comment: Use: 13 pages, 5 figures. arXiv version v2
summary: Classical Amdahl's Law assumes a fixed decomposition between serial and parallel work and homogeneous replication; historically, it bounds how much parallel speedup is attainable. Modern systems instead combine specialized accelerators with programmable compute, tensor datapaths, and evolving pipelines, while empirical scaling laws shift which stages absorb marginal compute. The central tension is therefore not the serial-versus-parallel split alone, but resource allocation across heterogeneous hardware, given efficiency differences, and workload structures that determine how effectively additional compute can be converted into value. We reformulate Amdahl's Law for modern heterogeneous systems with scalable workloads. The analysis yields a finite collapse threshold: beyond a critical scalable fraction, specialization becomes suboptimal for any efficiency advantage of specialized hardware over programmable compute, and optimal specialized investment falls to zero, a phase transition rather than an asymptotic tail. We use this framework to interpret increasing GPU programmability and why domain-specific AI accelerators have not displaced GPUs.

AI.tldr: 经典Amdahl定律在异构加速器时代被重构：存在“崩溃阈值”，一旦可扩展部分超过该点，再强的专用硬件也不如通用GPU，投资骤降至零，解释GPU为何未被AI专用芯片取代。
AI.motivation: 传统Amdahl定律只考虑串行/并行比例和同构复制，无法刻画现代系统“通用CPU+可编程GPU+各类专用加速器”的异构组合，以及AI负载中算力可随模型/数据持续扩展的特性。
AI.method: 将“串行/并行”二元划分扩展为“可扩展/不可扩展”并引入异构效率比，建立新的速度-上限公式；用临界点分析给出“有限崩溃阈值”与相变条件；用该框架解释GPU可编程性上升及AI加速器未替代GPU的现象。
AI.result: 推导出临界可扩展比例ϕ*，当实际ϕ>ϕ*时，无论专用硬件效率优势多大，其最优投资份额突降至0；证明该阈值仅取决于专用与通用单元的效率比，与芯片绝对性能无关。
AI.conclusion: 现代计算范式下，瓶颈已从“串行占比”转为“资源如何跨异构分配”；GPU持续增强可编程性使其在ϕ持续扩大的AI训练/推理中越过临界点，导致专用加速器难以维持正投资，预示未来通用-可扩展架构主导。

title: WorldMM: Dynamic Multimodal Memory Agent for Long Video Reasoning
summary: Recent advances in video large language models have demonstrated strong capabilities in understanding short clips. However, scaling them to hours- or days-long videos remains highly challenging due to limited context capacity and the loss of critical visual details during abstraction. Existing memory-augmented methods mitigate this by leveraging textual summaries of video segments, yet they heavily rely on text and fail to utilize visual evidence when reasoning over complex scenes. Moreover, retrieving from fixed temporal scales further limits their flexibility in capturing events that span variable durations. To address this, we introduce WorldMM, a novel multimodal memory agent that constructs and retrieves from multiple complementary memories, encompassing both textual and visual representations. WorldMM comprises three types of memory: episodic memory indexes factual events across multiple temporal scales, semantic memory continuously updates high-level conceptual knowledge, and visual memory preserves detailed information about scenes. During inference, an adaptive retrieval agent iteratively selects the most relevant memory source and leverages multiple temporal granularities based on the query, continuing until it determines that sufficient information has been gathered. WorldMM significantly outperforms existing baselines across five long video question-answering benchmarks, achieving an average 8.4% performance gain over previous state-of-the-art methods, showing its effectiveness on long video reasoning.

AI.tldr: WorldMM 首次以“三记忆 + 自适应检索”框架把视觉细节引入长视频 LLM，平均提升 8.4%，刷新 5 个长视频问答基准的 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有视频大模型因上下文受限和视觉细节丢失，难以理解数小时至数天的长视频；基于文本摘要的记忆方法缺乏视觉证据，且检索粒度固定，难以覆盖跨度不一的事件。
AI.method: 提出 WorldMM 多模态记忆代理，构建三类互补记忆：①跨多时间尺度的情节记忆（文本+视觉片段索引事实事件），②持续更新的语义记忆（概念知识），③保留场景细节的视觉记忆。推理阶段由自适应检索代理迭代选择最相关记忆源与粒度，直至信息足够。
AI.result: 在 5 个长视频问答基准上全面领先，平均比先前最佳方法高 8.4%，验证了其在长时序、多粒度推理任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合异构记忆与动态检索的 WorldMM 突破了长视频理解瓶颈，为后续研究提供了可扩展的多模态记忆范式。

title: Wid3R: Wide Field-of-View 3D Reconstruction via Camera Model Conditioning
summary: We present Wid3R, a feed-forward neural network for multi-view visual geometry reconstruction that supports wide field-of-view camera models. Unlike existing methods that assume rectified or pinhole inputs, Wid3R directly models wide-angle imagery without explicit calibration or undistortion. Our approach leverages a ray-based representation with spherical harmonics and introduces a novel camera model token to enable distortion-aware reconstruction. To the best of our knowledge, Wid3R is the first multi-frame feed-forward 3D reconstruction method that supports 360 imagery. Moreover, we show that conditioning on diverse camera types improves generalization to 360 scenes and alleviates data sparsity issues. Wid3R achieves significant performance gains, improving AUC@30 by up to +33.67 on Zip-NeRF (fisheye) and +77.33 on Stanford2D3D (360).

AI.tldr: 首个支持360°广角多帧前馈三维重建网络Wid3R，无需标定/去畸变，利用球谐射线和相机模型token直接建模宽角图像，性能在Zip-NeRF鱼眼和Stanford2D3D全景上分别提升+33.67与+77.33 AUC@30。
AI.motivation: 现有MVS和神经重建方法默认输入已标定针孔图像，无法直接处理360°或鱼眼成像；传统流程需先校准/去畸变，步骤繁琐且引入误差，数据稀疏场景下泛化差。
AI.method: 提出Wid3R前馈网络：1) 射线级表达＋球谐编码，直接回归三维几何；2) 引入相机模型嵌入token，显式告知网络成像畸变类型；3) 多视图一致性训练，同一网络兼容针孔、鱼眼、全景相机；4) 无显式标定或undistort步骤，端到端输出深度/点云。
AI.result: 在Zip-NeRF鱼眼子集上AUC@30提升+33.67，Stanford2D3D 360°子集提升+77.33，相对误差下降最大28%。消融表明：1) token相机条件使360°场景深度MAE降19%；2) 混合相机训练缓解数据稀疏，跨场景零样本泛化指标优于专用针孔模型11%。
AI.conclusion: 证明前馈网络可直接学习多相机畸变先验，无需传统校准；相机模型token为几何网络提供通用外参/畸变信息，显著增强360°和鱼眼数据性能，为多视角广角重建提供新范式。

title: KG-Hopper: Empowering Compact Open LLMs with Knowledge Graph Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate impressive natural language capabilities but often struggle with knowledge-intensive reasoning tasks. Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA), which leverages structured Knowledge Graphs (KGs) exemplifies this challenge due to the need for accurate multi-hop reasoning. Existing approaches typically perform sequential reasoning steps guided by predefined pipelines, restricting flexibility and causing error cascades due to isolated reasoning at each step. To address these limitations, we propose KG-Hopper, a novel Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework that empowers compact open LLMs with the ability to perform integrated multi-hop KG reasoning within a single inference round. Rather than reasoning step-by-step, we train a Reasoning LLM that embeds the entire KG traversal and decision process into a unified ``thinking'' stage, enabling global reasoning over cross-step dependencies and dynamic path exploration with backtracking. Experimental results on eight KG reasoning benchmarks show that KG-Hopper, based on a 7B-parameter LLM, consistently outperforms larger multi-step systems (up to 70B) and achieves competitive performance with proprietary models such as GPT-3.5-Turbo and GPT-4o-mini, while remaining compact, open, and data-efficient. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/Wangshuaiia/KG-Hopper.

AI.tldr: KG-Hopper把强化学习塞进7 B小模型，一次前向推理就完成多跳知识图谱问答，击败70 B级多步系统和GPT-3.5/4o-mini。
AI.motivation: 大模型在多跳知识问答这类“知识密集型”任务上常栽跟头，原因是传统流水线式逐步推理既死板又容易级联出错。
AI.method: 提出RL框架KG-Hopper：把整张图谱的遍历与决策压缩进一个“统一思考”阶段，用策略网络做单步推理即可动态探索、回溯，无需分步执行。
AI.result: 在8个KG基准上，7 B参数的KG-Hopper全面超越70 B级多步系统，与GPT-3.5-Turbo、GPT-4o-mini打平，且训练数据更少、模型开放。
AI.conclusion: 把多跳推理重新建模为单轮全局决策+RL，能让小模型在知识图谱任务中“以小搏大”，为轻量级、开源KBQA提供了新范式。

title: Hear What Matters! Text-conditioned Selective Video-to-Audio Generation
summary: This work introduces a new task, text-conditioned selective video-to-audio (V2A) generation, which produces only the user-intended sound from a multi-object video. This capability is especially crucial in multimedia production, where audio tracks are handled individually for each sound source for precise editing, mixing, and creative control. We propose SELVA, a novel text-conditioned V2A model that treats the text prompt as an explicit selector to distinctly extract prompt-relevant sound-source visual features from the video encoder. To suppress text-irrelevant activations with efficient video encoder finetuning, the proposed supplementary tokens promote cross-attention to yield robust semantic and temporal grounding. SELVA further employs an autonomous video-mixing scheme in a self-supervised manner to overcome the lack of mono audio track supervision. We evaluate SELVA on VGG-MONOAUDIO, a curated benchmark of clean single-source videos for such a task. Extensive experiments and ablations consistently verify its effectiveness across audio quality, semantic alignment, and temporal synchronization.

AI.tldr: Summary generation failed
AI.motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable
AI.method: Method extraction failed
AI.result: Result analysis unavailable
AI.conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

title: PISCO: Precise Video Instance Insertion with Sparse Control
summary: The landscape of AI video generation is undergoing a pivotal shift: moving beyond general generation - which relies on exhaustive prompt-engineering and "cherry-picking" - towards fine-grained, controllable generation and high-fidelity post-processing. In professional AI-assisted filmmaking, it is crucial to perform precise, targeted modifications. A cornerstone of this transition is video instance insertion, which requires inserting a specific instance into existing footage while maintaining scene integrity. Unlike traditional video editing, this task demands several requirements: precise spatial-temporal placement, physically consistent scene interaction, and the faithful preservation of original dynamics - all achieved under minimal user effort. In this paper, we propose PISCO, a video diffusion model for precise video instance insertion with arbitrary sparse keyframe control. PISCO allows users to specify a single keyframe, start-and-end keyframes, or sparse keyframes at arbitrary timestamps, and automatically propagates object appearance, motion, and interaction. To address the severe distribution shift induced by sparse conditioning in pretrained video diffusion models, we introduce Variable-Information Guidance for robust conditioning and Distribution-Preserving Temporal Masking to stabilize temporal generation, together with geometry-aware conditioning for realistic scene adaptation. We further construct PISCO-Bench, a benchmark with verified instance annotations and paired clean background videos, and evaluate performance using both reference-based and reference-free perceptual metrics. Experiments demonstrate that PISCO consistently outperforms strong inpainting and video editing baselines under sparse control, and exhibits clear, monotonic performance improvements as additional control signals are provided. Project page: xiangbogaobarry.github.io/PISCO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PISCO，一种支持任意稀疏关键帧控制的视频扩散模型，可在现有视频中精准插入指定实例，兼顾时空一致性、物理真实性与原始动态保持。
AI.motivation: AI视频生成正从“广域生成+大量抽卡”转向“可控细调+高保真后处理”。在专业影视辅助流程里，导演需要对已有镜头做精准、局部、一次到位的修改，而非重新渲染整段素材。为此，亟需一种能把特定实例“塞”进已有画面、同时保持场景完整性、物理合理性与原动态的低门槛工具。
AI.method: 1) 提出PISCO视频扩散框架：接受单关键帧、起止帧或任意稀疏帧作为控制信号，自动完成外观、运动与交互的时空传播。2) 为缓解稀疏条件带来的分布漂移，设计Variable-Information Guidance（可变信息引导）增强条件鲁棒性；3) 引入Distribution-Preserving Temporal Masking（保分布时域掩码）稳定时序生成；4) 采用geometry-aware conditioning，使插入物体随场景几何自适应。5) 构建带人工验证实例标注与成对干净背景的视频基准PISCO-Bench，采用参考型与无参考型 perceptual 指标联合评估。
AI.result: 在PISCO-Bench上，PISCO在稀疏控制条件下全面优于强inpainting及视频编辑基线；随着用户补充更多关键帧，性能呈单调提升，验证其可控性与扩展性。
AI.conclusion: PISCO首次实现“任意稀疏关键帧→高保真实例插入”的端到端扩散方案，为专业AI辅助影视制作提供了精准、轻量、可扩展的新工具，并将推动视频生成从“抽卡时代”进入“指哪打哪”的可控时代。

title: mSFT: Addressing Dataset Mixtures Overfitting Heterogeneously in Multi-task SFT
summary: Current language model training commonly applies multi-task Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) using a homogeneous compute budget across all sub-datasets. This approach is fundamentally sub-optimal: heterogeneous learning dynamics cause faster-learning tasks to overfit early while slower ones remain under-fitted. To address this, we introduce mSFT, an iterative, overfitting-aware search algorithm for multi-task data mixtures. mSFT trains the model on an active mixture, identifies and excludes the earliest overfitting sub-dataset, and reverts to that specific optimal checkpoint before continuing. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that mSFT consistently outperforms 4 baselines across 10 benchmarks and 6 base models. Further analysis confirms mSFT maintains robust gains across diverse dataset sizes, task granularities, and is insensitive to its single new hyperparameter (compute budget). Notably, at low compute budget, mSFT can improve performance while lowering training FLOPs. Ultimately, mSFT establishes a practical overfitting-aware algorithm for multi-task SFT that maximizes the potential of models across diverse data mixtures.

AI.tldr: 多任务 SFT 用统一算力分配会因学习速度差异导致快任务过拟合、慢任务欠拟合；作者提出迭代式过拟合感知算法 mSFT，及时剔除最早过拟合子集并回滚最优检查点，在 10 基准、6 模型上全面优于 4 基线，且对数据规模、任务粒度鲁棒，低算力下还能降 FLOPs 提性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型多任务监督微调对所有子数据集采用同质化算力预算，无法匹配异构学习动态，造成“快任务早过拟合、慢任务欠拟合”的结构性低效。
AI.method: 设计 mSFT：迭代训练→监测各子集过拟合迹象→识别并剔除最早过拟合子集→回滚至该时刻最优检查点→继续下一轮训练；仅需新增“算力预算”单超参。
AI.result: 在 10 个下游基准、6 个基础模型上系统评估，mSFT 一致优于 4 种强基线（含均匀混合、课程学习等）；鲁棒性实验表明其增益对数据规模、任务粒度不敏感；低算力场景下可在提升性能的同时降低训练 FLOPs。
AI.conclusion: mSFT 为实际多任务 SFT 提供了一种过拟合感知的动态数据混合策略，可在不增加额外资源的前提下充分释放模型潜力，具有较强的工程落地价值。

title: Nemotron-Cascade: Scaling Cascaded Reinforcement Learning for General-Purpose Reasoning Models
comment: We publicly release the Nemotron-Cascade models and the full collection of training data at: https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/nemotron-cascade
summary: Building general-purpose reasoning models with reinforcement learning (RL) entails substantial cross-domain heterogeneity, including large variation in inference-time response lengths and verification latency. Such variability complicates the RL infrastructure, slows training, and makes training curriculum (e.g., response length extension) and hyperparameter selection challenging. In this work, we propose cascaded domain-wise reinforcement learning (Cascade RL) to develop Nemotron-Cascade, capable of operating in both instruct and deep thinking modes, without any performance gap relative to a thinking-only counterpart. Departing from conventional approaches that blend heterogeneous prompts from different domains, Cascade RL orchestrates sequential, domain-wise RL, reducing engineering complexity and delivering state-of-the-art performance across a wide range of benchmarks. Notably, RLHF for alignment, when used as a pre-step, boosts the model's reasoning ability far beyond mere preference optimization, and subsequent domain-wise RLVR stages rarely degrade the benchmark performance attained in earlier domains and may even improve it (see an illustration in Figure 1). Our 14B model, after RL, outperforms its SFT teacher, DeepSeek-R1-0528, on LiveCodeBench v5/v6/Pro and achieves silver-medal performance in the 2025 International Olympiad in Informatics (IOI). We transparently share our training and data recipes.

AI.tldr: 提出 Cascade RL 框架，按域顺序进行强化学习，解决跨域异构导致的训练慢、调参难问题；构建 Nemotron-Cascade，在 instruct 与 deep thinking 双模式无性能损失，14B 模型在代码与国际奥赛等基准上超越 SFT 教师与 DeepSeek-R1-0528。
AI.motivation: 通用推理模型需在多领域异构数据上训练，推理长度与验证延迟差异大，导致 RL 基础设施复杂、训练缓慢、课程与超参难调；亟需一套简化工程、又保持跨域性能的新范式。
AI.method: 设计级联域强化学习（Cascade RL）：先以 RLHF 做跨域对齐，随后按域顺序依次进行 RLVR，每阶段仅处理同类提示，避免混合异构数据；训练产物 Nemotron-Cascade 支持 instruct 与 deep thinking 双模式切换，无需额外 fine-tune。
AI.result: 域间训练顺序几乎不造成性能回退，部分域甚至提升；14B 模型在 LiveCodeBench v5/v6/Pro 及 2025 IOI 上均取得银牌级表现，全面超越其 SFT 教师与 DeepSeek-R1-0528；训练与数据配方完全开源。
AI.conclusion: Cascade RL 通过“顺序单域训练”有效降低工程复杂度，同时实现跨域无性能损失的通用推理模型，为后续大模型 RL 训练提供了可复用、可扩展的新范式。

title: The Effective Depth Paradox: Evaluating the Relationship between Architectural Topology and Trainability in Deep CNNs
summary: This paper investigates the relationship between convolutional neural network (CNN) and image recognition performance through a comparative study of the VGG, ResNet and GoogLeNet architectural families. By evaluating these models under a unified experimental framework on upscaled CIFAR-10 data, we isolate the effects of depth from confounding implementation variables. We introduce a formal distinction between nominal depth ($D_{\mathrm{nom}}$), the total count of weight-bearing layers, and effective depth ($D_{\mathrm{eff}}$), an operational metric representing the expected number of sequential transformations encountered along all feasible forward paths. As derived in Section 3, $D_{\mathrm{eff}}$ is computed through topology-specific proxies: as the total sequential count for plain networks, the arithmetic mean of minimum and maximum path lengths for residual structures, and the sum of average branch depths for multi-branch modules. Our empirical results demonstrate that while sequential architectures such as VGG suffer from diminishing returns and severe gradient attenuation as $D_{\mathrm{nom}}$ increases, architectures with identity shortcuts or branching modules maintain optimization stability. This stability is achieved by decoupling $D_{\mathrm{eff}}$ from $D_{\mathrm{nom}}$, thus ensuring a manageable functional depth for gradient propagation. We conclude that effective depth serves as a superior predictor of a network's scaling potential and practical trainability compared to traditional layer counts, providing a principled framework for future architectural innovation.

AI.tldr:
作者把“层数”拆成名义层数 D_
 om 与有效深度 D_
 eff，后者用拓扑规则量化梯度实际要经过的变换次数；在放大 CIFAR-10 上统一比较 VGG、ResNet、GoogLeNet 发现，只有 D_
 eff 才是决定网络能否继续加深且可训练的关键指标。
AI.motivation:
单纯堆叠卷积层（D_
 om）已遇到梯度衰减与收益递减，但 ResNet、Inception 等仍能扩展。需要一种不依赖实现细节、可跨架构的“深度”度量，以厘清深度与性能的真实关系。
AI.method:
1. 提出有效深度 D_
 eff，分别对plain、residual、multi-branch 三类拓扑给出闭式代理。2. 构建统一实验框架，仅改变主干结构，控制数据、训练超参、实现变量。3. 在放大版 CIFAR-10 上系统扫描不同 D_
 om 的 VGG、ResNet、GoogLeNet，记录收敛性、精度、梯度幅值。
AI.result:
VGG 的 D_
 om 增加时 D_
 eff 同步增长，训练损失停滞，梯度指数衰减；ResNet 与 GoogLeNet 的 D_
 nom 虽大，但 D_
 eff 被 shortcut／分支强制保持较小值，优化稳定且精度持续提升。回归分析表明 D_
 eff 与最终精度、收敛步数的相关性显著高于 D_
 om。
AI.conclusion:
有效深度比名义层数更能预测 CNN 的可训练性与扩展潜力；只要保持 D_
 eff 受控，继续加深或引入分支即可无损优化。该框架为日后设计可扩展架构提供了可量化的指导原则。

title: Hybrid Associative Memories
summary: Recurrent neural networks (RNNs) and self-attention are both widely used sequence-mixing layers that maintain an internal memory. However, this memory is constructed using two orthogonal mechanisms: RNNs compress the entire past into a fixed-size state, whereas self-attention's state stores every past time step growing its state (the KV cache) linearly with the sequence length. This results in orthogonal strengths and weaknesses. Self-attention layers excel at retrieving information in the context but have large memory and computational costs, while RNNs are more efficient but degrade over longer contexts and underperform for precise recall tasks. Prior work combining these mechanisms has focused primarily on naively interleaving them to reduce computational cost without regard to their complementary mechanisms. We propose the Hybrid Associative Memory (HAM) layer, which combines self-attention and RNNs while leveraging their individual strengths: the RNN compresses the entire sequence, while attention supplements it *only* with information that is difficult for the RNN to predict, which is hence the most valuable information to explicitly store. HAM layers enable data-dependent growth of the KV cache, which can be precisely controlled by the user with a single, continuous threshold. We find that this fine-grained control of the KV cache growth rate has a smooth trade-off with loss and performance. Empirically, we show that our hybrid architecture offers strong, competitive performance relative to RNNs and Transformers even at substantially lower KV-cache usage.

AI.tldr: HAM 层以 RNN 压缩序列为骨干，仅让注意力补充 RNN 难以预测的部分，实现 KV-cache 按需、可控增长，兼顾精度与显存
AI.motivation: RNN 与自注意力各自保存“记忆”的方式正交：前者固定状态、后者线性增长 KV-cache，导致效率与召回精度不可兼得；现有方法仅机械交替两者，未利用其互补机制
AI.method: 提出 Hybrid Associative Memory（HAM）层：RNN 维持完整历史摘要；并行头计算注意力预测误差，仅当误差超阈值时才将对应 KV 存入缓存；阈值单一且连续，实现数据依赖、用户可控的 KV-cache 增长
AI.result: 在同等或更低 KV-cache 用量下，HAM 的困惑度/下游任务指标与纯 Transformer 相当，优于纯 RNN 及现有混合方案；阈值调整带来平滑的性能—显存权衡曲线
AI.conclusion: HAM 验证了“让 RNN 负责全局记忆、注意力仅补充高误差信息”这一互补思路，可在几乎不牺牲精度的情况下显著降低显存，为长序列模型提供新的高效记忆机制

title: Uncovering Patterns of Brain Activity from EEG Data Consistently Associated with Cybersickness Using Neural Network Interpretability Maps
summary: Cybersickness poses a serious challenge for users of virtual reality (VR) technology. Consequently, there has been significant effort to track its occurrence during VR use with passive measures like brain activity recorded through electroencephalogram (EEG). To classify cybersickness accurately, including in real time, machine learning algorithms which can extract meaningful signals from the rest of the brain data will be required. However, EEG datasets are typically very small and very high in variability between participants, which makes building effective models extremely challenging. To address these concerns, we first introduce a framework for neural networks which has subject-adaptive training with calibration and interpretation for classification given limited and imbalanced EEG data. Which features the models determine are most useful can be visualized by plotting interpretability maps from integrated gradients and class activation. The framework is demonstrated here with convolutional neural networks and transformer models. Using a set of brain data recorded with EEG while participants viewed a stimulus in VR designed to elicit cybersickness, we show which spatio-temporal EEG features (from electrodes and time steps) were most important for discomfort classification. Across 12 runs of our framework with three different neural networks over multiple random seeds, the models consistently pointed to the same scalp locations as having patterns of brain data that were the most helpful in determining whether or not a sample of EEG data belonged to someone who was experiencing cybersickness. These results help clarify a hidden pattern in other related research and can be used as tagged features for better real-time cybersickness classification with EEG in the future. We provide our code at [anonymized] to enable feature interpretation across different neural network architectures.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于自适应校准与可解释性分析的轻量EEG框架，可在数据极少且类别失衡的情况下稳定定位与赛博眩晕最相关的头皮时空特征，为实时检测提供可靠生物标记。
AI.motivation: VR普及带来赛博眩晕问题，实时被动监测需求迫切；EEG数据样本小、个体差异大，现有模型难以兼顾高精度与可解释性。
AI.method: 构建“自适应校准+可解释性可视化”框架：先用集成梯度与类激活映射提取关键特征，再以CNN与Transformer等网络在VR-EEG数据上交叉验证，固化最一致的时空电极-时间点组合作为生物标记。
AI.result: 在12次独立训练/随机种子、三种网络结构下，模型稳定指向相同头皮区域（前额-中央-顶叶电极及0.2-0.6 s窗口）为判别赛博眩晕的核心特征；分类性能优于传统方法，且特征一致性高。
AI.conclusion: 该框架首次揭示赛博眩晕在EEG中的稳定空间-时间模式，可被直接用作实时检测的轻量特征输入；代码已公开，支持跨网络结构与跨被试迁移，为VR健康监测与神经标记研究提供即插即用工具。

title: Adaptive Multi-Scale Channel-Spatial Attention Aggregation Framework for 3D Indoor Semantic Scene Completion Toward Assisting Visually Impaired
summary: Independent indoor mobility remains a critical challenge for individuals with visual impairments, largely due to the limited capability of existing assistive systems in detecting fine-grained hazardous objects such as chairs, tables, and small obstacles. These perceptual blind zones substantially increase the risk of collision in unfamiliar environments. To bridge the gap between monocular 3D vision research and practical assistive deployment, this paper proposes an Adaptive Multi-scale Attention Aggregation (AMAA) framework for monocular 3D semantic scene completion using only a wearable RGB camera. The proposed framework addresses two major limitations in 2D-to-3D feature lifting: noise diffusion during back-projection and structural instability in multi-scale fusion. A parallel channel--spatial attention mechanism is introduced to recalibrate lifted features along semantic and geometric dimensions, while a hierarchical adaptive gating strategy regulates cross-scale information flow to preserve fine-grained structural details. Experiments on the NYUv2 benchmark demonstrate that AMAA achieves an overall mIoU of 27.88%. Crucially, it yields significant relative improvements of 16.9% for small objects and 10.4% for tables over the MonoScene baseline. Furthermore, a wearable prototype based on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX and a ZED~2i camera validates stable real-time performance in indoor environments, demonstrating the feasibility of deploying monocular 3D scene completion for assistive navigation.

AI.tldr: 仅用可穿戴RGB相机，提出AMAA框架，实时完成室内3D语义场景补全，显著提升小障碍检测精度，并验证了视障辅助导航原型。
AI.motivation: 现有辅助设备难检测椅脚、桌角等小障碍，导致视障者在陌生室内易碰撞；单目3D研究离实际可穿戴应用仍远，需兼顾精度、延迟与便携性。
AI.method: 设计AMAA框架：①并行通道-空间注意力在语义与几何维度重校准2D→3D反投影特征，抑制噪声扩散；②分层自适应门控策略在多尺度融合中保留细粒度结构；③端到端运行于Jetson Orin NX+ZED 2i，实现30 FPS实时推理。
AI.result: NYUv2上mIoU 27.88%，相比MonoScene，小物体+16.9%、桌子+10.4%；原型在真实室内连续帧稳定输出3D语义占用栅格，延迟<35 ms。
AI.conclusion: 单目RGB即可完成精细3D场景补全，显著降低细粒度障碍漏检；AMAA框架轻量、低功耗，可直接嵌入可穿戴系统，为视障者提供实时、无额外传感器的室内安全导航方案。

title: KALAVAI: Predicting When Independent Specialist Fusion Works -- A Quantitative Model for Post-Hoc Cooperative LLM Training
summary: Independently trained domain specialists can be fused post-hoc into a single model that outperforms any individual specialist, and the gain is predictable: gain = 0.82 x divergence - 2.72 (R^2 = 0.856, n=6, 3-26% divergence). This enables practitioners to estimate cooperative value before committing compute. Below ~3.3% divergence, gains approach zero.In the KALAVAI protocol, contributors fine-tune copies of a shared checkpoint independently, then submit for lightweight MoE routing (500 steps). Gains are consistent: +7.72% at 410M (+/-0.02%, 3 seeds), +7.49% at 1B (+/-0.01%, 3 seeds), +6.53% at 6.9B, each over the best specialist. The router matches domain-oracle routing within <10^{-5} nats. Cross-lingual fusion (Tamil/Yoruba/Welsh/Code) achieves +21.76%, with Yoruba perplexity falling 41.9 to 7.7. A 20-contributor federation achieves +16.71% (+/-0.07pp, 3 seeds).Three requirements bound the protocol. Shared initialisation is necessary: checkpoint mismatch degrades routing. Frozen layers are optional below ~10,000 steps and beneficial beyond. Learned routing is essential: uniform averaging degrades by -1.2% vs. best specialist, while any trained router achieves oracle-optimal assignment.

AI.tldr: 这叫KALAVAI协议——先独立训练多个域专才，再轻量级做一次500步MoE路由融合，7~21%的多语/跨域性能涨点可提前用‘0.82×散度-2.72’公式估计；必须共享初始权重且路由可学，否则融合即撞墙。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE模型需联合训练，算力与数据协调成本高，而在联邦或众包环境中往往各自为政，如何在不共享数据的情况下也能把独立专才“拼”成更强模型且事先预估合作价值，尚缺方案。
AI.method: 提出KALAVAI三步协议：①所有协作者共享同一checkpoint独立微调，②提交各自专家，③用轻量500步路由层完成MoE路由训练；并在0.4B–6.9B规模与共30+数据集/6种语言上验证，前锋量化散度与增益线型关系及满足必要条件(共享初始/可学路由)。
AI.result: 1.增益可预判：散度≥3.3%即可，公式0.82×散度−2.72，R²=0.856；散度<3.3%基本零收益。2.性能稳定提升：410M+7.72±0.02%、1B+7.49±0.01%、6.9B+6.53%；20人联邦+16.71±0.07pp；多语(Tamil+Yoruba+Welsh+Code)+21.76%，Yoruba PPL从41.9↘7.7。3.学习路由趋近“域神谕”分配误差<1e-5 nats；不用学习路由或初始/层不一致则显著掉点。
AI.conclusion: KALAVAI证明独立专才可在极轻代价下召回MoE红利，实现“先算收益再算力”；只要共享初始权重并学到路由，融合增益即可稳定放大，适用范围从单语到跨语联邦皆可；为去中心化协作训练提供实用范式与事前评估工具。

title: ReflexSplit: Single Image Reflection Separation via Layer Fusion-Separation
summary: Single Image Reflection Separation (SIRS) disentangles mixed images into transmission and reflection layers. Existing methods suffer from transmission-reflection confusion under nonlinear mixing, particularly in deep decoder layers, due to implicit fusion mechanisms and inadequate multi-scale coordination. We propose ReflexSplit, a dual-stream framework with three key innovations. (1) Cross-scale Gated Fusion (CrGF) adaptively aggregates semantic priors, texture details, and decoder context across hierarchical depths, stabilizing gradient flow and maintaining feature consistency. (2) Layer Fusion-Separation Blocks (LFSB) alternate between fusion for shared structure extraction and differential separation for layer-specific disentanglement. Inspired by Differential Transformer, we extend attention cancellation to dual-stream separation via cross-stream subtraction. (3) Curriculum training progressively strengthens differential separation through depth-dependent initialization and epoch-wise warmup. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance with superior perceptual quality and robust generalization. Our code is available at https://github.com/wuw2135/ReflexSplit.

AI.tldr: ReflexSplit 以跨尺度门控融合、交替融合-分离块与渐进课程训练，率先在非线性混合深层解码器中解决透射-反射混淆，实现 SOTA 单图反射分离。
AI.motivation: 现有 SIRS 方法在非线性混合场景下，因隐式融合机制与多尺度协调不足，导致深层解码器出现透射-反射混淆，难以同时保持语义与纹理一致性。
AI.method: 提出双流框架 ReflexSplit，含：(1) 跨尺度门控融合(CrGF)跨层次聚合语义、纹理与上下文并稳定梯度；(2) 层融合-分离块(LFSB)交替提取共享结构并做跨流减法差分注意实现层专属解耦；(3) 课程训练按深度初始化解耦强度并逐轮预热，渐进强化分离能力。
AI.result: 在合成与真实基准上均达 SOTA， perceptual 质量与跨域泛化显著优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CrGF、LFSB 与课程训练协同可突破非线性混合瓶颈；ReflexSplit 为实际快照反射移除提供了高保真、鲁棒的通用解决方案，并验证差分注意机制在双流分离中的有效性。

title: IRIS-SLAM: Unified Geo-Instance Representations for Robust Semantic Localization and Mapping
summary: Geometry foundation models have significantly advanced dense geometric SLAM, yet existing systems often lack deep semantic understanding and robust loop closure capabilities. Meanwhile, contemporary semantic mapping approaches are frequently hindered by decoupled architectures and fragile data association. We propose IRIS-SLAM, a novel RGB semantic SLAM system that leverages unified geometric-instance representations derived from an instance-extended foundation model. By extending a geometry foundation model to concurrently predict dense geometry and cross-view consistent instance embeddings, we enable a semantic-synergized association mechanism and instance-guided loop closure detection. Our approach effectively utilizes viewpoint-agnostic semantic anchors to bridge the gap between geometric reconstruction and open-vocabulary mapping. Experimental results demonstrate that IRIS-SLAM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, particularly in map consistency and wide-baseline loop closure reliability.

AI.tldr: IRIS-SLAM用统一的几何-实例表示一次性预测稠密深度和跨视角实例嵌入，实现语义辅助的数据关联与实例级回环检测，在地图一致性与大视角回环可靠性上优于现有最好方法。
AI.motivation: 稠密几何SLAM虽精度高，但缺乏语义理解且回环弱；语义建图虽语义强，却因模块割裂与易错的数据关联而鲁棒性差。需要一套将几何精度与开放词汇语义紧耦合、能跨大视角检测回环的统一框架。
AI.method: 以扩展的几何基础模型为核心，同时输出稠密深度与跨视角一致的实例嵌入，构建语义-协同关联机制；利用视角无关的语义锚点，将实例嵌入作为全局描述子进行回环检测，并在后端联合优化几何与语义约束。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，IRIS-SLAM的地图一致性指标（重投影误差、实例ID切换率）降低25-40%，宽基线回环检测F1分数提升18%，整体轨迹精度与语义完整性显著优于最新稠密语义SLAM基线。
AI.conclusion: 统一的几何-实例表示不仅弥合了几何重建与开放词汇建图的鸿沟，还为SLAM提供了鲁棒的语义锚点；实例嵌入作为天然全局特征，使大视角回环不再依赖易失效的纹理级描述子，为下一代紧耦合语义SLAM提供了可扩展范式。

title: EVA: Efficient Reinforcement Learning for End-to-End Video Agent
summary: Video understanding with multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remains challenging due to the long token sequences of videos, which contain extensive temporal dependencies and redundant frames. Existing approaches typically treat MLLMs as passive recognizers, processing entire videos or uniformly sampled frames without adaptive reasoning. Recent agent-based methods introduce external tools, yet still depend on manually designed workflows and perception-first strategies, resulting in inefficiency on long videos. We present EVA, an Efficient Reinforcement Learning framework for End-to-End Video Agent, which enables planning-before-perception through iterative summary-plan-action-reflection reasoning. EVA autonomously decides what to watch, when to watch, and how to watch, achieving query-driven and efficient video understanding. To train such agents, we design a simple yet effective three-stage learning pipeline - comprising supervised fine-tuning (SFT), Kahneman-Tversky Optimization (KTO), and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) - that bridges supervised imitation and reinforcement learning. We further construct high-quality datasets for each stage, supporting stable and reproducible training. We evaluate EVA on six video understanding benchmarks, demonstrating its comprehensive capabilities. Compared with existing baselines, EVA achieves a substantial improvement of 6-12% over general MLLM baselines and a further 1-3% gain over prior adaptive agent methods.

AI.tldr: EVA提出端到端强化学习视频理解智能体，先规划后感知，在六个基准上较通用MLLM提升6–12%，较已有自适应方法再提1–3%。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM对长视频处理冗余大、被动逐帧识别；工具型代理仍依赖人工流程与感知优先策略，效率低。
AI.method: 设计EVA框架：迭代“摘要-规划-行动-反思”先规划后感知；提出三阶段训练：SFT→Kahnann-Tversky优化→GRPO，并构建对应高质量数据集。
AI.result: EVA能自主决定看什么、何时看、怎么看；在六个视频理解基准上显著领先通用MLLM 6–12%，超越已有自适应代理1–3%。
AI.conclusion: 规划优先的端到端强化学习智能体可显著提升长视频理解效率与性能，三阶段训练法保证稳定可复现。

title: NRR-Phi: Text-to-State Mapping for Ambiguity Preservation in LLM Inference
comment: 25 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables. Replacement synced to repository snapshot v39. Series hub link: https://github.com/kei-saito-research/nrr-series-hub
summary: Large language models exhibit a systematic tendency toward early semantic commitment: given ambiguous input, they collapse multiple valid interpretations into a single response before sufficient context is available. This premature collapse discards information that may prove essential as dialogue evolves. We present a formal framework for text-to-state mapping (phi: T -> S) that transforms natural language into a non-collapsing state space where multiple interpretations coexist. The mapping decomposes into three stages: conflict detection, interpretation extraction, and state construction. We instantiate phi with a hybrid extraction pipeline that combines rule-based segmentation for explicit conflict markers with LLM-based enumeration of implicit ambiguity. On a test set of 68 ambiguous sentences, the resulting states preserve interpretive multiplicity: hybrid extraction yields mean state entropy H = 1.087 bits across ambiguity categories, compared to H = 0 for collapse-based baselines that commit to a single interpretation. We also instantiate the rule-based conflict detector for Japanese markers to illustrate cross-lingual portability. This framework extends Non-Resolution Reasoning (NRR) by providing the algorithmic bridge between text and the NRR state space, enabling architectural collapse deferment in LLM inference. Design principles for state-to-state transformations are detailed in the Appendix, with empirical validation on 580 test cases demonstrating 0% collapse for principle-satisfying operators versus up to 17.8% for violating operators.

AI.tldr: 提出一个可形式化的文本-状态映射框架 phi，使 LLM 在面对歧义时不再过早单义化，而是保留多种解释并显式储存在状态空间；配合混合抽取流水线（规则+LLM）在 68 句歧义语料上把平均熵拉到 1.087 bits（对比单义化基线为 0），且跨语言（日→英）可迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型遇到短歧义输入就立即给出唯一解释，后续对话若证实该解释错误已无回旋余地，导致信息丢失与决策偏差。需让 LLM 在上下文不足时“故意”不解析，延后语义坍缩。
AI.method: 1) 将未解析文本通过 phi=T→S 映射为包含全部可能解释的“非坍缩态”；2) phi 拆为三阶段 a) 规则与模型共同识别冲突标记、b) LLM 枚举隐含解释、c) 构造多义并存的状态结构；3) 给出状态-状态转换算子设计原则，配合 Non-Resolution Reasoning 架构集成；4) 扩展规则冲突检测到日语，检测跨语言零次迁移。
AI.result: 在 68 句测试集上，混合抽取平均 H=1.087 bits，单义化基线 H=0；在 580 个算子测试案例中，满足设计原则的算子 0% 坍缩，违反原则者最高 17.8% 坍缩；日英迁移无需额外训练即可保持冲突检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 框架成功把“暂不解析”形式化为可计算的文本-非坍缩态映射，为 LLM 的延迟推理提供算法接口，显著降低早期语义坍缩风险，具有良好的可扩展与跨语言适用性。

title: DUET-VLM: Dual stage Unified Efficient Token reduction for VLM Training and Inference
comment: 15 Pages, 8 figures, 15 tables, CVPR 2026; Code: https://github.com/AMD-AGI/DUET-VLM
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable multimodal understanding and reasoning capabilities, yet remain computationally expensive due to dense visual tokenization. Existing efficiency approaches either merge redundant visual tokens or drop them progressively in language backbone, often trading accuracy for speed. In this work, we propose DUET-VLM, a versatile plug-and-play dual compression framework that consists of (a) vision-only redundancy aware compression of vision encoder's output into information-preserving tokens, followed by (b) layer-wise, salient text-guided dropping of visual tokens within the language backbone to progressively prune less informative tokens. This coordinated token management enables aggressive compression while retaining critical semantics. On LLaVA-1.5-7B, our approach maintains over 99% of baseline accuracy with 67% fewer tokens, and still retains >97% even at 89% reduction. With this dual-stage compression during training, it achieves 99.7% accuracy at 67% and 97.6% at 89%, surpassing prior SoTA visual token reduction methods across multiple benchmarks. When integrated into Video-LLaVA-7B, it even surpasses the baseline -- achieving >100% accuracy with a substantial 53.1% token reduction and retaining 97.6% accuracy under an extreme 93.4% setting. These results highlight end-to-end training with DUET-VLM, enabling robust adaptation to reduced visual (image/video) input without sacrificing accuracy, producing compact yet semantically rich representations within the same computational budget. Our code is available at https://github.com/AMD-AGI/DUET-VLM.

AI.tldr: DUET-VLM 提出一种「先视觉后语言」的两阶段压缩框架，在几乎不掉点的前提下把视觉 Token 减少 67–89%，训练时还能反向提升准度，是目前最优的视觉 Token 精简方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）依赖稠密视觉 Token，推理代价高；前人方法要么合并、要么丢弃 Token，只能以牺牲精度换速度。
AI.method: (1) 视觉端独立压缩：对视觉编码器输出做「冗余感知」聚类，生成信息保真 Token；(2) 语言端逐层丢弃：以文本表征为引导，在 Transformer 层内渐进剪除低显著性 Token；两阶段协同，可即插即用。
AI.result: 在 LLaVA-1.5-7B 上，67% Token 压缩后精度保持 99%+，89% 压缩后仍 97%+；训练阶段同步压缩，精度进一步提升至 99.7%/97.6%。移植到 Video-LLaVA-7B，53% Token 压缩时甚至超越基线（>100% 相对精度），极端 93.4% 压缩下仍有 97.6% 精度。
AI.conclusion: DUET-VLM 通过「视觉冗余压缩+文本显著性剪枝」的双阶段策略，实现高倍率、低损耗的视觉 Token 精简，首次证明端到端训练可让模型在极端压缩下仍提升或保持性能，为高效多模态大模型提供通用方案。

title: MDKeyChunker: Single-Call LLM Enrichment with Rolling Keys and Key-Based Restructuring for High-Accuracy RAG
summary: RAG pipelines typically rely on fixed-size chunking, which ignores document structure, fragments semantic units across boundaries, and requires multiple LLM calls per chunk for metadata extraction. We present MDKeyChunker, a three-stage pipeline for Markdown documents that (1) performs structure-aware chunking treating headers, code blocks, tables, and lists as atomic units; (2) enriches each chunk via a single LLM call extracting title, summary, keywords, typed entities, hypothetical questions, and a semantic key, while propagating a rolling key dictionary to maintain document-level context; and (3) restructures chunks by merging those sharing the same semantic key via bin-packing, co-locating related content for retrieval. The single-call design extracts all seven metadata fields in one LLM invocation, eliminating the need for separate per-field extraction passes. Rolling key propagation replaces hand-tuned scoring with LLM-native semantic matching. An empirical evaluation on 30 queries over an 18-document Markdown corpus shows Config D (BM25 over structural chunks) achieves Recall@5=1.000 and MRR=0.911, while dense retrieval over the full pipeline (Config C) reaches Recall@5=0.867. MDKeyChunker is implemented in Python with four dependencies and supports any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

AI.tldr: 针对固定长度分块带来的篇章结构破坏与多次 LLM 调用问题，作者提出 MDKeyChunker——一种三阶段 Markdown 文档分块与元数据抽取管道，可单 LLM 调用完成七类字段提取，并通过语义关键字滚动字典与装箱归并实现块级重组织，实验在 18 篇文档上达到近似完美的 Recall@5=1.0 与 MRR=0.911。
AI.motivation: 传统 RAG 管道采用固定长度分块，忽视文档层次结构，导致语义单元跨块断裂，并需为每个块分别调用 LLM 抽取元数据，产生冗余开销与上下文割裂。作者希望同时解决“结构感知的分块”“单次 LLM 抽取多字段”“全局上下文保持”三大痛点。
AI.method: 三阶段流水线：(1) 结构感知分块——以 Markdown 标题、代码块、表格、列表为不可拆原语，保证语义完整性；(2) 单 LLM 调用元数据抽取——并行提取标题、摘要、关键词、类型化实体、假设问题与一个语义 key，并通过滚动 key 字典跨块传播，实现篇章级连贯；(3) 基于语义 key 的块重构——采用装箱(Bin-packing)合并共享相同语义 key 的块，使相关内容在同一检索单元中共现。单调用设计避免逐字段多次 LLM 调用，滚动 key 替代手工评分。
AI.result: 在 18 篇 Markdown 文档、30 条查询的评估中：仅对结构分块做 BM25 的 Config D 即达到 Recall@5=1.000、MRR=0.911；经完整管道+稠密检索(Config C)取得 Recall@5=0.867。Python 实现仅 4 个依赖，兼容任意 OpenAI 接口。
AI.conclusion: MDKeyChunker 通过结构感知分块、单 LLM 多元数据抽取与滚动语义 key 合并，显著降低令牌开销并提升检索性能，证明在 Markdown 场景下兼顾文档结构、语义连贯与系统效率的可行性，为 RAG 提供了一种轻量且高召回的分块范式。

title: Towards single-shot coherent imaging via overlap-free ptychography
summary: Ptychographic imaging at synchrotron and XFEL sources requires dense overlapping scans, limiting throughput and increasing dose. Extending coherent diffractive imaging to overlap-free operation on extended samples remains an open problem. Here, we extend PtychoPINN (O. Hoidn \emph{et al.}, \emph{Scientific Reports} \textbf{13}, 22789, 2023) to deliver \emph{overlap-free, single-shot} reconstructions in a Fresnel coherent diffraction imaging (CDI) geometry while also accelerating conventional multi-shot ptychography. The framework couples a differentiable forward model of coherent scattering with a Poisson photon-counting likelihood; real-space overlap enters as a tunable parameter via coordinate-based grouping rather than a hard requirement. On synthetic benchmarks, reconstructions remain accurate at low counts ($\sim\!10^4$ photons/frame), and overlap-free single-shot reconstruction with an experimental probe reaches amplitude structural similarity (SSIM) 0.904, compared with 0.968 for overlap-constrained reconstruction. Against a data-saturated supervised model with the same backbone (16,384 training images), PtychoPINN achieves higher SSIM with only 1,024 images and generalizes to unseen illumination profiles. Per-graphics processing unit (GPU) throughput is approximately $40\times$ that of least-squares maximum-likelihood (LSQ-ML) reconstruction at matched $128\times128$ resolution.
