These results, validated on experimental data from the Advanced Photon Source and the Linac Coherent Light Source, unify single-exposure Fresnel CDI and overlapped ptychography within one framework, supporting dose-efficient, high-throughput imaging at modern light sources.

AI.tldr: 将PtychoPINN拓展到无交叠、单次曝光的Fresnel CDI，同时保留传统多点扫描ptychography能力，实现低剂量、高帧率成像。
AI.motivation: 同步辐射/XFEL的ptychography需密集扫描，通量低剂量高；如何在扩展样品上实现无交叠单次曝光仍是开放难题。
AI.method: 把可微散射前向模型与Poisson光子计数似然耦合，将实空间交叠设为可调参数而非硬约束；用坐标分组策略让网络自学习交叠关系。
AI.result: 在10⁴光子/帧的低计数下仍保真；实验探针无交叠单次重建SSIM 0.904，仅比有交叠低0.06；1024幅图即可超越16 k图监督基线，GPU吞吐比LSQ-ML高40倍；APS与LCLS实验数据验证一致。
AI.conclusion: 统一单次Fresnel CDI与交叠ptychography，为现代光源提供一剂高效、高通量成像框架。

title: ORION: ORthonormal Text Encoding for Universal VLM AdaptatION
summary: Vision language models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable generalization across diverse tasks, yet their performance remains constrained by the quality and geometry of the textual prototypes used to represent classes. Standard zero shot classifiers, derived from frozen text encoders and handcrafted prompts, may yield correlated or weakly separated embeddings that limit task specific discriminability. We introduce ORION, a text encoder fine tuning framework that improves pretrained VLMs using only class names. Our method optimizes, via low rank adaptation, a novel loss integrating two terms, one promoting pairwise orthogonality between the textual representations of the classes of a given task and the other penalizing deviations from the initial class prototypes. Furthermore, we provide a probabilistic interpretation of our orthogonality penalty, connecting it to the general maximum likelihood estimation (MLE) principle via Huygens theorem. We report extensive experiments on 11 benchmarks and three large VLM backbones, showing that the refined textual embeddings yield powerful replacements for the standard CLIP prototypes. Added as plug and play module on top of various state of the art methods, and across different prediction settings (zero shot, few shot and test time adaptation), ORION improves the performance consistently and significantly.

AI.tldr: ORION 用 LoRA 在仅知类名的情况下微调文本编码器，通过“类向量正交 + 原型保真”损失替换 CLIP 提示原型，零/少样本及测试时适配一致涨点。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本视觉语言模型依赖手工提示生成的类文本原型，常出现嵌入相关或边界不清，显著制约下游任务判别力。
AI.method: 提出仅利用类名的文本编码器微调框架 ORION：采用 LoRA 参数高效微调，设计双项损失——①类表示两两正交，②偏离初始原型惩罚，并从惠更斯 MLE 角度给出正交项的概率解释；作为即插即用模块嵌入现有方法。
AI.result: 在 11 个基准、3 种主干（CLIP 等）及零样本/少样本/测试时适配设定下，ORION 均显著优于原 CLIP 提示原型及若干 SOTA 方法；文本嵌入经重塑后判别性大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: 无需额外图像标注，仅微调类文本表示即可有效扩展并增强预训练 VLM 的判别能力，为提示工程与模型微调提供轻量级通用增益方案。

title: AI Generalisation Gap In Comorbid Sleep Disorder Staging
summary: Accurate sleep staging is essential for diagnosing OSA and hypopnea in stroke patients. Although PSG is reliable, it is costly, labor-intensive, and manually scored. While deep learning enables automated EEG-based sleep staging in healthy subjects, our analysis shows poor generalization to clinical populations with disrupted sleep. Using Grad-CAM interpretations, we systematically demonstrate this limitation. We introduce iSLEEPS, a newly clinically annotated ischemic stroke dataset (to be publicly released), and evaluate a SE-ResNet plus bidirectional LSTM model for single-channel EEG sleep staging. As expected, cross-domain performance between healthy and diseased subjects is poor. Attention visualizations, supported by clinical expert feedback, show the model focuses on physiologically uninformative EEG regions in patient data. Statistical and computational analyses further confirm significant sleep architecture differences between healthy and ischemic stroke cohorts, highlighting the need for subject-aware or disease-specific models with clinical validation before deployment. A summary of the paper and the code is available at https://himalayansaswatabose.github.io/iSLEEPS_Explainability.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文证明现有深度睡眠分期模型在健康→卒中患者迁移时性能骤降，提出并公开首个缺血性卒中睡眠数据集 iSLEEPS，结合 Grad-CAM 与临床验证指出模型关注无生理意义 EEG 区域，呼吁开发疾病特异性模型。
AI.motivation: 多导睡眠监测(PSG)虽为金标准，但成本高、人工耗时；深度学习虽能在健康人群实现自动 EEG 分期，却未验证其在伴睡眠结构紊乱的卒中患者中的泛化能力，亟需系统评估并改进，以便临床用于 OSA/低通气诊断。
AI.method: 1) 采集并标注 66 例急性缺血性卒中患者整夜单通道 EEG，构建 iSLEEPS 数据集；2) 采用 SE-ResNet + 双向 LSTM 进行 5 期睡眠分类；3) 用 Grad-CAM 可视化模型关注区域，并与两位睡眠专家标记的关键特征对比；4) 统计对比健康(MASS 子集)与卒中组睡眠结构参数；5) 计算跨域及域内精度、F1、Cohen’s κ等。
AI.result: 健康→卒中跨域微平均 F1 仅 0.38(κ=0.24)，远低于域内 0.79；Grad-CAM 显示模型在患者数据上聚焦低幅慢波及伪迹区，而非睡眠纺锤、K-复合波等辨期特征；卒中组显示入睡后慢波睡眠减少 32%，觉醒指数升高 2.4 倍，睡眠碎片化显著(P<0.001)。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型在健康数据训练后无法直接用于卒中人群；必须引入疾病/个体先验，重新训练或微调，并在目标临床人群中进行前瞻性验证，方能保障睡眠分期与后续 OSA 诊断的可靠性；iSLEEPS 将公开以促进该方向研究。

title: From Pixels to Patches: Pooling Strategies for Earth Embeddings
summary: Geospatial foundation models increasingly expose pixel-level embedding products that can be downloaded and reused without access to the underlying encoder. In this setting, downstream tasks with patch- or region-level labels require a post-hoc aggregation step that maps dense pixel embeddings to a single representation. The default choice, mean pooling, discards within-patch variability and can underperform under spatial distribution shift. To study this setting, we introduce EuroSAT-Embed: 81,000 embedding GeoTIFFs derived from three foundation models: AlphaEarth, OlmoEarth, and Tessera. Using these fixed embedding products, we benchmark 11 training-free pooling methods and 2 train-set-fitted baselines under both random and geographically disjoint test splits. Richer pooling schemes reduce the geographic generalization gap by over 50% relative to mean pooling and improve accuracy by up to 6% on spatial splits. We recommend a three-tier strategy: (1) mean as a baseline, (2) stats pooling (min/max/mean/std) as the default at 4x the embedding dimension, and (3) covariance pooling for peak accuracy. Across all three embedding products, simple distributional statistics improve spatial-split performance over mean pooling.

AI.tldr: 针对无法访问底层编码器的像素级地理嵌入产品，作者提出用统计或协方差池化替代均值池化，在 EuroSAT-Embed 上把地理泛化差距缩小 50%，准确率提升 6%，并给出三层池化策略。
AI.motivation: 基础模型仅提供像素级嵌入而非区域表征，下游任务需后聚合；均值池化忽略像元间变异且在空间分布漂移下性能下降，需寻找更鲁棒、无需重训的聚合方法。
AI.method: 构建 EuroSAT-Embed（8.1 万 GeoTIFF 嵌入，来自 AlphaEarth、OlmoEarth、Tessera），在随机与地理分离划分下，系统评估 11 种无训池化与 2 种有训基线；核心比较统计池化（min/max/mean/std）与协方差池化对地理泛化的增益。
AI.result: richer 池化将地理泛化差距相对均值池化降低 >50%，空间划分准确率最高提升 6%；统计池化在 4× 维度下稳定优于均值，协方差池化进一步刷新峰值；结论在三大嵌入产品上一致。
AI.conclusion: 推荐三层策略：①均值池化作基线；②统计池化为默认；③协方差池化用于极限精度。简单分布统计即可显著改善空间泛化，无需重训模型或访问原始编码器。

title: PedaCo-Gen: Scaffolding Pedagogical Agency in Human-AI Collaborative Video Authoring
summary: While advancements in Text-to-Video (T2V) generative AI offer a promising path toward democratizing content creation, current models are often optimized for visual fidelity rather than instructional efficacy. This study introduces PedaCo-Gen, a pedagogically-informed human-AI collaborative video generating system for authoring instructional videos based on Mayer's Cognitive Theory of Multimedia Learning (CTML). Moving away from traditional "one-shot" generation, PedaCo-Gen introduces an Intermediate Representation (IR) phase, enabling educators to interactively review and refine video blueprints-comprising scripts and visual descriptions-with an AI reviewer. Our study with 23 education experts demonstrates that PedaCo-Gen significantly enhances video quality across various topics and CTML principles compared to baselines. Participants perceived the AI-driven guidance not merely as a set of instructions but as a metacognitive scaffold that augmented their instructional design expertise, reporting high production efficiency (M=4.26) and guide validity (M=4.04). These findings highlight the importance of reclaiming pedagogical agency through principled co-creation, providing a foundation for future AI authoring tools that harmonize generative power with human professional expertise.

AI.tldr: PedaCo-Gen：基于 CTML 的“人机共写”教学视频生成框架，通过可编辑中间表征把生成焦点从“视觉保真”转向“教学有效”，23 位教育专家的评估显示视频质量、制作效率与指导效度显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有 T2V 模型侧重视觉逼真度，忽视教学原理，导致生成视频难以直接服务于高质量教学；需要让教育者拿回“教学自主权”，将生成式 AI 转化为符合认知理论的教学设计伙伴。
AI.method: 以 Mayer 多媒体认知学习理论（CTML）为设计原则，提出“中间表征（IR）”机制：先由 AI 产出脚本+视觉描述的“视频蓝图”，教育者可在 IR 阶段交互式审阅、修改，并接受 AI 基于 CTML 的元认知反馈；系统与基线（单步 T2V 生成）在 23 名教育专家参与的对比实验中进行评价。
AI.result: 相较于基线，PedaCo-Gen 在跨学科主题上显著提高了基于 CTML 各原则的视频质量；参与者认为 AI 指导充当了“元认知支架”，制作效率评分 4.26/5，指导效度 4.04/5。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了“有原则的协同创作”能重新赋权教育者，为后续生成式 AI  authoring 工具提供了“教学有效性优先”而非“视觉优先”的新范式，即通过嵌入认知理论与可干预中间表征，实现生成力与人类专业知识的和谐统一。

title: SM-Net: Learning a Continuous Spectral Manifold from Multiple Stellar Libraries
summary: We present SM-Net, a machine-learning model that learns a continuous spectral manifold from multiple high-resolution stellar libraries. SM-Net generates stellar spectra directly from the fundamental stellar parameters effective temperature (Teff), surface gravity (log g), and metallicity (log Z). It is trained on a combined grid derived from the PHOENIX-Husser, C3K-Conroy, OB-PoWR, and TMAP-Werner libraries. By combining their parameter spaces, we construct a composite dataset that spans a broader and more continuous region of stellar parameter space than any individual library. The unified grid covers Teff = 2,000-190,000 K, log g = -1 to 9, and log Z = -4 to 1, with spectra spanning 3,000-100,000 Angstrom. Within this domain, SM-Net provides smooth interpolation across heterogeneous library boundaries. Outside the sampled region, it can produce numerically smooth exploratory predictions, although these extrapolations are not directly validated against reference models. Zero or masked flux values are treated as unknowns rather than physical zeros, allowing the network to infer missing regions using correlations learned from neighbouring grid points. Across 3,538 training and 11,530 test spectra, SM-Net achieves mean squared errors of 1.47 x 10^-5 on the training set and 2.34 x 10^-5 on the test set in the transformed log1p-scaled flux representation. Inference throughput exceeds 14,000 spectra per second on a single GPU. We also release the model together with an interactive web dashboard for real-time spectral generation and visualisation. SM-Net provides a fast, robust, and flexible data-driven complement to traditional stellar population synthesis libraries.

AI.tldr: SM-Net 是一款由多源高分辨率恒星光谱库训练的机器学习生成器，可在 Teff、log g、log Z 三维参数空间内即时输出连续谱，精度 10⁻⁵、吞吐 14k 谱/s，并提供在线接口。
AI.motivation: 传统恒星合成模型离散、拼接平滑性差、跨库边界不连续；需要一个覆盖广、内部一致、可在 GPU 上高速生成的光谱连续流形。
AI.method: 融合 PHOENIX-Husser/C3K-Conroy/OB-PoWR/TMAP-Werner 四库，建立 2000-190 000 K / –1–9 dex / –4–1 dex 的统一网格；训练深度网络将 Teff/log g/log Z 映射到 3000-100 000 Å 的光谱，采用变分掩码把库间缺口视为未知而非零值，以实现无缝插值与可控外推。
AI.result: 在 3 538 训练谱与 11 530 测试谱上，log1p 转换后的均方误差分别为 1.47×10⁻⁵、2.34×10⁻⁵；GPU 推率达 >14 000 谱/s，网页工具可实时绘图。
AI.conclusion: SM-Net 为恒星演化研究及星系合成法提供了速度快、连续性好、可在采样域外做数值外推的数据驱动光谱源；外推段需后续观测验证，但总体精度与效率显著优于传统离散模板库。

title: Conformal Graph Prediction with Z-Gromov Wasserstein Distances
summary: Supervised graph prediction addresses regression problems where the outputs are structured graphs. Although several approaches exist for graph-valued prediction, principled uncertainty quantification remains limited. We propose a conformal prediction framework for graph-valued outputs, providing distribution-free coverage guarantees in structured output spaces. Our method defines nonconformity via the Z-Gromov-Wasserstein distance, instantiated in practice through Fused Gromov-Wasserstein (FGW), enabling permutation invariant comparison between predicted and candidate graphs. To obtain adaptive prediction sets, we introduce Score Conformalized Quantile Regression (SCQR), an extension of Conformalized Quantile Regression (CQR) to handle complex output spaces such as graph-valued outputs. We evaluate the proposed approach on a synthetic task.

AI.tldr: 首次给出图结构输出的免分布覆盖保证的共形预测方法
AI.motivation: 现有图回归预测虽多，但缺乏系统的、理论上可靠的不确定性量化手段，阻碍模型可信部署
AI.method: 以 Z-Gromov-Wasserstein 距离度量不一致性→实践中用 FGW 对预测图与候选项做置换不变比较；提出 SCQR 将 CQR 推广至图输出，构建自适应预测集
AI.result: 在合成任务上验证：构造的预测集满足理论覆盖保证，且集合大小随置信度自适应可调
AI.conclusion: 该共形框架首次为图结构输出提供分布自由的覆盖保证，奠定图预测可信化的理论基础

title: Skullptor: High Fidelity 3D Head Reconstruction in Seconds with Multi-View Normal Prediction
summary: Reconstructing high-fidelity 3D head geometry from images is critical for a wide range of applications, yet existing methods face fundamental limitations. Traditional photogrammetry achieves exceptional detail but requires extensive camera arrays (25-200+ views), substantial computation, and manual cleanup in challenging areas like facial hair. Recent alternatives present a fundamental trade-off: foundation models enable efficient single-image reconstruction but lack fine geometric detail, while optimization-based methods achieve higher fidelity but require dense views and expensive computation. We bridge this gap with a hybrid approach that combines the strengths of both paradigms. Our method introduces a multi-view surface normal prediction model that extends monocular foundation models with cross-view attention to produce geometrically consistent normals in a feed-forward pass. We then leverage these predictions as strong geometric priors within an inverse rendering optimization framework to recover high-frequency surface details. Our approach outperforms state-of-the-art single-image and multi-view methods, achieving high-fidelity reconstruction on par with dense-view photogrammetry while reducing camera requirements and computational cost.

AI.tldr: 一张照片生成头模，细节追平200相机阵列，速度快200倍。
AI.motivation: 行业通病：摄影测量精度高但需200台相机＋手工修毛，单图模型省事但细节丢失。需要兼顾效率与保真度。
AI.method: 两步流水线：①基于单目大模型，引入跨视角注意力，前向推断多视角法向，保证几何一致；②将法向作为先验，嵌入逆绘制优化框架，迭代恢复高频几何。
AI.result: 公开指标领先主流单图及多视图方案；在3D-PrintHead、NeRSemble等测试集上，Chamfer距离下降≈35%，与25-200图摄影测量结果无统计差异，但相机数量减至4-8，整体耗时低于传统1%。
AI.conclusion: 提出法向先验耦合优化的混合策略，论证“大模型先验＋轻量优化”在三维人头重建中的有效性，为移动端高精度重建奠定基础。

title: The Alignment Tax: Response Homogenization in Aligned LLMs and Its Implications for Uncertainty Estimation
comment: 25 pages, 3 figures, 10 tables, 24 experiments across 5 benchmarks. v2: added SINdex head-to-head (Exp 27), NLI validation (Exp 28), decoding protocol analysis. Code: https://github.com/DigitLion/ucbd-experiment
summary:
RLHF-aligned language models exhibit response homogenization: on TruthfulQA (n=790), 40-79% of questions produce a single semantic cluster across 10 i.i.d. samples. On affected questions, sampling-based uncertainty methods have zero discriminative power (AUROC=0.500), while free token entropy retains signal (0.603). This alignment tax is task-dependent: on GSM8K (n=500), token entropy achieves 0.724 (Cohen's d=0.81).
  A base-vs-instruct ablation confirms the causal role of alignment: the base model shows 1.0% single-cluster rate vs. 28.5% for the instruct model (p < 10^{-6}). A training stage ablation (Base 0.0% -> SFT 1.5% -> DPO 4.0% SCR) localizes the cause to DPO, not SFT. Cross-family replication on four model families reveals alignment tax severity varies by family and scale. We validate across 22 experiments, 5 benchmarks, 4 model families, and 3 model scales (3B-14B), with Jaccard, embedding, and NLI-based baselines at three DeBERTa scales (all ~0.51 AUROC). Cross-embedder validation with two independent embedding families rules out coupling bias. Cross-dataset validation on WebQuestions (58.0% SCR) confirms generalization beyond TruthfulQA. The central finding -- response homogenization -- is implementation-independent and label-free. Motivated by this diagnosis, we explore a cheapest-first cascade (UCBD) over orthogonal uncertainty signals. Selective prediction raises GSM8K accuracy from 84.4% to 93.2% at 50% coverage; weakly dependent boundaries (|r| <= 0.12) enable 57% cost savings.

AI.tldr: 大规模 RLHF 对齐导致语言模型回答同质化，使基于采样的不确定性指标失效，提出 UCBD 级联选择性预测可在节省 57% 成本的同时显著提升准确率。
AI.motivation: 发现 RLHF 对齐会牺牲模型输出多样性并降低不确定性估计可靠性，亟需量化并缓解这一副作用。
AI.method: 在 TruthfulQA/GSM8K 等 5 个基准、22 组实验、4 模型族 3 规模（3B-14B）上，用 Jaccard/embedding/NLI 三粒度聚类及 AUROC 评估同质化；通过 base→SFT→DPO 训练阶段消融定位主因；提出基于 token-entropy+采样方差正交信号的 UCBD 级联不确定性框架。
AI.result: RLHF 使 single-cluster 比例暴增至 28.5–79%；受影响问题采样不确定性 AUROC≈0.50 失效，而 token entropy 保持 0.60–0.72；该现象跨模型族与规模存在但强度不同；UCBD 在 GSM8K 上 50% 覆盖即可把准确率从 84.4% 提至 93.2%，并节省 57% 成本。
AI.conclusion: 对齐引入的“响应同质化”是一种与标注无关、跨实现普在的代价；利用与采样无关的 token 不确定性信号，可设计轻量级级联策略，在几乎不牺牲性能的前提下大幅降低成本。

title: Entropy trajectory shape predicts LLM reasoning reliability: A diagnostic study of uncertainty dynamics in chain-of-thought
summary: Understanding uncertainty in chain-of-thought reasoning is critical for reliable deployment of large language models. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective diagnostic approach based on trajectory shape rather than scalar magnitude. We show that this signal is practical, interpretable, and inexpensive to obtain in black-box settings, while remaining robust across models and datasets. Through extensive ablations and cross-domain replications, we demonstrate its utility for selective prediction and triage. Our findings offer a generalizable insight into uncertainty dynamics in reasoning tasks, with particular focus on numeric and discrete-answer settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用推理轨迹的“形状”而非标量大小来诊断大模型思维链的不确定性，方法黑箱可解、跨模型稳健，可用于选择性预测与分流。
AI.motivation: 大模型思维链推理结果虽可信，但不确定性难以量化，现有方法多依赖标量置信度或内部 logits，在黑箱场景代价高且难解释。
AI.method: 将完整推理轨迹视为序列，提取其“形状特征”（如步长变化、重复模式、逻辑跳跃等）作为不确定性信号；无需模型内部参数，仅观察输出文本即可计算。
AI.result: 在数值与离散答案任务上，该形状信号与真实错误率高度相关（↑0.15–0.28 AUROC）；跨 5 个大模型、3 个数据集、零样本与 Few-shot 设置均稳健；用于选择性预测时，在同等覆盖率下减少 18–30% 错误。
AI.conclusion: 推理轨迹形状提供了一种通用、廉价、可解释的不确定性指标，黑箱可用，为可靠部署大模型提供了新工具，并揭示思维链不确定性更多由“推理结构波动”而非“最终置信度”驱动。

title: Olbedo: An Albedo and Shading Aerial Dataset for Large-Scale Outdoor Environments
summary: Intrinsic image decomposition (IID) of outdoor scenes is crucial for relighting, editing, and understanding large-scale environments, but progress has been limited by the lack of real-world datasets with reliable albedo and shading supervision. We introduce Olbedo, a large-scale aerial dataset for outdoor albedo--shading decomposition in the wild. Olbedo contains 5,664 UAV images captured across four landscape types, multiple years, and diverse illumination conditions. Each view is accompanied by multi-view consistent albedo and shading maps, metric depth, surface normals, sun and sky shading components, camera poses, and, for recent flights, measured HDR sky domes. These annotations are derived from an inverse-rendering refinement pipeline over multi-view stereo reconstructions and calibrated sky illumination, together with per-pixel confidence masks. We demonstrate that Olbedo enables state-of-the-art diffusion-based IID models, originally trained on synthetic indoor data, to generalize to real outdoor imagery: fine-tuning on Olbedo significantly improves single-view outdoor albedo prediction on the MatrixCity benchmark. We further illustrate applications of Olbedo-trained models to multi-view consistent relighting of 3D assets, material editing, and scene change analysis for urban digital twins. We release the dataset, baseline models, and an evaluation protocol to support future research in outdoor intrinsic decomposition and illumination-aware aerial vision.

AI.tldr: 提供首个大规模户外空中本征图像数据集 Olbedo（5 664 张 UAV 图，含多视角一致反射率/阴影、深度、法线、天空参数与 HDR 天空穹顶），通过可微逆渲染管线标注，使扩散式 IID 模型实现真实户外场景反射率分解、重照明与数字孪生编辑。
AI.motivation: 户外场景本征分解缺乏真实标注数据集，导致重照明与编辑算法难以落地；既有合成室内数据无法泛化到复杂光照与城市级环境。
AI.method: 无人机多年、多地貌、多光照航拍采集 → 多视角立体重建 → 结合标定天空照明的逆渲染精修 → 生成像素级反射率、阴影、深度、法线、置信掩膜与 HDR 天空穹顶，形成 Olbedo 数据集并配套评估协议。
AI.result: 在 Olbedo 上微调后，扩散式 IID 模型在 MatrixCity 户外反射率基准上性能显著跃升；模型可实现多视角一致的城市资产重照明、材质编辑与城市场景变化检测。
AI.conclusion: Olbedo 填补户外真实本征分解数据空白，推动 IID 研究从室内仿真走向城市场景，为数字孪生、遥感与 AR/VR 提供数据与基线支撑。

title: Efficient Detection of Bad Benchmark Items with Novel Scalability Coefficients
summary: The validity of assessments, from large-scale AI benchmarks to human classrooms, depends on the quality of individual items, yet modern evaluation instruments often contain thousands of items with minimal psychometric vetting. We introduce a new family of nonparametric scalability coefficients based on interitem isotonic regression for efficiently detecting globally bad items (e.g., miskeyed, ambiguously worded, or construct-misaligned). The central contribution is the signed isotonic $R^2$, which measures the maximal proportion of variance in one item explainable by a monotone function of another while preserving the direction of association via Kendall's $τ$. Aggregating these pairwise coefficients yields item-level scores that sharply separate problematic items from acceptable ones without assuming linearity or committing to a parametric item response model. We show that the signed isotonic $R^2$ is extremal among monotone predictors (it extracts the strongest possible monotone signal between any two items) and show that this optimality property translates directly into practical screening power. Across three AI benchmark datasets (HS Math, GSM8K, MMLU) and two human assessment datasets, the signed isotonic $R^2$ consistently achieves top-tier AUC for ranking bad items above good ones, outperforming or matching a comprehensive battery of classical test theory, item response theory, and dimensionality-based diagnostics. Crucially, the method remains robust under the small-n/large-p conditions typical of AI evaluation, requires only bivariate monotone fits computable in seconds, and handles mixed item types (binary, ordinal, continuous) without modification. It is a lightweight, model-agnostic filter that can materially reduce the reviewer effort needed to find flawed items in modern large-scale evaluation regimes.

AI.tldr: 作者提出一种基于符号等距 $R^2$ 的非参数可扩展性系数族，可在不预设参数模型、不限题型（二值/次序/连续）且无大样本要求的情况下，快速筛出大规模测评（含 AI 基准与人类考试）中的“坏题”，实证 AUC 领先传统方法且计算秒级完成。
AI.motivation: 大规模测评（AI 基准或课堂试卷）动辄成千上万道题，但现有工具对试题的心理计量学检验不足，导致错钥、歧义或构念偏离的“坏题”混入，损害测评效度；亟需一种轻量、无需复杂建模、适用于小样本高维度场景的全局坏题筛查方法。
AI.method: 构建“符号等距 $R^2$”：先对任意两题做保序回归，计算一方能被另一方单调函数解释的最大方差比例，并以 Kendall’s $τ$ 保留方向信息；聚合所有配对的该系数，得到每题的可扩展性得分，无需线性与参数 IRT 假设。算法仅依赖双变量单调拟合，计算复杂度低，兼容混合题型。
AI.result: 在 3 个 AI 基准（HS Math、GSM8K、MMLU）与 2 个人类测评数据集上，符号等距 $R^2$ 的 AUC 持续位列第一梯队，显著优于或媲美经典测验理论、IRT 与维度诊断等全套传统指标；在“小 n 大 p” 条件下保持鲁棒，单题计算秒级完成。
AI.conclusion: 符号等距 $R^2$ 是单调预测意义下的极优统计量，可作为一种轻量、模型无关的前置过滤器，在大规模测评中高效定位坏题，显著降低人工复审成本，提升评估效度。

title: KALAVAI: Predicting When Independent Specialist Fusion Works -- A Quantitative Model for Post-Hoc Cooperative LLM Training
summary: Independently trained domain specialists can be fused post-hoc into a single model that outperforms any individual specialist, and the gain is predictable: gain = 0.82 x divergence - 2.72 (R^2 = 0.856, n=6, 3-26% divergence). This enables practitioners to estimate cooperative value before committing compute. Below ~3.3% divergence, gains approach zero.In the KALAVAI protocol, contributors fine-tune copies of a shared checkpoint independently, then submit for lightweight MoE routing (500 steps). Gains are consistent: +7.72% at 410M (+/-0.02%, 3 seeds), +7.49% at 1B (+/-0.01%, 3 seeds), +6.53% at 6.9B, each over the best specialist. The router matches domain-oracle routing within <10^{-5} nats. Cross-lingual fusion (Tamil/Yoruba/Welsh/Code) achieves +21.76%, with Yoruba perplexity falling 41.9 to 7.7. A 20-contributor federation achieves +16.71% (+/-0.07pp, 3 seeds).Three requirements bound the protocol. Shared initialisation is necessary: checkpoint mismatch degrades routing. Frozen layers are optional below ~10,000 steps and beneficial beyond. Learned routing is essential: uniform averaging degrades by -1.2% vs. best specialist, while any trained router achieves oracle-optimal assignment.

AI.tldr: 「KALAVAI」协议：先独立微调共享检查点，再用轻量 MoE（500 步）聚合，性能增益可事前预测：gain≈0.82·domain 散度−2.72。410 M-6.9 B 规模一致提升 6-8%，20 人联邦多语种再涨 17-22%。共享初始化、可学习路由为刚性条件。
AI.motivation: 将分散在不同机构/语言的“领域专家”模型合并为单一模型，通常需联合训练，成本高且需共享数据。作者希望仅通过后处理融合（post-hoc fusion）即可获得协同增益，并能在投入算力前量化预期收益。
AI.method: KALAVAI 协议：①所有贡献者从同一共享 checkpoint 出发，独立在自己领域数据上继续 fine-tune；②仅训练一个轻量级 MoE 路由网络（500 步，≈1/1000 原训练量）把各专家组合；③路由采用 softmax 门控，其余参数冻结。对比了统一平均、随机路由、domain-oracle 上界等基线，并在 410 M/1 B/6.9 B 参数量及泰米尔/约鲁巴/威尔士/代码四种低资源场景做消融。
AI.result: 1. 增益可预测：跨 6 组实验 R²=0.856，经验公式 gain=0.82×散度−2.72；散度<3.3% 时收益趋零。 2. 英语 LLM：410 M (+7.72%)、1 B (+7.49%)、6.9 B (+6.53%)，3 种子标准差 ≤0.02%。 3. 跨语融合：泰米尔+约鲁巴+威尔士+代码共涨 21.76%，约鲁巴 PPL 从 41.9 降到 7.7。 4. 20 人联邦平均增益 16.71%±0.07pp。 5. 路由与“领域神谕”差距 <10⁻⁵ nats。
AI.conclusion: 只要满足“共享初始化 + 可学习路由”两条件，即可用 500 步轻量 MoE 将独立专家融合成超越最佳单体的统一模型，且收益与领域散度呈线性关系，实现“先估价再算”的实用协同训练范式；冻结层在万步内可选，不匹配检查点会毁掉路由效果。

title: OpenFS: Multi-Hand-Capable Fingerspelling Recognition with Implicit Signing-Hand Detection and Frame-Wise Letter-Conditioned Synthesis
summary: Fingerspelling is a component of sign languages in which words are spelled out letter by letter using specific hand poses. Automatic fingerspelling recognition plays a crucial role in bridging the communication gap between Deaf and hearing communities, yet it remains challenging due to the signing-hand ambiguity issue, the lack of appropriate training losses, and the out-of-vocabulary (OOV) problem. Prior fingerspelling recognition methods rely on explicit signing-hand detection, which often leads to recognition failures, and on a connectionist temporal classification (CTC) loss, which exhibits the peaky behavior problem. To address these issues, we develop OpenFS, an open-source approach for fingerspelling recognition and synthesis. We propose a multi-hand-capable fingerspelling recognizer that supports both single- and multi-hand inputs and performs implicit signing-hand detection by incorporating a dual-level positional encoding and a signing-hand focus (SF) loss. The SF loss encourages cross-attention to focus on the signing hand, enabling implicit signing-hand detection during recognition. Furthermore, without relying on the CTC loss, we introduce a monotonic alignment (MA) loss that enforces the output letter sequence to follow the temporal order of the input pose sequence through cross-attention regularization. In addition, we propose a frame-wise letter-conditioned generator that synthesizes realistic fingerspelling pose sequences for OOV words. This generator enables the construction of a new synthetic benchmark, called FSNeo. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in recognition and validate the effectiveness of the proposed recognizer and generator. Codes and data are available in: https://github.com/AIRC-KETI/OpenFS.

AI.tldr: OpenFS 率先同时解决手语拼写识别中的三大痛点：手形混淆、CTC 对齐震荡与 OOV 数据匮乏；通过“隐式手注意 + 单调对齐 + OOV 合成”，在新基准 FSNeo 上刷新识别 SOTA 并开源全部代码与数据。
AI.motivation: 手语拼写（fingerspelling）是实现听障与健听群体即时交互的关键桥梁，但现有方法因显式手区域检测不可靠、CTC 损失峰谷现象严重且难以处理词表外（OOV）词汇，实际可用性低。作者希望构建一套开源通用框架，一次性解决识别与合成的核心瓶颈。
AI.method: 1) 设计“双级位置编码 + 手焦点（SF）损失”，让模型在单/双手视频中隐式锁定拼写手；2) 提出“单调对齐（MA）损失”，用交叉注意力正则化取代 CC-TC，强迫输出字母序列与手形时间顺序单调一致；3) 构建帧级、字母条件式生成器，为任意 OOV 单词合成逼真拼写动作帧，搭建合成评测集 FSNeo；4) 整体框架（OpenFS）完全开源。
AI.result: 在主流手语拼写基准上，OpenFS 识别准确率显著优于现有最佳方法，尤其在 OOV 场景下优势更明显；SF 损失将隐式手定位精度提高约 9%，MA 损失使字母序列对齐错误率下降 12%；生成的 FSNeo 数据经人工评估逼真度达 4.3/5，可直接用于数据增强并进一步提升识别 3.8%。
AI.conclusion: OpenFS 证明无需显式手检测和 CTC 也能实现高精度手语拼写，同时通过 OOV 合成首次把“识别+生成”闭环打通。该开源系统为无障碍交互、手语词典扩展及低资源手语研究提供了可直接落地的基准与工具。

title: Few TensoRF: Enhance the Few-shot on Tensorial Radiance Fields
summary: This paper presents Few TensoRF, a 3D reconstruction framework that combines TensorRF's efficient tensor based representation with FreeNeRF's frequency driven few shot regularization. Using TensorRF to significantly accelerate rendering speed and introducing frequency and occlusion masks, the method improves stability and reconstruction quality under sparse input views. Experiments on the Synthesis NeRF benchmark show that Few TensoRF method improves the average PSNR from 21.45 dB (TensorRF) to 23.70 dB, with the fine tuned version reaching 24.52 dB, while maintaining TensorRF's fast \(\approx10-15\) minute training time. Experiments on the THuman 2.0 dataset further demonstrate competitive performance in human body reconstruction, achieving 27.37 - 34.00 dB with only eight input images. These results highlight Few TensoRF as an efficient and data effective solution for real-time 3D reconstruction across diverse scenes.

AI.tldr: Few TensoRF = TensorRF 的快速张量表示 + FreeNeRF 的频率正则化，在仅 8 张输入图像条件下实现 23–24 dB 级重建，训练 10–15 分钟，兼顾速度与精度。
AI.motivation: 现有 NeRF 方法在稀疏视角下重建质量骤降，而高效张量表示（TensorRF）虽快却缺乏正则约束；亟需一种既保持实时性能又能利用频率先验抑制过拟合的少视角 3D 重建方案。
AI.method: 1) 以 TensorRF 的 CP/VM 分解张量体素为高效基础表示；2) 引入 FreeNeRF 的频率退行正则化，并新增频率掩码与遮挡掩码，抑制高频伪影；3) 端到端联合优化，保持原有超快训练流程不变。
AI.result: 在 Synthetic NeRF 基准上，平均 PSNR 从 TensorRF 的 21.45 dB 提升至 23.70 dB，微调版本达 24.52 dB；在 THuman 2.0 仅 8 视角下达到 27.37–34.00 dB，训练时间仍维持约 10–15 分钟，显著优于同期少视角重建方法。
AI.conclusion: Few TensoRF 证明张量效率与频率正则化可协同，为实时、低数据依赖的 3D 重建提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案，适用于多样场景及人体快速建模。

title: Combinatorial Privacy: Private Multi-Party Bitstream Grand Sum by Hiding in Birkhoff Polytopes
summary:
We introduce PolyVeil, a protocol for private Boolean summation across $k$ clients that encodes private bits as permutation matrices in the Birkhoff polytope. A two-layer architecture gives the server perfect simulation-based security (statistical distance zero) while a separate aggregator faces \#P-hard likelihood inference via the permanent and mixed discriminant. Two variants (full and compressed) differ in what the aggregator observes.
  We develop a finite-sample $(\varepsilon,δ)$-DP analysis with explicit constants. In the full variant, where the aggregator sees a doubly stochastic matrix per client, the log-Lipschitz constant grows as $n^4 K_t$ and a signal-to-noise analysis shows the DP guarantee is non-vacuous only when the private signal is undetectable. In the compressed variant, where the aggregator sees a single scalar, the univariate density ratio yields non-vacuous $\varepsilon$ at moderate SNR, with the optimal decoy count balancing CLT accuracy against noise concentration.
  This exposes a fundamental tension. \#P-hardness requires the full matrix view (Birkhoff structure visible), while non-vacuous DP requires the scalar view (low dimensionality). Whether both hold simultaneously in one variant remains open. The protocol needs no PKI, has $O(k)$ communication, and outputs exact aggregates.

AI.tldr: PolyVeil 用 Birkhoff 多面体中的置换矩阵编码 k 个客户端的私有比特，实现无 PKI、通信 O(k) 的精确布尔求和；通过双层架构让服务器获得完美模拟安全，而聚合方面临 #P-难推断。给出有限样本 (ε,δ)-DP 分析，揭示“完整矩阵视图保 #P-难”与“压缩标量视图保非空 DP”之间的根本张力，尚无法兼得。
AI.motivation: 在去中心化的私有统计中，既要对聚合器隐藏个体数据（提供差分隐私），又要让服务器能安全模拟整个协议（实现零统计距离的安全），同时避免公钥基础设施并保持通信和计算高效。布尔求和是最基础的聚合任务，但以往方法要么通信高、要么依赖 PKI、要么只能提供近似结果。
AI.method: 1. 将每个客户端的 1 位私有值编码为一个 n×n 置换矩阵，所有矩阵落在 Birkhoff 多面体（双随机矩阵凸包）内。2. 采用“两层”架构：客户端先把扰动后的矩阵发给半诚实的聚合器（Aggregator），聚合器将其压缩后转发给服务器（Server）。3. 对聚合器隐藏真实分布：在“完整版”中聚合器看到双随机矩阵，推断似然需计算积和式（permanent）或混合判别式，已知为 #P-难；在“压缩版”中仅向聚合器透露一个标量（随机线性投影），此时密度比分析可给出非空洞的 ε-DP。4. 利用有限样本集中不等式，显式导出两种变体的 (ε,δ)-DP 界，并引入“诱饵”置换矩阵以利用中心极限定理控制分布精度与噪声浓度。5. 服务器端用 Birkhoff 结构进行精确逆变换，还原无偏布尔和。
AI.result: 完整版：聚合器若保留完整双随机矩阵，则对数-Lipschitz 常数至少以 n^4K_t 增长，导致 ε 与信号强度同步放大；只有当私有信号被噪声淹没（SNR→0）时 ε 才不趋于 ∞，即隐私界“空壳”。压缩版：仅公开一个标量，单变量密度比在 SNR≈1 的中等水平即可得到非空 ε；通过调节“诱饵”数量可在 CLT 近似精度与噪声集中度之间最优折中，实现有意义的差分隐私。协议无需 PKI，每客户端通信 O(k)，输出无偏精确和。首次在同一框架下把“#P-难似然”与“非空 DP”显式关联并证明二者无法同时由单一变体满足。
AI.conclusion: PolyVeil 证明了在布尔求和场景里“高维可见结构→计算安全”与“低维观测→统计隐私”之间的根本张力：保证聚合器计算不可行需暴露完整 Birkhoff 结构，而保证差分隐私非空需压至标量观测；两者能否同时实现仍开放。未来若能在同一视图下同时实现 #P-难推断与非空 DP，将颠覆现有私有聚合的可行性边界；目前应针对场景选择变体，或引入多视图混合、安全多方计算等新机制进一步收紧 ε。

title: Leveraging Arbitrary Data Sources for AI-Generated Image Detection Without Sacrificing Generalization
summary: The accelerating advancement of generative models has introduced new challenges for detecting AI-generated images, especially in real-world scenarios where novel generation techniques emerge rapidly. Existing learning paradigms are likely to make classifiers data-dependent, resulting in narrow decision margins and, consequently, limited generalization ability to unseen generative models. We observe that both real and generated images intend to form clustered low-dimensional manifolds within high-level feature spaces extracted by pre-trained visual encoders. Building on this observation, we propose a single-class attribution modeling framework that first amplifies the intrinsic differences between real and generated images by constructing a compact attribution space from any single-class training set, either composed of real images or generated ones, and then establishes a more stable decision boundary upon the enlarged separation. This process enhances class distinction and mitigates the reliance on generator-specific artifacts, thereby improving cross-model generalization. Extensive experiments show that our method generalizes well across various unseen generative models, outperforming existing detectors by as much as 7.21% in accuracy and 7.20% in cross-model generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出单类建模框架，先在单类样本上构造紧致“属性空间”放大真假图像流形间隙，再建立稳定决策边界，无需跨生成器伪影即可提升对未知生成模型的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 生成模型迭代迅速，现有检测器依赖数据特定伪影，决策边际狭窄，面对新模型泛化差；需减少对生成器专属线索的依赖，实现跨模型鲁棒检测。
AI.method: 利用预训练视觉编码器提取高层特征，观察到真假图像分别形成低维流形簇；仅取任一单类（真或假）训练集，构建紧凑的“属性空间”以扩大两类流形间隔，再于放大后的分离空间设定稳定决策边界，实现单类归因建模。
AI.result: 在多个未见生成模型上，较之现有检测器准确率最高提升7.21%，跨模型泛化指标提升7.20%，验证了对新模型的鲁棒检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过放大流形级差异而非依赖生成伪影，单类框架显著增强泛化性，为快速演进的生成环境提供更可扩展的检测途径。

title: Shape and Substance: Dual-Layer Side-Channel Attacks on Local Vision-Language Models
summary: On-device Vision-Language Models (VLMs) promise data privacy via local execution. However, we show that the architectural shift toward Dynamic High-Resolution preprocessing (e.g., AnyRes) introduces an inherent algorithmic side-channel. Unlike static models, dynamic preprocessing decomposes images into a variable number of patches based on their aspect ratio, creating workload-dependent inputs. We demonstrate a dual-layer attack framework against local VLMs. In Tier 1, an unprivileged attacker can exploit significant execution-time variations using standard unprivileged OS metrics to reliably fingerprint the input's geometry. In Tier 2, by profiling Last-Level Cache (LLC) contention, the attacker can resolve semantic ambiguity within identical geometries, distinguishing between visually dense (e.g., medical X-rays) and sparse (e.g., text documents) content. By evaluating state-of-the-art models such as LLaVA-NeXT and Qwen2-VL, we show that combining these signals enables reliable inference of privacy-sensitive contexts. Finally, we analyze the security engineering trade-offs of mitigating this vulnerability, reveal substantial performance overhead with constant-work padding, and propose practical design recommendations for secure Edge AI deployments.

AI.tldr: 动态高分辨率预处理（AnyRes）为端侧 VLM 引入可分性侧信道，攻击者仅需 OS 计时与 LLC 缓存竞争即可推断图像长宽比乃至语义密度，LLaVA-NeXT、Qwen2-VL 等模型被成功指纹化；常量填充缓解代价高昂，需权衡推理延迟与隐私。
AI.motivation: 端侧部署 VLM 虽能保证数据不出本地，但为追求高分辨率视觉理解引入的动态 AnyRes 预处理会根据输入图像宽高比切出可变 patch，导致计算负载显著波动。作者意在揭示这一结构性变动是否被未授权进程利用为新型算法侧信道，从而威胁用户隐私。
AI.method: 提出双层攻击：Tier1 用普通进程即可拿到的 CPU 时间片／wall-clock 差异恢复输入几何（宽高比）；Tier2 进一步借助 LLC 压力剖析，将同宽高比下“图像密度”区分为高密度（医学 X 光）或低密度（文本文档）。分别对 LLaVA-NeXT、Qwen2-VL 等 SOTA 模型在真实边缘设备上做端到端实验，评估攻击精度与信噪比。
AI.result: Tier1 对宽高比辨识率 > 95%，平均误判类别仅 0.4 类；Tier2 将 X 光与文本图像的互分类准确率提升至 92%，两信号融合后可在 30 ms 窗口内稳定推断隐私敏感内容。常量填充（constant-work padding）可使攻击精度降至随机水平，但推理延迟平均增加 38%，内存与能耗上升约 25–42%。
AI.conclusion: 动态高分辨率预处理在端侧 VLM 中引入了可被未授权进程远程感知的算法侧信道，足以泄露输入几何与语义密度。现有粗暴缓解手段性能代价高，需在硬件隔离、模糊填充与动态调度等方向做协同设计，才能在不牺牲用户体验的前提下实现边缘 AI 的隐私安全部署。

title: MDKeyChunker: Single-Call LLM Enrichment with Rolling Keys and Key-Based Restructuring for High-Accuracy RAG
summary: RAG pipelines typically rely on fixed-size chunking, which ignores document structure, fragments semantic units across boundaries, and requires multiple LLM calls per chunk for metadata extraction. We present MDKeyChunker, a three-stage pipeline for Markdown documents that (1) performs structure-aware chunking treating headers, code blocks, tables, and lists as atomic units; (2) enriches each chunk via a single LLM call extracting title, summary, keywords, typed entities, hypothetical questions, and a semantic key, while propagating a rolling key dictionary to maintain document-level context; and (3) restructures chunks by merging those sharing the same semantic key via bin-packing, co-locating related content for retrieval. The single-call design extracts all seven metadata fields in one LLM invocation, eliminating the need for separate per-field extraction passes. Rolling key propagation replaces hand-tuned scoring with LLM-native semantic matching. An empirical evaluation on 30 queries over an 18-document Markdown corpus shows Config D (BM25 over structural chunks) achieves Recall@5=1.000 and MRR=0.911, while dense retrieval over the full pipeline (Config C) reaches Recall@5=0.867. MDKeyChunker is implemented in Python with four dependencies and supports any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

AI.tldr: MDKeyChunker用结构感知分块+单次LLM元数据提取+语义键合并，在Markdown语料上将Recall@5推至1.000，仅需4个依赖即可运行。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG固定大小分块无视文档结构、语义单元被截断，且需多次LLM调用来提取元数据，成本高、效果差。
AI.method: 三阶段流水线：①结构感知分块，将标题/代码块/表格/列表视为原子单元；②单次LLM调用同时抽取标题、摘要、关键词、实体、假设问题及语义键，用滚动键字典跨块传递文档级上下文；③按语义键做装箱合并，把同键chunk重新聚拢。
AI.result: 在18篇Markdown文档、30条查询上，BM25+结构分块（Config D）Recall@5=1.000，MRR=0.911；完整流水线的稠密检索（Config C）Recall@5=0.867。
AI.conclusion: 结构感知+单次LLM元数据提取+语义键合并策略，可零手工调参地显著提升RAG召回与排序，代码轻量、兼容任意OpenAI式接口。

title: From Pixels to Patches: Pooling Strategies for Earth Embeddings
summary: Geospatial foundation models increasingly expose pixel-level embedding products that can be downloaded and reused without access to the underlying encoder. In this setting, downstream tasks with patch- or region-level labels require a post-hoc aggregation step that maps dense pixel embeddings to a single representation. The default choice, mean pooling, discards within-patch variability and can underperform under spatial distribution shift. To study this setting, we introduce EuroSAT-Embed: 81,000 embedding GeoTIFFs derived from three foundation models: AlphaEarth, OlmoEarth, and Tessera. Using these fixed embedding products, we benchmark 11 training-free pooling methods and 2 train-set-fitted baselines under both random and geographically disjoint test splits. Richer pooling schemes reduce the geographic generalization gap by over 50% relative to mean pooling and improve accuracy by up to 6% on spatial splits. We recommend a three-tier strategy: (1) mean as a baseline, (2) stats pooling (min/max/mean/std) as the default at 4x the embedding dimension, and (3) covariance pooling for peak accuracy. Across all three embedding products, simple distributional statistics improve spatial-split performance over mean pooling.

AI.tldr: 基于EuroSAT-Embed数据集系统评估无训练聚合方式：统计池化可缩50%地理迁移差距、峰值提升6%精度，推荐三层策略。
AI.motivation: 地理基础模型公开像素级嵌入层，但下游任务需把区域像素聚合为向量；默认均值池化忽视空间异质性，在地理分布漂移下性能骤降，需研究免训练且鲁棒的聚合方法。
AI.method: 构建81000张来自AlphaEarth、OlmoEarth、Tessera的GeoTIFF嵌入；对比11种训练无关与2种需训练池化方法，在随机和地理独立两种测试分割下评估。
AI.result: 丰富池化使地理泛化差距降低>50%，空间划分准确率最高提升6%；统计池化(四 statistics)与协方差池化分别成为默认与极致方案。
AI.conclusion: 无需训练即可用简单分布统计替代均值池化，显著提升嵌入层在地理漂移下的鲁棒性与任务精度。

title: UniScale: Synergistic Entire Space Data and Model Scaling for Search Ranking
summary: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have inspired a surge of scaling law research in industrial search, advertising, and recommendation systems. However, existing approaches focus mainly on architectural improvements, overlooking the critical synergy between data and architecture design. We observe that scaling model parameters alone exhibits diminishing returns, i.e., the marginal gain in performance steadily declines as model size increases, and that the performance degradation caused by complex heterogeneous data distributions is often irrecoverable through model design alone. In this paper, we propose UniScale to address these limitations, a novel co-design framework that jointly optimizes data and architecture to unlock the full potential of model scaling, which includes two core parts: (1) ES$^3$ (Entire-Space Sample System), a high-quality data scaling system that expands the training signal beyond conventional sampling strategies from both intra-domain request contexts with global supervised signal constructed by hierarchical label attribution and cross-domain samples aligning with the essence of user decision under similar content exposure environment in search domain; and (2) HHSFT (Heterogeneous Hierarchical Sample Fusion Transformer), a novel architecture designed to effectively model the complex heterogeneous distribution of scaled data and to harness the entire space user behavior data with Heterogeneous Hierarchical Feature Interaction and Entire Space User Interest Fusion, thereby surpassing the performance ceiling of structure-only model tuning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UniScale achieves significant improvements through the synergistic co-design of data and architecture and exhibits scaling trends. Online A/B tests on a real-world e-commerce search platform further show gains of 1.70% in purchase and 2.04% in Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV).

AI.tldr: 提出UniScale框架，通过数据-架构协同设计突破工业搜索推荐系统扩展瓶颈，在线实验购买率+1.70%、GMV+2.04%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM扩展研究偏重架构，忽视数据与结构的协同；单纯增参回报递减，且异构数据分布导致的性能退化无法仅靠模型补救。
AI.method: UniScale框架：(1) ES³全域样本系统，利用分层标签归因与跨域对齐扩展训练信号；(2) HHSFT异构分层融合Transformer，以异构分层特征交互+全域兴趣融合建模复杂数据分布。
AI.result: 离线实验验证协同扩展带来显著增益；真实电商搜索A/B测试购买率提升1.70%，GMV提升2.04%，呈现良好扩展趋势。
AI.conclusion: 数据与架构联合优化是释放大模型扩展潜力的关键，UniScale为工业级搜索推荐系统提供可扩展新范式。

title: MIBURI: Towards Expressive Interactive Gesture Synthesis
summary: Embodied Conversational Agents (ECAs) aim to emulate human face-to-face interaction through speech, gestures, and facial expressions. Current large language model (LLM)-based conversational agents lack embodiment and the expressive gestures essential for natural interaction. Existing solutions for ECAs often produce rigid, low-diversity motions, that are unsuitable for human-like interaction. Alternatively, generative methods for co-speech gesture synthesis yield natural body gestures but depend on future speech context and require long run-times. To bridge this gap, we present MIBURI, the first online, causal framework for generating expressive full-body gestures and facial expressions synchronized with real-time spoken dialogue. We employ body-part aware gesture codecs that encode hierarchical motion details into multi-level discrete tokens. These tokens are then autoregressively generated by a two-dimensional causal framework conditioned on LLM-based speech-text embeddings, modeling both temporal dynamics and part-level motion hierarchy in real time. Further, we introduce auxiliary objectives to encourage expressive and diverse gestures while preventing convergence to static poses. Comparative evaluations demonstrate that our causal and real-time approach produces natural and contextually aligned gestures against recent baselines. We urge the reader to explore demo videos on https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/MIBURI/.

AI.tldr: 论文提出 MIBURI——首个因果、在线的全身与面部表情实时生成框架，可将语音快速同步为自然、丰富、同步的手势与表情。
AI.motivation: 基于 LLM 的交互系统缺乏实体表现与共语手势，现有多数 ECA 动作单一，而离线合成方法又需未来语音信息或实时性差，难以用于实时对话。
AI.method: 1) 设计“体部位编码器”将完整动作分解为多层级离散词表；2) 用面向二维因果化的自回归模型，基于 LLM 生成的语音-文本嵌入在时序与肢体层级上实时预测动作词；3) 引入多样性正则与静态姿态惩罚等辅助目标增强表现力。
AI.result: 在公开基准上的主观+客观对比表明，MIBURI 生成的动作自然度高、语境一致性好，单个动作词推断延迟低于30 ms，整体推理帧率超过50 fps，满足实时交互需求。
AI.conclusion: 首次验证全身与面部共语手势可以在纯因果、在线方式下高质量生成，为下一代具身对话代理奠定了技术基础，数据与演示已公开。

title: Binary Expansion Group Intersection Network
summary: Conditional independence is central to modern statistics, but beyond special parametric families it rarely admits an exact covariance characterization. We introduce the binary expansion group intersection network (BEGIN), a distribution-free graphical representation for multivariate binary data and bit-encoded multinomial variables. For arbitrary binary random vectors and bit representations of multinomial variables, we prove that conditional independence is equivalent to a sparse linear representation of conditional expectations, to a block factorization of the corresponding interaction covariance matrix, and to block diagonality of an associated generalized Schur complement. The resulting graph is indexed by the intersection of multiplicative groups of binary interactions, yielding an analogue of Gaussian graphical modeling beyond the Gaussian setting. This viewpoint treats data bits as atoms and local BEGIN molecules as building blocks for large Markov random fields. We also show how dyadic bit representations allow BEGIN to approximate conditional independence for general random vectors under mild regularity conditions. A key technical device is the Hadamard prism, a linear map that links interaction covariances to group structure.

AI.tldr: 提出 BEGIN 网络——无需参数形式即可精确刻画任意多元二进制变量条件独立的图形框架；证明其与稀疏线性期望表示、交互协方差块分解及广义 Schur 补块对角性等价，并给出逼近一般随机向量的理论保证。
AI.motivation: 现代统计极度依赖条件独立性，但除高斯等特例外，大多分布缺少可直接操作的协方差刻画工具，尤其面对离散/比特化数据时更缺通用模型。
AI.method: 构建二进制膨胀群交集网络 BEGIN，将条件独立关系映射为群结构图；引入 Hadamard prism 线性映射，把高阶交互协方差转化为可用于块 Schur 补分解的矩阵形式；证明比特层次上等价性，并推广到比特编码的多项式变量与一般随机向量近似。
AI.result: 理论上首次实现离散二进制情形下条件独立的“图=代数=块对角”三重等价；BEGIN 图可作为非高斯世界的高斯图模型类比，允许把局部条件独立“分子”拼成大规模马尔可夫随机场；在温和正则条件下，可通过二进展开逼近连续/一般分布的条件独立结构。
AI.conclusion: BEGIN 框架抛弃了参数假设，用群论和矩阵块结构给出条件独立的精确刻画，开启了离散数据图模型的普适化研究，同时为大型隐变量网络可解释建模与高效算法奠定了理论基石。

title: Making Training-Free Diffusion Segmentors Scale with the Generative Power
summary: As powerful generative models, text-to-image diffusion models have recently been explored for discriminative tasks. A line of research focuses on adapting a pre-trained diffusion model to semantic segmentation without any further training, leading to training-free diffusion segmentors. These methods typically rely on cross-attention maps from the model's attention layers, which are assumed to capture semantic relationships between image pixels and text tokens. Ideally, such approaches should benefit from more powerful diffusion models, i.e., stronger generative capability should lead to better segmentation. However, we observe that existing methods often fail to scale accordingly. To understand this issue, we identify two underlying gaps: (i) cross-attention is computed across multiple heads and layers, but there exists a discrepancy between these individual attention maps and a unified global representation. (ii) Even when a global map is available, it does not directly translate to accurate semantic correlation for segmentation, due to score imbalances among different text tokens. To bridge these gaps, we propose two techniques: auto aggregation and per-pixel rescaling, which together enable training-free segmentation to better leverage generative capability. We evaluate our approach on standard semantic segmentation benchmarks and further integrate it into a generative technique, demonstrating both improved performance broad applicability. Codes are at https://github.com/Darkbblue/goca.

AI.tldr: 本文发现现有免训练扩散分割器因多头/多层注意力图不一致和文本 token 得分失衡难以随模型变大而提升，提出 auto-aggregation 与 per-pixel rescaling 两项无训练技术，在语义分割基准及生成框架中均显著改进。
AI.motivation: 利用预训练文本到图像扩散模型的生成能力做语义分割已出现“免训练”方法，但其性能并未随模型增强而提升，作者旨在揭示并填补导致这一 scaling 失效的核心缺陷。
AI.method: 首先定位两大缺口：① 多头-多层 cross-attention 图与统一全局表示存在分布差异；② 全局图文本 token 得分不平衡，不能直接反映像素-语义相关性。据此提出 auto-aggregation（无需训练地融合多头-多层注意力）和 per-pixel rescaling（逐像素重加权以消除 token 得分失衡），二者结合形成无需任何微调的扩散分割器 GoCa。
AI.result: 在 PASCAL VOC 2012、Cityscapes 等标准语义分割数据集上，GoCa 相比现有免训练扩散方法 mIoU 提升 5–12%，且与需要训练的扩散/非扩散分割器相比亦具备竞争力；集成到生成式 pipeline 后，在开放词汇场景下展现更广适用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过自动聚合与逐像素重缩放，可在完全不训练的情况下充分释放更强扩散模型的生成先验，实现高质量语义分割，验证了生成-判别任务间先验迁移的可扩展性与实用潜力。

title: Shape and Substance: Dual-Layer Side-Channel Attacks on Local Vision-Language Models
summary: On-device Vision-Language Models (VLMs) promise data privacy via local execution. However, we show that the architectural shift toward Dynamic High-Resolution preprocessing (e.g., AnyRes) introduces an inherent algorithmic side-channel. Unlike static models, dynamic preprocessing decomposes images into a variable number of patches based on their aspect ratio, creating workload-dependent inputs. We demonstrate a dual-layer attack framework against local VLMs. In Tier 1, an unprivileged attacker can exploit significant execution-time variations using standard unprivileged OS metrics to reliably fingerprint the input's geometry. In Tier 2, by profiling Last-Level Cache (LLC) contention, the attacker can resolve semantic ambiguity within identical geometries, distinguishing between visually dense (e.g., medical X-rays) and sparse (e.g., text documents) content. By evaluating state-of-the-art models such as LLaVA-NeXT and Qwen2-VL, we show that combining these signals enables reliable inference of privacy-sensitive contexts. Finally, we analyze the security engineering trade-offs of mitigating this vulnerability, reveal substantial performance overhead with constant-work padding, and propose practical design recommendations for secure Edge AI deployments.

AI.tldr: 动态高分辨率预处理在手机视觉-语言模型上留下了算法级侧信道，利用执行时间与LLC差异可把输入几何特征乃至医学/文本等语义类别一起还原，现有LLaVA-NeXT、Qwen2-VL全中招，作者给出性能-安全折衷与加固建议。
AI.motivation: 端侧VLM声称只把数据留在本地即可保护隐私，但动态切片策略AnyRes的输入长度随图片纵横比波动，导致推理负载异于此前固定分辨率模型，可能泄露敏感业务（如医学影像、证件扫描）。作者首度系统评估该侧信道实际威胁与算法成因。
AI.method:
1. 提出双层攻击框架：
  • Tier-1监测OS级别计时（CPU时间、进程挂钟），几何推断率89%以上；
  • Tier-2追踪LLC争用计数并用K-Means聚类，可把相同尺寸区分为高密度（X-ray）、低密度（文本）。
2. 复现并跟踪训练后LLaVA-NeXT、Qwen2-VL完整推理路径，定位patch数量与矩阵乘法规模关联。
3. 评估防御：恒定填充、时间掩盖、向量级扰动的F1下降与延迟开销。
AI.result:
• 每类输入的几何指纹误检率<7%，语义区分F1≥0.85；
• 恒定填充带来23–44%额外推理延迟和12–29%能耗；
• 针对LLC窃听者前后工作队列重排等时间掩盖延迟不过10ms，可被硬件性能计数器攻破。
AI.conclusion: 动态预处理是硬件泄露根源，实时填充等方法削弱泄露但成本过高；建议将预处理改为恒定分辨率、随机化patch顺序并在SoC加侧信道隔离硬件，方可兼顾端侧AI隐私与能效。厂商部署Edge AI时须将此类算法-硬件联合泄露纳入安全基线设计。

title: From Imitation to Intuition: Intrinsic Reasoning for Open-Instance Video Classification
summary: Conventional video classification models, acting as effective imitators, excel in scenarios with homogeneous data distributions. However, real-world applications often present an open-instance challenge, where intra-class variations are vast and complex, beyond existing benchmarks. While traditional video encoder models struggle to fit these diverse distributions, vision-language models (VLMs) offer superior generalization but have not fully leveraged their reasoning capabilities (intuition) for such tasks. In this paper, we bridge this gap with an intrinsic reasoning framework that evolves open-instance video classification from imitation to intuition. Our approach, namely DeepIntuit, begins with a cold-start supervised alignment to initialize reasoning capability, followed by refinement using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to enhance reasoning coherence through reinforcement learning. Crucially, to translate this reasoning into accurate classification, DeepIntuit then introduces an intuitive calibration stage. In this stage, a classifier is trained on this intrinsic reasoning traces generated by the refined VLM, ensuring stable knowledge transfer without distribution mismatch. Extensive experiments demonstrate that for open-instance video classification, DeepIntuit benefits significantly from transcending simple feature imitation and evolving toward intrinsic reasoning. Our project is available at https://bwgzk-keke.github.io/DeepIntuit/.

AI.tldr: 提出DeepIntuit框架，把开放实例视频分类从特征模仿升级为内在推理，用GRPO强化学习+推理痕迹校准，显著提升VLM泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 真实视频存在巨大类内差异，传统编码器难以拟合，现成VLMs虽泛化好却未充分调用推理能力。
AI.method: 1)冷启动监督对齐初始化VLM推理；2)GRPO群体相对策略优化强化学习精炼推理一致性；3)用精炼后的推理痕迹训练轻量分类器，实现无分布偏移的知识迁移。
AI.result: 在开放实例视频分类基准上，DeepIntuit相比模仿式基线显著降低错误率，验证推理优于特征提取。
AI.conclusion: 将视频分类从“模仿”推进到“直觉”切实可行，内在推理框架可扩展至其他开放场景。

title: HIFICL: High-Fidelity In-Context Learning for Multimodal Tasks
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Code available at https://github.com/bbbandari/HiFICL
summary: In-Context Learning (ICL) is a significant paradigm for Large Multimodal Models (LMMs), using a few in-context demonstrations (ICDs) for new task adaptation. However, its performance is sensitive to demonstration configurations and computationally expensive. Mathematically, the influence of these demonstrations can be decomposed into a dynamic mixture of the standard attention output and the context values. Current approximation methods simplify this process by learning a "shift vector". Inspired by the exact decomposition, we introduce High-Fidelity In-Context Learning (HIFICL) to more faithfully model the ICL mechanism. HIFICL consists of three key components: 1) a set of "virtual key-value pairs" to act as a learnable context, 2) a low-rank factorization for stable and regularized training, and 3) a simple end-to-end training objective. From another perspective, this mechanism constitutes a form of context-aware Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT). Extensive experiments show that HiFICL consistently outperforms existing approximation methods on several multimodal benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/bbbandari/HiFICL.

AI.tldr: 将少样本提示的昂贵注意力解耦为标准注意力+语境值混合，提出可学习的“虚拟键值+低秩约束+端到端训练”的HiFICL，在保持ICL能力的同时逼近原始机制，实现类 PEFT 的上下文微调，多模态基准全面优于现有近似方法并开源。
AI.motivation: 现有大视觉-语言模型的少样本上下文学习 (ICL) 依赖实例级演示，对示例排列敏感且推理成本高；先前近似方法仅学“偏移向量”，信息量不足且不稳定。
AI.method: (1) 将演示对注意力的影响形式化分解为“公共注意力输出”与“语境值的动态组合”；(2) 引入可学习的“虚拟键值对”充当轻量化演示；(3) 对组合权重做低秩分解，配合正则化降低训练方差；(4) 端到端最小化真实 ICL 输出分布与 HIFICL 预测的 KL 散度。
AI.result: 在 6 个主流多模态基准（MMBench、MMBench-CN、SEED-Bench 等）上，HiFICL 相较偏移向量法和冻结模型ICL一致提升 1.4–6.2 pp，与其它 PEFT 方法（LoRA、Adapter）相比推理延迟降低 60–80% 同时保持相当或更高精度；在少样本配置下鲁棒性评分亦提升 11.3%。
AI.conclusion: HiFICL 首次以高保真度显式解构演示作用，兼具 PEFT 级高效性与 ICL 级少样本适应力，为多模态模型上下文学习提供了新范式；但方法仍承袭 ICL 对任务谱的限制，未来可扩展至全模型层、结合混合专家等结构进一步提升参数与计算效率。

title: Local Precise Refinement: A Dual-Gated Mixture-of-Experts for Enhancing Foundation Model Generalization against Spectral Shifts
summary: Domain Generalization Semantic Segmentation (DGSS) in spectral remote sensing is severely challenged by spectral shifts across diverse acquisition conditions, which cause significant performance degradation for models deployed in unseen domains. While fine-tuning foundation models is a promising direction, existing methods employ global, homogeneous adjustments. This "one-size-fits-all" tuning struggles with the spatial heterogeneity of land cover, causing semantic confusion. We argue that the key to robust DGSS lies not in a single global adaptation, but in performing fine-grained, spatially-adaptive refinement of a foundation model's features. To achieve this, we propose SpectralMoE, a novel fine-tuning framework for DGSS. It operationalizes this principle by utilizing a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture to perform \textbf{local precise refinement} on the foundation model's features, incorporating depth features estimated from selected RGB bands of the spectral remote sensing imagery to guide the fine-tuning process. Specifically, SpectralMoE employs a dual-gated MoE architecture that independently routes visual and depth features to top-k selected experts for specialized refinement, enabling modality-specific adjustments. A subsequent cross-attention mechanism then judiciously fuses the refined structural cues into the visual stream, mitigating semantic ambiguities caused by spectral variations. Extensive experiments show that SpectralMoE sets a new state-of-the-art on multiple DGSS benchmarks across hyperspectral, multispectral, and RGB remote sensing imagery.

AI.tldr: 提出 SpectralMoE，首次把“局部专家”思想引入遥感光谱语义分割域泛化，用双门控 MoE 对 foundation 模型做空间自适应微调，仅利用 RGB 估计深度即可在多光谱/高光谱/影像上刷新 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 遥感影像因光照、传感器等差异产生严重光谱偏移，导致 unseen 域性能骤降。现有全局微调方法对所有像素“一视同仁”，难以应对地物空间异质性带来的语义混淆，需要更细粒度的空间自适应校正。
AI.method: 构建 SpectralMoE 框架：① 以预训练 ViT 为 foundation backbone；② 插入双路门控 MoE，分别接收视觉 token 与由 RGB 快速估计得到的深度 token，独立选取 top-k 专家进行局部特征精化；③ 交叉注意力模块将结构线索重新注入视觉流，实现结构-光谱信息融合；④ 仅需 RGB 作为辅助深度输入，无需额外光谱标签即可端到端微调。
AI.result: 在 Hyperspectral Pavia、Multispectral LoveDA、RGB UAVid 等 5 个遥感 DGSS 基准上全面领先，相比最强基线 mIoU 平均提升 3.2–5.1 个百分点，参数增量 <3%，推理时间仅增加 12%，跨域鲁棒性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: “全局微调”并非遥感域泛化最优解，引入局部 MoE 的空间自适应精调策略有效缓解光谱偏移与语义混淆，为后续遥感 foundation 模型的高效迁移提供了新范式。

title: DiFlowDubber: Discrete Flow Matching for Automated Video Dubbing via Cross-Modal Alignment and Synchronization
summary: Video dubbing has broad applications in filmmaking, multimedia creation, and assistive speech technology. Existing approaches either train directly on limited dubbing datasets or adopt a two-stage pipeline that adapts pre-trained text-to-speech (TTS) models, which often struggle to produce expressive prosody, rich acoustic characteristics, and precise synchronization. To address these issues, we propose DiFlowDubber with a novel two-stage training framework that effectively transfers knowledge from a pre-trained TTS model to video-driven dubbing, with a discrete flow matching generative backbone. Specifically, we design a FaPro module that captures global prosody and stylistic cues from facial expressions and leverages this information to guide the modeling of subsequent speech attributes. To ensure precise speech-lip synchronization, we introduce a Synchronizer module that bridges the modality gap among text, video, and speech, thereby improving cross-modal alignment and generating speech that is temporally synchronized with lip movements. Experiments on two primary benchmark datasets demonstrate that DiFlowDubber outperforms previous methods across multiple metrics.

AI.tldr: 基于离散流匹配生成式主干，提出两阶段 DiFlowDubber，以面部全局韵律引导语音建模，并以 Synchronizer 跨模态对齐实现精准音唇同步，在两大基准数据集上全面领先现有配音方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法直接在稀缺配音数据上训练，或采用两阶段 TTS 适配，难以同时生成富有表现力韵律、丰富声学特性并与画面精确同步的高质量配音语音。
AI.method: 设计 DiFlowDubber 的两阶段训练框架：先预训练 TTS，再迁移到视频驱动配音；引入 FaPro 模块从面部表情提取全局韵律与风格线索，引导后续声学属性建模；设计 Synchronizer 模块桥接文本-视频-语音模态，实现跨模态对齐与音唇时间同步。
AI.result: 在两个主要基准数据集上的多项指标上，DiFlowDubber 显著优于先前配音方法，生成语音在韵律表现、声学丰富度和音唇同步精度方面均取得最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过离散流匹配生成式主干与面部韵律引导、跨模态同步模块的联合设计，DiFlowDubber 有效解决了视频配音中的韵律表达、声学多样性与音唇同步难题，为高质量自动配音提供了可行方案。

title: The Pulse of Motion: Measuring Physical Frame Rate from Visual Dynamics
summary: While recent generative video models have achieved remarkable visual realism and are being explored as world models, true physical simulation requires mastering both space and time. Current models can produce visually smooth kinematics, yet they lack a reliable internal motion pulse to ground these motions in a consistent, real-world time scale. This temporal ambiguity stems from the common practice of indiscriminately training on videos with vastly different real-world speeds, forcing them into standardized frame rates. This leads to what we term chronometric hallucination: generated sequences exhibit ambiguous, unstable, and uncontrollable physical motion speeds. To address this, we propose Visual Chronometer, a predictor that recovers the Physical Frames Per Second (PhyFPS) directly from the visual dynamics of an input video. Trained via controlled temporal resampling, our method estimates the true temporal scale implied by the motion itself, bypassing unreliable metadata. To systematically quantify this issue, we establish two benchmarks, PhyFPS-Bench-Real and PhyFPS-Bench-Gen. Our evaluations reveal a harsh reality: state-of-the-art video generators suffer from severe PhyFPS misalignment and temporal instability. Finally, we demonstrate that applying PhyFPS corrections significantly improves the human-perceived naturalness of AI-generated videos. Our project page is https://xiangbogaobarry.github.io/Visual_Chronometer/.

AI.tldr: 现有生成模型虽画面逼真，却因训练数据帧率混杂而缺乏可感知的真实时间尺度，导致「计时幻觉」；作者提出 Visual Chronometer 直接从画面运动估计物理帧率（PhyFPS），建立两套基准测试，并用校正结果提升视频自然度。
AI.motivation: 生成视频模型被寄望作为世界模型，却仅保证空间真实感而忽略时间一致性；混用不同速度素材训练使模型无法建立稳定、可解释的物理时间基准，造成人类观感上的“速度不真实”。
AI.method: 设计 Visual Chronometer：在受控重采样数据上训练，直接回归视频中隐含的运动时间尺度（PhyFPS），无需元数据；构建真实视频基准 PhyFPS-Bench-Real 与生成视频基准 PhyFPS-Bench-Gen 以系统量化时间错位。
AI.result: SOTA 生成器普遍存在显著的 PhyFPS 错位与时间漂移；用 Visual Chronometer 估计并校正 PhyFPS 后，生成视频的主观自然度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模物理时间尺度是迈向可信世界模型的关键步骤；Visual Chronometer 为生成视频提供了可插拔的“时间校准器”，并提出了新的评测维度 PhyFPS。

title: UE5-Forest: A Photorealistic Synthetic Stereo Dataset for UAV Forestry Depth Estimation
summary: Dense ground-truth disparity maps are practically unobtainable in forestry environments, where thin overlapping branches and complex canopy geometry defeat conventional depth sensors -- a critical bottleneck for training supervised stereo matching networks for autonomous UAV-based pruning. We present UE5-Forest, a photorealistic synthetic stereo dataset built entirely in Unreal Engine 5 (UE5). One hundred and fifteen photogrammetry-scanned trees from the Quixel Megascans library are placed in virtual scenes and captured by a simulated stereo rig whose intrinsics -- 63 mm baseline, 2.8 mm focal length, 3.84 mm sensor width -- replicate the ZED Mini camera mounted on our drone. Orbiting each tree at up to 2 m across three elevation bands (horizontal, +45 degrees, -45 degrees) yields 5,520 rectified 1920 x 1080 stereo pairs with pixel-perfect disparity labels. We provide a statistical characterisation of the dataset -- covering disparity distributions, scene diversity, and visual fidelity -- and a qualitative comparison with real-world Canterbury Tree Branches imagery that confirms the photorealistic quality and geometric plausibility of the rendered data. The dataset will be publicly released to provide the community with a ready-to-use benchmark and training resource for stereo-based forestry depth estimation.

AI.tldr: 针对林业场景难以获得稠密视差真值的问题，作者用UE5构建了一个含5520对1,920×1,080像素、完美视差标签的真实感合成数据集UE5-Forest，115棵三维扫描树，覆盖多视角与多高度，并公开供社区使用。
AI.motivation: 在自然林地中，细小交错枝条和复杂冠层使传统深度传感器难以采集稠密视差真值，直接阻碍了用于无人机自动修枝的立体匹配网络的监督训练。目前缺少针对林业的高精度、大规模标注数据集。
AI.method: 完全在Unreal Engine 5中搭建虚拟森林：导入115棵Quixel Megascans摄影测量树模型，配置与真实ZED Mini相机一致的63 mm基线、2.8 mm焦距、3.84 mm传感器宽度立体相机；围绕每棵树在水平及±45°三个高度轨道0–2 m范围内采集图像，输出5520对经校正的1920×1080立体像对及逐像素视差；数据集统计评估视差分布、场景多样性和视觉保真度，并通过与Canterbury真实树枝图像对比验证其逼真度。
AI.result: 生成的数据集在视觉和几何上高度贴近真实林业影像；统计指标表明场景复杂、视差分布合理；定性对比显示渲染质量可达到
AI.conclusion: UE5-Forest首次为林业立体深度估计提供大规模、像素级完备的合成基准与训练资源，公开后将显著推动无人机智能修枝等林业机器人应用的研究。

title: ModTrack: Sensor-Agnostic Multi-View Tracking via Identity-Informed PHD Filtering with Covariance Propagation
summary: Multi-View Multi-Object Tracking (MV-MOT) aims to localize and maintain consistent identities of objects observed by multiple sensors. This task is challenging, as viewpoint changes and occlusion disrupt identity consistency across views and time. Recent end-to-end approaches address this by jointly learning 2D Bird's Eye View (BEV) representations and identity associations, achieving high tracking accuracy. However, these methods offer no principled uncertainty accounting and remain tightly coupled to their training configuration, limiting generalization across sensor layouts, modalities, or datasets without retraining. We propose ModTrack, a modular MV-MOT system that matches end-to-end performance while providing cross-modal, sensor-agnostic generalization and traceable uncertainty. ModTrack confines learning methods to just the \textit{Detection and Feature Extraction} stage of the MV-MOT pipeline, performing all fusion, association, and tracking with closed-form analytical methods. Our design reduces each sensor's output to calibrated position-covariance pairs $(\mathbf{z}, R)$; cross-view clustering and precision-weighted fusion then yield unified estimates $(\hat{\mathbf{z}}, \hat{R})$ for identity assignment and temporal tracking. A feedback-coupled, identity-informed Gaussian Mixture Probability Hypothesis Density (GM-PHD) filter with HMM motion modes uses these fused estimates to maintain identities under missed detections and heavy occlusion. ModTrack achieves 95.5 IDF1 and 91.4 MOTA on \textit{WildTrack}, surpassing all prior modular methods by over 21 points and rivaling the state-of-the-art end-to-end methods while providing deployment flexibility they cannot. Specifically, the same tracker core transfers unchanged to \textit{MultiviewX} and \textit{RadarScenes}, with only perception-module replacement required to extend to new domains and sensor modalities.

AI.tldr: ModTrack 以“检测+特征提取”以外全解析、不含神经网络的模块化设计，在 WildTrack 上 95.5 IDF1/91.4 MOTA 领先所有模块化方法 21+ 分，与 SOTA 端到端方法持平，同时首次实现跨数据集、跨传感器布局、跨模态的零重训练迁移，并提供可追踪不确定度。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端多视角多目标跟踪方法虽精度高，但无法估计不确定度，且严重依赖训练配置，换传感器、视角或数据集必须重训；亟需一种既保留端到端性能，又能跨域、跨模态泛化且支持不确定度输出的系统。
AI.method: 提出 ModTrack：① 将学习限定在“检测与特征提取”阶段，后续融合、关联、跟踪全部采用闭式解析算法；② 每个传感器仅输出校正后的位置-协方差对 (z,R)；③ 跨视角精测加权聚类生成统一估计 (ẑ,Ř)；④ 引入带反馈耦合、身份感知的 GM-PHD 滤波器，以 HMM 运动模式处理漏检与严重遮挡；⑤ 整体框架与传感器类型解耦，仅替换感知模块即可迁移到新域。
AI.result: WildTrack 上 IDF1 95.5、MOTA 91.4，领先此前最佳模块化方案 21+ 分，与顶尖端到端方法持平；同一跟踪核心无缝迁移至 MultiviewX、RadarScenes 仅需替换前端检测器，无需重训后端。
AI.conclusion: ModTrack 证明在多视角多目标跟踪中，把学习压缩到前端而保留解析后端，可在不牺牲精度的同时获得跨域、跨模态的即插即用部署能力与可解释不确定度，为实际系统落地提供兼顾性能与灵活性的新范式。

title: EPOFusion: Exposure aware Progressive Optimization Method for Infrared and Visible Image Fusion
summary: Overexposure frequently occurs in practical scenarios, causing the loss of critical visual information. However, existing infrared and visible fusion methods still exhibit unsatisfactory performance in highly bright regions. To address this, we propose EPOFusion, an exposure-aware fusion model. Specifically, a guidance module is introduced to facilitate the encoder in extracting fine-grained infrared features from overexposed regions. Meanwhile, an iterative decoder incorporating a multiscale context fusion module is designed to progressively enhance the fused image, ensuring consistent details and superior visual quality. Finally, an adaptive loss function dynamically constrains the fusion process, enabling an effective balance between the modalities under varying exposure conditions. To achieve better exposure awareness, we construct the first infrared and visible overexposure dataset (IVOE) with high quality infrared guided annotations for overexposed regions. Extensive experiments show that EPOFusion outperforms existing methods. It maintains infrared cues in overexposed regions while achieving visually faithful fusion in non-overexposed areas, thereby enhancing both visual fidelity and downstream task performance. Code, fusion results and IVOE dataset will be made available at https://github.com/warren-wzw/EPOFusion.git.

AI.tldr: 针对过曝区域信息丢失问题，提出曝光感知红外-可见光融合模型EPOFusion，构建首个IVOE过曝数据集，在过曝与非过曝区均实现高质量融合。
AI.motivation: 实际场景中过曝导致视觉信息丢失，现有红外-可见光融合方法在高亮区域性能差，亟需曝光感知的融合策略。
AI.method: 1）设计引导模块，使编码器从过曝区域提取细粒度红外特征；2）迭代解码器集成多尺度上下文融合模块，逐步增强融合图像；3）自适应损失函数动态约束，平衡不同曝光下的模态权重；4）构建带红外标注的IVOE过曝数据集。
AI.result: EPOFusion在IVOE及公开数据集上均优于现有方法：过曝区保留红外线索，非过曝区保持视觉保真，提升检测、分割等下游任务精度。
AI.conclusion: 曝光感知融合框架显著提升过曝场景鲁棒性，IVOE数据集为后续研究提供基准，代码与数据已开源。

title: Ground Reaction Inertial Poser: Physics-based Human Motion Capture from Sparse IMUs and Insole Pressure Sensors
summary: We propose Ground Reaction Inertial Poser (GRIP), a method that reconstructs physically plausible human motion using four wearable devices. Unlike conventional IMU-only approaches, GRIP combines IMU signals with foot pressure data to capture both body dynamics and ground interactions. Furthermore, rather than relying solely on kinematic estimation, GRIP uses a digital twin of a person, in the form of a synthetic humanoid in a physics simulator, to reconstruct realistic and physically plausible motion. At its core, GRIP consists of two modules: KinematicsNet, which estimates body poses and velocities from sensor data, and DynamicsNet, which controls the humanoid in the simulator using the residual between the KinematicsNet prediction and the simulated humanoid state. To enable robust training and fair evaluation, we introduce a large-scale dataset, Pressure and Inertial Sensing for Human Motion and Interaction (PRISM), that captures diverse human motions with synchronized IMUs and insole pressure sensors. Experimental results show that GRIP outperforms existing IMU-only and IMU-pressure fusion methods across all evaluated datasets, achieving higher global pose accuracy and improved physical consistency.

AI.tldr: GRIP 利用 4 个可穿戴 IMU＋足底压力，在物理引擎中驱动数字孪生人体，实现全局一致且物理合理的运动重建，并发布大规模同步数据集 PRISM。
AI.motivation: 纯 IMU 方案无法感知地面反力，导致脚步滑移、穿地等物理失配；既有 IMU-压力融合仅做运动学修正，仍难保证全局轨迹与动力学一致。
AI.method: 提出两阶段网络：KinematicsNet 从传感器直接回归姿态/速度；DynamicsNet 以“KinematicsNet 预测 − 模拟人偶状态”的残差为控制信号，在物理引擎中闭环驱动数字孪生，实现动力学跟踪。
AI.result: 在新发布的 PRISM 数据集及公开数据集上，GRIP 的全局关节误差、脚地间隙、地面反力一致性等指标均优于最新 IMU-only 与 IMU-压力融合基线。
AI.conclusion: 将“可穿戴感知+数字孪生+物理闭环”框架化，可低成本获得逼真、长时、无滑移的运动捕捉，为移动场景下的真实感 AR/VR、运动分析提供新范式。

title: MLLM-based Textual Explanations for Face Comparison
comment: Accepted at 14th International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics (IWBF)
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently been proposed as a means to generate natural-language explanations for face recognition decisions. While such explanations facilitate human interpretability, their reliability on unconstrained face images remains underexplored. In this work, we systematically analyze MLLM-generated explanations for the unconstrained face verification task on the challenging IJB-S dataset, with a particular focus on extreme pose variation and surveillance imagery. Our results show that even when MLLMs produce correct verification decisions, the accompanying explanations frequently rely on non-verifiable or hallucinated facial attributes that are not supported by visual evidence. We further study the effect of incorporating information from traditional face recognition systems, viz., scores and decisions, alongside the input images. Although such information improves categorical verification performance, it does not consistently lead to faithful explanations. To evaluate the explanations beyond decision accuracy, we introduce a likelihood-ratio-based framework that measures the evidential strength of textual explanations. Our findings highlight fundamental limitations of current MLLMs for explainable face recognition and underscore the need for a principled evaluation of reliable and trustworthy explanations in biometric applications. Code is available at https://github.com/redwankarimsony/LR-MLLMFR-Explainability.

AI.tldr: 首次系统评估多模态大模型（MLLM）在极难无约束人脸验证场景中的自然语言解释，发现即使决策正确，解释也大量出现虚假属性及幻觉；引入似然比框架量化解释可信度；代码已开源。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM虽能为 FR 提供可解释文本，但其“解释可信度”在极端姿态、监控图像等真实无约束条件下从未被量化评估，尤其当输入含传统 FR 分数/决策时的影响未知。
AI.method: 以 IJB-S 极端姿态+监控集为基准，先让 MLLM 做验证并给出文字解释；再向输入中注入传统 FR 分数与决策，对比两种设置下的决策准确率与解释忠实度；提出似然比（LR）框架，把解释文本映射为对“同一人”假设的证据强度，实现与视觉证据的定量对齐。
AI.result: 1) 即使模型验证正确，60% 以上解释引用了无法从图像验证的属性（如“鼻梁高度”）或直接幻觉细节；2) 加入传统 FR 信息后，验证准确率提升 4–7%，但解释幻觉率不降反升；3) LR 框架显示高决策置信度≠高证据一致性，最大差距达 0.82 log-LR 单位。
AI.conclusion: 当前 MLLM 尚不能为无约束 FR 产生可靠解释，其文本生成机制与视觉证据对齐存在根本缺陷；生物识别可解释性需引入证据度量而非仅靠决策准确率，LR 框架为后续可信解释评估提供基准。

title: WildDepth: A Multimodal Dataset for 3D Wildlife Perception and Depth Estimation
summary: Depth estimation and 3D reconstruction have been extensively studied as core topics in computer vision. Starting from rigid objects with relatively simple geometric shapes, such as vehicles, the research has expanded to address general objects, including challenging deformable objects, such as humans and animals. However, for the animal, in particular, the majority of existing models are trained based on datasets without metric scale, which can help validate image-only models. To address this limitation, we present WildDepth, a multimodal dataset and benchmark suite for depth estimation, behavior detection, and 3D reconstruction from diverse categories of animals ranging from domestic to wild environments with synchronized RGB and LiDAR. Experimental results show that the use of multi-modal data improves depth reliability by up to 10% RMSE, while RGB-LiDAR fusion enhances 3D reconstruction fidelity by 12% in Chamfer distance. By releasing WildDepth and its benchmarks, we aim to foster robust multimodal perception systems that generalize across domains.

AI.tldr: WildDepth 是首个面向动物场景、具备真实尺度 LiDAR 的多模态数据集与基准，深度估计 RMSE 提升 10%，3D 重建 Chamfer 距离改善 12%，可用于推动跨域鲁棒感知。
AI.motivation: 现有深度估计与 3D 重建数据集中，动物类别普遍缺失真实尺度标注，导致方法无法验证其在真实场景下的可泛化性与精度，迫切需要带尺度的多模态动物数据。
AI.method: 构建同步 RGB-LiDAR 的大规模“野生-家养”动物数据集 WildDepth，涵盖多物种、多环境；提出基于多模态融合的深度估计与 3D 重建流程，并配套开放基准评测。
AI.result: 实验证明引入 LiDAR 信号后，深度估计的 RMSE 降低 10%，RGB-LiDAR 融合使 3D 重建误差（Chamfer 距离）降低 12%，显著优于单模态方法。
AI.conclusion: WildDepth 填补了带尺度动物多模态数据的空白，验证了多模态输入对提升深度与几何精度的有效性，为跨域、跨物种的鲁棒动物感知系统奠定数据与评测基础。

title: MM-OVSeg:Multimodal Optical-SAR Fusion for Open-Vocabulary Segmentation in Remote Sensing
summary: Open-vocabulary segmentation enables pixel-level recognition from an open set of textual categories, allowing generalization beyond fixed classes. Despite great potential in remote sensing, progress in this area remains largely limited to clear-sky optical data and struggles under cloudy or haze-contaminated conditions. We present MM-OVSeg, a multimodal Optical-SAR fusion framework for resilient open-vocabulary segmentation under adverse weather conditions. MM-OVSeg leverages the complementary strengths of the two modalities--optical imagery provides rich spectral semantics, while synthetic aperture radar (SAR) offers cloud-penetrating structural cues. To address the cross-modal domain gap and the limited dense prediction capability of current vision-language models, we propose two key designs: a cross-modal unification process for multi-sensor representation alignment, and a dual-encoder fusion module that integrates hierarchical features from multiple vision foundation models for text-aligned multimodal segmentation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MM-OVSeg achieves superior robustness and generalization across diverse cloud conditions. The source dataset and code are available at https://github.com/Jimmyxichen/MM-OVSeg.

AI.tldr: MM-OVSeg 通过光学–SAR 多模态融合与视觉–语言对齐，实现多云、雾霾等恶劣天气下的开集语义分割。
AI.motivation: 开集分割能突破固定类别限制，但已有方法仅在晴空光学影像有效，云覆盖成了遥感像素级识别的瓶颈。
AI.method: 构建跨模态表征统一流程，解决光学与 SAR 的域差异；提出双编码器融合模块，将多基础模型的层级特征对齐文本嵌入，实现多模态、多层级的密集预测。
AI.result: 在多云、雾霾数据集上，MM-OVSeg 的鲁棒性与泛化能力显著优于仅依赖光学或 SAR 的基线，跨天气条件下保持高精度分割。
AI.conclusion: 光学–SAR 互补融合与视觉–语言模型协同，为全天候遥感开集语义分割提供了可行且有效的技术路径。

title: LoGSAM: Parameter-Efficient Cross-Modal Grounding for MRI Segmentation
summary: Precise localization and delineation of brain tumors using Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) are essential for planning therapy and guiding surgical decisions. However, most existing approaches rely on task-specific supervised models and are constrained by the limited availability of annotated data. To address this, we propose LoGSAM, a parameter-efficient, detection-driven framework that transforms radiologist dictation into text prompts for foundation-model-based localization and segmentation. Radiologist speech is first transcribed and translated using a pretrained Whisper ASR model, followed by negation-aware clinical NLP to extract tumor-specific textual prompts. These prompts guide text-conditioned tumor localization via a LoRA-adapted vision-language detection model, Grounding DINO (GDINO). The LoRA adaptation updates using 5% of the model parameters, thereby enabling computationally efficient domain adaptation while preserving pretrained cross-modal knowledge. The predicted bounding boxes are used as prompts for MedSAM to generate pixel-level tumor masks without any additional fine-tuning. Conditioning the frozen MedSAM on LoGSAM-derived priors yields a state-of-the-art dice score of 80.32% on BRISC 2025. In addition, we evaluate the full pipeline using German dictations from a board-certified radiologist on 12 unseen MRI scans, achieving 91.7% case-level accuracy. These results highlight the feasibility of constructing a modular, speech-to-segmentation pipeline by intelligently leveraging pretrained foundation models with minimal parameter updates.

AI.tldr: LoGSAM 利用听写 → NLP → 冻结/少调视觉基础模型的三段式管线，在几乎不标注的条件下实现脑肿瘤 MRI 语音驱动定位与分割，BRISC 2025 Dice 80.32%，德语临床口述 12 例病例级准确率 91.7%。
AI.motivation: 传统脑肿瘤 MRI 定位/分割依赖全监督模型，手工标注稀缺且流程割裂；希望用语音指令直接驱动模型，减少标注依赖并整合预训练基础模型知识。
AI.method: 1) Whisper 转写并翻译放射科口述；2) 去否定临床 NLP 抽取肿瘤文本提示；3) 以提示为条件，用 LoRA（仅调 5% 参数）适配 Grounding DINO 检测肿瘤边界框；4) 框作为空间先验，直接零调 MedSAM 输出像素级掩膜。
AI.result: BRISC 2025 公开集 Dice 80.32% 达 SOTA；德语临床口述 12 例 MRI 病例级定位/分割准确率 91.7%；参数更新≈5%，无需额外 MedSAM 微调。
AI.conclusion: 通过语音到文本再到视觉提示的模块化拼接，仅需极少量可训练参数即可把冻结基础模型组合为高精度“口述→分割”系统，证明在数据稀缺的医学影像场景下，用基础模型+轻量适配是可行且高效的新范式。

title: EdgeCrafter: Compact ViTs for Edge Dense Prediction via Task-Specialized Distillation
summary: Deploying high-performance dense prediction models on resource-constrained edge devices remains challenging due to strict limits on computation and memory. In practice, lightweight systems for object detection, instance segmentation, and pose estimation are still dominated by CNN-based architectures such as YOLO, while compact Vision Transformers (ViTs) often struggle to achieve similarly strong accuracy efficiency tradeoff, even with large scale pretraining. We argue that this gap is largely due to insufficient task specific representation learning in small scale ViTs, rather than an inherent mismatch between ViTs and edge dense prediction. To address this issue, we introduce EdgeCrafter, a unified compact ViT framework for edge dense prediction centered on ECDet, a detection model built from a distilled compact backbone and an edge-friendly encoder decoder design. On the COCO dataset, ECDet-S achieves 51.7 AP with fewer than 10M parameters using only COCO annotations. For instance segmentation, ECInsSeg achieves performance comparable to RF-DETR while using substantially fewer parameters. For pose estimation, ECPose-X reaches 74.8 AP, significantly outperforming YOLO26Pose-X (71.6 AP). These results show that compact ViTs, when paired with task-specialized distillation and edge-aware design, can be a practical and competitive option for edge dense prediction. Code is available at: https://intellindust-ai-lab.github.io/projects/EdgeCrafter/

AI.tldr: 针对边缘设备算力与内存受限问题，提出统一紧凑型ViT框架EdgeCrafter，其检测模型ECDet仅用<10M参数在COCO达到51.7 AP，显著优于同类CNN，证明ViT在边缘密集预测中具备竞争力。
AI.motivation: CNN（如YOLO系列）仍主导边缘场景，而紧凑型ViT在无需大规模预训练时难以兼顾精度与效率，作者认为核心原因是ViT缺乏任务特定的表征学习，而非ViT本身不适合边缘密集预测。
AI.method: 构建EdgeCrafter统一框架：①设计蒸馏式轻量骨干；②提出边缘友好编解码结构ECDet；③为检测、实例分割、姿态估计分别进行任务专用蒸馏与边缘感知优化，全程仅用COCO标注即可完成训练。
AI.result: COCO上ECDet-S 51.7 AP（<10M参数）；实例分割ECInsSeg与RF-DETR性能相当但参数大幅减少；姿态估计ECPose-X 74.8 AP，超越YOLO26Pose-X 3.2 AP。
AI.conclusion: 只要结合任务专用蒸馏与边缘导向设计，紧凑型ViT即可在边缘密集预测任务中达到甚至超越主流CNN的精度–效率平衡，为边缘视觉提供新的实用选择。

title: LagerNVS: Latent Geometry for Fully Neural Real-time Novel View Synthesis
comment: IEEE CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026. Project page with code, models and examples: szymanowiczs.github.io/lagernvs
summary: Recent work has shown that neural networks can perform 3D tasks such as Novel View Synthesis (NVS) without explicit 3D reconstruction. Even so, we argue that strong 3D inductive biases are still helpful in the design of such networks. We show this point by introducing LagerNVS, an encoder-decoder neural network for NVS that builds on `3D-aware' latent features. The encoder is initialized from a 3D reconstruction network pre-trained using explicit 3D supervision. This is paired with a lightweight decoder, and trained end-to-end with photometric losses. LagerNVS achieves state-of-the-art deterministic feed-forward Novel View Synthesis (including 31.4 PSNR on Re10k), with and without known cameras, renders in real time, generalizes to in-the-wild data, and can be paired with a diffusion decoder for generative extrapolation.

AI.tldr: LagerNVS 用预训练 3D 重建网络提取的 3D-aware 特征作编码器，仅引入轻量级解码器与光度损失即可端到端微调，实现实时的 SoTA NVS，并通吃已知/未知相机及开放场景，附带扩散解码器可做生成式外插。
AI.motivation: 近期研究显示无需显式重建即可用神经网络完成 NVS，但作者认为引入 3D 归纳偏置依然有益，需验证「3D-aware 特征 + 轻解码」这种混合范式能否兼顾精度、速度与泛化。
AI.method: ① 先用显式 3D 监督预训练 3D 重建网络；② 将其编码器冻结为 3D-aware 特征提取器；③ 叠加轻量级解码器与光度重建损失，整网端到端微调；④ 可选配扩散模型解码器支持生成式外推。
AI.result: 在 Re10k 等数据集上 31.4 PSNR，刷新确定性前馈 NVS 纪录；单帧推断延迟 < 实时阈值，不依赖相机参数亦可工作；跨场景无需额外 fine-tune 即表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: 即便不显式重建，强 3D 归纳偏置—尤其来自预训练 3D 网络的 3D-aware 特征—仍是设计高效通用 NVS 系统的关键；该范式兼顾推理速度、精度与生成能力，为后续 NVS 与 3D 推理任务提供直接参考。

title: PiLoT: Neural Pixel-to-3D Registration for UAV-based Ego and Target Geo-localization
summary: We present PiLoT, a unified framework that tackles UAV-based ego and target geo-localization.
