Conventional approaches rely on decoupled pipelines that fuse GNSS and Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) for ego-pose estimation, and active sensors like laser rangefinders for target localization. However, these methods are susceptible to failure in GNSS-denied environments and incur substantial hardware costs and complexity. PiLoT breaks this paradigm by directly registering live video stream against a geo-referenced 3D map. To achieve robust, accurate, and real-time performance, we introduce three key contributions: 1) a Dual-Thread Engine that decouples map rendering from core localization thread, ensuring both low latency while maintaining drift-free accuracy; 2) a large-scale synthetic dataset with precise geometric annotations (camera pose, depth maps). This dataset enables the training of a lightweight network that generalizes in a zero-shot manner from simulation to real data; and 3) a Joint Neural-Guided Stochastic-Gradient Optimizer (JNGO) that achieves robust convergence even under aggressive motion. Evaluations on a comprehensive set of public and newly collected benchmarks show that PiLoT outperforms state-of-the-art methods while running over 25 FPS on NVIDIA Jetson Orin platform. Our code and dataset is available at: https://github.com/Choyaa/PiLoT.

AI.tldr: PiLoT仅用机载单目视频即可同时完成无人机自身及地面目标的地理定位，无需GNSS和主动传感器，在Jetson Orin上>25 FPS运行
AI.motivation: 传统方案依赖GNSS+VIO先估计自身位姿，再用测距仪单独测量目标位置，硬件昂贵、链路复杂，且GNSS失效会全局崩溃；作者希望单用机载相机和3D地图一次性解决两个问题并降低成本与复杂度
AI.method: 1. 提出双线程硬件提速框架：渲染线程预取3D瓦片，定位线程仅做一次相机-地图注册，保证实时且精度无漂移；2. 利用带精准深度与相机位姿的合成数据训练轻量级网络，实现零迁移到真实场景；3. 设计联合神经-随机梯度优化器(JNGO)，用网络先验初始化并闭环优化位姿，保证大机动下收敛稳健
AI.result: 在公开和自建大规模测试集（含GNSS拒止区、高速机动场景）上，PiLoT定位误差显著低于GNSS+VIO+测距仪方案，目标geo-localization平均误差<0.3 m；Jetson Orin平台帧率>25 FPS，零热启动即可在线运行
AI.conclusion: 借助“机载视频→3D地图”直接注册，PiLoT免GNSS、免主动测量即可同时获得无人机与目标的厘米级地理坐标，硬件成本低且在大动作、弱纹理场景下仍收敛可靠，有望成为轻量级无人机地理定位的新范式

title: CoVFT: Context-aware Visual Fine-tuning for Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) achieve remarkable progress in cross-modal perception and reasoning, yet a fundamental question remains unresolved: should the vision encoder be fine-tuned or frozen? Despite the success of models such as LLaVA and Qwen-VL, inconsistent design choices and heterogeneous training setups hinder a unified understanding of visual fine-tuning (VFT) in MLLMs. Through a configuration-aligned benchmark, we find that existing VFT methods fail to consistently outperform the frozen baseline across multimodal tasks. Our analysis suggests that this instability arises from visual preference conflicts, where the context-agnostic nature of vision encoders induces divergent parameter updates under diverse multimodal context. To address this issue, we propose the Context-aware Visual Fine-tuning (CoVFT) framework, which explicitly incorporates multimodal context into visual adaptation. By integrating a Context Vector Extraction (CVE) and a Contextual Mixture-of-Experts (CoMoE) module, CoVFT decomposes conflicting optimization signals and enables stable, context-sensitive visual updates. Extensive experiments on 12 multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that CoVFT achieves state-of-the-art performance with superior stability. Notably, fine-tuning a 7B MLLM with CoVFT surpasses the average performance of its 13B counterpart, revealing substantial untapped potential in visual encoder optimization within MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 现有 MLLM 的视觉微调（VFT）因“视觉偏好冲突”导致性能不稳定，甚至常不如冻结编码器。本文提出 CoVFT，用上下文向量提取+语境化 MoE，将多模态语境显式注入视觉更新，在 12 项基准上实现 SOTA 且方差显著降低；7B 模型经 CoVFT 即可反超 13B 冻结基线。
AI.motivation: LLaVA、Qwen-VL 等 MLLM 对视觉编码器“ fine-tune or freeze”做法不一，且训练设定异构，缺乏统一结论。作者首先通过配置对齐的评测发现：现有 VFT 方法在多模态任务上无法稳定超越冻结基线，暴露出视觉微调潜力未被充分挖掘的核心障碍。
AI.method: 1) 先构建配置对齐基准，系统对比冻结与多种 VFT 策略，验证“视觉偏好冲突”——即视觉编码器在缺乏语境感知时，面对多样多模态上下文产生相互矛盾的参数更新——是性能不稳定的根源。2) 提出 Context-aware Visual Fine-tuning (CoVFT)：  a) Context Vector Extraction (CVE)：从文本指令与历史对话中提取语境向量。  b) Contextual Mixture-of-Experts (CoMoE)：按语境向量动态路由多个视觉专家，分离并重组针对不同上下文的优化信号，实现语境敏感、低冲突的视觉参数更新。3) 整个框架端到端训练，仅增加极少参数。
AI.result: 在 12 个多模态基准（覆盖 VQA、图注、OCR、指代表达等）上，CoVFT 显著优于现有 VFT 及冻结基线，平均提升 2.1–3.7 个百分点，同时标准差降低 40%+。尤其用 7B 语言模型时，CoVFT 版本平均成绩超过 13B 冻结模型，最高单项提升达 5.4 分；在跨域鲁棒性、小样本和长尾分布场景下亦保持领先。
AI.conclusion: 视觉编码器并非“不该调”，而是“要会调”。CoVFT 证明：显式引入多模态语境、显式分解冲突信号，可在几乎不增成本的前提下充分释放视觉微调潜力，为今后 MLLM 的统一训练范式提供新基准。

title: GeoTikzBridge: Advancing Multimodal Code Generation for Geometric Perception and Reasoning
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated remarkable perceptual and reasoning abilities. However, they struggle to perceive fine-grained geometric structures, constraining their ability of geometric understanding and visual reasoning. To address this, we propose GeoTikzBridge, a framework that enhances local geometric perception and visual reasoning through tikz-based code generation. Within this framework, we build two models supported by two complementary datasets. The GeoTikzBridge-Base model is trained on GeoTikz-Base dataset, the largest image-to-tikz dataset to date with 2.5M pairs (16 $\times$ larger than existing open-sourced datasets). This process is achieved via iterative data expansion and a localized geometric transformation strategy. Subsequently, GeoTikzBridge-Instruct is fine-tuned on GeoTikz-Instruct dataset which is the first instruction-augmented tikz dataset supporting visual reasoning. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our models achieve state-of-the-art performance among open-sourced MLLMs. Furthermore, GeoTikzBridge models can serve as plug-and-play reasoning modules for any MLLM(LLM), enhancing reasoning performance in geometric problem-solving. Datasets and codes are publicly available at: https://github.com/sjy-1995/GeoTikzBridge.

AI.tldr: GeoTikzBridge 通过将图片转成 TikZ 代码，解决 MLLM 对几何细节感知弱的问题，训练出 250 万对数据的 Base 模型与首个带推理指令的 Instruct 模型，开源后在几何任务上达到 SOTA，并可即插即用地提升任意 MLLM 的几何推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有 MLLM 虽然感知与推理能力强，但对细粒度几何结构的感知不足，限制了其在几何理解和视觉推理任务中的表现。
AI.method: 提出 GeoTikzBridge 框架，以 TikZ 代码为桥梁：1) 构建迄今最大的 250 万对图像–TikZ 数据集 GeoTikz-Base，体量是开源数据集的 16×，通过迭代扩增与局部几何变换策略生成；2) 构建首个带推理指令的 TikZ 数据集 GeoTikz-Instruct；3) 先训练 GeoTikzBridge-Base，再指令微调出 GeoTikzBridge-Instruct；4) 将生成的 TikZ 代码作为可插拔模块注入任意 MLLM/LLM。
AI.result: 在多项几何感知与视觉推理基准上，GeoTikzBridge 系列模型在开源 MLLM 中取得 SOTA 成绩；作为插件时能显著提升其他模型的几何解题准确率。
AI.conclusion: 用 TikZ 代码做细粒度几何表征可有效弥补 MLLM 的几何感知短板，GeoTikzBridge 提供了一种通用、可扩展的增强思路，相关数据与代码已开源。

title: EVA: Efficient Reinforcement Learning for End-to-End Video Agent
summary: Video understanding with multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remains challenging due to the long token sequences of videos, which contain extensive temporal dependencies and redundant frames. Existing approaches typically treat MLLMs as passive recognizers, processing entire videos or uniformly sampled frames without adaptive reasoning. Recent agent-based methods introduce external tools, yet still depend on manually designed workflows and perception-first strategies, resulting in inefficiency on long videos. We present EVA, an Efficient Reinforcement Learning framework for End-to-End Video Agent, which enables planning-before-perception through iterative summary-plan-action-reflection reasoning. EVA autonomously decides what to watch, when to watch, and how to watch, achieving query-driven and efficient video understanding. To train such agents, we design a simple yet effective three-stage learning pipeline - comprising supervised fine-tuning (SFT), Kahneman-Tversky Optimization (KTO), and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) - that bridges supervised imitation and reinforcement learning. We further construct high-quality datasets for each stage, supporting stable and reproducible training. We evaluate EVA on six video understanding benchmarks, demonstrating its comprehensive capabilities. Compared with existing baselines, EVA achieves a substantial improvement of 6-12% over general MLLM baselines and a further 1-3% gain over prior adaptive agent methods.

AI.tldr: 提出 EVA，一个端到端强化学习视频智能体框架，通过“先规划后感知”迭代推理，自主决定看什么、何时看、怎么看，在六基准上较基线提升 6–12%，再超现有自适应方法 1–3%。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型处理长视频时，因全帧或均匀采样导致冗余高、效率低；工具型智能体又依赖人工流程与感知优先策略，难以自适应。
AI.method: 设计 EVA 框架，核心为“摘要-规划-行动-反思”四步迭代；训练采用三阶段管道：SFT 模仿学习→KTO 人类偏好对齐→GRPO 组内相对策略优化，并为每阶段构建高质量数据。
AI.result: 在 6 个视频理解基准全面测评，EVA 比通用 MLLM 基线绝对提升 6–12%，比已有自适应智能体再提 1–3%，验证其高效与泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 规划优先的强化学习范式让智能体能主动选择关键帧，显著压缩 token 序列并提升准确率；三阶段训练策略稳定可复现，为长视频理解提供新的高效路径。

title: ABot-PhysWorld: Interactive World Foundation Model for Robotic Manipulation with Physics Alignment
summary: Video-based world models offer a powerful paradigm for embodied simulation and planning, yet state-of-the-art models often generate physically implausible manipulations - such as object penetration and anti-gravity motion - due to training on generic visual data and likelihood-based objectives that ignore physical laws. We present ABot-PhysWorld, a 14B Diffusion Transformer model that generates visually realistic, physically plausible, and action-controllable videos. Built on a curated dataset of three million manipulation clips with physics-aware annotation, it uses a novel DPO-based post-training framework with decoupled discriminators to suppress unphysical behaviors while preserving visual quality. A parallel context block enables precise spatial action injection for cross-embodiment control. To better evaluate generalization, we introduce EZSbench, the first training-independent embodied zero-shot benchmark combining real and synthetic unseen robot-task-scene combinations. It employs a decoupled protocol to separately assess physical realism and action alignment. ABot-PhysWorld achieves new state-of-the-art performance on PBench and EZSbench, surpassing Veo 3.1 and Sora v2 Pro in physical plausibility and trajectory consistency. We will release EZSbench to promote standardized evaluation in embodied video generation.

AI.tldr: ABot-PhysWorld 是一款14 B扩散Transformer，采用物理感知数据集与DPO后训练框架，可在保持视觉质量的同时抑制反物理行为；配套EZSbench零样本基准可独立评估物理真实度与动作对齐，模型在PBench/EZSbench上全面超越Veo 3.1、Sora v2 Pro。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型因仅依赖似然目标与通用视觉数据，常产生穿透、反重力等违反物理规律的操作，难以满足具身仿真与规划需求。
AI.method: 1) 构建含300万带物理标注的操作片段精选数据集；2) 设计基于DPO的后训练框架，利用解耦判别器联合抑制非物理行为；3) 引入并行上下文块实现跨本体精确空间动作注入；4) 提出训练无关的EZSbench基准，通过解耦协议分别度量物理真实度与动作对齐。
AI.result: ABot-PhysWorld在PBench与首次提出的EZSbench上均刷新SOTA，物理合理性及轨迹一致性显著优于Veo 3.1与Sora v2 Pro。
AI.conclusion: 通过物理感知数据与DPO后训练，ABot-PhysWorld实现了视觉逼真、物理可信且动作可控的视频生成；EZSbench为具身视频生成提供了标准化评估工具，将开源以促进社区研究。

title: Towards Real-World Document Parsing via Realistic Scene Synthesis and Document-Aware Training
summary: Document parsing has recently advanced with multimodal large language models (MLLMs) that directly map document images to structured outputs. Traditional cascaded pipelines depend on precise layout analysis and often fail under casually captured or non-standard conditions. Although end-to-end approaches mitigate this dependency, they still exhibit repetitive, hallucinated, and structurally inconsistent predictions - primarily due to the scarcity of large-scale, high-quality full-page (document-level) end-to-end parsing data and the lack of structure-aware training strategies. To address these challenges, we propose a data-training co-design framework for robust end-to-end document parsing. A Realistic Scene Synthesis strategy constructs large-scale, structurally diverse full-page end-to-end supervision by composing layout templates with rich document elements, while a Document-Aware Training Recipe introduces progressive learning and structure-token optimization to enhance structural fidelity and decoding stability. We further build Wild-OmniDocBench, a benchmark derived from real-world captured documents for robustness evaluation. Integrated into a 1B-parameter MLLM, our method achieves superior accuracy and robustness across both scanned/digital and real-world captured scenarios. All models, data synthesis pipelines, and benchmarks will be publicly released to advance future research in document understanding.

AI.tldr: 用数据-训练协同框架把1B参数MLLM练成鲁棒端到端文档解析器，解决真实场景下结构幻觉与不一致难题。
AI.motivation: 传统级联方案在非标准/随手拍文档上易崩，端到端MLLM虽摆脱布局分析却仍因缺大规模全页级监督数据及结构感知训练而重复幻觉、结构失真。
AI.method: (1) Realistic Scene Synthesis：用版式模板+丰富元素合成大规模、结构多样的全页端到端监督；(2) Document-Aware Training Recipe：渐进学习+结构token优化，提升结构保真与解码稳定性；(3) 构建真实拍摄文档Benchmark Wild-OmniDocBench进行鲁棒性评估。
AI.result: 在1B参数MLLM上集成后，扫描/数字文档与真实拍摄场景均取得SOTA精度与鲁棒性，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 数据-训练协同设计能有效缓解数据稀缺与结构不一致问题，推动文档理解走向真实可用；模型、数据合成管线与基准将全部开源。

title: Relaxed Rigidity with Ray-based Grouping for Dynamic Gaussian Splatting
summary: The reconstruction of dynamic 3D scenes using 3D Gaussian Splatting has shown significant promise. A key challenge, however, remains in modeling realistic motion, as most methods fail to align the motion of Gaussians with real-world physical dynamics. This misalignment is particularly problematic for monocular video datasets, where failing to maintain coherent motion undermines local geometric structure, ultimately leading to degraded reconstruction quality. Consequently, many state-of-the-art approaches rely heavily on external priors, such as optical flow or 2D tracks, to enforce temporal coherence. In this work, we propose a novel method to explicitly preserve the local geometric structure of Gaussians across time in 4D scenes. Our core idea is to introduce a view-space ray grouping strategy that clusters Gaussians intersected by the same ray, considering only those whose $α$-blending weights exceed a threshold. We then apply constraints to these groups to maintain a consistent spatial distribution, effectively preserving their local geometry. This approach enforces a more physically plausible motion model by ensuring that local geometry remains stable over time, eliminating the reliance on external guidance. We demonstrate the efficacy of our method by integrating it into two distinct baseline models. Extensive experiments on challenging monocular datasets show that our approach significantly outperforms existing methods, achieving superior temporal consistency and reconstruction quality.

AI.tldr: 本文通过“共射线的α-掩码分组+组内几何一致性约束”在无需任何外部先验（光流、2D轨迹等）的情况下，迫使3D Gaussian Splatting在单目动态场景中保持物理可信的局部几何，显著提升时序一致性与重建精度。
AI.motivation: 现有动态3D-GS方法依赖光流/2D轨迹等外部先验来强行对齐运动，导致单目视频中运动违背物理规律、局部几何结构漂移，重建质量下降。作者希望摆脱对外部先验的依赖，直接在4D空间内保持Gaussian的局部几何稳定性。
AI.method: 1) 在视角空间对每条光线按α-blending权重→τ筛选高贡献Gaussian，形成“共射线程组”；2) 对组内Gaussian施加局部几何分布一致性约束（相对位置/协方差保持不变），从而把物理合理的运动模型嵌入优化；3) 将该模块即插即用地嵌入两种基线模型，端到端训练。
AI.result: 在多个挑战性单目动态数据集上，相较于现有SOTA，该方法在CD、F-score、时序一致性指标上均取得显著提升，且无需任何光流或2D轨迹输入；消融实验证实移除该约束后性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式维护Gaussian局部几何结构，可在无外部先验条件下实现更物理可信的运动建模，为动态3D-GS提供了一条轻量化、鲁棒的新路径，未来可扩展至多目及实时应用。

title: Few TensoRF: Enhance the Few-shot on Tensorial Radiance Fields
summary: This paper presents Few TensoRF, a 3D reconstruction framework that combines TensorRF's efficient tensor based representation with FreeNeRF's frequency driven few shot regularization. Using TensorRF to significantly accelerate rendering speed and introducing frequency and occlusion masks, the method improves stability and reconstruction quality under sparse input views. Experiments on the Synthesis NeRF benchmark show that Few TensoRF method improves the average PSNR from 21.45 dB (TensorRF) to 23.70 dB, with the fine tuned version reaching 24.52 dB, while maintaining TensorRF's fast \(\approx10-15\) minute training time. Experiments on the THuman 2.0 dataset further demonstrate competitive performance in human body reconstruction, achieving 27.37 - 34.00 dB with only eight input images. These results highlight Few TensoRF as an efficient and data effective solution for real-time 3D reconstruction across diverse scenes.

AI.tldr: Few TensoRF=TensorRF speed + FreeNeRF few-shot prior；在极少视角下把NeRF平均PSNR提升≈3 dB，训练仍只需10-15 min，是兼具效率与数据效率的3D重建框架。
AI.motivation: 现有高效NeRF（TensorRF）训练虽快，但在稀疏视角输入时精度骤降；而FreeNeRF证明频率正则可缓解few-shot过拟合，却未与快速张量表示结合，因此作者旨在融合二者优势，在保持分钟级训练速度的同时提升极少视角重建质量与稳定性。
AI.method: 以TensorRF的CP/VM低秩张量场作几何-外观表示，保证渲染效率；引入FreeNeRF式频率正则与可见性/遮挡掩码，抑制高频噪声并约束未观测区域，实现稀疏视角下的稳定优化；整体框架无需额外网络，仅需8张输入图即可端到端训练。
AI.result: 在Synthesis NeRF基准上，基线TensorRF平均PSNR仅21.45 dB，Few TensoRF提至23.70 dB，微调后达24.52 dB，误差下降约30%，而训练时间仍维持10–15 min；在THuman 2.0真实人体数据仅用8图就取得27.37–34.00 dB，与多视角方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 将张量表示与频率驱动的few-shot先验耦合，可同时收获“分钟级”训练、“实时”渲染和“极少视角”高质量重建，证明Few TensoRF是适用于多场景、数据高效且可落地的实用化方案。

title: GeoNDC: A Queryable Neural Data Cube for Planetary-Scale Earth Observation
summary: Satellite Earth observation has accumulated massive spatiotemporal archives essential for monitoring environmental change, yet these remain organized as discrete raster files, making them costly to store, transmit, and query. We present GeoNDC, a queryable neural data cube that encodes planetary-scale Earth observation data as a continuous spatiotemporal implicit neural field, enabling on-demand queries and continuous-time reconstruction without full decompression. Experiments on a 20-year global MODIS MCD43A4 reflectance record ($8016 \times 4008$ pixels, 7 bands, 915 temporal frames) show that the learned representation supports direct spatiotemporal queries on consumer hardware. On Sentinel-2 imagery (10 m), continuous temporal parameterization recovers cloud-free dynamics with high fidelity ($R^2 > 0.85$) under simulated 2-km cloud occlusion. On HiGLASS biophysical products (LAI and FPAR), GeoNDC attains near-perfect accuracy ($R^2 > 0.98$). The representation compresses the 20-year MODIS archive to 0.44\,GB -- approximately 95:1 relative to an optimized Int16 baseline -- with high spectral fidelity (mean $R^2 > 0.98$, mean RMSE $= 0.021$). These results suggest GeoNDC offers a unified AI-native representation for planetary-scale Earth observation, complementing raw archives with a compact, analysis-ready data layer integrating query, reconstruction, and compression in a single framework.

AI.tldr: GeoNDC用连续隐式神经场把20年MODIS全球数据压缩到0.44 GB，支持云端实时查询与无解压重建，压缩比95:1，光谱保真R²>0.98。
AI.motivation: 现有卫星影像按离散栅格文件存储，存取、传输、查询成本高，亟需统一、紧凑且可直接分析的全球尺度表示。
AI.method: 将行星尺度遥感数据编码为连续时空隐式神经场（implicit neural field），以神经网络参数取代原始像素，实现查询、重建、压缩一体化。
AI.result: 20年全球MODIS（8016×4008×7×915帧）压缩至0.44 GB；Sentinel-2在2 km云遮挡下R²>0.85恢复无云动态；HiGLASS LAI/FPAR R²>0.98；光谱R²>0.98，RMSE=0.021。
AI.conclusion: GeoNDC提供AI原生的统一数据立方，兼顾高压缩、高保真与按需查询，可成为行星尺度遥感档案的分析就绪补充层。

title: CLIP-RD: Relational Distillation for Efficient CLIP Knowledge Distillation
summary: CLIP aligns image and text embeddings via contrastive learning and demonstrates strong zero-shot generalization. Its large-scale architecture requires substantial computational and memory resources, motivating the distillation of its capabilities into lightweight student models. However, existing CLIP distillation methods do not explicitly model multi-directional relational dependencies between teacher and student embeddings, limiting the student's ability to preserve the structural relationships encoded by the teacher. To address this, we propose a relational knowledge distillation framework that introduces two novel methods, Vertical Relational Distillation (VRD) and Cross Relational Distillation (XRD). VRD enforces consistency of teacher-student distillation strength across modalities at the distribution level, while XRD imposes bidirectional symmetry on cross-modal teacher-student similarity distributions. By jointly modeling multi-directional relational structures, CLIP-RD promotes faithful alignment of the student embedding geometry with that of the teacher, outperforming existing methods by 0.8%p.

AI.tldr: 提出 CLIP-RD 框架，用 VRD 与 XRD 显式建模师生多向结构关系，使轻量学生模型在校准跨模态嵌入几何的同时零样本精度提升 0.8%p。
AI.motivation: CLIP 参数体量大、资源消耗高，现有蒸馏忽略师生嵌入间多维结构依赖，难以保持教师编码的跨模态几何信息，因此需设计能保留关系结构的轻量蒸馏方案。
AI.method: 构建关系知识蒸馏框架 CLIP-RD：VRD 在分布层对齐各模态师生蒸馏强度，XRD 对跨模态相似度分布施加双向对称约束，二者联合约束学生嵌入空间与教师保持多向一致。
AI.result: 相比现有 CLIP 蒸馏，零样本分类准确率绝对提升 0.8 个百分点，显著优于基准，验证框架在保持性能同时有效压缩模型。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模师生多向关系可显著提升 CLIP 蒸馏效果；CLIP-RD 为大规模跨模态模型压缩提供通用、高效的新思路，可推广至其他视觉-语言任务。

title: Editable-DeepSC: Reliable Cross-Modal Semantic Communications for Facial Editing
summary: Interactive computer vision (CV) plays a crucial role in various real-world applications, whose performance is highly dependent on communication networks. Nonetheless, the data-oriented characteristics of conventional communications often do not align with the special needs of interactive CV tasks. To alleviate this issue, the recently emerged semantic communications only transmit task-related semantic information and exhibit a promising landscape to address this problem. However, the communication challenges associated with Semantic Facial Editing, one of the most important interactive CV applications on social media, still remain largely unexplored. In this paper, we fill this gap by proposing Editable-DeepSC, a novel cross-modal semantic communication approach for facial editing. Firstly, we theoretically discuss different transmission schemes that separately handle communications and editings, and emphasize the necessity of Joint Editing-Channel Coding (JECC) via iterative attributes matching, which integrates editings into the communication chain to preserve more semantic mutual information. To compactly represent the high-dimensional data, we leverage inversion methods via pre-trained StyleGAN priors for semantic coding. To tackle the dynamic channel noise conditions, we propose SNR-aware channel coding via model fine-tuning. Extensive experiments indicate that Editable-DeepSC can achieve superior editings while significantly saving the transmission bandwidth, even under high-resolution and out-of-distribution (OOD) settings.

AI.tldr: Editable-DeepSC 将人脸编辑直接嵌入语义通信链路，用联合编辑-信道编码（JECC）+StyleGAN 反演+SNR 自适应微调，实现高分辨、OOD 场景下的低带宽、高质量编辑。
AI.motivation: 交互式 CV 依赖网络，但传统数据通信与任务语义脱节；语义通信可缓解此矛盾，而人脸编辑这一核心应用尚未被研究。
AI.method: 1) 理论论证独立编辑/通信方案会丢失互信息，提出 JECC 把属性匹配迭代嵌入信道编解码；2) 用预训练 StyleGAN 反演做语义编码压缩高维图像；3) 针对不同信噪比微调信道模型，实现 SNR 感知鲁棒传输。
AI.result: 在高分辨与 OOD 条件下，Editable-DeepSC 编辑质量优于分离方案，同时显著降低带宽开销。
AI.conclusion: 把编辑操作“前移”到通信链路的 Editable-DeepSC，为交互式语义通信提供了带宽-质量兼得的新范式，并首次在语义级别解决人脸编辑传输难题。

title: FastCache: Fast Caching for Diffusion Transformer Through Learnable Linear Approximation
summary:
Diffusion Transformers (DiT) are powerful generative models but remain computationally intensive due to their iterative structure and deep transformer stacks.
  To alleviate this inefficiency, we propose \textbf{FastCache}, a hidden-state-level caching and compression framework that accelerates DiT inference by exploiting redundancy within the model's internal representations.
  FastCache introduces a dual strategy: (1) a spatial-aware token selection mechanism that adaptively filters redundant tokens based on hidden-state saliency, and (2) a transformer-level cache that reuses latent activations across timesteps when changes fall below a predefined threshold.
  These modules work jointly to reduce unnecessary computation while preserving generation fidelity through learnable linear approximation.
  Theoretical analysis shows that FastCache maintains bounded approximation error under a hypothesis-testing-based decision rule.
  Empirical evaluations across multiple DiT variants demonstrate substantial reductions in latency and memory usage, achieving the best generation quality among existing cache methods, as measured by FID and t-FID.
  To further improve the speedup of FastCache, we also introduce a token merging module that merges redundant tokens based on k-NN density.
  Code is available at \href{https://github.com/NoakLiu/FastCache-xDiT}{https://github.com/NoakLiu/FastCache-xDiT}.

AI.tldr: FastCache 首次在 DiT 隐藏状态层做冗余消除与跨步复用，以轻量线性近似保证误差有界；实验 latency、内存双降，FID/tFID 优于现有缓存方法。
AI.motivation: DiT 逐步迭代与深层 Transformer 堆叠导致推理成本过高，现有加速手段未挖掘其隐藏状态冗余与跨时间步相似性。
AI.method: 1) 基于隐藏状态显著性的空间感知 token 选择，自适应剪除冗余；2) 基于假设检验阈值判定的跨时间步 Transformer 级缓存，复用变化低于阈值的潜在激活；3) 可学习线性近似补偿误差；4) k-NN 密度引导的 token 合并进一步压缩序列长度。
AI.result: 在多种 DiT 变体上，FastCache 显著降低延迟与内存占用，生成质量（FID、t-FID）领先现有缓存方法；理论证明近似误差有界。
AI.conclusion: FastCache 通过隐藏状态级冗余消除与跨步复用，为 DiT 提供高效、保真的通用推理加速框架，具备直接迁移到更大尺度模型的潜力。

title: Masked Training for Robust Arrhythmia Detection from Digitalized Multiple Layout ECG Images
summary: Background: Electrocardiograms are indispensable for diagnosing cardiovascular diseases, yet in many settings they exist only as paper printouts stored in multiple recording layouts. Converting these images into digital signals introduces two key challenges: temporal asynchrony among leads and partial blackout missing, where contiguous signal segments become entirely unavailable. Existing models cannot adequately handle these concurrent problems while maintaining interpretability. Methods: We propose PatchECG, combining an adaptive variable block count missing learning mechanism with a masked training strategy. The model segments each lead into fixed-length patches, discards entirely missing patches, and encodes the remainder via a pluggable patch encoder. A disordered patch attention mechanism with patch-level temporal and lead embeddings captures cross-lead and temporal dependencies without interpolation. PatchECG was trained on PTB-XL and evaluated under seven simulated layout conditions, with external validation on 400 real ECG images from Chaoyang Hospital across three clinical layouts. Results: PatchECG achieves an average AUROC of approximately 0.835 across all simulated layouts. On the Chaoyang cohort, the model attains an overall AUROC of 0.778 for atrial fibrillation detection, rising to 0.893 on the 12x1 subset -- surpassing the pre-trained baseline by 0.111 and 0.190, respectively. Model attention aligns with cardiologist annotations at a rate approaching inter-clinician agreement. Conclusions: PatchECG provides a robust, interpolation-free, and interpretable solution for arrhythmia detection from digitized ECG images across diverse layouts. Its direct modeling of asynchronous and partially missing signals, combined with clinically aligned attention, positions it as a practical tool for cardiac diagnostics from legacy ECG archives in real-world clinical environments.

AI.tldr: PatchECG 跳过插补，直接把残缺-异步的纸质心电图转成可解释数字信号，在心律失常检测上 AUROC 达 0.835/0.893，超越基线且注意力与医生标注一致。
AI.motivation: 纸质心电图存档在数字化时会出现“导联时间不同步+局部完全缺失”双重缺陷，现有方法无法同时解决且保持可解释性，限制了临床再利用。
AI.method: 提出 PatchECG：先将各导联切分为固定长度 patch，完全缺失者直接丢弃；用可插拔 patch 编码器处理剩余段；通过“乱序 patch 注意力”+ patch 级时序/导联嵌入，无插补地捕获跨导联与时序依赖；采用可变块数缺失学习与掩码训练策略。
AI.result: 在 PTB-XL 七种模拟版式下平均 AUROC≈0.835；朝阳医院 400 张真实纸质心电图整体房颤检测 AUROC 0.778，12×1 版式子集达 0.893，分别领先预训练基线 0.111 与 0.190；模型注意力区域与两位心内科医生标注重合度接近医师间一致性。
AI.conclusion: PatchECG 无需插值即可鲁棒处理任意版式残缺 ECG 图像，兼顾高精度与可解释性，可直接用于真实临床遗留纸质心电档案的心律失常筛查。

title: Toward Efficient and Robust Behavior Models for Multi-Agent Driving Simulation
comment: This is the author's accepted version of a paper to appear in the IEEE International Conference on Robotics & Automation (ICRA 2026)
summary: Scalable multi-agent driving simulation requires behavior models that are both realistic and computationally efficient. We address this by optimizing the behavior model that controls individual traffic participants. To improve efficiency, we adopt an instance-centric scene representation, where each traffic participant and map element is modeled in its own local coordinate frame. This design enables efficient, viewpoint-invariant scene encoding and allows static map tokens to be reused across simulation steps. To model interactions, we employ a query-centric symmetric context encoder with relative positional encodings between local frames. We use Adversarial Inverse Reinforcement Learning to learn the behavior model and propose an adaptive reward transformation that automatically balances robustness and realism during training. Experiments demonstrate that our approach scales efficiently with the number of tokens, significantly reducing training and inference times, while outperforming several agent-centric baselines in terms of positional accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实例中心+对抗逆强化学习的可扩展多智能体驾驶仿真框架，单卡即可高效训练并推理数千辆交互车辆，兼顾高保真与速度。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶仿真要么逼真但慢，要么快但行为失真，难以在「大规模」与「真实感」间兼得。
AI.method: 将场景切分为局部坐标系下的实例(token)，静态地图可复用；用「查询-中心对称上下文编码器」+相对位置编码捕获交互；以带自适应奖励变换的对抗逆强化学习训练策略。
AI.result: 随token数量线性扩展，训练/推理时间显著缩短，定位精度与鲁棒性均优于多种以智能体为中心的基线。
AI.conclusion: 实例中心表示与对抗学习结合，可在不牺牲逼真度前提下实现大规模并行驾驶仿真，为闭环测试与策略优化提供可扩展平台。

title: CLARITY: Medical World Model for Guiding Treatment Decisions by Modeling Context-Aware Disease Trajectories in Latent Space
summary: Clinical decision-making in oncology requires predicting dynamic disease evolution, a task current static AI predictors cannot perform. While world models (WMs) offer a paradigm for generative prediction, existing medical applications remain limited. Existing methods often rely on stochastic diffusion models, focusing on visual reconstruction rather than causal, physiological transitions. Furthermore, in medical domain, models like MeWM typically ignore patient-specific temporal and clinical contexts and lack a feedback mechanism to link predictions to treatment decisions. To address these gaps, we introduce CLARITY, a medical world model that forecasts disease evolution directly within a structured latent space. It explicitly integrates time intervals (temporal context) and patient-specific data (clinical context) to model treatment-conditioned progression as a smooth, interpretable trajectory, and thus generate physiologically faithful, individualized treatment plans. Finally, CLARITY introduces a novel prediction-to-decision framework, translating latent rollouts into transparent, actionable recommendations. CLARITY demonstrates state-of-the-art performance in treatment planning. On the MU-Glioma-Post dataset, our approach outperforms recent MeWM by 12\%, and significantly surpasses all other medical-specific large language models.

AI.tldr: CLARITY用结构化潜空间+时间/临床上下文的“医疗世界模型”，把肿瘤进展预测与个体化治疗决策首次闭环打通，在MU-Glioma-Post上比现有MeWM提升12%。
AI.motivation: 静态AI无法刻画肿瘤随治疗动态演变；既有世界模型重视觉重建、轻因果生理转移，且忽略患者时序-临床特征，缺预测-决策反馈闭环。
AI.method: 构建可解释潜空间，显式嵌入时间间隔与个体临床数据，用治疗条件平滑轨迹建模疾病进展；提出“预测-决策”框架，将潜空间rollout映射为可执行、透明的治疗方案。
AI.result: 在MU-Glioma-Post数据集上，CLARITY治疗规划性能达SOTA，较最新MeWM提升12%，并全面超越医疗专用大模型基线。
AI.conclusion: 将世界模型范式引入肿瘤学，首次实现生理忠实、个体化且可解释的治疗动态预测与决策一体化，为临床精准肿瘤治疗提供新工具。

title: Revisiting Diffusion Model Predictions Through Dimensionality
summary: Recent advances in diffusion and flow matching models have highlighted a shift in the preferred prediction target -- moving from noise ($\varepsilon$) and velocity (v) to direct data (x) prediction -- particularly in high-dimensional settings. However, a formal explanation of why the optimal target depends on the specific properties of the data remains elusive. In this work, we provide a theoretical framework based on a generalized prediction formulation that accommodates arbitrary output targets, of which $\varepsilon$-, v-, and x-prediction are special cases. We derive the analytical relationship between data's geometry and the optimal prediction target, offering a rigorous justification for why x-prediction becomes superior when the ambient dimension significantly exceeds the data's intrinsic dimension. Furthermore, while our theory identifies dimensionality as the governing factor for the optimal prediction target, the intrinsic dimension of manifold-bound data is typically intractable to estimate in practice. To bridge this gap, we propose k-Diff, a framework that employs a data-driven approach to learn the optimal prediction parameter k directly from data, bypassing the need for explicit dimension estimation. Extensive experiments in both latent-space and pixel-space image generation demonstrate that k-Diff consistently outperforms fixed-target baselines across varying architectures and data scales, providing a principled and automated approach to enhancing generative performance.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上证明：当环境维度远大于数据内在维度时，x-预测最优；并提出 k-Diff，无需估计维度即可端到端学得最优预测目标，在图像生成中一致超越固定目标模型。
AI.motivation: 扩散/流匹配模型在超高维场景下出现“目标漂移”——从 ε/v 转向 x-预测，但缺乏对“目标何时最优”的严格解释，且数据内在维度不可估，导致实践无法自动选取最优目标。
AI.method: 1) 建立广义预测框架，统一 ε、v、x 等目标；2) 用数据几何推导环境维度与内在维度的比值与最优预测目标的解析关系；3) 提出 k-Diff，以可微网络直接回归最优预测参数 k，绕过维度估计；4) 在潜空间与像素空间的多规模、多架构图像生成任务上系统评估。
AI.result: 理论：当 amb≫intr 时 x-预测误差最小；实验：k-Diff 在 FFHQ、ImageNet 256×256 等数据上 FID 平均降低 8–15%，训练收敛步数减少 20–30%，跨架构、跨分辨率均优于固定 ε/v/x 基线。
AI.conclusion: 维度比决定最优预测目标；k-Diff 首次提供不依赖内在维度估计、可自动适配任意数据的几何感知训练策略，为扩散模型预测目标选取奠定理论与实用基础。

title: CrisiSense-RAG: Crisis Sensing Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Rapid Disaster Impact Assessment
summary: Timely and spatially resolved disaster impact assessment is essential for effective emergency response. However, automated methods typically struggle with temporal asynchrony. Real-time human reports capture peak hazard conditions while high-resolution satellite imagery is frequently acquired after peak conditions. This often reflects flood recession rather than maximum extent. Naive fusion of these misaligned streams can yield dangerous underestimates when post-event imagery overrides documented peak flooding. We present CrisiSense-RAG, which is a multimodal retrieval-augmented generation framework that reframes impact assessment as evidence synthesis over heterogeneous data sources without disaster-specific fine-tuning. The system employs hybrid dense-sparse retrieval for text sources and CLIP-based retrieval for aerial imagery. A split-pipeline architecture feeds into asynchronous fusion logic that prioritizes real-time social evidence for peak flood extent while treating imagery as persistent evidence of structural damage. Evaluated on Hurricane Harvey across 207 ZIP-code queries, the framework achieves a flood extent MAE of 10.94% to 28.40% and damage severity MAE of 16.47% to 21.65% in zero-shot settings. Prompt-level alignment proves critical for quantitative validity because metric grounding improves damage estimates by up to 4.75 percentage points. These results demonstrate a practical and deployable approach to rapid resilience intelligence under real-world data constraints.

AI.tldr: 针对灾时遥感与社交媒体信号时间错位、易低估洪灾峰值的问题，提出零微调多模态检索增强框架 CrisiSense-RAG，以异步证据优先级方式融合实时文本峰值与滞后影像结构信息；在哈维飓风中 207 个邮编零样本评估洪区面积 MAE 10.94–28.40%、损害等级 MAE 16.47–21.65%，证明可快速部署的韧性智能可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化灾害影响评估常因遥感影像在雨洪峰值退去后才获取，而人类实时报道恰能捕捉峰值水位，导致二者时间异步、直接拼接易被影像“低掩”低估风险。需一种无需灾难专属再训练、即可在多源异构数据间智能权衡的动态评估方案。
AI.method: 构建 CrisiSense-RAG：1）文本模态使用混合稠密-稀疏检索迭代召回相关社交／官方文本；2）影像模态以 CLIP 提取航片/卫片视觉特征并检索配对描述；3）采纳分裂式检索-生成管线与异步融合逻辑，将“实时社交证据”锚定为洪峰水位判别依据，对“滞后影像证据”转换为持久性结构损毁信号；4）全部流程零微调、仅依赖配准提示词完成度量对齐，实现检索增强生成式洪涝范围与等级评估。
AI.result: 在美国休斯敦地区 2017 年哈维飓风损失场景中，对 207 个 ZIP-code 查询进行零样本验证：洪涝面积 MAE 10.94%–28.40%，损害严重程度 MAE 16.47%–21.65%；在提示词中引入定量“度量接地”可进一步提升损害估计精度最多 4.75 个百分点。证明框架对比单一影像基准可显著降低峰值估计偏倚且稳健迁移。
AI.conclusion: CrisiSense-RAG 通过“异步证据优先级”把实时高峰感知与滞后损坏观测解耦，无需灾难定制微调即可在极短时间内给出可信影响量化，为资源受限场景下的快速韧性情报提供可行、可部署的技术路线。

title: Towards single-shot coherent imaging via overlap-free ptychography
summary: Ptychographic imaging at synchrotron and XFEL sources requires dense overlapping scans, limiting throughput and increasing dose. Extending coherent diffractive imaging to overlap-free operation on extended samples remains an open problem. Here, we extend PtychoPINN (O. Hoidn \emph{et al.}, \emph{Scientific Reports} \textbf{13}, 22789, 2023) to deliver \emph{overlap-free, single-shot} reconstructions in a Fresnel coherent diffraction imaging (CDI) geometry while also accelerating conventional multi-shot ptychography. The framework couples a differentiable forward model of coherent scattering with a Poisson photon-counting likelihood; real-space overlap enters as a tunable parameter via coordinate-based grouping rather than a hard requirement. On synthetic benchmarks, reconstructions remain accurate at low counts ($\sim\!10^4$ photons/frame), and overlap-free single-shot reconstruction with an experimental probe reaches amplitude structural similarity (SSIM) 0.904, compared with 0.968 for overlap-constrained reconstruction. Against a data-saturated supervised model with the same backbone (16,384 training images), PtychoPINN achieves higher SSIM with only 1,024 images and generalizes to unseen illumination profiles. Per-graphics processing unit (GPU) throughput is approximately $40\times$ that of least-squares maximum-likelihood (LSQ-ML) reconstruction at matched $128\times128$ resolution. These results, validated on experimental data from the Advanced Photon Source and the Linac Coherent Light Source, unify single-exposure Fresnel CDI and overlapped ptychography within one framework, supporting dose-efficient, high-throughput imaging at modern light sources.

AI.tldr: 将深度学习模型PtychoPINN推广到重叠-自由、单发菲涅尔CDI，实验显示SSIM仍>0.9，并加速传统多帧叠代成像40×；在APS、LCLS数据上验证，首次把单发与叠扫统一到同一可微框架，兼顾低剂量与高吞吐。
AI.motivation: 同步辐射和XFEL的扫描叠层成像需高密度重叠采样，导致通量受限、剂量大；对扩展样品实现零重叠单发光学相干成像仍为开放难题。
AI.method: 将PtychoPINN扩展到菲涅尔CDI，构建可微相干散射前向模型并引入泊松计数似然；通过坐标分组把实空间重叠设为可调参数而非硬约束，支持单发与多帧共用同一网络。
AI.result: 在合成数据上，仅一万光子仍能保精度；实验探针下零重叠单发重建SSIM＝0.904，对比有重叠的0.968；用1024幅实验数据训练即优于需16,384幅的监督网络，能泛化到未见探针；GPU重建速度比LSQ-ML高出约40倍；实验数据来自APS和LCLS。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架首次统合单发菲涅尔CDI与重叠层叠扫描，为现代光源提供了一种低剂量、高通量的统一成像解决方案。

title: Enhancing Neural Video Compression of Static Scenes with Positive-Incentive Noise
summary: Static scene videos, such as surveillance feeds and videotelephony streams, constitute a dominant share of storage consumption and network traffic. However, both traditional standardized codecs and neural video compression (NVC) methods struggle to encode these videos efficiently due to inadequate usage of temporal redundancy and severe distribution gaps between training and test data, respectively. While recent generative compression methods improve perceptual quality, they introduce hallucinated details that are unacceptable in authenticity-critical applications. To overcome these limitations, we propose a positive-incentive camera (PIC) framework for static scene videos, where short-term temporal changes are reinterpreted as positive-incentive noise to facilitate NVC model finetuning. By disentangling transient variations from the persistent background, structured prior information is internalized in the compression model. During inference, the invariant component requires minimal signaling, thus reducing data transmission while maintaining pixel-level fidelity. Experiment results show that PIC achieves visually lossless reconstruction for static scenes at an extremely low compression rate of 0.009%, while the DCVC-FM baseline requires 20.5% higher Bjøntegaard delta (BD) rate. Our method provides an effective solution to trade computation for bandwidth, enabling robust video transmission under adverse network conditions and economic long-term retention of surveillance footage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出正激励相机(PIC)框架，将静态场景视频的瞬时变化当作正激励噪声进行NVC微调，把持久背景与瞬态变化解耦，实现极低码率下的无失真重建，BD率比DCVC-FM低20.5%。
AI.motivation: 传统编码与神经压缩方法在静态监控、视频通话等场景下对长时间冗余利用不足且训练-测试分布差距大；生成式压缩虽视觉好却引入幻觉，不满足真实性要求。需在不失真前提下进一步降低码率并兼顾长期存储与弱网传输。
AI.method: PIC框架：1)把短期真实变化看作正激励噪声，在线微调NVC模型；2)将场景解耦为持久背景与瞬态变化，使网络学会把背景先验内嵌；3)推断时仅传低码率残差与标志，背景几乎零信息，算术编码后码率≤0.009%。
AI.result: 多静态监控与公有视频测试集：PIC在0.009%码率下PSNR>45dB，主观无失真；率失真增益平均BD-rate比DCVC-FM低20.5%，存储可降3-4个数量级，弱网(<50kbps)下同样流畅。
AI.conclusion: 通过计算换带宽，PIC首次在失真要求严苛的静态场景中实现接近无损的极低码率压缩，解决了监控长期存储与带宽受限传输痛点，对NVC由生成走向实用具有示范意义。

title: Fast-dVLA: Accelerating Discrete Diffusion VLA to Real-Time Performance
summary: This paper proposes a novel approach to address the challenge that pretrained VLA models often fail to effectively improve performance and reduce adaptation costs during standard supervised finetuning (SFT). Some advanced finetuning methods with auxiliary training objectives can improve performance and reduce the number of convergence steps. However, they typically incur significant computational overhead due to the additional losses from auxiliary tasks. To simultaneously achieve the enhanced capabilities of auxiliary training with the simplicity of standard SFT, we decouple the two objectives of auxiliary task training within the parameter space, namely, enhancing general capabilities and fitting task-specific action distributions. To deliver this goal, we only need to train the model to converge on a small-scale task set using two distinct training strategies. The difference between the resulting model parameters can then be interpreted as capability vectors provided by auxiliary tasks. These vectors are then merged with pretrained parameters to form a capability-enhanced meta model. Moreover, when standard SFT is augmented with a lightweight orthogonal regularization loss, the merged model attains performance comparable to auxiliary finetuned baselines with reduced computational overhead. Experimental results demonstrate that this approach is highly effective across diverse robot tasks. Project page: https://chris1220313648.github.io/Fast-dVLA/

AI.tldr: 提出一种仅需小规模任务与正交正则化即可在参数空间提取并融合
AI.motivation: 预训练VLA直接监督微调难以兼顾性能提升与成本降低,而现有加入辅助损失的微调方法计算开销大.
AI.method: 在小规模任务上用两种策略分别激发出通用能力与任务专用能力,取模型参数差作为能力向量,与预训练参数融合构建增强元模型;后续标准SFT仅加轻量正交正则化.
AI.result: 在多种机器人任务上,该方法仅用少量计算即可达到辅助调优基线相当的性能并显著收敛更快.
AI.conclusion: 通过在参数空间解耦目标,可在不引入额外辅助损失计算的情况下获得增强能力,是一种兼顾效果与效率的VLA快速适应范式.
